## Remediation Tracking

| Gap ID | Framework | Control | аёҘаёіаё”аёұаёҡ | Owner | Deadline | аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё° |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|:---|:---:|:---:|
| GAP-001 | ISO 27001 | A.12.4 | рҹ”ҙ | [аёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ] | [аё§аёұаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳ] | вҳҗ |
| GAP-002 | NIST CSF | DE.CM | рҹҹЎ | [аёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ] | [аё§аёұаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳ] | вҳҗ |
| GAP-003 | PDPA | Art.37 | рҹ”ҙ | [аёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ] | [аё§аёұаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳ] | вҳҗ |

## KPIs аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ Compliance

| аё•аёұаё§аёҠаёөа№үаё§аёұаё” | а№Җаёӣа№үаёІаё«аёЎаёІаёў | аёӣаёұаёҲаёҲаёёаёҡаёұаёҷ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| % Controls Implemented | вүҘ 90% | [XX]% |
| Critical Gaps Outstanding | 0 | [XX] |
| Time to Remediate (Critical) | вүӨ 30 аё§аёұаёҷ | [XX] аё§аёұаёҷ |
| Compliance Score (аёЈаё§аёЎ) | вүҘ 85% | [XX]% |

## Gap Remediation Tracking

### Remediation Priority Matrix

| Gap Category | Impact | Effort | Priority |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Missing controls | аёӘаё№аёҮ | аёӘаё№аёҮ | P1 - аё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө |
| Incomplete policies | аёӘаё№аёҮ | аё•а№Ҳаёі | P1 - Quick win |
| Outdated procedures | аёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ | аё•а№Ҳаёі | P2 - аёӣаёЈаёұаёҡаёӣаёЈаёёаёҮ |
| Documentation gaps | аё•а№Ҳаёі | аё•а№Ҳаёі | P3 - аёҲаёұаё”аё—аёі |
| Training deficiencies | аёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ | аёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ | P2 - аё§аёІаёҮа№Ғаёңаёҷ |

### Gap Assessment Checklist

| Control Area | ISO 27001 | NIST CSF | PCI DSS | аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё° |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Risk Assessment | A.6 | ID.RA | 12.2 | вң…/вҡ пёҸ/вқҢ |
| Access Control | A.9 | PR.AC | 7,8 | вң…/вҡ пёҸ/вқҢ |
| Incident Response | A.16 | RS | 12.10 | вң…/вҡ пёҸ/вқҢ |
| Logging & Monitoring | A.12 | DE | 10 | вң…/вҡ пёҸ/вқҢ |
| Data Protection | A.8 | PR.DS | 3,4 | вң…/вҡ пёҸ/вқҢ |

### Quarterly Gap Review Cadence

| Activity | Timeline | Owner |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Scan for new requirements | Week 1 | Compliance Officer |
| Update gap register | Week 2 | Security Team |
| Risk re-assessment | Week 3 | CISO |
| Remediation planning | Week 4 | All |

### Gap Severity Criteria

| Severity | Definition | SLA |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Critical | Active non-compliance | 30 days |
| High | Significant gap | 60 days |
| Medium | Partial compliance | 90 days |
| Low | Documentation gap | 180 days |

### Gap Status Legend

| Icon | Meaning |
|:---|:---|
| вң… | Compliant |
| вҡ пёҸ | Partial |
| вқҢ | Non-compliant |

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ

-   [Compliance Mapping](Compliance_Mapping.th.md) вҖ” ISO 27001 / NIST CSF / PCI DSS
-   [PDPA Incident Response](PDPA_Incident_Response.th.md) вҖ” а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ 72 аёҠаёЎ.
-   [SOC Maturity Assessment](../06_Operations_Management/SOC_Maturity_Assessment.th.md) вҖ” аёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷ SOC
-   [Vulnerability Management](../06_Operations_Management/Vulnerability_Management.th.md) вҖ” аёҒаёІаёЈаёӘа№ҒаёҒаёҷа№ҒаёҘаё°а№ҒаёҒа№үа№„аёӮ

## File: 07_Compliance_Privacy/Compliance_Mapping.en.md
# Compliance Mapping вҖ” SOC Playbooks Г— Frameworks

> **Document ID:** COMP-MAP-001
> **Version:** 1.0
> **Last Updated:** 2026-02-15
> **Owner:** SOC Manager / Compliance Officer

---

## Purpose

This document maps all **53 SOC Playbooks**, **54 Sigma Detection Rules**, and key SOC operational controls to major compliance frameworks:

- **ISO/IEC 27001:2022** вҖ” Information Security Management System
- **NIST Cybersecurity Framework (CSF) 2.0** вҖ” Identify, Protect, Detect, Respond, Recover
- **PCI DSS v4.0** вҖ” Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard
- **NIST AI RMF 1.0** вҖ” Govern, Map, Measure, Manage for AI / GenAI systems

Use this mapping for **audit preparation**, **gap analysis**, and **demonstrating SOC coverage** to auditors and regulators.

```mermaid
graph TD
    Frameworks["Framework Mapping"] --> Ops["SOC Operations"]
    Frameworks --> IR["IR Playbooks"]
    Frameworks --> AI["AI / GenAI Controls"]
    Ops --> Evidence["Audit Evidence"]
    IR --> Evidence
    AI --> Evidence
    style Frameworks fill:#1d4ed8,color:#fff
    style Ops fill:#0f766e,color:#fff
    style IR fill:#b45309,color:#fff
    style AI fill:#7c3aed,color:#fff
    style Evidence fill:#dc2626,color:#fff
```

## Who Should Use This Document

| Role | Primary use | Output |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **CISO** | Validate risk coverage and investment gaps | Risk acceptance and escalation criteria |
| **SOC Manager** | Confirm workflow coverage and audit readiness | Scope, RACI, KPI and review cadence |
| **SOC Analyst** | Understand which framework requirement an alert or playbook supports | Better triage notes and evidence capture |
| **Security Engineer** | Tie controls and telemetry to compliance expectations | Logging and control implementation backlog |
| **IR Engineer** | Connect incidents to response, rollback, and notification obligations | Incident workflow and evidence preservation checklist |

---

## Playbook вҶ’ Framework Mapping

### PB-01 to PB-10 (Core Playbooks)

| Playbook | ISO 27001:2022 | NIST CSF 2.0 | PCI DSS v4.0 |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **PB-01** Phishing | A.5.23 (Information security for cloud), A.8.7 (Malware protection) | DE.AE-2, DE.AE-3, RS.AN-1, RS.MI-1 | 5.3, 12.10.5 |
| **PB-02** Ransomware | A.8.7 (Malware protection), A.8.13 (Information backup), A.8.14 (Redundancy) | DE.AE-3, RS.MI-1, RS.MI-2, RC.RP-1 | 5.2, 5.3, 12.10.5 |
| **PB-03** Malware Infection | A.8.7 (Malware protection), A.8.23 (Web filtering) | DE.CM-4, DE.AE-3, RS.MI-1 | 5.2, 5.3, 11.5.1 |
| **PB-04** Brute Force | A.8.5 (Secure authentication), A.5.17 (Authentication info) | DE.CM-1, DE.AE-2, PR.AC-7 | 8.2.4, 8.3.4, 10.7 |
| **PB-05** Account Compromise | A.5.16 (Identity management), A.8.5 (Secure authentication) | DE.AE-3, RS.AN-1, PR.AC-1 | 8.2, 8.3, 10.6.1 |
| **PB-06** Impossible Travel | A.8.5 (Secure authentication), A.8.15 (Logging) | DE.AE-2, DE.AE-5, RS.AN-1 | 10.6.1, 10.7 |
| **PB-07** Privilege Escalation | A.8.2 (Privileged access rights), A.8.18 (Use of privileged utility) | DE.CM-3, DE.AE-3, PR.AC-4 | 7.1, 7.2, 10.2.1 |
| **PB-08** Data Exfiltration | A.8.12 (Data leakage prevention), A.8.10 (Information deletion) | DE.AE-3, DE.CM-7, RS.MI-1 | 3.4, 10.6.1, 12.10.5 |
| **PB-09** DDoS Attack | A.8.20 (Network security), A.8.22 (Segregation of networks) | DE.AE-1, RS.MI-1, RS.MI-2 | 11.5.1, 12.10.5 |
| **PB-10** Web App Attack | A.8.26 (Application security requirements), A.8.28 (Secure coding) | DE.CM-6, DE.AE-3, RS.MI-1 | 6.2, 6.4, 11.5.1 |

### PB-11 to PB-20 (Advanced Playbooks)

| Playbook | ISO 27001:2022 | NIST CSF 2.0 | PCI DSS v4.0 |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **PB-11** Suspicious Script | A.8.7 (Malware protection), A.8.19 (Installation of software) | DE.CM-4, DE.AE-3, RS.AN-1 | 5.3, 11.5.1 |
| **PB-12** Lateral Movement | A.8.22 (Segregation of networks), A.8.20 (Network security) | DE.CM-1, DE.CM-7, RS.MI-1 | 1.3, 11.4, 11.5.1 |
| **PB-13** C2 Communication | A.8.20 (Network security), A.8.23 (Web filtering) | DE.CM-1, DE.AE-2, RS.AN-1 | 1.3, 10.6.1, 11.5.1 |
| **PB-14** Insider Threat | A.5.9 (Inventory of information), A.6.1 (Screening) | DE.CM-3, DE.AE-5, RS.AN-1 | 7.1, 7.2, 10.2.1 |
| **PB-15** Rogue Admin | A.8.2 (Privileged access rights), A.5.18 (Access rights) | DE.CM-3, DE.AE-3, PR.AC-4 | 7.1, 7.2, 10.2.1 |
| **PB-16** Cloud IAM Anomaly | A.5.23 (Cloud services), A.8.2 (Privileged access rights) | DE.AE-2, DE.CM-3, PR.AC-4 | 7.1, 8.3, 10.6.1 |
| **PB-17** Business Email Compromise | A.5.14 (Information transfer), A.8.7 (Malware protection) | DE.AE-3, RS.AN-1, RS.MI-1 | 5.3, 12.10.5 |
| **PB-18** Exploit | A.8.8 (Technical vulnerability management), A.8.28 (Secure coding) | DE.CM-8, DE.AE-3, RS.MI-1 | 6.3.3, 11.3, 11.5.1 |
| **PB-19** Lost/Stolen Device | A.7.9 (Security of assets off-premises), A.8.1 (User endpoint devices) | RS.MI-1, RS.AN-1, PR.DS-3 | 9.4, 9.5, 12.10.5 |
| **PB-20** Log Clearing | A.8.15 (Logging), A.8.17 (Clock synchronization) | DE.CM-3, DE.AE-5, PR.PT-1 | 10.3, 10.5, 10.7 |

### PB-21 to PB-25 (New Playbooks)

| Playbook | ISO 27001:2022 | NIST CSF 2.0 | PCI DSS v4.0 |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **PB-21** Supply Chain Attack | A.5.21 (ICT supply chain), A.5.22 (Supplier monitoring) | ID.SC-1, ID.SC-2, DE.CM-6, RS.MI-1 | 6.3.2, 12.8, 12.9 |
| **PB-22** API Abuse | A.8.26 (Application security), A.8.25 (Secure development lifecycle) | DE.CM-6, DE.AE-2, PR.AC-7 | 6.2, 6.4, 11.5.1 |
| **PB-23** Cryptomining | A.8.7 (Malware protection), A.8.20 (Network security) | DE.CM-4, DE.AE-3, RS.MI-1 | 5.2, 5.3, 11.5.1 |
| **PB-24** DNS Tunneling | A.8.20 (Network security), A.8.23 (Web filtering) | DE.CM-1, DE.AE-2, RS.MI-1 | 1.3, 10.6.1, 11.5.1 |
| **PB-25** Zero-Day Exploit | A.8.8 (Vulnerability management), A.5.7 (Threat intelligence) | DE.CM-8, RS.AN-5, RS.MI-1 | 6.3.3, 11.3, 12.10.5 |

### PB-26 to PB-30 (Coverage Expansion)

| Playbook | ISO 27001:2022 | NIST CSF 2.0 | PCI DSS v4.0 |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **PB-26** MFA Bypass / Token Theft | A.8.5 (Secure authentication), A.5.17 (Authentication info) | DE.AE-2, DE.CM-3, PR.AC-7 | 8.3, 8.4, 8.5 |
| **PB-27** Cloud Storage Exposure | A.5.23 (Cloud services), A.8.10 (Information deletion) | DE.CM-7, RS.MI-1, PR.DS-1 | 3.4, 3.5, 10.6.1 |
| **PB-28** Mobile Device Compromise | A.8.1 (User endpoint devices), A.7.9 (Off-premises assets) | DE.CM-4, RS.MI-1, PR.AC-3 | 9.4, 9.5, 12.3 |
| **PB-29** Shadow IT | A.5.23 (Cloud services), A.8.23 (Web filtering) | DE.CM-7, ID.AM-2, PR.AC-4 | 6.4, 12.8, 12.10.5 |
| **PB-30** OT/ICS Incident | A.8.20 (Network security), A.8.22 (Network segregation) | DE.CM-1, RS.RP-1, PR.AC-5 | 1.3, 11.4, 11.5.1 |

---

## SOC Operational Controls Mapping

| SOC Control | ISO 27001:2022 | NIST CSF 2.0 | PCI DSS v4.0 |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **24/7 SOC Monitoring** | A.8.16 (Monitoring activities) | DE.CM-1, DE.CM-6, DE.CM-7 | 10.6.1, 10.6.3, 12.10 |
| **Incident Response Framework** | A.5.24 (IR planning), A.5.26 (Response to incidents) | RS.RP-1, RS.CO-1, RS.AN-1 | 12.10.1, 12.10.2 |
| **Severity Classification (P1вҖ“P4)** | A.5.25 (Assessment of incidents) | RS.AN-4, RS.CO-3 | 12.10.1, 12.10.4 |
| **Escalation Procedures** | A.5.26 (Response to incidents) | RS.CO-2, RS.CO-4, RS.RP-1 | 12.10.1, 12.10.6 |
| **Shift Handover Process** | A.5.37 (Documented operating procedures) | PR.IP-9, RS.CO-1 | 12.10.2 |
| **Detection Rules (Sigma)** | A.8.16 (Monitoring activities) | DE.CM-1, DE.DP-2, DE.DP-5 | 10.6.1, 11.5.1 |
| **MITRE ATT&CK Mapping** | A.5.7 (Threat intelligence) | ID.RA-2, DE.AE-1 | 12.10.5 |
| **Post-Incident Review** | A.5.27 (Learning from incidents) | RS.IM-1, RS.IM-2 | 12.10.6 |
| **Log Retention (вүҘ1 year)** | A.8.15 (Logging) | PR.PT-1, DE.CM-3 | 10.5, 10.7 |
| **Vulnerability Management** | A.8.8 (Technical vulnerability management) | DE.CM-8, ID.RA-1 | 6.3.3, 11.3 |
| **Access Control / IAM** | A.8.2, A.8.3, A.5.15 | PR.AC-1, PR.AC-4 | 7.1, 7.2, 8.2 |
| **Security Awareness Training** | A.6.3 (Information security awareness) | PR.AT-1, PR.AT-2 | 12.6.1, 12.6.2 |
| **Data Classification** | A.5.12 (Classification of information) | ID.AM-5, PR.DS-1 | 3.2, 3.4, 9.6 |
| **Backup & Recovery** | A.8.13 (Information backup) | PR.IP-4, RC.RP-1 | 12.10.1 |

---

## AI / GenAI Control Mapping

This section improves the existing compliance mapping instead of creating a separate AI governance report. Use it when production AI systems, LLM assistants, RAG pipelines, model registries, or AI plugins/tools are in scope.

| AI Risk Area | Practical question | NIST AI RMF | Existing SOC Content |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Prompt injection and unsafe tool use | Can untrusted content alter prompts or trigger high-impact tools? | Govern, Map, Measure, Manage | [PB-51 AI Prompt Injection](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/AI_Prompt_Injection.en.md), [API Abuse](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/API_Abuse.en.md) |
| Data poisoning and RAG corruption | Can model behavior change because of poisoned data, embeddings, or document collections? | Map, Measure, Manage | [PB-52 LLM Data Poisoning](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/LLM_Data_Poisoning.en.md), [SOC Use Case Library](../08_Detection_Engineering/SOC_Use_Case_Library.en.md) |
| Model theft and checkpoint exfiltration | Can users or insiders extract model weights, responses, or proprietary training data? | Govern, Measure, Manage | [PB-53 AI Model Theft](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/AI_Model_Theft.en.md), [Cloud Security Monitoring](../06_Operations_Management/Cloud_Security_Monitoring.en.md) |
| AI supply chain exposure | Can third-party models, datasets, packages, or plugins introduce risk? | Govern, Map, Manage | [PB-32 Supply Chain Attack](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Supply_Chain_Attack.en.md), [Third-Party Risk](../06_Operations_Management/Third_Party_Risk.en.md) |
| Privacy and regulated data use | Could prompts, outputs, or model context expose regulated or sensitive data? | Govern, Map, Manage | [PDPA Incident Response](PDPA_Incident_Response.en.md), [Data Governance Policy](Data_Governance_Policy.en.md) |

## Minimum Deliverables for AI Systems

Before treating an AI system as production-ready, maintain these artifacts:

- [ ] AI system inventory with business owner and technical owner
- [ ] Approved use case with out-of-scope actions
- [ ] Trust-boundary map for prompts, RAG, tools, plugins, and external content
- [ ] Logging standard for prompts, outputs, tool calls, model version, and data-source changes
- [ ] Detection mapping for prompt injection, poisoning, model theft, and supply chain abuse
- [ ] Rollback or disable procedure with named approver
- [ ] Legal, privacy, and executive escalation path

## First 30 Days Practical Rollout

| Timeframe | Objective | Output |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Week 1 | Inventory AI systems, endpoints, plugins, and external providers | AI asset register |
| Week 2 | Map trust boundaries and required telemetry | Trust-boundary diagram and logging standard |
| Week 3 | Connect priority AI risks to detections and playbooks | Detection backlog and triage checklist |
| Week 4 | Test rollback, evidence capture, and executive communication | Tabletop record and escalation decision tree |

## Minimum Audit Evidence Pack

| Evidence | Why It Matters | Owner |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Approved IR framework, severity matrix, and current playbook index | Proves incident handling structure exists and is maintained | SOC Manager |
| Detection inventory mapped to major use cases and ATT&CK techniques | Shows monitoring coverage and design rationale | Security Engineer |
| Sample incident tickets with timestamps, escalation trail, and closure notes | Demonstrates the process works in production | SOC Analyst |
| Log retention, access review, and monitoring health evidence | Supports control-operation claims during audit | Security Engineer |
| Lessons learned or corrective action records | Shows continuous improvement, not just documentation | IR Engineer |

## Escalation Triggers for Compliance Gaps

| Condition | Escalate To | SLA | Required Decision |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| Required control has no owner, no evidence, or no operating procedure | CISO + Compliance Officer | Same business day | Assign owner and remediation deadline |
| Audit or regulator request cannot be answered from current records | CISO | Immediate | Open remediation track and approve interim response |
| Critical monitoring blind spot affects a regulated system or data set | SOC Manager + Business owner | Within 24 hours | Accept risk temporarily or fund control fix |
| AI system handles regulated data without approved logging or rollback | CISO + Legal / DPO | Immediate | Pause go-live or formally accept risk |
| Control failure repeats across monthly or quarterly reviews | CISO + Executive sponsor | At next governance meeting | Escalate from local fix to management action |

## Framework Coverage Summary

### ISO 27001:2022 Coverage

| Annex A Domain | Controls Covered | Key Controls |
|:---|:---:|:---|
| A.5 Organizational | 12 / 37 | A.5.7, A.5.12, A.5.21, A.5.24вҖ“A.5.27 |
| A.6 People | 2 / 8 | A.6.1, A.6.3 |
| A.7 Physical | 1 / 14 | A.7.9 |
| A.8 Technological | 18 / 34 | A.8.2, A.8.5, A.8.7, A.8.8, A.8.12, A.8.15, A.8.16, A.8.20 |

### NIST CSF 2.0 Coverage

| Function | Categories Covered | SOC Coverage Level |
|:---|:---:|:---|
| **Identify (ID)** | ID.AM, ID.RA, ID.SC | рҹҹЎ Partial вҖ” asset inventory & supply chain |
| **Protect (PR)** | PR.AC, PR.AT, PR.DS, PR.IP, PR.PT | рҹҹЎ Partial вҖ” access control & training |
| **Detect (DE)** | DE.AE, DE.CM, DE.DP | рҹҹў Strong вҖ” 54 Sigma rules + monitoring |
| **Respond (RS)** | RS.RP, RS.CO, RS.AN, RS.MI, RS.IM | рҹҹў Strong вҖ” 53 playbooks + severity matrix |
| **Recover (RC)** | RC.RP, RC.IM, RC.CO | рҹҹЎ Partial вҖ” backup & communication |

### PCI DSS v4.0 Coverage

| Requirement | SOC Coverage |
|:---|:---|
| Req 1 вҖ” Network Security Controls | рҹҹў PB-12, PB-13, PB-24 |
| Req 3 вҖ” Protect Stored Account Data | рҹҹЎ PB-08, Data Classification |
| Req 5 вҖ” Malware Protection | рҹҹў PB-01, PB-02, PB-03, PB-23 |
| Req 6 вҖ” Secure Development | рҹҹў PB-10, PB-18, PB-21, PB-22, PB-25 |
| Req 7 вҖ” Restrict Access | рҹҹў PB-07, PB-14, PB-15, PB-16 |
| Req 8 вҖ” Identify Users | рҹҹў PB-04, PB-05, PB-06 |
| Req 9 вҖ” Physical Access | рҹҹЎ PB-19 |
| Req 10 вҖ” Log & Monitor | рҹҹў 54 Sigma rules + SOC monitoring |
| Req 11 вҖ” Test Security | рҹҹў Detection rules + simulation guide |
| Req 12 вҖ” Security Policies | рҹҹў IR framework + severity matrix |

---

## Audit Quick Reference

### For ISO 27001 Auditors

> "Show me your incident response procedures."
вҶ’ [IR Framework](../05_Incident_Response/Framework.en.md) + [Severity Matrix](../05_Incident_Response/Severity_Matrix.en.md) + any Playbook (PB-01 to PB-53)

> "Show me your monitoring and detection capabilities."
вҶ’ [Detection Rules Index](../08_Detection_Engineering/README.md) (54 Sigma rules) + [MITRE ATT&CK Heatmap](../tools/mitre_attack_heatmap.html)

> "Show me evidence of incident learning."
вҶ’ [Post-Incident Review section](../05_Incident_Response/Framework.en.md) in all playbooks

### For PCI DSS QSA

> "Requirement 10.6.1 вҖ” Daily log reviews?"
вҶ’ [SOC Metrics & KPIs](../06_Operations_Management/SOC_Metrics.en.md) + 24/7 monitoring procedures

> "Requirement 12.10.1 вҖ” Incident response plan?"
вҶ’ [IR Framework](../05_Incident_Response/Framework.en.md) + [Severity Matrix](../05_Incident_Response/Severity_Matrix.en.md)

> "Requirement 11.5.1 вҖ” Intrusion detection?"
вҶ’ [54 Sigma Detection Rules](../08_Detection_Engineering/README.md) with MITRE ATT&CK mapping

---

## File: 07_Compliance_Privacy/Compliance_Mapping.th.md
# Compliance Mapping вҖ” SOC Playbooks Г— Frameworks (аё аёІаё©аёІа№„аё—аёў)

> **аёЈаё«аёұаёӘа№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈ:** COMP-MAP-001
> **а№Җаё§аёӯаёЈа№ҢаёҠаёұаёҷ:** 1.0
> **аёӯаёұаёӣа№Җаё”аё•аёҘа№ҲаёІаёӘаёёаё”:** 2026-02-15
> **а№ҖаёҲа№үаёІаёӮаёӯаёҮ:** SOC Manager / Compliance Officer

---

## аё§аёұаё•аё–аёёаёӣаёЈаё°аёӘаёҮаё„а№Ң

а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаёҷаёөа№ү map **SOC Playbook 53 аёҠаёёаё”**, **Sigma Detection Rule 54 аёҒаёҺ** а№ҒаёҘаё° SOC Controls аё•а№ҲаёІаёҮа№Ҷ а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёҒаёұаёҡаёҒаёЈаёӯаёҡаёЎаёІаё•аёЈаёҗаёІаёҷаё«аёҘаёұаёҒ:

- **ISO/IEC 27001:2022** вҖ” аёЈаё°аёҡаёҡаёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЎаёұа№Ҳаёҷаё„аёҮаёӣаёҘаёӯаё”аё аёұаёўаёӘаёІаёЈаёӘаёҷа№Җаё—аёЁ
- **NIST Cybersecurity Framework (CSF) 2.0** вҖ” аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҡа№„аёӢа№ҖаёҡаёӯаёЈа№ҢаёӘаё«аёЈаёұаёҗаёҜ
- **PCI DSS v4.0** вҖ” аёЎаёІаё•аёЈаёҗаёІаёҷаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӣаёҘаёӯаё”аё аёұаёўаёӯаёёаё•аёӘаёІаё«аёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎаёҡаёұаё•аёЈаёҠаёіаёЈаё°а№ҖаёҮаёҙаёҷ
- **NIST AI RMF 1.0** вҖ” Govern, Map, Measure, Manage аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ AI / GenAI

а№ғаёҠа№үаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ **а№Җаё•аёЈаёөаёўаёЎ Audit**, **аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№ҢаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮаё§а№ҲаёІаёҮ** а№ҒаёҘаё° **а№ҒаёӘаё”аёҮаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ** аё•а№Ҳаёӯаёңаё№а№үаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ

```mermaid
graph TD
    Frameworks["Compliance Mapping"] --> Ops["SOC Operations"]
    Frameworks --> IR["IR Playbooks"]
    Frameworks --> AI["AI / GenAI Controls"]
    Ops --> Evidence["Audit Evidence"]
    IR --> Evidence
    AI --> Evidence
    style Frameworks fill:#1d4ed8,color:#fff
    style Ops fill:#0f766e,color:#fff
    style IR fill:#b45309,color:#fff
    style AI fill:#7c3aed,color:#fff
    style Evidence fill:#dc2626,color:#fff
```

## а№ғаё„аёЈаё„аё§аёЈа№ғаёҠа№үа№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаёҷаёөа№ү

| аёҡаё—аёҡаёІаё— | а№ғаёҠа№үаё—аёіаёӯаё°а№„аёЈа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷаё«аёҘаёұаёҒ | аёңаёҘаёҘаёұаёһаёҳа№Ңаё—аёөа№Ҳаё„аё§аёЈа№„аё”а№ү |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **CISO** | аё”аё№ coverage аёӮаёӯаёҮаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮа№ҒаёҘаё°аёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮаё§а№ҲаёІаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёҘаёҮаё—аёёаёҷ | risk acceptance а№ҒаёҘаё° escalation criteria |
| **SOC Manager** | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаё§а№ҲаёІаёЎаёө workflow а№ҒаёҘаё°аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ audit аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ | scope, RACI, KPI, review cadence |
| **SOC Analyst** | а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІа№ғаёҲаё§а№ҲаёІ alert аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ playbook аёЈаёӯаёҮаёЈаёұаёҡаёӮа№үаёӯаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё”а№ғаё” | triage note а№ҒаёҘаё° evidence capture аё—аёөа№Ҳаё”аёөаёӮаё¶а№үаёҷ |
| **Security Engineer** | аёңаё№аёҒ controls а№ҒаёҘаё° telemetry а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёҒаёұаёҡаёӮа№үаёӯаё„аёІаё”аё«аё§аёұаёҮаё”а№үаёІаёҷ compliance | backlog аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ logging а№ҒаёҘаё° controls |
| **IR Engineer** | а№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎ incident а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёҒаёұаёҡ response, rollback, а№ҒаёҘаё° notification obligation | incident workflow а№ҒаёҘаё° evidence checklist |

---

## Playbook вҶ’ Framework Mapping

|:---|:---|:---|:---|

| **PB-04** Brute Force | A.8.5 (аёҒаёІаёЈаёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаё•аёұаё§аё•аёҷ), A.5.17 | DE.CM-1, DE.AE-2, PR.AC-7 | 8.2.4, 8.3.4, 10.7 |
| **PB-05** аёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёөаё–аё№аёҒаёўаё¶аё”аё„аёЈаёӯаёҮ | A.5.16 (аёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёұаё§аё•аёҷ), A.8.5 | DE.AE-3, RS.AN-1, PR.AC-1 | 8.2, 8.3, 10.6.1 |

| **PB-08** аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёЈаёұа№Ҳаё§а№„аё«аёҘ | A.8.12 (аёӣа№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёұаёҷаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёЈаёұа№Ҳаё§), A.8.10 | DE.AE-3, DE.CM-7, RS.MI-1 | 3.4, 10.6.1, 12.10.5 |
| **PB-09** DDoS | A.8.20 (аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӣаёҘаёӯаё”аё аёұаёўа№Җаё„аёЈаё·аёӯаёӮа№ҲаёІаёў), A.8.22 | DE.AE-1, RS.MI-1, RS.MI-2 | 11.5.1, 12.10.5 |
| **PB-10** а№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөа№Җаё§а№Үаёҡ | A.8.26 (аёӮа№үаёӯаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё”а№Ғаёӯаёӣ), A.8.28 | DE.CM-6, DE.AE-3, RS.MI-1 | 6.2, 6.4, 11.5.1 |

### PB-11 аё–аё¶аёҮ PB-20 (Playbooks аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаёӘаё№аёҮ)

| **PB-15** Admin аёҠаёұа№Ҳаё§аёЈа№үаёІаёў | A.8.2 (аёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ң Privileged), A.5.18 | DE.CM-3, DE.AE-3, PR.AC-4 | 7.1, 7.2, 10.2.1 |
| **PB-16** Cloud IAM | A.5.23 (Cloud), A.8.2 | DE.AE-2, DE.CM-3, PR.AC-4 | 7.1, 8.3, 10.6.1 |

| **PB-19** аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңаё«аёІаёў | A.7.9 (аёӘаёҙаёҷаё—аёЈаёұаёһаёўа№ҢаёҷаёӯаёҒаёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳ), A.8.1 | RS.MI-1, RS.AN-1, PR.DS-3 | 9.4, 9.5, 12.10.5 |
| **PB-20** аёҘаёҡ Log | A.8.15 (аёҒаёІаёЈаёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒ Log), A.8.17 | DE.CM-3, DE.AE-5, PR.PT-1 | 10.3, 10.5, 10.7 |

### PB-21 аё–аё¶аёҮ PB-25 (Playbooks а№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ)

| Playbook | ISO 27001:2022 | NIST CSF 2.0 | PCI DSS v4.0 |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **PB-21** Supply Chain | A.5.21 (аё«а№Ҳаё§аёҮа№ӮаёӢа№Ҳаёӯаёёаёӣаё—аёІаёҷ ICT), A.5.22 | ID.SC-1, ID.SC-2, DE.CM-6, RS.MI-1 | 6.3.2, 12.8, 12.9 |
| **PB-22** API Abuse | A.8.26 (аёӮа№үаёӯаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё”а№Ғаёӯаёӣ), A.8.25 | DE.CM-6, DE.AE-2, PR.AC-7 | 6.2, 6.4, 11.5.1 |
| **PB-23** аёӮаёёаё”аё„аёЈаёҙаёӣа№Ӯаё• | A.8.7 (аёӣа№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёұаёҷаёЎаёұаёҘа№Ғаё§аёЈа№Ң), A.8.20 | DE.CM-4, DE.AE-3, RS.MI-1 | 5.2, 5.3, 11.5.1 |
| **PB-24** DNS Tunneling | A.8.20, A.8.23 (аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҮ Web) | DE.CM-1, DE.AE-2, RS.MI-1 | 1.3, 10.6.1, 11.5.1 |
| **PB-25** Zero-Day | A.8.8 (аёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Ӯаё«аё§а№Ҳ), A.5.7 | DE.CM-8, RS.AN-5, RS.MI-1 | 6.3.3, 11.3, 12.10.5 |

### PB-26 аё–аё¶аёҮ PB-30 (аёӮаёўаёІаёў Coverage)

| Playbook | ISO 27001:2022 | NIST CSF 2.0 | PCI DSS v4.0 |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **PB-26** MFA Bypass / Token Theft | A.8.5 (аёҒаёІаёЈаёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаё•аёұаё§аё•аёҷ), A.5.17 | DE.AE-2, DE.CM-3, PR.AC-7 | 8.3, 8.4, 8.5 |
| **PB-27** Cloud Storage а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” Public | A.5.23 (Cloud), A.8.10 | DE.CM-7, RS.MI-1, PR.DS-1 | 3.4, 3.5, 10.6.1 |
| **PB-28** аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№ҢаёЎаё·аёӯаё–аё·аёӯаё–аё№аёҒаёҡаёёаёҒаёЈаёёаёҒ | A.8.1 (аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү), A.7.9 | DE.CM-4, RS.MI-1, PR.AC-3 | 9.4, 9.5, 12.3 |
| **PB-29** Shadow IT | A.5.23 (Cloud), A.8.23 (аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҮ Web) | DE.CM-7, ID.AM-2, PR.AC-4 | 6.4, 12.8, 12.10.5 |
| **PB-30** а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң OT/ICS | A.8.20 (а№Җаё„аёЈаё·аёӯаёӮа№ҲаёІаёў), A.8.22 | DE.CM-1, RS.RP-1, PR.AC-5 | 1.3, 11.4, 11.5.1 |

---

## аёӘаёЈаёёаёӣ Coverage аё•аёІаёЎа№Ғаё•а№ҲаёҘаё° Framework

## аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҒаёЎаёӣ Controls аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ AI / GenAI

аёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаёҷаёөа№үа№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІа№ғаёҷа№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈа№Җаё”аёҙаёЎа№Җаёһаё·а№Ҳаёӯа№ғаё«а№ү compliance mapping аёЈаёӯаёҮаёЈаёұаёҡаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ AI а№Ӯаё”аёўа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ҒаёўаёҒа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ report а№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ а№ғаёҠа№үа№ҖаёЎаё·а№ҲаёӯаёӯаёҮаё„а№ҢаёҒаёЈаёЎаёө production AI, LLM assistant, RAG pipeline, model registry, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ AI plugins/tools

| аёһаё·а№үаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ AI | аё„аёіаё–аёІаёЎа№ҖаёҠаёҙаёҮаёӣаёҸаёҙаёҡаёұаё•аёҙ | NIST AI RMF | а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈ SOC аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№үа№„аё”а№үаё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Prompt injection а№ҒаёҘаё° unsafe tool use | аёЎаёөаёҲаёёаё”а№ғаё”аё—аёөа№Ҳ untrusted content а№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷ prompt аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёӘаёұа№ҲаёҮ tool аёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚа№„аё”а№үаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ | Govern, Map, Measure, Manage | [PB-51 AI Prompt Injection](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/AI_Prompt_Injection.th.md), [API Abuse](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/API_Abuse.th.md) |
| Data poisoning а№ҒаёҘаё° RAG corruption | model behavior а№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷа№ҖаёһаёЈаёІаё°аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ, embedding, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ document collection аё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒ poison а№„аё”а№үаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ | Map, Measure, Manage | [PB-52 LLM Data Poisoning](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/LLM_Data_Poisoning.th.md), [SOC Use Case Library](../08_Detection_Engineering/SOC_Use_Case_Library.th.md) |
| Model theft а№ҒаёҘаё° checkpoint exfiltration | аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаё«аёЈаё·аёӯ insider аёӘаёІаёЎаёІаёЈаё–аё”аё¶аёҮ model weight, response, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ training data аёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚаёӯаёӯаёҒа№„аёӣа№„аё”а№үаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ | Govern, Measure, Manage | [PB-53 AI Model Theft](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/AI_Model_Theft.th.md), [Cloud Security Monitoring](../06_Operations_Management/Cloud_Security_Monitoring.th.md) |
| AI supply chain exposure | third-party model, dataset, package, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ plugin аёЎаёөаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮа№Ғаё—аёЈаёҒа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёЎаёІа№„аё”а№үаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ | Govern, Map, Manage | [PB-32 Supply Chain Attack](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Supply_Chain_Attack.th.md), [Third-Party Risk](../06_Operations_Management/Third_Party_Risk.th.md) |
| Privacy а№ҒаёҘаё° regulated data use | prompts, outputs, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ model context аёӘаёІаёЎаёІаёЈаё–а№Җаёӣаёҙаё”а№ҖаёңаёўаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӯа№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аё«аё§аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ regulated data а№„аё”а№үаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ | Govern, Map, Manage | [PDPA Incident Response](PDPA_Incident_Response.th.md), [Data Governance Policy](Data_Governance_Policy.th.md) |

## Deliverables аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•а№ҲаёіаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ AI

аёҒа№Ҳаёӯаёҷаё–аё·аёӯаё§а№ҲаёІаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ AI аёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎа№ғаёҠа№үаёҮаёІаёҷ production аё„аё§аёЈаёЎаёө artifact аё•а№Ҳаёӯа№„аёӣаёҷаёөа№ү:

- [ ] AI system inventory аё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёө business owner а№ҒаёҘаё° technical owner
- [ ] approved use case аё—аёөа№ҲаёЈаё°аёҡаёёаёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё•а№ҒаёҘаё°аёӘаёҙа№ҲаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳаё«а№үаёІаёЎаё—аёі
- [ ] trust-boundary map аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ prompts, RAG, tools, plugins, а№ҒаёҘаё° external content
- [ ] аёЎаёІаё•аёЈаёҗаёІаёҷ logging аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ prompts, outputs, tool calls, model version, а№ҒаёҘаё° data-source change
- [ ] detection mapping аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ prompt injection, poisoning, model theft, а№ҒаёҘаё° supply chain abuse
- [ ] аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷ rollback аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ disable аё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёө approver аёҠаёұаё”а№ҖаёҲаёҷ
- [ ] а№ҖаёӘа№үаёҷаё—аёІаёҮ escalation а№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ legal, privacy, а№ҒаёҘаё°аёңаё№а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈ

## а№ҒаёңаёҷаёҘаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯа№ғаёҷ 30 аё§аёұаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҒ

| аёҠа№Ҳаё§аёҮа№Җаё§аёҘаёІ | а№Җаёӣа№үаёІаё«аёЎаёІаёў | аёңаёҘаёҘаёұаёһаёҳа№Ң |
|:---|:---|:---|
| аёӘаёұаёӣаё”аёІаё«а№Ңаё—аёөа№Ҳ 1 | inventory AI systems, endpoints, plugins, а№ҒаёҘаё° external providers | AI asset register |
| аёӘаёұаёӣаё”аёІаё«а№Ңаё—аёөа№Ҳ 2 | map trust boundary а№ҒаёҘаё° telemetry аё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ | trust-boundary diagram а№ҒаёҘаё° logging standard |
| аёӘаёұаёӣаё”аёІаё«а№Ңаё—аёөа№Ҳ 3 | а№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ AI аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҒаёұаёҡ detections а№ҒаёҘаё° playbooks | detection backlog а№ҒаёҘаё° triage checklist |
| аёӘаёұаёӣаё”аёІаё«а№Ңаё—аёөа№Ҳ 4 | аё—аё”аёӘаёӯаёҡ rollback, evidence capture, а№ҒаёҘаё° executive communication | tabletop record а№ҒаёҘаё° escalation decision tree |

## аёҠаёёаё”аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•а№ҲаёіаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ Audit (Minimum Audit Evidence Pack)

| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ | а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёңаёҘ | аёңаё№а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҙаё”аёҠаёӯаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| IR framework, severity matrix а№ҒаёҘаё°аё”аёұаёҠаёҷаёө playbook аёӣаёұаёҲаёҲаёёаёҡаёұаёҷ | аёһаёҙаёӘаё№аёҲаёҷа№Ңаё§а№ҲаёІаёЎаёөаёҒаёЈаё°аёҡаё§аёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡа№Җаё«аё•аёёаё—аёөа№Ҳаё”аё№а№ҒаёҘаёӯаёўаё№а№ҲаёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮ | SOC Manager |
| inventory аёӮаёӯаёҮ detection аё—аёөа№Ҳ map аёҒаёұаёҡ use case а№ҒаёҘаё° ATT&CK | а№ҒаёӘаё”аёҮ coverage аёӮаёӯаёҮ monitoring а№ҒаёҘаё°а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёңаёҘа№ғаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёӯаёӯаёҒа№Ғаёҡаёҡ | Security Engineer |
| incident ticket аё•аёұаё§аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮаё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёө timestamp, escalation trail а№ҒаёҘаё° closure note | а№ҒаёӘаё”аёҮаё§а№ҲаёІаёҒаёЈаё°аёҡаё§аёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёіаёҮаёІаёҷа№„аё”а№үаёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮа№ғаёҷ production | SOC Analyst |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷа№ҖаёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ log retention, access review а№ҒаёҘаё° monitoring health | аёЈаёӯаёҮаёЈаёұаёҡаё„аёіаёҒаёҘа№ҲаёІаё§аёӯа№үаёІаёҮа№ҖаёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ control operation аёЈаё°аё«аё§а№ҲаёІаёҮ audit | Security Engineer |
| аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒ lessons learned аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ corrective action | а№ҒаёӘаё”аёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёЈаёұаёҡаёӣаёЈаёёаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаёҷаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№ҲаёЎаёөа№Ғаё•а№Ҳа№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈ | IR Engineer |

## Trigger аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮаё§а№ҲаёІаёҮаё”а№үаёІаёҷ Compliance (Escalation Triggers for Compliance Gaps)

| а№ҖаёҮаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аёӮ | аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё–аё¶аёҮ | SLA | аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№„аё”а№ү |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| control аё—аёөа№ҲаёҲаёіа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө owner, а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёөаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө operating procedure | CISO + Compliance Officer | аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷаё§аёұаёҷаё—аёіаёҒаёІаёЈа№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷ | а№Ғаё•а№ҲаёҮаё•аёұа№үаёҮ owner а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё” remediation deadline |
| аё•аёӯаёҡаё„аёіаё–аёІаёЎ auditor аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ regulator аёҲаёІаёҒ record аёӣаёұаёҲаёҲаёёаёҡаёұаёҷа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№ү | CISO | аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө | а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” remediation track а№ҒаёҘаё°аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ interim response |
| monitoring blind spot аёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаёҒаёіаёҒаёұаёҡ | SOC Manager + Business owner | аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ 24 аёҠаёЎ. | аёЈаёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаёҠаёұа№Ҳаё§аё„аёЈаёІаё§аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҒаёҒа№ү control |
| аёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ AI аё—аёөа№ҲаёҲаёұаёҡ regulated data а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө logging аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ rollback аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | CISO + Legal / DPO | аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө | аёҠаё°аёҘаёӯ go-live аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёЈаёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷаё—аёІаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈ |
| control failure а№ҖаёҒаёҙаё”аёӢа№үаёіаёӮа№үаёІаёЎаёЈаёӯаёҡ monthly/quarterly review | CISO + Executive sponsor | а№ғаёҷ governance meeting аё–аёұаё”а№„аёӣ | аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаёҲаёІаёҒ local fix а№„аёӣа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ management action |

### NIST CSF 2.0

| Function | аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ Coverage | аё„аёіаёӯаёҳаёҙаёҡаёІаёў |
|:---|:---:|:---|
| **Identify (аёЈаё°аёҡаёё)** | рҹҹЎ | аё„аёЈаёӯаёҡаё„аёҘаёёаёЎаёҡаёІаёҮаёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷ вҖ” аёӘаёҙаёҷаё—аёЈаёұаёһаёўа№Ң & Supply Chain |
| **Protect (аёӣа№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёұаёҷ)** | рҹҹЎ | аё„аёЈаёӯаёҡаё„аёҘаёёаёЎаёҡаёІаёҮаёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷ вҖ” Access Control & аёҒаёІаёЈаёқаё¶аёҒаёӯаёҡаёЈаёЎ |
| **Detect (аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ)** | рҹҹў | аё„аёЈаёӯаёҡаё„аёҘаёёаёЎаё”аёө вҖ” 54 Sigma Rules + аёҒаёІаёЈа№Җаёқа№үаёІаёЈаё°аё§аёұаёҮ |
| **Respond (аё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮ)** | рҹҹў | аё„аёЈаёӯаёҡаё„аёҘаёёаёЎаё”аёө вҖ” 53 Playbooks + аё•аёІаёЈаёІаёҮаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ |
| **Recover (аёҒаё№а№үаё„аё·аёҷ)** | рҹҹЎ | аё„аёЈаёӯаёҡаё„аёҘаёёаёЎаёҡаёІаёҮаёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷ вҖ” аёӘаёіаёЈаёӯаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ & аёӘаё·а№ҲаёӯаёӘаёІаёЈ |

### PCI DSS v4.0

| аёӮа№үаёӯаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё” | аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ Coverage |
|:---|:---:|
| Req 1 вҖ” аё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎа№Җаё„аёЈаё·аёӯаёӮа№ҲаёІаёў | рҹҹў |
| Req 5 вҖ” аёӣа№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёұаёҷаёЎаёұаёҘа№Ғаё§аёЈа№Ң | рҹҹў |
| Req 6 вҖ” аёһаёұаё’аёҷаёІаёӣаёҘаёӯаё”аё аёұаёў | рҹҹў |
| Req 7 вҖ” аё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ | рҹҹў |
| Req 8 вҖ” аёЈаё°аёҡаёёаё•аёұаё§аё•аёҷаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү | рҹҹў |
| Req 10 вҖ” аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒ Log & а№Җаёқа№үаёІаёЈаё°аё§аёұаёҮ | рҹҹў |
| Req 11 вҖ” аё—аё”аёӘаёӯаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӣаёҘаёӯаё”аё аёұаёў | рҹҹў |
| Req 12 вҖ” аёҷа№ӮаёўаёҡаёІаёўаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӣаёҘаёӯаё”аё аёұаёў | рҹҹў |

---

## Quick Reference аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ Auditor

### аёңаё№а№үаё•аёЈаё§аёҲ ISO 27001 аё–аёІаёЎ:

> "а№ҒаёӘаё”аёҮаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң"
вҶ’ [IR Framework](../05_Incident_Response/Framework.th.md) + [аё•аёІаёЈаёІаёҮаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ](../05_Incident_Response/Severity_Matrix.th.md) + Playbook а№ғаё”аёҒа№Үа№„аё”а№ү (PB-01 аё–аё¶аёҮ PB-53)

> "а№ҒаёӘаё”аёҮаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёІаёЎаёІаёЈаё–а№ғаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈа№Җаёқа№үаёІаёЈаё°аё§аёұаёҮа№ҒаёҘаё°аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ"
вҶ’ [аё”аёұаёҠаёҷаёө Detection Rules](../08_Detection_Engineering/README.th.md) (54 аёҒаёҺ Sigma) + [а№Ғаёңаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳ Coverage MITRE ATT&CK](../tools/mitre_attack_heatmap.html)

### QSA аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ PCI DSS аё–аёІаёЎ:

> "Req 10.6.1 вҖ” аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ Log аёЈаёІаёўаё§аёұаёҷ?"
вҶ’ [SOC Metrics & KPIs](../06_Operations_Management/SOC_Metrics.th.md) + аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷа№Җаёқа№үаёІаёЈаё°аё§аёұаёҮ 24/7

> "Req 12.10.1 вҖ” а№Ғаёңаёҷаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң?"
вҶ’ [IR Framework](../05_Incident_Response/Framework.th.md) + [аё•аёІаёЈаёІаёҮаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ](../05_Incident_Response/Severity_Matrix.th.md)

---

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ

- [IR Framework](../05_Incident_Response/Framework.th.md)
- [аё•аёІаёЈаёІаёҮаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ](../05_Incident_Response/Severity_Matrix.th.md)
- [аё”аёұаёҠаёҷаёө Detection Rules](../08_Detection_Engineering/README.th.md)
- [SOC Use Case Library](../08_Detection_Engineering/SOC_Use_Case_Library.th.md)
- [а№Ғаёңаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳ Coverage MITRE ATT&CK](../tools/mitre_attack_heatmap.html)
- [а№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯаё§аёұаё”аё„аё°а№Ғаёҷаёҷ SOC Maturity](../tools/soc_maturity_scorer.html)

## Cross-framework Control Mapping

### Key Control Areas

| Control | ISO 27001 | NIST CSF | PCI DSS | PDPA |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Risk Assessment | A.8 | ID.RA | 12.2 | аёЎаёІаё•аёЈаёІ 37 |
| Access Control | A.9 | PR.AC | 7, 8 | аёЎаёІаё•аёЈаёІ 37(1) |
| Encryption | A.10 | PR.DS | 3.4, 4.1 | аёЎаёІаё•аёЈаёІ 37(1) |
| Logging | A.12 | DE.CM | 10 | аёЎаёІаё•аёЈаёІ 37(1) |
| IR Plan | A.16 | RS.RP | 12.10 | аёЎаёІаё•аёЈаёІ 37(4) |
| Privacy | - | - | - | аёЎаёІаё•аёЈаёІ 23-26 |

### Compliance Status Dashboard

```
ISO 27001: в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘  93% (7 gaps)
NIST CSF:  в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–‘в–‘  87% (12 gaps)
PCI DSS:   в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘  80% (15 gaps)
PDPA:      в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–‘  90% (5 gaps)
```

### Annual Compliance Calendar

| а№Җаё”аё·аёӯаёҷ | Activity | Framework |
|:---|:---|:---|
| аёЎ.аё„. | Annual risk assessment | ISO 27001 |
| аёЎаёө.аё„. | PCI DSS audit prep | PCI DSS |
| аёЎаёҙ.аёў. | PDPA compliance review | PDPA |
| аёҒ.аёў. | ISO audit (internal) | ISO 27001 |
| аёҳ.аё„. | NIST CSF self-assessment | NIST CSF |

### Framework Update Tracking

| Framework | Last Update | Next Review |
|:---|:---|:---|
| ISO 27001 | 2022 | Annual |
| NIST CSF | 2.0 (2024) | Annual |
| PCI DSS | 4.0 (2024) | Annual |

## File: 07_Compliance_Privacy/Data_Governance_Policy.en.md
# Data Governance Policy

This policy defines comprehensive standards for data classification, handling, retention, disposal, and access control within the SOC environment. All SOC personnel must follow these guidelines when handling any data.

---

## 1. Data Classification Levels

| Level | Label | Description | Examples | Access Control |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **L4** | рҹ”ҙ Restricted | Extremely sensitive, loss would cause severe harm | Credentials, encryption keys, PII (sensitive), payment data | Named individuals only, MFA required |
| **L3** | рҹҹ  Confidential | Sensitive operational data | Investigation details, IoCs, incident reports, threat intel | SOC team + management, need-to-know |
| **L2** | рҹҹЎ Internal | Internal use, not for external sharing | SOPs, procedures, operational metrics, architecture docs | All employees |
| **L1** | рҹҹў Public | Safe for public consumption | Published advisories, open-source tools, public reports | Anyone |

---

## 2. Handling Requirements

### 2.1 Storage

| Classification | Storage Location | Encryption | Backup |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **Restricted** | Encrypted vault, access-logged | AES-256 at rest + in transit | Encrypted backup, separate key |
| **Confidential** | Access-controlled storage | At rest encryption required | Standard encrypted backup |
| **Internal** | Standard enterprise storage | Disk-level encryption | Standard backup |
| **Public** | Any approved storage | Optional | Best effort |

### 2.2 Transmission

| Classification | Allowed Channels | Requirements |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **Restricted** | Encrypted email (S/MIME/PGP), encrypted share | TLP:RED label, end-to-end encryption |
| **Confidential** | Encrypted email, internal chat, VPN | TLP:AMBER label, encryption preferred |
| **Internal** | Internal email, chat, intranet | TLP:GREEN label |
| **Public** | Any channel | TLP:CLEAR label |

### 2.3 Retention & Disposal

| Classification | Retention Period | Disposal Method | Verification |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **Restricted** | Per regulation (PDPA: min 1 year) | Secure delete (DoD 5220.22-M) + log | Written confirmation |
| **Confidential** | 1 year after case closure | Secure delete | Audit log |
| **Internal** | Per policy (typically 3 years) | Standard delete | N/A |
| **Public** | Indefinite | Standard delete | N/A |

---

## 3. SOC-Specific Data Guidelines

### 3.1 Log Data

| Aspect | Requirement |
|:---|:---|
| **Hot storage** | 90 days minimum (SIEM) |
| **Warm storage** | 90 daysвҖ“1 year (archive/data lake) |
| **Cold storage** | 1вҖ“7 years (compliance, legal hold) |
| **Classification** | L2 (Internal) by default, L3 if contains PII/IoCs |

### 3.2 Incident Evidence

| Aspect | Requirement |
|:---|:---|
| **Retention** | 1 year after case closure (or per legal hold) |
| **Chain of custody** | Documented in incident report |
| **Classification** | L3 (Confidential) minimum, L4 if PII involved |
| **Storage** | Read-only, hash-verified, access-logged |

### 3.3 Threat Intelligence

| Aspect | Requirement |
|:---|:---|
| **IoC feeds** | Refresh per feed schedule (5 minвҖ“24 hours) |
| **Historical IoCs** | Archive for correlation, review quarterly |
| **TLP handling** | Follow TLP protocol strictly |
| **Classification** | L3 (Confidential), L2 for published advisories |

### 3.4 Personal Data (PII)

| Aspect | Requirement |
|:---|:---|
| **Collection** | Minimize, collect only what's necessary for investigation |
| **Processing** | Follow [PDPA Compliance](PDPA_Compliance.en.md) |
| **Breach notification** | Within 72 hours per PDPA |
| **Classification** | L4 (Restricted) for sensitive PII |

### 3.5 Third-Party Data

| Aspect | Requirement |
|:---|:---|
| **Handling** | Per vendor agreement / NDA terms |
| **Sharing** | Only with authorized parties per contract |
| **Retention** | Per contract terms |
| **Classification** | At minimum L2, typically L3 |

---

## 4. Access Control

| Principle | Implementation |
|:---|:---|
| **Least privilege** | Grant minimum access needed for role |
| **Need-to-know** | L3/L4 data only accessible to those involved in the case |
| **Separation of duties** | Evidence handling requires dual sign-off |
| **Access review** | Quarterly review of all data access permissions |
| **Logging** | All access to L3/L4 data must be logged |

---

## 5. Compliance Mapping

| Framework | Relevant Controls |
|:---|:---|
| **ISO 27001** | A.8.2 (Classification), A.8.3 (Media handling) |
| **NIST 800-53** | SC-28 (Protection at Rest), MP-6 (Media Sanitization) |
| **PDPA** | Section 37 (Security measures), Section 40 (Breach notification) |
| **PCI DSS** | Req 3 (Protect stored data), Req 7 (Restrict access) |

---

## Data Classification Examples for SOC

| Data Type | Classification | TLP | Retention | Access |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| SIEM alert metadata | Internal | AMBER | 1 year | All SOC |
| SIEM raw logs (with PII) | Confidential | AMBER | 90 days | T2+ only |
| Forensic disk images | Highly Confidential | RED | Case duration + 1 year | Case team only |
| IOC feeds (public) | Public | CLEAR | Indefinite | All SOC |
| Incident reports (internal) | Confidential | AMBER | 3 years | SOC + Management |
| Vulnerability scan results | Confidential | AMBER | 1 year | SOC + IT |
| Threat intelligence (partner) | Restricted | AMBER/GREEN | 2 years | CTI team |
| Employee PII from investigations | Highly Confidential | RED | Case closure | Lead analyst + DPO |

## Data Lifecycle Management

```mermaid
graph LR
    Create["рҹ“қ Create/<br/>Collect"] --> Classify["рҹҸ·пёҸ Classify"]
    Classify --> Store["рҹ’ҫ Store<br/>(encrypted)"]
    Store --> Use["рҹ”Қ Process/<br/>Analyze"]
    Use --> Share["рҹ“Ө Share<br/>(per TLP)"]
    Share --> Archive["рҹ“Ұ Archive"]
    Archive --> Destroy["рҹ—‘пёҸ Destroy<br/>(per policy)"]
```

| Phase | SOC Responsibility | Control |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **Create** | Log collection, evidence capture | Automated via agents/SIEM |
| **Classify** | Apply TLP label, data category | Manual at creation |
| **Store** | Encrypted storage per classification | Automated encryption |
| **Process** | Access only what's needed (minimization) | RBAC enforcement |
| **Share** | Follow TLP sharing rules | DLP monitoring |
| **Archive** | Move to cold storage per retention | Automated lifecycle |
| **Destroy** | Secure deletion with certificate | Verified destruction |

## Data Quality Standards

| Dimension | Definition | SOC Example | Target |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **Completeness** | All required fields populated | Every alert has source, dest, timestamp | > 95% |
| **Accuracy** | Data correctly represents reality | Alert severity matches actual risk | > 90% |
| **Timeliness** | Data available when needed | Logs arrive in SIEM within 5 min | > 99% |
| **Consistency** | Same data in different systems matches | Ticket info matches SIEM data | > 95% |
| **Uniqueness** | No unnecessary duplicates | One ticket per incident (not duplicated) | 100% |

## Data Governance Escalation Triggers

| Condition | Escalate To | SLA | Required Action |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| Restricted or confidential data found in unapproved storage or channel | SOC Manager + Security Engineer | Immediate | Contain access and document exposure path |
| Retention or deletion control fails for regulated or case data | Security Engineer + Compliance Officer | Within 24 hours | Stop disposal gap and assess legal hold impact |
| Data owner is unknown for a high-value data set | SOC Manager | Same business day | Assign owner before continued processing |
| Sharing request conflicts with TLP, contract, or privacy rules | SOC Manager + DPO / Legal | Before release | Approve, redact, or deny sharing |
| Evidence chain-of-custody cannot be demonstrated | IR Lead + Compliance Officer | Immediate | Preserve remaining evidence and assess admissibility risk |

## Minimum Evidence for Data Governance

| Evidence | Why It Matters | Owner |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Current data classification matrix and handling standard | Shows staff have a live policy baseline | SOC Manager |
| Access logs for L3/L4 data | Demonstrates control over sensitive access | Security Engineer |
| Retention and disposal records | Proves lifecycle controls are operating | Security Engineer |
| Sample case or evidence labels with TLP and classification | Confirms practical use, not policy only | SOC Analyst |
| Exception approvals for data sharing or extended retention | Preserves accountability for deviations | SOC Manager / DPO |

## Evidence Legal Hold / Retention Path

| Condition | Hold or Retention Action | Escalate To | Minimum Output |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **Incident evidence includes regulated data or board-level exposure** | Suspend standard deletion and preserve full evidence set | DPO + Legal + CISO | Hold scope, owner, and review date |
| **Evidence is transferred to forensic archive** | Re-hash, confirm custodian, and log archive location | IR Lead | Archive record and integrity check |
| **Evidence release or destruction is requested** | Validate hold status before release or destruction | Legal + evidence custodian | Written approval and disposal record |
| **Retention exception is requested** | Approve extended retention with named owner and reason | DPO / Legal / SOC Manager | Exception approval record |

## Related Documents

- [PDPA Compliance](PDPA_Compliance.en.md)
- [Data Handling Protocol](../06_Operations_Management/Data_Handling_Protocol.en.md)
- [Forensic Investigation](../05_Incident_Response/Forensic_Investigation.en.md)
- [Access Control Policy](../06_Operations_Management/Access_Control.en.md)
- [Evidence Collection](../05_Incident_Response/Evidence_Collection.en.md)

## References

- [ISO 27001 вҖ” Information Security Management](https://www.iso.org/iso-27001-information-security.html)
- [NIST SP 800-53 вҖ” Security Controls](https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-53/rev-5/final)
- [TLP Protocol](https://www.first.org/tlp/)


---

## File: 07_Compliance_Privacy/Data_Governance_Policy.th.md
# аёҷа№ӮаёўаёҡаёІаёўаёҳаёЈаёЈаёЎаёІаё аёҙаёҡаёІаёҘаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ (Data Governance Policy)

аёҷа№ӮаёўаёҡаёІаёўаёҷаёөа№үаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё”аёЎаёІаё•аёЈаёҗаёІаёҷаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёұаё”аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ аёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈ аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҒа№ҮаёҡаёЈаёұаёҒаё©аёІ а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёіаёҘаёІаёўаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷаёӘаё аёІаёһа№Ғаё§аё”аёҘа№үаёӯаёЎ SOC аёҡаёёаё„аёҘаёІаёҒаёЈ SOC аё—аёёаёҒаё„аёҷаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёӣаёҸаёҙаёҡаёұаё•аёҙаё•аёІаёЎа№Ғаёҷаё§аёӣаёҸаёҙаёҡаёұаё•аёҙаёҷаёөа№ү

---

## 1. аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёұаё”аёҠаёұа№үаёҷаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ

| аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ | аёӣа№үаёІаёўаёҒаёіаёҒаёұаёҡ | аё•аёұаё§аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮ | аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **L4** | рҹ”ҙ аёҲаёіаёҒаёұаё” (Restricted) | Credentials, аё„аёөаёўа№Ңа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёЈаё«аёұаёӘ, PII аё—аёөа№ҲаёҘаё°а№Җаёӯаёөаёўаё”аёӯа№Ҳаёӯаёҷ | а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё°аёҡаёёаё„аё„аёҘаё—аёөа№ҲаёЈаё°аёҡаёёаёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ + MFA |
| **L3** | рҹҹ  аёҘаёұаёҡ (Confidential) | аёЈаёІаёўаёҘаё°а№Җаёӯаёөаёўаё”аёҒаёІаёЈаёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ, IoCs, аёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷ Incident | аё—аёөаёЎ SOC + аёңаё№а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈ, need-to-know |
| **L2** | рҹҹЎ аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ (Internal) | SOPs, аё•аёұаё§аёҠаёөа№үаё§аёұаё”, а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаёӘаё–аёІаёӣаёұаё•аёўаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎ | аёһаёҷаёұаёҒаёҮаёІаёҷаё—аёёаёҒаё„аёҷ |
| **L1** | рҹҹў аёӘаёІаёҳаёІаёЈаё“аё° (Public) | аё„аёіа№Ғаёҷаё°аёҷаёіаё—аёөа№Ҳа№Җаёңаёўа№ҒаёһаёЈа№Ҳ, а№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯ open-source | аё—аёёаёҒаё„аёҷ |

---

## 2. аёӮа№үаёӯаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё”аёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈ

### 2.1 аёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёұаё”а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ

| аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ | аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё—аёөа№ҲаёҲаёұаё”а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ | аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёЈаё«аёұаёӘ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **Restricted** | Vault а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёЈаё«аёұаёӘ, аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ | AES-256 аё—аёұа№үаёҮ at rest + in transit |
| **Confidential** | Storage аё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ | а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёЈаё«аёұаёӘ at rest |
| **Internal** | Enterprise storage аёЎаёІаё•аёЈаёҗаёІаёҷ | Disk-level encryption |
| **Public** | Storage аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙа№ғаё”аёҒа№Үа№„аё”а№ү | аё•аёІаёЎаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈ |

### 2.2 аёҒаёІаёЈаёӘа№ҲаёҮаё•а№ҲаёӯаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ

| аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ | аёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮаё—аёІаёҮаё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё• | аёӮа№үаёӯаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё” |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **Restricted** | аёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёЈаё«аёұаёӘ (S/MIME/PGP) | TLP:RED, end-to-end encryption |
| **Confidential** | аёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёЈаё«аёұаёӘ, а№ҒаёҠаё—аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ | TLP:AMBER |
| **Internal** | аёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘаё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ, а№ҒаёҠаё—, intranet | TLP:GREEN |
| **Public** | аёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮаё—аёІаёҮа№ғаё”аёҒа№Үа№„аё”а№ү | TLP:CLEAR |

### 2.3 аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҒа№ҮаёҡаёЈаёұаёҒаё©аёІа№ҒаёҘаё°аё—аёіаёҘаёІаёў

| аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ | аёЈаё°аёўаё°а№Җаё§аёҘаёІа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё—аёіаёҘаёІаёў |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **Restricted** | аё•аёІаёЎаёҒаёҺаё«аёЎаёІаёў (PDPA: вүҘ 1 аёӣаёө) | Secure delete + аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒ |
| **Confidential** | 1 аёӣаёөаё«аёҘаёұаёҮаёӣаёҙаё”а№Җаё„аёӘ | Secure delete |
| **Internal** | аё•аёІаёЎаёҷа№ӮаёўаёҡаёІаёў (3 аёӣаёө) | Standard delete |
| **Public** | а№„аёЎа№ҲаёҲаёіаёҒаёұаё” | Standard delete |

---

## 3. а№Ғаёҷаё§аёӣаёҸаёҙаёҡаёұаё•аёҙа№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё° SOC

### 3.1 аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ Log

| аёЎаёҙаё•аёҙ | аёӮа№үаёӯаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё” |
|:---|:---|
| **Hot storage** | вүҘ 90 аё§аёұаёҷ (SIEM) |
| **Warm storage** | 90 аё§аёұаёҷвҖ“1 аёӣаёө (archive) |
| **Cold storage** | 1вҖ“7 аёӣаёө (аё•аёІаёЎаёҒаёҺаё«аёЎаёІаёў) |
| **аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаёҠаёұа№үаёҷ** | L2 а№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷаё„а№ҲаёІа№ҖаёЈаёҙа№ҲаёЎаё•а№үаёҷ, L3 аё–а№үаёІаёЎаёө PII/IoCs |

### 3.2 аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң

| аёЎаёҙаё•аёҙ | аёӮа№үаёӯаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё” |
|:---|:---|
| **аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҒа№ҮаёҡаёЈаёұаёҒаё©аёІ** | 1 аёӣаёөаё«аёҘаёұаёҮаёӣаёҙаё”а№Җаё„аёӘ (аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаё•аёІаёЎ legal hold) |
| **Chain of custody** | аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒа№ғаёҷаёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷ incident |
| **аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаёҠаёұа№үаёҷ** | L3 аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•а№Ҳаёі, L4 аё–а№үаёІаёЎаёө PII |

### 3.3 аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаёҡаёёаё„аё„аёҘ (PII)

| аёЎаёҙаё•аёҙ | аёӮа№үаёӯаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё” |
|:---|:---|
| **аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҒа№ҮаёҡаёЈаё§аёҡаёЈаё§аёЎ** | а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡа№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё°аё—аёөа№ҲаёҲаёіа№Җаёӣа№ҮаёҷаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ |
| **аёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёЈаё°аёЎаё§аёҘаёңаёҘ** | аёӣаёҸаёҙаёҡаёұаё•аёҙаё•аёІаёЎ [PDPA Compliance](PDPA_Compliance.th.md) |
| **аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮа№Җаё•аё·аёӯаёҷа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёЈаёұа№Ҳаё§а№„аё«аёҘ** | аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ 72 аёҠаёЎ. аё•аёІаёЎ PDPA |
| **аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаёҠаёұа№үаёҷ** | L4 аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ PII аё—аёөа№ҲаёҘаё°а№Җаёӯаёөаёўаё”аёӯа№Ҳаёӯаёҷ |

---

## 4. аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ

| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҒаёІаёЈ | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ |
|:---|:---|
| **Least privilege** | а№ғаё«а№үаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ңаё•а№ҲаёіаёӘаёёаё”аё—аёөа№ҲаёҲаёіа№Җаёӣа№ҮаёҷаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёҡаё—аёҡаёІаё— |
| **Need-to-know** | аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ L3/L4 а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮа№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё°аёңаё№а№үаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ |
| **Separation of duties** | аёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ dual sign-off |
| **Access review** | аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷаё—аёёаёҒа№„аё•аёЈаёЎаёІаёӘ |
| **Logging** | аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ L3/L4 аё—аёёаёҒаё„аёЈаёұа№үаёҮ |

---

## 5. Compliance Mapping

| аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҡ | Controls аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ |
|:---|:---|
| **ISO 27001** | A.8.2 (Classification), A.8.3 (Media handling) |
| **NIST 800-53** | SC-28 (Protection at Rest), MP-6 (Media Sanitization) |
| **PDPA** | аёЎаёІаё•аёЈаёІ 37 (аёЎаёІаё•аёЈаёҒаёІаёЈаёЈаёұаёҒаё©аёІаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӣаёҘаёӯаё”аё аёұаёў), аёЎаёІаё•аёЈаёІ 40 (а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮа№Җаё•аё·аёӯаёҷа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёЈаёұа№Ҳаё§а№„аё«аёҘ) |

---

## аё•аёұаё§аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёіа№ҒаёҷаёҒаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ SOC

| аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | аёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёіа№ҒаёҷаёҒ | TLP | аёЈаё°аёўаё°а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ | аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| SIEM alert metadata | аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ | AMBER | 1 аёӣаёө | SOC аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” |
| SIEM raw logs (аёЎаёө PII) | аёҘаёұаёҡ | AMBER | 90 аё§аёұаёҷ | T2+ а№Җаё—а№ҲаёІаёҷаёұа№үаёҷ |
| Forensic disk images | аёҘаёұаёҡаёЎаёІаёҒ | RED | аёҠа№Ҳаё§аёҮ case + 1 аёӣаёө | аё—аёөаёЎ case а№Җаё—а№ҲаёІаёҷаёұа№үаёҷ |
| IOC feeds (аёӘаёІаёҳаёІаёЈаё“аё°) | аёӘаёІаёҳаёІаёЈаё“аё° | CLEAR | а№„аёЎа№ҲаёҲаёіаёҒаёұаё” | SOC аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” |
| Incident reports (аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ) | аёҘаёұаёҡ | AMBER | 3 аёӣаёө | SOC + аёңаё№а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈ |
| аёңаёҘаёӘа№ҒаёҒаёҷаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Ӯаё«аё§а№Ҳ | аёҘаёұаёҡ | AMBER | 1 аёӣаёө | SOC + IT |
| Threat intelligence (аёһаёұаёҷаёҳаёЎаёҙаё•аёЈ) | аёҲаёіаёҒаёұаё” | AMBER/GREEN | 2 аёӣаёө | аё—аёөаёЎ CTI |
| PII аёһаёҷаёұаёҒаёҮаёІаёҷаёҲаёІаёҒаёҒаёІаёЈаёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ | аёҘаёұаёҡаёЎаёІаёҒ | RED | аёӣаёҙаё” case | Lead analyst + DPO |

## аёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈаё§аёҮаёҲаёЈаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ

```mermaid
graph LR
    Create["рҹ“қ аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ/<br/>а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ"] --> Classify["рҹҸ·пёҸ аёҲаёіа№ҒаёҷаёҒ"]
    Classify --> Store["рҹ’ҫ аёҲаёұаё”а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ<br/>(а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёЈаё«аёұаёӘ)"]
    Store --> Use["рҹ”Қ аёӣаёЈаё°аёЎаё§аёҘаёңаёҘ/<br/>аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң"]
    Use --> Share["рҹ“Ө а№ҒаёҠаёЈа№Ң<br/>(аё•аёІаёЎ TLP)"]
    Share --> Archive["рҹ“Ұ а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡаё–аёІаё§аёЈ"]
    Archive --> Destroy["рҹ—‘пёҸ аё—аёіаёҘаёІаёў<br/>(аё•аёІаёЎаёҷа№ӮаёўаёҡаёІаёў)"]
```

| аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷ | аё«аёҷа№үаёІаё—аёөа№Ҳ SOC | Control |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ** | а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ log, capture аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ | аёӯаёұаё•а№ӮаёҷаёЎаёұаё•аёҙаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ agents/SIEM |
| **аёҲаёіа№ҒаёҷаёҒ** | аё•аёҙаё” TLP label, аё«аёЎаё§аё”аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | Manual аё•аёӯаёҷаёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ |
| **аёҲаёұаё”а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ** | а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёЈаё«аёұаёӘаё•аёІаёЎаёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёіа№ҒаёҷаёҒ | а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёЈаё«аёұаёӘаёӯаёұаё•а№ӮаёҷаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ |
| **аёӣаёЈаё°аёЎаё§аёҘаёңаёҘ** | а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮа№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё°аё—аёөа№ҲаёҲаёіа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ (minimization) | аёҡаёұаёҮаё„аёұаёҡ RBAC |
| **а№ҒаёҠаёЈа№Ң** | аё—аёіаё•аёІаёЎаёҒаёҺ TLP | DLP monitoring |
| **а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡаё–аёІаё§аёЈ** | аёўа№үаёІаёўа№„аёӣ cold storage аё•аёІаёЎ retention | Lifecycle аёӯаёұаё•а№ӮаёҷаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ |
| **аё—аёіаёҘаёІаёў** | Secure deletion аёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎ certificate | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёіаёҘаёІаёў |

## аёЎаёІаё•аёЈаёҗаёІаёҷаё„аёёаё“аё аёІаёһаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ

| аёЎаёҙаё•аёҙ | аёҷаёҙаёўаёІаёЎ | аё•аёұаё§аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮ SOC | а№Җаёӣа№үаёІаё«аёЎаёІаёў |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёЎаёҡаё№аёЈаё“а№Ң** | аё—аёёаёҒаёҹаёҙаёҘаё”а№Ңаё—аёөа№ҲаёҲаёіа№Җаёӣа№ҮаёҷаёЎаёөаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | аё—аёёаёҒ alert аёЎаёө source, dest, timestamp | > 95% |
| **аё„аё§аёІаёЎаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ** | аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё•аёЈаёҮаёҒаёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№Җаёӣа№ҮаёҷаёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮ | аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ alert аё•аёЈаёҮаёҒаёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮ | > 90% |
| **аё„аё§аёІаёЎаё—аёұаёҷа№Җаё§аёҘаёІ** | аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎа№ғаёҠа№үа№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈ | Log аё–аё¶аёҮ SIEM аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ 5 аёҷаёІаё—аёө | > 99% |
| **аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёӯаё”аё„аёҘа№үаёӯаёҮ** | аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘа№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷаё•аёЈаёҮаёҒаёұаёҷаёӮа№үаёІаёЎаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ | аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘа№ғаёҷ ticket аё•аёЈаёҮаёҒаёұаёҡ SIEM | > 95% |
| **аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№„аёЎа№ҲаёӢа№үаёі** | а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө duplicate аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№ҲаёҲаёіа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ | 1 ticket аё•а№Ҳаёӯ 1 incident | 100% |

## Trigger аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё”а№үаёІаёҷаёҳаёЈаёЈаёЎаёІаё аёҙаёҡаёІаёҘаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ (Data Governance Escalation Triggers)

| а№ҖаёҮаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аёӮ | аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё–аё¶аёҮ | SLA | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё—аёі |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| аёһаёҡаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ restricted аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ confidential а№ғаёҷ storage аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ channel аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | SOC Manager + Security Engineer | аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө | аё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮа№ҒаёҘаё°аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒа№ҖаёӘа№үаёҷаё—аёІаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈа№Җаёӣаёҙаё”а№Җаёңаёў |
| retention аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ deletion control аёҘа№үаёЎа№Җаё«аёҘаё§аёҒаёұаёҡаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёҒаёіаёҒаёұаёҡаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё„аё”аёө | Security Engineer + Compliance Officer | аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ 24 аёҠаёЎ. | аё«аёўаёёаё”аёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Ӯаё«аё§а№ҲаёӮаёӯаёҮ lifecycle а№ҒаёҘаё°аёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷ legal hold |
| а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЈаё№а№үаё§а№ҲаёІа№ғаё„аёЈа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ data owner аёӮаёӯаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёЎаё№аёҘаё„а№ҲаёІаёӘаё№аёҮ | SOC Manager | аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷаё§аёұаёҷаё—аёіаёҒаёІаёЈа№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷ | а№Ғаё•а№ҲаёҮаё•аёұа№үаёҮ owner аёҒа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёӣаёЈаё°аёЎаё§аёҘаёңаёҘаё•а№Ҳаёӯ |
| аёЎаёөаё„аёіаёӮаёӯа№ҒаёҠаёЈа№ҢаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аёөа№ҲаёӮаёұаё”аёҒаёұаёҡ TLP, аёӘаёұаёҚаёҚаёІ аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёҒаёҺ privacy | SOC Manager + DPO / Legal | аёҒа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёӣаёҘа№ҲаёӯаёўаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ а№Ғаё”аёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёӣаёҸаёҙа№ҖаёӘаёҳ |
| а№„аёЎа№ҲаёӘаёІаёЎаёІаёЈаё–аёһаёҙаёӘаё№аёҲаёҷа№Ң chain-of-custody аёӮаёӯаёҮаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷа№„аё”а№ү | IR Lead + Compliance Officer | аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө | аёЈаёұаёҒаё©аёІаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳа№Җаё«аёҘаё·аёӯа№ҒаёҘаё°аёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаё”а№үаёІаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈа№ғаёҠа№үа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ |

## аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•а№ҲаёіаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ Data Governance (Minimum Evidence for Data Governance)

| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ | а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёңаёҘ | аёңаё№а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҙаё”аёҠаёӯаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| data classification matrix а№ҒаёҘаё° handling standard а№Җаё§аёӯаёЈа№ҢаёҠаёұаёҷаёӣаёұаёҲаёҲаёёаёҡаёұаёҷ | а№ҒаёӘаё”аёҮаё§а№ҲаёІаё—аёөаёЎаёЎаёө baseline аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№үаёӯаёўаё№а№ҲаёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮ | SOC Manager |
| access logs аёӮаёӯаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ L3/L4 | аёһаёҙаёӘаё№аёҲаёҷа№Ңаё§а№ҲаёІаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӯа№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аё«аё§а№„аё”а№ү | Security Engineer |
| аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒ retention а№ҒаёҘаё° disposal | а№ҒаёӘаё”аёҮаё§а№ҲаёІ lifecycle control аё—аёіаёҮаёІаёҷаёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮ | Security Engineer |
| аё•аёұаё§аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮ label а№ғаёҷ case аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёө TLP а№ҒаёҘаё° classification | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈа№ғаёҠа№үаёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮ а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№ҲаёЎаёөа№Ғаё•а№Ҳ policy | SOC Analyst |
| аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒаёҒаёІаёЈаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ exception аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ data sharing аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҒа№ҮаёҡаёўаёІаё§а№ҖаёҒаёҙаёҷаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё” | а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ accountability а№ҖаёЎаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎаёөаёҒаёІаёЈа№Җаёҡаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаёҲаёІаёҒаёЎаёІаё•аёЈаёҗаёІаёҷ | SOC Manager / DPO |

## а№ҖаёӘа№үаёҷаё—аёІаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈ Legal Hold / Retention аёӮаёӯаёҮаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ

| а№ҖаёҮаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аёӮ | аёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёі hold аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ retention | аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё–аё¶аёҮ | аёңаёҘаёҘаёұаёһаёҳа№ҢаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•а№Ҳаёі |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёӮаёӯаёҮ incident аёЎаёө regulated data аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ exposure аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ board** | аё«аёўаёёаё”аёҒаёІаёЈаёҘаёҡаё•аёІаёЎаёЈаёӯаёҡаёӣаёҒаё•аёҙа№ҒаёҘаё°а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаё—аёұа№үаёҮаёҠаёёаё”а№„аё§а№ү | DPO + Legal + CISO | аёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё• hold, owner, а№ҒаёҘаё°аё§аёұаёҷаё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ |
| **аёЎаёөаёҒаёІаёЈаёўа№үаёІаёўаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІ forensic archive** | hash аёӢа№үаёі аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ custodian а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒаё•аёіа№Ғаё«аёҷа№ҲаёҮ archive | IR Lead | archive record а№ҒаёҘаё°аёңаёҘ integrity check |
| **аёЎаёөаё„аёіаёӮаёӯ release аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ destruction аёӮаёӯаёҮаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ** | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё° hold аёҒа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёӣаёҘа№Ҳаёӯаёўаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаё—аёіаёҘаёІаёў | Legal + evidence custodian | аё«аёҷаёұаёҮаёӘаё·аёӯаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙа№ҒаёҘаё° disposal record |
| **аёЎаёөаё„аёіаёӮаёӯ exception а№ҖаёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ retention** | аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡа№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎаёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎаёЈаё°аёҡаёё owner а№ҒаёҘаё°а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёңаёҘ | DPO / Legal / SOC Manager | аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒаёҒаёІаёЈаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ exception |

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ

- [Evidence Collection](../05_Incident_Response/Evidence_Collection.th.md)

### Data Classification Quick Reference

| Level | Label | Examples | Controls |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| 4 - Restricted | аёҘаёұаёҡаёЎаёІаёҒ | PII, credentials | Encrypted + ACL |
| 3 - Confidential | аёҘаёұаёҡ | Financial, HR | ACL + logging |
| 2 - Internal | аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ | Policies, SOPs | Basic ACL |
| 1 - Public | а№Җаёӣаёҙаё”а№Җаёңаёў | Marketing, website | None |

### Data Handling Quick Reference

| Action | Restricted | Confidential | Internal |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Email | вқҢ | Encrypted | вң… |
| USB copy | вқҢ | Approval | вң… |
| Cloud upload | Encrypted only | Approved cloud | вң… |
| Print | Approval | вң… | вң… |

## File: 07_Compliance_Privacy/ISO27001_Controls_Mapping.en.md
# ISO 27001 Controls Mapping for SOC Operations

> Map SOC operational processes to ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Annex A controls.
>
> Use this document to demonstrate compliance during audits and identify coverage gaps.

---

## 1. Overview

ISO/IEC 27001:2022 is the international standard for Information Security Management Systems (ISMS). This mapping shows how SOC Standard Operating Procedures align with the **93 Annex A controls** grouped into 4 themes.

### Compliance Score

```mermaid
pie title ISO 27001 Annex A Coverage
    "Fully Covered" : 34
    "Partially Covered" : 18
    "Not SOC Scope" : 41
```

> **52 of 93** Annex A controls are directly or partially addressed by SOC operations.

---

## 2. Organizational Controls (A.5)

| Control | Title | SOC Coverage | SOC Document |
|:---:|:---|:---:|:---|

| A.5.2 | Information security roles | вң… Full | [SOC Team Structure](../06_Operations_Management/SOC_Team_Structure.en.md) |
| A.5.4 | Management responsibilities | вң… Full | [SOC Metrics & KPIs](../06_Operations_Management/SOC_Metrics.en.md) |
| A.5.5 | Contact with authorities | вң… Full | [Escalation Matrix](../05_Incident_Response/Escalation_Matrix.en.md) |
| A.5.7 | Threat intelligence | вң… Full | [TI Lifecycle](../06_Operations_Management/Threat_Intelligence_Lifecycle.en.md) |
| A.5.8 | Information security in project management | рҹҹЎ Partial | [Change Management](../06_Operations_Management/Change_Management.en.md) |
| A.5.23 | Information security for cloud services | вң… Full | [Cloud Security Monitoring](../06_Operations_Management/Cloud_Security_Monitoring.en.md) |
| A.5.24 | Incident management planning | вң… Full | [IR Framework](../05_Incident_Response/Framework.en.md) |
| A.5.25 | Assessment and decision on events | вң… Full | [Severity Matrix](../05_Incident_Response/Severity_Matrix.en.md), [Incident Classification](../05_Incident_Response/Incident_Classification.en.md) |
| A.5.26 | Response to incidents | вң… Full | [53 Playbooks](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Phishing.en.md), [Tier Runbooks](../05_Incident_Response/Runbooks/Tier1_Runbook.en.md) |
| A.5.27 | Learning from incidents | вң… Full | [Lessons Learned](../05_Incident_Response/Lessons_Learned_Template.en.md) |
| A.5.28 | Collection of evidence | вң… Full | [Evidence Collection](../05_Incident_Response/Evidence_Collection.en.md), [Forensic Investigation](../05_Incident_Response/Forensic_Investigation.en.md) |
| A.5.29 | Information security during disruption | вң… Full | [Disaster Recovery / BCP](../05_Incident_Response/Disaster_Recovery_BCP.en.md) |
| A.5.30 | ICT readiness for business continuity | рҹҹЎ Partial | [DR/BCP](../05_Incident_Response/Disaster_Recovery_BCP.en.md) |

| A.5.36 | Compliance with policies | рҹҹЎ Partial | [Compliance Gap Analysis](Compliance_Gap_Analysis.en.md) |
| A.5.37 | Documented operating procedures | вң… Full | This entire repository |

---

## 6. Gap Analysis Summary

### Areas with Strong Coverage (вң…)
- **Incident Management** (A.5.24вҖ“A.5.28) вҖ” Full lifecycle covered by IR Framework + 53 Playbooks
- **Threat Intelligence** (A.5.7) вҖ” Dedicated TI Lifecycle + TI Feeds Integration
- **Logging & Monitoring** (A.8.15вҖ“A.8.16) вҖ” Log Source Matrix + Network/Cloud Monitoring
- **Vulnerability Management** (A.8.8) вҖ” Dedicated SOP
- **Business Continuity** (A.5.29) вҖ” DR/BCP plan

### Areas Needing Attention (рҹҹЎ)
- **A.5.8 Project Management** вҖ” Add security review checklist for SOC tool deployments
- **A.8.17 Clock Sync** вҖ” Add NTP configuration guide to Log Source Onboarding
- **A.8.22 Network Segregation** вҖ” Add network zone documentation

### Out of SOC Scope (в¬ң)
- Physical security controls (A.7.1вҖ“A.7.8) вҖ” Facility management responsibility
- HR controls (A.6.2, A.6.5, A.6.6) вҖ” HR department responsibility
- Cryptography (A.8.24) вҖ” Development team responsibility

## Minimum Audit Evidence by Control Theme

| Theme | Minimum Evidence | Owner |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Incident management (A.5.24вҖ“A.5.28) | Approved framework, sample tickets, evidence records, lessons learned | IR Engineer |
| Logging and monitoring (A.8.15вҖ“A.8.16) | Log source inventory, health checks, alert review records | Security Engineer |
| Access and authentication (A.8.2, A.8.3, A.8.5) | Access review output, privileged approval trail, MFA coverage evidence | SOC Manager |
| Vulnerability management (A.8.8) | Scan cadence, remediation tracking, exception records | Security Engineer |
| Awareness and training (A.6.3) | Training completion records and exercise evidence | SOC Manager |

## Escalation Triggers for ISO 27001 Gaps

| Condition | Escalate To | SLA | Required Decision |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| Control marked full coverage has no current evidence | Compliance Officer + SOC Manager | Same business day | Downgrade status or restore evidence immediately |
| Repeated partial-control gaps remain open across two review cycles | CISO | At next governance review | Fund remediation or accept risk |
| Audit sample shows operating procedure not followed in production | CISO + Control owner | Immediate | Contain process failure and define corrective action |

---

## File: 07_Compliance_Privacy/ISO27001_Controls_Mapping.th.md
# ISO 27001 вҖ” аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҒаёЎаёӣаёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ SOC

> а№ҒаёЎаёӣаёҒаёЈаё°аёҡаё§аёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёҸаёҙаёҡаёұаё•аёҙаёҮаёІаёҷ SOC аёҒаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Annex A
>
> а№ғаёҠа№үа№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаёҷаёөа№үа№Җаёһаё·а№Ҳаёӯа№ҒаёӘаё”аёҮаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёӯаё”аё„аёҘа№үаёӯаёҮа№ғаёҷаёЈаё°аё«аё§а№ҲаёІаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈ Audit а№ҒаёҘаё°аёЈаё°аёҡаёёаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮаё§а№ҲаёІаёҮ

---

## 1. аё аёІаёһаёЈаё§аёЎ

ISO/IEC 27001:2022 а№Җаёӣа№ҮаёҷаёЎаёІаё•аёЈаёҗаёІаёҷаёӘаёІаёҒаёҘаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈаёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЎаёұа№Ҳаёҷаё„аёҮаёӣаёҘаёӯаё”аё аёұаёўаёӘаёІаёЈаёӘаёҷа№Җаё—аёЁ (ISMS) аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҒаёЎаёӣаёҷаёөа№үа№ҒаёӘаё”аёҮаё§а№ҲаёІ SOP аёӮаёӯаёҮ SOC аёӘаёӯаё”аё„аёҘа№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёұаёҡ **93 аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ Annex A** аё—аёөа№ҲаёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёҘаёёа№ҲаёЎа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ 4 аё«аёЎаё§аё”

```mermaid
pie title аё„аё§аёІаёЎаё„аёЈаёӯаёҡаё„аёҘаёёаёЎ ISO 27001 Annex A
    "аё„аёЈаёӯаёҡаё„аёҘаёёаёЎа№Җаё•а№ҮаёЎаё—аёөа№Ҳ" : 34
    "аё„аёЈаёӯаёҡаё„аёҘаёёаёЎаёҡаёІаёҮаёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷ" : 18
    "а№„аёЎа№Ҳаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳа№ғаёҷаёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё• SOC" : 41
```

> **52 аёҲаёІаёҒ 93** аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ Annex A а№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаё”аё№а№ҒаёҘа№Ӯаё”аёўаё•аёЈаёҮаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёҡаёІаёҮаёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаёҲаёІаёҒаёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёҸаёҙаёҡаёұаё•аёҙаёҮаёІаёҷ SOC

---

## 2. аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎаё”а№үаёІаёҷаёӯаёҮаё„а№ҢаёҒаёЈ (A.5)

| Control | аёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ | аё„аёЈаёӯаёҡаё„аёҘаёёаёЎ | а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈ SOC |
|:---:|:---|:---:|:---|
| A.5.1 | аёҷа№ӮаёўаёҡаёІаёўаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЎаёұа№Ҳаёҷаё„аёҮаёӣаёҘаёӯаё”аё аёұаёўаёӘаёІаёЈаёӘаёҷа№Җаё—аёЁ | вң… | [аёҷа№ӮаёўаёҡаёІаёўаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ](../06_Operations_Management/Access_Control.th.md) |
| A.5.2 | аёҡаё—аёҡаёІаё—аё”а№үаёІаёҷаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЎаёұа№Ҳаёҷаё„аёҮаёӣаёҘаёӯаё”аё аёұаёў | вң… | [а№Ӯаё„аёЈаёҮаёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮаё—аёөаёЎ SOC](../06_Operations_Management/SOC_Team_Structure.th.md) |
| A.5.7 | аёӮа№ҲаёІаё§аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҮаё аёұаёўаё„аёёаёҒаё„аёІаёЎ | вң… | [аё§аёҮаёҲаёЈаёҠаёөаё§аёҙаё• TI](../06_Operations_Management/Threat_Intelligence_Lifecycle.th.md) |
| A.5.24 | аёҒаёІаёЈаё§аёІаёҮа№ҒаёңаёҷаёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң | вң… | [аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҡ IR](../05_Incident_Response/Framework.th.md) |
| A.5.25 | аёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷа№ҒаёҘаё°аё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲа№ҖаёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң | вң… | [аё•аёІаёЈаёІаёҮаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ](../05_Incident_Response/Severity_Matrix.th.md) |
| A.5.26 | аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң | вң… | [53 Playbooks](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Phishing.th.md), [Runbooks](../05_Incident_Response/Runbooks/Tier1_Runbook.th.md) |
| A.5.27 | аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёЈаёөаёўаёҷаёЈаё№а№үаёҲаёІаёҒа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң | вң… | [аёҡаё—а№ҖаёЈаёөаёўаёҷ](../05_Incident_Response/Lessons_Learned_Template.th.md) |
| A.5.28 | аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҒа№ҮаёҡаёЈаё§аёҡаёЈаё§аёЎаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ | вң… | [аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ](../05_Incident_Response/Evidence_Collection.th.md) |
| A.5.29 | аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЎаёұа№Ҳаёҷаё„аёҮаёӣаёҘаёӯаё”аё аёұаёўа№ғаёҷаёҠа№Ҳаё§аёҮаё«аёўаёёаё”аёҠаё°аёҮаёұаёҒ | вң… | [а№Ғаёңаёҷ DR/BCP](../05_Incident_Response/Disaster_Recovery_BCP.th.md) |
| A.5.35 | аёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷаёӯаёҙаёӘаёЈаё° | вң… | [аёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷаё§аёёаё’аёҙаё аёІаё§аё° SOC](../06_Operations_Management/SOC_Maturity_Assessment.th.md) |

## 3. аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎаё”а№үаёІаёҷа№Җаё—аё„а№Ӯаёҷа№ӮаёҘаёўаёө (A.8) вҖ” аёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ SOC

| Control | аёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ | аё„аёЈаёӯаёҡаё„аёҘаёёаёЎ | а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈ SOC |
|:---:|:---|:---:|:---|
| A.8.2 | аёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ңа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮа№Ғаёҡаёҡ Privileged | вң… | [PB аёўаёҒаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ң](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Privilege_Escalation.th.md) |
| A.8.7 | аёҒаёІаёЈаёӣа№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёұаёҷаёЎаёұаёҘа№Ғаё§аёЈа№Ң | вң… | [PB аёЎаёұаёҘа№Ғаё§аёЈа№Ң](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Malware_Infection.th.md), [PB а№ҒаёЈаёҷаёӢаёұаёЎа№Ғаё§аёЈа№Ң](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Ransomware.th.md) |
| A.8.8 | аёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Ӯаё«аё§а№Ҳ | вң… | [аёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Ӯаё«аё§а№Ҳ](../06_Operations_Management/Vulnerability_Management.th.md) |
| A.8.15 | аёҒаёІаёЈаёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒ Log | вң… | [аё•аёІаёЈаёІаёҮа№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮ Log](../06_Operations_Management/Log_Source_Matrix.th.md) |
| A.8.16 | аёҒаёҙаёҲаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎа№Җаёқа№үаёІаёЈаё°аё§аёұаёҮ | вң… | [а№Җаёқа№үаёІаёЈаё°аё§аёұаёҮа№Җаё„аёЈаё·аёӯаёӮа№ҲаёІаёў](../06_Operations_Management/Network_Security_Monitoring.th.md) |

---

## аёӘаёЈаёёаёӣаё§а№ҲаёІаёҮ (Gap)

### аё„аёЈаёӯаёҡаё„аёҘаёёаёЎаё”аёө вң…
- **аёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң** (A.5.24вҖ“A.5.28) вҖ” аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҡ IR + 53 Playbooks
- **аёӮа№ҲаёІаё§аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҮаё аёұаёўаё„аёёаёҒаё„аёІаёЎ** (A.5.7) вҖ” TI Lifecycle + TI Feeds
- **аёҒаёІаёЈаёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒа№ҒаёҘаё°а№Җаёқа№үаёІаёЈаё°аё§аёұаёҮ** (A.8.15вҖ“A.8.16) вҖ” Log Source Matrix + Network/Cloud Monitoring

### аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёӣаёЈаёұаёҡаёӣаёЈаёёаёҮ рҹҹЎ
- **A.8.17 аёҒаёІаёЈаёӢаёҙаёҮаё„а№Ңа№Җаё§аёҘаёІ** вҖ” а№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎаё„аё№а№ҲаёЎаё·аёӯ NTP а№ғаёҷ Log Source Onboarding
- **A.8.22 аёҒаёІаёЈа№Ғаёҡа№ҲаёҮа№Җаё„аёЈаё·аёӯаёӮа№ҲаёІаёў** вҖ” а№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎа№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈ Network Zone

## аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•а№Ҳаёіаё•аёІаёЎаё«аёЎаё§аё”аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ (Minimum Audit Evidence by Control Theme)

| аё«аёЎаё§аё” | аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•а№Ҳаёі | аёңаё№а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҙаё”аёҠаёӯаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| аёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң (A.5.24вҖ“A.5.28) | framework аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§, ticket аё•аёұаё§аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮ, evidence record, lessons learned | IR Engineer |
| аёҒаёІаёЈаёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒа№ҒаёҘаё°а№Җаёқа№үаёІаёЈаё°аё§аёұаёҮ (A.8.15вҖ“A.8.16) | inventory аёӮаёӯаёҮ log source, health checks, аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒаёҒаёІаёЈ review alert | Security Engineer |
| аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮа№ҒаёҘаё°аёҒаёІаёЈаёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаё•аёұаё§аё•аёҷ (A.8.2, A.8.3, A.8.5) | аёңаёҘ access review, approval trail аёӮаёӯаёҮ privileged access, аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ MFA coverage | SOC Manager |
| аёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Ӯаё«аё§а№Ҳ (A.8.8) | cadence аёӮаёӯаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаёӘа№ҒаёҒаёҷ, remediation tracking, exception record | Security Engineer |
| аёҒаёІаёЈаёқаё¶аёҒаёӯаёҡаёЈаёЎа№ҒаёҘаё°аёҒаёІаёЈаёЈаёұаёҡаёЈаё№а№ү (A.6.3) | training completion record а№ҒаёҘаё°аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёқаё¶аёҒаёӢа№үаёӯаёЎ | SOC Manager |

## Trigger аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮаё§а№ҲаёІаёҮ ISO 27001 (Escalation Triggers for ISO 27001 Gaps)

| а№ҖаёҮаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аёӮ | аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё–аё¶аёҮ | SLA | аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№„аё”а№ү |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| control аё—аёөа№ҲаёЈаё°аёҡаёёаё§а№ҲаёІ full coverage а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёөаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёӣаёұаёҲаёҲаёёаёҡаёұаёҷаёЈаёӯаёҮаёЈаёұаёҡ | Compliance Officer + SOC Manager | аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷаё§аёұаёҷаё—аёіаёҒаёІаёЈа№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷ | аёҘаё”аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ coverage аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёҒаё№а№үаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө |
| partial-control gap а№Җаёӣаёҙаё”аё„а№үаёІаёҮа№ҖаёҒаёҙаёҷ 2 аёЈаёӯаёҡ review | CISO | а№ғаёҷ governance review аё–аёұаё”а№„аёӣ | аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙаёҮаёҡа№ҒаёҒа№үа№„аёӮаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёЈаёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ |
| audit sample аёһаёҡаё§а№ҲаёІ procedure а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаё–аё№аёҒаё—аёіаё•аёІаёЎа№ғаёҷ production | CISO + Control owner | аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө | аё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ process failure а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё” corrective action |

---

## File: 07_Compliance_Privacy/NIST_CSF_Mapping.en.md
# NIST Cybersecurity Framework 2.0 вҖ” SOC Mapping

> Maps SOC operational processes to NIST CSF 2.0 Functions and Categories
>
> Use this document to demonstrate alignment during audits and identify coverage gaps

---

## 1. Overview

The NIST Cybersecurity Framework (CSF) 2.0, released February 2024, organizes cybersecurity activities into **6 Functions** and **22 Categories**. This mapping shows how SOC SOPs address each function.

```mermaid
graph LR
    GV[рҹҸӣпёҸ GOVERN] --> ID[рҹ”Қ IDENTIFY]
    ID --> PR[рҹӣЎпёҸ PROTECT]
    PR --> DE[рҹ“Ў DETECT]
    DE --> RS[рҹҡЁ RESPOND]
    RS --> RC[рҹ”„ RECOVER]
    style GV fill:#6366f1,color:#fff
    style ID fill:#0ea5e9,color:#fff
    style PR fill:#22c55e,color:#fff
    style DE fill:#f59e0b,color:#fff
    style RS fill:#ef4444,color:#fff
    style RC fill:#8b5cf6,color:#fff
```

```mermaid
pie title SOC Coverage by CSF Function
    "Govern вҖ” Partial" : 3
    "Identify вҖ” Partial" : 3
    "Protect вҖ” Partial" : 4
    "Detect вҖ” Full" : 4
    "Respond вҖ” Full" : 5
    "Recover вҖ” Full" : 3
```

> **SOC directly covers 12/22 Categories** with full or substantial alignment. 10 remaining categories are outside core SOC scope (HR, procurement, physical security, etc.)

---

| Category | Description | Coverage | SOC Documents |
|:---:|:---|:---:|:---|
| RC.RP | Recovery Planning | вң… Full | [DR/BCP](../05_Incident_Response/Disaster_Recovery_BCP.en.md) |
| RC.CO | Recovery Communication | вң… Full | [SOC Communication SOP](../06_Operations_Management/SOC_Communication.en.md), [Escalation Matrix](../05_Incident_Response/Escalation_Matrix.en.md) |
| RC.IM | Recovery Improvements | вң… Full | [Lessons Learned](../05_Incident_Response/Lessons_Learned_Template.en.md), [Lessons Learned (Post-Incident)](../05_Incident_Response/Lessons_Learned_Template.en.md) |

---

## 8. Coverage Summary

| Function | Categories | SOC Covered | Key Strength |
|:---|:---:|:---:|:---|
| **Govern** | 6 | 3 full + 3 partial | Team structure, policies, oversight |
| **Identify** | 3 | 2 full + 1 partial | Risk assessment, improvement cycle |
| **Protect** | 5 | 3 full + 2 partial | IAM, training, DR/BCP |
| **Detect** | 3 | 3 full | Monitoring, Sigma rules, runbooks |
| **Respond** | 5 | 5 full | IR framework, 53 playbooks, forensics |
| **Recover** | 3 | 3 full | DR/BCP, lessons learned, comms |
| **Total** | **22** | **16 full + 6 partial** | |

### Gaps Requiring Attention рҹҹЎ

| Gap | Recommendation | Priority |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| ID.AM Asset Management | Integrate CMDB/asset inventory into Log Source Matrix | Medium |
| PR.DS Data Security | Expand DLP monitoring documentation | Medium |
| PR.PS Platform Security | Add SIEM/EDR hardening guide | Low |
| GV.OC Organizational Context | Reference enterprise risk appetite in SOC charter | Low |

## Minimum Evidence by CSF Function

| Function | Minimum Evidence | Owner |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Govern | Policy set, ownership matrix, governance review minutes | CISO / SOC Manager |
| Identify | Asset/risk inventory, gap analysis, review cadence | SOC Manager |
| Protect | Access review, training records, data-handling evidence | Security Engineer |
| Detect | Monitoring inventory, rule testing evidence, alert review samples | Security Engineer |
| Respond | Incident records, escalation trail, communication logs | IR Engineer |
| Recover | Recovery plans, post-incident improvements, executive updates | SOC Manager |

## Executive Decision Triggers

| Condition | Escalate To | SLA | Required Decision |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| Category marked full coverage lacks operating evidence | CISO | Same business day | Reclassify status or restore operation |
| Detect or Respond capability gap affects regulated or critical services | CISO + Business owner | Within 24 hours | Fund remediation or accept risk |
| Governance review finds repeated backlog with no owner | Executive sponsor | Next governance meeting | Assign accountable owner and due date |

---
