## File: 11_Reporting_Templates/Telemetry_Backlog_Prioritization.en.md
# Telemetry Backlog Prioritization Template

**Audience**: Security Engineer, SOC Manager, Platform Owner
**Purpose**: Use this template to rank telemetry onboarding and data quality work by security value, dependency, and implementation readiness.

```mermaid
graph TD
    A["Collect Telemetry Gaps"] --> B["Map to Use Cases and Assets"]
    B --> C["Score Readiness and Exposure"]
    C --> D["Rank Work Items"]
    D --> E["Track Delivery and Validation"]
```

## 1. Backlog Item Register

| ID | Telemetry Gap | Affected Asset or Service | Owner | Status |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---:|
| TEL-BL-[001] | | | | вҳҗ New вҳҗ Ranked вҳҗ In Progress вҳҗ Done |
| TEL-BL-[002] | | | | вҳҗ New вҳҗ Ranked вҳҗ In Progress вҳҗ Done |

## 2. Scoring Model

| Factor | Question | Score (1-5) |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Critical asset exposure | Does the gap affect a critical or regulated service? | |
| Detection dependency | How many use cases depend on this telemetry? | |
| Investigation dependency | Does incident response fail without this data? | |
| Implementation readiness | Are owner, integration path, and sample data ready? | |
| Data quality risk | Is current data missing, delayed, or unreliable? | |

## 3. Prioritization Table

| Item | Asset Exposure | Detection Dependency | IR Dependency | Readiness | Quality Risk | Total | Priority |
|:---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| | | | | | | | High / Medium / Low |
| | | | | | | | |

## 4. Review Rules

-   [ ] Prioritize telemetry that unlocks multiple high-priority use cases.
-   [ ] Escalate items affecting critical assets with no alternative data source.
-   [ ] Do not mark work complete until data quality and timestamp checks pass.
-   [ ] Re-score when service ownership, retention, or legal constraints change.

## Related Documents

-   [Log Source Onboarding Request](Log_Source_Onboarding_Request.en.md)
-   [SOC Service Catalog](../06_Operations_Management/SOC_Service_Catalog.en.md)
-   [Log Source Matrix](../06_Operations_Management/Log_Source_Matrix.en.md)
-   [Log Source Onboarding](../06_Operations_Management/Log_Source_Onboarding.en.md)

## References

-   [NIST SP 800-92](https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-92/final)
-   [Open Cybersecurity Schema Framework](https://schema.ocsf.io/)


---

## File: 11_Reporting_Templates/Telemetry_Backlog_Prioritization.th.md
# а№ҒаёҡаёҡаёҹаёӯаёЈа№ҢаёЎаёҲаёұаё”аёҘаёіаё”аёұаёҡ Telemetry Backlog

**аёҒаёҘаёёа№ҲаёЎа№Җаёӣа№үаёІаё«аёЎаёІаёў**: Security Engineer, SOC Manager, Platform Owner
**аё§аёұаё•аё–аёёаёӣаёЈаё°аёӘаёҮаё„а№Ң**: а№ғаёҠа№үа№ҒаёҡаёҡаёҹаёӯаёЈа№ҢаёЎаёҷаёөа№үа№Җаёһаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҲаёұаё”аёҘаёіаё”аёұаёҡаёҮаёІаёҷ onboarding telemetry а№ҒаёҘаё° data quality аё•аёІаёЎаё„аёёаё“аё„а№ҲаёІаё”а№үаёІаёҷаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӣаёҘаёӯаё”аё аёұаёў dependency а№ҒаёҘаё°аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎа№ғаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ implement

```mermaid
graph TD
    A["аёЈаё§аёҡаёЈаё§аёЎ Telemetry Gaps"] --> B["Map а№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ Use Cases а№ҒаёҘаё° Assets"]
    B --> C["а№ғаё«а№үаё„аё°а№Ғаёҷаёҷаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎа№ҒаёҘаё° Exposure"]
    C --> D["аёҲаёұаё”аёҘаёіаё”аёұаёҡаёҮаёІаёҷ"]
    D --> E["аё•аёҙаё”аё•аёІаёЎ Delivery а№ҒаёҘаё° Validation"]
```

## 1. аё—аё°а№ҖаёҡаёөаёўаёҷаёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈ Backlog

| ID | Telemetry Gap | Affected Asset or Service | Owner | Status |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---:|
| TEL-BL-[001] | | | | вҳҗ New вҳҗ Ranked вҳҗ In Progress вҳҗ Done |
| TEL-BL-[002] | | | | вҳҗ New вҳҗ Ranked вҳҗ In Progress вҳҗ Done |

## 2. а№ӮаёЎа№Җаё”аёҘаёҒаёІаёЈа№ғаё«а№үаё„аё°а№Ғаёҷаёҷ

| Factor | Question | Score (1-5) |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Critical asset exposure | Gap аёҷаёөа№үаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ critical аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ regulated service аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ | |
| Detection dependency | аёЎаёө use cases аёҒаёөа№ҲаёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёһаё¶а№ҲаёҮ telemetry аёҷаёөа№ү | |
| Investigation dependency | Incident response аёҘа№үаёЎа№Җаё«аёҘаё§аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳаё«аёІаёҒа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёөаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёҷаёөа№ү | |
| Implementation readiness | аёЎаёө owner, integration path, а№ҒаёҘаё° sample data аёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ | |
| Data quality risk | аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӣаёұаёҲаёҲаёёаёҡаёұаёҷаёӮаёІаё” аё«аёІаёў аёҠа№үаёІ аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳаёҷа№ҲаёІа№ҖаёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯаё–аё·аёӯаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ | |

## 3. аё•аёІаёЈаёІаёҮаёҲаёұаё”аёҘаёіаё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ

| Item | Asset Exposure | Detection Dependency | IR Dependency | Readiness | Quality Risk | Total | Priority |
|:---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| | | | | | | | High / Medium / Low |
| | | | | | | | |

## 4. аёҒаё•аёҙаёҒаёІаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ

-   [ ] а№ғаё«а№ү priority аёҒаёұаёҡ telemetry аё—аёөа№ҲаёӣаёҘаё”аёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒ high-priority use cases а№„аё”а№үаё«аёҘаёІаёўаёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈ
-   [ ] escalate аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№ҲаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ critical assets а№ҒаёҘаё°а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө alternative data source
-   [ ] аё«а№үаёІаёЎаёӣаёҙаё”аёҮаёІаёҷаёҲаёҷаёҒаё§а№ҲаёІаёҲаё°аёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ data quality а№ҒаёҘаё° timestamp checks
-   [ ] re-score а№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯ service ownership, retention, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ legal constraints а№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷ

## 5. а№ҖаёӘа№үаёҷаё—аёІаёҮаёӘа№ҲаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№ғаёҷ Backlog а№ҒаёҘаё° Governance

-   [ ] а№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎаёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҖаёЈаёҙа№ҲаёЎаёҮаёІаёҷа№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳа№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ log source onboarding request
-   [ ] а№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎаёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№ҲаёҡаёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒ detection use case аёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚа№„аёӣ weekly telemetry review а№ҒаёҘаё° monthly governance review а№ҖаёЎаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮа№ҖаёҠаёҙаёҮаёҡаёЈаёҙаёҒаёІаёЈ
-   [ ] аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ blind spot аё—аёөа№Ҳаё„аёҮаёӯаёўаё№а№ҲаёҷаёІаёҷаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ regulated data а№„аёӣ quarterly risk аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ board review аё•аёІаёЎа№ҖаёҒаё“аё‘а№Ңаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ (Related Documents)

-   [Log Source Onboarding Request](Log_Source_Onboarding_Request.th.md)
-   [SOC Service Catalog](../06_Operations_Management/SOC_Service_Catalog.th.md)

-   [Log Source Onboarding](../06_Operations_Management/Log_Source_Onboarding.th.md)

## File: 11_Reporting_Templates/Telemetry_Ownership_RACI.en.md
# Telemetry Ownership RACI

**Audience**: Security Engineer, Platform Owner, SOC Manager, Detection Engineer
**Purpose**: Use this document to assign ownership for telemetry onboarding, parsing, data quality, incident support, and outage recovery.

```mermaid
graph TD
    A["Telemetry Request or Gap"] --> B["Assign Data and Security Owners"]
    B --> C["Onboard and Validate"]
    C --> D["Monitor Health"]
    D --> E["Fix, Escalate, or Accept Risk"]
```

## 1. Scope

-   [ ] Use this RACI for new log onboarding, parser defects, ingestion failures, and critical data quality gaps.
-   [ ] Apply this RACI in weekly telemetry review and service onboarding decisions.

## 2. RACI Matrix

| Activity | Security Engineer | Platform Owner | SOC Manager | Detection Engineer | Data Owner |
|:---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| Submit onboarding request | I | C | I | C | **R** |
| Approve onboarding scope | C | **A** | C | I | R |
| Build integration or parser | **R** | C | I | C | I |
| Validate required fields | **R** | C | I | C | I |
| Confirm use case dependency | C | I | I | **R** | I |
| Escalate ingestion failure | **R** | C | A | I | I |
| Approve workaround or deferment | C | C | **A** | I | I |
| Confirm recovery and close gap | **R** | C | A | C | I |

*R = Responsible, A = Accountable, C = Consulted, I = Informed*

## 3. Minimum Ownership Rules

-   [ ] Every critical telemetry source must have a named platform owner and security owner.
-   [ ] Data quality failures on critical assets must be escalated the same week.
-   [ ] No onboarding item closes until validation evidence is attached.
-   [ ] Temporary workarounds must have an expiry date and owner.

## Related Documents

-   [Log Source Onboarding Request](Log_Source_Onboarding_Request.en.md)
-   [Telemetry Backlog Prioritization](Telemetry_Backlog_Prioritization.en.md)
-   [Weekly Telemetry Review Pack](Weekly_Telemetry_Review_Pack.en.md)
-   [SOC Service Catalog](../06_Operations_Management/SOC_Service_Catalog.en.md)

## References

-   [NIST SP 800-92](https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-92/final)
-   [Open Cybersecurity Schema Framework](https://schema.ocsf.io/)


---

## File: 11_Reporting_Templates/Telemetry_Ownership_RACI.th.md
# RACI аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷа№ҖаёҲа№үаёІаёӮаёӯаёҮаёҮаёІаёҷ Telemetry

**аёҒаёҘаёёа№ҲаёЎа№Җаёӣа№үаёІаё«аёЎаёІаёў**: Security Engineer, Platform Owner, SOC Manager, Detection Engineer
**аё§аёұаё•аё–аёёаёӣаёЈаё°аёӘаёҮаё„а№Ң**: а№ғаёҠа№үа№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаёҷаёөа№үа№Җаёһаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё” owner аёӮаёӯаёҮаёҮаёІаёҷ telemetry аё•аёұа№үаёҮа№Ғаё•а№Ҳ onboarding, parsing, data quality, incident support, а№ҒаёҘаё° outage recovery

```mermaid
graph TD
    A["аё„аёіаёӮаёӯ telemetry аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ gap"] --> B["аёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё” data owner а№ҒаёҘаё° security owner"]
    B --> C["Onboard а№ҒаёҘаё°аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ"]
    C --> D["аё•аёҙаё”аё•аёІаёЎаёӘаёёаёӮаё аёІаёһаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ"]
    D --> E["а№ҒаёҒа№үа№„аёӮ аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёўаёӯаёЎаёЈаёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ"]
```

## 1. аёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё•аёҒаёІаёЈа№ғаёҠа№үаёҮаёІаёҷ

-   [ ] а№ғаёҠа№ү RACI аёҷаёөа№үаёҒаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈ onboard log а№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ parser defects ingestion failures а№ҒаёҘаё° critical data quality gaps
-   [ ] а№ғаёҠа№ү RACI аёҷаёөа№үа№ғаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёЈаё°аёҠаёёаёЎ weekly telemetry review а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲ service onboarding

## 2. RACI Matrix

| Activity | Security Engineer | Platform Owner | SOC Manager | Detection Engineer | Data Owner |
|:---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| аёӘа№ҲаёҮаё„аёіаёӮаёӯ onboarding | I | C | I | C | **R** |
| аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙаёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё• onboarding | C | **A** | C | I | R |
| аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ integration аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ parser | **R** | C | I | C | I |
| validate required fields | **R** | C | I | C | I |
| аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ use case dependency | C | I | I | **R** | I |
| escalate ingestion failure | **R** | C | A | I | I |
| аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ workaround аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ deferment | C | C | **A** | I | I |
| аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ recovery а№ҒаёҘаё°аёӣаёҙаё” gap | **R** | C | A | C | I |

*R = Responsible, A = Accountable, C = Consulted, I = Informed*

## 3. аёҒаё•аёҙаёҒаёІаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•а№Ҳаёіа№ҖаёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ Ownership

-   [ ] telemetry source аё—аёөа№ҲаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚаё—аёёаёҒаё•аёұаё§аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёЎаёө platform owner а№ҒаёҘаё° security owner аёҠаёұаё”а№ҖаёҲаёҷ
-   [ ] data quality failures аёҡаёҷ critical assets аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё–аё№аёҒ escalate аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷаёӘаёұаёӣаё”аёІаё«а№Ңа№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷ
-   [ ] аё«а№үаёІаёЎаёӣаёҙаё” onboarding item аё«аёІаёҒаёўаёұаёҮа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө validation evidence
-   [ ] workaround аёҠаёұа№Ҳаё§аё„аёЈаёІаё§аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёЎаёө expiry date а№ҒаёҘаё° owner

## 4. а№ҖаёӘа№үаёҷаё—аёІаёҮаёӘа№ҲаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№ғаёҷ Governance

-   [ ] blind spot аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ ingestion failure аё—аёөа№ҲаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ critical services аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё–аё№аёҒаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІ weekly telemetry review а№ҒаёҘаё° monthly governance review
-   [ ] аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёўаёӯаёЎаёЈаёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаёҠаёұа№Ҳаё§аё„аёЈаёІаё§аё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎа№„аёӣ quarterly risk acceptance review

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ (Related Documents)

-   [Log Source Onboarding Request](Log_Source_Onboarding_Request.th.md)
-   [Telemetry Backlog Prioritization](Telemetry_Backlog_Prioritization.th.md)
-   [Weekly Telemetry Review Pack](Weekly_Telemetry_Review_Pack.th.md)
-   [SOC Service Catalog](../06_Operations_Management/SOC_Service_Catalog.th.md)

## References

-   [NIST SP 800-92](https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-92/final)

## File: 11_Reporting_Templates/Threat_Hunt_Request_Template.en.md
# Threat Hunt Request Template

**Audience**: Threat Hunter, SOC Manager, Incident Responder, Detection Engineer
**Purpose**: Use this template to request a threat hunt based on a hypothesis, campaign concern, or control gap.

```mermaid
graph TD
    A["Submit Hunt Request"] --> B["Define Hypothesis and Scope"]
    B --> C["Check Data Availability"]
    C --> D["Schedule Hunt"]
    D --> E["Convert Findings to Actions"]
```

## 1. Request Header

| Field | Value |
|:---|:---|
| **Request ID** | HUNT-[YYYYMMDD]-[001] |
| **Requester** | |
| **Date Submitted** | |
| **Reason for Hunt** | вҳҗ Hypothesis В· вҳҗ Incident Follow-up В· вҳҗ Threat Intel В· вҳҗ Audit / Gap |

## 2. Hunt Objective

| Question | Answer |
|:---|:---|
| **Hypothesis or concern** | |
| **Assets or users in scope** | |
| **Time window** | |
| **Expected indicators or behaviors** | |

## 3. Data and Constraints

| Item | Status | Notes |
|:---|:---:|:---|
| Relevant logs available | вҳҗ | |
| EDR or endpoint data available | вҳҗ | |
| Cloud or identity data available | вҳҗ | |
| Known constraints documented | вҳҗ | |

## 4. Expected Outputs

-   [ ] Hunt result summary
-   [ ] Findings requiring incident escalation
-   [ ] Detection candidates
-   [ ] Telemetry or coverage gaps

## 5. Approval and Scheduling

| Role | Name | Decision | Date |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| Threat Hunt Lead | | вҳҗ Accept В· вҳҗ Reject В· вҳҗ Need More Info | |
| SOC Manager | | вҳҗ Scheduled | |

## Related Documents

-   [SOC Service Catalog](../06_Operations_Management/SOC_Service_Catalog.en.md)
-   [Threat Hunting Playbook](../05_Incident_Response/Threat_Hunting_Playbook.en.md)
-   [Threat Intelligence Lifecycle](../06_Operations_Management/Threat_Intelligence_Lifecycle.en.md)
-   [SOC Use Case Library](../08_Detection_Engineering/SOC_Use_Case_Library.en.md)

## References

-   [MITRE ATT&CK](https://attack.mitre.org/)
-   [NIST SP 800-61 Rev. 2](https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-61/rev-2/final)


---

## File: 11_Reporting_Templates/Threat_Hunt_Request_Template.th.md
# а№ҒаёҡаёҡаёҹаёӯаёЈа№ҢаёЎаё„аёіаёӮаёӯ Threat Hunt

**аёҒаёҘаёёа№ҲаёЎа№Җаёӣа№үаёІаё«аёЎаёІаёў**: Threat Hunter, SOC Manager, Incident Responder, Detection Engineer
**аё§аёұаё•аё–аёёаёӣаёЈаё°аёӘаёҮаё„а№Ң**: а№ғаёҠа№үа№ҒаёҡаёҡаёҹаёӯаёЈа№ҢаёЎаёҷаёөа№үа№Җаёһаё·а№ҲаёӯаёӮаёӯ threat hunt аёҲаёІаёҒ hypothesis, campaign concern, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ control gap

```mermaid
graph TD
    A["аёӘа№ҲаёҮаё„аёіаёӮаёӯ hunt"] --> B["аёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё” hypothesis а№ҒаёҘаё°аёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё•"]
    B --> C["аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎаёӮаёӯаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ"]
    C --> D["аёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё”аё•аёІаёЈаёІаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈ hunt"]
    D --> E["а№ҒаёӣаёҘаёҮаёңаёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳаёһаёҡа№Җаёӣа№ҮаёҷаёҮаёІаёҷаё•а№Ҳаёӯ"]
```

## 1. аёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаё«аёұаё§аё„аёіаёӮаёӯ

| Field | Value |
|:---|:---|
| **Request ID** | HUNT-[YYYYMMDD]-[001] |
| **аёңаё№а№үаёЈа№үаёӯаёҮаёӮаёӯ** | |
| **аё§аёұаёҷаё—аёөа№ҲаёӘа№ҲаёҮаё„аёіаёӮаёӯ** | |
| **а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёңаёҘаёӮаёӯаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈ hunt** | вҳҗ Hypothesis В· вҳҗ аё•аёҙаё”аё•аёІаёЎ incident В· вҳҗ Threat Intel В· вҳҗ Audit / Gap |

## 2. а№Җаёӣа№үаёІаё«аёЎаёІаёўаёӮаёӯаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈ Hunt

| Question | Answer |
|:---|:---|
| **Hypothesis аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёӮа№үаёӯаёҒаёұаёҮаё§аёҘаё«аёҘаёұаёҒ** | |
| **Assets аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ users аё—аёөа№Ҳаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳа№ғаёҷ scope** | |
| **аёҠа№Ҳаё§аёҮа№Җаё§аёҘаёІ** | |
| **Indicators аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёһаёӨаё•аёҙаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎаё—аёөа№Ҳаё„аёІаё”аё§а№ҲаёІаёҲаё°аёһаёҡ** | |

## 3. аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘа№ҒаёҘаё°аёӮа№үаёӯаёҲаёіаёҒаёұаё”

| Item | Status | Notes |
|:---|:---:|:---|
| аёЎаёө logs аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮаёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎ | вҳҗ | |
| аёЎаёө EDR аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ endpoint data аёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎ | вҳҗ | |
| аёЎаёө cloud аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ identity data аёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎ | вҳҗ | |
| аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒаёӮа№үаёӯаёҲаёіаёҒаёұаё”аё—аёөа№Ҳаё—аёЈаёІаёҡа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§ | вҳҗ | |

## 4. аёңаёҘаёҘаёұаёһаёҳа№Ңаё—аёөа№Ҳаё„аёІаё”аё«аё§аёұаёҮ

-   [ ] аёӘаёЈаёёаёӣаёңаёҘаёҒаёІаёЈ hunt
-   [ ] Findings аё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ escalate а№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ incident
-   [ ] Detection candidates
-   [ ] аёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮаё§а№ҲаёІаёҮаё”а№үаёІаёҷ telemetry аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ coverage

## 5. аёҒаёІаёЈаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙа№ҒаёҘаё°аёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёұаё”аё•аёІаёЈаёІаёҮ

| Role | Name | Decision | Date |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| Threat Hunt Lead | | вҳҗ Accept В· вҳҗ Reject В· вҳҗ Need More Info | |
| SOC Manager | | вҳҗ Scheduled | |

## 6. а№ҖаёӘа№үаёҷаё—аёІаёҮаёӘа№ҲаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯаё«аёҘаёұаёҮаёҲаёҡ Hunt

-   [ ] аё«аёІаёҒаёһаёҡ incident indicator аё—аёөа№Ҳаёҷа№ҲаёІа№ҖаёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯаё–аё·аёӯ а№ғаё«а№үаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІ incident response аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө
-   [ ] аё«аёІаёҒаёһаёҡ detection candidate а№ғаё«а№үа№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎа№„аёӣ detection request аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ detection backlog
-   [ ] аё«аёІаёҒаёһаёҡ telemetry gap аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ blind spot а№ғаё«а№үа№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎа№„аёӣ telemetry backlog аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ log source onboarding request

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ (Related Documents)

## File: 11_Reporting_Templates/Weekly_Detection_Review_Pack.en.md
# Weekly Detection Review Pack

**Audience**: Detection Engineer, SOC Manager, Threat Hunter, Senior Analyst
**Purpose**: Use this pack to review weekly detection performance, backlog movement, false positive trends, and decisions required for tuning or deployment.

```mermaid
graph TD
    A["Collect Detection Metrics"] --> B["Review Noise and Coverage"]
    B --> C["Check Backlog Movement"]
    C --> D["Decide Tune, Deploy, or Defer"]
    D --> E["Assign Owners and Due Dates"]
```

## 1. Meeting Header

| Field | Value |
|:---|:---|
| **Review Week** | [YYYY-WW] |
| **Prepared By** | |
| **Review Date** | |
| **Chair** | |

## 2. Minimum Inputs

-   [ ] Detection backlog updated before the meeting
-   [ ] False positive trends for the week available
-   [ ] Missed detection or hunt findings captured
-   [ ] Rule test or deployment outcomes recorded

## 3. Detection Health Summary

| Area | Status | Notes |
|:---|:---:|:---|
| New detections requested | рҹҹў / рҹҹЎ / рҹ”ҙ | |
| Detections deployed this week | рҹҹў / рҹҹЎ / рҹ”ҙ | |
| False positive pressure | рҹҹў / рҹҹЎ / рҹ”ҙ | |
| Coverage gaps affecting critical assets | рҹҹў / рҹҹЎ / рҹ”ҙ | |

## 4. Weekly Escalation Thresholds

| Condition | Threshold | Default Decision | Move To |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **False positive pressure** | Same rule or use case creates analyst disruption for 2 straight weeks | Tune, suppress narrowly, or rollback | Monthly Governance Review if service quality is affected |
| **Missed detection** | Confirmed gap on Critical/High incident path | Build or re-test immediately | Weekly Telemetry Review if missing data blocks fix |
| **Coverage gap** | Critical asset or top-priority use case has no deployable detection | Prioritize backlog item above normal queue | Monthly Governance Review if unresolved by month-end |
| **Deployment instability** | Rule rollback, emergency disablement, or repeated test failure | Freeze release and investigate | Monthly Remediation Review if change is tied to incident/audit action |

## 5. Backlog Review

| Item | Priority | Owner | Current State | Next Action |
|:---|:---:|:---|:---|:---|
| | High / Medium / Low | | | |
| | | | | |

## 6. Tuning and Quality Review

| Topic | Finding | Decision | Owner |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| False positives | | Tune / Monitor / Defer | |
| Missed detections | | Build / Re-test / Escalate | |
| Retired rules | | Retire / Keep / Replace | |

## 7. Decisions Required This Week

-   [ ] Approve priority changes for detection backlog items.
-   [ ] Approve emergency tuning or rollback if analyst load is at risk.
-   [ ] Escalate telemetry gaps that block high-priority detections.
-   [ ] Assign due dates for every accepted action.

## 8. Carry-Forward Rules

| If Weekly Review Finds | Move To | Required Output |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **Telemetry dependency blocks detection release** | Weekly Telemetry Review Pack | Missing source, parser issue, affected use case, and due date |
| **Detection gap contributes to open incident remediation** | Monthly Remediation Review Pack | Remediation item owner, affected incident, and validation requirement |
| **Repeated noise or coverage issue impacts SLA or analyst load** | Monthly Governance Review Pack | Service impact summary, owner, and escalation recommendation |

## Related Documents

-   [Detection Backlog Prioritization](Detection_Backlog_Prioritization.en.md)
-   [Detection Request Template](Detection_Request_Template.en.md)
-   [Alert Tuning](../06_Operations_Management/Alert_Tuning.en.md)
-   [Detection Rule Testing](../06_Operations_Management/Detection_Rule_Testing.en.md)
-   [Weekly Telemetry Review Pack](Weekly_Telemetry_Review_Pack.en.md)
-   [Monthly Remediation Review Pack](Monthly_Remediation_Review_Pack.en.md)
-   [Monthly Governance Review Pack](Monthly_Governance_Review_Pack.en.md)

## References

-   [MITRE ATT&CK](https://attack.mitre.org/)
-   [Sigma Rule Specification](https://sigmahq.io/sigma-specification/specification/sigma-rules-specification.html)


---

## File: 11_Reporting_Templates/Weekly_Detection_Review_Pack.th.md
# аёҠаёёаё”аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ Detection аёӣаёЈаё°аёҲаёіаёӘаёұаёӣаё”аёІаё«а№Ң

**аёҒаёҘаёёа№ҲаёЎа№Җаёӣа№үаёІаё«аёЎаёІаёў**: Detection Engineer, SOC Manager, Threat Hunter, Senior Analyst
**аё§аёұаё•аё–аёёаёӣаёЈаё°аёӘаёҮаё„а№Ң**: а№ғаёҠа№үаёҠаёёаё”а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаёҷаёөа№үа№Җаёһаё·а№Ҳаёӯаё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷаёңаёҘаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёіаёҮаёІаёҷаёӮаёӯаёҮ detection аёЈаёІаёўаёӘаёұаёӣаё”аёІаё«а№Ң аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№Җаё„аёҘаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аё«аё§аёӮаёӯаёҮ backlog а№Ғаёҷаё§а№Ӯаёҷа№үаёЎ false positive а№ҒаёҘаё°аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё”а№Үаёҷаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲа№ҖаёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ tuning аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ deployment

```mermaid
graph TD
    A["аёЈаё§аёҡаёЈаё§аёЎ Detection Metrics"] --> B["аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ Noise а№ҒаёҘаё° Coverage"]
    B --> C["аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаё„аё·аёҡаё«аёҷа№үаёІаёӮаёӯаёҮ backlog"]
    C --> D["аё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲаёӣаёЈаёұаёҡа№Ғаё•а№ҲаёҮ аёӣаёҘа№Ҳаёӯаёўа№ғаёҠа№үаёҮаёІаёҷ аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№ҖаёҘаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷ"]
    D --> E["аёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё” owner а№ҒаёҘаё°аё§аёұаёҷаё„аёЈаёҡаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё”"]
```

## 1. аёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаё«аёұаё§аёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёЈаё°аёҠаёёаёЎ

| Field | Value |
|:---|:---|
| **Review Week** | [YYYY-WW] |
| **аёңаё№а№үаёҲаёұаё”аё—аёі** | |
| **аё§аёұаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳаё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ** | |
| **аёӣаёЈаё°аёҳаёІаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёЈаё°аёҠаёёаёЎ** | |

## 2. аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•а№Ҳаёіаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёЎаёө

-   [ ] аёӯаёұаёӣа№Җаё”аё• detection backlog аёҒа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёӣаёЈаё°аёҠаёёаёЎа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§
-   [ ] аёЎаёө false positive trends аёӮаёӯаёҮаёӘаёұаёӣаё”аёІаё«а№Ң
-   [ ] аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒ missed detection аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ hunt findings а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§
-   [ ] аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒаёңаёҘ rule test аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ deployment а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§

## 3. аёӘаёЈаёёаёӣаёӘаёёаёӮаё аёІаёһаёӮаёӯаёҮ Detection

| Area | Status | Notes |
|:---|:---:|:---|
| аё„аёіаёӮаёӯ detection а№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ | рҹҹў / рҹҹЎ / рҹ”ҙ | |
| detections аё—аёөа№Ҳ deploy аёӘаёұаёӣаё”аёІаё«а№Ңаёҷаёөа№ү | рҹҹў / рҹҹЎ / рҹ”ҙ | |
| а№ҒаёЈаёҮаёҒаё”аё”аёұаёҷаёҲаёІаёҒ false positive | рҹҹў / рҹҹЎ / рҹ”ҙ | |
| coverage gaps аё—аёөа№ҲаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ critical assets | рҹҹў / рҹҹЎ / рҹ”ҙ | |

## 4. а№ҖаёҒаё“аё‘а№ҢаёҒаёІаёЈаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаёЈаёІаёўаёӘаёұаёӣаё”аёІаё«а№Ң

| а№ҖаёҮаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аёӮ | а№ҖаёҒаё“аё‘а№Ң | аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲаё•аёұа№үаёҮаё•а№үаёҷ | аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёӘа№ҲаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№„аёӣаё—аёөа№Ҳ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **false positive pressure** | rule аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ use case а№Җаё”аёҙаёЎаё—аёіа№ғаё«а№ү analyst аёЈаёұаёҡаё аёІаёЈаё°аё«аёҷаёұаёҒаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаёҷаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ 2 аёӘаёұаёӣаё”аёІаё«а№Ң | tune, suppress а№Ғаёҡаёҡа№Ғаё„аёҡ, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ rollback | Monthly Governance Review аё–а№үаёІаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ service quality |
| **missed detection** | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ detection gap аёҡаёҷа№ҖаёӘа№үаёҷаё—аёІаёҮ incident аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ Critical/High | build аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ re-test аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө | Weekly Telemetry Review аё–а№үаёІаё•аёҙаё”аё—аёөа№ҲаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘа№„аёЎа№Ҳаёһаёӯ |
| **coverage gap** | critical asset аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ top-priority use case аёўаёұаёҮа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө detection аё—аёөа№Ҳ deploy а№„аё”а№ү | аё”аёұаёҷ backlog item аёӮаё¶а№үаёҷа№Җаё«аёҷаё·аёӯаё„аёҙаё§аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ | Monthly Governance Review аё–а№үаёІаёўаёұаёҮа№„аёЎа№Ҳаёӣаёҙаё”аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷаёӘаёҙа№үаёҷа№Җаё”аё·аёӯаёҷ |
| **deployment instability** | аёЎаёө rule rollback, emergency disable, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ test fail аёӢа№үаёі | freeze release а№ҒаёҘаё°аёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ | Monthly Remediation Review аё–а№үаёІа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҡ incident/audit action |

## 5. аёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ Backlog

| Item | Priority | Owner | Current State | Next Action |
|:---|:---:|:---|:---|:---|
| | High / Medium / Low | | | |
| | | | | |

## 6. аёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ Tuning а№ҒаёҘаё°аё„аёёаё“аё аёІаёһ

| Topic | Finding | Decision | Owner |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| False positives | | Tune / Monitor / Defer | |
| Missed detections | | Build / Re-test / Escalate | |
| Retired rules | | Retire / Keep / Replace | |

## 7. аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё”а№Үаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲаёӘаёұаёӣаё”аёІаё«а№Ңаёҷаёөа№ү

-   [ ] аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҷаёҘаёіаё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚаёӮаёӯаёҮ detection backlog
-   [ ] аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ emergency tuning аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ rollback аё«аёІаёҒ analyst load а№ҖаёЈаёҙа№ҲаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ
-   [ ] escalate telemetry gaps аё—аёөа№ҲаёҡаёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒ high-priority detections
-   [ ] аёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё” due date а№ғаё«а№ү action аё—аёөа№ҲаёЈаёұаёҡа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§аё—аёёаёҒаёӮа№үаёӯ

## 8. аёҒаё•аёҙаёҒаёІаёҒаёІаёЈаёӘа№ҲаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯ

| аё–а№үаёІаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷаёЈаёІаёўаёӘаёұаёӣаё”аёІаё«а№Ңаёһаёҡаё§а№ҲаёІ | аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёӘа№ҲаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№„аёӣаё—аёөа№Ҳ | аёңаёҘаёҘаёұаёһаёҳа№Ңаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёЎаёө |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **telemetry dependency аёҡаёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒаёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёҘа№Ҳаёӯаёў detection** | Weekly Telemetry Review Pack | а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аёөа№ҲаёӮаёІаё”, parser issue, use case аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ, а№ҒаёҘаё° due date |
| **detection gap аё—аёіа№ғаё«а№ү remediation аёӮаёӯаёҮ incident аёўаёұаёҮа№„аёЎа№Ҳаёӣаёҙаё”** | Monthly Remediation Review Pack | remediation item owner incident аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ а№ҒаёҘаё°аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ validate |
| **noise аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ coverage issue аёӢа№үаёіаёҲаёҷаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ SLA аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ analyst load** | Monthly Governance Review Pack | service impact summary, owner, а№ҒаёҘаё°аёӮа№үаёӯа№ҖаёӘаёҷаёӯа№Ғаёҷаё°а№ғаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ escalate |

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ (Related Documents)

-   [Sigma Rule Specification](https://sigmahq.io/sigma-specification/specification/sigma-rules-specification.html)

## File: 11_Reporting_Templates/Weekly_Telemetry_Review_Pack.en.md
# Weekly Telemetry Review Pack

**Audience**: Security Engineer, SOC Manager, Platform Owner, Detection Engineer
**Purpose**: Use this pack to review telemetry onboarding progress, data quality issues, ingestion failures, and decisions affecting detection readiness.

```mermaid
graph TD
    A["Collect Telemetry Health Data"] --> B["Review Quality and Gaps"]
    B --> C["Check Backlog and Dependencies"]
    C --> D["Decide Fix, Escalate, or Defer"]
    D --> E["Assign Owners and Dates"]
```

## 1. Meeting Header

| Field | Value |
|:---|:---|
| **Review Week** | [YYYY-WW] |
| **Prepared By** | |
| **Review Date** | |
| **Chair** | |

## 2. Minimum Inputs

-   [ ] Telemetry backlog updated
-   [ ] Ingestion failures or parser defects summarized
-   [ ] Data quality checks completed for critical sources
-   [ ] New onboarding requests logged

## 3. Telemetry Health Summary

| Area | Status | Notes |
|:---|:---:|:---|
| Critical source availability | рҹҹў / рҹҹЎ / рҹ”ҙ | |
| Data quality and timestamp health | рҹҹў / рҹҹЎ / рҹ”ҙ | |
| Onboarding progress | рҹҹў / рҹҹЎ / рҹ”ҙ | |
| Detection blockers caused by telemetry | рҹҹў / рҹҹЎ / рҹ”ҙ | |

## 4. Weekly Escalation Thresholds

| Condition | Threshold | Default Decision | Move To |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **Critical source unavailable** | Log source outage or unusable data for crown-jewel or regulated service | Restore immediately or approve workaround | Monthly Governance Review if unresolved in current month |
| **Parser or schema defect** | Breaks detection logic or investigation for prioritized use case | Fix parser or revert change | Weekly Detection Review when rule release depends on the fix |
| **Onboarding slippage** | High-priority source misses target date with no validated blocker | Reprioritize or escalate dependency owner | Monthly Governance Review if business risk grows |
| **Blind spot requires temporary acceptance** | No viable short-term fix for required telemetry | Apply compensating control and document gap | Quarterly Risk Acceptance Review if it persists |

## 5. Backlog and Dependency Review

| Item | Priority | Dependency | Owner | Next Action |
|:---|:---:|:---|:---|:---|
| | High / Medium / Low | | | |
| | | | | |

## 6. Decisions Required This Week

-   [ ] Escalate sources causing critical detection blind spots.
-   [ ] Approve schedule changes for onboarding or parser fixes.
-   [ ] Confirm data owner actions and due dates.
-   [ ] Record whether any gap requires risk acceptance or temporary workaround.

## 7. Carry-Forward Rules

| If Weekly Review Finds | Move To | Required Output |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **Telemetry defect blocks detection release** | Weekly Detection Review Pack | Affected rules, interim tuning decision, and expected fix date |
| **Telemetry issue leaves incident remediation incomplete** | Monthly Remediation Review Pack | Open remediation item, affected asset/service, and owner |
| **Persistent visibility gap affects service quality or compliance** | Monthly Governance Review Pack | Blind spot statement, business impact, and escalation recommendation |
| **Long-lived blind spot needs formal tolerance** | Quarterly Risk Acceptance Review Pack | Residual risk statement, compensating control, and expiry recommendation |

## Related Documents

-   [Telemetry Backlog Prioritization](Telemetry_Backlog_Prioritization.en.md)
-   [Log Source Onboarding Request](Log_Source_Onboarding_Request.en.md)
-   [Log Source Matrix](../06_Operations_Management/Log_Source_Matrix.en.md)
-   [SOC Service Catalog](../06_Operations_Management/SOC_Service_Catalog.en.md)
-   [Weekly Detection Review Pack](Weekly_Detection_Review_Pack.en.md)
-   [Monthly Remediation Review Pack](Monthly_Remediation_Review_Pack.en.md)
-   [Monthly Governance Review Pack](Monthly_Governance_Review_Pack.en.md)

## References

-   [NIST SP 800-92](https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-92/final)
-   [Open Cybersecurity Schema Framework](https://schema.ocsf.io/)


---

## File: 11_Reporting_Templates/Weekly_Telemetry_Review_Pack.th.md
# аёҠаёёаё”аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ Telemetry аёӣаёЈаё°аёҲаёіаёӘаёұаёӣаё”аёІаё«а№Ң

**аёҒаёҘаёёа№ҲаёЎа№Җаёӣа№үаёІаё«аёЎаёІаёў**: Security Engineer, SOC Manager, Platform Owner, Detection Engineer
**аё§аёұаё•аё–аёёаёӣаёЈаё°аёӘаёҮаё„а№Ң**: а№ғаёҠа№үаёҠаёёаё”а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаёҷаёөа№үа№Җаёһаё·а№Ҳаёӯаё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷаё„аё§аёІаёЎаё„аё·аёҡаё«аёҷа№үаёІа№ғаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ onboarding telemetry аёӣаёұаёҚаё«аёІ data quality, ingestion failure, а№ҒаёҘаё°аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё”а№Үаёҷаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲаё—аёөа№ҲаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ detection readiness

```mermaid
graph TD
    A["аёЈаё§аёҡаёЈаё§аёЎаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӘаёёаёӮаё аёІаёһаёӮаёӯаёҮ telemetry"] --> B["аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷаё„аёёаё“аё аёІаёһа№ҒаёҘаё°аёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮаё§а№ҲаёІаёҮ"]
    B --> C["аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ backlog а№ҒаёҘаё° dependency"]
    C --> D["аё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲа№ҒаёҒа№үа№„аёӮ аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№ҖаёҘаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷ"]
    D --> E["аёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё” owner а№ҒаёҘаё°аё§аёұаёҷаё„аёЈаёҡаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё”"]
```

## 1. аёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаё«аёұаё§аёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёЈаё°аёҠаёёаёЎ

| Field | Value |
|:---|:---|
| **Review Week** | [YYYY-WW] |
| **аёңаё№а№үаёҲаёұаё”аё—аёі** | |
| **аё§аёұаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳаё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ** | |
| **аёӣаёЈаё°аёҳаёІаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёЈаё°аёҠаёёаёЎ** | |

## 2. аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•а№Ҳаёіаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёЎаёө

-   [ ] аёӯаёұаёӣа№Җаё”аё• telemetry backlog а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§
-   [ ] аёӘаёЈаёёаёӣ ingestion failures аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ parser defects а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§
-   [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ data quality checks аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ critical sources а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§
-   [ ] аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒаё„аёіаёӮаёӯ onboarding а№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§

## 3. аёӘаёЈаёёаёӣаёӘаёёаёӮаё аёІаёһаёӮаёӯаёҮ Telemetry

| Area | Status | Notes |
|:---|:---:|:---|
| аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎаёӮаёӯаёҮ critical sources | рҹҹў / рҹҹЎ / рҹ”ҙ | |
| data quality а№ҒаёҘаё° timestamp health | рҹҹў / рҹҹЎ / рҹ”ҙ | |
| аё„аё§аёІаёЎаё„аё·аёҡаё«аёҷа№үаёІаёӮаёӯаёҮ onboarding | рҹҹў / рҹҹЎ / рҹ”ҙ | |
| detection blockers аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёҙаё”аёҲаёІаёҒ telemetry | рҹҹў / рҹҹЎ / рҹ”ҙ | |

## 4. а№ҖаёҒаё“аё‘а№ҢаёҒаёІаёЈаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаёЈаёІаёўаёӘаёұаёӣаё”аёІаё«а№Ң

| а№ҖаёҮаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аёӮ | а№ҖаёҒаё“аё‘а№Ң | аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲаё•аёұа№үаёҮаё•а№үаёҷ | аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёӘа№ҲаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№„аёӣаё—аёөа№Ҳ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **critical source а№ғаёҠа№үаёҮаёІаёҷа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№ү** | log source outage аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘа№ғаёҠа№үа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ crown-jewel аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ regulated service | аёҒаё№а№үаё„аё·аёҷаё—аёұаёҷаё—аёөаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ workaround | Monthly Governance Review аё–а№үаёІаёўаёұаёҮа№„аёЎа№Ҳаёҹаё·а№үаёҷа№ғаёҷа№Җаё”аё·аёӯаёҷаёҷаёөа№ү |
| **parser аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ schema defect** | аёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ detection logic аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёҒаёІаёЈаёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷаёӮаёӯаёҮ prioritized use case | а№ҒаёҒа№ү parser аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ revert change | Weekly Detection Review а№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯ rule release аёЈаёӯ fix аёҷаёөа№үаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳ |
| **onboarding аёҘа№ҲаёІаёҠа№үаёІ** | high-priority source аёһаёҘаёІаё” target date а№Ӯаё”аёўа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө blocker аё—аёөа№Ҳаёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷа№„аё”а№ү | reprioritize аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ escalate а№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ dependency owner | Monthly Governance Review аё–а№үаёІ business risk аёӘаё№аёҮаёӮаё¶а№үаёҷ |
| **blind spot аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёўаёӯаёЎаёЈаёұаёҡаёҠаёұа№Ҳаё§аё„аёЈаёІаё§** | а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө short-term fix аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№үа№„аё”а№үаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ telemetry аё—аёөа№ҲаёҲаёіа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ | а№ғаёҠа№ү compensating control а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒ gap | Quarterly Risk Acceptance Review аё–а№үаёІаёўаё·аё”а№Җаёўаё·а№үаёӯ |

## 5. аёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ Backlog а№ҒаёҘаё° Dependency

| Item | Priority | Dependency | Owner | Next Action |
|:---|:---:|:---|:---|:---|
| | High / Medium / Low | | | |
| | | | | |

## 6. аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё”а№Үаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲаёӘаёұаёӣаё”аёІаё«а№Ңаёҷаёөа№ү

-   [ ] escalate а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳаё—аёіа№ғаё«а№үа№ҖаёҒаёҙаё” critical detection blind spots
-   [ ] аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷ schedule аёӮаёӯаёҮ onboarding аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ parser fixes
-   [ ] аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ action а№ҒаёҘаё° due date аёӮаёӯаёҮ data owner
-   [ ] аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒаё§а№ҲаёІаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮаё§а№ҲаёІаёҮа№ғаё”аё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ғаёҠа№ү risk acceptance аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ workaround аёҠаёұа№Ҳаё§аё„аёЈаёІаё§

## 7. аёҒаё•аёҙаёҒаёІаёҒаёІаёЈаёӘа№ҲаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯ

| аё–а№үаёІаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷаёЈаёІаёўаёӘаёұаёӣаё”аёІаё«а№Ңаёһаёҡаё§а№ҲаёІ | аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёӘа№ҲаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№„аёӣаё—аёөа№Ҳ | аёңаёҘаёҘаёұаёһаёҳа№Ңаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёЎаёө |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **telemetry defect аёҡаёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒ detection release** | Weekly Detection Review Pack | rules аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ, interim tuning decision, а№ҒаёҘаё°аё§аёұаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳаё„аёІаё”аё§а№ҲаёІаёҲаё° fix |
| **telemetry issue аё—аёіа№ғаё«а№ү remediation аёӮаёӯаёҮ incident аёўаёұаёҮа№„аёЎа№Ҳаёӣаёҙаё”** | Monthly Remediation Review Pack | remediation item, asset/service аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ, а№ҒаёҘаё° owner |
| **visibility gap аё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаёҷаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёҲаёҷаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ service quality аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ compliance** | Monthly Governance Review Pack | blind spot statement, business impact, а№ҒаёҘаё°аёӮа№үаёӯа№ҖаёӘаёҷаёӯа№Ғаёҷаё°а№ғаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ escalate |
| **blind spot аёӯаёўаё№а№ҲаёўаёІаё§аёҲаёҷаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёўаёӯаёЎаёЈаёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ** | Quarterly Risk Acceptance Review Pack | residual risk statement, compensating control, а№ҒаёҘаё°аёӮа№үаёӯа№ҖаёӘаёҷаёӯа№ҖаёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаё§аёұаёҷаё«аёЎаё”аёӯаёІаёўаёё |

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ (Related Documents)

-   [Telemetry Backlog Prioritization](Telemetry_Backlog_Prioritization.th.md)
-   [Log Source Onboarding Request](Log_Source_Onboarding_Request.th.md)
-   [Log Source Matrix](../06_Operations_Management/Log_Source_Matrix.th.md)
-   [SOC Service Catalog](../06_Operations_Management/SOC_Service_Catalog.th.md)

-   [Monthly Remediation Review Pack](Monthly_Remediation_Review_Pack.th.md)
-   [Monthly Governance Review Pack](Monthly_Governance_Review_Pack.th.md)

## References

## File: 11_Reporting_Templates/change_request_rfc.en.md
# Request for Change (RFC)

> **Instructions**: Complete all sections before submitting to the Change Advisory Board (CAB). Emergency changes may skip CAB but require SOC Manager + CISO verbal approval and retrospective review within 48 hours.

---

## Header

| Field | Value |
|:---|:---|
| **RFC ID** | #RFC-YYYYMMDD-XX |
| **Requester** | [Name / Role] |
| **Date Submitted** | YYYY-MM-DD |
| **Target Date** | YYYY-MM-DD |
| **Change Type** | вҳҗ Standard В· вҳҗ Normal В· вҳҗ Emergency |
| **Priority** | вҳҗ Critical В· вҳҗ High В· вҳҗ Medium В· вҳҗ Low |
| **Environment** | вҳҗ Production В· вҳҗ Staging В· вҳҗ Development |

---

## 1. Description of Change

*What exactly is being changed? Be specific about components, versions, and configurations.*

| Aspect | Details |
|:---|:---|
| **Component** | [SIEM / EDR / SOAR / Network / Other] |
| **Change Summary** | [e.g., Deploy new detection rule 'Detect Mimikatz T1003'] |
| **Scope** | [Which systems/tenants/regions affected] |
| **Version** | From: [current] вҶ’ To: [target] |

---

## 2. Justification

*Why is this change necessary? What risk does it mitigate?*

| Question | Answer |
|:---|:---|
| **Business Need** | |
| **Risk Mitigated** | |
| **Consequences of NOT Changing** | |
| **Regulatory Requirement?** | вҳҗ Yes (specify) В· вҳҗ No |

---

## 3. Impact Analysis

| Dimension | Assessment |
|:---|:---|
| **Affected Components** | [List all systems] |
| **Affected Teams** | [SOC / IT Ops / Network / Users] |
| **Risk of Failure** | вҳҗ Low В· вҳҗ Medium В· вҳҗ High |
| **Downtime Required** | вҳҗ Yes (duration: ____) В· вҳҗ No |
| **Performance Impact** | вҳҗ None В· вҳҗ Temporary degradation В· вҳҗ Significant |
| **False Positive Risk** | вҳҗ Low В· вҳҗ Medium В· вҳҗ High (for detection rules) |
| **User Notification Needed** | вҳҗ Yes В· вҳҗ No |

---

## 4. Implementation Plan

| # | Step | Responsible | Duration | Checkpoint |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| 1 | Pre-change backup/snapshot | | | вҳҗ |
| 2 | [Implementation step] | | | вҳҗ |
| 3 | [Implementation step] | | | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Post-change validation | | | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Monitoring period | | | вҳҗ |

**Maintenance Window**: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM вҖ“ HH:MM (UTC)

---

## 5. Testing & Validation

| Test | Expected Result | Actual Result | Pass? |
|:---|:---|:---|:---:|
| Functional test | | | вҳҗ |
| Performance test | | | вҳҗ |
| Alert validation (if detection rule) | | | вҳҗ |
| No regression on existing rules | | | вҳҗ |

---

## 6. Rollback Plan

*Step-by-step instructions to revert the change if it fails.*

| # | Rollback Step | Responsible | Duration |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---|
| 1 | | | |
| 2 | | | |
| 3 | Verify rollback successful | | |

**Rollback Trigger**: [What conditions trigger a rollback?]
**Maximum Acceptable Downtime**: [Duration]

---

## 7. Communication Plan

| When | Who | Channel | Message |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Before change | [Affected teams] | [Email/Chat] | Planned change notification |
| During change | [SOC team] | [Chat] | Status updates |
| After change | [All stakeholders] | [Email] | Completion confirmation |
| If failed | [Management] | [Phone + Email] | Rollback notification |

---

## 8. Approval (CAB)

| Role | Name | Decision | Date |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| SOC Manager | | вҳҗ Approved В· вҳҗ Rejected | |
| IT Operations | | вҳҗ Approved В· вҳҗ Rejected | |
| Security Lead | | вҳҗ Approved В· вҳҗ Rejected | |
| CISO (Critical only) | | вҳҗ Approved В· вҳҗ Rejected | |

**CAB Decision**: вҳҗ Approved В· вҳҗ Approved with Conditions В· вҳҗ Deferred В· вҳҗ Rejected

**Conditions (if any)**: [Enter approval conditions or state "None"]

---

## 9. Post-Implementation Review

| Metric | Value |
|:---|:---|
| **Change Successful?** | вҳҗ Yes В· вҳҗ Partial В· вҳҗ No (rolled back) |
| **Actual Implementation Time** | |
| **Issues Encountered** | |
| **Lessons Learned** | |
| **Follow-up Actions** | |

---

## Risk Assessment Matrix

| Risk Factor | Low (1) | Medium (2) | High (3) |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **Scope** | Single rule/dashboard | Multiple tools/configs | Core infrastructure |
| **Reversibility** | Instant rollback | Rollback < 1 hour | Rollback > 1 hour or destructive |
| **Impact if Failed** | Minor inconvenience | Alert gaps (< 1 hour) | Monitoring blindspot or data loss |
| **Testing** | Fully tested in lab | Partially tested | Cannot test in advance |
| **Timing** | During change window | During business hours | During active incident |

**Risk Score** = Sum of all factors (5-15)
- **5-7**: Low risk вҶ’ SOC Lead approval
- **8-10**: Medium risk вҶ’ SOC Manager approval
- **11-15**: High risk вҶ’ CISO approval + CAB review

## Approval Matrix

| Change Type | Risk Level | Approver | Lead Time |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| New detection rule (test mode) | Low | SOC Lead | Same day |
| Detection rule to production | Low-Medium | SOC Lead + peer review | 24 hours |
| SIEM configuration | Medium | SOC Manager | 48 hours |
| New log source onboarding | Medium | SOC Manager | 1 week |
| Agent deployment (fleet-wide) | High | SOC Manager + IT Lead | 1 week |
| Major platform upgrade | High | CISO + CAB | 2 weeks |
| Tool replacement/migration | High | CISO + Board | 1 month |

## Post-Change Validation Checklist

```
в–Ў Change applied successfully
в–Ў No error messages in logs
в–Ў System health dashboards normal
в–Ў Test alert fires correctly (if rule change)
в–Ў Data flow confirmed (if source/pipeline change)
в–Ў No unexpected FP increase
в–Ў Performance baseline unchanged
в–Ў Rollback plan confirmed working
в–Ў Change ticket updated and closed
в–Ў Team notified of change completion
```

## Related Documents

- [Deployment Procedures](../02_Platform_Operations/Deployment_Procedures.en.md)
- [Incident Report Template](incident_report.en.md)
- [Change Management SOP](../06_Operations_Management/Change_Management.en.md)
- [SOC Assessment Checklist](../06_Operations_Management/SOC_Assessment_Checklist.en.md)

## References

- [ITIL Change Management](https://www.axelos.com/certifications/itil-service-management)
- [NIST SP 800-128 вҖ” Configuration Management](https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-128/final)


---

## File: 11_Reporting_Templates/change_request_rfc.th.md
# а№ҒаёҡаёҡаёҹаёӯаёЈа№ҢаёЎаёЈа№үаёӯаёҮаёӮаёӯаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷа№ҒаёӣаёҘаёҮ (Request for Change - RFC)

> **аё„аёіа№Ғаёҷаё°аёҷаёі**: аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҒаё—аёёаёҒаёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаёҒа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёӘа№ҲаёҮ CAB аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ Emergency change аёӘаёІаёЎаёІаёЈаё–аёӮа№үаёІаёЎ CAB а№Ғаё•а№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙаё§аёІаёҲаёІаёҲаёІаёҒ SOC Manager + CISO а№ҒаёҘаё°аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷаёўа№үаёӯаёҷаё«аёҘаёұаёҮаё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ 48 аёҠаёұа№Ҳаё§а№ӮаёЎаёҮ

---

## аёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаё«аёұаё§

| аёҹаёҙаёҘаё”а№Ң | аё„а№ҲаёІ |
|:---|:---|
| **аёЈаё«аёұаёӘ RFC** | #RFC-YYYYMMDD-XX |
| **аёңаё№а№үаёЈа№үаёӯаёҮаёӮаёӯ** | [аёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ / аё•аёіа№Ғаё«аёҷа№ҲаёҮ] |
| **аё§аёұаёҷаё—аёөа№ҲаёӘа№ҲаёҮ** | YYYY-MM-DD |
| **аё§аёұаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳа№Җаёӣа№үаёІаё«аёЎаёІаёў** | YYYY-MM-DD |
| **аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—** | вҳҗ Standard В· вҳҗ Normal В· вҳҗ Emergency |
| **аёҘаёіаё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ** | вҳҗ Critical В· вҳҗ High В· вҳҗ Medium В· вҳҗ Low |
| **аёӘаё аёІаёһа№Ғаё§аё”аёҘа№үаёӯаёЎ** | вҳҗ Production В· вҳҗ Staging В· вҳҗ Development |

---

## 1. аёЈаёІаёўаёҘаё°а№Җаёӯаёөаёўаё”аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷа№ҒаёӣаёҘаёҮ

| аёЎаёҙаё•аёҙ | аёЈаёІаёўаёҘаё°а№Җаёӯаёөаёўаё” |
|:---|:---|
| **аёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаёӣаёЈаё°аёҒаёӯаёҡ** | [SIEM / EDR / SOAR / Network / аёӯаё·а№Ҳаёҷа№Ҷ] |
| **аёӘаёЈаёёаёӣаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷа№ҒаёӣаёҘаёҮ** | [а№ҖаёҠа№Ҳаёҷ аё•аёҙаё”аё•аёұа№үаёҮаёҒаёҺаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡа№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ 'Detect Mimikatz T1003'] |
| **аёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё•** | [аёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ/tenant/region аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ] |
| **а№Җаё§аёӯаёЈа№ҢаёҠаёұаёҷ** | аёҲаёІаёҒ: [аёӣаёұаёҲаёҲаёёаёҡаёұаёҷ] вҶ’ а№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ: [а№Җаёӣа№үаёІаё«аёЎаёІаёў] |

---

## 2. а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёңаёҘаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёҲаёіа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ

| аё„аёіаё–аёІаёЎ | аё„аёіаё•аёӯаёҡ |
|:---|:---|
| **аё„аё§аёІаёЎаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёІаёҮаёҳаёёаёЈаёҒаёҙаёҲ** | |
| **аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаё—аёөа№ҲаёҘаё”а№„аё”а№ү** | |
| **аёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡаё«аёІаёҒа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷ** | |
| **аёӮа№үаёӯаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё”аёҒаёҺаёЈаё°а№Җаёҡаёөаёўаёҡ?** | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ (аёЈаё°аёҡаёё) В· вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№Ҳ |

---

## 3. аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№ҢаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ

| аёЎаёҙаё•аёҙ | аёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷ |
|:---|:---|
| **аёЈаё°аёҡаёҡаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ** | [аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡаё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё”] |
| **аё—аёөаёЎаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ** | [SOC / IT Ops / Network / аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү] |
| **аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаё—аёөа№ҲаёҲаё°аёҘа№үаёЎа№Җаё«аёҘаё§** | вҳҗ аё•а№Ҳаёі В· вҳҗ аёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ В· вҳҗ аёӘаё№аёҮ |
| **аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё«аёўаёёаё”аёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ** | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ (аёЈаё°аёўаё°а№Җаё§аёҘаёІ: ____) В· вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№Ҳ |
| **аёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ Performance** | вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө В· вҳҗ аёҘаё”аёҘаёҮаёҠаёұа№Ҳаё§аё„аёЈаёІаё§ В· вҳҗ аёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ |
| **аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ False Positive** | вҳҗ аё•а№Ҳаёі В· вҳҗ аёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ В· вҳҗ аёӘаё№аёҮ |

---

## 4. а№ҒаёңаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ

| # | аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷ | аёңаё№а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҙаё”аёҠаёӯаёҡ | аёЈаё°аёўаё°а№Җаё§аёҘаёІ | а№ҖаёҠа№Үаё„аёһаёӯаёўаё•а№Ң |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| 1 | аёӘаёіаёЈаёӯаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ/snapshot аёҒа№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷ | | | вҳҗ |
| 2 | [аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ] | | | вҳҗ |
| 3 | [аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ] | | | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡаё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷ | | | вҳҗ |
| 5 | аёЈаё°аёўаё°а№Җаё§аёҘаёІа№Җаёқа№үаёІаёЈаё°аё§аёұаёҮ | | | вҳҗ |

---

## 5. аёҒаёІаёЈаё—аё”аёӘаёӯаёҡа№ҒаёҘаё°аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ

| аёҒаёІаёЈаё—аё”аёӘаёӯаёҡ | аёңаёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳаё„аёІаё”аё«аё§аёұаёҮ | аёңаёҘаёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮ | аёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ? |
|:---|:---|:---|:---:|
| аё—аё”аёӘаёӯаёҡаёҹаёұаёҮаёҒа№ҢаёҠаёұаёҷ | | | вҳҗ |
| аё—аё”аёӘаёӯаёҡ Performance | | | вҳҗ |
| аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ Alert (аёҒаёҺаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ) | | | вҳҗ |
| а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө regression аёҒаёҺа№Җаё”аёҙаёЎ | | | вҳҗ |

---

## 6. а№Ғаёңаёҷаё–аёӯаёўаёҒаёҘаёұаёҡ (Rollback)

| # | аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷ Rollback | аёңаё№а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҙаё”аёҠаёӯаёҡ | аёЈаё°аёўаё°а№Җаё§аёҘаёІ |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---|
| 1 | | | |
| 2 | | | |
| 3 | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ rollback аёӘаёіа№ҖаёЈа№ҮаёҲ | | |

**а№ҖаёҮаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аёӮ Rollback**: [аёӯаё°а№„аёЈаёҲаё°аё—аёіа№ғаё«а№үаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ rollback?]

---

## 7. аёҒаёІаёЈаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ (CAB)

| аё•аёіа№Ғаё«аёҷа№ҲаёҮ | аёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ | аёңаёҘаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷ | аё§аёұаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳ |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| SOC Manager | | вҳҗ аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ В· вҳҗ аёӣаёҸаёҙа№ҖаёӘаёҳ | |
| IT Operations | | вҳҗ аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ В· вҳҗ аёӣаёҸаёҙа№ҖаёӘаёҳ | |
| Security Lead | | вҳҗ аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ В· вҳҗ аёӣаёҸаёҙа№ҖаёӘаёҳ | |
| CISO (а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё° Critical) | | вҳҗ аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ В· вҳҗ аёӣаёҸаёҙа№ҖаёӘаёҳ | |

---

## 8. аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷаё«аёҘаёұаёҮаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ

| аё•аёұаё§аёҠаёөа№үаё§аёұаё” | аё„а№ҲаёІ |
|:---|:---|
| **а№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷа№ҒаёӣаёҘаёҮаёӘаёіа№ҖаёЈа№ҮаёҲ?** | вҳҗ аёӘаёіа№ҖаёЈа№ҮаёҲ В· вҳҗ аёҡаёІаёҮаёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷ В· вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№ҲаёӘаёіа№ҖаёЈа№ҮаёҲ (rollback) |
| **а№Җаё§аёҘаёІаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮ** | |
| **аёӣаёұаёҚаё«аёІаё—аёөа№Ҳаёһаёҡ** | |
| **аёҡаё—а№ҖаёЈаёөаёўаёҷ** | |

---

## а№ҖаёҒаё“аё‘а№ҢаёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ

| аёӣаёұаёҲаёҲаёұаёў | аё•а№Ҳаёі (1) | аёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ (2) | аёӘаё№аёҮ (3) |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **аёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё•** | Rule/dashboard а№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§ | аё«аёҘаёІаёўа№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯ/config | Core infrastructure |
| **аёўа№үаёӯаёҷаёҒаёҘаёұаёҡ** | Rollback аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө | Rollback < 1 аёҠаёЎ. | Rollback > 1 аёҠаёЎ. |
| **аёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ** | а№„аёЎа№ҲаёӘаё°аё”аё§аёҒа№ҖаёҘа№ҮаёҒаёҷа№үаёӯаёў | Alert gap < 1 аёҠаёЎ. | аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӘаё№аёҚаё«аёІаёў |
| **аёҒаёІаёЈаё—аё”аёӘаёӯаёҡ** | аё—аё”аёӘаёӯаёҡа№Җаё•а№ҮаёЎа№ғаёҷ lab | аё—аё”аёӘаёӯаёҡаёҡаёІаёҮаёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷ | аё—аё”аёӘаёӯаёҡаёҘа№Ҳаё§аёҮаё«аёҷа№үаёІа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№ү |
| **а№Җаё§аёҘаёІ** | Change window | а№Җаё§аёҘаёІаё—аёіаёҒаёІаёЈ | аёЈаё°аё«аё§а№ҲаёІаёҮ incident |

**аё„аё°а№Ғаёҷаёҷа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ** = аёЈаё§аёЎаё—аёёаёҒаёӣаёұаёҲаёҲаёұаёў (5-15)
- **5-7**: аё•а№Ҳаёі вҶ’ SOC Lead аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ
- **8-10**: аёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ вҶ’ SOC Manager аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ
- **11-15**: аёӘаё№аёҮ вҶ’ CISO аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ + CAB review

## Approval Matrix

| аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё— Change | аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ | аёңаё№а№үаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | Lead Time |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Detection rule а№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ (test) | аё•а№Ҳаёі | SOC Lead | аё§аёұаёҷа№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§ |
| Detection rule (production) | аё•а№Ҳаёі-аёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ | SOC Lead + peer review | 24 аёҠаёЎ. |
| SIEM configuration | аёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ | SOC Manager | 48 аёҠаёЎ. |
| Log source а№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ | аёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ | SOC Manager | 1 аёӘаёұаёӣаё”аёІаё«а№Ң |
| Agent deploy (fleet) | аёӘаё№аёҮ | SOC Manager + IT Lead | 1 аёӘаёұаёӣаё”аёІаё«а№Ң |
| Platform upgrade аё«аёҘаёұаёҒ | аёӘаё№аёҮ | CISO + CAB | 2 аёӘаёұаёӣаё”аёІаё«а№Ң |

## Checklist аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷ

```
в–Ў Change аё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёӘаёіа№ҖаёЈа№ҮаёҲ
в–Ў а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө error а№ғаёҷ logs
в–Ў Dashboard аёӘаёёаёӮаё аёІаёһаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡаёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ
в–Ў Test alert аё—аёіаёҮаёІаёҷаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ (аё–а№үаёІа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷ rule)
в–Ў Data flow аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§ (аё–а№үаёІа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷ source/pipeline)
в–Ў а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө FP а№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎаёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ
в–Ў Performance baseline а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷ
в–Ў Rollback plan аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаё§а№ҲаёІа№ғаёҠа№үа№„аё”а№ү
в–Ў Change ticket аёӯаёұаёӣа№Җаё”аё•а№ҒаёҘаё°аёӣаёҙаё”а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§
в–Ў а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаё—аёөаёЎаё§а№ҲаёІ change а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ
```

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ

- [аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ Deploy](../02_Platform_Operations/Deployment_Procedures.th.md)
- [а№ҒаёҡаёҡаёҹаёӯаёЈа№ҢаёЎ Incident](incident_report.th.md)
- [SOP аёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷа№ҒаёӣаёҘаёҮ](../06_Operations_Management/Change_Management.th.md)

## аё•аёІаёЈаёІаёҮаёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаёӮаёӯаёҮ Change

| аёӣаёұаёҲаёҲаёұаёў | Low (1) | Medium (2) | High (3) |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| аёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡаё•а№Ҳаёӯ Production | а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө | аёҡаёІаёҮаёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷ | аё—аёұа№үаёҮаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ |
| аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӢаёұаёҡаёӢа№үаёӯаёҷ | Simple | Multi-step | Cross-system |
| Rollback Difficulty | Auto | Manual < 1hr | Manual > 1hr |
| Downtime Required | а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө | < 30 min | > 30 min |

## а№Җаё—аёЎа№ҖаёһаёҘаё•аёҒаёІаёЈаёӘаё·а№ҲаёӯаёӘаёІаёЈа№ҖаёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ Change

```
Subject: [RFC-XXXX] Change Notification
- Change: [аёЈаёІаёўаёҘаё°а№Җаёӯаёөаёўаё”]
- Window: [аё§аёұаёҷа№Җаё§аёҘаёІ]
- Impact: [аёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ]
- Contact: [аёңаё№а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҙаё”аёҠаёӯаёҡ]
- Rollback ETA: [а№Җаё§аёҘаёІаё–а№үаёІаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ rollback]
```

## аё„аё№а№ҲаёЎаё·аёӯаёўа№ҲаёӯаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ

| Risk Level | Approver | Turnaround |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Low | Team lead | Same day |
| Medium | Manager | 2 days |
| High | CAB | 5 days |

## References

- [ITIL Change Management](https://www.axelos.com/certifications/itil-service-management)
- [NIST SP 800-128](https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-128/final)

## File: 11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.en.md
# Incident Report Template

> **Instructions**: Complete all mandatory sections (вҳ…) within 24 hours of incident closure. For Critical/High severity incidents, the executive summary must be submitted to management within 4 hours of detection.

---

## Header

| Field | Value |
|:---|:---|
| **Incident ID** | #YYYYMMDD-00X |
| **Date Detected** | YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM (UTC) |
| **Date Closed** | YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM (UTC) |
| **Analyst** | [Name / Role] |
| **Severity** | вҳҗ Critical В· вҳҗ High В· вҳҗ Medium В· вҳҗ Low |
| **Status** | вҳҗ Open В· вҳҗ Investigating В· вҳҗ Contained В· вҳҗ Closed |
| **TLP** | вҳҗ RED В· вҳҗ AMBER+STRICT В· вҳҗ AMBER В· вҳҗ GREEN В· вҳҗ CLEAR |
| **Category** | [Phishing / Malware / Ransomware / Account Compromise / DDoS / Data Breach / Other] |
| **MITRE ATT&CK** | [Technique IDs, e.g., T1566.001, T1059.001] |

---

## вҳ… 1. Executive Summary

*2вҖ“3 sentence overview: What happened, what was the impact, and what was the outcome?*

---

## вҳ… 2. Timeline (UTC)

| Time | Phase | Event |
|:---|:---|:---|
| YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM | **Initial Activity** | First attacker action (if known) |
| YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM | **Detection** | Alert triggered by [Rule Name / Source] |
| YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM | **Triage** | Analyst acknowledged and began investigation |
| YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM | **Escalation** | Escalated to [Tier 2 / SOC Lead / Management] |
| YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM | **Containment** | [Action taken, e.g., host isolated, account disabled] |
| YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM | **Eradication** | [Action taken, e.g., malware removed, vulnerability patched] |
| YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM | **Recovery** | System returned to production |
| YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM | **Monitoring** | Enhanced monitoring period began |
| YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM | **Closure** | Incident declared resolved |

---

## вҳ… 3. Impact Assessment

| Dimension | Assessment |
|:---|:---|
| **Affected Hosts** | [List hostnames/IPs] |
| **Affected Users** | [Count + list if < 10] |
| **Affected Services** | [Applications, databases, etc.] |
| **Data Loss** | вҳҗ None В· вҳҗ Suspected В· вҳҗ Confirmed (details: ____) |
| **Data Type** | вҳҗ PII В· вҳҗ Financial В· вҳҗ Credentials В· вҳҗ IP В· вҳҗ Other |
| **Business Impact** | [Downtime duration, revenue impact, reputational risk] |
| **Regulatory Notification Required** | вҳҗ Yes (PDPA 72h / Other) В· вҳҗ No |

---

## вҳ… 4. Root Cause Analysis

### VERIS "4A" Framework

| Dimension | Assessment |
|:---|:---|
| **Actor** | вҳҗ External В· вҳҗ Internal В· вҳҗ Partner В· вҳҗ Unknown |
| **Action** | вҳҗ Malware В· вҳҗ Hacking В· вҳҗ Social Engineering В· вҳҗ Error В· вҳҗ Misuse В· вҳҗ Physical |
| **Asset** | вҳҗ Server В· вҳҗ Workstation В· вҳҗ User Device В· вҳҗ Network В· вҳҗ Cloud В· вҳҗ Person В· вҳҗ Data |
| **Attribute** | вҳҗ Confidentiality В· вҳҗ Integrity В· вҳҗ Availability |

### Root Cause Detail

| Question | Answer |
|:---|:---|
| **What vulnerability was exploited?** | [CVE-XXXX-XXXX or description] |
| **How did the attacker gain access?** | [Initial access vector] |
| **What controls failed?** | [Detection gap, missing patch, etc.] |
| **Was this preventable?** | вҳҗ Yes (how) В· вҳҗ No (why) |

---

## вҳ… 5. Indicators of Compromise (IoCs)

| Type | Value | Context |
|:---|:---|:---|
| IP Address | | [C2 / Scanner / Source] |
| Domain | | [Phishing / C2 / Staging] |
| File Hash (SHA256) | | [Malware / Tool] |
| Email Address | | [Sender / Recipient] |
| URL | | [Payload / Landing page] |
| File Path | | [Dropped / Modified] |
| Process | | [Suspicious / Malicious] |
| Registry Key | | [Persistence] |

---

## вҳ… 6. Remediation & Follow-up Actions

| # | Action | Owner | Status | Due Date |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| 1 | | | вҳҗ Done В· вҳҗ Pending | |
| 2 | | | вҳҗ Done В· вҳҗ Pending | |
| 3 | | | вҳҗ Done В· вҳҗ Pending | |
| 4 | Update detection rules | SOC | вҳҗ Done В· вҳҗ Pending | |
| 5 | Update playbook if needed | SOC | вҳҗ Done В· вҳҗ Pending | |

---

## 7. Lessons Learned

| Question | Answer |
|:---|:---|
| **What went well?** | |
| **What could be improved?** | |
| **Were playbooks followed?** | вҳҗ Yes В· вҳҗ Partially В· вҳҗ No |
| **Were SLAs met?** | вҳҗ Yes В· вҳҗ No (detail: ____) |
| **Training gaps identified?** | |
| **Tool/process changes needed?** | |

---

## 8. Approvals

| Role | Name | Signature | Date |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Lead Analyst | | | |
| SOC Manager | | | |
| CISO (Critical only) | | | |

---

## Executive Summary Template

For incidents requiring management notification, include a 1-paragraph executive summary:

```markdown
## Executive Summary

On [DATE], the SOC detected [THREAT TYPE] targeting [SYSTEM/USER].
The attack was [detected/reported] at [TIME] and contained within
[DURATION]. Impact assessment: [DESCRIPTION]. [X] systems/users
were affected. Root cause: [BRIEF EXPLANATION]. Current status:
[CONTAINED/ERADICATED/RECOVERED]. Estimated business impact:
[LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH]. [X] remediation actions are in progress.
```

## Timeline Documentation Best Practice

Use UTC timestamps and format consistently:

```markdown
## Incident Timeline вҖ” INC-2026-042

| Time (UTC) | Phase | Event | Source |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| 2026-02-15 08:23 | Initial Access | Phishing email received by user | Email gateway |
| 2026-02-15 08:31 | Execution | User clicked malicious link | Proxy logs |
| 2026-02-15 08:32 | Execution | Macro executed, PowerShell spawned | EDR alert |
| 2026-02-15 08:35 | Detection | SOC alert triggered (Sigma rule) | SIEM |
| 2026-02-15 08:38 | Triage | T1 analyst confirmed True Positive | Ticket |
| 2026-02-15 08:42 | Escalation | Escalated to T2 analyst | Ticket |
| 2026-02-15 08:50 | Containment | Host isolated via EDR | EDR console |
| 2026-02-15 09:15 | Investigation | Forensic image captured | Forensic tool |
| 2026-02-15 11:00 | Eradication | Malware removed, creds reset | IT + EDR |
| 2026-02-15 14:00 | Recovery | Host rebuilt and returned | IT |
| 2026-02-15 15:00 | Post-Incident | Lessons learned meeting scheduled | Calendar |
```

## Evidence Attachment Checklist

```
в–Ў Screenshots of alert/detection
в–Ў Raw log excerpts (relevant lines only)
в–Ў Network capture (if applicable)
в–Ў Memory dump (if applicable)
в–Ў Malware sample hash (NEVER attach actual malware)
в–Ў Email headers (if phishing)
в–Ў IOCs collected (IPs, domains, hashes)
в–Ў MITRE ATT&CK mapping
в–Ў Impact assessment documentation
```

## Minimum Evidence Before Closure

- [ ] **Timeline confirmed**: Detection, triage, escalation, containment, eradication, recovery, and closure timestamps are complete.
- [ ] **Affected scope verified**: Hosts, users, services, and data impact are validated, not assumed.
- [ ] **Root cause recorded**: The exploited weakness or business process failure is documented well enough to assign remediation.
- [ ] **Containment evidence retained**: Account disables, host isolation, blocks, or configuration changes are traceable.
- [ ] **Notification decision logged**: Privacy, legal, customer, or executive notification decision is recorded with owner and time.

## Management Notification Triggers

| Trigger | Notify | Timing |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **Critical incident or confirmed business disruption** | CISO, CIO, business owner | Immediate |
| **Confirmed or suspected regulated data exposure** | CISO, Legal, Privacy | Immediate |
| **Incident affecting executive, privileged, or shared administration accounts** | CISO, SOC Manager, identity owner | Immediate |
| **Containment requires service interruption or emergency access restriction** | Business owner, IT operations, CISO | Before action when feasible |

## Executive / Legal / Privacy Notification Record

| Decision Point | Owner | Time | Evidence Used | Next Action |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Executive notification required? | | | | |
| Legal / privacy review required? | | | | |
| Customer or third-party notification required? | | | | |
| Board-level follow-up required? | | | | |

## Outbound Communication Handoff Record

| Communication Type | Approved Sender | Audience | Approval Time | Tracking Reference |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Customer notification | | | | |
| Regulator notification | | | | |
| Vendor / third-party notification | | | | |
| Media / executive statement | | | | |

## War Room Governance Record

| Item | Value |
|:---|:---|
| **War room activated?** | вҳҗ Yes В· вҳҗ No |
| **Incident Commander** | |
| **Backup Commander** | |
| **War room opened at** | |
| **War room closed at** | |
| **Update cadence used** | |
| **Major decisions logged at** | |
| **Monitoring owner after war room** | |
| **Next governance review time** | |

## Service Restoration / Rollback Record

| Decision Point | Owner | Time | Evidence Used | Validation Required |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Restore from backup / snapshot approved? | | | | |
| Rollback to prior release / configuration approved? | | | | |
| Reconnect host / network path / integration approved? | | | | |
| Return service to production approved? | | | | |

## Minimum Return-to-Service Evidence

- [ ] **Clean state confirmed**: Host, account, application, or integration passed the agreed integrity or validation checks.
- [ ] **Data consistency reviewed**: Backup point, transaction gap, or rollback state is accepted by the service owner.
- [ ] **Monitoring active**: Enhanced monitoring owner, duration, and escalation threshold are defined before restore or reconnect.
- [ ] **Rollback path retained**: A fallback action remains available if the restored service degrades or shows recurrence.
- [ ] **Business owner sign-off captured**: Material service restoration or access re-enable decisions show the accountable owner.

## Enhanced Monitoring Exit and Incident Closure Record

| Checkpoint | Owner | Status | Evidence / Note |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Enhanced monitoring completed for agreed duration | | вҳҗ Pass В· вҳҗ Blocked | |
| No recurrence or unresolved suspicious activity | | вҳҗ Pass В· вҳҗ Blocked | |
| Telemetry stayed available during validation | | вҳҗ Pass В· вҳҗ Blocked | |
| Open notifications and external obligations completed or handed over | | вҳҗ Pass В· вҳҗ Blocked | |
| Residual risk accepted at the right authority level | | вҳҗ Pass В· вҳҗ Blocked | |
| Incident approved for closure | | вҳҗ Pass В· вҳҗ Blocked | |

## Board Escalation Criteria

-   [ ] Escalate to the board pack if the case caused material business disruption, unresolved regulatory exposure, or remediation decisions that need funding-level approval.
-   [ ] Escalate if residual risk remains **High** after containment or if accepted risk exceeds management authority.
-   [ ] Escalate if repeated incident patterns show systemic control failure.

## Related Documents

- [IR Framework](../05_Incident_Response/Framework.en.md)
- [Shift Handover Template](shift_handover.en.md)
- [Change Request (RFC)](change_request_rfc.en.md)
- [PDPA Compliance](../07_Compliance_Privacy/PDPA_Compliance.en.md)
- [PDPA Incident Response Guide](../07_Compliance_Privacy/PDPA_Incident_Response.en.md)
- [Board Quarterly Decision Pack](Board_Quarterly_Decision_Pack.en.md)
- [Communication Templates](../05_Incident_Response/Communication_Templates.en.md)

## References

- [NIST SP 800-61r2 вҖ” Incident Handling](https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-61/rev-2/final)
- [VERIS Framework](http://veriscommunity.net/)
- [SANS Incident Report Template](https://www.sans.org/information-security-policy/)


---

## File: 11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.th.md
# а№ҒаёҡаёҡаёҹаёӯаёЈа№ҢаёЎаёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң (Incident Report Template)

> **аё„аёіа№Ғаёҷаё°аёҷаёі**: аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҒаёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаёҡаёұаёҮаё„аёұаёҡ (вҳ…) а№ғаё«а№үаё„аёЈаёҡаё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ 24 аёҠаёЎ. аё«аёҘаёұаёҮаёӣаёҙаё”а№Җаё„аёӘ аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ Critical/High аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёӘа№ҲаёҮ executive summary а№ғаё«а№үаёңаё№а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈаё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ 4 аёҠаёЎ. аё«аёҘаёұаёҮаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёһаёҡ

---

## аёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаё«аёұаё§

| аёҹаёҙаёҘаё”а№Ң | аё„а№ҲаёІ |
|:---|:---|
| **аёЈаё«аёұаёӘа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң** | #YYYYMMDD-00X |
| **аё§аёұаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёһаёҡ** | YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM (UTC) |
| **аё§аёұаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳаёӣаёҙаё”** | YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM (UTC) |
| **аёңаё№а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҙаё”аёҠаёӯаёҡ** | [аёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ / аё•аёіа№Ғаё«аёҷа№ҲаёҮ] |
| **аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ** | вҳҗ Critical В· вҳҗ High В· вҳҗ Medium В· вҳҗ Low |
| **аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё°** | вҳҗ Open В· вҳҗ аёҒаёіаёҘаёұаёҮаёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ В· вҳҗ аёҲаёіаёҒаёұаё”аё§аёҮ В· вҳҗ Closed |
| **TLP** | вҳҗ RED В· вҳҗ AMBER+STRICT В· вҳҗ AMBER В· вҳҗ GREEN В· вҳҗ CLEAR |
| **аё«аёЎаё§аё”аё«аёЎаё№а№Ҳ** | [Phishing / Malware / Ransomware / Account Compromise / DDoS / Data Breach / аёӯаё·а№Ҳаёҷа№Ҷ] |
| **MITRE ATT&CK** | [Technique IDs, а№ҖаёҠа№Ҳаёҷ T1566.001, T1059.001] |

---

## вҳ… 1. аёҡаё—аёӘаёЈаёёаёӣаёңаё№а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈ

*аёӘаёЈаёёаёӣ 2-3 аёӣаёЈаё°а№Ӯаёўаё„: а№ҖаёҒаёҙаё”аёӯаё°а№„аёЈаёӮаё¶а№үаёҷ аёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡаё„аё·аёӯаёӯаё°а№„аёЈ аёңаёҘаёҘаёұаёһаёҳа№Ңа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷаёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮа№„аёЈ*

---

## вҳ… 2. а№„аё—аёЎа№Ңа№„аёҘаёҷа№Ң (UTC)

| а№Җаё§аёҘаёІ | аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷ | а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң |
|:---|:---|:---|
| YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM | **аёҒаёҙаёҲаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎа№ҖаёЈаёҙа№ҲаёЎаё•а№үаёҷ** | аёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёіа№ҒаёЈаёҒаёӮаёӯаёҮаёңаё№а№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө (аё–а№үаёІаё—аёЈаёІаёҡ) |
| YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM | **аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёһаёҡ** | Alert аёҲаёІаёҒ [аёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҒаёҺ / а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮ] |
| YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM | **аё„аёұаё”аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҮ** | Analyst аёЈаёұаёҡа№ҖаёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮа№ҒаёҘаё°а№ҖаёЈаёҙа№ҲаёЎаёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ |
| YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM | **Escalation** | аёӘа№ҲаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ [Tier 2 / SOC Lead / аёңаё№а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈ] |
| YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM | **аёҲаёіаёҒаёұаё”аё§аёҮ** | [аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ а№ҖаёҠа№Ҳаёҷ а№ҒаёўаёҒа№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ, аёӣаёҙаё”аёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө] |
| YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM | **аёҒаёіаёҲаёұаё”** | [аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ а№ҖаёҠа№Ҳаёҷ аёҘаёҡ malware, patch] |
| YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM | **аёҒаё№а№үаё„аё·аёҷ** | аёЈаё°аёҡаёҡаёҒаёҘаёұаёҡаёӘаё№а№Ҳ production |
| YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM | **аёӣаёҙаё”а№Җаё„аёӘ** | аёӣаёЈаё°аёҒаёІаёЁа№ҒаёҒа№үа№„аёӮа№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲаёӘаёҙа№үаёҷ |

---

## вҳ… 3. аёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ

| аёЎаёҙаё•аёҙ | аёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷ |
|:---|:---|
| **а№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ** | [аёЈаёІаёўаёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ hostname/IP] |
| **аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ** | [аёҲаёіаёҷаё§аёҷ + аёЈаёІаёўаёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯаё–а№үаёІ < 10] |
| **аёҡаёЈаёҙаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ** | [а№ҒаёӯаёӣаёһаёҘаёҙа№Җаё„аёҠаёұаёҷ, аёҗаёІаёҷаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ аёҜаёҘаёҜ] |
| **аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӘаё№аёҚаё«аёІаёў** | вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө В· вҳҗ аёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёў В· вҳҗ аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ (аёЈаёІаёўаёҘаё°а№Җаёӯаёөаёўаё”: ____) |
| **аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ** | вҳҗ PII В· вҳҗ аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҮаёҙаёҷ В· вҳҗ Credentials В· вҳҗ IP В· вҳҗ аёӯаё·а№Ҳаёҷа№Ҷ |
| **аёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡаё—аёІаёҮаёҳаёёаёЈаёҒаёҙаёҲ** | [аёЈаё°аёўаё°а№Җаё§аёҘаёІ downtime, аёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡаёЈаёІаёўа№„аё”а№ү] |
| **аё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаё•аёІаёЎаёҒаёҺаё«аёЎаёІаёў** | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ (PDPA 72 аёҠаёЎ. / аёӯаё·а№Ҳаёҷа№Ҷ) В· вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ |

---

## вҳ… 4. аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№ҢаёӘаёІа№Җаё«аё•аёё (VERIS "4A")

| аёЎаёҙаё•аёҙ | аёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷ |
|:---|:---|
| **аёңаё№а№үаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёі** | вҳҗ External В· вҳҗ Internal В· вҳҗ Partner В· вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳаё—аёЈаёІаёҡ |
| **аёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёі** | вҳҗ Malware В· вҳҗ Hacking В· вҳҗ Social В· вҳҗ Error В· вҳҗ Misuse |
| **аёӘаёҙаёҷаё—аёЈаёұаёһаёўа№Ң** | вҳҗ Server В· вҳҗ Workstation В· вҳҗ User Device В· вҳҗ Cloud В· вҳҗ Data |
| **аёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ** | вҳҗ Confidentiality В· вҳҗ Integrity В· вҳҗ Availability |

| аё„аёіаё–аёІаёЎ | аё„аёіаё•аёӯаёҡ |
|:---|:---|
| **аёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Ӯаё«аё§а№Ҳаё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒа№ғаёҠа№ү** | [CVE-XXXX-XXXX аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаё„аёіаёӯаёҳаёҙаёҡаёІаёў] |
| **аё§аёҙаёҳаёөа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ** | [Initial access vector] |
| **аёӣа№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёұаёҷа№„аё”а№ү?** | вҳҗ а№„аё”а№ү (аё§аёҙаёҳаёө) В· вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№ү (а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёңаёҘ) |

---

## вҳ… 5. Indicators of Compromise (IoCs)

| аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё— | аё„а№ҲаёІ | аёҡаёЈаёҙаёҡаё— |
|:---|:---|:---|
| IP Address | | [C2 / Scanner / Source] |
| Domain | | [Phishing / C2] |
| File Hash (SHA256) | | [Malware / Tool] |
| URL | | [Payload / Landing page] |

---

## вҳ… 6. аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҒаёҒа№үа№„аёӮа№ҒаёҘаё°аё•аёҙаё”аё•аёІаёЎ

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | аёңаё№а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҙаё”аёҠаёӯаёҡ | аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё° | аёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё” |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| 1 | | | вҳҗ а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ В· вҳҗ аёЈаёӯ | |
| 2 | | | вҳҗ а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ В· вҳҗ аёЈаёӯ | |
| 3 | аёӯаёұаёӣа№Җаё”аё•аёҒаёҺаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ | SOC | вҳҗ а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ В· вҳҗ аёЈаёӯ | |

---

## 7. аёҡаё—а№ҖаёЈаёөаёўаёҷ

| аё„аёіаё–аёІаёЎ | аё„аёіаё•аёӯаёҡ |
|:---|:---|
| **аёӯаё°а№„аёЈаё—аёіа№„аё”а№үаё”аёө?** | |
| **аёӯаё°а№„аёЈаёӣаёЈаёұаёҡаёӣаёЈаёёаёҮа№„аё”а№ү?** | |
| **аё—аёіаё•аёІаёЎ Playbook?** | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ В· вҳҗ аёҡаёІаёҮаёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷ В· вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ |
| **SLA аё•аёЈаёҮа№Җаё§аёҘаёІ?** | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ В· вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ (аёЈаёІаёўаёҘаё°а№Җаёӯаёөаёўаё”: ____) |

---

## 8. аёҒаёІаёЈаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ

| аё•аёіа№Ғаё«аёҷа№ҲаёҮ | аёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ | аёҘаёІаёўа№ҖаёӢа№Үаёҷ | аё§аёұаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Lead Analyst | | | |
| SOC Manager | | | |
| CISO (а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё° Critical) | | | |

---

## Template аёӘаёЈаёёаёӣаёңаё№а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈ

аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ incident аё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаёңаё№а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈ:

```markdown
## аёӘаёЈаёёаёӣаёңаё№а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈ

а№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯ [аё§аёұаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳ] SOC аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёһаёҡ [аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—аё аёұаёў] аёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё”а№Җаёӣа№үаёІ [аёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ/аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү]
аёҒаёІаёЈа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөаё–аё№аёҒ [аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ/а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ] а№Җаё§аёҘаёІ [а№Җаё§аёҘаёІ] а№ҒаёҘаё° contain аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ [аёЈаё°аёўаё°а№Җаё§аёҘаёІ]
аёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ: [аё„аёіаёӯаёҳаёҙаёҡаёІаёў] аёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ/аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү [X] аёЈаёІаёўа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ
аёӘаёІа№Җаё«аё•аёё: [аёӯаёҳаёҙаёҡаёІаёўаёӘаёұа№үаёҷ] аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё°: [Contained/Eradicated/Recovered]
аёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡаёҳаёёаёЈаёҒаёҙаёҲа№Ӯаё”аёўаёЈаё§аёЎ: [аё•а№Ҳаёі/аёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ/аёӘаё№аёҮ]
```

## а№Ғаёҷаё§аёӣаёҸаёҙаёҡаёұаё•аёҙаёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒ Timeline

а№ғаёҠа№ү UTC timestamp а№ҒаёҘаё°аёЈаё№аёӣа№ҒаёҡаёҡаёӘаёЎа№Ҳаёіа№ҖаёӘаёЎаёӯ:

```markdown
## Timeline Incident вҖ” INC-2026-042

| а№Җаё§аёҘаёІ (UTC) | аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷ | а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң | а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| 2026-02-15 08:23 | Initial Access | а№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡ phishing email | Email gateway |
| 2026-02-15 08:31 | Execution | аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаё„аёҘаёҙаёҒ link аёӯаёұаёҷаё•аёЈаёІаёў | Proxy logs |
| 2026-02-15 08:32 | Execution | Macro аё—аёіаёҮаёІаёҷ, PowerShell spawn | EDR alert |
| 2026-02-15 08:35 | Detection | SOC alert trigger (Sigma rule) | SIEM |
| 2026-02-15 08:38 | Triage | T1 analyst аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ True Positive | Ticket |
| 2026-02-15 08:42 | Escalation | Escalate а№„аёӣ T2 analyst | Ticket |
| 2026-02-15 08:50 | Containment | Isolate host аёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ EDR | EDR console |
| 2026-02-15 09:15 | Investigation | а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ forensic image | Forensic tool |
| 2026-02-15 11:00 | Eradication | аёҘаёҡ malware, reset credentials | IT + EDR |
| 2026-02-15 14:00 | Recovery | Build host а№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ | IT |
```

## Checklist а№Ғаёҷаёҡаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ

```
в–Ў Screenshots аёӮаёӯаёҮ alert/detection
в–Ў Raw log excerpts (а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё°аёҡаёЈаёЈаё—аёұаё”аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§)
в–Ў Network capture (аё–а№үаёІаёЎаёө)
в–Ў Memory dump (аё–а№үаёІаёЎаёө)
в–Ў Hash аёӮаёӯаёҮ malware sample (аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІа№Ғаёҷаёҡ malware аёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮ)
в–Ў Email headers (аё–а№үаёІа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ phishing)
в–Ў IOCs аё—аёөа№ҲаёЈаё§аёҡаёЈаё§аёЎ (IPs, domains, hashes)
в–Ў MITRE ATT&CK mapping
в–Ў а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ
```

## аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•а№ҲаёіаёҒа№Ҳаёӯаёҷаёӣаёҙаё”а№Җаё„аёӘ (Minimum Evidence Before Closure)

- [ ] **аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ timeline а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§**: а№Җаё§аёҘаёІаёӮаёӯаёҮ detection, triage, escalation, containment, eradication, recovery а№ҒаёҘаё° closure аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё„аёЈаёҡ
- [ ] **аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё•аёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§**: hosts, users, services а№ҒаёҘаё°аёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡаё•а№ҲаёӯаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№ҲаёҒаёІаёЈаё„аёІаё”а№Җаё”аёІ
- [ ] **аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒ root cause а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§**: аёЈаё°аёҡаёёаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Ӯаё«аё§а№Ҳаё«аёЈаё·аёӯ business process failure а№„аё”а№үаёҠаёұаё”аёһаёӯаё—аёөа№ҲаёҲаё°аёЎаёӯаёҡаё«аёЎаёІаёў remediation
- [ ] **а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёіаёҒаёұаё”аё§аёҮа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§**: аёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёҙаё”аёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө isolate host аёҒаёІаёЈ block аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷ config аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡаёўа№үаёӯаёҷаё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№„аё”а№ү
- [ ] **аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒаёңаёҘаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲа№ҖаёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§**: privacy, legal, аёҘаё№аёҒаё„а№үаёІ аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёңаё№а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈ аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёЎаёө owner а№ҒаёҘаё°а№Җаё§аёҘаёІаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲ

## Trigger аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаёңаё№а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈа№ҒаёҘаё°аё«аёҷа№Ҳаё§аёўаёҮаёІаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ

| Trigger | аё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮа№ғаё„аёЈ | а№Җаё§аёҘаёІ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **Critical incident аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёЎаёө business disruption аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§** | CISO, CIO, business owner | аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө |
| **аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёўаё§а№ҲаёІаёЎаёө regulated data exposure** | CISO, Legal, Privacy | аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө |
| **incident аёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёөаёңаё№а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈ аёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёөаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№ҢаёӘаё№аёҮ аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө shared administration** | CISO, SOC Manager, identity owner | аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө |
| **аёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёіаёҒаёұаё”аё§аёҮаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡаёҡаёЈаёҙаёҒаёІаёЈаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёҲаёіаёҒаёұаё”аёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ңа№ҒаёҡаёҡаёүаёёаёҒа№Җаёүаёҙаёҷ** | Business owner, IT operations, CISO | аёҒа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёҘаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯ аё–а№үаёІаё—аёіа№„аё”а№ү |

## аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаёңаё№а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈ / аёҒаёҺаё«аёЎаёІаёў / Privacy

| аёҲаёёаё”аё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲ | Owner | а№Җаё§аёҘаёІ | аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№ү | аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷаё–аёұаё”а№„аёӣ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| аё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаёңаё№а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ | | | | |
| аё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ғаё«а№ү legal / privacy review аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ | | | | |
| аё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаёҘаё№аёҒаё„а№үаёІ аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ third party аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ | | | | |
| аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ board аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ | | | | |

## аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒаёҒаёІаёЈаёӘа№ҲаёҮаё•а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёІаёҷаёӘаё·а№ҲаёӯаёӘаёІаёЈаёӯаёӯаёҒаёҷаёӯаёҒаё—аёөаёЎ

| аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—аёҒаёІаёЈаёӘаё·а№ҲаёӯаёӘаёІаёЈ | аёңаё№а№үаёӘа№ҲаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | аёңаё№а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӘаёІаёЈ | а№Җаё§аёҘаёІаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаёӯа№үаёІаёҮаёӯаёҙаёҮ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаёҘаё№аёҒаё„а№үаёІ | | | | |
| а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ regulator | | | | |
| а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ vendor / third party | | | | |
| а№Ғаё–аёҘаёҮаё•а№ҲаёӯаёӘаё·а№Ҳаёӯ / аёңаё№а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈ | | | | |

## аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒаёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаёіаёҒаёұаёҡ War Room

| аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈ | аё„а№ҲаёІ |
|:---|:---|
| **аёЎаёөаёҒаёІаёЈа№Җаёӣаёҙаё” War room аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ** | вҳҗ Yes В· вҳҗ No |
| **Incident Commander** | |
| **Backup Commander** | |
| **а№Җаё§аёҘаёІа№Җаёӣаёҙаё” War room** | |
| **а№Җаё§аёҘаёІаёӣаёҙаё” War room** | |
| **Cadence аёҒаёІаёЈаёӯаёұаёӣа№Җаё”аё•аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№үаёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮ** | |
| **а№Җаё§аёҘаёІаё—аёөа№Ҳаёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ** | |
| **owner аёӮаёӯаёҮ monitoring аё«аёҘаёұаёҮаёӣаёҙаё” war room** | |
