## аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲ Restore / Rollback / Return-to-Service

| аёҲаёёаё”аё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲ | Owner | а№Җаё§аёҘаёІ | аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№ү | аёҒаёІаёЈаёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё—аёіаё•а№Ҳаёӯ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ restore аёҲаёІаёҒ backup / snapshot аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ | | | | |
| аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ rollback а№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ release / configuration аёҒа№Ҳаёӯаёҷаё«аёҷа№үаёІаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ | | | | |
| аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ reconnect host / network path / integration аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ | | | | |
| аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ return service to production аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ | | | | |

## аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•а№ҲаёіаёҒа№Ҳаёӯаёҷ Return-to-Service

- [ ] **аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ clean state а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§**: host, account, application, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ integration аёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ integrity check аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ validation аё•аёІаёЎаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•аёҒаёҘаёҮаёҒаёұаёҷа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§
- [ ] **аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ data consistency а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§**: service owner аёўаёӯаёЎаёЈаёұаёҡ backup point, transaction gap, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ state аё«аёҘаёұаёҮ rollback а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§
- [ ] **а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” monitoring а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§**: аёЈаё°аёҡаёё owner аёЈаё°аёўаё°а№Җаё§аёҘаёІ а№ҒаёҘаё° escalation threshold аёӮаёӯаёҮ enhanced monitoring а№„аё§а№үаёҒа№Ҳаёӯаёҷ restore аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ reconnect
- [ ] **аёўаёұаёҮаёЎаёө rollback path**: аёўаёұаёҮаёЎаёөаё—аёІаёҮаёўа№үаёӯаёҷаёҒаёҘаёұаёҡа№„аё”а№үаё«аёІаёҒаёҡаёЈаёҙаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№ҲаёҒаё№а№үаё„аё·аёҷа№ҖаёЈаёҙа№ҲаёЎаёЎаёөаёӣаёұаёҚаё«аёІаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёЎаёөаёӘаёұаёҚаёҚаёІаё“а№ҖаёҒаёҙаё”аёӢа№үаёі
- [ ] **аёЎаёө business owner sign-off**: аёҒаёІаёЈ restore аёҡаёЈаёҙаёҒаёІаёЈаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚаё«аёЈаё·аёӯ re-enable access аё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёөаёҷаёұаёўаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёЎаёө owner аёңаё№а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҙаё”аёҠаёӯаёҡаёҠаёұаё”а№ҖаёҲаёҷ

## аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒаёҒаёІаёЈаёӯаёӯаёҒаёҲаёІаёҒ Enhanced Monitoring а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёҙаё” Incident

| аёҲаёёаё”аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ | Owner | аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё° | аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ / аё«аёЎаёІаёўа№Җаё«аё•аёё |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| enhanced monitoring аё„аёЈаёҡаё•аёІаёЎаёҠа№Ҳаё§аёҮа№Җаё§аёҘаёІаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•аёҒаёҘаёҮ | | вҳҗ Pass В· вҳҗ Blocked | |
| а№„аёЎа№ҲаёһаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҒаёҙаё”аёӢа№үаёіаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёҒаёҙаёҲаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёўаё—аёөа№ҲаёўаёұаёҮа№„аёЎа№Ҳаё„аёҘаёөа№Ҳаё„аёҘаёІаёў | | вҳҗ Pass В· вҳҗ Blocked | |
| telemetry аёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎа№ғаёҠа№үаёҮаёІаёҷаё•аёҘаёӯаё”аёҠа№Ҳаё§аёҮ validate | | вҳҗ Pass В· вҳҗ Blocked | |
| аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮа№ҒаёҘаё° external obligation аё—аёөа№Ҳа№Җаёӣаёҙаё”аёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳа№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёӘа№ҲаёҮаёЎаёӯаёҡаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§ | | вҳҗ Pass В· вҳҗ Blocked | |
| residual risk аё–аё№аёҒаёўаёӯаёЎаёЈаёұаёҡа№ғаёҷаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаёӯаёіаёҷаёІаёҲаё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ | | вҳҗ Pass В· вҳҗ Blocked | |
| аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙаёӣаёҙаё” incident а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§ | | вҳҗ Pass В· вҳҗ Blocked | |

## а№ҖаёҒаё“аё‘а№ҢаёҒаёІаёЈаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ Board

-   [ ] аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІ board pack аё«аёІаёҒа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№ҢаёҒа№Ҳаёӯа№ғаё«а№үа№ҖаёҒаёҙаё” material business disruption, аёЎаёө regulatory exposure аё—аёөа№ҲаёўаёұаёҮа№„аёЎа№Ҳаёӣаёҙаё”, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ remediation decision аё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ғаёҠа№үаёӯаёіаёҷаёІаёҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙаёҮаёҡ
-   [ ] аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё«аёІаёҒ residual risk аё«аёҘаёұаёҮ containment аёўаёұаёҮаёӯаёўаё№а№ҲаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ **High** аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ accepted risk а№ҖаёҒаёҙаёҷаёӯаёіаёҷаёІаёҲаёӮаёӯаёҮ management
-   [ ] аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё«аёІаёҒ incident pattern а№ҖаёҒаёҙаё”аёӢа№үаёіа№ҒаёҘаё°аёҠаёөа№үаё§а№ҲаёІаёЎаёө systemic control failure

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ

## Checklist аё„аёёаё“аё аёІаёһаёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷ (Report Quality Checklist)

| Item | Description | вң“ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Timeline | аё„аёЈаёҡаё—аёёаёҒ event | вҳҗ |
| Evidence | SHA256 hashes | вҳҗ |
| Impact | Quantified | вҳҗ |
| Root cause | Identified | вҳҗ |
| Actions | Assigned + dated | вҳҗ |

## SLA аёҒаёІаёЈаёӘа№ҲаёҮаёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷ (Report Priority)

| Severity | Due |
|:---|:---|
| Critical | 24 hrs |
| High | 72 hrs |

| Incidents Closed | |
| Escalations Made | |
| False Positives Identified | |
| Average Response Time (MTTA) | min |

---

## вҳ… Sign-off

| | Outgoing Lead | Incoming Lead |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **Name** | | |
| **Signature** | | |
| **Time** | | |

> вҡ пёҸ **Both leads must sign off** to confirm that the briefing was conducted and all mandatory sections were reviewed.

---

## Completed Handover Example

```markdown
## Shift Handover вҖ” 2026-02-16 (Day вҶ’ Night)

### Outgoing Analyst: John D. (Shift A)
### Incoming Analyst: Sarah T. (Shift B)

### Open Incidents
| Ticket ID | Severity | Status | Summary | Action Needed |
|:---|:---:|:---|:---|:---|
| INC-2026-089 | P2 | Investigating | Suspicious PowerShell on HR-PC-042 | Waiting EDR isolation approval |
| INC-2026-091 | P3 | Monitoring | Failed VPN logins from unknown IP | 12 more hours monitoring |

### Alert Queue Status
- Current queue: 14 alerts (7 low, 5 medium, 2 high)
- 2 high alerts need immediate triage

### System Health
- SIEM: вң… Normal | EDR: вң… Normal | Ticketing: вң… Normal
- Log source gap: Firewall FL-02 offline since 14:30 (IT notified)

### Notes for Incoming
1. IMPORTANT: INC-089 вҖ” SOC Manager approved isolation, proceed when evidence captured
2. New Sigma rule deployed for CVE-2026-1234, may generate initial FPs
3. Scheduled maintenance for SIEM at 03:00, expect 15-min search delay
```

## Common Handover Mistakes

| вқҢ Mistake | Impact | вң… Best Practice |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Verbal-only handover | Details forgotten, context lost | Always write in template + brief verbally |
| Not mentioning system issues | Incoming analyst misses data gaps | Always check and report log source health |
| Incomplete incident summary | Time wasted re-investigating | Include: what happened, what's done, what's needed |
| Forgetting pending approvals | Containment delayed | List ALL pending approvals/waiting items |
| No alert queue status | Queue overflows | Always report queue depth and priority counts |

## Related Documents

- [Shift Handoff Standard](../06_Operations_Management/Shift_Handoff.en.md) вҖ” Full handoff procedure
- [IR Framework](../05_Incident_Response/Framework.en.md) вҖ” Incident response lifecycle
- [SOC Metrics & KPIs](../06_Operations_Management/SOC_Metrics.en.md) вҖ” Performance metrics
- [Incident Report Template](incident_report.en.md) вҖ” Post-incident documentation

## References

- [NIST SP 800-61r2 вҖ” Incident Handling](https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-61/rev-2/final)


---

## File: 11_Reporting_Templates/shift_handover.th.md
# аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒаёҒаёІаёЈаёӘа№ҲаёҮаёЎаёӯаёҡаёҒаё° (Shift Handover Log)

> **аё„аёіа№Ғаёҷаё°аёҷаёі**: аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҒаё—аёёаёҒаёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаё—аёөа№ҲаёҡаёұаёҮаё„аёұаёҡ (вҳ…) аёҒа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёҡаёЈаёөаёҹаёҒаё°а№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒа№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаёҷаёөа№үа№ғаёҷаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ ticketing аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ shared drive аё«аёҘаёұаёҮаёҲаёІаёҒаё—аёұа№үаёҮаёӘаёӯаёҮ Lead аёҘаёҮаёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ

---

## аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё«аёұаё§аёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёІаё©

| аёҹаёҙаёҘаё”а№Ң | аё„а№ҲаёІ |
|:---|:---|
| **аё§аёұаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳ** | YYYY-MM-DD |
| **аёҒаё°** | вҳҗ а№ҖаёҠа№үаёІ (08:00вҖ“16:00) В· вҳҗ аёҡа№ҲаёІаёў (16:00вҖ“00:00) В· вҳҗ аё”аё¶аёҒ (00:00вҖ“08:00) |
| **Lead аёҒаё°а№ҖаёҒа№ҲаёІ** | [аёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ] |
| **Lead аёҒаё°а№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ** | [аёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ] |
| **а№Җаё§аёҘаёІаёӘа№ҲаёҮаёЎаёӯаёҡ** | HH:MM |

---

## вҳ… 1. аёӘаёЈаёёаёӣаёҒаё°

**аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё°а№Ӯаё”аёўаёЈаё§аёЎ**: вҳҗ а№ҖаёҮаёөаёўаёҡ В· вҳҗ аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ В· вҳҗ аёўаёёа№ҲаёҮ В· вҳҗ аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё•

**аёӘаёЈаёёаёӣаё аёІаёһаёЈаё§аёЎ**:
> *а№ҖаёӮаёөаёўаёҷаёӘаёЈаёёаёӣ 2вҖ“3 аёӣаёЈаё°а№Ӯаёўаё„а№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҡаёҒаё° а№Җаёҷа№үаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ escalation, а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№ҢаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаё„аёіаёӘаёұа№ҲаёҮаёҲаёІаёҒаёңаё№а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈ*

---

## вҳ… 2. Incidents аё—аёөа№ҲаёҒаёіаёҘаёұаёҮаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ (аё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ғаё«а№үаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёҷа№ғаёҲ)

| ID | аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ | аё«аёЎаё§аё”аё«аёЎаё№а№Ҳ | аёЈаёІаёўаёҘаё°а№Җаёӯаёөаёўаё” | аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё°аёӣаёұаёҲаёҲаёёаёҡаёұаёҷ | а№ҖаёҲа№үаёІаёӮаёӯаёҮ | аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷаё–аёұаё”а№„аёӣ | ETA |
|:---|:---:|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| #___ | Critical/High/Med/Low | Phishing/Malware/аёӯаё·а№Ҳаёҷа№Ҷ | аёЈаёІаёўаёҘаё°а№Җаёӯаёөаёўаё”аёӘаёұа№үаёҷ | Triage/аёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ/Containment | [аёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ] | аёӘаёҙа№ҲаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё—аёіаё•а№Ҳаёӯ | а№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯа№„аё«аёЈа№Ҳ |
| | | | | | | | |

**аёЈаё§аёЎ Active**: ____ | **Critical/High**: ____ | **аёЈаёӯ Escalation**: ____

---

## вҳ… 3. аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё°аёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ

| аёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ | аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё° | аё«аёЎаёІаёўа№Җаё«аё•аёё |
|:---|:---:|:---|
| SIEM Ingestion | вҳҗ аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ В· вҳҗ аёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ В· вҳҗ аё«аёўаёёаё”аё—аёіаёҮаёІаёҷ | |
| EDR Connectivity | вҳҗ аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ В· вҳҗ аёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ В· вҳҗ аё«аёўаёёаё”аё—аёіаёҮаёІаёҷ | |
| SOAR Playbooks | вҳҗ аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ В· вҳҗ аёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ В· вҳҗ аё«аёўаёёаё”аё—аёіаёҮаёІаёҷ | |
| TI Feed Updates | вҳҗ аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ В· вҳҗ аёҘа№ҲаёІаёҠа№үаёІ В· вҳҗ аё«аёўаёёаё”аё—аёіаёҮаёІаёҷ | |
| аёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ Ticketing | вҳҗ аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ В· вҳҗ аёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ В· вҳҗ аё«аёўаёёаё”аё—аёіаёҮаёІаёҷ | |
| Network Sensors | вҳҗ аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ В· вҳҗ аёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ В· вҳҗ аё«аёўаёёаё”аё—аёіаёҮаёІаёҷ | |
| Email Gateway | вҳҗ аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ В· вҳҗ аёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ В· вҳҗ аё«аёўаёёаё”аё—аёіаёҮаёІаёҷ | |

**аёӣаёұаёҚаё«аёІаё—аёөа№Ҳаё—аёЈаёІаёҡ**:
> *аёӯаёҳаёҙаёҡаёІаёўаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡаё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёөаёӣаёұаёҚаё«аёІ, аёҒаёІаёЈаёҡаёіаёЈаёёаёҮаёЈаёұаёҒаё©аёІаё•аёІаёЎаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё”, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ license аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ғаёҒаёҘа№үаё«аёЎаё”аёӯаёІаёўаёё*

---

## вҳ… 4. аёҮаёІаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳаё„а№үаёІаёҮ / Follow-ups

| # | аёҮаёІаёҷ | Ticket аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ | аёҘаёіаё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ | аёЎаёӯаёҡаё«аёЎаёІаёўаё–аё¶аёҮ | аёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё”аёӘа№ҲаёҮ |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|:---|:---|
| 1 | | | аёӘаё№аёҮ/аёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ/аё•а№Ҳаёі | | |
| 2 | | | | | |
| 3 | | | | | |

## вҳ… 5. аёӮа№ҲаёІаё§аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҮа№ҒаёҘаё°аё„аёіа№Ғаёҷаё°аёҷаёі

### аёӮа№ҲаёІаё§аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҮаё аёұаёўаё„аёёаёҒаё„аёІаёЎа№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ
| а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮаё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёІ | аёӘаёЈаёёаёӣ | а№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎ IoCs а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§? | аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ? |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---:|
| | | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ В· вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ В· вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ |

### аёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Ӯаё«аё§а№Ҳаё—аёөа№ҲаёӣаёЈаё°аёҒаёІаёЁ
| CVE | аёЈаё°аёҡаёҡаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ | аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ | аёЎаёө Patch? | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---:|:---|
| | | | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ В· вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ | |

---

## 6. Escalations (аё–а№үаёІаёЎаёө)

| аёӘа№ҲаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯаё–аё¶аёҮ | а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёңаёҘ | а№Җаё§аёҘаёІ | а№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаё•аёӯаёҡаёҒаёҘаёұаёҡ? | аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё° |
|:---|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| | | | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ В· вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ | |

---

## 7. аёӣаёЈаё°аёҒаёІаёЁа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷа№ҒаёӣаёҘаёҮ (аё–а№үаёІаёЎаёө)

| Change ID | аёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ | аёЈаёІаёўаёҘаё°а№Җаёӯаёөаёўаё” | аёҠа№Ҳаё§аёҮа№Җаё§аёҘаёІ | аёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ Alert? |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---:|
| | | | | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ В· вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ |

---

## вҳ… аёӘаё–аёҙаё•аёҙаёӮаёӯаёҮаёҒаё°

| аё•аёұаё§аёҠаёөа№үаё§аёұаё” | аёҲаёіаёҷаё§аёҷ |
|:---|:---:|
| Alerts аё—аёөа№ҲаёӣаёЈаё°аёЎаё§аёҘаёңаёҘ | |
| Incidents аё—аёөа№Ҳа№Җаёӣаёҙаё” | |
| Incidents аё—аёөа№Ҳаёӣаёҙаё” | |
| Escalations | |
| False Positives аё—аёөа№Ҳаёһаёҡ | |
| а№Җаё§аёҘаёІаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮа№ҖаёүаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёў (MTTA) | аёҷаёІаё—аёө |

---

## вҳ… аёҘаёҮаёҷаёІаёЎ

| | Lead аёҒаё°а№ҖаёҒа№ҲаёІ | Lead аёҒаё°а№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **аёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ** | | |
| **аёҘаёІаёўа№ҖаёӢа№Үаёҷ** | | |
| **а№Җаё§аёҘаёІ** | | |

> вҡ пёҸ **аё—аёұа№үаёҮаёӘаёӯаёҮ Lead аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёҘаёҮаёҷаёІаёЎ** а№Җаёһаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаё§а№ҲаёІа№„аё”а№үаёҡаёЈаёөаёҹа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§а№ҒаёҘаё°аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаё—аёёаёҒаёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаё—аёөа№ҲаёҡаёұаёҮаё„аёұаёҡ

---

## аё•аёұаё§аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮ Handover аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§

```markdown
## Shift Handover вҖ” 2026-02-16 (аёҒаёҘаёІаёҮаё§аёұаёҷ вҶ’ аёҒаёҘаёІаёҮаё„аё·аёҷ)

### Analyst аёӯаёӯаёҒ: аёӘаёЎаёҠаёІаёў (Shift A)
### Analyst а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІ: аёӘаёЎаёЁаёЈаёө (Shift B)

### Incidents аё„а№үаёІаёҮ
| Ticket ID | Severity | аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё° | аёӘаёЈаёёаёӣ | аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё—аёі |
|:---|:---:|:---|:---|:---|
| INC-2026-089 | P2 | аёҒаёіаёҘаёұаёҮаёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ | PowerShell аёҷа№ҲаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёўаёҡаёҷ HR-PC-042 | аёЈаёӯ EDR isolation approval |
| INC-2026-091 | P3 | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | Failed VPN logins аёҲаёІаёҒ IP а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЈаё№а№үаёҲаёұаёҒ | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡаёӯаёөаёҒ 12 аёҠаёЎ. |

### аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё° Alert Queue
- Queue аёӣаёұаёҲаёҲаёёаёҡаёұаёҷ: 14 alerts (7 low, 5 medium, 2 high)
- 2 high alerts аё•а№үаёӯаёҮ triage аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө

### аёӘаёёаёӮаё аёІаёһаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ
- SIEM: вң… аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ | EDR: вң… аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ | Ticketing: вң… аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ
- Log source gap: Firewall FL-02 offline аё•аёұа№үаёҮа№Ғаё•а№Ҳ 14:30 (а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ IT а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§)

### аё«аёЎаёІаёўа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёҒаё°а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІ
1. аёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ: INC-089 вҖ” SOC Manager аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ isolation а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§ аё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ
2. Sigma rule а№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ deploy аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ CVE-2026-1234 аёӯаёІаёҲаёЎаёө FPs аёҠа№Ҳаё§аёҮа№ҒаёЈаёҒ
3. SIEM maintenance аё•аёӯаёҷ 03:00 search аёӯаёІаёҲаёҠа№үаёІ 15 аёҷаёІаё—аёө
```

## аёӮа№үаёӯаёңаёҙаё”аёһаёҘаёІаё” Handover аё—аёөа№Ҳаёһаёҡаёҡа№Ҳаёӯаёў

| вқҢ аёңаёҙаё”аёһаёҘаёІаё” | аёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ | вң… а№Ғаёҷаё§аёӣаёҸаёҙаёҡаёұаё•аёҙаё—аёөа№Ҳаё”аёө |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Handover аёӣаёІаёҒа№ҖаёӣаёҘа№ҲаёІ | аёҘаё·аёЎаёЈаёІаёўаёҘаё°а№Җаёӯаёөаёўаё” | а№ҖаёӮаёөаёўаёҷ template + brief аёӣаёІаёҒа№ҖаёӣаёҘа№ҲаёІ |
| а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаёӣаёұаёҚаё«аёІаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ | Analyst а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёһаёҘаёІаё”аёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮаё§а№ҲаёІаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲа№ҒаёҘаё°аёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷ log source health а№ҖаёӘаёЎаёӯ |
| аёӘаёЈаёёаёӣ incident а№„аёЎа№Ҳаё„аёЈаёҡ | а№ҖаёӘаёөаёўа№Җаё§аёҘаёІаёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷаёӢа№үаёі | а№ғаёӘа№Ҳ: а№ҖаёҒаёҙаё”аёӯаё°а№„аёЈ аё—аёіаёӯаё°а№„аёЈа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§ аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё—аёіаёӯаё°а№„аёЈаё•а№Ҳаёӯ |
| аёҘаё·аёЎаёҡаёӯаёҒ pending approvals | Containment аёҘа№ҲаёІаёҠа№үаёІ | аёҘаёҙаёӘаё•а№Ң pending approvals/waiting items аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” |
| а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё° alert queue | Queue аёҘа№үаёҷ | аёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷ queue depth а№ҖаёӘаёЎаёӯ |

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ

- [аёЎаёІаё•аёЈаёҗаёІаёҷаёӘа№ҲаёҮаёЎаёӯаёҡаёҒаё°](../06_Operations_Management/Shift_Handoff.th.md) вҖ” аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷаёӘа№ҲаёҮаёЎаёӯаёҡ
- [аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҡ IR](../05_Incident_Response/Framework.th.md) вҖ” аё§аёҮаёҲаёЈаёҠаёөаё§аёҙаё•аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮ
- [аё•аёұаё§аёҠаёөа№үаё§аёұаё” SOC & KPIs](../06_Operations_Management/SOC_Metrics.th.md) вҖ” аё•аёұаё§аёҠаёөа№үаё§аёұаё”аёӣаёЈаё°аёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙаё аёІаёһ
- [а№ҒаёҡаёҡаёҹаёӯаёЈа№ҢаёЎ Incident Report](incident_report.th.md) вҖ” а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң

### Handover Quality Check

| Item | Verified |
|:---|:---|
| Open incidents listed | вҳҗ |
| Pending actions noted | вҳҗ |
| Unusual activity flagged | вҳҗ |
| System health confirmed | вҳҗ |

## References

- [NIST SP 800-61r2](https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-61/rev-2/final)


---

## File: 08_Detection_Engineering/Coverage_Matrix.en.md
# рҹҺҜ Detection Coverage Matrix

> **аё•аёІаёЈаёІаёҮаё„аёЈаёӯаёҡаё„аёҘаёёаёЎаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ** вҖ” а№ҒаёӘаё”аёҮ Sigma Rule, YARA Rule а№ҒаёҘаё° MITRE ATT&CK аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаё—аёёаёҒ Playbook
>
> **Version**: 2.14.0 | **Last updated**: 2026-04-26

---

## рҹ“Ҡ Coverage Summary

| Metric | Count | Coverage |
|:---|:---:|:---:|
| Total Playbooks | 53 | вҖ” |
| Playbooks with Sigma Rules | 53 | **100%** вң… |
| Total Sigma Rules | 54 | 1+ per playbook |
| Total YARA Rules | 15 | File-based threats |
| MITRE ATT&CK / ATLAS Techniques | 43+ | Mapped to all rules |

---

|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|:---|:---:|

| PB-02 | **Ransomware** | `file_bulk_renaming_ransomware` | вң… `ransomware_indicators` | T1486 | рҹ”ҙ Critical |
| PB-03 | **Malware Infection** | `proc_temp_folder_execution` | вң… `malicious_document` | T1204.002 | рҹҹ  High |
| PB-04 | **Brute Force** | `win_multiple_failed_logins` | вҖ” | T1110 | рҹҹЎ Medium |
| PB-05 | **Account Compromise** | `cloud_unusual_login` | вҖ” | T1078.004 | рҹҹЎ Medium |
| PB-06 | **Impossible Travel** | `cloud_impossible_travel` | вҖ” | T1078.004 | рҹҹ  High |
| PB-07 | **Privilege Escalation** | `win_domain_admin_group_add` | вҖ” | T1078 | рҹҹ  High |
| PB-08 | **Data Exfiltration** | `file_bulk_usb_copy`, `net_large_upload` | вң… `data_staging_archive` | T1052, T1048 | рҹҹ  High |

## File: 08_Detection_Engineering/Coverage_Matrix.th.md
# рҹҺҜ аё•аёІаёЈаёІаёҮаё„аёЈаёӯаёҡаё„аёҘаёёаёЎаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ (Detection Coverage Matrix)

> а№ҒаёӘаё”аёҮ Sigma Rule, YARA Rule а№ҒаёҘаё° MITRE ATT&CK аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаё—аёёаёҒ Playbook
>
> **Version**: 2.14.0 | **аёӯаёұаёӣа№Җаё”аё•аёҘа№ҲаёІаёӘаёёаё”**: 2026-04-26

---

## рҹ“Ҡ аёӘаёЈаёёаёӣаё аёІаёһаёЈаё§аёЎ

| аё•аёұаё§аёҠаёөа№үаё§аёұаё” | аёҲаёіаёҷаё§аёҷ | аё„аёЈаёӯаёҡаё„аёҘаёёаёЎ |
|:---|:---:|:---:|
| Playbook аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” | 53 | вҖ” |
| Playbook аё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёө Sigma Rules | 53 | **100%** вң… |
| Sigma Rules аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” | 54 | 1+ аё•а№Ҳаёӯ playbook |
| YARA Rules аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” | 15 | аё аёұаёўаё„аёёаёҒаё„аёІаёЎаё—аёөа№Ҳа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷа№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң |
| а№Җаё—аё„аёҷаёҙаё„ MITRE ATT&CK / ATLAS | 43+ | map аё„аёЈаёҡаё—аёёаёҒаёҒаёҺ |

---

## File: 08_Detection_Engineering/README.md
# Detection Rules Index (Sigma)

This directory contains **54 Sigma detection rules** mapped to the SOC Playbooks. Rules are organized by category and can be imported into any Sigma-compatible SIEM (Splunk, Elastic, Microsoft Sentinel, etc.).

## How to Use

1. **Import** the `.yml` files into your SIEM's Sigma converter (e.g., `sigmac`, `pySigma`, Uncoder.io)
2. **Tune** the `falsepositives` and `level` fields to match your environment
3. **Map** each rule to the corresponding Playbook for response procedures

---

## рҹ“Ӣ Detection Rules by Category

### рҹ–ҘпёҸ Process / Endpoint Detection

| Rule File | Title | Level | MITRE ATT&CK | Playbook |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| [proc_office_spawn_powershell.yml](proc_office_spawn_powershell.yml) | Office Application Spawning PowerShell | High | T1059.001 | PB-01 Phishing |
| [proc_powershell_encoded.yml](proc_powershell_encoded.yml) | PowerShell Encoded Command | High | T1059.001 | PB-11 Suspicious Script |
| [proc_temp_folder_execution.yml](proc_temp_folder_execution.yml) | Suspicious Execution from Temp/Downloads | Medium | T1204.002 | PB-03 Malware |
| [proc_cryptomining_indicators.yml](proc_cryptomining_indicators.yml) | Cryptomining Process / Stratum Protocol | Critical | T1496 | PB-31 Cryptomining |
| [win_lolbin_execution.yml](sigma_rules/win_lolbin_execution.yml) | Living Off The Land Binary Execution | High | T1218 | PB-39 LOLBins |

## рҹҺҜ YARA Rules (File-based Detection)

In addition to Sigma rules, this directory contains **15 YARA rules** for file-based threat detection:

| File | Rules | Detects | Playbook |
|:---|:---:|:---|:---|
| [ransomware_indicators.yar](yara/ransomware_indicators.yar) | 2 | Ransom notes, shadow copy deletion | PB-02 |
| [webshell_generic.yar](yara/webshell_generic.yar) | 3 | PHP/JSP/ASPX webshells | PB-10, PB-18 |
| [cryptominer_detection.yar](yara/cryptominer_detection.yar) | 2 | Mining pools, xmrig binaries | PB-31 |
| [cobalt_strike_beacon.yar](yara/cobalt_strike_beacon.yar) | 2 | CS beacons & stagers | PB-13, PB-12 |
| [malicious_document.yar](yara/malicious_document.yar) | 2 | Office macro malware, PDF JS | PB-01, PB-03 |
| [credential_dumping_tools.yar](yara/credential_dumping_tools.yar) | 2 | Mimikatz, LaZagne, Rubeus, SAM dump | PB-36 |
| [wiper_malware.yar](yara/wiper_malware.yar) | 1 | Shamoon, NotPetya, HermeticWiper | PB-38 |
| [rootkit_bootkit.yar](yara/rootkit_bootkit.yar) | 1 | TDL, ZeroAccess, UEFI rootkits | PB-45 |
| [lolbin_dropper.yar](yara/lolbin_dropper.yar) | 1 | certutil, mshta, BITSAdmin abuse scripts | PB-39 |
| [exploit_kit_payload.yar](yara/exploit_kit_payload.yar) | 1 | Exploit kit landing pages, shellcode | PB-24, PB-43, PB-44 |
| [supply_chain_backdoor.yar](yara/supply_chain_backdoor.yar) | 1 | npm/pip backdoor, SolarWinds/SUNBURST | PB-32 |
| [data_staging_archive.yar](yara/data_staging_archive.yar) | 1 | Password-protected archives, staging | PB-08, PB-35 |

рҹ“– **Full YARA Index**: [yara/README.md](yara/README.md)

## File: 08_Detection_Engineering/README.th.md
# аё”аёұаёҠаёҷаёө Detection Rules (Sigma) вҖ” аё аёІаё©аёІа№„аё—аёў

а№„аё”а№ҖаёЈаёҒаё—аёӯаёЈаёөаёҷаёөа№үаёЎаёө **Sigma Detection Rule 54 аёҒаёҺ** аё—аёөа№Ҳ map аёҒаёұаёҡ SOC Playbook а№Ғаё•а№ҲаёҘаё°аёҠаёёаё” аёӘаёІаёЎаёІаёЈаё– Import а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІ SIEM аё—аёөа№ҲаёЈаёӯаёҮаёЈаёұаёҡ Sigma а№„аё”а№ү (Splunk, Elastic, Microsoft Sentinel аёҜаёҘаёҜ)

## аё§аёҙаёҳаёөа№ғаёҠа№үаёҮаёІаёҷ

1. **Import** а№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң `.yml` а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІ Sigma Converter аёӮаёӯаёҮ SIEM (а№ҖаёҠа№Ҳаёҷ `sigmac`, `pySigma`, Uncoder.io)
2. **аёӣаёЈаёұаёҡа№Ғаё•а№ҲаёҮ** аё„а№ҲаёІ `falsepositives` а№ҒаёҘаё° `level` а№ғаё«а№үа№Җаё«аёЎаёІаё°аёҒаёұаёҡаёӘаё аёІаёһа№Ғаё§аё”аёҘа№үаёӯаёЎаёӮаёӯаёҮаё„аёёаё“
3. **а№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎа№ӮаёўаёҮ** а№Ғаё•а№ҲаёҘаё°аёҒаёҺаёҒаёұаёҡ Playbook аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮа№Җаёһаё·а№ҲаёӯаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮ

---

## рҹ“Ӣ Detection Rules а№ҒаёўаёҒаё•аёІаёЎаё«аёЎаё§аё”аё«аёЎаё№а№Ҳ

### рҹ–ҘпёҸ Process / Endpoint Detection (аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаё—аёөа№Ҳ Endpoint)

| а№„аёҹаёҘа№ҢаёҒаёҺ | аёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ (EN) | аё„аёіаёӯаёҳаёҙаёҡаёІаёўаё аёІаё©аёІа№„аё—аёў | аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ | MITRE | Playbook |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| [proc_office_spawn_powershell.yml](proc_office_spawn_powershell.yml) | Office Spawning PowerShell | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ Office (Word/Excel/Outlook) а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” PowerShell вҖ” а№Җаё—аё„аёҷаёҙаё„ Phishing аё—аёұа№Ҳаё§а№„аёӣ | аёӘаё№аёҮ | T1059.001 | PB-01 |
| [proc_powershell_encoded.yml](proc_powershell_encoded.yml) | PowerShell Encoded Command | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ PowerShell аё—аёөа№ҲаёЈаёұаёҷаё„аёіаёӘаёұа№ҲаёҮа№Ғаёҡаёҡ Encode а№Җаёһаё·а№ҲаёӯаёӢа№Ҳаёӯаёҷ Script аёӯаёұаёҷаё•аёЈаёІаёў | аёӘаё№аёҮ | T1059.001 | PB-11 |
| [proc_temp_folder_execution.yml](proc_temp_folder_execution.yml) | Execution from Temp/Downloads | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡа№„аёҹаёҘа№Ңаё—аёөа№ҲаёЈаёұаёҷаёҲаёІаёҒа№ӮаёҹаёҘа№Җаё”аёӯаёЈа№Ң Temp аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ Downloads вҖ” аёҷа№ҲаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёўаё§а№ҲаёІа№Җаёӣа№ҮаёҷаёЎаёұаёҘа№Ғаё§аёЈа№Ң | аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ | T1204.002 | PB-03 |
| [proc_cryptomining_indicators.yml](proc_cryptomining_indicators.yml) | Cryptomining Process / Stratum | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ Process аёӮаёёаё”а№Җаё«аёЎаё·аёӯаёҮ (xmrig, cpuminer) аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёҒаёІаёЈа№ғаёҠа№ү Stratum Protocol вҖ” аёӮаёёаё”аё„аёЈаёҙаёӣа№Ӯаё•а№Ӯаё”аёўа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё• | аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• | T1496 | PB-31 |
| [win_lolbin_execution.yml](sigma_rules/win_lolbin_execution.yml) | Living Off The Land Binary | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈа№ғаёҠа№ү LOLBins (certutil, mshta, rundll32, regsvr32) а№Җаёһаё·а№Ҳаёӯаё”аёІаё§аёҷа№Ңа№Ӯаё«аёҘаё”аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёЈаёұаёҷ Payload аёӯаёұаёҷаё•аёЈаёІаёў | аёӘаё№аёҮ | T1218 | PB-39 |

### рҹ“Ғ File Activity (аёҒаёҙаёҲаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎа№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң)

| [file_bulk_usb_copy.yml](file_bulk_usb_copy.yml) | Bulk File Copy to USB | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаё„аёұаё”аёҘаёӯаёҒа№„аёҹаёҘа№ҢаёҲаёіаёҷаё§аёҷаёЎаёІаёҒа№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ USB Drive вҖ” аёӯаёІаёҲа№Җаёӣа№ҮаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёӮа№ӮаёЎаёўаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ | T1052 | PB-08 |
| [file_usb_autorun.yml](sigma_rules/file_usb_autorun.yml) | USB Removable Media Threat | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ Autorun аёҲаёІаёҒ USB, аёӘаёұаёҚаёҚаёІаё“ BadUSB а№ҒаёҘаё° Mass Storage аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё• | аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ | T1091 | PB-40 |

### рҹҢҗ Network Detection (аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡа№Җаё„аёЈаё·аёӯаёӮа№ҲаёІаёў)

| а№„аёҹаёҘа№ҢаёҒаёҺ | аёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ (EN) | аё„аёіаёӯаёҳаёҙаёҡаёІаёўаё аёІаё©аёІа№„аё—аёў | аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ | MITRE | Playbook |

| [net_large_upload.yml](net_large_upload.yml) | Large Upload >500MB | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаёӯаёұаёӣа№Ӯаё«аёҘаё”аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёЎаёІаёҒаёҒаё§а№ҲаёІ 500MB а№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ IP аё аёІаёўаёҷаёӯаёҒ вҖ” аёӯаёІаёҲа№Җаёӣа№ҮаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёЈаёұа№Ҳаё§а№„аё«аёҘаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | аёӘаё№аёҮ | T1048 | PB-08 |
| [net_dns_tunneling.yml](net_dns_tunneling.yml) | DNS Tunneling | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ DNS Query аё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёөаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёўаёІаё§аёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ (>50 chars) аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёӣаёЈаёҙаёЎаёІаё“ TXT/NULL record аёӘаё№аёҮ вҖ” аёӘаёұаёҚаёҚаёІаё“ DNS Tunneling | аёӘаё№аёҮ | T1071.004 | PB-25 |
| [net_ot_ics_anomaly.yml](net_ot_ics_anomaly.yml) | OT/ICS Network Anomaly | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаё—аёЈаёІаёҹаёҹаёҙаёҒ Modbus/DNP3/OPC UA аё—аёөа№Ҳаёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙа№ғаёҷа№Җаё„аёЈаё·аёӯаёӮа№ҲаёІаёў OT/ICS | аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• | ICS T0813 | PB-33 |
| [net_vpn_abuse.yml](sigma_rules/net_vpn_abuse.yml) | Unauthorized VPN/Proxy | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈа№ғаёҠа№ү VPN аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё• (NordVPN, ProtonVPN), Tunnel (ngrok), аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ Tor | аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ | T1133 | PB-41 |

| [net_typosquatting.yml](sigma_rules/net_typosquatting.yml) | Typosquatting Domain | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮа№Ӯаё”а№ҖаёЎаёҷаёӣаёҘаёӯаёЎ (homoglyph, punycode, TLD аёҷа№ҲаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёў) | аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ | T1583.001 | PB-49 |
| [net_unauthorized_scanning.yml](sigma_rules/net_unauthorized_scanning.yml) | Unauthorized Scanning | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡа№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯ Scan (nmap, masscan) а№ҒаёҘаё° Port Sweep аёҲаёІаёҒаё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ | аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ | T1046 | PB-50 |

| а№„аёҹаёҘа№ҢаёҒаёҺ | аёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ (EN) | аё„аёіаёӯаёҳаёҙаёҡаёІаёўаё аёІаё©аёІа№„аё—аёў | аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ | MITRE | Playbook |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| [cloud_impossible_travel.yml](cloud_impossible_travel.yml) | Impossible Travel | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ Login аёҲаёІаёҒ 2 аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳаё—аёөа№Ҳа№Җаё”аёҙаёҷаё—аёІаёҮа№„аёЎа№Ҳаё—аёұаёҷа№ғаёҷа№Җаё§аёҘаёІаё—аёөа№ҲаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё” | аёӘаё№аёҮ | T1078.004 | PB-06 |
| [cloud_unusual_login.yml](cloud_unusual_login.yml) | Unusual Login Location | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ Login аёҲаёІаёҒаёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё—аёЁаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳа№ғаёҷаёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ | T1078.004 | PB-05 |
| [cloud_root_login.yml](cloud_root_login.yml) | AWS Root Account Login | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈ Login аё”а№үаё§аёўаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө Root аёӮаёӯаёҮ AWS вҖ” а№„аёЎа№Ҳаё„аё§аёЈа№ғаёҠа№үа№ғаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёіаёҮаёІаёҷаёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ | аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• | T1078 | PB-16 |
| [cloud_aws_ec2_mining.yml](cloud_aws_ec2_mining.yml) | EC2 Crypto Mining | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ EC2 Instance аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎаё•а№ҲаёӯаёҒаёұаёҡ Mining Pool аёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ GuardDuty | аёӘаё№аёҮ | T1496 | PB-22/PB-31 |
| [cloud_aws_s3_public_access.yml](cloud_aws_s3_public_access.yml) | S3 Public Access Enabled | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёҙаё” Block Public Access аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ Bucket Policy аё—аёөа№Ҳа№Җаёӣаёҙаё”а№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ Public | аёӘаё№аёҮ | T1530 | PB-21 |
| [cloud_azure_risky_signin.yml](cloud_azure_risky_signin.yml) | Azure AD Risky Sign-in | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ Sign-in аё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒа№ҒаёҹаёҘа№ҮаёҒаё§а№ҲаёІ Impossible Travel аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ Anonymized IP | аёӘаё№аёҮ | T1078.004 | PB-23 |
| [cloud_email_inbox_rule.yml](cloud_email_inbox_rule.yml) | Suspicious Inbox Rule | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ Inbox Rule аё—аёөа№Ҳаёңаё№а№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөа№ғаёҠа№үаёӢа№Ҳаёӯаёҷаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘ (а№ҖаёҠа№Ҳаёҷ аёҘаёҡ, аёўа№үаёІаёўа№„аёӣ RSS) | аёӘаё№аёҮ | T1114.003 | PB-17 |
| [cloud_supply_chain_compromise.yml](cloud_supply_chain_compromise.yml) | Supply Chain Package Tampering | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ Package Manager (npm, pip, gem) аё—аёөа№Ҳ Install аёҲаёІаёҒ Registry а№„аёЎа№ҲаёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ вҖ” аёӘаёұаёҚаёҚаёІаё“ Supply Chain Attack | аёӘаё№аёҮ | T1195.002 | PB-32 |
| [cloud_mfa_bypass.yml](cloud_mfa_bypass.yml) | MFA Bypass / AiTM Token Theft | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈ Bypass MFA аёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ AiTM Proxy аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ Token Theft | аёӘаё№аёҮ | T1556.006 | PB-26 |
| [cloud_storage_public_access.yml](cloud_storage_public_access.yml) | Cloud Storage Public Access | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈа№Җаёӣаёҙаё” Public Access аёӮаёӯаёҮ Cloud Storage (S3/Blob) | аёӘаё№аёҮ | T1530 | PB-27 |
| [cloud_mobile_compromise.yml](cloud_mobile_compromise.yml) | Mobile Device Compromise | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаёӘаёұаёҚаёҚаёІаё“аёҒаёІаёЈа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№ҢаёЎаё·аёӯаё–аё·аёӯаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ MDM | аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ | T1456 | PB-28 |
| [cloud_email_takeover.yml](sigma_rules/cloud_email_takeover.yml) | Email Account Takeover | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаёўаё¶аё”аёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёөаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘ вҖ” OAuth App аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёў, аёҒаёҺаёӘа№ҲаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘ, аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷ Delegate | аёӘаё№аёҮ | T1114 | PB-42 |
| [cloud_sim_swap.yml](sigma_rules/cloud_sim_swap.yml) | SIM Swap Attack | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаёӘаёұаёҚаёҚаёІаё“ SIM Swap вҖ” а№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷа№ҖаёҡаёӯаёЈа№Ңа№Ӯаё—аёЈ, а№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷаё§аёҙаёҳаёө MFA, аёЈаёөа№ҖаёӢа№Үаё•аёЈаё«аёұаёӘ | аёӘаё№аёҮ | T1111 | PB-46 |
| [cloud_cryptojacking.yml](sigma_rules/cloud_cryptojacking.yml) | Cloud Cryptojacking | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаёӮаёёаё”аё„аёЈаёҙаёӣа№Ӯаё•аёҡаёҷ Cloud вҖ” аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ GPU Instance, аё„а№ҲаёІа№ғаёҠа№үаёҲа№ҲаёІаёўаёһаёёа№ҲаёҮ, API Key abuse | аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• | T1496 | PB-47 |

### рҹҢҚ Web / Application (а№Җаё§а№Үаёҡ / а№ҒаёӯаёӣаёһаёҘаёҙа№Җаё„аёҠаёұаёҷ)

| а№„аёҹаёҘа№ҢаёҒаёҺ | аёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ (EN) | аё„аёіаёӯаёҳаёҙаёҡаёІаёўаё аёІаё©аёІа№„аё—аёў | аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ | MITRE | Playbook |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| [web_high_rate_limit.yml](web_high_rate_limit.yml) | High Request Rate | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ IP а№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёӘа№ҲаёҮ HTTP Request аёҲаёіаёҷаё§аёҷаёЎаёІаёҒаёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ вҖ” аёӘаёұаёҚаёҚаёІаё“ DDoS аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ Scanning | аёӘаё№аёҮ | T1498 | PB-09/30 |
| [web_sqli_pattern.yml](web_sqli_pattern.yml) | SQL Injection Pattern | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаёЈаё№аёӣа№Ғаёҡаёҡ SQL Injection аё—аёұа№Ҳаё§а№„аёӣа№ғаёҷ URL Parameter | аёӘаё№аёҮ | T1190 | PB-10 |
| [web_waf_exploit.yml](web_waf_exploit.yml) | WAF Exploit Attempt | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ WAF Event аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҒаёҹаёҘа№ҮаёҒаёҒаёІаёЈаёһаёўаёІаёўаёІаёЎа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөаё”а№үаё§аёў CVE аё—аёөа№ҲаёЈаё№а№үаёҲаёұаёҒ | аёӘаё№аёҮ | T1190 | PB-18 |
| [web_api_abuse_auth_bypass.yml](web_api_abuse_auth_bypass.yml) | API Auth Bypass / Enumeration | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө API а№Ғаёҡаёҡ BOLA/IDOR вҖ” аё§аёҷ ID аё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаёҷаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаё«аёЈаё·аёӯ Auth Fail аёҲаёіаёҷаё§аёҷаёЎаёІаёҒ | аёӘаё№аёҮ | T1190 | PB-30 |
| [web_zero_day_exploit_attempt.yml](web_zero_day_exploit_attempt.yml) | Zero-Day Exploit Payload | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ Payload аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Ӯаё«аё§а№Ҳ (Log4Shell, Spring4Shell, RCE) а№ғаёҷ Web Request | аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• | T1190/T1203 | PB-24 |
| [web_sqli_advanced.yml](sigma_rules/web_sqli_advanced.yml) | Advanced SQL Injection | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ SQLi аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаёӘаё№аёҮ вҖ” Blind SQLi, Time-based, Error-based extraction | аёӘаё№аёҮ | T1190 | PB-37 |
| [web_watering_hole.yml](sigma_rules/web_watering_hole.yml) | Watering Hole Attack | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ Redirect аёҲаёІаёҒа№Җаё§а№Үаёҡаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯаё–аё·аёӯа№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ Exploit Kit аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№Ӯаё”а№ҖаёЎаёҷаёӯаёұаёҷаё•аёЈаёІаёў | аёӘаё№аёҮ | T1189 | PB-43 |
| [web_drive_by_download.yml](sigma_rules/web_drive_by_download.yml) | Drive-By Download | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ Browser аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ Process аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёў (cmd, powershell, wscript) вҖ” аёӘаёұаёҚаёҚаёІаё“ Exploit | аёӘаё№аёҮ | T1189 | PB-44 |

### рҹ“ұ MDM / Device (аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң)

| а№„аёҹаёҘа№ҢаёҒаёҺ | аёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ (EN) | аё„аёіаёӯаёҳаёҙаёҡаёІаёўаё аёІаё©аёІа№„аё—аёў | аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ | MITRE | Playbook |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| [mdm_device_offline.yml](mdm_device_offline.yml) | Device Offline >30 Days | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳ Check-in аёҒаёұаёҡ MDM Server аёЎаёІаёҒаёҒаё§а№ҲаёІ 30 аё§аёұаёҷ | аё•а№Ҳаёі | вҖ” | PB-19 |

### рҹ”Қ Proxy / CASB

| а№„аёҹаёҘа№ҢаёҒаёҺ | аёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ (EN) | аё„аёіаёӯаёҳаёҙаёҡаёІаёўаё аёІаё©аёІа№„аё—аёў | аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ | MITRE | Playbook |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| [proxy_shadow_it.yml](proxy_shadow_it.yml) | Shadow IT / Unauthorized SaaS | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈа№ғаёҠа№ү SaaS аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ (Dropbox, WeTransfer аёҜаёҘаёҜ) | аё•а№Ҳаёі | T1567 | PB-29 |

### рҹӨ– AI / ML Security

| а№„аёҹаёҘа№ҢаёҒаёҺ | аёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ (EN) | аё„аёіаёӯаёҳаёҙаёҡаёІаёўаё аёІаё©аёІа№„аё—аёў | аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ | MITRE / ATLAS | Playbook |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| [ai_prompt_injection.yml](sigma_rules/ai_prompt_injection.yml) | AI Prompt Injection Attack Pattern | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ jailbreak, system prompt extraction а№ҒаёҘаё°аё„аёіаёӘаёұа№ҲаёҮ override аё•а№Ҳаёӯ LLM endpoint | аёӘаё№аёҮ | AML.T0051, T1059 | PB-51 |
| [ai_data_poisoning.yml](sigma_rules/ai_data_poisoning.yml) | LLM Data Poisoning Indicators | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҒаёҒа№үа№„аёӮ training data, RAG source аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ dataset аёҲаёіаёҷаё§аёҷаёЎаёІаёҒа№Ӯаё”аёўаёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ | аёӘаё№аёҮ | AML.T0020, T1565 | PB-52 |
| [ai_model_theft.yml](sigma_rules/ai_model_theft.yml) | AI Model Theft or Extraction Attempt | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ inference call аёӣаёЈаёҙаёЎаёІаё“аёӘаё№аёҮа№ҒаёҘаё°аёҒаёІаёЈ download model weight аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё• | аёӘаё№аёҮ | AML.T0024, T1020 | PB-53 |

---

## аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ (Severity Level)

| аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ | аё„аё§аёІаёЎаё«аёЎаёІаёў | аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| рҹ”ҙ **аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• (Critical)** | аё•аёұаё§аёҡа№ҲаёҮаёҠаёөа№үаёҒаёІаёЈаё–аё№аёҒаёҡаёёаёҒаёЈаёёаёҒаё—аёөа№ҲаёҠаёұаё”а№ҖаёҲаёҷ | аё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮаё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө вҖ” а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ Tier 2+ |
| рҹҹ  **аёӘаё№аёҮ (High)** | аёЎаёөа№ӮаёӯаёҒаёІаёӘаёӘаё№аёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№ҢаёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮ | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡаё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ 15 аёҷаёІаё—аёө |
| рҹҹЎ **аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ (Medium)** | аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡа№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎа№Җаё•аёҙаёЎ | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡаё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ 1 аёҠаёұа№Ҳаё§а№ӮаёЎаёҮ |
| рҹҹў **аё•а№Ҳаёі (Low)** | аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘа№ҖаёӘаёЈаёҙаёЎ / аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡа№ғаёҷа№Җаё§аёҘаёІаё—аёіаёҒаёІаёЈ |

## рҹҺҜ аё•аёІаёЈаёІаёҮ Detection Coverage

аё”аё№аё аёІаёһаёЈаё§аёЎ Sigma, YARA а№ҒаёҘаё° MITRE ATT&CK аё—аёөа№Ҳаё„аёЈаёӯаёҡаё„аёҘаёёаёЎаё—аёёаёҒ 53 Playbook:

> рҹ“Ҡ **[Coverage_Matrix.th.md](Coverage_Matrix.th.md)** | **[Coverage Matrix (EN)](Coverage_Matrix.en.md)**

---

## рҹ“ҡ аё„аёҘаёұаёҮ Use Case аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ SOC

а№ғаёҠа№үаё„аёҘаёұаёҮ Use Case аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ SOC а№Җаёһаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҲаёұаё”аёҘаёіаё”аёұаёҡ detection аё•аёІаёЎ maturity, business risk, telemetry readiness, response playbook а№ҒаёҘаё° KPI:

> рҹ“ҳ **[SOC_Use_Case_Library.th.md](SOC_Use_Case_Library.th.md)** | **[SOC Use Case Library (EN)](SOC_Use_Case_Library.en.md)**

---

## File: 08_Detection_Engineering/SOC_Use_Case_Library.en.md
# SOC Use Case Library

**Document ID**: DET-UC-001
**Version**: 1.0
**Last Updated**: 2026-04-26
**Owner**: SOC Lead / Detection Engineer

---

## Purpose

Define a practical use case library for prioritizing, implementing, and measuring SOC detections. Use this document to decide which detections to build first, what telemetry is required, which playbook should handle the alert, and how to measure operational value.

---

## Use Case Selection Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Identify Business Risk] --> B[Map to Threat Scenario]
    B --> C[Confirm Log Sources]
    C --> D{Telemetry Ready?}
    D -->|Yes| E[Select Sigma or YARA Rule]
    D -->|No| F[Onboard Required Logs]
    F --> C
    E --> G[Map to Playbook]
    G --> H[Test and Tune]
    H --> I[Measure KPI and Review]
```

---

## 1. Use Case Tiers

| Tier | Maturity | Goal | Example Use Cases |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Tier 1 | Foundational | Detect common attacks with high analyst confidence | Phishing, brute force, malware execution, suspicious PowerShell |
| Tier 2 | Operational | Detect attack progression across identity, endpoint, network, and cloud | Lateral movement, privilege escalation, impossible travel, data exfiltration |
| Tier 3 | Advanced | Detect low-signal, high-impact, or business-specific threats | Insider threat, supply chain compromise, AI abuse, cloud cryptojacking |

---

## 2. Foundational Use Cases

| Use Case | Primary Logs | Detection Rule | Playbook | KPI |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Phishing attachment or link execution | Email, endpoint process, DNS, proxy | `proc_office_spawn_powershell.yml` | [PB-01 Phishing](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Phishing.en.md) | Time from report to containment |
| Ransomware file activity | Endpoint, file audit, EDR telemetry | `file_bulk_renaming_ransomware.yml` | [PB-02 Ransomware](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Ransomware.en.md) | Hosts isolated within SLA |
| Malware execution from user-writable paths | Endpoint process, file creation | `proc_temp_folder_execution.yml` | [PB-03 Malware Infection](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Malware_Infection.en.md) | True positive rate |
| Multiple failed logins | Identity provider, Windows security logs, VPN | `win_multiple_failed_logins.yml` | [PB-04 Brute Force](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Brute_Force.en.md) | False positive rate |
| Suspicious script execution | Endpoint process, command line, script block logs | `proc_powershell_encoded.yml` | [PB-11 Suspicious Script](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Suspicious_Script.en.md) | Alert-to-triage time |

---

## 3. Operational Use Cases

| Use Case | Primary Logs | Detection Rule | Playbook | KPI |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Impossible travel or anomalous login | Identity provider, VPN, cloud audit | `cloud_impossible_travel.yml` | [PB-06 Impossible Travel](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Impossible_Travel.en.md) | Account containment time |
| Privilege escalation | Directory audit, admin group changes | `win_domain_admin_group_add.yml` | [PB-07 Privilege Escalation](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Privilege_Escalation.en.md) | Unauthorized admin changes reversed |
| Data exfiltration | Proxy, firewall, DLP, file audit | `net_large_upload.yml` | [PB-08 Data Exfiltration](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Data_Exfiltration.en.md) | Exfiltration volume confirmed |
| Lateral movement over admin shares | Windows security, endpoint, network flow | `win_admin_share_access.yml` | [PB-12 Lateral Movement](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Lateral_Movement.en.md) | Affected hosts identified |
| C2 beaconing | DNS, proxy, firewall, network flow | `net_beaconing.yml` | [PB-13 C2 Communication](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/C2_Communication.en.md) | Beacon dwell time |
| Cloud storage exposure | Cloud audit, storage access logs | `cloud_storage_public_access.yml` | [PB-27 Cloud Storage Exposure](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Cloud_Storage_Exposure.en.md) | Public exposure duration |

---

## 4. Advanced Use Cases

| Use Case | Primary Logs | Detection Rule | Playbook | KPI |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Insider data staging | File audit, DLP, proxy, HR risk signals | `win_data_collection_staging.yml` | [PB-14 Insider Threat](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Insider_Threat.en.md) | Confirmed risk cases reviewed |
| Supply chain compromise | CI/CD, package manager, cloud audit | `cloud_supply_chain_compromise.yml` | [PB-32 Supply Chain Attack](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Supply_Chain_Attack.en.md) | Affected dependencies identified |
| Cloud cryptojacking | Cloud billing, instance inventory, audit logs | `cloud_cryptojacking.yml` | [PB-47 Cloud Cryptojacking](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Cloud_Cryptojacking.en.md) | Cost spike contained |
| Deepfake social engineering | Email, collaboration, ticketing, financial workflow | `net_deepfake_social.yml` | [PB-48 Deepfake Social Engineering](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Deepfake_Social_Engineering.en.md) | High-risk requests verified |
| AI prompt injection | Application logs, AI gateway logs, tool execution logs | `ai_prompt_injection.yml` | [PB-51 AI Prompt Injection](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/AI_Prompt_Injection.en.md) | Unsafe tool calls blocked |
| LLM data poisoning | Data pipeline, RAG index, model evaluation logs | `ai_data_poisoning.yml` | [PB-52 LLM Data Poisoning](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/LLM_Data_Poisoning.en.md) | Poisoned records removed |
| AI model theft | API logs, repository audit, storage access logs | `ai_model_theft.yml` | [PB-53 AI Model Theft](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/AI_Model_Theft.en.md) | Unauthorized extraction stopped |

---

## 5. Intake Checklist

-   [ ] **Business risk**: Identify the asset, process, or user group the use case protects.
-   [ ] **Threat mapping**: Map the scenario to MITRE ATT&CK tactic and technique where applicable.
-   [ ] **Telemetry**: Confirm required logs are collected, parsed, retained, and searchable.
-   [ ] **Detection logic**: Select or write a Sigma, YARA, or SIEM-native rule.
-   [ ] **Response path**: Link the alert to the correct incident response playbook.
-   [ ] **Tuning plan**: Define expected false positives, exclusions, and review cadence.
-   [ ] **Metric**: Assign one operational KPI that proves the use case is useful.

---

## 6. Prioritization Model

Score each candidate use case from 1 to 5.

| Factor | Question | Weight |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Business Impact | Would failure affect critical operations, regulated data, or executive risk? | 30% |
| Threat Likelihood | Is the threat common in the sector or current threat landscape? | 25% |
| Telemetry Readiness | Are the required logs available and reliable? | 20% |
| Response Readiness | Does a tested playbook and owner exist? | 15% |
| Tuning Cost | Can the team handle expected alert volume? | 10% |

Use cases scoring **4.0+** should be implemented first. Use cases below **3.0** should be deferred unless required by compliance, audit, or executive direction.

---

## 7. Review Cadence

| Cadence | Activity | Owner |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Weekly | Review noisy alerts and false positives | Detection Engineer |
| Monthly | Compare use cases against incident trends and threat intelligence | SOC Lead |
| Quarterly | Update MITRE coverage, retired rules, and control mappings | SOC Manager |
| Annually | Re-score all use cases against business risk | CISO / Risk Owner |

---

## Related Documents

-   [Detection Coverage Matrix](Coverage_Matrix.en.md)
-   [Detection Rules Index](README.md)
-   [Use Case Prioritization](../01_SOC_Fundamentals/Use_Case_Prioritization.en.md)
-   [Detection Rule Testing SOP](../06_Operations_Management/Detection_Rule_Testing.en.md)
-   [Log Source Matrix](../06_Operations_Management/Log_Source_Matrix.en.md)
-   [SOC Metrics & KPIs](../06_Operations_Management/SOC_Metrics.en.md)

## References

-   [MITRE ATT&CK Enterprise Matrix](https://attack.mitre.org/matrices/enterprise/)
-   [NIST SP 800-61r2 Computer Security Incident Handling Guide](https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-61/rev-2/final)
-   [CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities Catalog](https://www.cisa.gov/known-exploited-vulnerabilities-catalog)
-   [Sigma Specification](https://sigmahq.io/docs/basics/rules.html)


---

## File: 08_Detection_Engineering/SOC_Use_Case_Library.th.md
# аё„аёҘаёұаёҮ Use Case аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ SOC (SOC Use Case Library)

**Document ID**: DET-UC-001
**Version**: 1.0
**Last Updated**: 2026-04-26
**Owner**: SOC Lead / Detection Engineer

---

## 1. аё§аёұаё•аё–аёёаёӣаёЈаё°аёӘаёҮаё„а№Ң (Purpose)

аёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё”аё„аёҘаёұаёҮ use case аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡа№ҖаёҘаё·аёӯаёҒ аёҘаёіаё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ а№ҒаёҘаё°аё§аёұаё”аёңаёҘ detection аёӮаёӯаёҮ SOC аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮа№Җаёӣа№ҮаёҷаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ а№ғаёҠа№үа№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаёҷаёөа№үа№Җаёһаё·а№Ҳаёӯаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲаё§а№ҲаёІ use case а№ғаё”аё„аё§аёЈаё—аёіаёҒа№Ҳаёӯаёҷ аё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ғаёҠа№ү log source аёӯаё°а№„аёЈ аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёңаё№аёҒаёҒаёұаёҡ playbook а№ғаё” а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҲаё°аё§аёұаё”аё„аёёаё“аё„а№ҲаёІаё—аёІаёҮаёӣаёҸаёҙаёҡаёұаё•аёҙаёҒаёІаёЈаёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮа№„аёЈ

---

## 2. аёҒаёЈаё°аёҡаё§аёҷаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҘаё·аёӯаёҒ Use Case (Use Case Selection Flow)

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[аёЈаё°аёҡаёёаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаёҳаёёаёЈаёҒаёҙаёҲ] --> B[аёңаё№аёҒаёҒаёұаёҡаёӘаё–аёІаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ңаё аёұаёўаё„аёёаёҒаё„аёІаёЎ]
    B --> C[аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ Log Source]
    C --> D{Telemetry аёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎ?}
    D -->|аёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎ| E[а№ҖаёҘаё·аёӯаёҒ Sigma аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ YARA Rule]
    D -->|а№„аёЎа№ҲаёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎ| F[Onboard Log аё—аёөа№ҲаёҲаёіа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ]
    F --> C
    E --> G[аёңаё№аёҒаёҒаёұаёҡ Playbook]
    G --> H[Test а№ҒаёҘаё° Tune]
    H --> I[аё§аёұаё” KPI а№ҒаёҘаё° Review]
```

---

## 3. аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаёӮаёӯаёҮ Use Case (Use Case Tiers)

| Tier | Maturity | а№Җаёӣа№үаёІаё«аёЎаёІаёў | аё•аёұаё§аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮ Use Case |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Tier 1 | Foundational | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаё аёұаёўаё„аёёаёҒаё„аёІаёЎаё—аёұа№Ҳаё§а№„аёӣаё—аёөа№Ҳ analyst аё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲа№„аё”а№үаёЎаёұа№Ҳаёҷа№ғаёҲ | Phishing, brute force, malware execution, suspicious PowerShell |
| Tier 2 | Operational | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈа№Җаё„аёҘаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷаё•аёұаё§аёӮаёӯаёҮ attacker аёӮа№үаёІаёЎ identity, endpoint, network а№ҒаёҘаё° cloud | Lateral movement, privilege escalation, impossible travel, data exfiltration |
| Tier 3 | Advanced | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаё аёұаёўаё„аёёаёҒаё„аёІаёЎ signal аё•а№Ҳаёіа№Ғаё•а№Ҳ impact аёӘаё№аёҮ аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё°аёҳаёёаёЈаёҒаёҙаёҲ | Insider threat, supply chain compromise, AI abuse, cloud cryptojacking |

---

## 4. Foundational Use Cases

| Use Case | Log аё«аёҘаёұаёҒ | Detection Rule | Playbook | KPI |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Phishing attachment аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ link execution | Email, endpoint process, DNS, proxy | `proc_office_spawn_powershell.yml` | [PB-01 Phishing](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Phishing.th.md) | а№Җаё§аёҘаёІаёҲаёІаёҒ report аё–аё¶аёҮ containment |
| Ransomware file activity | Endpoint, file audit, EDR telemetry | `file_bulk_renaming_ransomware.yml` | [PB-02 Ransomware](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Ransomware.th.md) | Host аё—аёөа№Ҳ isolate а№„аё”а№үаё•аёІаёЎ SLA |
| Malware execution аёҲаёІаёҒ path аё—аёөа№Ҳ user а№ҖаёӮаёөаёўаёҷа№„аё”а№ү | Endpoint process, file creation | `proc_temp_folder_execution.yml` | [PB-03 Malware Infection](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Malware_Infection.th.md) | True positive rate |
| Multiple failed logins | Identity provider, Windows security logs, VPN | `win_multiple_failed_logins.yml` | [PB-04 Brute Force](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Brute_Force.th.md) | False positive rate |
| Suspicious script execution | Endpoint process, command line, script block logs | `proc_powershell_encoded.yml` | [PB-11 Suspicious Script](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Suspicious_Script.th.md) | Alert-to-triage time |

---

## 5. Operational Use Cases

| Use Case | Log аё«аёҘаёұаёҒ | Detection Rule | Playbook | KPI |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Impossible travel аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ anomalous login | Identity provider, VPN, cloud audit | `cloud_impossible_travel.yml` | [PB-06 Impossible Travel](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Impossible_Travel.th.md) | а№Җаё§аёҘаёІаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө |
| Privilege escalation | Directory audit, admin group changes | `win_domain_admin_group_add.yml` | [PB-07 Privilege Escalation](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Privilege_Escalation.th.md) | аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҷаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ң admin аё—аёөа№Ҳ rollback а№„аё”а№ү |
| Data exfiltration | Proxy, firewall, DLP, file audit | `net_large_upload.yml` | [PB-08 Data Exfiltration](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Data_Exfiltration.th.md) | аёӣаёЈаёҙаёЎаёІаё“аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳаёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаё§а№ҲаёІа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ |
| Lateral movement аёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ admin shares | Windows security, endpoint, network flow | `win_admin_share_access.yml` | [PB-12 Lateral Movement](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Lateral_Movement.th.md) | аёҲаёіаёҷаё§аёҷ host аё—аёөа№ҲаёЈаё°аёҡаёёаёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё•а№„аё”а№ү |
| C2 beaconing | DNS, proxy, firewall, network flow | `net_beaconing.yml` | [PB-13 C2 Communication](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/C2_Communication.th.md) | Beacon dwell time |
| Cloud storage exposure | Cloud audit, storage access logs | `cloud_storage_public_access.yml` | [PB-27 Cloud Storage Exposure](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Cloud_Storage_Exposure.th.md) | аёЈаё°аёўаё°а№Җаё§аёҘаёІаё—аёөа№Ҳ storage а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” public |

---

## 6. Advanced Use Cases

| Use Case | Log аё«аёҘаёұаёҒ | Detection Rule | Playbook | KPI |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Insider data staging | File audit, DLP, proxy, HR risk signals | `win_data_collection_staging.yml` | [PB-14 Insider Threat](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Insider_Threat.th.md) | а№Җаё„аёӘа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳ review а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§ |
| Supply chain compromise | CI/CD, package manager, cloud audit | `cloud_supply_chain_compromise.yml` | [PB-32 Supply Chain Attack](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Supply_Chain_Attack.th.md) | Dependency аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ |
| Cloud cryptojacking | Cloud billing, instance inventory, audit logs | `cloud_cryptojacking.yml` | [PB-47 Cloud Cryptojacking](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Cloud_Cryptojacking.th.md) | Cost spike аё—аёөа№Ҳаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎа№„аё”а№ү |
| Deepfake social engineering | Email, collaboration, ticketing, financial workflow | `net_deepfake_social.yml` | [PB-48 Deepfake Social Engineering](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Deepfake_Social_Engineering.th.md) | аё„аёіаёӮаёӯа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаёӘаё№аёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳ verify а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§ |
| AI prompt injection | Application logs, AI gateway logs, tool execution logs | `ai_prompt_injection.yml` | [PB-51 AI Prompt Injection](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/AI_Prompt_Injection.th.md) | Unsafe tool call аё—аёөа№Ҳ block а№„аё”а№ү |
| LLM data poisoning | Data pipeline, RAG index, model evaluation logs | `ai_data_poisoning.yml` | [PB-52 LLM Data Poisoning](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/LLM_Data_Poisoning.th.md) | Poisoned record аё—аёөа№ҲаёҘаёҡа№„аё”а№ү |
| AI model theft | API logs, repository audit, storage access logs | `ai_model_theft.yml` | [PB-53 AI Model Theft](../05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/AI_Model_Theft.th.md) | аёҒаёІаёЈ extract аё—аёөа№Ҳаё«аёўаёёаё”а№„аё”а№ү |

---

## 7. Checklist аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёЈаёұаёҡ Use Case а№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ (Intake Checklist)

-   [ ] **Business risk**: аёЈаё°аёҡаёё asset, process аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ user group аё—аёөа№Ҳ use case аёҷаёөа№үаёӣаёҒаёӣа№үаёӯаёҮ
-   [ ] **Threat mapping**: аёңаё№аёҒаёӘаё–аёІаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№ҢаёҒаёұаёҡ MITRE ATT&CK tactic а№ҒаёҘаё° technique аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ
-   [ ] **Telemetry**: аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаё§а№ҲаёІ log аё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ғаёҠа№үаё–аё№аёҒ collect, parse, retain а№ҒаёҘаё° search а№„аё”а№ү
-   [ ] **Detection logic**: а№ҖаёҘаё·аёӯаёҒаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№ҖаёӮаёөаёўаёҷ Sigma, YARA аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ SIEM-native rule
-   [ ] **Response path**: аёңаё№аёҒ alert аёҒаёұаёҡ incident response playbook аё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ
-   [ ] **Tuning plan**: аёЈаё°аёҡаёё false positive аё—аёөа№Ҳаё„аёІаё”а№„аё§а№ү exclusion а№ҒаёҘаё°аёЈаёӯаёҡ review
-   [ ] **Metric**: аёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё” KPI аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮаёҷа№үаёӯаёў 1 аё•аёұаё§а№Җаёһаё·а№ҲаёӯаёһаёҙаёӘаё№аёҲаёҷа№Ңаё„аёёаё“аё„а№ҲаёІаёӮаёӯаёҮ use case

---

## 8. а№ӮаёЎа№Җаё”аёҘаёҲаёұаё”аёҘаёіаё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ (Prioritization Model)

а№ғаё«а№үаё„аё°а№Ғаёҷаёҷ use case а№Ғаё•а№ҲаёҘаё°аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёІаёҒ 1 аё–аё¶аёҮ 5

| Factor | аё„аёіаё–аёІаёЎ | Weight |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Business Impact | аё«аёІаёҒаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№ү аёҲаё°аёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ operation аёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ regulated data аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ executive risk аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ | 30% |
| Threat Likelihood | аё аёұаёўаёҷаёөа№үаёһаёҡаёҡа№Ҳаёӯаёўа№ғаёҷ sector аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ threat landscape аёӣаёұаёҲаёҲаёёаёҡаёұаёҷаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ | 25% |
| Telemetry Readiness | Log аё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ғаёҠа№үаёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎа№ҒаёҘаё°аёҷа№ҲаёІа№ҖаёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯаё–аё·аёӯаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ | 20% |
| Response Readiness | аёЎаёө playbook а№ҒаёҘаё° owner аё—аёөа№Ҳаё—аё”аёӘаёӯаёҡа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ | 15% |
| Tuning Cost | аё—аёөаёЎаёЈаёӯаёҮаёЈаёұаёҡ alert volume аё—аёөа№Ҳаё„аёІаё”а№„аё§а№үа№„аё”а№үаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ | 10% |

Use case аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаё„аё°а№Ғаёҷаёҷ **4.0+** аё„аё§аёЈаё—аёіаёҒа№Ҳаёӯаёҷ аёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷ use case аё•а№ҲаёіаёҒаё§а№ҲаёІ **3.0** аё„аё§аёЈа№ҖаёҘаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҷаёӯаёӯаёҒа№„аёӣ аёўаёҒа№Җаё§а№үаёҷаёҲаёіа№Җаёӣа№ҮаёҷаёҲаёІаёҒ compliance, audit аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаё„аёіаёӘаёұа№ҲаёҮаёңаё№а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈ

---

## 9. аёЈаёӯаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈ Review (Review Cadence)

| Cadence | аёҒаёҙаёҲаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎ | Owner |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Weekly | Review alert аё—аёөа№Ҳ noise аёӘаё№аёҮа№ҒаёҘаё° false positive | Detection Engineer |
| Monthly | а№Җаё—аёөаёўаёҡ use case аёҒаёұаёҡ incident trend а№ҒаёҘаё° threat intelligence | SOC Lead |
| Quarterly | Update MITRE coverage, retired rules а№ҒаёҘаё° control mappings | SOC Manager |
| Annually | Re-score use case аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё”аё•аёІаёЎ business risk | CISO / Risk Owner |

---

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ (Related Documents)

-   [аё•аёІаёЈаёІаёҮ Detection Coverage](Coverage_Matrix.th.md)
-   [аё”аёұаёҠаёҷаёө Detection Rules](README.th.md)
-   [Use Case Prioritization](../01_SOC_Fundamentals/Use_Case_Prioritization.th.md)
-   [Detection Rule Testing SOP](../06_Operations_Management/Detection_Rule_Testing.th.md)
-   [Log Source Matrix](../06_Operations_Management/Log_Source_Matrix.th.md)
-   [SOC Metrics & KPIs](../06_Operations_Management/SOC_Metrics.th.md)

## References

-   [MITRE ATT&CK Enterprise Matrix](https://attack.mitre.org/matrices/enterprise/)
-   [NIST SP 800-61r2 Computer Security Incident Handling Guide](https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-61/rev-2/final)
-   [CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities Catalog](https://www.cisa.gov/known-exploited-vulnerabilities-catalog)

## File: 08_Detection_Engineering/file_signatures/README.md
# YARA Rules (File Signatures)

This directory contains YARA rules for detecting malicious files. These rules can be used with the `yara` command line tool or integrated into EDR/Forensic tools.

| Rule File | Description | Severity |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `webshell_php_generic.yar` | Detects common PHP Webshells (c99, r57, etc.) | Critical |
| `ransomware_generic_encrypt.yar` | Detects mass file encryption behavior and ransom notes | Critical |
| `hacktool_mimikatz.yar` | Detects Mimikatz credential dumping artifacts | High |

## Usage
```bash
yara -r 08_Detection_Engineering/file_signatures/ /path/to/scan
```


---

## File: 08_Detection_Engineering/yara/README.md
# YARA Detection Rules

This directory contains **19 YARA rules** across 12 files for **file-based threat detection**. Use these rules with YARA-compatible tools (YARA CLI, ClamAV, THOR, Velociraptor, etc.) to scan endpoints and file shares.

## How to Use

1. **Install YARA**: `brew install yara` (macOS) or `apt install yara` (Linux)
2. **Scan a file**: `yara -r ransomware_indicators.yar /path/to/suspect_file`
3. **Scan a directory**: `yara -r *.yar /path/to/directory/`
4. **Use in Velociraptor**: Import rules into `Yara.Scan` artifact for endpoint sweeps

---

## рҹ“Ӣ Rules Index

| File | Rules | Threat Category | Severity | Playbook | MITRE |
|:---|:---:|:---|:---:|:---|:---|
| [ransomware_indicators.yar](ransomware_indicators.yar) | 2 | Ransomware (ransom notes, shadow delete) | Critical | PB-02 | T1486 |
| [webshell_generic.yar](webshell_generic.yar) | 3 | Webshells (PHP, JSP, ASPX) | High | PB-10, PB-18 | T1505.003 |
| [cryptominer_detection.yar](cryptominer_detection.yar) | 2 | Cryptominers (binary + script) | High | PB-23 | T1496 |
| [cobalt_strike_beacon.yar](cobalt_strike_beacon.yar) | 2 | Cobalt Strike (beacon + stager) | Critical | PB-13, PB-12 | T1071.001 |
| [malicious_document.yar](malicious_document.yar) | 2 | Malicious docs (Office macros, PDF JS) | High | PB-01, PB-03 | T1566.001 |
| [credential_dumping_tools.yar](credential_dumping_tools.yar) | 2 | Mimikatz, LaZagne, Rubeus, SAM dump | Critical | PB-36 | T1003 |
| [wiper_malware.yar](wiper_malware.yar) | 1 | Shamoon, NotPetya, HermeticWiper, MBR wipe | Critical | PB-38 | T1485, T1561 |
| [rootkit_bootkit.yar](rootkit_bootkit.yar) | 1 | TDL, ZeroAccess, kernel hooks, UEFI tamper | Critical | PB-45 | T1014, T1542 |
| [lolbin_dropper.yar](lolbin_dropper.yar) | 1 | certutil, mshta, BITSAdmin abuse scripts | High | PB-39 | T1218 |
| [exploit_kit_payload.yar](exploit_kit_payload.yar) | 1 | Exploit kit landing pages, shellcode | Critical | PB-25, PB-43, PB-44 | T1189, T1203 |
| [supply_chain_backdoor.yar](supply_chain_backdoor.yar) | 1 | npm/pip backdoor, SolarWinds/SUNBURST | High | PB-21 | T1195 |
| [data_staging_archive.yar](data_staging_archive.yar) | 1 | Password-protected archives, staging | Medium | PB-08, PB-35 | T1074, T1560 |

**Total: 19 rules / 12 files**

---

## Rule Severity Guide

| Severity | Action |
|:---|:---|
| **Critical** | Block immediately + escalate to Tier 2 |
| **High** | Alert + quarantine + triage within 15 min |
| **Medium** | Alert + investigate within 1 hour |

---

## Integration Examples

### Velociraptor Artifact
```yaml
name: Custom.Yara.SOCScan
sources:
  - query: |
      SELECT * FROM yara(
        rules=read_file(filename="/path/to/yara/*.yar"),
        files=glob(globs="/tmp/**")
      )
```

### ClamAV
```bash
# Convert YARA to ClamAV signatures
sigtool --convert-yara ransomware_indicators.yar > ransomware.ldb
```

### THOR (Nextron Systems)
```bash
# Drop .yar files into THOR's custom-signatures directory
cp *.yar /opt/thor/custom-signatures/yara/
```


---

## File: 06_Operations_Management/Access_Control.en.md
# SOC Access Control Policy

> **Document ID:** ACC-001
> **Version:** 1.0
> **Last Updated:** 2026-02-15
> **Owner:** SOC Manager / CISO

---

## Purpose

Defines who can access SOC tools, at what privilege level, and how access is granted, reviewed, and revoked. The SOC must protect itself as rigorously as it protects the organization.

---

## Role-Based Access Matrix

| SOC Tool | T1 Analyst | T2 Analyst | SOC Lead | SOC Manager | Detection Eng | External (MSSP) |
|:---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| **SIEM вҖ” Read/Search** | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… (limited) |
| **SIEM вҖ” Create Rules** | вқҢ | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… | вқҢ |
| **SIEM вҖ” Admin/Config** | вқҢ | вқҢ | вқҢ | вң… | вң… | вқҢ |
| **EDR вҖ” View Alerts** | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… (limited) |
| **EDR вҖ” Isolate Host** | вқҢ | вң… | вң… | вң… | вқҢ | вқҢ |
| **EDR вҖ” Uninstall Agent** | вқҢ | вқҢ | вқҢ | вң… | вқҢ | вқҢ |
| **Ticketing вҖ” Create** | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… |
| **Ticketing вҖ” Close P1/P2** | вқҢ | вқҢ | вң… | вң… | вқҢ | вқҢ |
| **Firewall вҖ” View Rules** | вқҢ | вң… | вң… | вң… | вқҢ | вқҢ |
| **Firewall вҖ” Block IP** | вқҢ | вң… (temp) | вң… | вң… | вқҢ | вқҢ |
| **SOAR вҖ” Execute Playbook** | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… | вқҢ |
| **SOAR вҖ” Edit Playbook** | вқҢ | вқҢ | вң… | вң… | вң… | вқҢ |
| **TI Platform (MISP)** | Read | Read/Write | Admin | Admin | Read/Write | Read |
| **SOC Documentation** | Read | Read/Write | Admin | Admin | Read/Write | Read |

---

## Access Request Process

```mermaid
graph LR
    Request[1. Submit Request] --> Manager[2. SOC Manager Review]
    Manager --> IT[3. IT Provisions Access]
    IT --> Verify[4. User Confirms]
    Verify --> Log[5. Log in Access Register]
```

### Request Requirements

| Field | Required |
|:---|:---:|
| Requester name | вң… |
| Tool/system requested | вң… |
| Access level (read/write/admin) | вң… |
| Business justification | вң… |
| Duration (permanent/temporary) | вң… |
| Manager approval | вң… |

---

## Account Security Requirements

| Control | Requirement |
|:---|:---|
| **Authentication** | MFA required for ALL SOC tools |
| **Password** | Min 14 chars, complexity enforced, no reuse (12 history) |
| **Session timeout** | 15 min inactive вҶ’ lock, 8 hrs max вҶ’ force re-auth |
| **Service accounts** | Unique per tool, no shared passwords, rotate every 90 days |
| **API keys** | Per-user, rotate every 90 days, stored in vault (not plaintext) |
| **VPN/Zero Trust** | Required for remote access to SOC tools |
| **Privileged access** | JIT (Just-In-Time) for admin access where possible |

---

## Access Review Schedule

| Review Type | Frequency | Reviewer | Action |
|:---|:---:|:---|:---|
| Active accounts | Monthly | SOC Manager | Remove departed staff |
| Privilege levels | Quarterly | SOC Manager + CISO | Right-size permissions |
| Service accounts | Quarterly | SOC Engineer | Rotate credentials |
| API keys | Quarterly | SOC Engineer | Rotate and audit usage |
| MSSP access | Monthly | SOC Manager | Validate scope |
| Full audit | Annually | CISO + Internal Audit | Comprehensive review |

---

## Offboarding Checklist

When a SOC team member departs:

```
в–Ў Disable AD/Azure AD account (within 1 hour of departure)
в–Ў Revoke SIEM access
в–Ў Revoke EDR access
в–Ў Revoke ticketing system access
в–Ў Revoke SOAR access
в–Ў Revoke VPN/remote access
в–Ў Revoke TI platform access
в–Ў Rotate any shared credentials the person had access to
в–Ў Remove from SOC communication channels (Slack/Teams)
в–Ў Remove from on-call/shift rotation
в–Ў Transfer ownership of dashboards/rules they created
в–Ў Document in Access Register
```

---

## Audit Logging

All SOC tool access must be logged:

| Log Type | What to Capture | Retention |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Login events | User, time, source IP, success/fail | 1 year |
| Configuration changes | Who, what, when, before/after | 2 years |
| Rule modifications | Rule name, author, old/new logic | 2 years |
| Data exports | Who, dataset, volume, destination | 1 year |
| Admin actions | All privileged operations | 2 years |

---

## Break-Glass Emergency Access

During critical incidents when normal access paths are unavailable:

| Scenario | Break-Glass Procedure | Post-Incident |
|:---|:---|:---|
| SSO/IdP down, cannot access SIEM | Use local admin account (sealed envelope) | Change password immediately, log usage |
| MFA provider outage | Bypass MFA with backup codes (pre-issued) | Report to IT, review all sessions |
| Primary analyst unavailable for P1 | SOC Manager grants temp access to backup | Revoke within 24 hours |
| SOAR API credentials expired mid-incident | Use manual command override | Rotate credentials, update vault |

### Break-Glass Access Rules
1. **Two-person rule** вҖ” break-glass access requires approval from SOC Manager or CISO
2. **Audit trail** вҖ” all break-glass usage must be logged in incident ticket
3. **Time-limited** вҖ” access valid for incident duration only (max 24 hours)
4. **Post-mortem** вҖ” review all break-glass events in weekly ops meeting

## Privileged Access Management (PAM)

```mermaid
graph LR
    Request["Request PAM<br/>Access"] --> Approve["Manager<br/>Approves"]
    Approve --> Grant["JIT Access<br/>Granted"]
    Grant --> Session["Recorded<br/>Session"]
    Session --> Expire["Auto-Expire<br/>(4h max)"]
    Expire --> Audit["Audit Log<br/>Generated"]
```

| PAM Control | Implementation |
|:---|:---|
| Just-In-Time (JIT) access | Admin access granted for 4-hour windows only |
| Session recording | All admin sessions recorded and stored 1 year |
| Password vaulting | Service account passwords in CyberArk/HashiCorp Vault |
| Credential rotation | Automated rotation every 90 days |
| Multi-level approval | P1 incident: SOC Manager; Config changes: CISO |

## Access Risk Escalation Triggers

| Condition | Escalate To | SLA | Required Action |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| Privileged account granted without ticket or approval | SOC Manager + CISO | Immediate | Review access, revoke if unjustified |
| Shared, orphaned, or undocumented admin account found | SOC Manager + Security Engineer | Within 4 hours | Contain usage and assign owner |
| Failed access review or offboarding gap discovered | SOC Manager + HR / IT owner | Same business day | Revoke stale access and confirm completion |
| Break-glass account used outside approved incident | CISO | Immediate | Investigate misuse and rotate credentials |
| Access logs missing for privileged actions | Security Engineer + SOC Manager | Within 24 hours | Restore logging and assess blind spots |

## Minimum Evidence for Access Review

| Evidence | Why It Matters | Owner |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Current user-to-role export for each SOC system | Confirms who has access now | Security Engineer |
| Approval record or ticket for privileged accounts | Proves authorization path | SOC Manager |
| Last login and activity history | Identifies dormant or suspicious accounts | SOC Analyst |
| Offboarding completion evidence | Confirms removal of departed users | HR / IT owner |
| Break-glass usage log and post-review | Verifies emergency access remained controlled | SOC Manager |

## Related Documents

- [SOC Team Structure](SOC_Team_Structure.en.md)
- [Change Management SOP](Change_Management.en.md)
- [Data Handling Protocol](Data_Handling_Protocol.en.md)

## References

- [NIST SP 800-53 Rev. 5 - Access Control (AC)](https://csrc.nist.gov/pubs/sp/800/53/r5/upd1/final)
- [NIST SP 800-61r2](https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-61/rev-2/final)


---

## File: 06_Operations_Management/Access_Control.th.md
# аёҷа№ӮаёўаёҡаёІаёўаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ SOC

> **аёЈаё«аёұаёӘа№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈ:** ACC-001
> **а№Җаё§аёӯаёЈа№ҢаёҠаёұаёҷ:** 1.0
> **аёӯаёұаёӣа№Җаё”аё•аёҘа№ҲаёІаёӘаёёаё”:** 2026-02-15
> **а№ҖаёҲа№үаёІаёӮаёӯаёҮ:** SOC Manager / CISO

---

## аё•аёІаёЈаёІаёҮ Access аё•аёІаёЎаёҡаё—аёҡаёІаё—

| а№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯ | T1 | T2 | Lead | Manager | DetEng | MSSP |
|:---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| SIEM аёӯа№ҲаёІаёҷ/аё„а№үаёҷаё«аёІ | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… аёҲаёіаёҒаёұаё” |
| SIEM аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ Rule | вқҢ | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… | вқҢ |
| SIEM Admin | вқҢ | вқҢ | вқҢ | вң… | вң… | вқҢ |
| EDR аё”аё№ Alert | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… аёҲаёіаёҒаёұаё” |
| EDR Isolate | вқҢ | вң… | вң… | вң… | вқҢ | вқҢ |
| Ticketing аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… |
| Ticketing аёӣаёҙаё” P1/P2 | вқҢ | вқҢ | вң… | вң… | вқҢ | вқҢ |
| Firewall Block IP | вқҢ | вң… аёҠаёұа№Ҳаё§аё„аёЈаёІаё§ | вң… | вң… | вқҢ | вқҢ |
| SOAR а№ҒаёҒа№ү Playbook | вқҢ | вқҢ | вң… | вң… | вң… | вқҢ |

---

## аёӮа№үаёӯаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё”аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӣаёҘаёӯаё”аё аёұаёўаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө

| аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ | аёӮа№үаёӯаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё” |
|:---|:---|
| **Authentication** | MFA аёҡаёұаёҮаё„аёұаёҡаё—аёёаёҒа№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯ SOC |
| **Password** | вүҘ 14 аё•аёұаё§аёӯаёұаёҒаё©аёЈ, а№„аёЎа№ҲаёӢа№үаёі 12 аёЈаёӯаёҡ |
| **Session timeout** | 15 аёҷаёІаё—аёө inactive вҶ’ lock |
| **Service accounts** | а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё°а№Ғаё•а№ҲаёҘаё°а№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯ, rotate 90 аё§аёұаёҷ |
| **API keys** | аё•а№Ҳаёӯаё„аёҷ, rotate 90 аё§аёұаёҷ, а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡа№ғаёҷ vault |
| **Remote access** | VPN/Zero Trust аёҡаёұаёҮаё„аёұаёҡ |

---

## аё•аёІаёЈаёІаёҮаё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ Access

| аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ | аё„аё§аёІаёЎаё–аёөа№Ҳ | аёңаё№а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҙаё”аёҠаёӯаёҡ |
|:---|:---:|:---|
| аёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө active | аёЈаёІаёўа№Җаё”аё·аёӯаёҷ | SOC Manager |
| аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ң | аёЈаёІаёўа№„аё•аёЈаёЎаёІаёӘ | SOC Manager + CISO |
| Service accounts | аёЈаёІаёўа№„аё•аёЈаёЎаёІаёӘ | SOC Engineer |
| MSSP access | аёЈаёІаёўа№Җаё”аё·аёӯаёҷ | SOC Manager |
| Full audit | аёЈаёІаёўаёӣаёө | CISO + Internal Audit |

---

## Checklist а№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯаё„аёҷаёӯаёӯаёҒ

```
в–Ў аёӣаёҙаё”аёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө AD/Azure AD (аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ 1 аёҠаёЎ.)
в–Ў а№ҖаёһаёҙаёҒаё–аёӯаёҷ SIEM, EDR, Ticketing, SOAR, VPN, TI access
в–Ў Rotate shared credentials аё—аёөа№Ҳаё„аёҷаёҷаёұа№үаёҷа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮа№„аё”а№ү
в–Ў аёҘаёҡаёҲаёІаёҒ Slack/Teams SOC
в–Ў аёҘаёҡаёҲаёІаёҒ on-call/shift rotation
в–Ў а№Ӯаёӯаёҷаёўа№үаёІаёў dashboards/rules аё—аёөа№ҲаёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮа№„аё§а№ү
в–Ў аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒа№ғаёҷ Access Register
```

---

## аё•аёІаёЈаёІаёҮаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ңаё•аёІаёЎаёҡаё—аёҡаёІаё— (RBAC)

| аёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ң | Tier 1 | Tier 2 | Tier 3 | Engineer | Manager |
|:---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| аё”аё№ Dashboard | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… |
| аё„аёұаё”аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҮ Alert | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… |
| а№ҒаёўаёҒ Endpoint | вқҢ | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… |
| а№ҒаёҒа№үа№„аёӮ Config | вқҢ | вқҢ | вң… | вң… | вң… |
| аёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү | вқҢ | вқҢ | вқҢ | вң… | вң… |
| аё”аё№аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ Raw | вқҢ | вқҢ | вң… | вң… | вң… |

## аё•аёІаёЈаёІаёҮаё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ң

| аёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ | аё„аё§аёІаёЎаё–аёөа№Ҳ | аёңаё№а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҙаё”аёҠаёӯаёҡ | аёңаёҘаёҘаёұаёһаёҳа№Ң |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ңаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү | аёЈаёІаёўа№„аё•аёЈаёЎаёІаёӘ | SOC Manager | аёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ң |
| аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёөаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү | аёЈаёІаёўа№Җаё”аё·аёӯаёҷ | SOC Engineer | аёӣаёҙаё”аёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө inactive |
| аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ MFA compliance | аёЈаёІаёўа№Җаё”аё·аёӯаёҷ | SOC Engineer | аёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷ compliance |
| аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ Privileged access | аёЈаёІаёўа№„аё•аёЈаёЎаёІаёӘ | SOC Manager + CISO | аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ PAM |

## Access Control Matrix

### Role-based Permissions

| Role | SIEM | EDR | Firewall | Ticketing |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Tier 1 Analyst | Read | Read | None | Read/Write |
| Tier 2 Analyst | Read/Write | Read/Write | Read | Read/Write |
| Tier 3 Engineer | Admin | Admin | Read | Admin |
| SOC Manager | Admin | Admin | Read/Write | Admin |

### Access Review Schedule

| Review Type | Frequency | Reviewer | SLA |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| New access | аё—аёёаёҒаё„аёЈаёұа№үаёҮ | SOC Manager | 24 аёҠаёЎ. |
| Quarterly review | аё—аёёаёҒ 3 а№Җаё”аё·аёӯаёҷ | CISO | 5 аё§аёұаёҷ |
| Termination | аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө | HR + IT | 4 аёҠаёЎ. |
| Privilege escalation | аё—аёёаёҒаё„аёЈаёұа№үаёҮ | CISO | 48 аёҠаёЎ. |

### Emergency Access Procedure

| Step | Action | SLA |
|:---|:---|:---|
| 1 | аёӮаёӯ emergency access | аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө |
| 2 | Verbal approval аёҲаёІаёҒ CISO | 15 min |
| 3 | Grant temporary access | 30 min |
| 4 | Log all activities | Real-time |
| 5 | Revoke а№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯа№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ | аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө |
| 6 | Post-review | 24 hrs |

### Access Log Monitoring

| Event | Alert? | Review |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Admin login | вң… | Real-time |
| After-hours | вң… | Next day |
| Failed attempt | >5 = вң… | Daily |

## аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮаёүаёёаёҒа№Җаёүаёҙаёҷ (Break-Glass)

а№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯа№ҖаёҒаёҙаё” incident аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё•аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡаёӣаёҒаё•аёҙа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№ү:

| аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң | аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷ Break-Glass | аё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң |
|:---|:---|:---|
| SSO/IdP аёҘа№ҲаёЎ а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІ SIEM а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№ү | а№ғаёҠа№ү local admin account (аёӢаёӯаёҮаёӣаёҙаё”аёңаёҷаё¶аёҒ) | а№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷ password аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө, аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒаёҒаёІаёЈа№ғаёҠа№ү |
| MFA provider аёҘа№ҲаёЎ | а№ғаёҠа№ү backup codes (аёӯаёӯаёҒаёҘа№Ҳаё§аёҮаё«аёҷа№үаёІ) | а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ IT, аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ session аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” |
| Analyst аё«аёҘаёұаёҒа№„аёЎа№Ҳаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳаё•аёӯаёҷ P1 | SOC Manager а№ғаё«а№ү temp access а№ҒаёҒа№Ҳаё„аёҷаёӘаёіаёЈаёӯаёҮ | аё–аёӯаёҷ access аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ 24 аёҠаёЎ. |
| SOAR API credentials аё«аёЎаё”аёӯаёІаёўаёёаёЈаё°аё«аё§а№ҲаёІаёҮ incident | а№ғаёҠа№ү manual command override | Rotate credentials, аёӯаёұаёӣа№Җаё”аё• vault |

### аёҒаёҺ Break-Glass
1. **аёҒаёҺаёӘаёӯаёҮаё„аёҷ** вҖ” аё•а№үаёӯаёҮ SOC Manager аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ CISO аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ
2. **Audit trail** вҖ” аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒаёҒаёІаёЈа№ғаёҠа№үаё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё”а№ғаёҷ incident ticket
3. **аёҲаёіаёҒаёұаё”а№Җаё§аёҘаёІ** вҖ” а№ғаёҠа№үа№„аё”а№үа№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё°аёҠа№Ҳаё§аёҮ incident (аёӘаё№аёҮаёӘаёёаё” 24 аёҠаёЎ.)
4. **Post-mortem** вҖ” аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ break-glass аё—аёёаёҒаё„аёЈаёұа№үаёҮа№ғаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёЈаё°аёҠаёёаёЎ ops аёӘаёұаёӣаё”аёІаё«а№Ң

## Privileged Access Management (PAM)

```mermaid
graph LR
    Request["аёӮаёӯ PAM<br/>Access"] --> Approve["Manager<br/>аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ"]
    Approve --> Grant["JIT Access<br/>а№ғаё«а№үа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§"]
    Grant --> Session["аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒ<br/>Session"]
    Session --> Expire["аё«аёЎаё”аёӯаёІаёўаёё<br/>аёӯаёұаё•а№ӮаёҷаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ (4 аёҠаёЎ.)"]
    Expire --> Audit["Audit Log<br/>аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§"]
```

| PAM Control | аёҒаёІаёЈа№ғаёҠа№үаёҮаёІаёҷ |
|:---|:---|
| Just-In-Time (JIT) access | Admin access а№ғаё«а№үа№Җаёӣа№ҮаёҷаёЈаёӯаёҡ 4 аёҠаёЎ. а№Җаё—а№ҲаёІаёҷаёұа№үаёҷ |
| аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒ Session | Admin session аё—аёёаёҒаё„аёЈаёұа№үаёҮаё–аё№аёҒаёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ 1 аёӣаёө |
| Password vaulting | Service account passwords а№ғаёҷ CyberArk/HashiCorp Vault |
| Credential rotation | аё«аёЎаёёаёҷаёӯаёұаё•а№ӮаёҷаёЎаёұаё•аёҙаё—аёёаёҒ 90 аё§аёұаёҷ |
| аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙаё«аёҘаёІаёўаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ | P1 incident: SOC Manager; Config changes: CISO |

## Trigger аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаё”а№үаёІаёҷаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ңа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ (Access Risk Escalation Triggers)

| а№ҖаёҮаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аёӮ | аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё–аё¶аёҮ | SLA | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё—аёі |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| аёЎаёөаёҒаёІаёЈа№ғаё«а№үаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ң privileged а№Ӯаё”аёўа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө ticket аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ approval | SOC Manager + CISO | аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө | аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷа№ҒаёҘаё°аё–аёӯаёҷаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ңаё–а№үаёІа№„аёЎа№ҲаёӘаёЎа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёңаёҘ |
| аёһаёҡаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө admin а№Ғаёҡаёҡ shared, orphaned аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө owner | SOC Manager + Security Engineer | аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ 4 аёҠаёЎ. | аё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎаёҒаёІаёЈа№ғаёҠа№үаёҮаёІаёҷа№ҒаёҘаё°аёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё” owner |
| аёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ңаё«аёЈаё·аёӯ offboarding а№„аёЎа№Ҳаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ | SOC Manager + HR / IT owner | аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷаё§аёұаёҷаё—аёіаёҒаёІаёЈа№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷ | аё–аёӯаёҷаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ңаё„а№үаёІаёҮа№ҒаёҘаё°аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёҙаё”аё„аёЈаёҡ |
| аёЎаёөаёҒаёІаёЈа№ғаёҠа№ү break-glass аёҷаёӯаёҒ incident аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | CISO | аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈа№ғаёҠа№үаёҮаёІаёҷа№ҒаёҘаё°аё«аёЎаёёаёҷ credential |
| а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө access log аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ privileged action | Security Engineer + SOC Manager | аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ 24 аёҠаёЎ. | аёҒаё№а№ү logging аёҒаёҘаёұаёҡаёЎаёІа№ҒаёҘаё°аёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷ blind spot |

## аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•а№ҲаёіаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ң (Minimum Evidence for Access Review)

| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ | а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёңаёҘ | аёңаё№а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҙаё”аёҠаёӯаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈ user-to-role аёӣаёұаёҲаёҲаёёаёҡаёұаёҷаёӮаёӯаёҮаё—аёёаёҒаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ SOC | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаё§а№ҲаёІа№ғаё„аёЈаёЎаёөаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ңаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳаё•аёӯаёҷаёҷаёөа№ү | Security Engineer |
| Ticket аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ approval аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө privileged | аёһаёҙаёӘаё№аёҲаёҷа№Ңа№ҖаёӘа№үаёҷаё—аёІаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | SOC Manager |
| аёӣаёЈаё°аё§аёұаё•аёҙ last login а№ҒаёҘаё° activity | аё«аёІ dormant account аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёһаёӨаё•аёҙаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎаёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ | SOC Analyst |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаё§а№ҲаёІ offboarding а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲаёӘаёЎаёҡаё№аёЈаё“а№Ң | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаё§а№ҲаёІаёңаё№а№үаё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёӯаёҒа№„аёӣаё–аё№аёҒаё–аёӯаёҷаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ңа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§ | HR / IT owner |
| Log аёҒаёІаёЈа№ғаёҠа№ү break-glass а№ҒаёҘаё° post-review | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаё§а№ҲаёІаёҒаёІаёЈа№ғаёҠа№ү emergency access аё–аё№аёҒаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ | SOC Manager |

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ

- [а№Ӯаё„аёЈаёҮаёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮаё—аёөаёЎ SOC](SOC_Team_Structure.th.md)
- [SOP аёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷа№ҒаёӣаёҘаёҮ](Change_Management.th.md)
- [а№ӮаёӣаёЈа№Ӯаё•аё„аёӯаёҘаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ](Data_Handling_Protocol.th.md)

## References

- [NIST SP 800-53 Rev. 5 - Access Control (AC)](https://csrc.nist.gov/pubs/sp/800/53/r5/upd1/final)
- [NIST SP 800-61r2](https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-61/rev-2/final)
