## File: 06_Operations_Management/Insider_Threat_Program.en.md
# Insider Threat Program

**Document ID**: OPS-SOP-019
**Version**: 1.0
**Classification**: Confidential
**Last Updated**: 2026-02-15

> A structured program for **detecting, investigating, and mitigating insider threats** вҖ” malicious, negligent, or compromised insiders. Covers behavioral indicators, detection use cases, investigation procedures, and prevention strategies.

---

## Insider Threat Categories

| Category | Description | Intent | Example |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| **Malicious** | Deliberate harmful actions for personal gain or revenge | Intentional | Data theft, sabotage before resignation |
| **Negligent** | Unintentional harm through carelessness or policy violation | Unintentional | Sending PII to wrong recipient, weak passwords |
| **Compromised** | External attacker using legitimate insider credentials | N/A (external) | Phished credentials, stolen laptop |
| **Colluding** | Insider working with external threat actor | Intentional | Selling access, planting backdoors |

```mermaid
pie title Insider Threat Distribution (Industry Average)
    "Negligent" : 56
    "Malicious" : 26
    "Compromised Credentials" : 18
```

---

## Behavioral Indicators

### High-Risk Indicators (Immediate Investigation)

| # | Indicator | Data Source | Detection Method |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---|
| 1 | **Accessing data outside role** | DLP, CASB, file audit | UEBA anomaly |
| 2 | **Bulk download/copy to USB** | EDR, DLP, print logs | Threshold rule |
| 3 | **After-hours access to sensitive systems** | SIEM, badge logs | Time-based rule |
| 4 | **Email to personal accounts with attachments** | Email gateway, DLP | DLP policy |
| 5 | **Disabling security controls** | EDR, SIEM | Agent health monitoring |
| 6 | **Unauthorized cloud storage uploads** | CASB, proxy | URL category + volume |
| 7 | **Accessing terminated employee's data** | File audit, IAM | Access control monitoring |

### Medium-Risk Indicators (Monitor & Correlate)

| # | Indicator | Data Source | Detection Method |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---|
| 8 | **Frequent failed access attempts** | IAM, VPN, app logs | Threshold rule |
| 9 | **Printing large volumes** | Print server logs | Threshold rule |
| 10 | **VPN from unusual location** | VPN logs, GeoIP | GeoIP anomaly |
| 11 | **Privilege escalation requests** | IAM, ticketing | Trend analysis |
| 12 | **Working outside normal patterns** | Badge, VPN, SIEM | UEBA baseline |
| 13 | **Excessive use of tools** | EDR, SIEM | UEBA anomaly |

### Contextual Risk Multipliers

| Context | Risk Multiplier | Source |
|:---|:---:|:---|
| **Resignation submitted** | Г—3 | HR notification |
| **PIP (Performance Improvement Plan)** | Г—2 | HR notification |
| **Access to crown jewels** | Г—2 | Data classification |
| **Privileged access (admin/root)** | Г—2 | IAM roles |
| **Contractor/temporary staff** | Г—1.5 | HR/vendor records |
| **Recent negative performance review** | Г—1.5 | HR notification |
| **Accessing competitor's job sites** | Г—1.5 | Proxy logs |

---

## Detection Architecture

```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph DataSources["рҹ“Ҡ Data Sources"]
        A[DLP Alerts]
        B[UEBA Anomalies]
        C[EDR Events]
        D[IAM / Badge Logs]
        E[Email Gateway]
        F[HR Notifications]
    end

    subgraph CorrelationEngine["рҹ”Қ Correlation Engine"]
        G[Risk Score Calculator]
        H[Behavioral Baseline]
        I[Context Enrichment]
    end

    subgraph Response["вҡЎ Response"]
        J[Score < 50: Monitor]
        K[Score 50-80: Investigate]
        L[Score > 80: Immediate Action]
    end

    A --> G
    B --> G
    C --> G
    D --> G
    E --> G
    F --> I
    H --> G
    I --> G

    G --> J
    G --> K
    G --> L

    style CorrelationEngine fill:#3b82f6,color:#fff
    style L fill:#dc2626,color:#fff
```

### SIEM Detection Rules

| Rule | Logic | Severity | MITRE |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| **Bulk data download** | > 500 MB downloaded in 1 hour by single user | P2 | T1530 |
| **USB mass storage** | USB device with > 100 MB write | P2 | T1052.001 |
| **Email to personal domain** | Attachment > 5 MB to non-corporate domain | P3 | T1567 |
| **Cloud upload spike** | > 200% increase in cloud upload vs 30-day baseline | P2 | T1567.002 |
| **Off-hours sensitive access** | Access to classified data 22:00вҖ“06:00 | P3 | T1530 |
| **Resignation + data access** | HR flag + any data access within 14 days | P2 | T1530 |
| **Multiple failed admin access** | > 5 failed admin login in 10 min | P2 | T1110 |
| **Security tool tampering** | EDR agent stopped/uninstalled | P1 | T1562.001 |
| **Printing sensitive docs** | Print job from classified document | P3 | T1052 |

---

## Investigation Procedures

### Investigation Workflow

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Insider Threat Alert] --> B[Initial Assessment]
    B --> C{Risk Score}

    C -->|< 50| D[Add to watchlist<br/>Passive monitoring]
    C -->|50-80| E[Formal investigation<br/>Notify HR & Legal]
    C -->|> 80| F[CRITICAL: Immediate<br/>containment + notify CISO]

    E --> G[Covert evidence collection]
    F --> H[Emergency access revocation]
    F --> G
    H --> G

    G --> I[Timeline reconstruction]
    I --> J[Interviews / HR process]
    J --> K{Confirmed?}

    K -->|Malicious| L[Terminate + Legal action]
    K -->|Negligent| M[Remediation + Training]
    K -->|Compromised| N[Credential reset + forensics]
    K -->|Not confirmed| O[Close case + document]

    L --> P[Lessons learned]
    M --> P
    N --> P
    O --> P

    style F fill:#dc2626,color:#fff
    style L fill:#dc2626,color:#fff
    style M fill:#eab308,color:#000
    style N fill:#3b82f6,color:#fff
```

### Investigation Checklist

- [ ] **Initial assessment** вҖ” Review alert details, check user context
- [ ] **Identity verification** вҖ” Confirm user behind the activity (not shared account)
- [ ] **HR notification** вҖ” Inform HR (mandatory for formal investigation)
- [ ] **Legal consultation** вҖ” Verify investigation is legally compliant
- [ ] **Evidence preservation** вҖ” Begin covert collection (do NOT alert subject)
- [ ] **Access review** вҖ” Document all systems/data subject can access
- [ ] **Timeline construction** вҖ” Build activity timeline (SIEM, email, badge, VPN)
- [ ] **Data exposure assessment** вҖ” Determine what data was accessed/exfiltrated
- [ ] **Interviews** вҖ” Coordinate with HR for subject interview
- [ ] **Documentation** вҖ” Complete investigation report
- [ ] **Remediation** вҖ” Implement corrective actions
- [ ] **Lessons learned** вҖ” Update detection rules if gaps found

### Evidence Sources (Priority Order)

| # | Source | What to Collect | Covert? |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **SIEM logs** | All activity for subject (30-90 days) | вң… Yes |
| 2 | **DLP alerts** | All DLP events for subject | вң… Yes |
| 3 | **Email logs** | Sent emails with attachments | вң… Yes |
| 4 | **Badge/physical access** | Entry/exit times, room access | вң… Yes |
| 5 | **VPN logs** | Connection times, source IPs | вң… Yes |
| 6 | **Proxy logs** | Web activity, cloud uploads | вң… Yes |
| 7 | **EDR telemetry** | Process execution, file access | вң… Yes |
| 8 | **Print server logs** | Print jobs, document names | вң… Yes |
| 9 | **Cloud audit logs** | Cloud resource access | вң… Yes |
| 10 | **Device forensics** | Disk image (only with legal approval) | вҡ пёҸ Consult Legal |

---

## Prevention & Deterrence

### Pre-Employment

| Control | Description |
|:---|:---|
| Background checks | Verify identity, criminal record, employment history |
| Reference checks | Validate previous employers |
| NDA/Employment agreement | Include data handling obligations |

### During Employment

| Control | Description |
|:---|:---|
| **Least privilege access** | Only access needed for role |
| **Regular access reviews** | Quarterly review of permissions |
| **DLP policies** | Block/alert on sensitive data movement |
| **Security awareness training** | Annual training on data protection |
| **Clear desk / clean screen** | Physical security policies |
| **Mandatory vacation** | 2+ consecutive weeks (detect fraud) |
| **Separation of duties** | Critical actions require 2+ approvers |

### Off-boarding (Critical)

| Step | Timing | Owner |
|:---|:---:|:---|
| Disable all accounts | Within 1 hour of departure | IT |
| Revoke physical access | Same day | Facilities |
| Collect devices | Same day | IT |
| Revoke VPN/remote access | Within 1 hour | IT |
| Transfer data ownership | Within 1 week | Manager |
| Review last 30 days activity | Within 1 week | SOC |
| Archive mailbox | Within 1 day | IT |

---

## HR-SOC Integration

### Mandatory HR Notifications to SOC

| HR Event | Risk Level | SOC Action |
|:---|:---:|:---|
| **Resignation/termination notice** | рҹ”ҙ High | Enable enhanced monitoring for 14 days |
| **Performance improvement plan (PIP)** | рҹҹ  Medium | Add to watchlist |
| **Role change with access change** | рҹҹЎ Low | Verify access adjustment |
| **Contractor onboarding** | рҹҹЎ Low | Verify access scope |
| **Disciplinary action** | рҹҹ  Medium | Add to watchlist for 30 days |
| **Security policy violation** | рҹҹ  Medium | Investigate, add to watchlist |

### Notification Process

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant HR
    participant SOC as SOC Lead
    participant SIEM

    HR->>SOC: Employee event notification (encrypted)
    SOC->>SIEM: Create/update user risk profile
    SIEM->>SIEM: Apply enhanced monitoring rules
    SOC->>HR: Confirm monitoring activated

    Note over SOC,SIEM: Monitoring period (14-30 days)

    alt Suspicious activity detected
        SIEM->>SOC: Alert triggered
        SOC->>HR: Notify for investigation
        SOC->>SOC: Begin formal investigation
    else No activity
        SIEM->>SOC: Monitoring period expired
        SOC->>SOC: Remove enhanced monitoring
        SOC->>HR: All clear notification
    end
```

---

## Metrics

| Metric | Target | Measurement |
|:---|:---:|:---|
| Mean time to detect insider threat | < 48 hours | Alert timestamp vs first activity |
| Investigation completion time | < 10 business days | Ticket timestamps |
| False positive rate | < 40% | Confirmed vs total alerts |
| Off-boarding compliance (accounts disabled < 1hr) | 100% | IT audit |
| HR notification compliance | 100% | HR audit |
| DLP policy coverage | > 90% of sensitive data | DLP coverage report |
| Access review completion | 100% quarterly | IAM reports |

---

## Legal & Privacy Considerations

> вҡ пёҸ **IMPORTANT**: Always consult Legal before conducting insider threat investigations.

| Topic | Guidance |
|:---|:---|
| **PDPA compliance** | Employee monitoring must be disclosed in privacy notice |
| **Proportionality** | Monitoring scope must be proportionate to risk |
| **Covert monitoring** | Requires legal authorization, document justification |
| **Device monitoring** | Company-owned devices only (unless BYOD agreement) |
| **Email review** | Only corporate email, with legal approval |
| **Interview procedures** | HR must be present, follow labor law |
| **Evidence admissibility** | Follow chain of custody for legal proceedings |

---

## Related Documents

-   [Forensic Investigation](../05_Incident_Response/Forensic_Investigation.en.md) вҖ” Evidence handling
-   [Incident Classification](../05_Incident_Response/Incident_Classification.en.md) вҖ” Severity classification
-   [Escalation Matrix](../05_Incident_Response/Escalation_Matrix.en.md) вҖ” Escalation procedures
-   [Alert Tuning SOP](Alert_Tuning.en.md) вҖ” UEBA tuning
-   [Third-Party Risk](Third_Party_Risk.en.md) вҖ” Contractor/vendor risk
-   [SOC Automation Catalog](SOC_Automation_Catalog.en.md) вҖ” Automated response


---

## File: 06_Operations_Management/Insider_Threat_Program.th.md
# Insider Threat Program / а№ӮаёӣаёЈа№ҒаёҒаёЈаёЎ Insider Threat

**аёЈаё«аёұаёӘа№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈ**: OPS-SOP-019
**а№Җаё§аёӯаёЈа№ҢаёҠаёұаёҷ**: 1.0
**аёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёұаё”аёҠаёұа№үаёҷаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёҘаёұаёҡ**: аёҘаёұаёҡ
**аёӯаёұаёӣа№Җаё”аё•аёҘа№ҲаёІаёӘаёёаё”**: 2026-02-15

> а№ӮаёӣаёЈа№ҒаёҒаёЈаёЎаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ **аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ, аёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ, а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҡаёЈаёЈа№Җаё—аёІ insider threats** вҖ” аё—аёұа№үаёҮа№ҒаёҡаёҡаёҲаёҮа№ғаёҲ, аёӣаёЈаё°аёЎаёІаё—, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаё–аё№аёҒа№ғаёҠа№үа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷа№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯ аё„аёЈаёӯаёҡаё„аёҘаёёаёЎ behavioral indicators, detection use cases, аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷаёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ, а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҒаёҘаёўаёёаё—аёҳа№Ңаёӣа№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёұаёҷ

---

## аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё— Insider Threat

| аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё— | аё„аёіаёӯаёҳаёҙаёҡаёІаёў | а№ҖаёҲаё•аёҷаёІ | аё•аёұаё§аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮ |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| **Malicious** | аёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёіа№Җаёһаё·а№ҲаёӯаёңаёҘаёӣаёЈаё°а№ӮаёўаёҠаёҷа№ҢаёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаё•аёұаё§/а№ҒаёҒа№үа№Ғаё„а№үаёҷ | аёҲаёҮа№ғаёҲ | аёӮа№ӮаёЎаёўаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёҒа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёҘаёІаёӯаёӯаёҒ |
| **Negligent** | аё—аёіаёңаёҙаё”аёһаёҘаёІаё”аёҲаёІаёҒаёӣаёЈаё°аёЎаёІаё— | а№„аёЎа№ҲаёҲаёҮа№ғаёҲ | аёӘа№ҲаёҮ PII а№„аёӣаёңаёҙаё”аё„аёҷ, аёЈаё«аёұаёӘаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷаёӯа№Ҳаёӯаёҷ |
| **Compromised** | аё–аё№аёҒа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөаёҲаёІаёҒаё аёІаёўаёҷаёӯаёҒа№ғаёҠа№ү credentials аёӮаёӯаёҮ insider | а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө (аё аёІаёўаёҷаёӯаёҒ) | аё–аё№аёҒ phish, а№ҒаёҘа№Үаёӣаё—а№Үаёӯаёӣаё–аё№аёҒаёӮа№ӮаёЎаёў |
| **Colluding** | аёЈа№Ҳаё§аёЎаёЎаё·аёӯаёҒаёұаёҡ threat actor аё аёІаёўаёҷаёӯаёҒ | аёҲаёҮа№ғаёҲ | аёӮаёІаёўаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ңа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ |

---

## Behavioral Indicators

### аё•аёұаё§аёҡа№ҲаёҮаёҠаёөа№үаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаёӘаё№аёҮ (аёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷаё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө)

| # | аё•аёұаё§аёҡа№ҲаёҮаёҠаёөа№ү | а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---|
| 1 | **а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёҷаёӯаёҒаёҡаё—аёҡаёІаё—** | DLP, CASB, file audit | UEBA anomaly |
| 2 | **аё”аёІаё§аёҷа№Ңа№Ӯаё«аёҘаё”/copy аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёҲаёіаёҷаё§аёҷаёЎаёІаёҒа№„аёӣ USB** | EDR, DLP, print logs | Threshold rule |
| 3 | **а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ sensitive аёҷаёӯаёҒа№Җаё§аёҘаёІ** | SIEM, badge logs | Time-based rule |
| 4 | **аёӘа№ҲаёҮ email а№„аёӣ personal account аёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎа№„аёҹаёҘа№Ңа№Ғаёҷаёҡ** | Email gateway, DLP | DLP policy |
| 5 | **аёӣаёҙаё” security controls** | EDR, SIEM | Agent health monitoring |
| 6 | **Upload cloud storage а№Ӯаё”аёўа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё•** | CASB, proxy | URL category + volume |

### аё•аёұаё§аё„аё№аё“аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаё•аёІаёЎаёҡаёЈаёҙаёҡаё—

| аёҡаёЈаёҙаёҡаё— | аё•аёұаё§аё„аё№аё“ | а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮ |
|:---|:---:|:---|
| **аёўаё·а№ҲаёҷаёҘаёІаёӯаёӯаёҒ** | Г—3 | а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаёҲаёІаёҒ HR |
| **аёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳа№ғаёҷ PIP** | Г—2 | а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаёҲаёІаёҒ HR |
| **а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ crown jewels** | Г—2 | Data classification |
| **аёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ң privileged (admin/root)** | Г—2 | IAM roles |
| **аёңаё№а№үаёЈаёұаёҡа№Җаё«аёЎаёІ/аёҠаёұа№Ҳаё§аё„аёЈаёІаё§** | Г—1.5 | HR/vendor records |
| **аёңаёҘаёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷа№ҖаёҠаёҙаёҮаёҘаёҡаёҘа№ҲаёІаёӘаёёаё”** | Г—1.5 | а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаёҲаёІаёҒ HR |

---

## Detection Rules а№ғаёҷ SIEM

| Rule | Logic | Severity | MITRE |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| **Bulk data download** | > 500 MB а№ғаёҷ 1 аёҠаёЎ. | P2 | T1530 |
| **USB mass storage** | USB а№ҖаёӮаёөаёўаёҷ > 100 MB | P2 | T1052.001 |
| **Email а№„аёӣ personal domain** | а№„аёҹаёҘа№Ңа№Ғаёҷаёҡ > 5 MB а№„аёӣ non-corporate | P3 | T1567 |
| **Cloud upload spike** | а№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎ > 200% vs 30-day baseline | P2 | T1567.002 |
| **а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ sensitive аёҷаёӯаёҒа№Җаё§аёҘаёІ** | 22:00вҖ“06:00 | P3 | T1530 |
| **аёҘаёІаёӯаёӯаёҒ + data access** | HR flag + data access аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ 14 аё§аёұаёҷ | P2 | T1530 |
| **Security tool tampering** | EDR agent аё–аё№аёҒаё«аёўаёёаё”/аёҘаёҡ | P1 | T1562.001 |

---

## аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷаёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ

### Investigation Workflow

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Insider Threat Alert] --> B[аёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷа№Җаёҡаё·а№үаёӯаёҮаё•а№үаёҷ]
    B --> C{Risk Score}
    C -->|аё•а№Ҳаёі| D[а№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎа№ғаёҷ watchlist]
    C -->|аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ| E[аёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷаёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮаёҲаёұаёҮ<br/>а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ HR & Legal]
    C -->|аёӘаё№аёҮ| F[CRITICAL: Contain аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө<br/>а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ CISO]

    E --> G[а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷа№ҒаёҡаёҡаёҘаёұаёҡ]
    F --> H[аёўаёҒа№ҖаёҘаёҙаёҒаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№ҢаёүаёёаёҒа№Җаёүаёҙаёҷ]
    F --> G
    H --> G

    G --> I[аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ timeline]
    I --> J[аёӘаёұаёЎаё аёІаё©аё“а№Ң / аёҒаёЈаё°аёҡаё§аёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ HR]
    J --> K{аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ?}

    K -->|аёҲаёҮа№ғаёҲ| L[а№ҖаёҘаёҙаёҒаёҲа№үаёІаёҮ + аё”аёіа№Җаёҷаёҙаёҷаё„аё”аёө]
    K -->|аёӣаёЈаё°аёЎаёІаё—| M[а№ҒаёҒа№үа№„аёӮ + аёқаё¶аёҒаёӯаёҡаёЈаёЎ]
    K -->|аё–аё№аёҒ Compromise| N[аёЈаёөа№ҖаёӢа№Үаё• credentials + forensics]
    K -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳаёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ| O[аёӣаёҙаё”а№Җаё„аёӘ + аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒ]

    style F fill:#dc2626,color:#fff
    style L fill:#dc2626,color:#fff
```

### Checklist аёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ

- [ ] аёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷа№Җаёҡаё·а№үаёӯаёҮаё•а№үаёҷ вҖ” аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡаёЈаёІаёўаёҘаё°а№Җаёӯаёөаёўаё” alert, аёҡаёЈаёҙаёҡаё—аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү
- [ ] аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаё•аёұаё§аё•аёҷ вҖ” а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№Ҳ shared account
- [ ] а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ HR вҖ” аёҡаёұаёҮаё„аёұаёҡаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷаёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮаёҲаёұаёҮ
- [ ] аёӣаёЈаё¶аёҒаё©аёІ Legal вҖ” аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡаё§а№ҲаёІаёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷаё–аё№аёҒаёҒаёҺаё«аёЎаёІаёў
- [ ] а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ вҖ” а№ҒаёҡаёҡаёҘаёұаёҡ (**аё«а№үаёІаёЎа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮа№Җаёӣа№үаёІаё«аёЎаёІаёў**)
- [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ң вҖ” а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёёаёҒаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ/аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮа№„аё”а№ү
- [ ] аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ timeline вҖ” SIEM, email, badge, VPN
- [ ] аёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ вҖ” аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӯаё°а№„аёЈаё–аё№аёҒа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ/аё–аё№аёҒаёӘа№ҲаёҮаёӯаёӯаёҒ
- [ ] аёӘаёұаёЎаё аёІаё©аё“а№Ң вҖ” HR аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳаё”а№үаё§аёў
- [ ] Remediation вҖ” аё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҒаёҒа№үа№„аёӮ
- [ ] Lessons learned вҖ” аёӯаёұаёӣа№Җаё”аё• detection rules

---

## аёҒаёІаёЈаёӣа№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёұаёҷ

### Off-boarding (аёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚаёЎаёІаёҒ)

| аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷ | а№Җаё§аёҘаёІ | аёңаё№а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҙаё”аёҠаёӯаёҡ |
|:---|:---:|:---|
| аёӣаёҙаё”аё—аёёаёҒ account | аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ 1 аёҠаёЎ. | IT |
| аёўаёҒа№ҖаёҘаёҙаёҒ physical access | аё§аёұаёҷа№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷ | Facilities |
| а№ҖаёҒа№ҮаёҡаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң | аё§аёұаёҷа№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷ | IT |
| аёўаёҒа№ҖаёҘаёҙаёҒ VPN/remote access | аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ 1 аёҠаёЎ. | IT |
| а№Ӯаёӯаёҷ data ownership | аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ 1 аёӘаёұаёӣаё”аёІаё«а№Ң | аёңаё№а№үаёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈ |
| аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ activity 30 аё§аёұаёҷ | аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ 1 аёӘаёұаёӣаё”аёІаё«а№Ң | SOC |
| Archive mailbox | аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ 1 аё§аёұаёҷ | IT |

---

## HR-SOC Integration

### аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаёҡаёұаёҮаё„аёұаёҡаёҲаёІаёҒ HR а№„аёӣ SOC

| а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң HR | аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ | SOC Action |
|:---|:---:|:---|
| **а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаёҘаёІаёӯаёӯаёҒ/а№ҖаёҘаёҙаёҒаёҲа№үаёІаёҮ** | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ | Enhanced monitoring 14 аё§аёұаёҷ |
| **PIP** | рҹҹ  аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ | а№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎа№ғаёҷ watchlist |
| **а№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷаёҡаё—аёҡаёІаё—** | рҹҹЎ аё•а№Ҳаёі | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ң |
| **Onboard аёңаё№а№үаёЈаёұаёҡа№Җаё«аёЎаёІ** | рҹҹЎ аё•а№Ҳаёі | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡаёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё•аёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ң |
| **аё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёІаёҮаё§аёҙаёҷаёұаёў** | рҹҹ  аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ | Watchlist 30 аё§аёұаёҷ |

---

## аёӮа№үаёӯаёһаёҙаёҲаёІаёЈаё“аёІаё—аёІаёҮаёҒаёҺаё«аёЎаёІаёў

> вҡ пёҸ **аёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ**: аёӣаёЈаё¶аёҒаё©аёІ Legal аёҒа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ insider threat а№ҖаёӘаёЎаёӯ

| аё«аёұаё§аёӮа№үаёӯ | а№Ғаёҷаё§аё—аёІаёҮ |
|:---|:---|
| **PDPA** | аёҒаёІаёЈ monitor аёһаёҷаёұаёҒаёҮаёІаёҷаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮа№ғаёҷ privacy notice |
| **аёӘаёЎаёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷ** | аёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё• monitoring аё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№Җаё«аёЎаёІаё°аёӘаёЎаёҒаёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ |
| **Covert monitoring** | аё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё•, аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёңаёҘ |
| **Monitor аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң** | а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё°аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№ҢаёҡаёЈаёҙаё©аёұаё— (аёўаёҒа№Җаё§а№үаёҷаёЎаёө BYOD agreement) |
| **аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ email** | email аёҡаёЈаёҙаё©аёұаё—а№Җаё—а№ҲаёІаёҷаёұа№үаёҷ, аё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ Legal |
| **аёӘаёұаёЎаё аёІаё©аё“а№Ң** | HR аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёЈа№Ҳаё§аёЎ, аёӣаёҸаёҙаёҡаёұаё•аёҙаё•аёІаёЎаёҒаёҺаё«аёЎаёІаёўа№ҒаёЈаёҮаёҮаёІаёҷ |

---

## аё•аёұаё§аёҠаёөа№үаё§аёұаё”

| аё•аёұаё§аёҠаёөа№үаё§аёұаё” | а№Җаёӣа№үаёІаё«аёЎаёІаёў |
|:---|:---:|
| а№Җаё§аёҘаёІаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ insider threat | < 48 аёҠаёЎ. |
| а№Җаё§аёҘаёІаёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷа№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ | < 10 аё§аёұаёҷаё—аёіаёҒаёІаёЈ |
| False positive rate | < 40% |
| Off-boarding compliance (аёӣаёҙаё” account < 1 аёҠаёЎ.) | 100% |
| HR notification compliance | 100% |
| DLP policy coverage | > 90% |

---

## Risk Scoring Model

| аёӣаёұаёҲаёҲаёұаёў | аёҷа№үаёіаё«аёҷаёұаёҒ | аё•аёұаё§аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮ Indicator |
|:---|:---:|:---|
| **Access Level** | 25% | Admin access, database access, code repo |
| **Behavioral Anomaly** | 25% | аё—аёіаёҮаёІаёҷаёҷаёӯаёҒа№Җаё§аёҘаёІаёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ, download аёЎаёІаёҒа№ҖаёҒаёҙаёҷ |
| **HR Factors** | 20% | PIP, resignation notice, disciplinary action |
| **Data Access** | 20% | а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёҘаёұаёҡ, bulk export |
| **Technical Indicators** | 10% | USB usage, personal cloud upload |

### аё„аёіаёҷаё§аё“аё„аё°а№Ғаёҷаёҷаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ

```
Risk Score = ОЈ (Factor Weight Г— Factor Score)
а№Ӯаё”аёў Factor Score = 0 (а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө) / 1 (аё•а№Ҳаёі) / 2 (аёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ) / 3 (аёӘаё№аёҮ)

аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ:
  0вҖ“3  = аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ (а№Җаёқа№үаёІаёЈаё°аё§аёұаёҮаёЎаёІаё•аёЈаёҗаёІаёҷ)
  4вҖ“6  = а№Җаё•аё·аёӯаёҷ (а№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎаёҒаёІаёЈ monitor)
  7вҖ“9  = аёӘаё№аёҮ (аёӘаёӯаёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ)
  10+  = аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• (аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө)
```

## Investigation Workflow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Trigger["рҹҡЁ Trigger Alert"] --> Triage["рҹ“Ӣ SOC Triage"]
    Triage --> Verify{"аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ?"}
    Verify -->|False Positive| Close["аёӣаёҙаё”а№Җаё„аёӘ"]
    Verify -->|Confirmed| Investigate["рҹ”Қ аёӘаёӯаёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ"]
    Investigate --> Evidence["рҹ“Ғ аёЈаё§аёҡаёЈаё§аёЎаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ"]
    Evidence --> HR{"аё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ HR?"}
    HR -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| Escalate["в¬ҶпёҸ аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ HR+Legal"]
    HR -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ| Monitor["рҹ‘ҒпёҸ а№Җаёқа№үаёІаёЈаё°аё§аёұаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯ"]
    Escalate --> Action["рҹ”’ аё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ"]
```

## а№Җаё—аёЎа№ҖаёһаёҘаё• Investigation Report

| аёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷ | а№Җаёҷаё·а№үаёӯаё«аёІ |
|:---|:---|
| **Case ID** | INSIDER-YYYY-NNN |
| **Subject** | [аёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ/аёЈаё«аёұаёӘаёһаёҷаёұаёҒаёҮаёІаёҷ вҖ” а№ғаёҠа№ү alias аёҒа№Ҳаёӯаёҷаёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ] |
| **Trigger** | [аёӘаёҙа№ҲаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳаё—аёіа№ғаё«а№үа№ҖаёЈаёҙа№ҲаёЎаёӘаёӯаёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ] |
| **Timeline** | [аёҘаёіаё”аёұаёҡа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң] |
| **аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ** | [Log, screenshot, DLP alerts] |
| **аёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ** | [аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒ access/exfiltrate] |
| **аёӘаёЈаёёаёӣ/аёӮа№үаёӯа№ҖаёӘаёҷаёӯа№Ғаёҷаё°** | [аёңаёҘаёӘаёӯаёҡаёӘаё§аёҷа№ҒаёҘаё° action items] |

## аёӮа№үаёӯаёһаёҙаёҲаёІаёЈаё“аёІаё—аёІаёҮаёҒаёҺаё«аёЎаёІаёў (PDPA)

| аё«аёұаё§аёӮа№үаёӯ | а№Ғаёҷаё§аёӣаёҸаёҙаёҡаёұаё•аёҙ |
|:---|:---|
| **аёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ңа№ғаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ monitor** | аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёЎаёө policy аё—аёөа№ҲаёһаёҷаёұаёҒаёҮаёІаёҷаёЈаёұаёҡаё—аёЈаёІаёҡ |
| **аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаёҡаёёаё„аё„аёҘ** | Monitor а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё°аёҒаёҙаёҲаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҡаёҮаёІаёҷ |
| **аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ** | Chain of custody, encryption, access log |
| **аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ DPO** | а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ DPO а№ҖаёЎаё·а№ҲаёӯаёһаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаёҘаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаё”аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ |
| **Retention** | аёҘаёҡаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮаё«аёҘаёұаёҮаёӣаёҙаё”а№Җаё„аёӘ |

## Detection Use Cases

| Use Case | Log Source | Detection Logic | аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---:|
| Mass file download | DLP/CASB | > 100 files in 1 hour | рҹ”ҙ |
| After-hours access to sensitive data | SIEM | Access outside 08:00-18:00 + PII data | рҹҹЎ |
| USB mass storage on critical host | EDR | USB device class = mass storage | рҹҹЎ |
| Email to personal account + attachment | Email gateway | To: gmail/hotmail + attachment > 1MB | рҹҹЎ |
| Privilege escalation attempt | AD logs | Non-admin adding self to admin group | рҹ”ҙ |
| Unusual VPN location | VPN logs | Login from country not in baseline | рҹҹЎ |
| Badge access anomaly | Physical security | Tailgating / off-hours entry | рҹҹў |

## Program Maturity Levels

| аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ | аёҘаёұаёҒаё©аё“аё° | аё•аёұаё§аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **1 вҖ” Ad-hoc** | а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө program, react а№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯа№ҖаёҒаёҙаё”а№Җаё«аё•аёё | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯ HR а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ |
| **2 вҖ” Basic** | Policy + awareness training | аёЎаёө acceptable use policy |
| **3 вҖ” Defined** | Technical controls + process | DLP deployed, UEBA basics |
| **4 вҖ” Managed** | Proactive monitoring + analytics | UEBA + risk scoring |
| **5 вҖ” Optimized** | Predictive, integrated with HR | ML-based anomaly + HR data feed |

## Insider Risk Indicators

### Behavioral Indicators Scoring

| Indicator | Risk Score | Detection Method |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Mass file download | +8 | DLP / UEBA |
| After-hours access | +3 | Access logs |
| Resignation notice | +5 | HR integration |
| Privilege escalation request | +4 | IAM workflow |
| USB device usage | +6 | Endpoint agent |
| Personal email forward | +7 | Email gateway |
| Print spike | +4 | Print server logs |

### Risk Score Thresholds

```
Risk Score Actions:
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
0-10   в–“в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘  Normal - Monitor only
11-20  в–“в–“в–‘в–‘в–‘  Elevated - Weekly review
21-30  в–“в–“в–“в–‘в–‘  High - Daily monitoring
31-40  в–“в–“в–“в–“в–‘  Critical - Immediate investigation
41+    в–“в–“в–“в–“в–“  Emergency - Contain & investigate
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
```

### Investigation Workflow

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    A[Alert] --> B[Verify indicator]
    B --> C{Risk > 20?}
    C -->|No| D[Continue monitoring]
    C -->|Yes| E[Open investigation]
    E --> F[Gather evidence]
    F --> G{Confirmed?}
    G -->|No| H[Close & document]
    G -->|Yes| I[HR + Legal + Mgmt]
    I --> J[Containment action]
```

### Checklist аё”а№үаёІаёҷаёҒаёҺаё«аёЎаёІаёўа№ҒаёҘаё°аёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаёіаёҒаёұаёҡаё”аё№а№ҒаёҘ

| Requirement | Status | Notes |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Employee consent | вҳҗ | HR policy update |
| PDPA compliance | вҳҗ | DPO review |
| Union notification | вҳҗ | If applicable |
| Evidence handling | вҳҗ | Chain of custody |

### аёЈаёӯаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷа№ӮаёӣаёЈа№ҒаёҒаёЈаёЎ

| Review | Frequency |
|:---|:---|
| Policy | Annual |
| Indicators | Quarterly |

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ

-   [Forensic Investigation](../05_Incident_Response/Forensic_Investigation.th.md) вҖ” аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ
-   [Incident Classification](../05_Incident_Response/Incident_Classification.th.md) вҖ” аёҲаёіа№ҒаёҷаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ
-   [Escalation Matrix](../05_Incident_Response/Escalation_Matrix.th.md) вҖ” аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёӘа№ҲаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯ
-   [Alert Tuning SOP](Alert_Tuning.th.md) вҖ” аёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёЈаёұаёҡаёҲаё№аёҷ UEBA
-   [Third-Party Risk](Third_Party_Risk.th.md) вҖ” аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаёҲаёІаёҒ contractor/vendor


---

## File: 06_Operations_Management/KPI_Dashboard_Template.en.md
# SOC KPI Dashboard Template

**Document ID**: OPS-SOP-013
**Version**: 1.0
**Classification**: Internal
**Last Updated**: 2026-02-15

> A ready-to-use **executive dashboard template** for monthly SOC performance reporting. Copy these sections into your BI tool (Grafana, Power BI, Kibana) or use as a manual report template.

---

## Dashboard Overview

```mermaid
graph LR
    subgraph "Executive Summary"
        A[Total Alerts]
        B[Incidents Created]
        C[MTTD / MTTR]
        D[SLA Compliance]
    end

    subgraph "Operational Detail"
        E[Alert Volume Trend]
        F[Top Categories]
        G[Analyst Workload]
        H[Detection Coverage]
    end

    subgraph "Strategic"
        I[Risk Posture]
        J[Automation Rate]
        K[Maturity Score]
        L[Budget/ROI]
    end
```

---

## Section 1: Executive Summary Cards

> рҹҺҜ **Audience**: CISO, CTO, Board
> рҹ“… **Frequency**: Monthly

### Top-Line KPIs

| KPI | This Month | Last Month | Trend | Target | Status |
|:---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| **Total Alerts** | _____ | _____ | вҶ‘/вҶ“ _% | вҖ” | вҖ” |
| **True Positive Rate** | ___% | ___% | вҶ‘/вҶ“ | вүҘ 80% | рҹҹў/рҹҹЎ/рҹ”ҙ |
| **Incidents Created** | _____ | _____ | вҶ‘/вҶ“ _% | вҖ” | вҖ” |
| **P1/P2 Incidents** | _____ | _____ | вҶ‘/вҶ“ _% | вҖ” | вҖ” |
| **MTTD** (Mean Time to Detect) | ___ min | ___ min | вҶ‘/вҶ“ | < 15 min | рҹҹў/рҹҹЎ/рҹ”ҙ |
| **MTTR** (Mean Time to Respond) | ___ min | ___ min | вҶ‘/вҶ“ | < 60 min | рҹҹў/рҹҹЎ/рҹ”ҙ |
| **MTTC** (Mean Time to Contain) | ___ hrs | ___ hrs | вҶ‘/вҶ“ | < 4 hrs | рҹҹў/рҹҹЎ/рҹ”ҙ |
| **SLA Compliance** | ___% | ___% | вҶ‘/вҶ“ | вүҘ 95% | рҹҹў/рҹҹЎ/рҹ”ҙ |
| **Automation Rate** | ___% | ___% | вҶ‘/вҶ“ | вүҘ 40% | рҹҹў/рҹҹЎ/рҹ”ҙ |
| **Data Breach Count** | _____ | _____ | вҶ‘/вҶ“ | 0 | рҹҹў/рҹҹЎ/рҹ”ҙ |

**Status Legend**: рҹҹў On Target | рҹҹЎ Needs Attention (within 10%) | рҹ”ҙ Below Target

---

| _____ | _____ | _____ | _____ | ___% | _____ |
| _____ | _____ | _____ | _____ | ___% | _____ |
| _____ | _____ | _____ | _____ | ___% | _____ |

| Rank | Category | Count | % of Total | Trend | Top Source |

| 3 | ______________ | _____ | ___% | вҶ‘/вҶ“ | ______________ |
| 4 | ______________ | _____ | ___% | вҶ‘/вҶ“ | ______________ |
| 5 | ______________ | _____ | ___% | вҶ‘/вҶ“ | ______________ |

## Section 3: Incident Metrics

### 3c. SLA Performance

```mermaid
graph LR
    subgraph "SLA Targets"
        P1[P1: Respond < 15 min] --> P1R[Met: __%]
        P2[P2: Respond < 30 min] --> P2R[Met: __%]
        P3[P3: Respond < 4 hrs] --> P3R[Met: __%]
        P4[P4: Respond < 24 hrs] --> P4R[Met: __%]
    end
```

## Appendix: BI Tool Configuration

### Grafana Dashboard JSON

```json
{
  "panels": [
    {
      "title": "Total Alerts (30 days)",
      "type": "stat",
      "datasource": "SIEM",
      "query": "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alerts WHERE timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'"
    },
    {
      "title": "MTTR (P1/P2)",
      "type": "gauge",
      "datasource": "Ticketing",
      "query": "SELECT AVG(resolved_at - created_at) FROM incidents WHERE severity IN ('P1','P2') AND resolved_at IS NOT NULL"
    }
  ]
}
```

### Recommended Refresh Rates

| Dashboard Section | Refresh Rate |
|:---|:---:|
| Alert Volume (real-time) | 5 min |
| Incident Metrics | 15 min |
| SLA Compliance | 1 hour |
| Detection Coverage | Daily |
| Team Performance | Weekly |
| Executive Summary | Monthly |

---

## File: 06_Operations_Management/KPI_Dashboard_Template.th.md
# SOC KPI Dashboard Template / а№ҒаёЎа№Ҳа№Ғаёҡаёҡ Dashboard аё•аёұаё§аёҠаёөа№үаё§аёұаё” SOC

**аёЈаё«аёұаёӘа№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈ**: OPS-SOP-013
**а№Җаё§аёӯаёЈа№ҢаёҠаёұаёҷ**: 1.0
**аёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёұаё”аёҠаёұа№үаёҷаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёҘаёұаёҡ**: а№ғаёҠа№үаё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ
**аёӯаёұаёӣа№Җаё”аё•аёҘа№ҲаёІаёӘаёёаё”**: 2026-02-15

> а№ҒаёЎа№Ҳа№Ғаёҡаёҡ **executive dashboard** аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷаёңаёҘаёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҮаёІаёҷ SOC аёЈаёІаёўа№Җаё”аё·аёӯаёҷ аё„аёұаё”аёҘаёӯаёҒаёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷа№Җаё«аёҘа№ҲаёІаёҷаёөа№үа№„аёӣа№ғаёҠа№үа№ғаёҷ BI tool (Grafana, Power BI, Kibana) аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№ғаёҠа№үа№Җаёӣа№ҮаёҷаёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷ manual

---

## аёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳ 1: аёӘаёЈаёёаёӣаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёңаё№а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈ

> рҹҺҜ **аёҒаёҘаёёа№ҲаёЎа№Җаёӣа№үаёІаё«аёЎаёІаёў**: CISO, CTO, аё„аё“аё°аёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎаёҒаёІаёЈ
> рҹ“… **аё„аё§аёІаёЎаё–аёөа№Ҳ**: аёЈаёІаёўа№Җаё”аё·аёӯаёҷ

### KPI аё«аёҘаёұаёҒ

| KPI | а№Җаё”аё·аёӯаёҷаёҷаёөа№ү | а№Җаё”аё·аёӯаёҷаёҒа№Ҳаёӯаёҷ | а№Ғаёҷаё§а№Ӯаёҷа№үаёЎ | а№Җаёӣа№үаёІаё«аёЎаёІаёў | аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё° |
|:---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| **Alert аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё”** | _____ | _____ | вҶ‘/вҶ“ _% | вҖ” | вҖ” |
| **True Positive Rate** | ___% | ___% | вҶ‘/вҶ“ | вүҘ 80% | рҹҹў/рҹҹЎ/рҹ”ҙ |
| **Incident аё—аёөа№ҲаёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ** | _____ | _____ | вҶ‘/вҶ“ _% | вҖ” | вҖ” |
| **P1/P2 Incidents** | _____ | _____ | вҶ‘/вҶ“ _% | вҖ” | вҖ” |
| **MTTD** (а№Җаё§аёҘаёІа№ҖаёүаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўа№ғаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёһаёҡ) | ___ аёҷаёІаё—аёө | ___ аёҷаёІаё—аёө | вҶ‘/вҶ“ | < 15 аёҷаёІаё—аёө | рҹҹў/рҹҹЎ/рҹ”ҙ |
| **MTTR** (а№Җаё§аёҘаёІа№ҖаёүаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўа№ғаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮ) | ___ аёҷаёІаё—аёө | ___ аёҷаёІаё—аёө | вҶ‘/вҶ“ | < 60 аёҷаёІаё—аёө | рҹҹў/рҹҹЎ/рҹ”ҙ |
| **MTTC** (а№Җаё§аёҘаёІа№ҖаёүаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўа№ғаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ) | ___ аёҠаёЎ. | ___ аёҠаёЎ. | вҶ‘/вҶ“ | < 4 аёҠаёЎ. | рҹҹў/рҹҹЎ/рҹ”ҙ |
| **SLA Compliance** | ___% | ___% | вҶ‘/вҶ“ | вүҘ 95% | рҹҹў/рҹҹЎ/рҹ”ҙ |
| **Automation Rate** | ___% | ___% | вҶ‘/вҶ“ | вүҘ 40% | рҹҹў/рҹҹЎ/рҹ”ҙ |
| **Data Breach** | _____ | _____ | вҶ‘/вҶ“ | 0 | рҹҹў/рҹҹЎ/рҹ”ҙ |

**аёӘаёұаёҚаёҘаёұаёҒаё©аё“а№Ң**: рҹҹў а№„аё”а№үаё•аёІаёЎа№Җаёӣа№үаёІ | рҹҹЎ аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё”аё№а№ҒаёҘ (аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ 10%) | рҹ”ҙ аё•а№ҲаёіаёҒаё§а№ҲаёІа№Җаёӣа№үаёІ

---

## аёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳ 2: Alert Analytics

### 2a. а№Ғаёҷаё§а№Ӯаёҷа№үаёЎаёӣаёЈаёҙаёЎаёІаё“ Alert (12 а№Җаё”аё·аёӯаёҷ)

| а№Җаё”аё·аёӯаёҷ | Alert аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” | True Positive | False Positive | TP Rate | Alert/Analyst/аё§аёұаёҷ |
|:---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| _____ | _____ | _____ | _____ | ___% | _____ |
| _____ | _____ | _____ | _____ | ___% | _____ |

## а№Ғаёҷаё§аёӣаёҸаёҙаёҡаёұаё•аёҙаё—аёөа№Ҳаё”аёөа№ғаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёӯаёӯаёҒа№Ғаёҡаёҡ Dashboard

### аёЎаёІаё•аёЈаёҗаёІаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈа№ғаёҠа№үаёӘаёө

| аёӘаёө | аё„аё§аёІаёЎаё«аёЎаёІаёў | а№ғаёҠа№үаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| рҹҹў а№ҖаёӮаёөаёўаё§ | аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ / аёҡаёЈаёЈаёҘаёёа№Җаёӣа№үаёІ | KPI аё—аёөа№Ҳаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷа№ҖаёҒаё“аё‘а№Ң |
| рҹҹЎ а№Җаё«аёҘаё·аёӯаёҮ | а№Җаё•аё·аёӯаёҷ / а№ғаёҒаёҘа№үа№ҖаёҒаё“аё‘а№Ң | аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё•аёҙаё”аё•аёІаёЎ |
| рҹ”ҙ а№Ғаё”аёҮ | аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• / а№ҖаёҒаёҙаёҷа№ҖаёҒаё“аё‘а№Ң | аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө |
| рҹ”ө аёҷа№үаёіа№ҖаёҮаёҙаёҷ | аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӯа№үаёІаёҮаёӯаёҙаёҮ | Baseline / trend |

```
в”Ӯ MTTR     в”Ӯ MTTD     в”Ӯ Alerts   в”Ӯ Open Incidents     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 12 min вҶ“ в”Ӯ 8 min вҶ“  в”Ӯ 1,247 вҶ‘  в”Ӯ 23 вҶ“              в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ  [Alert Trend Chart - 30 days]                      в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ  Top Alert Sources  в”Ӯ  Incident by Severity         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  1. Firewall  45%   в”Ӯ  Critical: 3                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  2. EDR       30%   в”Ӯ  High: 8                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  3. IDS       15%   в”Ӯ  Medium: 12                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  4. Other     10%   в”Ӯ  Low: 45                      в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

### Refresh Rate Guidelines

| аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё— Dashboard | Refresh Rate | а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёңаёҘ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Real-time Operations | 30 аё§аёҙаёҷаёІаё—аёө | Alert monitoring |
| Daily Summary | 15 аёҷаёІаё—аёө | Shift awareness |
| Weekly Executive | 1 аёҠаёұа№Ҳаё§а№ӮаёЎаёҮ | Trend analysis |
| Monthly Report | Manual | Deep analysis |

### Dashboard Access Control

| Role | View | Edit | Admin |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| SOC Analyst | вң… | вқҢ | вқҢ |
| SOC Lead | вң… | вң… | вқҢ |
| SOC Manager | вң… | вң… | вң… |
| CISO | вң… | вқҢ | вқҢ |

### Data Source Integration

|:---|:---|:---|
| Alert Volume | SIEM API | 30 sec |
| MTTR/MTTD | Ticketing API | 5 min |
| SLA Compliance | Ticketing + SLA DB | 15 min |

### Dashboard Maintenance Schedule

| Task | Frequency |
|:---|:---|
| Data source check | Daily |
| Widget review | Monthly |
| Full redesign | Annual |

## File: 06_Operations_Management/Log_Source_Matrix.en.md
# Log Source Matrix

**Document ID**: OPS-SOP-010
**Version**: 1.0
**Classification**: Internal
**Last Updated**: 2026-02-15

> The Log Source Matrix provides a **single-page view** of all data sources ingested (or required) by the SOC. Use it as a gap analysis tool to identify blind spots in your detection coverage.

---

## How to Use This Document

1. **Onboarding** вҶ’ Verify all required log sources are connected
2. **Gap Analysis** вҶ’ Identify missing sources (вқҢ) and plan remediation
3. **Capacity Planning** вҶ’ Estimate EPS and storage requirements
4. **Compliance** вҶ’ Map log sources to regulatory requirements (PDPA, PCI-DSS, ISO 27001)
5. **Detection Tuning** вҶ’ Correlate with MITRE ATT&CK coverage gaps

---

## Status Legend

| Symbol | Status | Action Required |
|:---:|:---|:---|
| вң… | Collected & parsed | None вҖ” healthy |
| вҡ пёҸ | Partial (collected but not parsed/normalized) | Needs parser development |
| вқҢ | Not collected | Plan for integration |
| рҹ”ң | Planned / in progress | On roadmap |
| N/A | Not applicable to environment | Skip |

---

## 1. Endpoint & Host Logs

| # | Log Source | Type | Key Events | MITRE Coverage | EPS (est.) | Status |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---:|:---:|
| 1.1 | **Windows Security Event Log** | Host | 4624/4625 (Logon), 4688 (Process), 4698 (Scheduled Task), 7045 (Service) | T1078, T1053, T1543 | 500вҖ“5K | вң… |
| 1.2 | **Windows Sysmon** | Host | Process create (1), Network (3), File create (11), Registry (13), DNS (22) | T1055, T1059, T1071 | 1KвҖ“10K | вң… |
| 1.3 | **Windows PowerShell** | Host | 4103 (Module), 4104 (Script Block), 4105/4106 (Start/Stop) | T1059.001, T1027 | 100вҖ“1K | вң… |
| 1.4 | **Linux Auditd / syslog** | Host | execve, file access, auth, sudo | T1548, T1059.004, T1070 | 200вҖ“2K | вң… |
| 1.5 | **macOS Unified Log** | Host | Process exec, auth, network, file | T1059, T1078, T1547 | 100вҖ“500 | вҡ пёҸ |
| 1.6 | **EDR Telemetry** (CrowdStrike / Defender / SentinelOne) | Endpoint | Process tree, file write, network, injection | Wide coverage (50+ TTPs) | 1KвҖ“20K | вң… |
| 1.7 | **Antivirus / EPP** | Endpoint | Detection, quarantine, scan results | T1204, T1566 | 50вҖ“500 | вң… |

---

## 2. Network Logs

| # | Log Source | Type | Key Events | MITRE Coverage | EPS (est.) | Status |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---:|:---:|
| 2.1 | **Firewall** (Palo Alto / Fortinet / pfSense) | Network | Allow/Deny, NAT, VPN tunnel, threat log | T1071, T1090, T1572 | 1KвҖ“50K | вң… |
| 2.2 | **IDS/IPS** (Suricata / Snort) | Network | Signature alerts, protocol anomaly | T1190, T1071, T1040 | 100вҖ“5K | вң… |
| 2.3 | **DNS Logs** (AD DNS / Pi-hole / Infoblox) | Network | Query/Response, NXDomain, TXT record | T1071.004, T1048.003, T1568 | 500вҖ“10K | вң… |
| 2.4 | **Web Proxy / SWG** (Squid / Zscaler / Netskope) | Network | URL, user agent, response code, bytes | T1071.001, T1102, T1567 | 500вҖ“5K | вң… |
| 2.5 | **NetFlow / IPFIX** | Network | IP pairs, ports, bytes, duration | T1046, T1571, T1572 | 1KвҖ“100K | вҡ пёҸ |
| 2.6 | **DHCP Logs** | Network | Lease, MAC-to-IP binding | Asset identification | 10вҖ“100 | вҡ пёҸ |
| 2.7 | **VPN Gateway** | Network | Connect/disconnect, user, source IP, duration | T1133, T1078 | 10вҖ“500 | вң… |
| 2.8 | **Wireless Controller** | Network | Association, deauth, rogue AP | T1557, T1200 | 50вҖ“500 | вқҢ |

---

## 3. Cloud & SaaS Logs

| # | Log Source | Type | Key Events | MITRE Coverage | EPS (est.) | Status |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---:|:---:|
| 3.1 | **AWS CloudTrail** | Cloud | API calls (all services), console sign-in | T1078.004, T1580, T1537 | 100вҖ“5K | вң… |
| 3.2 | **AWS GuardDuty** | Cloud | Threat findings, anomaly detection | Multiple techniques | 1вҖ“50 | вң… |
| 3.3 | **AWS VPC Flow Logs** | Cloud | Network flow within VPC | T1046, T1071 | 500вҖ“10K | вҡ пёҸ |
| 3.4 | **Azure AD Sign-in Logs** | Cloud | Login events, MFA status, conditional access | T1078.004, T1556 | 100вҖ“2K | вң… |
| 3.5 | **Azure Activity Log** | Cloud | Resource operations, RBAC changes | T1098, T1562 | 50вҖ“500 | вң… |
| 3.6 | **GCP Cloud Audit Logs** | Cloud | Admin activity, data access | T1078.004, T1530 | 50вҖ“1K | вқҢ |
| 3.7 | **Microsoft 365 UAL** | SaaS | Mail (Send/Receive/Forward), SharePoint, Teams | T1114, T1213, T1567 | 200вҖ“5K | вң… |
| 3.8 | **Google Workspace** | SaaS | Drive, Gmail, Admin console | T1114, T1530 | 100вҖ“1K | вқҢ |
| 3.9 | **Okta / Azure AD** (IdP) | Identity | Login, MFA challenge, app assignment | T1078, T1556, T1550 | 50вҖ“500 | вң… |
| 3.10 | **SaaS Apps** (Salesforce, Slack, etc.) | SaaS | User activity, file share, admin changes | T1213, T1567 | 10вҖ“200 | рҹ”ң |

---

## 4. Identity & Access Logs

| # | Log Source | Type | Key Events | MITRE Coverage | EPS (est.) | Status |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---:|:---:|
| 4.1 | **Active Directory** (DC Security) | Identity | 4720 (Account Created), 4728/4732 (Group Add), 4768/4769 (Kerberos) | T1078, T1098, T1558 | 200вҖ“5K | вң… |
| 4.2 | **LDAP Logs** | Identity | Bind, search, modify | T1087, T1018 | 50вҖ“500 | вҡ пёҸ |
| 4.3 | **PAM / Vault** (CyberArk / HashiCorp) | Identity | Session recording, credential checkout, rotation | T1078.002, T1555 | 10вҖ“100 | рҹ”ң |
| 4.4 | **MFA Platform** | Identity | Challenge/Response, enrollment, bypass | T1556.006, T1621 | 10вҖ“200 | вң… |
| 4.5 | **Certificate Authority** | Identity | Cert issuance, revocation, template changes | T1649, T1553 | 1вҖ“50 | вқҢ |

---

## 5. Application & Database Logs

| # | Log Source | Type | Key Events | MITRE Coverage | EPS (est.) | Status |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---:|:---:|
| 5.1 | **Web Server** (Apache / Nginx / IIS) | Application | Access log, error log, WAF events | T1190, T1505, T1136 | 100вҖ“10K | вң… |
| 5.2 | **WAF** (Cloudflare / AWS WAF / ModSecurity) | Application | Block, allow, challenge, bot score | T1190, T1595 | 100вҖ“5K | вң… |
| 5.3 | **Database Audit** (MySQL / PostgreSQL / MSSQL) | Database | Login, query, schema change, bulk export | T1213, T1565, T1530 | 50вҖ“2K | вҡ пёҸ |
| 5.4 | **Application Logs** (custom apps) | Application | Login, error, transaction, API call | T1078, T1190 | 50вҖ“5K | вҡ пёҸ |
| 5.5 | **Container / K8s Audit** | Application | Pod create/delete, exec, RBAC change | T1610, T1611, T1613 | 100вҖ“2K | вқҢ |

---

## 6. Email & Communication Logs

| # | Log Source | Type | Key Events | MITRE Coverage | EPS (est.) | Status |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---:|:---:|
| 6.1 | **Email Gateway** (Exchange Online / Proofpoint / Mimecast) | Email | Send/receive, attachment, phishing verdict | T1566, T1534 | 50вҖ“2K | вң… |
| 6.2 | **Email DLP** | Email | Policy match, block, quarantine | T1048, T1567 | 10вҖ“200 | вң… |
| 6.3 | **Anti-Spam / Anti-Phishing** | Email | Detection, URL sandbox, attachment detonate | T1566.001, T1566.002 | 10вҖ“500 | вң… |

---

## 7. Security Tool Logs

| # | Log Source | Type | Key Events | MITRE Coverage | EPS (est.) | Status |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---:|:---:|
| 7.1 | **SIEM Internal** | Security | Health, ingestion rate, rule triggers | N/A (operational) | 10вҖ“100 | вң… |
| 7.2 | **Vulnerability Scanner** (Qualys / Nessus / Rapid7) | Security | Scan results, new vuln, patch status | T1190, T1210 | 1вҖ“50 | вң… |
| 7.3 | **DLP** (Endpoint / Network) | Security | Policy violation, block, alert | T1048, T1567 | 10вҖ“200 | вҡ пёҸ |
| 7.4 | **CASB** (Netskope / Microsoft MCAS) | Security | Shadow IT, data exfil, anomalous usage | T1567, T1537, T1530 | 10вҖ“500 | рҹ”ң |
| 7.5 | **Threat Intelligence Platform** | Security | IOC match, feed update | Various | 1вҖ“50 | вң… |

---

## Coverage Summary

```mermaid
pie title Log Source Status
    "Collected вң…" : 28
    "Partial вҡ пёҸ" : 9
    "Missing вқҢ" : 5
    "Planned рҹ”ң" : 3
```

### Gap Remediation Priority

| Priority | Missing Source | Impact | Effort | Timeline |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| рҹ”ҙ P1 | Container / K8s Audit | Blind to container-based attacks | Medium | Q1 |
| рҹ”ҙ P1 | Certificate Authority | Cannot detect Golden Certificate (T1649) | Low | Q1 |
| рҹҹЎ P2 | GCP Cloud Audit | No visibility into GCP workloads | Medium | Q2 |
| рҹҹЎ P2 | Google Workspace | Missing email/drive monitoring for Google users | Medium | Q2 |
| рҹҹў P3 | Wireless Controller | Limited rogue AP detection | Low | Q3 |

---

## Capacity Planning

| Tier | Typical Total EPS | SIEM License Impact | Storage (90 days) |
|:---|:---:|:---|:---:|
| **Small SOC** (< 500 hosts) | 5KвҖ“15K | Standard tier | 500 GB вҖ“ 1.5 TB |
| **Medium SOC** (500вҖ“5K hosts) | 15KвҖ“100K | Enterprise tier | 1.5 вҖ“ 10 TB |
| **Large SOC** (5K+ hosts) | 100KвҖ“1M+ | Premium tier | 10 вҖ“ 100+ TB |

### EPS Estimation Formula

```
Daily Events = EPS Г— 86,400
Storage (GB/day) = Daily Events Г— Avg Event Size (bytes) / 1,073,741,824
90-day Storage = Storage/day Г— 90
```

---

## MITRE ATT&CK Mapping

> This matrix shows which log sources contribute to detecting each ATT&CK tactic.

| Tactic | Primary Sources | Secondary Sources |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **Initial Access** | Email Gateway, WAF, Proxy | Firewall, VPN |
| **Execution** | EDR, Sysmon, PowerShell | App Logs |
| **Persistence** | Windows Events, EDR, Cloud Audit | AD, DNS |
| **Privilege Escalation** | Windows Events, EDR, AD | PAM, Sysmon |
| **Defense Evasion** | EDR, Sysmon, PowerShell | Firewall |
| **Credential Access** | AD, EDR, MFA Platform | PAM, Sysmon |
| **Discovery** | AD, EDR, DNS | NetFlow |
| **Lateral Movement** | Windows Events, EDR, Firewall | NetFlow, AD |
| **Collection** | DLP, EDR, DB Audit | Email, SaaS |
| **Command & Control** | DNS, Proxy, Firewall | IDS/IPS, NetFlow |
| **Exfiltration** | DLP, Proxy, DNS | Firewall, Email |
| **Impact** | EDR, App Logs, Cloud Audit | Backup Logs |

---

## Maintenance Schedule

| Task | Frequency | Owner |
|:---|:---:|:---|
| Review log source health | Daily | SOC Tier 1 |
| Validate EPS vs baseline | Weekly | SOC Engineering |
| Update matrix (new sources) | Monthly | SOC Lead |
| Full gap analysis review | Quarterly | SOC Manager + CISO |
| Compliance mapping audit | Annually | GRC / Compliance |

---

## Minimum Logging Baseline by Use Case

| Use Case | Required Sources | Recommended Enrichment | Blind Spot If Missing |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **Identity abuse / account compromise** | AD or IdP sign-in logs, MFA platform, VPN gateway | DHCP, EDR, geo-IP | Cannot verify who logged in, from where, or whether MFA failed |
| **Endpoint execution / malware** | Windows Security, Sysmon, EDR, AV/EPP | DNS, proxy, threat intel | Process lineage and post-execution activity become weak |
| **Phishing / BEC** | Email gateway, M365 UAL or equivalent, IdP logs | Sandbox verdicts, DLP, URL click logs | Message delivery and account follow-on activity cannot be tied together |
| **Data exfiltration** | Proxy, DLP, storage audit, firewall | NetFlow, SaaS audit, DB audit | Large transfers may look like normal traffic with no content context |
| **Cloud abuse** | CloudTrail/Activity/Audit logs, cloud identity logs | VPC/NSG flow logs, CSPM findings | Privileged API misuse and public exposure changes may go unseen |
| **Web attack / API abuse** | WAF, web server, application logs | DB audit, threat intel, CDN logs | Attack path stops at the edge and misses downstream impact |

## Data Quality Checks and Escalation Triggers

| Check | Owner | Acceptable Threshold | Escalate When |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **Ingestion freshness** | SOC Engineering | No gap beyond agreed source SLA | P1/P2 source missing beyond SLA |
| **Parser coverage** | Security Engineer | Required fields normalized for priority sources | Critical source remains partial for more than one reporting cycle |
| **Clock alignment** | SOC Engineering | Timestamps consistent enough for correlation | Time drift breaks case timelines or MTTD measurement |
| **EPS stability** | SOC Lead | Within documented baseline or approved change window | Sudden drop/spike with no planned change |
| **Retention compliance** | SOC Manager / GRC | Meets incident, audit, and legal needs | Evidence window shorter than investigation requirement |

## Executive View: What Missing Logs Mean

| Missing or Partial Source | Operational Impact | Business Risk |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **IdP / MFA logs** | Weak account-compromise triage | Increased risk of undetected unauthorized access |
| **EDR or Sysmon** | Poor endpoint reconstruction | Slower containment and harder forensic validation |
| **Cloud audit logs** | Limited visibility into admin/API abuse | High risk in cloud governance and breach investigations |
| **Email audit logs** | Cannot confirm user action after phishing | Delayed response to BEC and mail-based attacks |
| **Database / SaaS audit** | Weak evidence for data access cases | Regulatory and legal reporting risk |

---

## Related Documents

-   [Threat Hunting Playbook](../05_Incident_Response/Threat_Hunting_Playbook.en.md)

-   [TI Feeds Integration](../06_Operations_Management/TI_Feeds_Integration.en.md)

- [NIST SP 800-92](https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-92/final)
- [MITRE ATT&CK](https://attack.mitre.org/)

## File: 06_Operations_Management/Log_Source_Matrix.th.md
# Log Source Matrix / аё•аёІаёЈаёІаёҮа№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ Log

**аёЈаё«аёұаёӘа№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈ**: OPS-SOP-010
**а№Җаё§аёӯаёЈа№ҢаёҠаёұаёҷ**: 1.0
**аёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёұаё”аёҠаёұа№үаёҷаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёҘаёұаёҡ**: а№ғаёҠа№үаё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ
**аёӯаёұаёӣа№Җаё”аё•аёҘа№ҲаёІаёӘаёёаё”**: 2026-02-15

> Log Source Matrix а№ҒаёӘаё”аёҮ **аё аёІаёһаёЈаё§аёЎаё«аёҷа№үаёІа№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§** аёӮаёӯаёҮ data sources аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё”аё—аёөа№Ҳ SOC аёЈаёұаёҡа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈ а№ғаёҠа№үа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷа№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯ gap analysis а№Җаёһаё·а№Ҳаёӯаё„а№үаёҷаё«аёІаёҲаёёаё”аёҡаёӯаё”а№ғаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ

---

## аё§аёҙаёҳаёөа№ғаёҠа№үа№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаёҷаёөа№ү

1. **Onboarding** вҶ’ аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡаё§а№ҲаёІа№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎаё•а№Ҳаёӯ log sources аё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаё„аёЈаёҡа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§
2. **Gap Analysis** вҶ’ аёЈаё°аёҡаёёа№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮаё—аёөа№ҲаёўаёұаёҮаёӮаёІаё” (вқҢ) а№ҒаёҘаё°аё§аёІаёҮа№Ғаёңаёҷа№ҒаёҒа№үа№„аёӮ
3. **Capacity Planning** вҶ’ аёӣаёЈаё°аёЎаёІаё“ EPS а№ҒаёҘаё°аё„аё§аёІаёЎаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаёһаё·а№үаёҷаё—аёөа№ҲаёҲаёұаё”а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ
4. **Compliance** вҶ’ а№ҒаёЎаёӣ log sources аёҒаёұаёҡаёӮа№үаёӯаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё” (PDPA, PCI-DSS, ISO 27001)
5. **Detection Tuning** вҶ’ а№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎа№ӮаёўаёҮаёҒаёұаёҡ MITRE ATT&CK coverage gaps

---

## аёӘаёұаёҚаёҘаёұаёҒаё©аё“а№ҢаёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё°

| аёӘаёұаёҚаёҘаёұаёҒаё©аё“а№Ң | аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё° | аёӘаёҙа№ҲаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё—аёі |
|:---:|:---|:---|
| вң… | а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡа№ҒаёҘаё° parse а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§ | а№„аёЎа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё—аёіаёӯаё°а№„аёЈ |
| вҡ пёҸ | аёҡаёІаёҮаёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷ (а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡа№Ғаё•а№ҲаёўаёұаёҮа№„аёЎа№Ҳ parse/normalize) | аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёһаёұаё’аёҷаёІ parser |
| вқҢ | аёўаёұаёҮа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ | аё§аёІаёҮа№Ғаёңаёҷ integration |
| рҹ”ң | аё§аёІаёҮа№Ғаёңаёҷа№„аё§а№ү / аёҒаёіаёҘаёұаёҮаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | аёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳа№ғаёҷ roadmap |
| N/A | а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёұаёҡаёӘаё аёІаёһа№Ғаё§аё”аёҘа№үаёӯаёЎ | аёӮа№үаёІаёЎ |
