## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/DNS_Tunneling.th.md
# Playbook: DNS Tunneling

**ID**: PB-25
**аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ**: аёӘаё№аёҮ | **аё«аёЎаё§аё”аё«аёЎаё№а№Ҳ**: а№Җаё„аёЈаё·аёӯаёӮа№ҲаёІаёў / аёҒаёІаёЈаёҷаёіаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӯаёӯаёҒ
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1071.004](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1071/004/) (Application Layer Protocol: DNS)
**аё—аёЈаёҙаёҒа№ҖаёҒаёӯаёЈа№Ң**: DNS analytics alert (high entropy), SIEM (excessive NXDOMAIN/TXT), IDS/IPS signature


## аё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң (Post-Incident)

- [ ] аёҡаёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒ DNS-over-HTTPS endpoints аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё•
- [ ] а№ғаёҠа№ү DNS sinkholing аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ C2 domains
- [ ] аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ DNS inspection coverage
- [ ] аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ detection rule аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ high-entropy DNS queries
- [ ] а№ғаёҠа№ү DNS logging а№Җаёқа№үаёІаёЈаё°аё§аёұаёҮаёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаёҷаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ
- [ ] аёҲаёұаё”аё—аёі [Incident Report](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.th.md)

### аёңаёұаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ DNS Tunneling

```mermaid
graph LR
    DNS["рҹ“Ў DNS Query"] --> Analyze{"рҹ”Қ аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң"}
    Analyze -->|Entropy аёӘаё№аёҮ| Suspect["рҹҹ  аёҷа№ҲаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёў"]
    Analyze -->|Query аёўаёІаё§ >50 char| Suspect
    Analyze -->|TXT record аёЎаёІаёҒ| Suspect
    Analyze -->|NXDOMAIN аёЎаёІаёҒ| Suspect
    Suspect --> Correlate["рҹ”— Correlate: host + process"]
    Correlate --> Confirm["рҹ”ҙ аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ Tunnel"]
    style DNS fill:#3498db,color:#fff
    style Suspect fill:#f39c12,color:#fff
    style Confirm fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
```

### аёңаёұаёҮаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷ RPZ Sinkhole

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Host
    participant DNS as DNS Resolver
    participant RPZ as RPZ Zone
    participant SOC
    Host->>DNS: query: data.evil.com
    DNS->>RPZ: аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ RPZ policy
    RPZ-->>DNS: NXDOMAIN (blocked!)
    DNS-->>Host: NXDOMAIN
    RPZ->>SOC: рҹ“Ӣ Log blocked query
    SOC->>SOC: аёЈаё°аёҡаёё infected host
```

---

## аёңаёұаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲ

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ DNS аёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ"] --> Indicator{"рҹ“Ҡ аё•аёұаё§аёҡа№ҲаёҮаёҠаёөа№ү?"}
    Indicator -->|Entropy аёӘаё№аёҮ| Entropy["рҹ”Ө Subdomain аёўаёІаё§/аёӘаёёа№ҲаёЎ"]
    Indicator -->|Query rate аёӘаё№аёҮ| Volume["рҹ“Ҳ аёӣаёЈаёҙаёЎаёІаё“аёӘаё№аёҮаёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ"]
    Indicator -->|TXT/NULL аёӘаё№аёҮ| Type["рҹ“Ӣ Record type аёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ"]
    Entropy --> Domain["рҹҢҗ аёЈаё°аёҡаёё Tunnel Domain"]
    Volume --> Domain
    Type --> Domain
    Domain --> Tool{"рҹ”§ а№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯ?"}
    Tool -->|iodine/dnscat2| Known["вң… Known Tool"]
    Tool -->|Custom/Cobalt Strike| APT["рҹ”ҙ APT Indicator"]
```

---

## 1. аёҒаёІаёЈаё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң

### 1.1 аё•аёұаё§аёҡа№ҲаёҮаёҠаёөа№ү DNS Tunneling

| аё•аёұаё§аёҡа№ҲаёҮаёҠаёөа№ү | аё„а№ҲаёІаёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ | аё„а№ҲаёІаёҷа№ҲаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёў | аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **Subdomain length** | < 30 chars | > 50 chars | DNS analytics |
| **Shannon entropy** | < 3.5 | > 4.0 | DNS analytics |
| **Query rate** (single domain) | < 10/min | > 100/min | SIEM |
| **TXT query volume** | аё•а№Ҳаёі | аёӘаё№аёҮаёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ | DNS logs |
| **NULL/CNAME unusual** | аёҷа№үаёӯаёў | аёЎаёІаёҒ | DNS logs |
| **Domain аёҲаё”аё—аё°а№Җаёҡаёөаёўаёҷа№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ** | вҖ” | < 30 аё§аёұаёҷ | WHOIS / TI |
| **Non-cached queries** | аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ | 100% non-cached | DNS resolver |

### 1.2 а№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯ DNS Tunnel аё—аёөа№ҲаёЈаё№а№үаёҲаёұаёҒ

| а№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯ | аёҘаёұаёҒаё©аё“аё° | аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **iodine** | IP-over-DNS, NULL records | рҹҹ  аёӘаё№аёҮ |
| **dnscat2** | Encrypted C2, TXT records | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ |
| **DNSExfiltrator** | Data exfil, TXT/CNAME | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ |
| **Cobalt Strike DNS** | Beacon over DNS | рҹ”ҙ аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• |
| **SUNBURST** | SolarWinds, CNAME | рҹ”ҙ аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• (APT) |

### 1.3 аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ

| аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈ | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Domain аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№ү tunnel | DNS logs / analytics | вҳҗ |
| Source host(s) | DNS query logs | вҳҗ |
| Process аё—аёөа№Ҳаё—аёі DNS queries | EDR (Sysmon Event 22) | вҳҗ |
| аёӣаёЈаёҙаёЎаёІаё“аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аёөа№ҲаёӘа№ҲаёҮаёӯаёӯаёҒ (аёӣаёЈаё°аёЎаёІаё“) | Query volume Г— payload size | вҳҗ |
| Domain аёҘаёҮаё—аё°а№Җаёҡаёөаёўаёҷа№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯа№„аё«аёЈа№Ҳ? | WHOIS | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёө host аёӯаё·а№Ҳаёҷаё•аёҙаё”аё•а№Ҳаёӯ domain а№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷ? | SIEM pivot | вҳҗ |
| аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӯаё°а№„аёЈаё–аё№аёҒаёӘа№ҲаёҮаёӯаёӯаёҒ? (decode payload) | Base32/Base64 decode | вҳҗ |

---

## 2. аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Block** tunnel domain вҶ’ DNS RPZ / Sinkhole | DNS server | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **Isolate** source host | EDR / Network | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **Kill** tunnel process | EDR | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **Block** DoH/DoT а№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ external resolvers | Firewall | вҳҗ |
| 5 | аё„а№үаёҷаё«аёІ host аёӯаё·а№Ҳаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳ query domain а№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷ | SIEM | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаёіаёҲаёұаё”

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | аёҘаёҡ DNS tunnel tool аёҲаёІаёҒ host | вҳҗ |
| 2 | аёҘаёҡ persistence (scheduled task, startup) | вҳҗ |
| 3 | аё«аёЎаёёаёҷа№Җаё§аёөаёўаёҷ credentials аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёІаёҲаё–аё№аёҒаёӘа№ҲаёҮаёӯаёӯаёҒ | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ malware аёӯаё·а№Ҳаёҷаёҡаёҷ host (EDR full scan) | вҳҗ |

---

## 4. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҹаё·а№үаёҷаёҹаё№

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **аёҡаёұаёҮаё„аёұаёҡ DNS аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷа№Җаё—а№ҲаёІаёҷаёұа№үаёҷ** (block outbound 53/UDP а№„аёЎа№Ҳаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ resolver) | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **Block DoH/DoT** а№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ external providers (8.8.8.8, 1.1.1.1) | вҳҗ |
| 3 | а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” **DNS analytics** / DNS firewall | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аё•аёұа№үаёҮ threshold alerts аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ entropy > 4.0 | вҳҗ |
| 5 | аё•аёҙаё”аё•аёІаёЎ 30 аё§аёұаёҷ | вҳҗ |

---

## 5. а№ҖаёҒаё“аё‘а№ҢаёҒаёІаёЈаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ

| а№ҖаёҮаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аёӮ | аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ |
|:---|:---|
| Data exfiltration аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ | [PB-08 Data Exfiltration](Data_Exfiltration.th.md) + Legal |
| C2 over DNS (Cobalt Strike / APT) | [PB-13 C2](C2_Communication.th.md) + Threat Hunt |
| SUNBURST / nation-state indicators | CISO + Law Enforcement |
| аё«аёҘаёІаёў host а№ғаёҠа№ү tunnel а№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷ | Major Incident |

---

### аёңаёұаёҮ DNS Security Architecture

```mermaid
graph LR
    Client["рҹ’» Client"] --> Internal["рҹ”Ө Internal DNS"]
    Internal --> RPZ["рҹӣЎпёҸ RPZ Filter"]
    RPZ -->|Block| Sinkhole["рҹ•іпёҸ Sinkhole"]
    RPZ -->|Allow| Upstream["рҹҢҗ Upstream DNS"]
    Upstream --> DoH["рҹ”’ DoH/DoT"]
    style RPZ fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style Sinkhole fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
```

### аёңаёұаёҮ DNS-based C2 Indicators

```mermaid
graph TD
    Indicator["рҹ”Қ DNS Indicator"] --> Length["рҹ“Ҹ Query > 50 chars"]
    Indicator --> Entropy["рҹҺІ High entropy"]
    Indicator --> Volume["рҹ“Ҡ High NXDomain"]
    Indicator --> TXT["рҹ“қ Large TXT responses"]
    Length --> Score["вҡ пёҸ Risk Score"]
    Entropy --> Score
    Volume --> Score
    TXT --> Score
    Score --> Alert["рҹҡЁ SOC Alert"]
    style Alert fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
```

## аёҒаёҺаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ (Sigma)

| аёҒаёҺ | а№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң |
|:---|:---|
| DNS Tunneling Detection | [net_dns_tunneling.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/net_dns_tunneling.yml) |
| Network Beaconing Pattern | [net_beaconing.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/net_beaconing.yml) |

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ

- [аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң](../Framework.th.md)
- [PB-13 C2 Communication](C2_Communication.th.md)
- [PB-08 Data Exfiltration](Data_Exfiltration.th.md)

## DNS Tunneling Detection Indicators

| Indicator | Normal | Suspicious | Threshold |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Query length | < 30 chars | > 50 chars | Alert > 60 |
| Subdomain depth | 1-3 levels | > 5 levels | Alert > 4 |
| Query entropy | < 3.0 | > 3.5 | Alert > 3.5 |
| TXT record volume | < 5/hr | > 50/hr | Alert > 20 |
| NXDOMAIN ratio | < 5% | > 30% | Alert > 20% |

### DNS Analysis Tools

| Tool | Purpose | Usage |
|:---|:---|:---|
| dns2tcp | Detect tunneling | Monitor traffic |
| Passive DNS | Historical lookup | Investigate domains |
| Zeek dns.log | Log analysis | Query forensics |
| DNScat2 detection | Known tool fingerprint | Signature match |

### Containment Checklist

| Action | Priority |
|:---|:---|
| Block malicious domain | Immediate |
| Sinkhole DNS queries | Immediate |
| Isolate source host | 15 min |
| Scan for additional hosts | 1 hr |

## References

- [MITRE ATT&CK T1071.004 вҖ” DNS](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1071/004/)
- [SANS вҖ” Detecting DNS Tunneling](https://www.sans.org/white-papers/detecting-dns-tunneling/)


---

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Data_Collection.en.md
# Playbook PB-35: Suspicious Data Collection

**ID**: PB-35
**Severity**: High | **Category**: Collection | **MITRE**: T1560, T1119, T1115, T1074, T1213, T1005

---

## Decision Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ Data Collection Alert"] --> Auth{"рҹ‘Ө Authorized?"}
    Auth -->|Normal role| Close["вң… Close"]
    Auth -->|Unusual| Volume{"рҹ“Ҡ Volume?"}
    Volume -->|Normal| Monitor["рҹ‘ҒпёҸ Monitor 48h"]
    Volume -->|Excessive| Escalate["рҹ”ҙ Escalate Tier 2"]
    Escalate --> Contain["рҹ”Ң Isolate + Investigate"]
```

### Data Staging Process

```mermaid
graph LR
    Collect["рҹ“Ғ Collect Files"] --> Archive["рҹ“Ұ Archive"]
    Archive --> Stage["рҹ“Ӯ Staging Dir"]
    Stage --> Method{"рҹ“Ў Exfil Method?"}
    Method -->|Web| Cloud["вҳҒпёҸ Cloud Upload"]
    Method -->|USB| USB["рҹ’ҫ Removable"]
    Method -->|Email| Mail["рҹ“§ Email"]
    style Collect fill:#3498db,color:#fff
    style Stage fill:#f39c12,color:#fff
    style Cloud fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
```

### UEBA Detection Sequence

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant DLP
    participant UEBA
    participant SOC
    User->>DLP: Access 500+ files
    DLP->>UEBA: Volume anomaly
    UEBA->>UEBA: Compare baseline
    UEBA->>SOC: рҹҡЁ Risk score exceeded
    SOC->>SOC: Review data type + user role
    SOC->>DLP: Block further access
```

## Description

An attacker gathers sensitive data from within the environment before exfiltration. This includes staging files in temporary directories, accessing SharePoint/OneDrive, archiving data with compression tools, clipboard capture, and automated collection scripts. Collection is a precursor to exfiltration and indicates the attacker has achieved their objective access.

## Detection Sources

| Source | Alert Examples |
|:---|:---|
| **EDR** | Suspicious archiver usage (7z, rar, zip from temp dirs), data staging |
| **SIEM** | Bulk file access, unusual SharePoint/OneDrive downloads |
| **DLP** | Sensitive data in archives, clipboard monitoring alerts |
| **Cloud** | Mass document downloads from Teams/SharePoint/Google Drive |
| **Network** | Large internal data transfers, staging to file shares |

## Triage Checklist

| # | Step | Action |
|:---:|:---|:---|
| 1 | **Identify the user** | Who is collecting data? Authorized role? |
| 2 | **Check data type** | What files/data are being accessed? Sensitive? Classified? |
| 3 | **Volume** | How much data? Unusual volume for this user/role? |
| 4 | **Staging** | Are files being copied to temp directories, USB, or cloud? |
| 5 | **Tools** | Compression tools used? (7z, rar, WinRAR, tar with password) |
| 6 | **Timeline** | Does this correlate with discovery or credential access alerts? |

## Response Actions

### Tier 1

1. Document the user, files accessed, volume, and destination
2. Check if user's role justifies the data access pattern
3. If unauthorized volume/type вҶ’ Escalate to Tier 2

### Tier 2

4. Review full file access history for the user (past 30 days)
5. Check for preceding compromise indicators
6. Investigate staging locations (temp dirs, file shares, cloud storage)
7. If confirmed malicious:
   - **Isolate** the source host
   - **Revoke** cloud/file share access
   - **Preserve** staging artifacts for forensics
   - **Block** egress for the source IP

### Tier 3

8. Full forensic analysis of staging directories
9. Analyze archives for content classification
10. Assess data breach scope вҖ” what data was collected?
11. Coordinate with Legal if PII/sensitive data involved
12. Update DLP rules to detect similar patterns

## Containment

| Action | Method | Approval |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Isolate source host | EDR network isolation | SOC Lead |
| Revoke access | SharePoint/OneDrive/IAM | SOC Lead |
| Block egress | Firewall rules for source IP | SOC Lead + Network |
| Preserve evidence | Forensic image of staging location | IR Lead |
| Disable auto-forward rules | Exchange admin / Google admin | SOC Lead |

## Eradication

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Remove staging archives and temp files | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Delete archiving tools not part of baseline | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Remove unauthorized scripts (PowerShell, Python) | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Clear scheduled tasks created for data collection | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Revoke OAuth tokens used for cloud access | вҳҗ |
| 6 | Remove malicious email forwarding rules | вҳҗ |

## IoC Collection

| Type | Value | Source |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Source host / IP | | EDR / SIEM |
| User account | | AD / IAM logs |
| Archive file name | | File system / DLP |
| Archive hash (SHA256) | | Forensic analysis |
| Staging directory path | | EDR telemetry |
| Destination (upload URL / email) | | Proxy / email logs |
| Volume of data collected (MB/GB) | | DLP / Cloud audit |
| Tools used | | Process logs |

## Evidence Checklist

| Evidence Type | What to Collect | Source | Why It Matters |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Collection evidence | Files accessed, queries run, archive names, staging paths, timestamps | EDR / DLP / DB audit | Shows exactly what was collected and prepared |
| User and access evidence | User role, source host, privileges, app/session context | IAM / SIEM / endpoint logs | Distinguishes misuse from approved business access |
| Tool evidence | Archivers, scripts, sync tools, clipboard/screenshot tools | Process logs / EDR | Identifies the collection method and detection gap |
| Destination evidence | Upload URL, email forwarding, removable media, cloud sync | Proxy / email / USB / cloud logs | Indicates whether collection was preparing for exfiltration |
| Data sensitivity evidence | Data labels, record counts, customer/PII/IP scope | DLP / data inventory | Supports legal and executive decisions |

## Minimum Telemetry Required

| Telemetry Source | Required For | Priority | Blind Spot If Missing |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| Endpoint and process telemetry | Archiving, staging, file access, removable media | Required | Cannot see local data collection behavior |
| DLP and data classification telemetry | Sensitive content, labels, record counts | Required | Business and legal impact remain unclear |
| Identity, share, and cloud-access logs | Who accessed which repositories and when | Required | Cannot attribute collection activity correctly |
| Database and application audit logs | Structured-data export and repository access | Recommended | Large non-file-based collection may be missed |
| Proxy, email, and cloud-sync telemetry | Preparation for outbound movement | Recommended | Staging may be seen but next-step intent remains weak |

## False Positive and Tuning Guide

| Scenario | Why It Looks Suspicious | How to Validate | Tuning Action | Escalate If |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Approved bulk export or reporting job | Large archives and file access can look malicious | Confirm report owner, schedule, destination, and ticket | Tune for approved jobs, accounts, and paths only | Job collects unrelated sensitive data or uses new destinations |
| Backup or migration activity | Copying and compression may resemble staging | Validate service account, maintenance window, and source repo | Lower severity for documented backup/migration workflows | Activity occurs from user endpoints or outside approved windows |
| eDiscovery or legal hold | Large mailbox/file exports can look like theft | Confirm case ID and legal owner | Suppress only legal workflows with recorded approval | Export leaves controlled storage or exceeds case scope |
| Developer or analyst local dataset prep | Normal packaging of test data may be noisy | Validate project owner and sanitized-data scope | Tune for approved lab paths and sanitized datasets | Real production data or personal storage is involved |

## Escalation Criteria

| Condition | Escalate To |
|:---|:---|
| PII / customer data in staging archive | Legal + DPO (PDPA) |
| > 1 GB of data archived/staged | SOC Lead + IR |
| Source code or trade secrets identified | CISO + Legal |
| Collection followed by confirmed exfiltration | Tier 3 + CISO |
| Multiple departments' data accessed | SOC Manager + Data Owners |
| Executive/C-level data targeted | CISO + CEO |

## Recovery

- [ ] Restore any files inadvertently deleted during containment
- [ ] Re-enable user account after credential reset and access review
- [ ] Verify DLP policies properly cover staging paths
- [ ] Confirm no data reached external destinations
- [ ] Review and re-baseline file access permissions
- [ ] Re-enable disabled services after threat is removed

## Post-Incident

- [ ] Update DLP rules with new staging path patterns observed
- [ ] Add file archiver monitoring to EDR policy
- [ ] Conduct user access review for affected data repositories
- [ ] Create Sigma rule for bulk file access patterns
- [ ] Review data classification labels for affected data
- [ ] Document findings in [Incident Report](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.en.md)

## Key Indicators

| Indicator | Example |
|:---|:---|
| **Archiver Tools** | `7z a -p`, `rar a -hp`, `tar -czf`, `Compress-Archive` (PowerShell) |
| **Staging Paths** | `C:\Temp\`, `C:\Users\Public\`, `/tmp/`, `%APPDATA%\Temp\` |
| **Bulk Access** | 100+ files accessed in < 10 min, SharePoint bulk download |
| **Cloud** | OneDrive sync of entire department folder, Google Takeout |
| **Clipboard** | Clipboard capture tools, screen recording software |
| **Email** | Mass email forwarding rules, auto-forward to external addresses |

## Data Classification Impact

| Data Type | Risk | Notification |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **PII (General)** | High | DPO within 72 hours |
| **PII (Sensitive)** | Critical | DPO immediately, PDPC notification |
| **Financial** | High | CFO, Legal |
| **Trade Secrets** | Critical | CEO, Legal |
| **Source Code** | High | CTO, Engineering Lead |

### DLP Architecture

```mermaid
graph LR
    Endpoint["рҹ’» Endpoint DLP"] --> SIEM["рҹ“Ҡ SIEM"]
    Network["рҹҢҗ Network DLP"] --> SIEM
    Cloud["вҳҒпёҸ Cloud DLP"] --> SIEM
    Email["рҹ“§ Email DLP"] --> SIEM
    SIEM --> SOC["рҹҺҜ SOC Alert"]
    style Endpoint fill:#3498db,color:#fff
    style Cloud fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style SOC fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
```

### Insider Data Theft Indicators

```mermaid
graph TD
    UEBA["рҹ”Қ UEBA"] --> Type{"рҹ“Ӣ Indicator?"}
    Type --> Resign["рҹ“қ Upcoming resignation"]
    Type --> Hours["рҹ•җ Off-hours access"]
    Type --> Volume["рҹ“Ҡ Excessive downloads"]
    Type --> USB["рҹ’ҫ USB data copy"]
    Resign --> Risk["вҡ пёҸ High Risk"]
    Hours --> Risk
    Volume --> Risk
    USB --> Risk
    style Risk fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
```

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Data_Collection.th.md
# Playbook: Data Collection / аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҒа№ҮаёҡаёЈаё§аёҡаёЈаё§аёЎаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ

**ID**: PB-35
**аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ**: аёӘаё№аёҮ | **аё«аёЎаё§аё”аё«аёЎаё№а№Ҳ**: аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӣаёҘаёӯаё”аё аёұаёўаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1005](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1005/) (Data from Local System), [T1039](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1039/) (Data from Network Shared Drive), [T1213](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1213/) (Data from Information Repositories)
**аё—аёЈаёҙаёҒа№ҖаёҒаёӯаёЈа№Ң**: DLP alert, UEBA (unusual file access), EDR (archive creation), insider threat indicator


## аё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң (Post-Incident)

- [ ] аёӯаёұаёһа№Җаё”аё— DLP rules аё•аёІаёЎ staging path patterns аё—аёөа№Ҳаёһаёҡ
- [ ] а№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎ file archiver monitoring а№ғаёҷ EDR policy
- [ ] аё—аёі user access review аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ data repositories
- [ ] аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ Sigma rule аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ bulk file access patterns
- [ ] аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ data classification labels
- [ ] аёҲаёұаё”аё—аёі [Incident Report](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.th.md)

### аёңаёұаёҮаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷ Data Staging

```mermaid
graph LR
    Access["рҹ“Ғ Access Data"] --> Copy["рҹ“Ӣ Copy/Download"]
    Copy --> Stage["рҹ“Ұ Stage (archive)"]
    Stage --> Encrypt["рҹ”’ Encrypt"]
    Encrypt --> Exfil["рҹ“Ө Exfiltrate"]
    style Access fill:#3498db,color:#fff
    style Stage fill:#f39c12,color:#fff
    style Exfil fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
```

### аёңаёұаёҮ UEBA Detection

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant User as аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү
    participant UEBA
    participant SOC
    participant HR
    User->>User: Download 500 files (аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ = 10/аё§аёұаёҷ)
    UEBA->>SOC: рҹҡЁ Anomaly score аёӘаё№аёҮ
    SOC->>HR: аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаёҒаёіаёҘаёұаёҮаёҘаёІаёӯаёӯаёҒ?
    HR-->>SOC: а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ вҖ” last day аёһаёЈаёёа№ҲаёҮаёҷаёөа№ү!
    SOC->>SOC: рҹ”ҙ а№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎ monitoring + preserve
```

---

## аёңаёұаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲ

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ Data Collection Alert"] --> Source{"рҹ“Қ а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ?"}
    Source -->|Local Files| Local["рҹ’» Local System"]
    Source -->|Network Shares| Share["рҹ“Ғ File Shares"]
    Source -->|SharePoint/Teams| Cloud["вҳҒпёҸ Cloud Repos"]
    Source -->|Database| DB["рҹ—„пёҸ Database Query"]
    Local --> Intent{"рҹӨ” а№ҖаёҲаё•аёҷаёІ?"}
    Share --> Intent
    Cloud --> Intent
    DB --> Intent
    Intent -->|Business Need| FP["вң… а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№Ҳа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң"]
    Intent -->|аёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ| Staging{"рҹ“Ұ Staging for Exfil?"}
    Staging -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| Exfil["рҹ”ҙ аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ PB-08"]
    Staging -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№Ғаёҷа№Ҳа№ғаёҲ| Monitor["рҹҹ  а№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎ Monitoring"]
```

---

## 1. аёҒаёІаёЈаё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң

### 1.1 а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёұаёҒаё–аё№аёҒа№ҖаёҒа№ҮаёҡаёЈаё§аёҡаёЈаё§аёЎ

| а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮ | аё•аёұаё§аёҡа№ҲаёҮаёҠаёөа№ү | MITRE | а№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **Local system** | Archive creation (7z, rar, zip), large copy | T1005 | EDR / DLP |
| **Network shares** | Bulk file access, recursive copy | T1039 | File audit / DLP |
| **SharePoint / Teams / Confluence** | Bulk download, API scraping | T1213 | CASB / Cloud audit |
| **Email / Mailbox** | Export PST, search+download | T1114 | DLP / Exchange audit |
| **Database** | Large query, dump export (pg_dump, mysqldump) | T1005 | DB audit logs |
| **Source code repo** | `git clone` аёӮаёҷаёІаё”а№ғаё«аёҚа№Ҳ, API download | T1213 | SCM audit |
| **Screenshots / clipboard** | Screen capture tools, clipboard access | T1113 | EDR |

### 1.2 Staging Indicators

| аё•аёұаё§аёҡа№ҲаёҮаёҠаёөа№ү | аё•аёұаё§аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮ |
|:---|:---|
| **Archive creation** | 7z, rar, zip аёӮаёҷаёІаё”а№ғаё«аёҚа№Ҳа№ғаёҷ temp/desktop |
| **Encryption** | rar -p, 7z -pPASSWORD (password-protected) |
| **Rename** | а№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҷаёҷаёІаёЎаёӘаёҒаёёаёҘа№„аёҹаёҘа№Ңа№Җаёһаё·а№Ҳаёӯаё«аёҘаёөаёҒ DLP |
| **Staging directory** | аёўа№үаёІаёўа№„аёҹаёҘа№Ңа№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ temp, recycle bin, hidden folder |
| **Cloud upload prep** | Copy to cloud sync folder (Dropbox, GDrive) |

### 1.3 аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ

| аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈ | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| а№ғаё„аёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ? | DLP / UEBA / AD logs | вҳҗ |
| аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӯаё°а№„аёЈ? аёҲаёіа№ҒаёҷаёҒаёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё— (PII, IP, financial) | Data classification | вҳҗ |
| аёӣаёЈаёҙаёЎаёІаё“аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ (аёҲаёіаёҷаё§аёҷа№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң, аёӮаёҷаёІаё”) | File audit | вҳҗ |
| аёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙа№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаё—аёөаёўаёҡаёҒаёұаёҡ baseline? | UEBA | вҳҗ |
| а№Җаёӣа№ҮаёҷаёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаё«аёҷаё¶а№ҲаёҮаёӮаёӯаёҮаё«аёҷа№үаёІаё—аёөа№ҲаёҒаёІаёЈаёҮаёІаёҷ? | Manager interview | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёө staging (archive, encrypt, copy to temp)? | EDR / DLP | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёө exfiltration аё•аёІаёЎаёЎаёІ? (upload, USB, email) | DLP / CASB | вҳҗ |
| аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаёҒаёіаёҘаёұаёҮаёҲаё°аёҘаёІаёӯаёӯаёҒ/аё–аё№аёҒ PIP? | HR check | вҳҗ |

---

## 2. аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **а№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎ DLP monitoring** аёҡаёҷаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү/host | DLP / CASB | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **аёҲаёіаёҒаёұаё”** network share / cloud access аёҠаёұа№Ҳаё§аё„аёЈаёІаё§ | IAM / CASB | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **Block** USB / external upload (аё–а№үаёІаёЎаёө staging) | EDR / GPO | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **Preserve** evidence (copy of staged files, logs) | Forensics | вҳҗ |
| 5 | аё«аёІаёҒа№ҖаёҲаё•аёҷаёІаёЈа№үаёІаёўаёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ вҶ’ **аёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө** | IAM | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаёіаёҲаёұаё”

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | аёҘаёҡ staged archives / copies | вҳҗ |
| 2 | аёҘаёҡ collection tools (аё–а№үаёІа№ғаёҠа№ү automated tool) | вҳҗ |
| 3 | аёҒаё№а№үаё„аё·аёҷ access permissions аё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒа№ҒаёҒа№үа№„аёӮ | вҳҗ |

---

## 4. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҹаё·а№үаёҷаёҹаё№

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | а№ғаёҠа№ү **DLP content-aware policies** (PII, financial, IP) | вҳҗ |
| 2 | а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” **UEBA** аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ abnormal file access patterns | вҳҗ |
| 3 | аё•аёұа№үаёҮ **data classification + labeling** (auto + manual) | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аёҲаёіаёҒаёұаё” **least privilege** access аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ sensitive repos | вҳҗ |
| 5 | а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” **file access auditing** аёҡаёҷ critical shares/repos | вҳҗ |
| 6 | а№ғаёҠа№ү **IRM/DRM** аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аёөа№ҲаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚаёЎаёІаёҒ | вҳҗ |

---

## 5. Evidence Checklist

| аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ | аёӘаёҙа№ҲаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ | а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёңаёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҒа№ҮаёҡаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | file аё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ, query аё—аёөа№ҲаёЈаёұаёҷ, archive name, staging path, timestamp | EDR / DLP / DB audit | а№ғаёҠа№үаё”аё№аё§а№ҲаёІаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӯаё°а№„аёЈаё–аё№аёҒа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡа№ҒаёҘаё°а№Җаё•аёЈаёөаёўаёЎа№„аё§а№ү |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаё”а№үаёІаёҷаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үа№ҒаёҘаё°аёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ң | user role, source host, privilege, app/session context | IAM / SIEM / endpoint logs | а№ғаёҠа№үа№ҒаёўаёҒ misuse аёӯаёӯаёҒаёҲаёІаёҒаёҮаёІаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёӮаёӯаёҮа№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯ | archiver, script, sync tool, clipboard/screenshot tool | Process logs / EDR | а№ғаёҠа№үаёЈаё°аёҡаёёаё§аёҙаёҳаёөаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҒа№ҮаёҡаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘа№ҒаёҘаё° detection gap |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёӣаёҘаёІаёўаё—аёІаёҮ | upload URL, email forwarding, removable media, cloud sync | Proxy / email / USB / cloud logs | а№ғаёҠа№үаё”аё№а№ҖаёҲаё•аёҷаёІаё§а№ҲаёІаёҒаёіаёҘаёұаёҮа№Җаё•аёЈаёөаёўаёЎ exfiltration аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӯа№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аё«аё§аёӮаёӯаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | data label, record count, customer/PII/IP scope | DLP / data inventory | а№ғаёҠа№үаёЈаёӯаёҮаёЈаёұаёҡ legal а№ҒаёҘаё° executive decision |

---

## 6. Minimum Telemetry Required

| а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮ Telemetry | а№ғаёҠа№үа№Җаёһаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёӯаё°а№„аёЈ | аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ | Blind Spot аё–а№үаёІа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| Endpoint а№ҒаёҘаё° process telemetry | аё”аё№ archiving, staging, file access, removable media | Required | аёЎаёӯаёҮа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№Җаё«а№ҮаёҷаёһаёӨаё•аёҙаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎ collection аёҡаёҷа№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ |
| DLP а№ҒаёҘаё° data classification telemetry | аё”аё№ sensitive content, label, record count | Required | аёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡаё—аёІаёҮаёҳаёёаёЈаёҒаёҙаёҲа№ҒаёҘаё°аёҒаёҺаё«аёЎаёІаёўа№„аёЎа№ҲаёҠаёұаё” |
| Identity, share, а№ҒаёҘаё° cloud-access logs | аё”аё№аё§а№ҲаёІа№ғаё„аёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ repository а№„аё«аёҷ а№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯа№„аёЈ | Required | аёңаё№аёҒ collection activity аёҒаёұаёҡаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№ү |
| Database а№ҒаёҘаё° application audit logs | аё”аё№ structured-data export а№ҒаёҘаё° repo access | Recommended | аёһаёҘаёІаё” collection аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№Ҳа№„аёҹаёҘа№ҢаёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ |
| Proxy, email, а№ҒаёҘаё° cloud-sync telemetry | аё”аё№аёӘаёұаёҚаёҚаёІаё“а№Җаё•аёЈаёөаёўаёЎ outbound movement | Recommended | а№Җаё«а№Үаёҷ staging а№Ғаё•а№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№Җаё«а№Үаёҷ intent аёҠаёұаё” |

---

## 7. False Positive а№ҒаёҘаё° Tuning Guide

| Scenario | аё—аёіа№„аёЎаёҲаё¶аёҮаё”аё№аёҷа№ҲаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёў | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | Tuning Action | аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| аёҮаёІаёҷ export аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ reporting аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | archive а№ғаё«аёҚа№Ҳа№ҒаёҘаё° file access аёҲаёіаёҷаё§аёҷаёЎаёІаёҒаё”аё№а№Җаё«аёЎаё·аёӯаёҷ malicious | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ report owner, schedule, destination, а№ҒаёҘаё° ticket | tune а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё° job/account/path аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | а№„аёӣа№Ғаё•аё°аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӯа№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аё«аё§аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№ғаёҠа№үаёӣаёҘаёІаёўаё—аёІаёҮа№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ |
| backup аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ migration activity | copy а№ҒаёҘаё° compression аё”аё№а№Җаё«аёЎаё·аёӯаёҷ staging | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ service account, maintenance window, а№ҒаёҘаё° source repo | аёҘаё” severity аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ workflow аё—аёөа№Ҳ documented | activity а№ҖаёҒаёҙаё”аёҲаёІаёҒ user endpoint аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёҷаёӯаёҒа№Җаё§аёҘаёІ |
| eDiscovery аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ legal hold | bulk export аёӯаёІаёҲаё”аё№а№Җаё«аёЎаё·аёӯаёҷ data theft | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ case ID а№ҒаёҘаё° legal owner | suppress а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё° workflow аё—аёІаёҮаёҒаёҺаё«аёЎаёІаёўаё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | export аёӯаёӯаёҒаёҷаёӯаёҒ controlled storage аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№ҖаёҒаёҙаёҷ scope |
| developer/analyst prep dataset а№ғаёҷ lab | аёҒаёІаёЈа№Ғаёһа№ҮаёҒаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аё”аёӘаёӯаёҡаёӯаёІаёҲ noisy | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ project owner а№ҒаёҘаё°аёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё• sanitized-data | tune а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё° lab path а№ҒаёҘаё° sanitized dataset | аёЎаёө production data аёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮаё«аёЈаё·аёӯ personal storage а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёЎаёІа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ |

---

## 8. а№ҖаёҒаё“аё‘а№ҢаёҒаёІаёЈаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ

| а№ҖаёҮаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аёӮ | аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ |
|:---|:---|
| Staging + exfiltration аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ | [PB-08 Data Exfiltration](Data_Exfiltration.th.md) |
| Insider threat аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ | [PB-14 Insider Threat](Insider_Threat.th.md) + HR |
| PII / customer data аё–аё№аёҒа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ | Legal + DPO (PDPA 72 аёҠаёЎ.) |
| Source code / IP аё–аё№аёҒ collect | CISO + Legal |
| аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаёҒаёіаёҘаёұаёҮаёҘаёІаёӯаёӯаёҒ + bulk download | HR + SOC Lead аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө |

---

### аёңаёұаёҮ DLP Architecture

```mermaid
graph LR
    Endpoint["рҹ’» Endpoint DLP"] --> SIEM["рҹ“Ҡ SIEM"]
    Network["рҹҢҗ Network DLP"] --> SIEM
    Cloud["вҳҒпёҸ Cloud DLP"] --> SIEM
    Email["рҹ“§ Email DLP"] --> SIEM
    SIEM --> SOC["рҹҺҜ SOC Alert"]
    style Endpoint fill:#3498db,color:#fff
    style Cloud fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style SOC fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
```

### аёңаёұаёҮ Insider Data Theft Indicators

```mermaid
graph TD
    UEBA["рҹ”Қ UEBA"] --> Type{"рҹ“Ӣ Indicator?"}
    Type --> Resign["рҹ“қ аёҘаёІаёӯаёӯаёҒа№ҖаёЈа№Үаё§а№Ҷ"]
    Type --> Hours["рҹ•җ а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮаёҷаёӯаёҒа№Җаё§аёҘаёІ"]
    Type --> Volume["рҹ“Ҡ Download аёЎаёІаёҒ"]
    Type --> USB["рҹ’ҫ USB аё–а№ҲаёІаёўаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ"]
    Resign --> Risk["вҡ пёҸ High Risk"]
    Hours --> Risk
    Volume --> Risk
    USB --> Risk
    style Risk fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
```

## аёҒаёҺаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ (Sigma)

| аёҒаёҺ | а№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң |
|:---|:---|
| Data Collection and Staging | [sigma/win_data_collection_staging.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/win_data_collection_staging.yml) |
| Bulk File Copy to USB | [file_bulk_usb_copy.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/file_bulk_usb_copy.yml) |

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ

- [аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң](../Framework.th.md)
- [PB-08 Data Exfiltration](Data_Exfiltration.th.md)
- [PB-14 Insider Threat](Insider_Threat.th.md)

## Data Staging Detection

| Indicator | Source | Detection |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Bulk file copy to temp | EDR file events | Volume threshold |
| Archive creation (zip/rar) | Process monitoring | New archiver process |
| Clipboard data hoarding | DLP | Content analysis |
| Database export | DB audit logs | Large SELECT queries |
| Screenshot capture | EDR | Screen capture tools |

### Data Collection TTPs (MITRE ATT&CK)

| Technique | ID | Detection Priority |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Data from Local System | T1005 | High |
| Data from Network Share | T1039 | High |
| Input Capture | T1056 | Medium |
| Screen Capture | T1113 | Medium |
| Archive Collected Data | T1560 | Critical |
| Data Staged | T1074 | Critical |

### Data Classification Impact

| Data Type | Risk If Collected | Response |
|:---|:---|:---|
| PII/PHI | Critical | PDPA notification |
| Financial | High | Legal + audit |
| IP/Trade secrets | Critical | Legal + forensics |
| Internal docs | Medium | Assess scope |

### Collection Method Indicators

| Method | Log Source | Alert |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Bulk file copy | EDR | Volume threshold |
| Archive creation | Process log | Archiver from user |
| DB export | DB audit | Large query result |

## References

- [MITRE ATT&CK вҖ” Collection](https://attack.mitre.org/tactics/TA0009/)


---

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Data_Exfiltration.en.md
# Playbook: Data Exfiltration

**ID**: PB-08
**Severity**: Critical | **Category**: Data Protection
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1048](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1048/) (Exfiltration Over Alternative Protocol), [T1567](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1567/) (Exfiltration Over Web Service), [T1041](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1041/) (Exfiltration Over C2 Channel)
**Trigger**: DLP alert, Netflow anomaly, UEBA, Proxy/Cloud alert, EDR large file operation

### Detection by Channel

```mermaid
graph TD
    DLP["рҹ”Қ DLP Engine"] --> Ch{"рҹ“Ў Channel?"}
    Ch -->|Web Upload| Proxy["рҹҢҗ Proxy / CASB"]
    Ch -->|Email| Mail["рҹ“§ Mail Gateway"]
    Ch -->|USB| Endpoint["рҹ’» Endpoint DLP"]
    Ch -->|DNS| DNS["рҹ”Ө DNS Analytics"]
    Proxy --> Alert["рҹҡЁ Alert SOC"]
    Mail --> Alert
    Endpoint --> Alert
    DNS --> Alert
    Alert --> Investigate["рҹ”Һ Investigate"]
```

### Data Impact Assessment

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant SOC
    participant DLP
    participant Legal
    participant DPO
    SOC->>DLP: What data was exfiltrated?
    DLP-->>SOC: PII вҖ” 500 records
    SOC->>Legal: рҹ“Ӣ Incident report
    Legal->>DPO: PDPA notification required?
    DPO-->>Legal: Yes вҖ” within 72 hours
    Legal->>SOC: Prepare notification report
```

---

## Decision Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ DLP / Anomaly Alert"] --> Classify{"рҹ“„ Data Classification?"}
    Classify -->|L1 Public| FP["вң… Low Risk вҖ” Monitor"]
    Classify -->|L2 Internal| Review["вҡ пёҸ Review Context"]
    Classify -->|L3 Confidential| Urgent["рҹ”ҙ Urgent Investigation"]
    Classify -->|L4 Restricted/PII| Critical["рҹҡЁ Critical вҖ” Notify Legal"]
    Review --> Dest{"рҹҢҗ Destination?"}
    Urgent --> Dest
    Critical --> Dest
    Dest -->|Corporate/Approved| Context["Check Business Justification"]
    Dest -->|Personal Cloud/Unknown| Block["рҹӣ‘ Block + Investigate"]
    Dest -->|Known Malicious| Block
    Context -->|Justified| Close["Close with Documentation"]
    Context -->|Unjustified| Block
    Block --> Isolate["рҹ”Ң Isolate Source"]
```

---

## 1. Analysis (Triage)

### 1.1 Initial Assessment

| Check | How | Done |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Data volume transferred | DLP / Proxy logs вҖ” anomalous for this user? | вҳҗ |
| Destination IP/domain | Trusted or unknown? Check reputation | вҳҗ |
| Data classification | PII, financial, IP, credentials? | вҳҗ |
| Protocol used | HTTP/S, FTP, DNS tunneling, USB? | вҳҗ |
| User context | Normal behavior or first-time transfer? | вҳҗ |

### 1.2 Exfiltration Method Identification

| Method | Detection Source | MITRE ID |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Upload to personal cloud (Google Drive, Dropbox) | Proxy / CASB | T1567.002 |
| Email to external address | DLP / Email Gateway | T1048.003 |
| USB/removable media | DLP / Endpoint agent | T1052.001 |
| DNS tunneling | DNS logs (high entropy/length) | T1048.001 |
| FTP/SCP/SFTP to external server | Firewall / IDS | T1048 |
| Encoded/encrypted upload | Proxy (content inspection) | T1048.002 |
| Cloud sync (OneDrive, iCloud) | CASB / Endpoint | T1567 |
| Print to PDF / screenshot | Endpoint monitoring | T1113 |

### 1.3 Scope Assessment

- [ ] Total volume of data transferred (MB/GB)?
- [ ] How long has the exfiltration been occurring?
- [ ] Exactly which files/databases were accessed?
- [ ] Was data staged before exfiltration? ([PB-35](Data_Collection.en.md))
- [ ] Is this insider threat or external attacker?
- [ ] Multiple users/endpoints involved?

---

## 2. Containment

### 2.1 Immediate Actions (within 10 minutes)

| # | Action | Tool | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Block destination** IP/domain at firewall/proxy | Firewall, Proxy | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **Isolate source** endpoint from network | EDR | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **Disable user account** (if user-driven) | AD / IdP | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **Revoke active sessions** | IdP | вҳҗ |
| 5 | **Preserve evidence** вҖ” snapshot/image the source system | Forensics | вҳҗ |

### 2.2 Additional Containment

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Block USB/removable media on endpoint (if USB method) | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Disable user's cloud sync application | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Place legal hold on user's mailbox and cloud storage | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Block similar transfers org-wide (if widespread) | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. Eradication

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Remove any staging files (RAR/ZIP archives) from source | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Scan for persistence / backdoors left by attacker | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Remove any unauthorized scripts or scheduled tasks | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Verify no additional exfiltration channels remain | вҳҗ |

---

## 4. Recovery & Legal

### 4.1 Damage Assessment

| Question | Answer |
|:---|:---|
| What data was exfiltrated? | [File list / description] |
| Classification level? | L1 / L2 / L3 / L4 |
| Number of records (if PII)? | |
| Business impact? | |
| Regulatory notification required? | PDPA (72h) / GDPR / Other |

### 4.2 Notification

| Stakeholder | When | Condition |
|:---|:---|:---|
| SOC Lead | Immediately | All confirmed cases |
| Legal / Compliance | Within 1 hour | If L3+ data or PII involved |
| CISO | Within 2 hours | If L4 data or regulatory impact |
| Data Protection Officer | Within 24 hours | If PII of data subjects |
| Regulatory authority | Within 72 hours | If PDPA/GDPR breach confirmed |
| Affected individuals | Per legal guidance | If personal data exposed |

---

## 5. IoC Collection

| Type | Value | Source |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Destination IP(s) | | Firewall / Proxy |
| Destination Domain(s) | | DNS / Proxy |
| Source Host | | DLP / EDR |
| Source User | | DLP / SIEM |
| Protocol / Port | | Firewall |
| File Names | | DLP |
| Data Volume | | Proxy / DLP |
| Staging Path | | EDR |

---

## 6. Evidence Checklist

| Evidence Type | What to Collect | Source | Why It Matters |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Data impact evidence | File names, data classifications, record counts, dataset owners | DLP / data inventory | Determines legal and business impact |
| Transfer evidence | Destination IP/domain, protocol, port, transfer times, transfer volume | Proxy / firewall / NetFlow | Proves exfiltration path and scope |
| User and host evidence | Source user, endpoint, process, removable media, cloud sync client | EDR / IAM / endpoint control | Identifies whether it was insider-driven or attacker-driven |
| Staging evidence | Archive files, staging folders, compression or encryption artifacts | EDR / forensic tools | Shows preparation before exfiltration |
| Notification evidence | Legal review notes, DPO decision, affected-party list | Case record / legal workflow | Supports regulatory and customer communication |

---

## 7. Minimum Telemetry Required

| Telemetry Source | Required For | Priority | Blind Spot If Missing |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| DLP and data classification telemetry | Sensitive content match, owner, record count, policy trigger | Required | Cannot prove data sensitivity or notification impact |
| Proxy, firewall, and NetFlow logs | Transfer destination, protocol, volume, session timing | Required | Cannot reconstruct the exfiltration path or quantify loss |
| Endpoint telemetry | Staging folders, compression tools, removable media, sync clients | Required | Cannot confirm how data was prepared or moved locally |
| Identity and access logs | User attribution, session context, privilege level | Required | Cannot separate insider misuse from attacker-driven activity |
| Asset and legal case records | System criticality, dataset ownership, notification workflow | Recommended | Business impact and breach response decisions become inconsistent |

---

## 8. False Positive and Tuning Guide

| Scenario | Why It Looks Suspicious | How to Validate | Tuning Action | Escalate If |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Approved backup or replication job | Large outbound data volume resembles exfiltration | Confirm destination, service account, schedule, and backup job ID | Exclude approved backup destinations and service identities only | Volume targets a new destination or occurs outside the scheduled window |
| Authorized business bulk transfer | Finance, legal, or engineering may legitimately move large datasets | Validate ticket, dataset owner, encryption method, and recipient | Raise thresholds only for approved transfer workflows and users | Data classification, recipient, or transfer tool differs from approval |
| Cloud sync or collaboration client | Sync bursts can look like mass upload or staging | Confirm approved client, tenant, and directory path | Tune for sanctioned client signatures and corporate tenants | Personal tenant, removable media, or archive staging is involved |
| Security or eDiscovery export | Legal hold and investigation exports can trigger DLP alerts | Validate case ID, custodian, and export operator | Suppress only for approved eDiscovery workflows with owner review | Export scope exceeds case need or destination is not controlled |

---

## 9. Escalation Criteria

| Condition | Escalate To |
|:---|:---|
| L3/L4 data confirmed exfiltrated | CISO + Legal |
| PII of > 500 individuals | DPO + Regulatory |
| Insider threat suspected | HR + Legal + [PB-14](Insider_Threat.en.md) |
| External attacker (APT) | Threat Intel + External IR |
| Multiple endpoints involved | Major Incident |
| Data staging found | Cross-reference [PB-35](Data_Collection.en.md) |

---

### Exfiltration Channels

```mermaid
graph TD
    Exfil["рҹ“Ө Exfiltration"] --> Web["рҹҢҗ Web upload"]
    Exfil --> Email["рҹ“§ Email attach"]
    Exfil --> Cloud["вҳҒпёҸ Cloud sync"]
    Exfil --> USB["рҹ’ҫ USB"]
    Exfil --> DNS["рҹ”Ө DNS tunnel"]
    Web --> DLP["рҹӣЎпёҸ DLP inspect"]
    Email --> DLP
    Cloud --> DLP
    USB --> EDR["рҹ”Қ EDR block"]
    DNS --> NDR["рҹ“Ў NDR detect"]
    style Exfil fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style DLP fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
```

### Data Loss Prevention Pipeline

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant DLP
    participant SOC
    participant Manager
    User->>DLP: Upload 500MB to Google Drive
    DLP->>DLP: Scan: PII detected!
    DLP-->>User: вқҢ Blocked
    DLP->>SOC: рҹҡЁ Alert: PII exfiltration attempt
    SOC->>Manager: Notify team lead
```

## Detection Rules (Sigma)

| Rule | File |
|:---|:---|
| Large Upload to External IP | [net_large_upload.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/net_large_upload.yml) |
| Bulk File Copy to USB | [file_bulk_usb_copy.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/file_bulk_usb_copy.yml) |
| Data Collection and Staging | [sigma/win_data_collection_staging.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/win_data_collection_staging.yml) |
