## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Email_Account_Takeover.th.md
# Playbook: аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮ Email Account Takeover

**ID**: PB-42
**аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ**: аёӘаё№аёҮ | **аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—**: Collection / Impact
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1114](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1114/) (Email Collection), [T1114.003](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1114/003/) (Email Forwarding Rule)
**Trigger**: User аёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷ (аёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёӘа№ҲаёҮ), SIEM (inbox rule а№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ), M365/Google alert (impossible travel login а№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ mail), DLP (аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚаё–аё№аёҒ forward)

> вҡ пёҸ **аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё•**: Email account takeover а№Җаёӣаёҙаё”аё—аёІаёҮ BEC fraud, аёӮа№ӮаёЎаёўаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ forwarding rules, а№ҒаёҘаё°а№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө supply chain аёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ contacts

### Email Takeover Attack Flow

```mermaid
graph LR
    A["1пёҸвғЈ аёӮа№ӮаёЎаёў Credential\nPhishing/spray"] --> B["2пёҸвғЈ Login Mailbox\nOWA/IMAP/API"]
    B --> C["3пёҸвғЈ аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ Inbox Rules\nForward а№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮаё аёІаёўаёҷаёӯаёҒ"]
    C --> D["4пёҸвғЈ аёӘаёіаёЈаё§аёҲ\nаёӯа№ҲаёІаёҷ emails/contacts"]
    D --> E["5пёҸвғЈ BEC Attack\nаёӣаёҘаёӯаёЎа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ user"]
    E --> F["6пёҸвғЈ аёүа№үаёӯа№ӮаёҒаёҮа№ҖаёҮаёҙаёҷ\nWire transfer"]
    style A fill:#ffcc00,color:#000
    style C fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style E fill:#ff4444,color:#fff
    style F fill:#660000,color:#fff
```

### аёҒаёҙаёҲаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎаёӮаёӯаёҮаёңаё№а№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөа№ғаёҷ Mailbox

```mermaid
graph TD
    Access["рҹ“§ Mailbox Access"] --> Rules["аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ forwarding rules\nmailbox вҶ’ аё аёІаёўаёҷаёӯаёҒ"]
    Access --> Read["аёӯа№ҲаёІаёҷаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ\nаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҮаёҙаёҷ, аёӘаёұаёҚаёҚаёІ"]
    Access --> Delete["аёҘаёҡ security alerts\nаёӢа№Ҳаёӯаёҷаё•аёұаё§"]
    Access --> Send["аёӘа№ҲаёҮаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘ phishing\nаёҲаёІаёҒаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёөаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯаё–аё·аёӯ"]
    Access --> Contacts["а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ contact list\nаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№„аёӣ"]
    Access --> OAuth["аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ OAuth app\npersistent access"]
    style Access fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style Rules fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style OAuth fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
```

---

## Decision Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёһаёҡ Email Anomaly"] --> Type{"аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё— alert?"}
    Type -->|"Inbox rule а№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ"| Rule["аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ rule: forward аё аёІаёўаёҷаёӯаёҒ?\nAuto-delete?"]
    Type -->|"Login аёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ"| Login["GeoIP + аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң\nMobile/OWA/IMAP?"]
    Type -->|"User аёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷ"| Report["User аёҡаёӯаёҒ 'аёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёӘа№ҲаёҮ'\nаё«аёЈаё·аёӯ 'аёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘаё«аёІаёўа№„аёӣ'"]
    Type -->|"OAuth app"| OAuth["App а№ғаё«аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёөаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ң mail?\nPublisher а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЈаё№а№үаёҲаёұаёҒ?"]
    Rule --> Malicious{"Rule аёӘа№ҲаёҮа№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ domain аё аёІаёўаёҷаёӯаёҒ?"}
    Malicious -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| Contain["рҹ”ҙ CONTAIN\nаёҘаёҡ rule + reset password"]
    Malicious -->|"а№„аёЎа№Ҳ вҖ” аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ"| Review["аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаё§аёұаё•аё–аёёаёӣаёЈаё°аёӘаёҮаё„а№Ң rule"]
    Login --> Known{"аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң/аё•аёіа№Ғаё«аёҷа№ҲаёҮаё—аёөа№ҲаёЈаё№а№үаёҲаёұаёҒ?"}
    Known -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ| Contain
    Known -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| Monitor["аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаё•аёҙаё”аё•аёІаёЎ"]
    Report --> Contain
    OAuth --> Contain
    style Alert fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style Contain fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
```

### аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Alert as Alert Source
    participant SOC as SOC Analyst
    participant M365 as M365/Google Admin
    participant User
    participant IR as IR Team

    Alert->>SOC: рҹҡЁ аёҒаёҙаёҲаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎ email аёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ
    SOC->>M365: аё”аё¶аёҮ audit logs (sign-in + mailbox)
    M365->>SOC: аёӘа№ҲаёҮ login IPs, inbox rules, sent items
    SOC->>SOC: аёЈаё°аёҡаёё inbox rules аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё•
    SOC->>M365: аёҘаёҡ rules аёӯаёұаёҷаё•аёЈаёІаёўаё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө
    SOC->>User: а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ вҖ” аёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёөаё–аё№аёҒа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө
    SOC->>M365: аёҡаёұаёҮаё„аёұаёҡ reset password + revoke sessions
    SOC->>IR: Escalate вҖ” аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ BEC fraud
    IR->>M365: аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ sent/deleted items аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөаёўаё«аёІаёў
    IR->>SOC: аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ contacts аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ phishing аё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаёҷаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ
```

### аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё— Email Rules аё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёҲаёұаёҡаё•аёІ

```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph "рҹ”ҙ аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаёӘаё№аёҮ"
        R1["Auto-forward а№„аёӣаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘаё аёІаёўаёҷаёӯаёҒ"]
        R2["Auto-delete аёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘаёҡаёІаёҮаёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—"]
        R3["аёўа№үаёІаёў security alerts а№„аёӣ Deleted"]
        R4["Forward invoices/payments"]
    end
    subgraph "рҹҹЎ аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ"
        R5["Forward а№„аёӣаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘаёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаё•аёұаё§"]
        R6["Auto-reply OOO"]
        R7["аёўа№үаёІаёўаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘа№„аёӣ hidden folder"]
    end
    subgraph "рҹҹў аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ"
        R8["аёҲаёұаё”аё•аёІаёЎ sender а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІ folders"]
        R9["Flag аёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘаё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёө keywords"]
        R10["Auto-categorize"]
    end
    style R1 fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style R2 fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style R4 fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
```

### аёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ

```mermaid
graph TD
    Impact["аёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ"] --> DataRead{"аёӯа№ҲаёІаёҷаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ?"}
    DataRead -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ| Low["рҹҹў аё•а№Ҳаёі\nCredential compromise а№Җаё—а№ҲаёІаёҷаёұа№үаёҷ"]
    DataRead -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| Forward{"аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё–аё№аёҒ forward аёӯаёӯаёҒ?"}
    Forward -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ| Med["рҹҹЎ аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ\nаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё–аё№аёҒа№Җаёӣаёҙаё”а№Җаёңаёў"]
    Forward -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| BEC{"аёһаёўаёІаёўаёІаёЎ BEC fraud?"}
    BEC -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ| High["рҹҹ  аёӘаё№аёҮ\nData breach"]
    BEC -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| Money{"а№Ӯаёӯаёҷа№ҖаёҮаёҙаёҷа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§?"}
    Money -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ| VHigh["рҹ”ҙ аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё•\nBEC attempt аё–аё№аёҒ block"]
    Money -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| Cat["рҹ’Җ аёӘаё№аёҚа№ҖаёӘаёөаёўа№ҖаёҮаёҙаёҷ\nаё•аёҙаё”аё•а№ҲаёӯаёҳаёҷаёІаё„аёІаёЈаё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө"]
    style Impact fill:#333,color:#fff
    style Cat fill:#660000,color:#fff
```

### Timeline аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮ

```mermaid
gantt
    title Email Account Takeover Response
    dateFormat HH:mm
    axisFormat %H:%M
    section Detection
        а№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡ alert             :a1, 00:00, 5min
        аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё•   :a2, after a1, 10min
    section Containment
        аёҘаёҡ inbox rules          :a3, after a2, 5min
        Reset password & MFA    :a4, after a3, 10min
        Revoke OAuth apps       :a5, after a4, 10min
    section Investigation
        Audit mailbox activity  :a6, after a5, 60min
        аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ sent/deleted       :a7, after a6, 30min
        аёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷ BEC risk        :a8, after a7, 60min
    section Recovery
        а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаёңаё№а№үаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ  :a9, after a8, 30min
```

---

## 1. аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө (15 аёҷаёІаё—аёөа№ҒаёЈаёҒ)

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | аёңаё№а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҙаё”аёҠаёӯаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| 1 | аёҘаёҡ inbox rules аё—аёөа№Ҳаёҷа№ҲаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёўаё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” (forwarding, auto-delete) | M365/Google Admin |
| 2 | Reset password аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө | IAM Team |
| 3 | Revoke active sessions а№ҒаёҘаё° tokens аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” | M365/Google Admin |
| 4 | Revoke OAuth/app permissions аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЈаё№а№үаёҲаёұаёҒ | M365/Google Admin |
| 5 | Enroll MFA а№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳаё”а№үаё§аёўаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң/аё§аёҙаёҳаёөа№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ | IAM Team |
| 6 | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ Sent а№ҒаёҘаё° Deleted Items аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёҒаёҙаёҲаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎаёӮаёӯаёҮаёңаё№а№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө | SOC T2 |

## 2. аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ

### Mailbox Audit
- [ ] Sign-in logs: IP addresses, аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң, аё•аёіа№Ғаё«аёҷа№ҲаёҮ, timestamps
- [ ] Inbox rules аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ/а№ҒаёҒа№үа№„аёӮ: forwarding destinations
- [ ] Sent Items: аёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳаёңаё№а№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөаёӘа№ҲаёҮ (phishing, BEC)
- [ ] Deleted Items: security alerts аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаё—аёөа№ҲаёҘаёҡ
- [ ] OAuth/App permissions: apps а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЈаё№а№үаёҲаёұаёҒаё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёө mail.read scope
- [ ] Delegate access: users аёӯаё·а№Ҳаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳа№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ delegates

### аёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷ BEC
- [ ] аёЎаёөаё„аёіаёӘаёұа№ҲаёҮаё—аёІаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҮаёҙаёҷаё–аё№аёҒаёӘа№ҲаёҮаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ (wire transfer, invoice change)?
- [ ] аёЎаёөаёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёҘаёӯаёЎа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ vendor/partner аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ?
- [ ] аёңаё№а№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөаё•аёҙаё”аё•аёІаёЎ email threads а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё° (invoice, contract) аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ?
- [ ] аёЎаёө contacts аё–аё№аёҒ phish аёҲаёІаёҒаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёөаёҷаёөа№үаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ?

## 3. аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ (Containment)

| аёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё• | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ |
|:---|:---|
| **Inbox rules** | аёҘаёҡ forwarding/delete rules аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” |
| **Password** | аёҡаёұаёҮаё„аёұаёҡ reset + MFA re-enrollment |
| **Sessions** | Revoke active sessions/tokens аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” |
| **OAuth** | аёҘаёҡ app permissions аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЈаё№а№үаёҲаёұаёҒ |
| **Delegates** | аёҘаёҡ delegate access аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё• |

### аёҒаёІаёЈаёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаё№а№үаё„аё·аёҷ
- [ ] аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаё§а№ҲаёІ inbox rules аё—аёөа№Ҳа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷаёӯаёұаёҷаё•аёЈаёІаёўаё–аё№аёҒаёҘаёҡ
- [ ] аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ OAuth apps аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё•аё–аё№аёҒа№ҖаёһаёҙаёҒаё–аёӯаёҷ
- [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ login history 7 аё§аёұаёҷаё«аёҘаёұаёҮаёҒаё№а№үаё„аё·аёҷ
- [ ] аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ MFA аё—аёіаёҮаёІаёҷаёҡаёҷаё—аёёаёҒаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮаё—аёІаёҮ
- [ ] а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаёңаё№а№үаё•аёҙаё”аё•а№Ҳаёӯаё аёІаёўаёҷаёӯаёҒа№ҖаёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ compromise аё–а№үаёІаёҲаёіа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ

## 4. Evidence Checklist

| аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ | аёӘаёҙа№ҲаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ | а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёңаёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ mailbox | inbox rule, forwarding, delegate, sent/deleted item, audit trail | Mailbox audit / admin console | а№ғаёҠа№үаё”аё№ persistence а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёіаёӮаёӯаёҮ attacker а№ғаёҷ mailbox |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаё”а№үаёІаёҷаё•аёұаё§аё•аёҷ | sign-in, MFA event, session ID, device, IP, OAuth app | IdP / sign-in logs | а№ғаёҠа№үа№ҒаёўаёҒ mailbox-only abuse аёӯаёӯаёҒаёҲаёІаёҒ identity compromise а№Җаё•а№ҮаёЎаёЈаё№аёӣа№Ғаёҡаёҡ |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ message flow | phishing email аё—аёөа№ҲаёӘа№ҲаёҮаёӯаёӯаёҒ, recipient list, external forwarding, purge result | Message trace / gateway | а№ғаёҠа№үаё”аё№ blast radius а№ҒаёҘаё°аёңаё№а№үа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаёҷаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈа№Җаёӣаёҙаё”а№ҖаёңаёўаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | sensitive mailbox, attachment viewed/downloaded, thread monitoring | Mailbox audit / DLP | а№ғаёҠа№үаёЈаёӯаёҮаёЈаёұаёҡ legal а№ҒаёҘаё° business impact assessment |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ fraud аё—аёІаёҮаёҳаёёаёЈаёҒаёҙаёҲ | invoice thread, payment request, partner impersonation, callback record | Finance / ticketing / call logs | а№ғаёҠа№үаё”аё№аё§а№ҲаёІа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№„аёӣа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ BEC аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ vendor fraud аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ |

## 5. Minimum Telemetry Required

| а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮ Telemetry | а№ғаёҠа№үа№Җаёһаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёӯаё°а№„аёЈ | аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ | Blind Spot аё–а№үаёІа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| Mailbox audit а№ҒаёҘаё° message trace | аё”аё№ rule, forwarding, sent mail, purge scope, delegate change | Required | scope аёӮаёӯаёҮ mailbox abuse а№„аёЎа№ҲаёҠаёұаё” |
| Identity provider sign-in logs | аё”аё№ login source, MFA, session anomaly, OAuth grant | Required | аёҡаёӯаёҒа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаё§а№ҲаёІаё–аё№аёҒаёўаё¶аё”аёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёөаёЎаёІаёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮа№„аёЈ |
| Email gateway а№ҒаёҘаё° DLP telemetry | аё”аё№ outbound phishing, attachment access, sensitive content | Required | аёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷ downstream impact а№ҒаёҘаё° data exposure а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№ү |
| Helpdesk а№ҒаёҘаё° finance workflow records | аё”аё№ verification control, user-reported anomaly, callback evidence | Recommended | аёҡаёЈаёҙаёҡаё— fraud а№ҒаёҘаё° process failure аёӯа№Ҳаёӯаёҷ |
| Threat intel а№ҒаёҘаё° domain monitoring | аё”аё№ lookalike domain, campaign overlap, sender reputation | Recommended | аёЎаёӯаёҮ broader campaign аёҠа№үаёІаёҘаёҮ |

## 6. False Positive а№ҒаёҘаё° Tuning Guide

| Scenario | аё—аёіа№„аёЎаёҲаё¶аёҮаё”аё№аёҷа№ҲаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёў | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | Tuning Action | аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| forwarding аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ delegate change аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | workflow аёӮаёӯаёҮаёңаё№а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈаё«аёЈаё·аёӯ admin аёӯаёІаёҲа№ғаёҠа№ү delegation аёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮ | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ ticket, approver, а№ҒаёҘаё° target аё—аёөа№Ҳа№Ғаёҷа№Ҳаёҷаёӯаёҷ | suppress а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё° change аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙа№ғаёҷ mailbox аё—аёөа№ҲаёЈаё°аёҡаёё | target а№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ external, аёӢа№Ҳаёӯаёҷаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳ, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёӯаёўаё№а№ҲаёҷаёӯаёҒ workflow |
| аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈ rule а№ғаёҷ mailbox а№ҖаёӯаёҮ | folder/filter rule аёҡаёІаёҮа№Ғаёҡаёҡаё”аё№а№Җаё«аёЎаё·аёӯаёҷ abuse | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаёҒаёұаёҡаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үа№ҒаёҘаё°аё”аё№аё§а№ҲаёІа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№ү redirect/delete mail аёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ | tune а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё° rule аёҲаёұаё”аё«аёЎаё§аё”аё—аёөа№Ҳ benign | rule аёҘаёҡ alert, forward аёӯаёӯаёҒаёҷаёӯаёҒаёӯаёҮаё„а№ҢаёҒаёЈ, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёӢа№Ҳаёӯаёҷ invoice/security mail |
| enroll mobile mail client а№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ | app consent а№ҒаёҘаё° session а№ғаё«аёЎа№ҲаёӯаёІаёҲаё”аё№а№Җаё«аёЎаё·аёӯаёҷ compromise | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ enrollment а№ҒаёҘаё° approved app ID | allowlist client app а№ҒаёҘаё° enrollment window а№Ғаёҡаёҡа№Ғаё„аёҡ | app аёӮаёӯ scope а№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаё«аёЈаё·аёӯ session аёЎаёІаёҲаёІаёҒ geo/device а№ҒаёӣаёҘаёҒ |
| аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮа№Җаёһаё·а№Ҳаёӯ compliance аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ eDiscovery | legal review аёӯаёІаёҲаё—аёіа№ғаё«а№үаёЎаёө mailbox access аёҲаёіаёҷаё§аёҷаёЎаёІаёҒ | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ case ID, reviewer identity, а№ҒаёҘаё° mailbox scope | аёҘаё” severity а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё° workflow аё—аёІаёҮаёҒаёҺаё«аёЎаёІаёўаё—аёөа№Ҳ documented | access а№ҖаёҒаёҙаёҷ scope аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёЎаёө external forwarding/export |

## 7. аё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң (Post-Incident)

| аё„аёіаё–аёІаёЎ | аё„аёіаё•аёӯаёҡ |
|:---|:---|
| Email credentials аё–аё№аёҒа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөаёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮа№„аёЈ? | [Phishing/spray/leak] |
| Inbox rule alerts аёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё”аё„а№ҲаёІаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | [а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ/а№„аёЎа№Ҳ] |
| Conditional access policy аёҡаёұаёҮаё„аёұаёҡа№ғаёҠа№үаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | [аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё°] |
| аёЎаёө financial controls (dual approval) аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | [аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё°] |

## 8. Detection Rules (Sigma)

```yaml
title: Suspicious Email Forwarding Rule Created
logsource:
    product: m365
    service: exchange
detection:
    selection:
        Operation: 'New-InboxRule'
        Parameters|contains:
            - 'ForwardTo'
            - 'RedirectTo'
            - 'ForwardAsAttachmentTo'
    condition: selection
    level: high
```

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ
- [BEC Playbook](BEC.th.md)
- [Account Compromise Playbook](Account_Compromise.th.md)
- [Phishing Playbook](Phishing.th.md)
- [MFA Bypass Playbook](MFA_Bypass.th.md)

## References
- [MITRE T1114 вҖ” Email Collection](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1114/)
- [Microsoft вҖ” Detect Email Compromise](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/security/)

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Exploit.en.md
# Playbook: Vulnerability Exploitation

**ID**: PB-18
**Severity**: High/Critical | **Category**: Vulnerability Management
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1190](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1190/) (Exploit Public-Facing Application), [T1203](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1203/) (Exploitation for Client Execution)
**Trigger**: IDS/IPS alert, EDR detection, vulnerability scan, TI advisory, WAF block

### Exploit Lifecycle

```mermaid
graph LR
    Disc["рҹ”Қ Vuln Discovered"] --> PoC["рҹ’» Public PoC"]
    PoC --> Wild["рҹҢҗ In-the-Wild"]
    Wild --> Patch["рҹ©№ Vendor Patch"]
    Patch --> Apply["вң… Patch Applied"]
    style Disc fill:#3498db,color:#fff
    style Wild fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Apply fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
```

### Virtual Patching Flow

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant SOC
    participant WAF
    participant Dev as Dev Team
    SOC->>WAF: Create virtual patch rule
    WAF-->>SOC: вң… Rule active
    SOC->>Dev: Notify vulnerability + CVE
    Dev->>Dev: Fix source code
    Dev->>SOC: Deployed fix
    SOC->>WAF: Remove virtual patch
```

---

## Decision Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ Exploit Attempt Detected"] --> CVE["рҹ”Қ Identify CVE"]
    CVE --> Vuln{"рҹҺҜ Is Target Vulnerable?"}
    Vuln -->|Patched / Not Affected| Attempt["рҹҹЎ Blocked Attempt"]
    Vuln -->|Vulnerable| Response{"рҹ“Ҡ Exploit Successful?"}
    Response -->|200 OK / Shell / Payload| Success["рҹ”ҙ Successful Exploitation"]
    Response -->|Blocked (403/Drop)| Attempt
    Response -->|Error (500)| Partial["рҹҹ  Investigate Further"]
    Attempt --> Block["рҹҡ« Block Attacker IP"]
    Success --> Type{"рҹ’Ҙ Exploit Impact?"}
    Type -->|RCE| RCE["рҹҡЁ Isolate + Major Response"]
    Type -->|Info Disclosure| Info["рҹӣЎпёҸ Block + Patch"]
    Type -->|DoS| DoS["вҡҷпёҸ Mitigate + Patch"]
    Partial --> Type
    RCE --> FullIR["Full Incident Response"]
```

---

## 1. Analysis

### 1.1 CVE / Vulnerability Identification

| Check | How | Done |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Identify CVE number from alert/signature | IPS/IDS/WAF | вҳҗ |
| Check CVSS score and severity | NVD, vendor advisory | вҳҗ |
| Is it in CISA KEV (Known Exploited Vulnerabilities)? | [CISA KEV](https://www.cisa.gov/known-exploited-vulnerabilities-catalog) | вҳҗ |
| Is public PoC exploit available? | GitHub, ExploitDB | вҳҗ |
| Check if active exploitation in the wild | TI feeds, advisories | вҳҗ |

### 1.2 Target Assessment

| Check | How | Done |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Is the target system affected? (version/config) | CMDB, vulnerability scanner | вҳҗ |
| Is the vulnerable service exposed externally? | Firewall rules, Shodan | вҳҗ |
| What is the asset criticality? | CMDB, business context | вҳҗ |
| Is the target already patched? | Patch management system | вҳҗ |
| Were compensating controls in place? (WAF, segmentation) | Security architecture | вҳҗ |

### 1.3 Exploitation Evidence

| Evidence | What to Look For | Done |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Network payload | Exploit signature in IPS/IDS logs | вҳҗ |
| Server response | Success indicators (reverse shell, data leak) | вҳҗ |
| Process creation | New processes spawned after exploit | вҳҗ |
| File creation | Web shells, payloads dropped to disk | вҳҗ |
| Outbound connections | C2 callbacks from exploited server | вҳҗ |
| Post-exploitation | Credential dumping, lateral movement | вҳҗ |

---

## 2. Containment

### 2.1 Exploit Attempt (Blocked)

| # | Action | Tool | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Block attacker IP | Firewall | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Update IPS/WAF signatures | IPS / WAF | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Alert vulnerability management to prioritize patching | Ticket | вҳҗ |

### 2.2 Successful Exploitation

| # | Action | Tool | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Isolate exploited system** immediately | EDR / Firewall | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Block attacker IP and any C2 indicators | Firewall | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **Apply virtual patch** at WAF/IPS | WAF / IPS | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Disable vulnerable service if possible | System admin | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Capture memory dump and disk image | Forensics | вҳҗ |
| 6 | Check for lateral movement from exploited host | [PB-12](Lateral_Movement.en.md) | вҳҗ |

### 2.3 Zero-Day (No Patch Available)

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Apply workaround from vendor advisory (disable feature, config change) | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Deploy custom WAF/IPS rule for exploit pattern | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Segment affected systems from network | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Enable enhanced monitoring / logging | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Report to vendor and request emergency patch | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. Eradication

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Apply official patch** from vendor | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Remove any web shells, backdoors, or dropped payloads | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Reset credentials on the exploited system | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Scan for other vulnerable instances in environment | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Check for persistence mechanisms installed by attacker | вҳҗ |

---

## 4. Recovery

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Run vulnerability scan to confirm patch applied | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Test application functionality after patching | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Reconnect system to network in stages | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Monitor for re-exploitation attempts for 72 hours | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Update asset inventory with patch status | вҳҗ |

---

## 5. IoC Collection

| Type | Value | Source |
|:---|:---|:---|
| CVE Number | | IPS / Advisory |
| Attacker IP | | Firewall / IPS |
| Exploit Payload | | IPS / WAF logs |
| Target System | | Alert |
| Dropped Files (hash) | | EDR / Forensics |
| C2 Indicators | | Network logs |
| Post-exploitation Tools | | EDR |

---

## 6. Evidence Checklist

| Evidence Type | What to Collect | Source | Why It Matters |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Exploit evidence | CVE, payload, target endpoint, request path, delivery vector | WAF / IPS / app logs | Confirms which vulnerability was used |
| Host evidence | Shells, dropped files, processes, persistence, privilege changes | EDR / forensic tools | Shows whether the exploit led to compromise |
| Scope evidence | Other vulnerable systems, same payload pattern, follow-on hosts | SIEM / vuln scanner | Determines whether this is isolated or widespread |
| Credential and data evidence | Stolen creds, accessed records, post-exploitation actions | IAM / DLP / DB audit | Supports escalation beyond exploit attempt |
| Vendor and patch evidence | Advisory, workaround state, patch availability | Vendor advisory / vuln mgmt | Guides containment and recovery decisions |

---

## 7. Minimum Telemetry Required

| Telemetry Source | Required For | Priority | Blind Spot If Missing |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| WAF, IDS/IPS, and access logs | Payload, source, exploit pattern, blocked/passed status | Required | Cannot validate exploitation attempt characteristics |
| Endpoint and host telemetry | Web shell, dropped files, execution, persistence | Required | Successful compromise may be missed |
| Vulnerability and asset context | Exposure, patch state, affected systems | Required | Cannot scope which systems remain at risk |
| Network telemetry | C2 or follow-on communications after exploit | Recommended | Post-exploitation behavior may remain hidden |
| Change-management records | Planned maintenance and mitigation context | Recommended | Analysts may misread authorized workaround activity |

---

## 8. False Positive and Tuning Guide

| Scenario | Why It Looks Suspicious | How to Validate | Tuning Action | Escalate If |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Vulnerability scan | Scanner payloads look like real exploits | Confirm source, schedule, and target scope | Allowlist scanner sources and headers within approved windows | Payloads hit unapproved systems or trigger shell/persistence indicators |
| Pen test or red-team activity | Controlled exploitation appears real by design | Validate exercise ticket, team, and host list | Suppress only approved team IPs and time window | Activity spreads beyond scope or reaches production data unexpectedly |
| Emergency workaround deployment | Temporary config changes may resemble attacker modifications | Check change ticket and owner | Lower severity only for documented workaround actions | Same system also shows dropped files or unexplained persistence |
| QA validation after patch | Retest payloads may trigger residual alerts | Validate testing owner and release window | Tune by environment, test accounts, and endpoint scope | Attempts continue after test window or from unknown sources |

---

## 9. Escalation Criteria

| Condition | Escalate To |
|:---|:---|
| RCE with confirmed shell | CISO + Major Incident |
| Zero-day (no patch available) | CISO + Vendor + CERT |
| Critical infrastructure (DB, DC) exploited | CISO immediately |
| CISA KEV vulnerability actively exploited | Vulnerability Management + SOC Lead |
| Multiple systems exploited | Major Incident |
| Data breach through exploitation | [PB-08](Data_Exfiltration.en.md) + Legal |

---

### Exploit Severity Classification

```mermaid
graph TD
    Vuln["рҹ”“ Vulnerability"] --> CVSS{"рҹ“Ҡ CVSS?"}
    CVSS -->|9.0+| Critical["рҹ”ҙ Critical вҖ” patch 24h"]
    CVSS -->|7.0-8.9| High["рҹҹ  High вҖ” patch 7d"]
    CVSS -->|4.0-6.9| Medium["рҹҹЎ Medium вҖ” patch 30d"]
    CVSS -->|Under 4.0| Low["рҹҹў Low вҖ” next cycle"]
    Critical --> Weaponized{"вҡ”пёҸ Weaponized?"}
    Weaponized -->|Yes| Emergency["рҹҡЁ Emergency patch NOW"]
    Weaponized -->|No| Critical
    style Emergency fill:#c0392b,color:#fff
    style Critical fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
```

### Virtual Patching Architecture

```mermaid
graph LR
    Traffic["рҹҢҗ Traffic"] --> WAF["рҹӣЎпёҸ WAF"]
    WAF --> VPatch["рҹ“Ӣ Virtual Patch Rule"]
    VPatch -->|Match| Block["вқҢ Block"]
    VPatch -->|No match| App["рҹ“ұ App"]
    App --> IPS["рҹ”Қ IPS"]
    IPS -->|Signature| Alert["рҹҡЁ Alert"]
    style WAF fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style Block fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
```

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Exploit.th.md
# Playbook: аёҒаёІаёЈа№ғаёҠа№үаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Ӯаё«аё§а№Ҳ (Exploit)

**ID**: PB-18
**аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ**: аёӘаё№аёҮ/аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• | **аё«аёЎаё§аё”аё«аёЎаё№а№Ҳ**: аёҒаёІаёЈа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Ӯаё«аё§а№Ҳ
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1190](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1190/) (Exploit Public-Facing App), [T1203](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1203/) (Exploitation for Client Execution)
**аё—аёЈаёҙаёҒа№ҖаёҒаёӯаёЈа№Ң**: IDS/IPS alert, EDR detection, vulnerability scan, TI advisory, WAF block


## аё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң (Post-Incident)

- [ ] Patch vulnerability аё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒа№ғаёҠа№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө
- [ ] аёӘа№ҒаёҒаёҷаё«аёІ vulnerable systems аёӯаё·а№Ҳаёҷа№Ҷ аё”а№үаё§аёў vulnerability scanner
- [ ] аёӯаёұаёһа№Җаё”аё— IDS/IPS signatures
- [ ] а№ғаёҠа№ү virtual patching аё–а№үаёІаёўаёұаёҮа№„аёЎа№ҲаёӘаёІаёЎаёІаёЈаё– patch а№„аё”а№ү
- [ ] аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ patch management process
- [ ] аёҲаёұаё”аё—аёі [Incident Report](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.th.md)

### аёңаёұаёҮ Exploit Timeline

```mermaid
graph LR
    Disc["рҹ”Қ аё„а№үаёҷаёһаёҡаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Ӯаё«аё§а№Ҳ"] --> PoC["рҹ’» PoC аёӘаёІаёҳаёІаёЈаё“аё°"]
    PoC --> Wild["рҹҢҗ In-the-Wild"]
    Wild --> Patch["рҹ©№ Vendor Patch"]
    Patch --> Apply["вң… Patch Applied"]
    style Disc fill:#3498db,color:#fff
    style Wild fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Apply fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
```

### аёңаёұаёҮаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷ Virtual Patching

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant SOC
    participant WAF
    participant Dev as Dev Team
    SOC->>WAF: аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ virtual patch rule
    WAF-->>SOC: вң… Rule active
    SOC->>Dev: а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ vulnerability + CVE
    Dev->>Dev: а№ҒаёҒа№ү source code
    Dev->>SOC: Deploy fix а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§
    SOC->>WAF: аёҘаёҡ virtual patch
```

---

## аёңаёұаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲ

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ Exploit Alert"] --> Success{"рҹ’Ҙ Exploit аёӘаёіа№ҖаёЈа№ҮаёҲ?"}
    Success -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| Impact{"рҹ“Ҡ аёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ?"}
    Success -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ (attempt)| Block["рҹ”’ Block IP + Monitor"]
    Impact -->|RCE| Critical["рҹ”ҙ Isolate аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө"]
    Impact -->|Info Disclosure| High["рҹҹ  Assess Data"]
    Impact -->|DoS| Medium["рҹҹЎ Mitigate + Patch"]
    Critical --> Lateral{"рҹ”Җ Lateral Movement?"}
    Lateral -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| Major["рҹ”ҙ Major Incident"]
    Lateral -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ| Contain["рҹ”’ Contain + Patch"]
```

---

## 1. аёҒаёІаёЈаё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң

### 1.1 аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—аёҒаёІаёЈа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Ӯаё«аё§а№Ҳ

| аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё— | аёҘаёұаёҒаё©аё“аё° | аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **Remote Code Execution (RCE)** | аёЈаёұаёҷа№Ӯаё„а№үаё”аёҲаёІаёҒаёЈаё°аёўаё°а№„аёҒаёҘ | рҹ”ҙ аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• |
| **Local Privilege Escalation (LPE)** | аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ң | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ |
| **SQL Injection** | а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮаёҗаёІаёҷаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ |
| **Path Traversal** | аёӯа№ҲаёІаёҷа№„аёҹаёҘа№ҢаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ | рҹҹ  аёӘаё№аёҮ |
| **SSRF** | а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ internal resources | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ |
| **Deserialization** | Object injection вҶ’ RCE | рҹ”ҙ аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• |
| **Authentication Bypass** | а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡа№Ӯаё”аёўа№„аёЎа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ login | рҹ”ҙ аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• |

### 1.2 аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ

| аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈ | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| CVE ID | Advisory / IDS signature | вҳҗ |
| CVSS score + attack vector | NVD | вҳҗ |
| аёӢаёӯаёҹаё•а№Ңа№Ғаё§аёЈа№Ңа№ҒаёҘаё°а№Җаё§аёӯаёЈа№ҢаёҠаёұаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ | CMDB | вҳҗ |
| аёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳа№ғаёҷ CISA KEV? | [KEV catalog](https://www.cisa.gov/known-exploited-vulnerabilities-catalog) | вҳҗ |
| Exploit аёӘаёіа№ҖаёЈа№ҮаёҲ аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ attempt а№Җаё—а№ҲаёІаёҷаёұа№үаёҷ? | IDS/EDR analysis | вҳҗ |
| аё«аёІаёҒ RCE вҶ’ process tree аёӮаёӯаёҮ exploit | EDR | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёө web shell аё–аё№аёҒаё§аёІаёҮ? | EDR / File integrity | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёө lateral movement? | SIEM correlation | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёө data access / exfil? | DLP / DB audit logs | вҳҗ |

---

## 2. аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ

### 2.1 Exploit Attempt (а№„аёЎа№ҲаёӘаёіа№ҖаёЈа№ҮаёҲ)

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Block** source IP аё—аёөа№Ҳ WAF/IPS/firewall | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ** аё§а№ҲаёІаёўаёұаёҮаёЎаёө attempt аёӯаё·а№ҲаёҷаёҲаёІаёҒ IP а№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷ | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **а№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎ** IPS/WAF rule аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ exploit pattern | вҳҗ |

### 2.2 Exploit аёӘаёіа№ҖаёЈа№ҮаёҲ

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Isolate** аёЈаё°аёҡаёҡаё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **Virtual patch** вҖ” IPS/WAF rule аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ CVE | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **Block** source IP аё—аёөа№Ҳ firewall | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **аёҲаёіаёҒаёұаё” network access** а№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡа№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷаё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёөаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Ӯаё«аё§а№Ҳ | вҳҗ |
| 5 | **аё„а№үаёҷаё«аёІ web shell** / backdoor | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаёіаёҲаёұаё”

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Patch** а№ғаё«а№үа№ҖаёЈа№Үаё§аё—аёөа№ҲаёӘаёёаё” (Emergency Change) | вҳҗ |
| 2 | аёҘаёҡ web shell / backdoor | вҳҗ |
| 3 | аёҘаёҡ persistence аё—аёөа№ҲаёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮаёЈаё°аё«аё§а№ҲаёІаёҮ post-exploitation | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ lateral movement вҶ’ аёҒаёіаёҲаёұаё”аёҡаёҷ host аёӯаё·а№Ҳаёҷ | вҳҗ |
| 5 | аё«аёЎаёёаёҷа№Җаё§аёөаёўаёҷ credentials аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёІаёҲаё–аё№аёҒаёӮа№ӮаёЎаёў | вҳҗ |

---

## 4. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҹаё·а№үаёҷаёҹаё№

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаё§а№ҲаёІ patch аё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ (vulnerability scan) | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” automated patching** аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ OS / middleware | вҳҗ |
| 3 | а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” **WAF** аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ web applications | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аё•аёұа№үаёҮ **vulnerability scan** аёЈаёІаёўаёӘаёұаёӣаё”аёІаё«а№Ң | вҳҗ |
| 5 | аёҘаё” attack surface (аёӣаёҙаё” port/service аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№ү) | вҳҗ |

---

## 5. Evidence Checklist

| аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ | аёӘаёҙа№ҲаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ | а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёңаёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ exploit | CVE, payload, target endpoint, request path, delivery vector | WAF / IPS / app logs | а№ғаёҠа№үаёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаё§а№ҲаёІаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Ӯаё«аё§а№Ҳа№ғаё”аё–аё№аёҒа№ғаёҠа№ү |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёҲаёІаёҒ host | shell, dropped file, process, persistence, privilege change | EDR / forensic tools | а№ғаёҠа№үаё”аё№аё§а№ҲаёІ exploit аёҷаёіа№„аёӣаёӘаё№а№Ҳ compromise а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаё”а№үаёІаёҷаёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё• | аёЈаё°аёҡаёҡаёӯаё·а№Ҳаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёӣаёЈаёІаё°аёҡаёІаёҮ, payload pattern а№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷ, host аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ | SIEM / vuln scanner | а№ғаёҠа№үаё”аё№аё§а№ҲаёІа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ isolated case аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ widespread |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ credential а№ҒаёҘаё°аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | credential аё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаёӮа№ӮаёЎаёў, record аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ, post-exploitation action | IAM / DLP / DB audit | а№ғаёҠа№үаёӣаёЈаё°аёҒаёӯаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№ҖаёҒаёҙаёҷаёҒаё§а№ҲаёІ exploit attempt |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ vendor а№ҒаёҘаё° patch | advisory, workaround state, patch availability | Vendor advisory / vuln mgmt | а№ғаёҠа№үаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё” containment а№ҒаёҘаё° recovery |

---

## 6. Minimum Telemetry Required

| а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮ Telemetry | а№ғаёҠа№үа№Җаёһаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёӯаё°а№„аёЈ | аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ | Blind Spot аё–а№үаёІа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| WAF, IDS/IPS, а№ҒаёҘаё° access logs | аё”аё№ payload, source, exploit pattern, blocked/passed status | Required | validate аёҘаёұаёҒаё©аё“аё° exploit а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№ү |
| Endpoint а№ҒаёҘаё° host telemetry | аё”аё№ web shell, dropped file, execution, persistence | Required | аёһаёҘаёІаё” successful compromise |
| Vulnerability а№ҒаёҘаё° asset context | аё”аё№ exposure, patch state, аёЈаё°аёҡаёҡаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ | Required | scope аёЈаё°аёҡаёҡа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮа№„аёЎа№ҲаёҠаёұаё” |
| Network telemetry | аё”аё№ C2 аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ traffic аё«аёҘаёұаёҮ exploit | Recommended | аёһаёҘаёІаё” post-exploitation behavior |
| Change-management records | аё”аё№ maintenance аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ mitigation context | Recommended | аёӯаёІаёҲаё•аёө workaround аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ incident |

---

## 7. False Positive а№ҒаёҘаё° Tuning Guide

| Scenario | аё—аёіа№„аёЎаёҲаё¶аёҮаё”аё№аёҷа№ҲаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёў | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | Tuning Action | аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| vulnerability scan | scanner payload аё”аё№а№Җаё«аёЎаё·аёӯаёҷ exploit аёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮ | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ source, schedule, а№ҒаёҘаё° target scope | allowlist scanner source/header а№ғаёҷаёҠа№Ҳаё§аёҮа№Җаё§аёҘаёІаё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | payload а№ӮаёңаёҘа№ҲаёҷаёӯаёҒа№Җаё§аёҘаёІ аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№ҖаёҒаёҙаё” shell/persistence |
| pen test аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ red-team activity | exploitation аё—аёөа№Ҳаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§аёўаёұаёҮаё”аё№а№Җаё«аёЎаё·аёӯаёҷаёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮ | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ exercise ticket, team, а№ҒаёҘаё° host list | suppress а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё° team IP а№ҒаёҘаё° time window аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | activity аё«аёҘаёёаё”аёӯаёӯаёҒаёҷаёӯаёҒ scope аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№Ғаё•аё°аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ production |
| emergency workaround deployment | config change аёҠаёұа№Ҳаё§аё„аёЈаёІаё§аёӯаёІаёҲаё”аё№а№Җаё«аёЎаё·аёӯаёҷ attacker | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ change ticket а№ҒаёҘаё° owner | аёҘаё” severity а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё° action аё—аёөа№Ҳ documented | аёЎаёө dropped file аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ persistence а№ҒаёӣаёҘаёҒа№ҖаёҒаёҙаё”аёЈа№Ҳаё§аёЎаё”а№үаё§аёў |
| QA validation аё«аёҘаёұаёҮ patch | retest payload аёӯаёІаёҲ trigger alert аёӢа№үаёі | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ testing owner а№ҒаёҘаё° release window | tune аё•аёІаёЎ environment, test account, а№ҒаёҘаё° endpoint scope | аёЎаёө traffic аёҲаёІаёҒ source а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЈаё№а№үаёҲаёұаёҒаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёҷаёӯаёҒа№Җаё§аёҘаёІ |

---

## 8. а№ҖаёҒаё“аё‘а№ҢаёҒаёІаёЈаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ

| а№ҖаёҮаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аёӮ | аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ |
|:---|:---|
| RCE аёӘаёіа№ҖаёЈа№ҮаёҲ вҶ’ compromise аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ | Major Incident |
| Web shell аёһаёҡаёҡаёҷ production | SOC Lead + CISO |
| Zero-day (а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө patch) | [PB-24 Zero-Day](Zero_Day_Exploit.th.md) + CISO |
| аё«аёҘаёІаёўаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡаё–аё№аёҒ exploit | Major Incident |
| аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё–аё№аёҒа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ | Legal + DPO |

---

### аёңаёұаёҮ Exploit Severity Classification

```mermaid
graph TD
    Vuln["рҹ”“ Vulnerability"] --> CVSS{"рҹ“Ҡ CVSS?"}
    CVSS -->|9.0+| Critical["рҹ”ҙ Critical вҖ” patch 24h"]
    CVSS -->|7.0-8.9| High["рҹҹ  High вҖ” patch 7d"]
    CVSS -->|4.0-6.9| Medium["рҹҹЎ Medium вҖ” patch 30d"]
    CVSS -->|Under 4.0| Low["рҹҹў Low вҖ” next cycle"]
    Critical --> Weaponized{"вҡ”пёҸ Weaponized?"}
    Weaponized -->|Yes| Emergency["рҹҡЁ Emergency patch NOW"]
    Weaponized -->|No| Critical
    style Emergency fill:#c0392b,color:#fff
    style Critical fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
```

### аёңаёұаёҮ Virtual Patching Architecture

```mermaid
graph LR
    Traffic["рҹҢҗ Traffic"] --> WAF["рҹӣЎпёҸ WAF"]
    WAF --> VPatch["рҹ“Ӣ Virtual Patch Rule"]
    VPatch -->|Match| Block["вқҢ Block"]
    VPatch -->|No match| App["рҹ“ұ App"]
    App --> IPS["рҹ”Қ IPS"]
    IPS -->|Signature| Alert["рҹҡЁ Alert"]
    style WAF fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style Block fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
```

## аёҒаёҺаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ (Sigma)

| аёҒаёҺ | а№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң |
|:---|:---|
| WAF Detected Exploit Attempt | [web_waf_exploit.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/web_waf_exploit.yml) |
| Execution from Temp/Downloads | [proc_temp_folder_execution.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/proc_temp_folder_execution.yml) |

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ

- [аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң](../Framework.th.md)
- [PB-24 Zero-Day Exploit](Zero_Day_Exploit.th.md)
- [PB-10 Web Attack](Web_Attack.th.md)

## Exploit Classification & Response

| Exploit Type | Severity | Response Time | Mitigation |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Remote Code Execution | Critical | 1 hr | Isolate + Patch |
| Privilege Escalation | High | 4 hrs | Restrict + Monitor |
| Information Disclosure | Medium | 8 hrs | WAF rule |
| Denial of Service | Medium | 4 hrs | Rate limit |

### Exploit Chain Analysis

| Stage | Indicator | Detection Source |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Recon | Scanning activity | IDS/IPS |
| Weaponize | Payload crafting | N/A (pre-attack) |
| Deliver | Exploit attempt | WAF/IDS logs |
| Exploit | Code execution | EDR/Sysmon |
| Install | Persistence mechanism | EDR |
| C2 | Callback to attacker | Network flow |

### Vulnerability Assessment Post-Exploit

| Check | Tool | Action |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Patch status | Scanner | Apply patches |
| Config hardening | CIS benchmark | Remediate gaps |
| Similar systems | Asset inventory | Scan all |

## References

- [CISA KEV](https://www.cisa.gov/known-exploited-vulnerabilities-catalog)
- [MITRE ATT&CK T1190](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1190/)

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Impossible_Travel.en.md
# Playbook: Impossible Travel

**ID**: PB-06
**Severity**: Medium/High | **Category**: Identity & Access
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1078](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1078/) (Valid Accounts), [T1078.004](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1078/004/) (Cloud Accounts)
**Trigger**: Identity Protection (impossible travel), SIEM (multiple geographic sign-ins), CASB alert

### Analysis Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҢҚ Alert"] --> Check{"рҹ”Қ VPN/Proxy?"}
    Check -->|Yes| FP["вң… False Positive"]
    Check -->|No| GeoCheck{"рҹ“Қ True geo?"}
    GeoCheck -->|Travel confirmed| FP
    GeoCheck -->|No travel| Compromise["рҹ”ҙ Compromise!"]
    Compromise --> Revoke["рҹ”’ Revoke sessions"]
    Revoke --> Reset["рҹ”‘ Reset password"]
    Reset --> MFA["рҹ“ұ Re-register MFA"]
```

### CAE Token Protection

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant App
    participant IdP as Azure AD
    participant SOC
    User->>App: Access resource
    App->>IdP: Validate token
    IdP->>IdP: CAE: Check risk signals
    Note over IdP: Risk detected вҖ” impossible travel
    IdP-->>App: вқҢ Token revoked
    App-->>User: Session terminated
    IdP->>SOC: рҹҡЁ Alert
```

---

## Decision Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ Impossible Travel Alert"] --> VPN{"рҹ”— Corporate VPN?"}
    VPN -->|Yes, VPN Exit Node| FP["вң… False Positive вҖ” VPN"]
    VPN -->|No| Proxy{"рҹҢҗ Cloud Proxy / CDN?"}
    Proxy -->|Yes, Zscaler/CF| FP2["вң… FP вҖ” Proxy Egress"]
    Proxy -->|No| Physics{"вҸұпёҸ Physically Possible?"}
    Physics -->|Yes, Enough Time| Travel{"вңҲпёҸ User Traveling?"}
    Physics -->|No, Impossible| Suspicious["рҹ”ҙ Suspicious"]
    Travel -->|Yes, Confirmed| FP3["вң… FP вҖ” Legitimate Travel"]
    Travel -->|Unknown| Contact["рҹ“һ Contact User"]
    Contact -->|User Confirms| FP3
    Contact -->|User Denies / Unreachable| Suspicious
    Suspicious --> MFA{"рҹ”‘ MFA Used?"}
    MFA -->|Yes, Both Logins| Advanced["рҹ”ҙ MFA Bypass / Token Theft"]
    MFA -->|No, One Login Without| Cred["рҹҹ  Credential Compromise"]
    Advanced --> Terminate["рҹ”Ң Terminate All Sessions"]
    Cred --> Terminate
```

---

## 1. Analysis

### 1.1 Common False Positive Sources

| Source | How to Identify | Action |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **Corporate VPN** | Source IP is known VPN exit node | Whitelist VPN IPs |
| **Cloud proxy** (Zscaler, Cloudflare) | IP belongs to proxy ASN | Whitelist proxy ranges |
| **Mobile network** | IP geolocates to carrier hub (not user location) | Verify with user |
| **Shared account** | Multiple people using same creds | Enforce personal accounts |
| **VPN split-tunnel** | Some traffic via VPN, some direct | Check VPN config |
| **Cached credentials** | Laptop login vs cloud login timing | Check auth method |

### 1.2 Investigation Checklist

| Check | How | Done |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Both login locations (city, country, ISP) | SIEM / IdP sign-in logs | вҳҗ |
| Time between logins | Calculate вҖ” physically possible? | вҳҗ |
| IP reputation of both IPs | AbuseIPDB, VirusTotal | вҳҗ |
| Were both logins via same protocol? | Console / API / IMAP / ActiveSync | вҳҗ |
| Was MFA required and passed on both? | IdP MFA logs | вҳҗ |
| Device fingerprint (browser, OS) | IdP details | вҳҗ |
| User's known location | HR / Manager / User | вҳҗ |
| Is the user a frequent traveler? | Travel history, role | вҳҗ |

### 1.3 Post-Login Activity Analysis

| Check | What to Look For | Done |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Email access | New inbox rules, mass email read, forwarding | вҳҗ |
| File access | Bulk downloads from SharePoint/OneDrive | вҳҗ |
| Admin actions | Role changes, new app registrations | вҳҗ |
| MFA changes | New MFA method registered | вҳҗ |
| Password change | Self-service password reset | вҳҗ |
| OAuth consents | New app permissions granted | вҳҗ |

---

## 2. Containment

### 2.1 Confirmed Impossible Travel (Not FP)

| # | Action | Tool | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Terminate all active sessions** | IdP (Revoke Sessions) | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **Reset password** immediately | AD / IdP | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **Revoke refresh tokens** (cloud apps) | Azure AD / Okta | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **Block suspicious IP** at firewall/conditional access | Firewall / IdP | вҳҗ |
| 5 | **Enforce MFA re-registration** (existing MFA may be compromised) | IdP | вҳҗ |

### 2.2 If Token Theft Suspected

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Revoke ALL OAuth tokens and app consents | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Check for adversary-in-the-middle phishing (EvilProxy, Evilginx) | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Check endpoint for token-stealing malware | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Enable token protection / CAE (Continuous Access Evaluation) | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. Investigation

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Determine which login is legitimate and which is attacker | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Audit all actions from attacker session | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Check for inbox rules / forwarding created during attacker session | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Check for data accessed / downloaded during attacker session | вҳҗ |

```mermaid
graph TD
    Login["рҹ”“ Login"] --> CA{"рҹӣЎпёҸ Conditional Access"}
    CA -->|Trusted Location| Allow["вң… Allow"]
    CA -->|Unknown Location| MFA["рҹ“ұ Require MFA"]
    CA -->|Risky Sign-in| Block["вқҢ Block"]
    CA -->|Unmanaged Device| Limited["вҡ пёҸ Limited Access"]
    MFA --> Compliant{"рҹ“Ӣ Compliant?"}
    Compliant -->|Yes| Allow
    Compliant -->|No| Block
    style Block fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Allow fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
```

### аёңаёұаёҮ Token Theft Detection

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Attacker
    participant IdP
    participant SOC
    participant CAE
    Attacker->>IdP: а№ғаёҠа№ү stolen token
    IdP->>CAE: аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ вҖ” IP а№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ!
    CAE->>IdP: вқҢ Revoke token
    IdP-->>Attacker: 401 Unauthorized
    CAE->>SOC: рҹҡЁ Token theft alert
    SOC->>SOC: Link аёҒаёұаёҡ impossible travel
```

## аёҒаёҺаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ (Sigma)

| аёҒаёҺ | а№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң |
|:---|:---|
| Impossible Travel Detection | [cloud_impossible_travel.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/cloud_impossible_travel.yml) |
| Azure AD Risky Sign-in | [cloud_azure_risky_signin.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/cloud_azure_risky_signin.yml) |

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ

- [аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң](../Framework.th.md)
- [PB-05 аёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёөаё–аё№аёҒаёҡаёёаёҒаёЈаёёаёҒ](Account_Compromise.th.md)
- [PB-26 MFA Bypass](MFA_Bypass.th.md)

## False Positive Assessment

| Scenario | Likely FP? | Verification |
|:---|:---|:---|
| VPN + office login | вң… High | Check VPN logs |
| Mobile + desktop | вң… Medium | User confirmation |
| Two countries < 2 hrs | вқҢ Low | Investigate |
| Service account travel | вқҢ Very Low | Alert immediately |

### Velocity Analysis Template

| Login 1 | Login 2 | Distance | Time | Speed | Verdict |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Bangkok | Singapore | 1,400 km | 30 min | Impossible | вҡ пёҸ Alert |
| Bangkok | Chiang Mai | 600 km | 3 hrs | Possible (flight) | в„№пёҸ Verify |
| Office | Home (VPN) | Same city | 5 min | VPN likely | вң… FP |

### Investigation Checklist
- [ ] Verify both login sources (IP geolocation)
- [ ] Check for VPN/proxy usage
- [ ] Contact user for confirmation
- [ ] Review session tokens and cookies
- [ ] Check for credential sharing
- [ ] Assess data access during sessions

### VPN/Proxy Identification

| Source | Check | Tool |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Known VPN IPs | Internal VPN logs | SIEM |
| Commercial VPN | IP reputation DB | TI Feed |
| Tor exit nodes | Published list | Auto-block |

### Response Decision Matrix

| Confidence | Action | SLA |
|:---|:---|:---|
| High (no VPN) | Suspend + investigate | 15 min |
| Medium | User verification | 1 hr |
| Low (VPN likely) | Log + monitor | 24 hrs |

## References

- [MITRE ATT&CK T1078 вҖ” Valid Accounts](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1078/)


---

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Insider_Threat.en.md
# Playbook: Insider Threat

**ID**: PB-14
**Severity**: High/Critical | **Category**: Data Protection / HR
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1534](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1534/) (Internal Spearphishing), [T1567](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1567/) (Exfiltration Over Web Service), [T1052](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1052/) (Exfiltration Over Physical Medium)
**Trigger**: UEBA alert, DLP alert, HR referral, Whistleblower report, Manager report

### Risk Assessment Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Indicator["рҹҡЁ Indicator"] --> Risk{"вҡ–пёҸ Level?"}
    Risk -->|Low: off-hours access| Monitor["рҹ‘ҒпёҸ Monitor 30 days"]
    Risk -->|Medium: bulk download| CovertOps["рҹ•өпёҸ Covert Investigation"]
    Risk -->|High: exfil + resignation| Overt["рҹ”ҙ Overt вҖ” Lock Account"]
    CovertOps --> Evidence{"рҹ“Ғ Evidence?"}
    Evidence -->|Yes| HR["рҹ‘Ҙ HR + Legal"]
    Evidence -->|No| Continue["рҹ”„ Continue Monitoring"]
```

### Coordination Flow

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant SOC
    participant HR
    participant Legal
    participant Manager
    participant IT
    SOC->>HR: Report insider threat indicators
    HR->>Legal: Consult legal requirements
    Legal-->>HR: Recommend approach
    HR->>Manager: Consult (overt cases)
    SOC->>IT: Increase DLP monitoring
    HR->>SOC: Approve overt action
    SOC->>IT: Lock account + preserve data
```

> вҡ пёҸ **IMPORTANT**: Insider threat investigations are highly sensitive. Coordinate with HR and Legal BEFORE taking visible actions. Do NOT alert the subject prematurely.

---

## Decision Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ Insider Threat Indicator"] --> Type{"рҹ“Ӣ Indicator Type?"}
    Type -->|UEBA / DLP Alert| Technical["рҹ”Қ Technical Investigation"]
    Type -->|HR Referral| HR["рҹ“һ HR Coordination First"]
    Type -->|Tip / Report| Context["рҹ”Қ Validate Report"]
    Technical --> Status{"рҹ‘Ө Employment Status?"}
    HR --> Status
    Context --> Status
    Status -->|Leaving / Notice Period| HighRisk["рҹ”ҙ High Risk вҖ” Accelerate"]
    Status -->|Active Employee| Assess["вҡ пёҸ Assess Behavior"]
    Status -->|Already Departed| Urgent["рҹҡЁ Check What Was Taken"]
    HighRisk --> Scope["рҹ“Ҡ Scope Assessment"]
    Assess --> Scope
    Urgent --> Scope
    Scope --> Action{"Confirmed Malicious?"}
    Action -->|Yes| Contain["рҹ”’ Contain + Legal"]
    Action -->|Unclear| Monitor["рҹ‘ҒпёҸ Enhanced Monitoring"]
```

---

## 1. Analysis

### 1.1 Behavioral Indicators

| Category | Indicators | Detection |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **Data hoarding** | Bulk file downloads, mass email forwards | DLP, CASB |
| **Unusual access** | Accessing files outside job scope | UEBA, file audit |
| **Off-hours activity** | Logins at 2 AM, weekends (unusual for role) | SIEM, UEBA |
| **USB usage** | Large USB transfers, new USB devices | DLP, Endpoint |
| **Cloud uploads** | Large uploads to personal cloud | Proxy, CASB |
| **Email to personal** | Forwarding work email to personal account | Email DLP |
| **Privilege abuse** | Accessing admin tools beyond role needs | SIEM, PAM |
| **Resignation context** | Recent resignation, PIP, conflict | HR referral |
| **Technical evasion** | Disabling monitoring tools, clearing logs | EDR, SIEM |

### 1.2 Employment Context

| Check | Action | Source | Done |
|:---|:---|:---|:---:|
| Employment status | Active / Notice / PIP / Terminated? | HR | вҳҗ |
| Recent performance issues | Written warnings, conflicts? | HR | вҳҗ |
| Access level | What systems/data can they access? | IAM / CMDB | вҳҗ |
| Departure date (if leaving) | How much time remains? | HR | вҳҗ |
| Known grievances | Labor disputes, denied promotion? | HR (confidential) | вҳҗ |

### 1.3 Technical Scope Assessment

| Check | How | Done |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Files accessed in past 30 days | DLP / File audit / Cloud audit | вҳҗ |
| Email sent to external addresses | Email gateway logs | вҳҗ |
| USB device connections | Endpoint agent / SIEM | вҳҗ |
| Cloud uploads (personal services) | Proxy / CASB | вҳҗ |
| Print jobs (large or sensitive) | Print server logs | вҳҗ |
| Code repository activity | Git/SVN audit (clones, downloads) | вҳҗ |
| Screenshots / screen recording | Endpoint monitoring | вҳҗ |

---

## 2. Containment

### 2.1 Covert Containment (Before Confrontation)

| # | Action | Owner | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Enable enhanced monitoring (DLP, UEBA, email) | SOC | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Restrict USB ports (silently via GPO) | IT Ops | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Block personal cloud service URLs | Proxy | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Capture forensic image of laptop (during maintenance window) | Forensics | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Place legal hold on email / cloud storage | Legal + IT | вҳҗ |

### 2.2 Overt Containment (After Decision to Act)

| # | Action | Owner | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Disable all accounts immediately | IT Security | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Revoke VPN, remote access, badge access | IT + Physical Security | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Seize company devices (laptop, phone) | HR + Physical Security | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Escort from premises (if on-site) | Physical Security + HR | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Disable email / redirect to manager | IT | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. Investigation (Forensic)

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Create forensic image of all assigned devices | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Analyze email for data sent to personal accounts | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Review USB connection history (mounted devices, file copies) | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Analyze browser history (personal cloud, file sharing) | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Review print history for sensitive documents | вҳҗ |
| 6 | Check code repository activity (bulk clone, branch downloads) | вҳҗ |
| 7 | Analyze deleted files (recycle bin, $Recycle.Bin forensics) | вҳҗ |
| 8 | Document timeline of all suspicious activities | вҳҗ |

---

## 4. Recovery & Legal

### 4.1 Immediate

| # | Action | Owner | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Brief HR and Legal on findings | SOC Lead | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Determine employment action (termination, warning) | HR + Legal | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Assess data exposure вҖ” what was taken? | SOC + Business unit | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Notify affected parties if PII exposed | Legal / DPO | вҳҗ |

### 4.2 Long-Term

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Update DLP rules based on exfiltration method used | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Review access controls for the role (over-provisioned?) | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Implement/enhance UEBA baselining | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Conduct security awareness on insider threat indicators | вҳҗ |

---

## 5. Evidence Checklist

| Evidence Type | What to Collect | Source | Why It Matters |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Access evidence | Unusual file access, data exports, repository activity, print jobs | SIEM / DLP / repo audit / print logs | Shows what the insider actually touched or removed |
| Device evidence | USB history, browser/cloud-sync activity, forensic image, deleted files | Endpoint forensics / EDR | Proves staging, copying, or destruction behavior |
| Identity evidence | User role, recent privilege changes, shared-account use, badge/VPN access | IAM / HR / physical security | Connects suspicious activity to actual access rights |
| Behavioral and case evidence | HR concerns, resignation status, warnings, manager reports, legal hold | HR / legal / case records | Establishes motive context and supports lawful handling |
| Timeline evidence | Ordered sequence of technical and business events | Case notes / SIEM / forensics | Critical for legal review and defensible executive decisions |

---

## 6. Minimum Telemetry Required

| Telemetry Source | Required For | Priority | Blind Spot If Missing |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| DLP, file, and repository telemetry | Bulk access, copying, external sharing, source-code activity | Required | Cannot quantify exfiltration or sabotage behavior |
| Endpoint and USB telemetry | Removable media, browser upload, local staging, deleted files | Required | Physical copying and local staging remain hidden |
| Identity, badge, and remote-access telemetry | User access path, after-hours entry, VPN, privilege use | Required | Insider activity cannot be tied to access context reliably |
| HR and legal case context | Employment actions, resignation, approved investigation scope | Required | Technical findings may be misread without business context |
| Print, email, and cloud-collaboration logs | Less obvious data-removal channels | Recommended | Non-USB/non-download exfiltration paths may be missed |

---

## 7. False Positive and Tuning Guide

| Scenario | Why It Looks Suspicious | How to Validate | Tuning Action | Escalate If |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Approved bulk export or project handoff | Large file access can resemble theft | Confirm ticket, project owner, destination, and business need | Tune only for approved user/project/destination combinations | Export includes unrelated sensitive data or personal destination |
| Developer repo clone or backup task | Large source-code sync may look exfiltrative | Validate device, branch, repo owner, and working hours | Baseline expected engineering sync patterns narrowly | Same user also uses USB, personal cloud, or off-hours access |
| HR or finance after-hours work | Sensitive data access can spike during payroll or close | Confirm calendar cycle, manager approval, and exact datasets | Lower severity for known cyclical workflows | Access expands beyond normal role or coincides with resignation concerns |
| Security or legal collection | Covert review or litigation hold may generate quiet bulk access | Validate legal hold ID and collector identity | Suppress only documented collection accounts and windows | Collection reaches uncontrolled destinations or uses personal accounts |

---

## 8. Escalation Criteria

| Condition | Escalate To |
|:---|:---|
| PII or customer data confirmed exfiltrated | Legal + DPO (PDPA 72h) |
| Source code / trade secrets taken | CISO + Legal + Executive |
| Evidence of sabotage (deleting data) | CISO + Legal |
| Armed/threatening behavior | Physical Security + Police |
| Collusion with external party | CISO + Legal + Law enforcement |

---

### Insider Threat Indicators

```mermaid
graph TD
    UEBA["рҹ”Қ UEBA"] --> Behav{"рҹ§  Behavioral?"}
    UEBA --> Tech{"рҹ’» Technical?"}
    Behav --> Resign["рҹ“қ Resignation/dissatisfaction"]
    Behav --> Hours["рҹ•җ Behavioral changes"]
    Tech --> Volume["рҹ“Ҡ Excessive downloads"]
    Tech --> Access["рҹ”“ Unusual data access"]
    Tech --> USB["рҹ’ҫ USB/Cloud upload"]
    Volume --> Score["вҡ пёҸ Risk Score"]
    Access --> Score
    USB --> Score
    style Score fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
```

### Covert Investigation Process

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant HR
    participant Legal
    participant SOC
    participant Forensics
    HR->>Legal: Report abnormal behavior
    Legal->>SOC: вң… Approve covert investigation
    SOC->>Forensics: Collect evidence (covert)
    Forensics->>SOC: рҹ“Ӣ Reports ready
    SOC->>Legal: Present evidence
    Legal->>HR: Take action
    Note over SOC: вҡ пёҸ Do not alert suspect!
```

## Detection Rules (Sigma)

| Rule | File |
|:---|:---|
| Bulk File Copy to USB | [file_bulk_usb_copy.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/file_bulk_usb_copy.yml) |
| Large Upload to External IP | [net_large_upload.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/net_large_upload.yml) |
| Suspicious Inbox Rule Created | [cloud_email_inbox_rule.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/cloud_email_inbox_rule.yml) |

## Related Documents

- [IR Framework](../Framework.en.md)
- [Incident Report](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.en.md)
- [PB-08 Data Exfiltration](Data_Exfiltration.en.md)
- [Data Governance Policy](../../07_Compliance_Privacy/Data_Governance_Policy.en.md)
- [PDPA Compliance](../../07_Compliance_Privacy/PDPA_Compliance.en.md)

## References

- [MITRE ATT&CK T1534 вҖ” Internal Spearphishing](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1534/)
- [CISA Insider Threat Mitigation Guide](https://www.cisa.gov/topics/physical-security/insider-threat-mitigation)
- [CERT Insider Threat Center](https://www.sei.cmu.edu/our-work/insider-threat/)

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Insider_Threat.th.md
# Playbook: аё аёұаёўаё„аёёаёҒаё„аёІаёЎаёҲаёІаёҒаё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ (Insider Threat)

**ID**: PB-14
**аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ**: аёӘаё№аёҮ/аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• | **аё«аёЎаё§аё”аё«аёЎаё№а№Ҳ**: аё аёұаёўаёҲаёІаёҒаё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1078](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1078/) (аёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёөаё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ), [T1048](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1048/) (аёҒаёІаёЈаёҷаёіаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӯаёӯаёҒ)
**аё—аёЈаёҙаёҒа№ҖаёҒаёӯаёЈа№Ң**: UEBA alert, DLP alert, HR referral, whistleblower report, аёңаё№а№үаёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈаёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷ


## аё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң (Post-Incident)

- [ ] аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ access controls аё•аёІаёЎ least privilege
- [ ] а№ғаёҠа№ү UEBA а№Җаёқа№үаёІ anomalous behavior аё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаёҷаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ
- [ ] аёӯаёұаёһа№Җаё”аё— DLP policies аё•аёІаёЎ insider patterns аё—аёөа№Ҳаёһаёҡ
- [ ] аёӣаёЈаё°аёӘаёІаёҷ HR аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ disciplinary actions
- [ ] аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ monitoring policies аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ high-risk users
- [ ] аёҲаёұаё”аё—аёі [Incident Report](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.th.md)

### а№Ғаёҷаё§аё—аёІаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ

```mermaid
graph TD
    Indicator["рҹҡЁ аё•аёұаё§аёҡа№ҲаёҮаёҠаёөа№ү"] --> Risk{"вҡ–пёҸ аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ?"}
    Risk -->|аё•а№Ҳаёі: а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮаёҷаёӯаёҒа№Җаё§аёҘаёІ| Monitor["рҹ‘ҒпёҸ а№Җаёқа№үаёІаёЈаё°аё§аёұаёҮ 30 аё§аёұаёҷ"]
    Risk -->|аёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ: download аёЎаёІаёҒ| CovertOps["рҹ•өпёҸ аёӘаёӯаёҡаёӘаё§аёҷа№Ғаёҡаёҡ Covert"]
    Risk -->|аёӘаё№аёҮ: exfil + аёҘаёІаёӯаёӯаёҒ| Overt["рҹ”ҙ Overt вҖ” аёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө"]
    CovertOps --> Evidence{"рҹ“Ғ аёЎаёөаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ?"}
    Evidence -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| HR["рҹ‘Ҙ HR + Legal"]
    Evidence -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ| Continue["рҹ”„ а№Җаёқа№үаёІаёЈаё°аё§аёұаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯ"]
```

### аёңаёұаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёЈаё°аёӘаёІаёҷаёҮаёІаёҷ

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant SOC
    participant HR
    participant Legal
    participant Manager
    participant IT
    SOC->>HR: а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ insider threat indicators
    HR->>Legal: аёӣаёЈаё¶аёҒаё©аёІа№ҖаёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёҒаёҺаё«аёЎаёІаёў
    Legal-->>HR: а№Ғаёҷаё°аёҷаёіаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷ
    HR->>Manager: аёӣаёЈаё¶аёҒаё©аёІ (аёҒаёЈаё“аёө overt)
    SOC->>IT: а№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎ DLP monitoring
    HR->>SOC: аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ overt action
    SOC->>IT: аёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө + preserve data
```

---

## аёңаёұаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲ

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ аёҒаёҙаёҲаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎаё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷаёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ"] --> Intent{"рҹҺҜ а№ҖаёҲаё•аёҷаёІ?"}
    Intent -->|аёЈа№үаёІаёў (malicious)| Mal["рҹ”ҙ аёӘаёӯаёҡаёӘаё§аёҷаёҘаёұаёҡ"]
    Intent -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳаё•аёұа№үаёҮа№ғаёҲ (negligent)| Neg["рҹҹ  а№ғаё«а№үаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаё№а№ү + аё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ"]
    Intent -->|аё–аё№аёҒаёҡаёұаёҮаё„аёұаёҡ (coerced)| Coerce["рҹ”ҙ аёӘаёӯаёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ + аёҠа№Ҳаё§аёўа№Җаё«аёҘаё·аёӯ"]
    Mal --> Evidence["рҹ“Ӣ аёЈаё§аёҡаёЈаё§аёЎаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ"]
    Coerce --> Evidence
    Evidence --> HRLIT["вҡ–пёҸ аё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёЈа№Ҳаё§аёЎ HR/Legal"]
```

---

## 1. аёҒаёІаёЈаё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң

### 1.1 аё•аёұаё§аёҡа№ҲаёҮаёҠаёөа№үаёһаёӨаё•аёҙаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎ

| аё•аёұаё§аёҡа№ҲаёҮаёҠаёөа№ү | аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ | а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| аё”аёІаё§аёҷа№Ңа№Ӯаё«аёҘаё”/аё„аёұаё”аёҘаёӯаёҒаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёҲаёіаёҷаё§аёҷаёЎаёІаёҒ | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ | DLP / UEBA |
| а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёҷаёӯаёҒаёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё•аё«аёҷа№үаёІаё—аёөа№Ҳ | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ | UEBA |
| а№ғаёҠа№ү USB/cloud storage аёӘа№ҲаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӯаёӯаёҒ | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ | DLP / EDR |
| а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡаёҷаёӯаёҒа№Җаё§аёҘаёІаё—аёіаёҮаёІаёҷаёҡа№Ҳаёӯаёў | рҹҹЎ аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ | SIEM |
| аёӯаёўаё№а№ҲаёЈаё°аё«аё§а№ҲаёІаёҮаёҘаёІаёӯаёӯаёҒ (notice period) | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ | HR |
| аё–а№ҲаёІаёўаёЈаё№аёӣаё«аёҷа№үаёІаёҲаёӯ (shoulder surfing) | рҹҹЎ аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ | аёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷа№Җаёһаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҷаёЈа№Ҳаё§аёЎаёҮаёІаёҷ |
| аё•аёҙаё”аё•аёұа№үаёҮ unauthorized tools | рҹҹ  аёӘаё№аёҮ | EDR |
| а№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷ permissons / аёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ң | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ | IAM audit |
| аёӯа№ҲаёІаёҷаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ competitor / M&A | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ | DLP |

### 1.2 аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ (**аёҘаёұаёҡ**)

| аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈ | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| аёЈаё°аёҡаёёаёһаёҷаёұаёҒаёҮаёІаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ | UEBA / DLP | вҳҗ |
| аёҒаёҙаёҲаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎаё—аёөа№Ҳаёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙаё„аё·аёӯаёӯаё°а№„аёЈ? | SIEM / DLP | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёөаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё–аё№аёҒаёӘа№ҲаёҮаёӯаёӯаёҒаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—аёӯаё°а№„аёЈ? | DLP / Netflow | вҳҗ |
| аёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮаё—аёІаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№ү (USB, email, cloud, print) | DLP / EDR | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёө context аёҲаёІаёҒ HR? (аёҘаёІаёӯаёӯаёҒ, аё–аё№аёҒаёҘаёҮа№Ӯаё—аё©) | HR | вҳҗ |
| timeline аёӮаёӯаёҮаёҒаёҙаёҲаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎ | SIEM | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёөаёҡаёёаё„аё„аёҘаёӯаё·а№Ҳаёҷа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ? | UEBA correlation | вҳҗ |

> вҡ пёҸ **аёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ**: аё«а№үаёІаёЎа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаёһаёҷаёұаёҒаёҮаёІаёҷаёҲаёҷаёҒаё§а№ҲаёІаёҲаё°аёӣаёЈаё¶аёҒаё©аёІ HR + Legal а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§

---

## 2. аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ

### 2.1 аёӘаёӯаёҡаёӘаё§аёҷаёҘаёұаёҡ (Covert)

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | а№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎ UEBA/DLP monitoring аёҘаёұаёҡ | вҳҗ |
| 2 | аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒ forensic image а№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№ү | вҳҗ |
| 3 | а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ HR + Legal аёҘаёұаёҡ | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аёҲаёіаёҒаёұаё” USB access (аё«аёІаёҒаёўаёұаёҮа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө policy) | вҳҗ |
| 5 | а№Җаёқа№үаёІаёЈаё°аё§аёұаёҮаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮаё—аёІаёҮаёӘа№ҲаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӯаёӯаёҒ | вҳҗ |

### 2.2 аё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮаё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө (Overt вҖ” аёҒаёЈаё“аёөа№ҖаёЈа№ҲаёҮаё”а№Ҳаё§аёҷ)

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **аёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө** аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **аёўаё¶аё”аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң** аёЈа№Ҳаё§аёЎаёҒаёұаёҡ HR | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **аёҡаёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒ VPN/Remote access** | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **аёӘаёіаёЈаёӯаёҮ forensic evidence** | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаёіаёҲаёұаё”

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | аёҘаёҡаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө / аёӣаёҙаё”аёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ңаё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” | вҳҗ |
| 2 | аё«аёЎаёёаёҷа№Җаё§аёөаёўаёҷ credentials аё—аёөа№ҲаёһаёҷаёұаёҒаёҮаёІаёҷа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮа№„аё”а№ү | вҳҗ |
| 3 | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ service accounts / shared accounts | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аёўаё¶аё”аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңа№ҒаёҘаё°аёӘаёіаёЈаёӯаёҮ forensics аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” | вҳҗ |

---

## 4. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҹаё·а№үаёҷаёҹаё№

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | аёӣаёЈаёұаёҡаёӣаёЈаёёаёҮ DLP rules | вҳҗ |
| 2 | аёӣаёЈаёұаёҡаёӣаёЈаёёаёҮ offboarding checklist аёЈа№Ҳаё§аёЎ HR | вҳҗ |
| 3 | а№ғаёҠа№ү UEBA аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёһаёҷаёұаёҒаёҮаёІаёҷ high-risk | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аёҲаёіаёҒаёұаё” USB / removable media | вҳҗ |
| 5 | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ңаё—аёёаёҒа№„аё•аёЈаёЎаёІаёӘ | вҳҗ |

---

## 5. Evidence Checklist

| аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ | аёӘаёҙа№ҲаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ | а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёңаёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ | file access аёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ, data export, repo activity, print job | SIEM / DLP / repo audit / print logs | а№ғаёҠа№үаё”аё№аё§а№ҲаёІаёңаё№а№үаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёўа№Ғаё•аё°аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӯаё°а№„аёЈа№„аёӣаёҡа№үаёІаёҮ |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёҲаёІаёҒаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң | USB history, browser/cloud-sync activity, forensic image, deleted file | Endpoint forensics / EDR | а№ғаёҠа№үаёһаёҙаёӘаё№аёҲаёҷа№Ң staging, copying, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёіаёҘаёІаёўаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаё”а№үаёІаёҷаё•аёұаё§аё•аёҷ | user role, privilege change аёҘа№ҲаёІаёӘаёёаё”, shared-account use, badge/VPN access | IAM / HR / physical security | а№ғаёҠа№үаёңаё№аёҒаёҒаёҙаёҲаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёҒаёұаёҡаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ңаё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёөаёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮ |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷа№ҖаёҠаёҙаёҮаёһаёӨаё•аёҙаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎа№ҒаёҘаё°аё„аё”аёө | HR concern, resignation status, warning, manager report, legal hold | HR / legal / case records | а№ғаёҠа№үаёӣаёЈаё°аёҒаёӯаёҡаёҡаёЈаёҙаёҡаё—а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё•аёІаёЎаёҒаёҺаё«аёЎаёІаёў |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ timeline | аёҘаёіаё”аёұаёҡа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ңаё—аёІаёҮа№Җаё—аё„аёҷаёҙаё„а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҳаёёаёЈаёҒаёҙаёҲаё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” | Case notes / SIEM / forensics | аёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚаёЎаёІаёҒаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ legal review а№ҒаёҘаё° executive decision |

---

## 6. Minimum Telemetry Required

| а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮ Telemetry | а№ғаёҠа№үа№Җаёһаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёӯаё°а№„аёЈ | аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ | Blind Spot аё–а№үаёІа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| DLP, file, а№ҒаёҘаё° repository telemetry | аё”аё№ bulk access, copying, external sharing, source-code activity | Required | аё§аёұаё” exfiltration аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ sabotage а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№ү |
| Endpoint а№ҒаёҘаё° USB telemetry | аё”аё№ removable media, browser upload, local staging, deleted file | Required | аёЎаёӯаёҮа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№Җаё«а№ҮаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ copy аё—аёІаёҮаёҒаёІаёўаё аёІаёһа№ҒаёҘаё°аёҒаёІаёЈ staging аёҡаёҷа№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ |
| Identity, badge, а№ҒаёҘаё° remote-access telemetry | аё”аё№ access path, after-hours entry, VPN, privilege use | Required | аёңаё№аёҒ insider activity аёҒаёұаёҡаёҡаёЈаёҙаёҡаё—аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№ү |
| HR а№ҒаёҘаё° legal case context | аё”аё№ employment action, resignation, а№ҒаёҘаё° approved investigation scope | Required | аёӯа№ҲаёІаёҷаё„аё§аёІаёЎаё«аёЎаёІаёўаёӮаёӯаёҮ technical finding аёңаёҙаё”а№„аё”а№үаёҮа№ҲаёІаёў |
| Print, email, а№ҒаёҘаё° cloud-collaboration logs | аё”аё№аёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮаё—аёІаёҮаёҷаёіаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӯаёӯаёҒаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№Ҳ USB/download | Recommended | аёһаёҘаёІаё”а№ҖаёӘа№үаёҷаё—аёІаёҮ exfiltration аё—аёІаёҮаёӯа№үаёӯаёЎ |

---

## 7. False Positive а№ҒаёҘаё° Tuning Guide

| Scenario | аё—аёіа№„аёЎаёҲаё¶аёҮаё”аё№аёҷа№ҲаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёў | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | Tuning Action | аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| аёҮаёІаёҷ export аёҲаёіаёҷаё§аёҷаёЎаёІаёҒаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёӘа№ҲаёҮаёЎаёӯаёҡ project аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | data access аёӣаёЈаёҙаёЎаёІаё“аёЎаёІаёҒаё”аё№а№Җаё«аёЎаё·аёӯаёҷ theft | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ ticket, project owner, destination, а№ҒаёҘаё° business need | tune а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё° user/project/destination аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | export аёЎаёөаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӯа№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аё«аё§аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёӘа№ҲаёҮа№„аёӣ personal destination |
| developer clone repo аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ backup аё•аёІаёЎаёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ | sync source code аёҲаёіаёҷаё§аёҷаёЎаёІаёҒаё”аё№а№Җаё«аёЎаё·аёӯаёҷ exfiltration | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ device, branch, repo owner, а№ҒаёҘаё°а№Җаё§аёҘаёІаёҮаёІаёҷ | baseline expected engineering sync pattern а№Ғаёҡаёҡа№Ғаё„аёҡ | user а№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷа№ғаёҠа№ү USB, personal cloud, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮаёҷаёӯаёҒа№Җаё§аёҘаёІаёӣаёҒаё•аёҙаёЈа№Ҳаё§аёЎаё”а№үаё§аёў |
| аёҮаёІаёҷаё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№Җаё§аёҘаёІаёҮаёІаёҷаёӮаёӯаёҮ HR аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ finance | аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӯа№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аё«аё§аёҒаёҘаёІаёҮаё„аё·аёҷаё”аё№аёҷа№ҲаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёў | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаёЈаёӯаёҡаёҮаёІаёҷ, аёҒаёІаёЈаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙаёҲаёІаёҒаё«аёұаё§аё«аёҷа№үаёІ, а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҠаёёаё”аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ | аёҘаё” severity аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ workflow аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёҙаё”а№Җаёӣа№ҮаёҷаёЈаёӯаёҡаё•аёІаёЎ business cycle | аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮаёӮаёўаёІаёўа№ҖаёҒаёҙаёҷ role аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№ҖаёҒаёҙаё”аёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎ resignation concern |
| аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҒа№ҮаёҡаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘа№Җаёһаё·а№Ҳаёӯ legal аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ security investigation | bulk access а№Ғаёҡаёҡа№ҖаёҮаёөаёўаёҡаёӯаёІаёҲаё”аё№а№Җаё«аёЎаё·аёӯаёҷ insider action | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ legal hold ID а№ҒаёҘаё° collector identity | suppress а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё° account а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҠа№Ҳаё§аёҮа№Җаё§аёҘаёІаё—аёөа№Ҳ documented | аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҒа№ҮаёҡаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘа№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮаёӣаёҘаёІаёўаё—аёІаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№ғаёҠа№ү personal account |

---

## 8. а№ҖаёҒаё“аё‘а№ҢаёҒаёІаёЈаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ

| а№ҖаёҮаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аёӮ | аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ |
|:---|:---|
| PII / аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёҘаё№аёҒаё„а№үаёІаё–аё№аёҒаёӘа№ҲаёҮаёӯаёӯаёҒ | Legal + DPO (PDPA 72 аёҠаёЎ.) |
| аё—аёЈаёұаёһаёўа№ҢаёӘаёҙаёҷаё—аёІаёҮаёӣаёұаёҚаёҚаёІаё–аё№аёҒаёӮа№ӮаёЎаёў | Legal + CISO |
| аё—аёіаёЈа№Ҳаё§аёЎаёҒаёұаёҡаёҡаёёаё„аё„аёҘаё аёІаёўаёҷаёӯаёҒ (sabotage/espionage) | Law Enforcement |
| аёһаёӨаё•аёҙаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎаё„аёёаёҒаё„аёІаёЎ (threatening behavior) | HR + Security аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө |
| Admin abuse | [PB-15 Rogue Admin](Rogue_Admin.th.md) |

---

### аёңаёұаёҮ Insider Threat Indicators

```mermaid
graph TD
    UEBA["рҹ”Қ UEBA"] --> Behav{"рҹ§  Behavioral?"}
    UEBA --> Tech{"рҹ’» Technical?"}
    Behav --> Resign["рҹ“қ аёҘаёІаёӯаёӯаёҒ/а№„аёЎа№Ҳаёһаёӯа№ғаёҲ"]
    Behav --> Hours["рҹ•җ аёһаёӨаё•аёҙаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷ"]
    Tech --> Volume["рҹ“Ҡ Download аёЎаёІаёҒ"]
    Tech --> Access["рҹ”“ а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ"]
    Tech --> USB["рҹ’ҫ USB/Cloud upload"]
    Volume --> Score["вҡ пёҸ Risk Score"]
    Access --> Score
    USB --> Score
    style Score fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
```

### аёңаёұаёҮ Covert Investigation Process

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant HR
    participant Legal
    participant SOC
    participant Forensics
    HR->>Legal: аёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷаёһаёӨаё•аёҙаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎаёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ
    Legal->>SOC: вң… аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ covert investigation
    SOC->>Forensics: а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ evidence (аёҘаёұаёҡ)
    Forensics->>SOC: рҹ“Ӣ Reports ready
    SOC->>Legal: аёҷаёіа№ҖаёӘаёҷаёӯаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ
    Legal->>HR: аё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ
    Note over SOC: вҖӢвҡ пёҸ аё«а№үаёІаёЎа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ suspect!
```

## аёҒаёҺаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ (Sigma)

| аёҒаёҺ | а№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң |
|:---|:---|
| Bulk File Copy to USB | [file_bulk_usb_copy.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/file_bulk_usb_copy.yml) |
| Large Upload to External IP | [net_large_upload.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/net_large_upload.yml) |
| Suspicious Inbox Rule Created | [cloud_email_inbox_rule.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/cloud_email_inbox_rule.yml) |

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ

- [аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң](../Framework.th.md)
- [а№ҒаёЎа№Ҳа№ҒаёҡаёҡаёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.th.md)
- [PB-20 а№Ғаёӯаё”аёЎаёҙаёҷаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёіаёңаёҙаё”](Rogue_Admin.th.md)
- [PB-08 аёҒаёІаёЈаёҷаёіаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӯаёӯаёҒ](Data_Exfiltration.th.md)

## Insider Threat Indicators Correlation

| Category | Behavioral | Technical | Combined Risk |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Pre-resignation | Notice given | Mass download | рҹ”ҙ Critical |
| Disgruntled | Performance issues | After-hours access | рҹҹ  High |
| Negligent | Policy violations | Unpatched system | рҹҹЎ Medium |
| Compromised | Phished | Unusual C2 traffic | рҹ”ҙ Critical |

### Investigation without Alerting Subject

| Step | Method | Precaution |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Monitor activity | Silent DLP/UEBA | Need-to-know only |
| Review access logs | Backend query | No user-facing alerts |
| Capture evidence | Forensic copy | Legal hold |
| Coordinate HR/Legal | Offline meeting | Secure channel |

### Data Impact Classification

| Data Accessed | Severity | Notification |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Customer PII | Critical | PDPA required |
| Financial data | High | CFO + Legal |
| Source code | High | CTO |
| General internal | Medium | SOC Manager |

## References

- [MITRE ATT&CK вҖ” Insider Threat](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1078/)
- [CERT вҖ” Common Sense Guide to Insider Threats](https://insights.sei.cmu.edu/library/common-sense-guide-to-mitigating-insider-threats/)
