## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Log_Clearing.th.md
# Playbook: аёҒаёІаёЈаёҘаёҡ/а№ҒаёҒа№үа№„аёӮ Log

**ID**: PB-20
**аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ**: аёӘаё№аёҮ/аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• | **аё«аёЎаё§аё”аё«аёЎаё№а№Ҳ**: аёҒаёІаёЈаёӣа№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёұаёҷаё•аёұаё§ (Defense Evasion)
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1070.001](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1070/001/) (Clear Windows Event Logs), [T1070.002](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1070/002/) (Clear Linux/Mac Logs)
**аё—аёЈаёҙаёҒа№ҖаёҒаёӯаёЈа№Ң**: SIEM gap detection, Event ID 1102/104, file integrity alert, log integrity failure


## аё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң (Post-Incident)

- [ ] а№ғаёҠа№ү immutable logging (WORM storage)
- [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ log forwarding аё§а№ҲаёІаёӘаёЎаёҡаё№аёЈаё“а№Ң
- [ ] аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ log retention policies
- [ ] а№ғаёҠа№ү tamper protection аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ EDR logs
- [ ] аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ alert аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ log deletion events
- [ ] аёҲаёұаё”аё—аёі [Incident Report](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.th.md)

### аёңаёұаёҮа№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮ Log аёӘаёіаёЈаёӯаёҮ

```mermaid
graph TD
    Cleared["рҹ—‘пёҸ Log аё–аё№аёҒаёҘаёҡ"] --> Backup{"рҹ’ҫ Log аёӘаёіаёЈаёӯаёҮ?"}
    Backup -->|SIEM| SIEM["рҹ“Ҡ SIEM retained"]
    Backup -->|Syslog Server| Syslog["рҹ“Ӣ Syslog copy"]
    Backup -->|Cloud| Cloud["вҳҒпёҸ CloudWatch/LA"]
    Backup -->|WORM| WORM["рҹ”’ Immutable storage"]
    SIEM --> Recover["вҷ»пёҸ аёҒаё№а№үаё„аё·аёҷ timeline"]
    Syslog --> Recover
    Cloud --> Recover
    WORM --> Recover
```

### аёңаёұаёҮаёҘаёіаё”аёұаёҡа№Җаё§аёҘаёІ

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Attacker
    participant System
    participant SIEM
    participant SOC
    Attacker->>System: рҹ”Ё Compromise
    Attacker->>System: рҹ—‘пёҸ аёҘаёҡ Event Logs
    System->>SIEM: (gap detected!)
    SIEM->>SOC: рҹҡЁ Log gap alert
    SOC->>SIEM: аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ logs аёҒа№Ҳаёӯаёҷаё–аё№аёҒаёҘаёҡ
    SOC->>SOC: аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ timeline аёҲаёІаёҒ backup
```

---

## аёңаёұаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲ

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ Log аё–аё№аёҒаёҘаёҡ/а№ҒаёҒа№үа№„аёӮ"] --> Source{"рҹ”Қ а№ғаё„аёЈаёҘаёҡ?"}
    Source -->|Admin аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ| Verify["вң… аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ Change Ticket"]
    Source -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳаё—аёЈаёІаёҡ/а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ| Suspicious["рҹ”ҙ аёҷа№ҲаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёў"]
    Source -->|Service Account| Auto["вҡҷпёҸ аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ Automation"]
    Suspicious --> Scope{"рҹ“Ҡ аёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё•?"}
    Scope -->|аёЈаё°аёҡаёҡа№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§| Single["рҹҹ  аёӘаёӯаёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ Host"]
    Scope -->|аё«аёҘаёІаёўаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ| Multiple["рҹ”ҙ аёҒаёҙаёҲаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎаёңаё№а№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө"]
    Multiple --> Hunt["рҹ”Қ Threat Hunt а№Җаё•а№ҮаёЎаёЈаё№аёӣа№Ғаёҡаёҡ"]
    Single --> Hunt
    Verify --> Close["рҹ“Ӣ аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒа№ҒаёҘаё°аёӣаёҙаё”"]
```

---

## 1. аёҒаёІаёЈаё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң

### 1.1 аёЈаё№аёӣа№ҒаёҡаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаёҘаёҡ Log

| аё§аёҙаёҳаёө | Windows Event ID | Linux | аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **аёҘа№үаёІаёҮ Event Log** | **1102** (Security), **104** (System) | вҖ” | SIEM alert |
| **аёҘаёҡа№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң Log** | Sysmon Event 23 | `rm /var/log/*` | FIM |
| **аё«аёўаёёаё” Service** | 7036 (eventlog service) | `systemctl stop rsyslog` | SIEM |
| **а№ҒаёҒа№үа№„аёӮ timestamp** | вҖ” | `touch`, `timestomp` | SIEM timestamp gap |
| **аёӣаёҙаё” Audit Policy** | 4719 | `auditctl -D` | GPO / SIEM |
| **аёҘаёҡ Syslog Forward** | вҖ” | а№ҒаёҒа№үа№„аёӮ rsyslog.conf | Config monitoring |

### 1.2 аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ

| аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈ | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Log а№ғаё”аё–аё№аёҒаёҘаёҡ? (Security, System, Application) | SIEM / Event ID 1102, 104 | вҳҗ |
| а№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯа№ғаё”? | SIEM timestamp | вҳҗ |
| а№ғаё„аёЈаёҘаёҡ? (username, process) | SIEM / EventLog | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёө change request аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | ITSM | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёөаёҒаёҙаёҲаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎаёӯаёұаёҷаё•аёЈаёІаёўаёӯаё·а№ҲаёҷаёҒа№Ҳаёӯаёҷаё«аёҷа№үаёІаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | SIEM timeline | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёөаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡаёӯаё·а№Ҳаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳ log аё–аё№аёҒаёҘаёҡаё”а№үаё§аёўаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | SIEM search | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёө backup log аёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | SIEM / Log archive | вҳҗ |
| Audit policy аё–аё№аёҒа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | GPO / Event 4719 | вҳҗ |

> вҡ пёҸ **аёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ**: аёҒаёІаёЈаёҘаёҡ log аёЎаёұаёҒа№Җаёӣа№ҮаёҷаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷ **аё«аёҘаёұаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө** вҖ” аёЎаёөа№ӮаёӯаёҒаёІаёӘаёӘаё№аёҮаё§а№ҲаёІаёЎаёөа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ңаёӯаё·а№Ҳаёҷаё—аёөа№ҲаёЈа№үаёІаёўа№ҒаёЈаёҮаёҒаё§а№ҲаёІа№ҖаёҒаёҙаё”аёӮаё¶а№үаёҷаё”а№үаё§аёў

---

## 2. аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ

### 2.1 аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Isolate** host аё—аёөа№Ҳ log аё–аё№аёҒаёҘаёҡ | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **аёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө** аё—аёөа№ҲаёҘаёҡ log (аё–а№үаёІа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№Ҳ authorized admin) | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **аёӘаёіаёЈаёӯаёҮ** log аё—аёөа№Ҳа№Җаё«аёҘаё·аёӯа№ҒаёҘаё° memory dump аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ SIEM** вҖ” аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аёөа№ҲаёӘа№ҲаёҮа№„аёӣ SIEM аёҒа№Ҳаёӯаёҷаё–аё№аёҒаёҘаёҡаёўаёұаёҮаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳ | вҳҗ |
| 5 | **а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” enhanced logging** | вҳҗ |

### 2.2 аё„а№үаёҷаё«аёІаёҒаёҙаёҲаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎаёҒа№Ҳаёӯаёҷаё«аёҷа№үаёІ

аё„а№үаёҷаё«аёІа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ңаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёҙаё”аёӮаё¶а№үаёҷ **аёҒа№Ҳаёӯаёҷ** log аё–аё№аёҒаёҘаёҡ:

| аё„а№үаёҷаё«аёІ | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Lateral movement | AD logs, network | вҳҗ |
| Privilege escalation | Event 4672, 4728 | вҳҗ |
| Malware execution | EDR telemetry | вҳҗ |
| Data exfiltration | DLP / Netflow | вҳҗ |
| Account creation | Event 4720 | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаёіаёҲаёұаё”

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | аёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ңаё«аёҘаёұаёҒ (malware/intrusion аё—аёөа№Ҳаё—аёіа№ғаё«а№үаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёҘаёҡ log) | вҳҗ |
| 2 | аё„аё·аёҷаё„а№ҲаёІ audit policies аё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷ | вҳҗ |
| 3 | аёҘаёҡ tools аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№үаёҘаёҡ log | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аё«аёЎаёёаёҷа№Җаё§аёөаёўаёҷ credentials | вҳҗ |

---

## 4. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҹаё·а№үаёҷаёҹаё№

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | аёҒаё№а№үаё„аё·аёҷ log аёҲаёІаёҒ backup / SIEM аё—аёөа№ҲаёўаёұаёҮаёЎаёөаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳ | вҳҗ |
| 2 | аёҡаёұаёҮаё„аёұаёҡ centralized logging вҖ” WORM storage | вҳҗ |
| 3 | а№ғаёҠа№ү Sysmon аёЈа№Ҳаё§аёЎаёҒаёұаёҡ Event Forwarding | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аёҡаёұаёҮаё„аёұаёҡ GPO аёӣаёҙаё”аёҒаёұа№үаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёҘаёҡ log | вҳҗ |
| 5 | а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” log integrity monitoring (FIM) | вҳҗ |
| 6 | аё•аёҙаё”аё•аёІаёЎ 30 аё§аёұаёҷ | вҳҗ |

---

## 5. а№ҖаёҒаё“аё‘а№ҢаёҒаёІаёЈаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ

| а№ҖаёҮаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аёӮ | аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ |
|:---|:---|
| Log аё–аё№аёҒаёҘаёҡаё«аёҘаёұаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө (аёӣаёҒаёӣаёҙаё”аёЈа№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЈаёӯаёў) | Major Incident |
| Admin аёҘаёҡ log а№Ӯаё”аёўа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | CISO + HR ([PB-15 Rogue Admin](Rogue_Admin.th.md)) |
| аё«аёҘаёІаёўаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡаё–аё№аёҒаёҘаёҡ log аёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎаёҒаёұаёҷ | Tier 2 + Threat Hunt |
| Audit policy аё–аё№аёҒаёӣаёҙаё” | CISO аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө |
| а№„аёЎа№ҲаёӘаёІаёЎаёІаёЈаё–аёҒаё№а№үаё„аё·аёҷ log а№„аё”а№ү | Legal (аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷа№„аёЎа№ҲаёӘаёЎаёҡаё№аёЈаё“а№Ң) |

---

### аёңаёұаёҮ Log Protection Architecture

```mermaid
graph TD
    Source["рҹ“қ Log Source"] --> Agent["рҹ“Ў Agent forward"]
    Agent --> SIEM["рҹ“Ҡ SIEM (immutable)"]
    Agent --> WORM["рҹ”’ WORM storage"]
    Source --> Local["рҹ’Ҫ Local (vulnerable)"]
    Local -.->|вқҢ аё–аё№аёҒаёҘаёҡ| Attacker["рҹ”ҙ Attacker"]
    SIEM -.->|вң… аёўаёұаёҮаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳ| SOC["рҹҺҜ SOC"]
    style WORM fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style SIEM fill:#3498db,color:#fff
    style Local fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
```

### аёңаёұаёҮ Log Source Priority

```mermaid
graph LR
    Priority["рҹ“Ӣ Priority"] --> P1["рҹ”ҙ P1: Auth logs"]
    Priority --> P2["рҹҹ  P2: Firewall/Proxy"]
    Priority --> P3["рҹҹЎ P3: Application"]
    Priority --> P4["рҹҹў P4: Debug"]
    P1 --> SIEM["рҹ“Ҡ SIEM real-time"]
    P2 --> SIEM
    P3 --> Archive["рҹ—„пёҸ Archive 1yr"]
    P4 --> Archive
    style P1 fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style P2 fill:#f39c12,color:#fff
```

## аёҒаёҺаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ (Sigma)

| аёҒаёҺ | а№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң |
|:---|:---|
| Windows Security Log Cleared | [win_security_log_cleared.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/win_security_log_cleared.yml) |

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ

- [аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң](../Framework.th.md)
- [а№ҒаёЎа№Ҳа№ҒаёҡаёҡаёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.th.md)
- [PB-14 аё аёұаёўаё„аёёаёҒаё„аёІаёЎаёҲаёІаёҒаё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ](Insider_Threat.th.md)
- [PB-20 а№Ғаёӯаё”аёЎаёҙаёҷаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёіаёңаёҙаё”](Rogue_Admin.th.md)

## Log Tampering Detection Matrix

| Log Type | Expected Volume | Clearing Indicator | Detection |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Windows Security | > 100 events/hr | Event 1102 | Immediate |
| Linux syslog | > 50 lines/hr | Sudden gap | 5 min check |
| Application | Varies | Zero events | Baseline compare |
| Firewall | > 200 events/hr | Counter reset | Continuous |

### Anti-Tampering Controls

| Control | Implementation | Priority |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Log forwarding | Real-time to SIEM | P1 |
| Immutable storage | WORM/append-only | P1 |
| Integrity monitoring | File hash checking | P2 |
| Admin audit trail | Privileged action logging | P1 |

### Backup Log Verification

| Source | Forwarded To | Verified |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Windows Events | SIEM | вҳҗ |
| Linux syslog | Syslog server | вҳҗ |
| Network devices | SIEM | вҳҗ |

## References

- [MITRE ATT&CK T1070 вҖ” Indicator Removal](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1070/)


---

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Lost_Device.en.md
# Playbook: Lost/Stolen Device

**ID**: PB-19
**Severity**: Medium/High | **Category**: Physical Security / Data Protection
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1025](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1025/) (Data from Removable Media), [T1552](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1552/) (Unsecured Credentials)
**Trigger**: Employee report (device lost/stolen), MDM non-check-in alert, Asset mismatch

### Risk Assessment

```mermaid
graph TD
    Lost["рҹ“ұ Device Lost"] --> Encrypt{"рҹ”’ Encrypted?"}
    Encrypt -->|Yes| Low["рҹҹў Low Risk"]
    Encrypt -->|No| High["рҹ”ҙ High Risk"]
    Low --> Data{"рҹ“Ғ Sensitive Data?"}
    High --> Wipe["рҹ“І Remote Wipe Now"]
    Data -->|Yes| Wipe
    Data -->|No| Lock["рҹ”’ Remote Lock"]
```

### Remote Wipe Flow

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant SOC
    participant MDM
    participant IT
    User->>SOC: рҹ“һ Report lost device
    SOC->>MDM: Remote Lock
    SOC->>SOC: Assess data risk
    SOC->>MDM: Remote Wipe
    MDM-->>SOC: вң… Wipe initiated
    SOC->>IT: Revoke certificates
```

---

## Decision Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Report["рҹ“ұ Device Lost/Stolen"] --> Type{"рҹ’» Device Type?"}
    Type -->|Laptop| Encrypt{"рҹ”’ Full Disk Encryption?"}
    Type -->|Mobile| MDM{"рҹ“І MDM Managed?"}
    Encrypt -->|Yes, BitLocker/FileVault| MedRisk["рҹҹЎ Medium Risk"]
    Encrypt -->|No / Unknown| HighRisk["рҹ”ҙ High Risk"]
    MDM -->|Yes, Passcode Set| MedRisk
    MDM -->|No / No Passcode| HighRisk
    MedRisk --> Data{"рҹ“„ Sensitive Data?"}
    HighRisk --> Wipe["рҹ—‘пёҸ Remote Wipe ASAP"]
    Data -->|Yes, PII/Source/Creds| Wipe
    Data -->|No, Standard| Revoke["рҹ”‘ Revoke & Monitor"]
    Wipe --> Creds["рҹ”„ Reset All Credentials"]
    Revoke --> Creds
    Creds --> Replace["рҹ’» Provision New Device"]
```

---

## 1. Analysis

### 1.1 Initial Assessment

| Question | Answer | Done |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| What type of device? (laptop, phone, tablet) | | вҳҗ |
| Make/model/serial number | | вҳҗ |
| When was it last seen/used? | | вҳҗ |
| Where was it lost? (office, travel, public) | | вҳҗ |
| Was it lost or stolen? (theft vs misplaced) | | вҳҗ |
| Full disk encryption enabled? (BitLocker/FileVault/LUKS) | | вҳҗ |
| Device passcode/PIN set? | | вҳҗ |
| MDM enrolled? | | вҳҗ |
| Last MDM check-in time? | | вҳҗ |

### 1.2 Data Risk Assessment

| Data Category | Present on Device? | Classification |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Source code / IP | вҳҗ Yes вҳҗ No | L3/L4 |
| Customer PII | вҳҗ Yes вҳҗ No | L4 |
| Financial data | вҳҗ Yes вҳҗ No | L4 |
| Credentials / SSH keys | вҳҗ Yes вҳҗ No | L4 |
| Email / chat history | вҳҗ Yes вҳҗ No | L2/L3 |
| VPN certificates / config | вҳҗ Yes вҳҗ No | L3 |
| Browser saved passwords | вҳҗ Yes вҳҗ No | L4 |
| Cloud sync (OneDrive/Dropbox) | вҳҗ Yes вҳҗ No | L2-L4 |

---

## 2. Containment

### 2.1 Immediate Actions (within 30 minutes)

| # | Action | Tool | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Remote wipe** command | Intune / Jamf / Google Workspace | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **Lock device** (if wipe fails or pending) | MDM | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **Reset domain password** | AD / IdP | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **Revoke VPN / Wi-Fi certificates** | Certificate authority | вҳҗ |
| 5 | **Revoke OAuth tokens / active sessions** | IdP session management | вҳҗ |
| 6 | **Disable device in Azure AD / IdP** | Azure AD / Okta | вҳҗ |

### 2.2 If Device Is Unencrypted or Stolen (High Risk)

| # | Additional Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Reset ALL passwords the user may have saved in browser | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Rotate SSH keys, API tokens, certificates on the device | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Revoke cloud sync app tokens (OneDrive, Dropbox, iCloud) | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Check for sensitive files in recent activity | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Notify Legal if PII was on the device | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. Investigation

| Check | How | Done |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Any login attempts from device after loss? | SIEM вҖ” filter by device serial/hostname | вҳҗ |
| Any VPN connections from device? | VPN logs | вҳҗ |
| MDM wipe confirmed? | MDM console вҖ” wipe status | вҳҗ |
| Location tracking available? | MDM / Find My Device | вҳҗ |
| Police report filed? (if stolen) | Physical security / User | вҳҗ |

---

## 4. Recovery

| # | Action | Owner | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Provision new device with current SOE image | IT Operations | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Restore user data from cloud backup | IT / User | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Re-enroll new device in MDM | IT Operations | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Issue new certificates (VPN, Wi-Fi) | IT Security | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Verify all credential resets are complete | SOC | вҳҗ |
| 6 | Remove old device from asset inventory | Asset Management | вҳҗ |
| 7 | Monitor for old device serial in logs for 30 days | SOC | вҳҗ |

---

## 5. Evidence Checklist

| Evidence Type | What to Collect | Source | Why It Matters |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Asset evidence | Serial number, asset tag, device type, owner, encryption status | Asset inventory / MDM | Defines whether the event is administrative loss or data-breach risk |
| Access evidence | Last sign-in, VPN use, certificate use, cloud-app access after loss | IdP / VPN / app logs | Shows whether the missing device became active compromise |
| Location evidence | Last check-in, GPS, Wi-Fi AP, IP, remote-lock/wipe status | MDM / network logs | Supports recovery attempts and timing of exposure |
| Data exposure evidence | Cached mail, local files, stored credentials, removable media use | MDM / DLP / endpoint inventory | Determines breach and notification impact |
| Incident context evidence | User statement, theft report, police report, travel context | Ticketing / HR / physical security | Distinguishes theft, negligence, and possible targeted activity |

---

## 6. Minimum Telemetry Required

| Telemetry Source | Required For | Priority | Blind Spot If Missing |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| MDM and asset telemetry | Device state, encryption, remote actions, inventory | Required | Cannot confirm whether the device is protected or wiped |
| Identity and application access logs | Sign-ins, token use, cert usage, cloud app access after loss | Required | Cannot detect misuse of the device after it was reported missing |
| VPN and network telemetry | Remote access attempts, last internal connectivity, unusual source IPs | Required | Device-enabled remote compromise may be missed |
| DLP and data classification telemetry | Sensitive data likely stored on the device | Recommended | Breach assessment becomes guesswork |
| Physical security and HR records | Theft details, location, user travel, police follow-up | Recommended | Context for targeted theft or insider angle is weak |

---

## 7. False Positive and Tuning Guide

| Scenario | Why It Looks Suspicious | How to Validate | Tuning Action | Escalate If |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Device temporarily offline or battery dead | Missed check-ins can look like theft or tampering | Confirm user location, travel, and later MDM heartbeat | Tune offline-duration alerts by device class and travel pattern | Device comes back online with unexpected sign-ins or location |
| Device in repair or IT staging | Asset removal from normal use can resemble loss | Check repair ticket, custodian, and storage location | Suppress only for approved repair/staging workflows | Device is powered on or used outside authorized handling flow |
| BYOD selective wipe or unenroll | Ownership changes can create noisy MDM events | Validate BYOD offboarding request and user confirmation | Separate BYOD workflows from corporate-owned device alerts | Corporate tokens stay active or sensitive data remains reachable |
| Travel-related customs or airport hold | Long offline periods and odd geolocation may look malicious | Confirm itinerary and no access attempts during hold | Lower severity when travel is documented and device remains encrypted | VPN, certificate, or cloud-app use appears after report time |

---

## 8. Escalation Criteria

| Condition | Escalate To |
|:---|:---|
| Unencrypted device with PII | Legal + DPO (PDPA 72h) |
| Executive / VIP device stolen | CISO + Physical Security |
| Device shows login activity after reported lost | Tier 2 вҖ” treat as active compromise |
| Source code or credentials on device | CISO + Engineering lead |
| Multiple devices lost (pattern) | Physical Security + HR |

---

## 9. IoC Collection

| Type | Value | Source |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Device serial / asset tag | | Asset management |
| Last known IP | | MDM / DHCP logs |
| Last known Wi-Fi AP | | MDM / network logs |
| Last GPS coordinates | | MDM (if enabled) |
| User account | | HR / AD |
| Last sign-in time | | Azure AD / Okta |
| Corporate apps installed | | MDM inventory |
| VPN connection history | | VPN gateway logs |

## 10. Post-Incident

- [ ] Update asset management system (mark device as lost/stolen)
- [ ] Review and update device encryption enforcement policy
- [ ] Verify MDM enrollment compliance (are all devices enrolled?)
- [ ] Issue replacement device with pre-configured security baseline
- [ ] Conduct awareness training on physical device security
- [ ] Review insurance coverage for lost/stolen equipment
- [ ] Document findings in [Incident Report](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.en.md)

---

### MDM Lifecycle

```mermaid
graph LR
    Enroll["рҹ“І Enroll"] --> Policy["рҹ“Ӣ Policy Push"]
    Policy --> Monitor["рҹ‘ҒпёҸ Monitor"]
    Monitor --> Alert["рҹҡЁ Lost/Stolen"]
    Alert --> Lock["рҹ”’ Remote Lock"]
    Lock --> Wipe["рҹ—‘пёҸ Selective Wipe"]
    Wipe --> Retire["вҷ»пёҸ Retire"]
    style Alert fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Wipe fill:#c0392b,color:#fff
```

### Device Data Classification

```mermaid
graph TD
    Device["рҹ“ұ Device"] --> Type{"рҹҸ·пёҸ Data Type?"}
    Type -->|PII/PDPA| Critical["рҹ”ҙ Critical вҖ” wipe now"]
    Type -->|Business| High["рҹҹ  High вҖ” wipe 4h"]
    Type -->|General| Medium["рҹҹЎ Medium вҖ” lock + track"]
    Type -->|No data| Low["рҹҹў Low вҖ” lock only"]
    Critical --> Legal["вҡ–пёҸ Notify DPO"]
    style Critical fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Legal fill:#8e44ad,color:#fff
```

## Detection Rules (Sigma)

| Rule | File |
|:---|:---|
| Device Offline for Extended Period | [mdm_device_offline.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/mdm_device_offline.yml) |

## Related Documents

- [IR Framework](../Framework.en.md)
- [Incident Report](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.en.md)
- [PB-05 Account Compromise](Account_Compromise.en.md)
- [Data Governance Policy](../../07_Compliance_Privacy/Data_Governance_Policy.en.md)
- [PDPA Compliance](../../07_Compliance_Privacy/PDPA_Compliance.en.md)

## References

- [NIST SP 800-46 вҖ” Telework and Remote Access Security](https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-46/rev-2/final)
- [MITRE ATT&CK T1025 вҖ” Data from Removable Media](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1025/)

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Lost_Device.th.md
# Playbook: аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№ҢаёӘаё№аёҚаё«аёІаёўаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаё–аё№аёҒаёӮа№ӮаёЎаёў

**ID**: PB-19
**аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ**: аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ/аёӘаё№аёҮ | **аё«аёЎаё§аё”аё«аёЎаё№а№Ҳ**: аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӣаёҘаёӯаё”аё аёұаёўаё—аёІаёҮаёҒаёІаёўаё аёІаёһ
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1078](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1078/) (аёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёөаё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ), [T1530](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1530/) (аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёҲаёІаёҒаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡаё„аёҘаёІаё§аё”а№Ң)
**аё—аёЈаёҙаёҒа№ҖаёҒаёӯаёЈа№Ң**: аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңаё«аёІаёў/аё–аё№аёҒаёӮа№ӮаёЎаёў, MDM offline alert, аё—аёЈаёұаёһаёўа№ҢаёӘаёҙаёҷа№„аёЎа№Ҳаё•аёЈаёҮ


## аё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң (Post-Incident)

- [ ] аёӯаёұаёһа№Җаё”аё— asset management (аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё° lost/stolen)
- [ ] аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ device encryption enforcement policy
- [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ MDM enrollment compliance
- [ ] аёӯаёӯаёҒаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңаё—аё”а№Ғаё—аёҷаёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎ security baseline
- [ ] аёҲаёұаё” awareness training а№ҖаёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ physical security
- [ ] аёҲаёұаё”аё—аёі [Incident Report](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.th.md)

### аёңаёұаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ

```mermaid
graph TD
    Lost["рҹ“ұ аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңаё«аёІаёў"] --> Encrypt{"рҹ”’ а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёЈаё«аёұаёӘ?"}
    Encrypt -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| Low["рҹҹў аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёі"]
    Encrypt -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ| High["рҹ”ҙ аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаёӘаё№аёҮ"]
    Low --> Data{"рҹ“Ғ аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ?"}
    High --> Wipe["рҹ“І Remote Wipe аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө"]
    Data -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| Wipe
    Data -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ| Lock["рҹ”’ Remote Lock"]
```

### аёңаёұаёҮаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷ Remote Wipe

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant User as аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү
    participant SOC
    participant MDM
    participant IT
    User->>SOC: рҹ“һ а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңаё«аёІаёў
    SOC->>MDM: аёӘаёұа№ҲаёҮ Remote Lock
    SOC->>SOC: аёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷ data risk
    SOC->>MDM: аёӘаёұа№ҲаёҮ Remote Wipe
    MDM-->>SOC: вң… Wipe initiated
    SOC->>IT: а№ҖаёһаёҙаёҒаё–аёӯаёҷ certificates
```

---

## аёңаёұаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲ

```mermaid
graph TD
    Report["рҹ“һ а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№ҢаёӘаё№аёҚаё«аёІаёў"] --> Type{"рҹ“ұ аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң?"}
    Type -->|а№Ӯаёҷа№үаё•аёҡаёёа№ҠаёҒ| Laptop["рҹ’» а№Ӯаёҷа№үаё•аёҡаёёа№ҠаёҒ"]
    Type -->|аёЎаё·аёӯаё–аё·аёӯ/а№Ғаё—а№Үаёҡа№ҖаёҘа№Үаё•| Mobile["рҹ“ұ аёЎаё·аёӯаё–аё·аёӯ"]
    Type -->|USB/HDD| USB["рҹ’ҫ аёӘаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҲаёұаё”а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ"]
    Laptop --> Encrypted{"рҹ”’ а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёЈаё«аёұаёӘа№Җаё•а№ҮаёЎаё”аёҙаёӘаёҒа№Ң?"}
    Mobile --> MDM{"рҹ“І аёЎаёө MDM?"}
    USB --> Classify["рҹ“Ғ аёҲаёіа№ҒаёҷаёҒаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘа№ғаёҷаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң"]
    Encrypted -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ (BitLocker/FileVault)| LowRisk["рҹҹЎ аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёі вҖ” аёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒ + аё•аёҙаё”аё•аёІаёЎ"]
    Encrypted -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ| HighRisk["рҹ”ҙ аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаёӘаё№аёҮ вҖ” Wipe аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө"]
    MDM -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| Wipe["рҹ“ұ Selective/Full Wipe"]
    MDM -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ| HighRisk
    Classify -->|аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ| HighRisk
    HighRisk --> FullResponse["рҹ”’ аё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮа№Җаё•а№ҮаёЎаёЈаё№аёӣа№Ғаёҡаёҡ"]
```

---

## 1. аёҒаёІаёЈаё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң

### 1.1 аёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ

| аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | аёЎаёөаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳа№ғаёҷаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң? | а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёЈаё«аёұаёӘ? | аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| аёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘаёӯаёҮаё„а№ҢаёҒаёЈ | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ | |
| а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈ / а№„аёҹаёҘа№ҢаёҮаёІаёҷ | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ | |
| аёӢаёӯаёЈа№ҢаёӘа№Ӯаё„а№үаё” | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ | |
| PII аёҘаё№аёҒаё„а№үаёІ | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ | |
| Credentials / Keys / Tokens | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ | |
| VPN / Network access | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ | |
| аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҮаёҙаёҷ | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ | |

### 1.2 аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ

| аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈ | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| аёӘаё№аёҚаё«аёІаёўа№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯа№„аё«аёЈа№Ҳ/аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё«аёҷ? | аёӘаёұаёЎаё аёІаё©аё“а№Ңаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү | вҳҗ |
| а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаё•аёіаёЈаё§аёҲа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёөаёЈаё«аёұаёӘаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ/PIN аёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң? | MDM / аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү | вҳҗ |
| а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” Full Disk Encryption? (BitLocker/FileVault) | MDM | вҳҗ |
| аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№ҢаёҘаёҮаё—аё°а№Җаёҡаёөаёўаёҷа№ғаёҷ MDM? | Intune / Jamf | вҳҗ |
| а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” Find My Device? | Apple / Google | вҳҗ |
| аёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒаёӯаёҙаёҷаёӯаёұаё•а№ӮаёҷаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ (cached credentials) | аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү | вҳҗ |

---

## 2. аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ

### 2.1 аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **аёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң** аёЈаё°аёўаё°а№„аёҒаёҘ | MDM / Find My | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **аёЈаёөа№ҖаёӢа№Үаё•аёЈаё«аёұаёӘаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ** аёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёөаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү (AD, M365, аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё”) | AD / IdP | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **а№ҖаёһаёҙаёҒаё–аёӯаёҷ sessions** а№ҒаёҘаё° tokens аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” | IdP | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **аёҡаёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒ** аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңа№ғаёҷ Conditional Access | IdP / MDM | вҳҗ |
| 5 | **аё•аёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎаё•а№Ҳаёӯ VPN** | VPN management | вҳҗ |
| 6 | **аё«аёЎаёёаёҷа№Җаё§аёөаёўаёҷ API keys / SSH keys** аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡа№ғаёҷаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң | аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү + IT | вҳҗ |

### 2.2 аёҒаёІаёЈ Wipe

| аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң BYOD | аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№ҢаёӯаёҮаё„а№ҢаёҒаёЈ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **Selective Wipe** (аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӯаёҮаё„а№ҢаёҒаёЈа№Җаё—а№ҲаёІаёҷаёұа№үаёҷ) | вң… а№Ғаёҷаё°аёҷаёі | вҳҗ аё—аёІаёҮа№ҖаёҘаё·аёӯаёҒ |
| **Full Wipe** | вҳҗ аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёўаёҙаёҷаёўаёӯаёЎ | вң… а№Ғаёҷаё°аёҷаёі |

---

## 3. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаёіаёҲаёұаё”

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | аё«аёЎаёёаёҷа№Җаё§аёөаёўаёҷ credentials аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё”аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёІаёҲ cached а№ғаёҷаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң | вҳҗ |
| 2 | а№ҖаёһаёҙаёҒаё–аёӯаёҷ certificates аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёӯаёҒа№ғаё«а№үаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң | вҳҗ |
| 3 | аёўаёҒа№ҖаёҘаёҙаёҒа№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёӯаёӯаёҒаёҲаёІаёҒ Intune/Jamf | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аёўа№үаёІаёўаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңа№„аёӣ "Lost" group а№ғаёҷ AD | вҳҗ |

---

## 4. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҹаё·а№үаёҷаёҹаё№

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | аёӯаёӯаёҒаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңа№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳа№ғаё«а№үаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү | вҳҗ |
| 2 | аё•аёұа№үаёҮаё„а№ҲаёІ MDM + disk encryption а№ғаёҷаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңа№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ | вҳҗ |
| 3 | аёҘаёҮаё—аё°а№Җаёҡаёөаёўаёҷ MFA а№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаё§а№ҲаёІаёЎаёөаёҒаёҙаёҲаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎаёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙа№ғаёҷаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёөаёЈаё°аё«аё§а№ҲаёІаёҮаёӘаё№аёҚаё«аёІаёў | вҳҗ |
| 5 | аёӯаёұаёӣа№Җаё”аё•аё—аё°а№Җаёҡаёөаёўаёҷаё—аёЈаёұаёһаёўа№ҢаёӘаёҙаёҷ | вҳҗ |

---

## 5. Evidence Checklist

| аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ | аёӘаёҙа№ҲаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ | а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёңаёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаё—аёЈаёұаёһаёўа№ҢаёӘаёҙаёҷ | serial number, asset tag, device type, owner, encryption status | Asset inventory / MDM | а№ғаёҠа№үа№ҒаёўаёҒаё§а№ҲаёІа№Җаёӣа№ҮаёҷаёҮаёІаёҷ admin аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёЎаёөаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёЈаёұа№Ҳаё§ |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ | last sign-in, VPN use, certificate use, cloud-app access аё«аёҘаёұаёҮаёӘаё№аёҚаё«аёІаёў | IdP / VPN / app logs | а№ғаёҠа№үаё”аё№аё§а№ҲаёІаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңаё—аёөа№Ҳаё«аёІаёўаё–аё№аёҒаёҷаёіа№„аёӣа№ғаёҠа№үаё•а№Ҳаёӯаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаё•аёіа№Ғаё«аёҷа№ҲаёҮ | last check-in, GPS, Wi-Fi AP, IP, аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё° remote lock/wipe | MDM / network logs | а№ғаёҠа№үаёҠа№Ҳаё§аёўаёҒаё№а№үаё„аё·аёҷа№ҒаёҘаё°аёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷа№Җаё§аёҘаёІа№ҖаёЈаёҙа№ҲаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈа№Җаёӣаёҙаё”а№ҖаёңаёўаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | cached mail, local file, saved credential, removable media use | MDM / DLP / endpoint inventory | а№ғаёҠа№үаёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷ breach а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮа№Җаё•аё·аёӯаёҷ |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёҡаёЈаёҙаёҡаё—аёӮаёӯаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң | аё„аёіа№ғаё«а№үаёҒаёІаёЈаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү, theft report, police report, travel context | Ticketing / HR / physical security | а№ғаёҠа№үа№ҒаёўаёҒ theft, negligence, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ targeted activity |

---

## 6. Minimum Telemetry Required

| а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮ Telemetry | а№ғаёҠа№үа№Җаёһаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёӯаё°а№„аёЈ | аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ | Blind Spot аё–а№үаёІа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| MDM а№ҒаёҘаё° asset telemetry | аё”аё№ device state, encryption, remote action, inventory | Required | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаё§а№ҲаёІа№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаё–аё№аёҒаёӣа№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёұаёҷаё«аёЈаё·аёӯ wipe а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёўаёұаёҮ |
| Identity а№ҒаёҘаё° application access logs | аё”аё№ sign-in, token use, cert use, cloud app access аё«аёҘаёұаёҮаёӘаё№аёҚаё«аёІаёў | Required | аёЎаёӯаёҮа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№Җаё«а№ҮаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈа№ғаёҠа№үаёҮаёІаёҷаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңаё«аёҘаёұаёҮаёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷаё«аёІаёў |
| VPN а№ҒаёҘаё° network telemetry | аё”аё№ remote access attempt, last connectivity, source IP а№ҒаёӣаёҘаёҒ | Required | аёһаёҘаёІаё” device-enabled remote compromise |
| DLP а№ҒаёҘаё° data classification telemetry | аё”аё№аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӯа№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аё«аё§аёӮаёӯаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёІаёҲаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳаёҡаёҷа№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ | Recommended | breach assessment аёҒаёҘаёІаёўа№Җаёӣа№ҮаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё„аёІаё”а№Җаё”аёІ |
| Physical security а№ҒаёҘаё° HR records | аё”аё№аёЈаёІаёўаёҘаё°а№Җаёӯаёөаёўаё”аёҒаёІаёЈаё«аёІаёў, аё•аёіа№Ғаё«аёҷа№ҲаёҮ, аёҒаёІаёЈа№Җаё”аёҙаёҷаё—аёІаёҮ, police follow-up | Recommended | аёҡаёЈаёҙаёҡаё—а№ҖаёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ targeted theft аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ insider angle а№„аёЎа№ҲаёҠаёұаё” |

---

## 7. False Positive а№ҒаёҘаё° Tuning Guide

| Scenario | аё—аёіа№„аёЎаёҲаё¶аёҮаё”аё№аёҷа№ҲаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёў | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | Tuning Action | аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң offline аёҠаёұа№Ҳаё§аё„аёЈаёІаё§аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№Ғаёҡаё•аё«аёЎаё” | missed check-in аё”аё№а№Җаё«аёЎаё·аёӯаёҷ theft аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ tampering | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаё•аёіа№Ғаё«аёҷа№ҲаёҮаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү аёҒаёІаёЈа№Җаё”аёҙаёҷаё—аёІаёҮ а№ҒаёҘаё° heartbeat аё аёІаёўаё«аёҘаёұаёҮ | tune аёЈаё°аёўаё°а№Җаё§аёҘаёІ offline аё•аёІаёЎаёҠаёҷаёҙаё”аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңа№ҒаёҘаё° pattern аёҒаёІаёЈа№Җаё”аёҙаёҷаё—аёІаёҮ | а№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёҒаёҘаёұаёҡаёЎаёІ online аёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎ sign-in аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ location аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳаё„аёІаё”аё„аёҙаё” |
| аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңаёӯаёўаё№а№ҲаёЈаё°аё«аё§а№ҲаёІаёҮаёӢа№ҲаёӯаёЎаё«аёЈаё·аёӯ IT staging | аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңаё«аёІаёўаёҲаёІаёҒаёҒаёІаёЈа№ғаёҠа№үаёҮаёІаёҷаёӣаёҒаё•аёҙаё”аё№а№Җаё«аёЎаё·аёӯаёҷаёӘаё№аёҚаё«аёІаёў | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ repair ticket, custodian, а№ҒаёҘаё°аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ | suppress а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё° workflow аёӢа№ҲаёӯаёЎ/а№Җаё•аёЈаёөаёўаёЎа№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңаё–аё№аёҒа№Җаёӣаёҙаё”а№ғаёҠа№үаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёҷаёіаёӯаёӯаёҒаёҷаёӯаёҒ flow аё—аёөа№ҲаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё” |
| BYOD selective wipe аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ unenroll | MDM event аёҡаёІаёҮаёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮаё”аё№а№Җаё«аёЎаё·аёӯаёҷ loss event | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаё„аёіаёӮаёӯ BYOD offboarding а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҒаёІаёЈаёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаёҲаёІаёҒаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү | а№ҒаёўаёҒ workflow аёӮаёӯаёҮ BYOD аёӯаёӯаёҒаёҲаёІаёҒ corporate-owned | corporate token аёўаёұаёҮ active аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚаёўаёұаёҮа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮа№„аё”а№ү |
| аёҒаёІаёЈа№Җаё”аёҙаёҷаё—аёІаёҮаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаё”а№ҲаёІаёҷаёӘаёҷаёІаёЎаёҡаёҙаёҷаё—аёіа№ғаё«а№ү offline аёҷаёІаёҷ | offline аёҷаёІаёҷа№ҒаёҘаё° geolocation а№ҒаёӣаёҘаёҒаё”аё№аёҷа№ҲаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёў | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ itinerary а№ҒаёҘаё°а№„аёЎа№Ҳаёһаёҡ access аёЈаё°аё«аё§а№ҲаёІаёҮаёҷаёұа№үаёҷ | аёҘаё” severity а№ҖаёЎаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎаёөа№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈа№Җаё”аёҙаёҷаё—аёІаёҮа№ҒаёҘаё°а№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёўаёұаёҮ encrypted | аёЎаёө VPN, certificate, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ cloud-app use аё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№Җаё§аёҘаёІаёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷаё«аёІаёў |

---

## 8. а№ҖаёҒаё“аё‘а№ҢаёҒаёІаёЈаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ

| а№ҖаёҮаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аёӮ | аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ |
|:---|:---|
| PII аёҘаё№аёҒаё„а№үаёІа№ғаёҷаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёЈаё«аёұаёӘ | Legal + DPO (PDPA 72 аёҠаёЎ.) |
| аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңаёңаё№а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈаё«аёЈаё·аёӯ admin | CISO аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө |
| аёЎаёөаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаё§а№ҲаёІаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңаё–аё№аёҒа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮаё«аёҘаёұаёҮаёӘаё№аёҚаё«аёІаёў | Major Incident |
| аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңаё«аёҘаёІаёўа№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёӘаё№аёҚаё«аёІаёў (аёЈаё№аёӣа№Ғаёҡаёҡ) | Security + HR |
| аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңаё–аё№аёҒаёӮа№ӮаёЎаёўаёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮа№ҖаёҲаёІаё°аёҲаёҮ | Law Enforcement |

---

### аёңаёұаёҮ MDM Lifecycle

```mermaid
graph LR
    Enroll["рҹ“І Enroll"] --> Policy["рҹ“Ӣ Policy Push"]
    Policy --> Monitor["рҹ‘ҒпёҸ Monitor"]
    Monitor --> Alert["рҹҡЁ Lost/Stolen"]
    Alert --> Lock["рҹ”’ Remote Lock"]
    Lock --> Wipe["рҹ—‘пёҸ Selective Wipe"]
    Wipe --> Retire["вҷ»пёҸ Retire"]
    style Alert fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Wipe fill:#c0392b,color:#fff
```

### аёңаёұаёҮ Device Data Classification

```mermaid
graph TD
    Device["рҹ“ұ аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң"] --> Type{"рҹҸ·пёҸ аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ?"}
    Type -->|PII/PDPA| Critical["рҹ”ҙ Critical вҖ” wipe аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө"]
    Type -->|Business| High["рҹҹ  High вҖ” wipe 4h"]
    Type -->|General| Medium["рҹҹЎ Medium вҖ” lock + track"]
    Type -->|No data| Low["рҹҹў Low вҖ” lock а№Җаё—а№ҲаёІаёҷаёұа№үаёҷ"]
    Critical --> Legal["вҡ–пёҸ а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ DPO"]
    style Critical fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Legal fill:#8e44ad,color:#fff
```

## аёҒаёҺаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ (Sigma)

|:---|:---|

- [аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң](../Framework.th.md)

## 9. Device Type Response Matrix

| Device Type | Remote Wipe | Data Risk | Priority |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Laptop (encrypted) | вң… MDM | Low | Medium |
| Laptop (unencrypted) | вң… MDM | Critical | Urgent |
| Mobile (managed) | вң… MDM | Low | Medium |
| Mobile (BYOD) | Limited | Medium | High |
| USB/External drive | вқҢ N/A | High | High |

### Lost Device Checklist

| Step | Action | Timeline | Owner |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| 1 | Report to SOC | Immediately | User |
| 2 | Revoke access tokens | 15 min | SOC |
| 3 | Change passwords | 30 min | User + IT |
| 4 | Remote wipe (if possible) | 1 hr | MDM Admin |
| 5 | File police report | 24 hrs | User |
| 6 | Assess data exposure | 48 hrs | Security |

### Device Data Risk Assessment

| Data Type | Encrypted? | Risk |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Email cache | Check policy | Medium-High |
| VPN credentials | Usually | Medium |
| Saved passwords | Browser-dependent | High |

## References

- [NIST SP 800-124r2 вҖ” Mobile Device Management](https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-124/rev-2/final)

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/MFA_Bypass.en.md
# Playbook: MFA Bypass / Token Theft

**ID**: PB-26
**Severity**: High/Critical | **Category**: Identity & Access
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1556.006](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1556/006/) (MFA Modification), [T1539](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1539/) (Steal Web Session Cookie), [T1111](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1111/) (Multi-Factor Authentication Interception)
**Trigger**: AiTM proxy detection, session token anomaly, MFA fatigue (push spam), IdP risk alert

> вҡ пёҸ **CRITICAL**: MFA bypass means the attacker defeated your strongest control вҖ” act immediately.

### AiTM (Adversary-in-the-Middle) Attack

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Victim
    participant Proxy as Phishing Proxy
    participant IdP as Azure AD
    Victim->>Proxy: 1. Click phishing link
    Proxy->>IdP: 2. Forward credentials
    IdP-->>Proxy: 3. MFA challenge
    Proxy-->>Victim: 4. Show MFA prompt
    Victim->>Proxy: 5. Complete MFA
    Proxy->>IdP: 6. Send MFA response
    IdP-->>Proxy: 7. Session cookie
    Note over Proxy: рҹҺҜ Stolen session cookie!
    Proxy->>Proxy: 8. Access account with cookie
```

### MFA Security Levels

```mermaid
graph LR
    SMS["рҹ“ұ SMS OTP"] --> TOTP["рҹ“І TOTP App"]
    TOTP --> Push["рҹ”” Push Notification"]
    Push --> NumberMatch["рҹ”ў Number Matching"]
    NumberMatch --> FIDO["рҹ”‘ FIDO2/Passkey"]
    style SMS fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style TOTP fill:#f39c12,color:#fff
    style Push fill:#f1c40f,color:#000
    style NumberMatch fill:#2ecc71,color:#fff
    style FIDO fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
```

---

## Decision Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ MFA Bypass / Token Anomaly"] --> Method{"вҡҷпёҸ Attack Method?"}
    Method -->|AiTM Proxy| AiTM["рҹҺЈ Adversary-in-the-Middle"]
    Method -->|MFA Fatigue| Fatigue["рҹ“І Push Spam / Bombing"]
    Method -->|Token Theft| Token["рҹҚӘ Session Cookie Stolen"]
    Method -->|SIM Swap| SIM["рҹ“һ SMS MFA Hijacked"]
    Method -->|Device Compromise| Device["рҹ’» Malware Stealing Tokens"]
    AiTM --> Phish["рҹ”Қ Find Phishing Page"]
    Fatigue --> Contact["рҹ“һ Contact User"]
    Token --> Replay["рҹ”Қ Identify Token Replay"]
    SIM --> Carrier["рҹ“һ Contact Carrier"]
    Device --> EDR["рҹ”Қ Check Endpoint"]
    Phish --> Revoke["рҹ”’ Revoke All Sessions"]
    Contact -->|User Accepted Push| Revoke
    Contact -->|User Didn't Accept| FP["вң… MFA Held вҖ” Monitor"]
    Replay --> Revoke
    Carrier --> Revoke
    EDR --> Revoke
```

---

## 1. Analysis

### 1.1 MFA Bypass Methods

| Method | How It Works | Detection |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **AiTM Proxy** (EvilProxy, Evilginx) | Phishing page proxies real login, captures session token | URL mismatch, certificate analysis, TI feeds |
| **MFA Fatigue / Push Bombing** | Spam MFA push notifications until user accepts | Multiple denied pushes then accept, SIEM correlation |
| **Session Token Theft** | Malware/script steals browser cookies | Different IP using same session ID, impossible geo |
| **SIM Swap** | Attacker takes over phone number for SMS OTP | User loses signal, carrier reports, auth logs |
| **Device Compromise** | Malware ex filtrates TOTP seeds or session cookies | EDR alerts, browser extension analysis |
| **Social Engineering** | Helpdesk tricked into resetting MFA | Reset without ticket, call recording review |

### 1.2 Investigation Checklist

| Check | How | Done |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Identify the bypass method used | Sign-in logs, phishing analysis, user interview | вҳҗ |
| Review sign-in logs for anomalies | Azure AD / Okta вҖ” IP, location, device, risk | вҳҗ |
| Check for session token replay | Same session ID from different IPs | вҳҗ |
| MFA push notification history | IdP MFA logs вҖ” denied then accepted? | вҳҗ |
| Newly registered MFA methods | IdP audit вҖ” new phone, new authenticator? | вҳҗ |
| OAuth app consents since compromise | Enterprise Applications audit | вҳҗ |
| Inbox forwarding rules created | Exchange audit, `Get-InboxRule` | вҳҗ |
| Data accessed during compromised session | Cloud audit logs, file activity | вҳҗ |

### 1.3 Post-Compromise Activity (What Did Attacker Do?)

| Activity | Check | Done |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Email access / forwarding | Inbox rules, message trace | вҳҗ |
| File downloads | SharePoint / OneDrive audit | вҳҗ |
| MFA method changes | IdP authentication methods audit | вҳҗ |
| Password changes | Directory audit | вҳҗ |
| Privilege changes | Role assignments, group changes | вҳҗ |
| OAuth app consents | Enterprise app permissions | вҳҗ |
| Internal phishing sent | Outbox / sent items | вҳҗ |

---

## 2. Containment

### 2.1 Immediate Actions (within 5 minutes)

| # | Action | Tool | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Revoke ALL sessions** and refresh tokens | IdP (`Revoke-AzureADUserAllRefreshToken`) | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **Block compromised session** cookie/token | IdP / WAF | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **Disable account** temporarily | IdP | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **Block AiTM infrastructure** (phishing domain/IP) | Firewall / DNS / Proxy | вҳҗ |
| 5 | **Remove phishing email** from all mailboxes | Exchange / M365 | вҳҗ |

### 2.2 Extended Containment

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Search for same phishing email across all users | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Check if other users visited the AiTM proxy | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Revoke malicious OAuth app consents | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Remove attacker-created inbox rules / delegates | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Remove attacker-registered MFA methods | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. Eradication

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Reset password** via verified alternate channel | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **Clear ALL MFA factors** and re-register from verified device | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Use **phishing-resistant MFA** for re-enrollment (FIDO2/passkey) | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Revoke ALL OAuth app consents and re-authorize only needed apps | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Delete forwarding rules, delegates, and mail flow rules | вҳҗ |
| 6 | Scan user's device for infostealers / token-stealing malware | вҳҗ |

---

## 4. Recovery

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Re-enable account with phishing-resistant MFA (FIDO2 / passkeys) | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Enforce Conditional Access: compliant device + managed app required | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Reduce token lifetime and enable CAE (Continuous Access Evaluation) | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Enable token protection (token binding) if supported | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Block legacy authentication protocols | вҳҗ |
| 6 | Deploy number matching for push MFA (prevent fatigue attacks) | вҳҗ |
| 7 | Monitor account for 30 days | вҳҗ |

---

## 5. IoC Collection

| Type | Value | Source |
|:---|:---|:---|
| AiTM phishing URL / domain | | Email / TI |
| AiTM proxy IP | | DNS / Proxy logs |
| Compromised session token ID | | Sign-in logs |
| Attacker IP(s) | | Sign-in logs |
| Malicious OAuth app ID | | Enterprise Apps |
| Inbox rules created | | Exchange audit |
| MFA methods registered by attacker | | IdP audit |

---

## 6. Evidence Checklist

| Evidence Type | What to Collect | Source | Why It Matters |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Session evidence | Token/session IDs, auth method, IPs, timestamps, device/app context | IdP / sign-in logs | Proves that access continued past MFA and shows how |
| Phishing or AiTM evidence | URL, proxy domain/IP, redirect chain, phishing email, TLS details | Email / proxy / DNS / TI | Identifies the bypass path and campaign scope |
| Identity evidence | Registered MFA methods, recovery changes, risk flags, account role | IdP / IAM | Shows whether the attacker established persistence or targeted privileged users |
| Mailbox and cloud activity evidence | Inbox rules, OAuth grants, file access, admin actions | Exchange / cloud audit | Shows what the attacker did after bypass |
| Endpoint evidence | Browser artifacts, infostealer signs, session-cookie theft indicators | Endpoint / EDR / browser forensics | Distinguishes AiTM from local token theft on the device |

---

## 7. Minimum Telemetry Required

| Telemetry Source | Required For | Priority | Blind Spot If Missing |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| Identity provider sign-in and token telemetry | Auth method, token reuse, MFA challenge result, session anomalies | Required | Cannot prove MFA was bypassed versus normal auth success |
| Mailbox and cloud audit logs | Post-login abuse, OAuth grants, data access, admin changes | Required | Impact after compromise remains unscoped |
| Email, proxy, and DNS telemetry | AiTM domain, phishing path, user interaction, redirect chain | Required | Campaign source and bypass mechanism stay unclear |
| Endpoint telemetry | Browser theft, infostealer, device compromise indicators | Recommended | Local token theft may be missed entirely |
| Helpdesk and admin workflow logs | MFA resets, recovery actions, social-engineering traces | Recommended | Helpdesk-assisted bypass or recovery abuse may be overlooked |

---

## 8. False Positive and Tuning Guide

| Scenario | Why It Looks Suspicious | How to Validate | Tuning Action | Escalate If |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| User re-registering MFA after device replacement | MFA method changes and session resets can look malicious | Check approved helpdesk ticket and enrollment source | Suppress only approved enrollment workflows for a short window | New MFA method is added from unknown IP or followed by risky session activity |
| Admin-driven OAuth consent change | Security or app rollout may add new consent records | Validate change ticket, app owner, and admin identity | Allowlist approved app IDs and change windows narrowly | App has excessive scopes or appears in user context unexpectedly |
| Conditional Access or auth policy rollout | Token revocations and prompt patterns may spike | Confirm planned rollout and affected user set | Lower severity during approved rollout windows | Same users also hit AiTM domains or unusual sessions |
| User push fatigue without compromise | Multiple MFA prompts may happen during app retry loops | Check device/app behavior and no post-auth malicious activity | Tune by app signature and retry pattern only | MFA acceptance from abnormal source or session takeover follows |

---

## 9. Escalation Criteria

| Condition | Escalate To |
|:---|:---|
| Executive / admin account bypassed | CISO immediately |
| Multiple users compromised via AiTM | Major Incident |
| Data exfiltration during compromised session | Legal + DPO (PDPA 72h) |
| Attacker registered persistent MFA method | Tier 2 + Identity team |
| BEC follow-up from compromised account | [PB-17 BEC](BEC.en.md) |
| Helpdesk social engineering confirmed | CISO + HR |

---

### MFA Rollout Strategy

```mermaid
graph TD
    Plan["рҹ“Ӣ MFA Rollout"] --> Admin["рҹ‘‘ Phase 1: Admin"]
    Admin --> VIP["рҹҸў Phase 2: VIP/Finance"]
    VIP --> All["рҹ‘Ҙ Phase 3: All users"]
    All --> FIDO["рҹ”‘ Phase 4: FIDO2"]
    Admin --> Enforce["рҹ”’ Enforce"]
    VIP --> Enforce
    All --> Enforce
    style Admin fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style FIDO fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
```

### Phishing-Resistant MFA Comparison

```mermaid
graph LR
    MFA{"рҹ“ұ MFA Type"} --> SMS["рҹ“І SMS вҖ” вқҢ SIM swap"]
    MFA --> TOTP["рҹ”ў TOTP вҖ” вҡ пёҸ Phishable"]
    MFA --> Push["рҹ”” Push вҖ” вҡ пёҸ Fatigue"]
    MFA --> Number["рҹ”ў Number Match вҖ” вң… Better"]
    MFA --> FIDO["рҹ”‘ FIDO2 вҖ” вң… Best"]
    style SMS fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style TOTP fill:#f39c12,color:#fff
    style Push fill:#f39c12,color:#fff
    style Number fill:#2ecc71,color:#fff
    style FIDO fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
```

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/MFA_Bypass.th.md
# Playbook: аёҒаёІаёЈаё«аёҘаёөаёҒа№ҖаёҘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ MFA / аёҒаёІаёЈаёӮа№ӮаёЎаёў Token

**ID**: PB-26
**аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ**: аёӘаё№аёҮ/аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• | **аё«аёЎаё§аё”аё«аёЎаё№а№Ҳ**: Identity & Access
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1556.006](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1556/006/) (MFA Modification), [T1539](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1539/) (Steal Web Session Cookie)
**аё—аёЈаёҙаёҒа№ҖаёҒаёӯаёЈа№Ң**: Identity Protection alert, Conditional Access anomaly, аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷ MFA prompt а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёӮаёӯ


## аё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң (Post-Incident)

- [ ] аёӯаёұаёһа№ҖаёҒаёЈаё”а№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ Phishing-resistant MFA (FIDO2/passkeys)
- [ ] аёӣаёҙаё” SMS/Voice MFA аё–а№үаёІа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷа№„аёӣа№„аё”а№ү
- [ ] а№ғаёҠа№ү number matching аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ push notifications
- [ ] аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ MFA registration policies
- [ ] а№ғаёҠа№ү token protection (token binding)
- [ ] аёҲаёұаё”аё—аёі [Incident Report](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.th.md)

### аёңаёұаёҮ AiTM (Adversary-in-the-Middle) Attack

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Victim as а№Җаё«аёўаё·а№Ҳаёӯ
    participant Proxy as Phishing Proxy
    participant IdP as Azure AD
    Victim->>Proxy: 1. аё„аёҘаёҙаёҒаёҘаёҙаёҮаёҒа№ҢаёҹаёҙаёҠаёҠаёҙаёҮ
    Proxy->>IdP: 2. аёӘа№ҲаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯ credentials
    IdP-->>Proxy: 3. MFA challenge
    Proxy-->>Victim: 4. а№ҒаёӘаё”аёҮ MFA prompt
    Victim->>Proxy: 5. аёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ MFA
    Proxy->>IdP: 6. аёӘа№ҲаёҮ MFA response
    IdP-->>Proxy: 7. Session cookie
    Note over Proxy: рҹҺҜ а№„аё”а№ү session cookie!
    Proxy->>Proxy: 8. а№ғаёҠа№ү cookie а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө
```

### аёңаёұаёҮаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӣаёҘаёӯаё”аё аёұаёў MFA

```mermaid
graph LR
    SMS["рҹ“ұ SMS OTP"] --> TOTP["рҹ“І TOTP App"]
    TOTP --> Push["рҹ”” Push Notification"]
    Push --> NumberMatch["рҹ”ў Number Matching"]
    NumberMatch --> FIDO["рҹ”‘ FIDO2/Passkey"]
    style SMS fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style TOTP fill:#f39c12,color:#fff
    style Push fill:#f1c40f,color:#000
    style NumberMatch fill:#2ecc71,color:#fff
    style FIDO fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
```
> вҡ пёҸ **аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё•**: MFA bypass аё«аёЎаёІаёўаё„аё§аёІаёЎаё§а№ҲаёІаёңаё№а№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөа№ҖаёӯаёІаёҠаёҷаё°аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҒаёӮа№ҮаёҮа№ҒаёҒаёЈа№ҲаёҮаё—аёөа№ҲаёӘаёёаё”а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§ вҖ” аё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө

---

## аёңаёұаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲ

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ MFA Bypass / Token аёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ"] --> Method{"вҡҷпёҸ аё§аёҙаёҳаёөа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө?"}
    Method -->|AiTM Proxy| AiTM["рҹҺЈ Adversary-in-the-Middle"]
    Method -->|MFA Fatigue| Fatigue["рҹ“І Push Spam"]
    Method -->|Token Theft| Token["рҹҚӘ аёӮа№ӮаёЎаёў Session Cookie"]
    Method -->|SIM Swap| SIM["рҹ“һ аёӮа№ӮаёЎаёўаё«аёЎаёІаёўа№ҖаёҘаёӮ SMS"]
    AiTM --> Phish["рҹ”Қ аё„а№үаёҷаё«аёІаё«аёҷа№үаёІ Phishing"]
    Fatigue --> Contact["рҹ“һ аё•аёҙаё”аё•а№Ҳаёӯаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү"]
    Token --> Replay["рҹ”Қ аёЈаё°аёҡаёё Token Replay"]
    SIM --> Carrier["рҹ“һ аё•аёҙаё”аё•а№Ҳаёӯаёңаё№а№үа№ғаё«а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаёҒаёІаёЈ"]
    Phish --> Revoke["рҹ”’ а№ҖаёһаёҙаёҒаё–аёӯаёҷ Sessions аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё”"]
    Contact -->|аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаёҒаё” Accept| Revoke
    Contact -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёҒаё”| FP["вң… MFA аёӣа№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёұаёҷа№„аё”а№ү вҖ” аё•аёҙаё”аё•аёІаёЎ"]
    Replay --> Revoke
    Carrier --> Revoke
```

---

## 1. аёҒаёІаёЈаё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң

### 1.1 аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаёҒаёІаёЈаё«аёҘаёөаёҒа№ҖаёҘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ MFA

| аё§аёҙаёҳаёө | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё—аёіаёҮаёІаёҷ | аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **AiTM Proxy** (EvilProxy, Evilginx) | аё«аёҷа№үаёІ phishing proxy аёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒаёӯаёҙаёҷаёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮ аёҲаёұаёҡ session token | URL а№„аёЎа№Ҳаё•аёЈаёҮ, TI feeds |
| **MFA Fatigue** | аёӘа№ҒаёӣаёЎаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮа№Җаё•аё·аёӯаёҷ push аёҲаёҷаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаёҒаё” accept | аё«аёҘаёІаёў deny а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§ accept, SIEM |
| **Session Token Theft** | аёЎаёұаёҘа№Ғаё§аёЈа№ҢаёӮа№ӮаёЎаёў browser cookies | IP аё•а№ҲаёІаёҮ session а№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷ |
| **SIM Swap** | аёңаё№а№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөаёўаё¶аё”аё«аёЎаёІаёўа№ҖаёҘаёӮа№Ӯаё—аёЈаёЁаёұаёһаё—а№Ң | аёӘаё№аёҚа№ҖаёӘаёөаёўаёӘаёұаёҚаёҚаёІаё“, аёңаё№а№үа№ғаё«а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаёҒаёІаёЈ |
| **Social Engineering** | аё«аёҘаёӯаёҒ helpdesk аёЈаёөа№ҖаёӢа№Үаё• MFA | аёЈаёөа№ҖаёӢа№Үаё•а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө ticket |

### 1.2 аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ

| аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈ | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| аёЈаё°аёҡаёёаё§аёҙаёҳаёө bypass аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№ү | Sign-in logs, phishing analysis | вҳҗ |
| аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ sign-in logs аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ | Azure AD / Okta | вҳҗ |
| аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ session token replay | Session ID а№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷаёҲаёІаёҒ IP аё•а№ҲаёІаёҮ | вҳҗ |
| аёӣаёЈаё°аё§аёұаё•аёҙ MFA push | IdP MFA logs вҖ” deny а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§ accept? | вҳҗ |
| MFA methods аё—аёөа№ҲаёҘаёҮаё—аё°а№Җаёҡаёөаёўаёҷа№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ | IdP audit | вҳҗ |
| OAuth app consents аё•аёұа№үаёҮа№Ғаё•а№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаёҡаёёаёҒаёЈаёёаёҒ | Enterprise Applications | вҳҗ |
| аёҒаёҺ inbox forwarding аё—аёөа№ҲаёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮаёӮаё¶а№үаёҷ | Exchange audit | вҳҗ |
| аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮаёЈаё°аё«аё§а№ҲаёІаёҮ session аё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаёҡаёёаёҒаёЈаёёаёҒ | Cloud audit logs | вҳҗ |

### 1.3 аёҒаёҙаёҲаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎаё«аёҘаёұаёҮаё–аё№аёҒаёҡаёёаёҒаёЈаёёаёҒ

| аёҒаёҙаёҲаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎ | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ/аёӘа№ҲаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘ | Inbox rules, message trace | вҳҗ |
| аё”аёІаё§аёҷа№Ңа№Ӯаё«аёҘаё”а№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң | SharePoint / OneDrive audit | вҳҗ |
| а№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷ MFA method | Authentication methods | вҳҗ |
| а№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҷаёЈаё«аёұаёӘаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ | Directory audit | вҳҗ |
| а№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҷаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ң | Role assignments | вҳҗ |
| аёӘа№ҲаёҮ phishing аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ | Outbox / sent items | вҳҗ |

---

## 2. аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ

### 2.1 аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө (аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ 5 аёҷаёІаё—аёө)

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **а№ҖаёһаёҙаёҒаё–аёӯаёҷ sessions аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё”** а№ҒаёҘаё° refresh tokens | IdP | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **аёҡаёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒ session cookie/token** аё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаёҡаёёаёҒаёЈаёёаёҒ | IdP / WAF | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **аёӣаёҙаё”аёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө** аёҠаёұа№Ҳаё§аё„аёЈаёІаё§ | IdP | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **аёҡаёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒ AiTM infrastructure** (а№Ӯаё”а№ҖаёЎаёҷ/IP phishing) | Firewall / DNS | вҳҗ |
| 5 | **аёҘаёҡаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘ phishing** аёҲаёІаёҒаё—аёёаёҒ mailbox | Exchange / M365 | вҳҗ |

### 2.2 аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎа№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎа№Җаё•аёҙаёЎ

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | аё„а№үаёҷаё«аёІаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘ phishing а№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷаё—аёёаёҒаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү | вҳҗ |
| 2 | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаё§а№ҲаёІаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаёӯаё·а№Ҳаёҷа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІ AiTM proxy аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ | вҳҗ |
| 3 | а№ҖаёһаёҙаёҒаё–аёӯаёҷ OAuth app consents аё—аёөа№Ҳаёӯаёұаёҷаё•аёЈаёІаёў | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аёҘаёҡ inbox rules / delegates аё—аёөа№Ҳаёңаё№а№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөаёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ | вҳҗ |
| 5 | аёҘаёҡ MFA methods аё—аёөа№Ҳаёңаё№а№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөаёҘаёҮаё—аё°а№Җаёҡаёөаёўаёҷ | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаёіаёҲаёұаё”

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **аёЈаёөа№ҖаёӢа№Үаё•аёЈаё«аёұаёӘаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ** аёңа№ҲаёІаёҷаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮаё—аёІаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳаёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§ | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **аёҘа№үаёІаёҮ MFA аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё”** а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҘаёҮаё—аё°а№Җаёҡаёөаёўаёҷа№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳаё”а№үаё§аёў **FIDO2/passkey** | вҳҗ |
| 3 | а№ҖаёһаёҙаёҒаё–аёӯаёҷ OAuth app consents аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё”а№ҒаёҘаё°аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙа№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳа№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё°аё—аёөа№ҲаёҲаёіа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аёҘаёҡ forwarding rules, delegates, mail flow rules | вҳҗ |
| 5 | аёӘа№ҒаёҒаёҷаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаё«аёІ infostealer / аёЎаёұаёҘа№Ғаё§аёЈа№Ң | вҳҗ |

---

## 4. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҹаё·а№үаёҷаёҹаё№

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | а№Җаёӣаёҙаё”аёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёөаё”а№үаё§аёў MFA аё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёІаёҷаё—аёІаёҷ phishing (FIDO2 / passkeys) | вҳҗ |
| 2 | аёҡаёұаёҮаё„аёұаёҡ Conditional Access: аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңаё—аёөа№Ҳ compliant а№Җаё—а№ҲаёІаёҷаёұа№үаёҷ | вҳҗ |
| 3 | аёҘаё” token lifetime а№ҒаёҘаё°а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” CAE (Continuous Access Evaluation) | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аёҡаёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒ legacy authentication protocols | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Deploy number matching аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ push MFA | вҳҗ |
| 6 | аё•аёҙаё”аё•аёІаёЎаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө 30 аё§аёұаёҷ | вҳҗ |

---

## 5. Evidence Checklist

| аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ | аёӘаёҙа№ҲаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ | а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёңаёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ session | token/session ID, auth method, IP, timestamp, device/app context | IdP / sign-in logs | а№ғаёҠа№үаёһаёҙаёӘаё№аёҲаёҷа№Ңаё§а№ҲаёІаёңаё№а№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ MFA а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§аёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮа№ҒаёҘаё°аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮа№„аёЈ |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ phishing аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ AiTM | URL, proxy domain/IP, redirect chain, phishing email, TLS detail | Email / proxy / DNS / TI | а№ғаёҠа№үаёЈаё°аёҡаёё bypass path а№ҒаёҘаё°аёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё•аёӮаёӯаёҮа№Ғаё„аёЎа№ҖаёӣаёҚ |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаё”а№үаёІаёҷаё•аёұаё§аё•аёҷ | MFA method аё—аёөа№ҲаёҘаёҮаё—аё°а№Җаёҡаёөаёўаёҷ, recovery change, risk flag, account role | IdP / IAM | а№ғаёҠа№үаё”аё№аё§а№ҲаёІаёңаё№а№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөаёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ persistence аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№ҖаёҘа№ҮаёҮаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө privileged аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ mailbox а№ҒаёҘаё° cloud activity | inbox rule, OAuth grant, file access, admin action | Exchange / cloud audit | а№ғаёҠа№үаё”аё№аё§а№ҲаёІаёңаё№а№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөаё—аёіаёӯаё°а№„аёЈаё•а№Ҳаёӯаё«аёҘаёұаёҮ bypass |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ endpoint | browser artifact, infostealer sign, session-cookie theft indicator | Endpoint / EDR / browser forensics | а№ғаёҠа№үа№ҒаёўаёҒ AiTM аёӯаёӯаёҒаёҲаёІаёҒ local token theft |

---

## 6. Minimum Telemetry Required

| а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮ Telemetry | а№ғаёҠа№үа№Җаёһаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёӯаё°а№„аёЈ | аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ | Blind Spot аё–а№үаёІа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| Identity provider sign-in а№ҒаёҘаё° token telemetry | аё”аё№ auth method, token reuse, MFA result, session anomaly | Required | аёһаёҙаёӘаё№аёҲаёҷа№Ң MFA bypass а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№ү |
| Mailbox а№ҒаёҘаё° cloud audit logs | аё”аё№ post-login abuse, OAuth grant, data access, admin change | Required | аёЎаёӯаёҮа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№Җаё«а№ҮаёҷаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡаё«аёҘаёұаёҮ compromise |
| Email, proxy, а№ҒаёҘаё° DNS telemetry | аё”аё№ AiTM domain, phishing path, user interaction, redirect chain | Required | а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЈаё№а№ү source а№ҒаёҘаё°аё§аёҙаёҳаёө bypass |
| Endpoint telemetry | аё”аё№ browser theft, infostealer, device compromise indicator | Recommended | local token theft аёӯаёІаёҲаёһаёҘаёІаё”а№„аёӣа№ҖаёҘаёў |
| Helpdesk а№ҒаёҘаё° admin workflow logs | аё”аё№ MFA reset, recovery action, social-engineering trace | Recommended | helpdesk-assisted bypass аёӯаёІаёҲаё–аё№аёҒаёЎаёӯаёҮаёӮа№үаёІаёЎ |

---

## 7. False Positive а№ҒаёҘаё° Tuning Guide

| Scenario | аё—аёіа№„аёЎаёҲаё¶аёҮаё”аё№аёҷа№ҲаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёў | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | Tuning Action | аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаёҘаёҮаё—аё°а№Җаёҡаёөаёўаёҷ MFA а№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳаё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҷаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң | MFA method change а№ҒаёҘаё° session reset аё”аё№а№Җаё«аёЎаё·аёӯаёҷ malicious | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ helpdesk ticket а№ҒаёҘаё° enrollment source аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | suppress а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё° workflow аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙа№ғаёҷаёҠа№Ҳаё§аёҮаёӘаёұа№үаёҷ | аёЎаёө MFA method а№ғаё«аёЎа№ҲаёҲаёІаёҒ IP а№ҒаёӣаёҘаёҒаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёЎаёө risky session аё•аёІаёЎаёЎаёІ |
| Admin а№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷ OAuth consent аё•аёІаёЎаёҮаёІаёҷаёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮ | app rollout аёӯаёІаёҲа№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎ consent record а№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ change ticket, app owner, а№ҒаёҘаё° admin identity | allowlist а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё° app ID а№ҒаёҘаё° change window аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | app аёӮаёӯ scope аёӘаё№аёҮаёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёӣа№ӮаёңаёҘа№Ҳа№ғаёҷ user context а№ҒаёӣаёҘаёҒ |
| Conditional Access аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ auth policy rollout | token revocation а№ҒаёҘаё° prompt spike аёӯаёІаёҲаёӘаё№аёҮаёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ rollout plan а№ҒаёҘаё°аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘ | аёҘаё” severity а№ғаёҷ rollout window аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үа№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷа№Ӯаё”аёҷ AiTM domain аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ session anomaly аёЈа№Ҳаё§аёЎаё”а№үаё§аёў |
| аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үа№Ӯаё”аёҷ MFA prompt аёӢа№үаёіа№Ғаё•а№ҲаёўаёұаёҮа№„аёЎа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаёўаё¶аё”аёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө | app retry loop аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ network issue аёӯаёІаёҲаё—аёіа№ғаё«а№ү prompt а№Җаёўаёӯаё° | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ behavior аёӮаёӯаёҮ app/device а№ҒаёҘаё°а№„аёЎа№Ҳаёһаёҡ post-auth abuse | tune аё•аёІаёЎ app signature а№ҒаёҘаё° retry pattern аё—аёөа№Ҳаёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§ | аёЎаёө MFA accept аёҲаёІаёҒа№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮа№ҒаёӣаёҘаёҒаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№ҖаёҒаёҙаё” session takeover аё•аёІаёЎаёЎаёІ |

---

## 8. а№ҖаёҒаё“аё‘а№ҢаёҒаёІаёЈаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ

| а№ҖаёҮаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аёӮ | аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ |
|:---|:---|
| аёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёөаёңаё№а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈ / admin аё–аё№аёҒ bypass | CISO аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө |
| аё«аёҘаёІаёўаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёөаё–аё№аёҒаёҡаёёаёҒаёЈаёёаёҒаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ AiTM | Major Incident |
| аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё–аё№аёҒаёҷаёіаёӯаёӯаёҒаёЈаё°аё«аё§а№ҲаёІаёҮ session | Legal + DPO (PDPA 72 аёҠаёЎ.) |
| BEC аё•аёІаёЎ follow-up аёҲаёІаёҒаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёөаё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаёҡаёёаёҒаёЈаёёаёҒ | [PB-17 BEC](BEC.th.md) |
| Social engineering helpdesk аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ | CISO + HR |

---

### аёңаёұаёҮ MFA Rollout Strategy

```mermaid
graph TD
    Plan["рҹ“Ӣ MFA Rollout"] --> Admin["рҹ‘‘ Phase 1: Admin"]
    Admin --> VIP["рҹҸў Phase 2: VIP/Finance"]
    VIP --> All["рҹ‘Ҙ Phase 3: All users"]
    All --> FIDO["рҹ”‘ Phase 4: FIDO2"]
    Admin --> Enforce["рҹ”’ Enforce"]
    VIP --> Enforce
    All --> Enforce
    style Admin fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style FIDO fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
```

### аёңаёұаёҮ Phishing-Resistant MFA Comparison

```mermaid
graph LR
    MFA{"рҹ“ұ MFA Type"} --> SMS["рҹ“І SMS вҖ” вқҢ SIM swap"]
    MFA --> TOTP["рҹ”ў TOTP вҖ” вҡ пёҸ Phishable"]
    MFA --> Push["рҹ”” Push вҖ” вҡ пёҸ Fatigue"]
    MFA --> Number["рҹ”ў Number Match вҖ” вң… Better"]
    MFA --> FIDO["рҹ”‘ FIDO2 вҖ” вң… Best"]
    style SMS fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style TOTP fill:#f39c12,color:#fff
    style Push fill:#f39c12,color:#fff
    style Number fill:#2ecc71,color:#fff
    style FIDO fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
```

## аёҒаёҺаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ (Sigma)

| аёҒаёҺ | а№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң |
|:---|:---|

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ

- [аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң](../Framework.th.md)
- [а№ҒаёЎа№Ҳа№ҒаёҡаёҡаёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.th.md)
- [PB-01 аёҹаёҙаёҠаёҠаёҙаёҮ](Phishing.th.md)
- [PB-05 аёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёөаё–аё№аёҒаёҡаёёаёҒаёЈаёёаёҒ](Account_Compromise.th.md)
- [PB-17 BEC](BEC.th.md)

## MFA Bypass Techniques & Detection

| Technique | Detection | Prevention |
|:---|:---|:---|
| SIM swap | Phone number change alert | Hardware tokens |
| Prompt bombing | Multiple push denials | Number matching |
| Token theft | Session anomaly | Binding to device |
| Adversary-in-the-middle | TLS cert anomaly | FIDO2/WebAuthn |

### MFA Hardening Recommendations

| Current MFA | Upgrade To | Priority |
|:---|:---|:---|
| SMS OTP | Authenticator app | High |
| Push notification | Number matching | High |
| Software token | FIDO2 hardware key | Critical |
| No MFA | Any MFA | Critical |

## References

- [MITRE ATT&CK T1556.006 вҖ” MFA Modification](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1556/006/)
- [Microsoft вҖ” Token Theft Playbook](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/operations/token-theft-playbook)


---

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Malware_Infection.en.md
# Playbook: Malware Infection

**ID**: PB-03
**Severity**: Medium/High | **Category**: Endpoint Security
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1204](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1204/) (User Execution), [T1059](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1059/) (Command and Scripting Interpreter)
**Trigger**: EDR alert, AV detection, SIEM correlation, User report

### Malware Analysis Pipeline

```mermaid
graph LR
    Hash["#пёҸвғЈ Hash"] --> VT["рҹ”Қ VirusTotal"]
    VT --> Known{"вң… Known?"}
    Known -->|Yes| Report["рҹ“Ӣ Use TI report"]
    Known -->|No| Sandbox["рҹ§Ә Sandbox"]
    Sandbox --> Static["рҹ“қ Static Analysis"]
    Static --> Dynamic["в–¶пёҸ Dynamic Analysis"]
    Dynamic --> IOC["рҹҺҜ Extract IOCs"]
    style Hash fill:#3498db,color:#fff
    style Sandbox fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style IOC fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
```

### Containment Workflow

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant EDR
    participant SOC
    participant FW as Firewall
    participant SIEM
    EDR->>SOC: рҹҡЁ Malware detected
    SOC->>EDR: Isolate host
    SOC->>EDR: Block hash (org-wide)
    SOC->>FW: Block C2 IP/domain
    SOC->>SIEM: Sweep IOCs org-wide
    SIEM-->>SOC: Results (additional hosts?)
```

---

## Decision Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ AV/EDR Alert"] --> Verify{"рҹ“Ғ File Still Exists?"}
    Verify -->|No| AutoClean["AV Auto-Cleaned"]
    Verify -->|Yes| Hash["рҹ”Қ Check Hash"]
    AutoClean --> Review["Review: Was it Fully Cleaned?"]
    Review -->|Yes + No Persistence| Close["Close as Resolved"]
    Review -->|Uncertain| Hash
    Hash -->|Known Malware| Type{"What Type?"}
    Hash -->|Unknown| Sandbox["рҹ§Ә Sandbox Analysis"]
    Sandbox -->|Malicious| Type
    Sandbox -->|Benign| FP["False Positive"]
    Type -->|Infostealer| FullResponse["рҹҡЁ Full Response + Credential Reset"]
    Type -->|RAT/Backdoor| FullResponse
    Type -->|Adware/PUP| Limited["вҡ пёҸ Remove + Monitor"]
    Type -->|Ransomware| Ransomware["вҶ’ PB-02 Ransomware"]
    FullResponse --> Isolate["рҹ”Ң Isolate & Eradicate"]
```

---

## 1. Analysis (Triage)

### 1.1 Initial Checks

| # | Check | How | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Verify file path | EDR console вҖ” is it in `%TEMP%`, `Downloads`, `System32`? | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Check file hash | VirusTotal, ThreatFox вҖ” known malware? | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Identify user | Who executed/downloaded the file? | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Determine delivery method | Email attachment, web download, USB? | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Check execution | Did the file execute or just land on disk? | вҳҗ |

### 1.2 Malware Classification

| Type | Risk | Additional Actions |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **Ransomware** | Critical | Escalate to [PB-02](Ransomware.en.md) immediately |
| **RAT / Backdoor** | High | Full IR вҖ” check C2, lateral movement |
| **Infostealer** | High | Reset all user credentials, check exfil |
| **Trojan Dropper** | High | Find all dropped payloads |
| **Cryptominer** | Medium | Remove, check for persistence |
| **Adware / PUP** | Low | Remove, tune AV rule |

### 1.3 Scope Assessment

- [ ] Any other hosts with the same file hash?
- [ ] Any network connections from the malware (C2)?
- [ ] Signs of lateral movement from this host?
- [ ] Any data exfiltration indicators?

---

## 2. Containment

| # | Action | Tool | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Network isolate the host | EDR | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Kill malicious process(es) | EDR / Task Manager | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Block file hash across all endpoints | EDR global blacklist | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Block C2 IP/domain at firewall/proxy | Firewall, Proxy | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Disable user account (if credential theft suspected) | AD / IdP | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. Eradication

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Delete malicious file(s) from disk | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Remove persistence mechanisms: | |
|   | - Registry Run keys (`HKCU\...\Run`, `HKLM\...\Run`) | вҳҗ |
|   | - Scheduled Tasks | вҳҗ |
|   | - Startup folder shortcuts | вҳҗ |
|   | - Services | вҳҗ |
|   | - WMI event subscriptions | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Run full system AV/EDR scan | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Check for additional dropped files | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Verify no rootkits (if RAT/backdoor) | вҳҗ |

---

## 4. Recovery

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Verify endpoint is clean (no alerts for 24h) | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Un-isolate host from network | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Reset user credentials (if Infostealer) | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Monitor endpoint for 48 hours post-recovery | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Confirm user awareness (how was it delivered?) | вҳҗ |

---

## 5. IoC Collection

| Type | Value | Source |
|:---|:---|:---|
| File Name | | EDR / AV |
| File Path | | EDR |
| File Hash (SHA256) | | EDR / Sandbox |
| C2 IP/Domain | | Network logs |
| Process Name | | EDR |
| Parent Process | | EDR |
| Delivery Method | | Email / Proxy logs |
| Dropped Files | | Sandbox |

---

## 6. Evidence Checklist

| Evidence Type | What to Collect | Source | Why It Matters |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Malware sample evidence | Filename, hash, path, compile info, sandbox verdict | EDR / sandbox / forensic tools | Supports classification, blocking, and hunting |
| Execution evidence | Parent process, command line, user context, persistence artifacts | EDR / system logs | Shows how the malware started and whether it can return |
| Network evidence | C2 domains/IPs, ports, DNS lookups, transfer volume | Proxy / firewall / DNS / NetFlow | Confirms remote control or exfiltration behavior |
| Delivery evidence | Email, download URL, removable media, installer source | Mail gateway / proxy / browser logs | Identifies the initial access path and prevention gap |
| Business impact evidence | Affected hosts, user population, credentials at risk, critical services | Asset inventory / IAM / ticketing | Supports escalation and recovery prioritization |

---

## 7. Minimum Telemetry Required

| Telemetry Source | Required For | Priority | Blind Spot If Missing |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| Endpoint detection telemetry | Process lineage, file activity, persistence, isolation actions | Required | Cannot confirm execution or containment on the host |
| Sandbox or malware analysis telemetry | Sample verdict, dropped files, secondary behavior | Required | Malware family and follow-on actions remain unclear |
| Network and DNS telemetry | C2, download sites, exfiltration, propagation clues | Required | Remote control and spread path remain hidden |
| Email, proxy, or web gateway logs | Delivery method and user interaction | Required | Initial access root cause cannot be established |
| Asset and identity inventory | Criticality, owner, user role, privileged status | Recommended | Recovery and communication decisions degrade |

---

## 8. False Positive and Tuning Guide

| Scenario | Why It Looks Suspicious | How to Validate | Tuning Action | Escalate If |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Legitimate admin tool or packaging utility | Dual-use tools can resemble malware execution | Confirm signed binary, expected path, and admin owner | Suppress by signed publisher and approved path only | Same process reaches suspicious destinations or persists abnormally |
| Security scanner or EDR remediation | Tool actions may drop files or spawn scripts | Validate tool identity, job ID, and console action history | Allowlist known tool process chains in approved maintenance windows | Unknown payloads or user-context execution appears alongside the tool |
| Software installer or updater | Temp-folder execution and child processes can look malicious | Verify publisher, hash reputation, and user intent | Tune for approved installer hashes and update services | Network destinations, persistence, or lateral movement are abnormal |
| Lab or malware analysis environment | Intentional detonation looks like real infection | Validate asset tag, isolated network, and analyst ownership | Limit exceptions to isolated lab assets only | Behavior reaches production systems or identities |

---

## 9. Escalation Criteria

| Condition | Escalate To |
|:---|:---|
| Ransomware variant | [PB-02 Ransomware](Ransomware.en.md) |
| RAT/backdoor with active C2 | Tier 2 + Threat Hunt |
| Multiple hosts infected | SOC Lead вҖ” Major Incident |
| Infostealer confirmed | Tier 2 + Identity team |
| Data exfiltration evidence | [PB-08 Data Exfiltration](Data_Exfiltration.en.md) |

---

## 10. Post-Incident

- [ ] Verify all malware artifacts have been removed from affected hosts
- [ ] Update antivirus / EDR signatures with new indicators
- [ ] Submit samples to threat intelligence platforms (VirusTotal, MWDB)
- [ ] Create Sigma detection rule for observed malware behavior
- [ ] Review endpoint hardening (disable macros, restrict PowerShell)
- [ ] Conduct user awareness training if initial access was via phishing
- [ ] Review application control policies for bypassed executables
- [ ] Document findings in [Incident Report](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.en.md)

---

### Malware Analysis Pipeline

```mermaid
graph LR
    Sample["рҹҰ  Sample"] --> Static["рҹ“Ӣ Static Analysis"]
    Static --> Sandbox["рҹҸ–пёҸ Sandbox"]
    Sandbox --> IOC["рҹ”Қ Extract IOCs"]
    IOC --> TI["рҹ“Ҡ Threat Intel"]
    TI --> Block["рҹ”’ Block"]
    Block --> Hunt["рҹҺҜ Hunt across org"]
    style Sample fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Block fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
```

### EDR Response Flow

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant EDR
    participant SOC
    participant Endpoint
    participant SIEM
    EDR->>SOC: рҹҡЁ Malware detected
    SOC->>EDR: Isolate host
    EDR->>Endpoint: рҹ”’ Network isolated
    SOC->>EDR: Collect forensic data
    EDR-->>SOC: рҹ“Ӣ Process tree + artifacts
    SOC->>SIEM: Add IOCs to blocklist
```

| Rule | File |
|:---|:---|
| Office Spawning PowerShell | [proc_office_spawn_powershell.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/proc_office_spawn_powershell.yml) |
| Execution from Temp/Downloads | [proc_temp_folder_execution.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/proc_temp_folder_execution.yml) |
| PowerShell Encoded Command | [proc_powershell_encoded.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/proc_powershell_encoded.yml) |
| Ransomware Bulk Renaming | [file_bulk_renaming_ransomware.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/file_bulk_renaming_ransomware.yml) |
