## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/OT_ICS_Incident.th.md
# Playbook: OT/ICS Security Incident

**ID**: PB-33
**аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ**: аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• | **аё«аёЎаё§аё”аё«аёЎаё№а№Ҳ**: аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӣаёҘаёӯаё”аё аёұаёў OT/ICS
**MITRE ICS**: [T0813](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T0813/) (Denial of Control), [T0831](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T0831/) (Manipulation of Control)
**аё—аёЈаёҙаёҒа№ҖаёҒаёӯаёЈа№Ң**: OT-IDS alert (Claroty/Nozomi/Dragos), IT-OT firewall alert, HMI anomaly, Safety system activation

> рҹҡЁ **аёҘаёіаё”аёұаёҡаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚаёӘаё№аёҮаёӘаёёаё”**: аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӣаёҘаёӯаё”аё аёұаёўаё—аёІаёҮаёҒаёІаёўаё аёІаёһаёӮаёӯаёҮаёҡаёёаё„аёҘаёІаёҒаёЈ аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң а№ҒаёҘаё°аёӘаёҙа№ҲаёҮа№Ғаё§аё”аёҘа№үаёӯаёЎ аёЎаёІаёҒа№Ҳаёӯаёҷаё—аёёаёҒаёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮ


## аё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң (Post-Incident)

- [ ] аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ IT/OT network segmentation
- [ ] аёӯаёұаёһа№Җаё”аё— asset inventory аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ OT devices
- [ ] аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ remote access policies аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ OT
- [ ] аёӣаёЈаё°аёӘаёІаёҷ vendor аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ firmware/patch updates
- [ ] аёҲаёұаё” tabletop exercise аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ OT incident scenarios
- [ ] аёҲаёұаё”аё—аёі [Incident Report](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.th.md)

### аёңаёұаёҮ Purdue Model

```mermaid
graph TD
    L5["рҹҢҗ L5: Enterprise Network"] --> L4["рҹ”’ L4: IT-OT DMZ"]
    L4 --> L3["рҹ“Ҡ L3: SCADA/Historian"]
    L3 --> L2["рҹ–ҘпёҸ L2: HMI/Engineering WS"]
    L2 --> L1["вҡҷпёҸ L1: PLC/RTU/DCS"]
    L1 --> L0["рҹҸӯ L0: Physical Process"]
    L0 -.-> SIS["рҹӣ‘ SIS: Safety System"]
    style L5 fill:#3498db,color:#fff
    style L4 fill:#f39c12,color:#fff
    style L3 fill:#e67e22,color:#fff
    style L1 fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style L0 fill:#c0392b,color:#fff
    style SIS fill:#ff0000,color:#fff
```

### аёңаёұаёҮаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷ Emergency Shutdown

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant OT_IDS as OT-IDS
    participant SOC
    participant OT_Eng as OT Engineer
    participant SIS
    participant Plant as Plant Manager
    OT_IDS->>SOC: рҹҡЁ PLC logic change detected
    SOC->>OT_Eng: а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ OT Engineer аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө
    OT_Eng->>OT_Eng: аёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаё—аёІаёҮаёҒаёІаёўаё аёІаёһ
    OT_Eng->>SIS: а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” Emergency Shutdown
    OT_Eng->>Plant: а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё° + аёӯаёһаёўаёһ (аё–а№үаёІаёҲаёіа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ)
    SOC->>SOC: аё•аёұаё” IT-OT DMZ
```

---

## аёңаёұаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲ

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ OT/ICS Alert"] --> Safety{"вҡ пёҸ аёЎаёөаё аёұаёўаё—аёІаёҮаёҒаёІаёўаё аёІаёһ?"}
    Safety -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| ESD["рҹӣ‘ Emergency Shutdown / SIS"]
    Safety -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ| Assess["рҹ“Ҡ аёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷ Purdue Level"]
    ESD --> Manual["рҹ”§ аёӘаёҘаёұаёҡа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ Manual Control"]
    Manual --> Assess
    Assess --> Level{"рҹ“Қ аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ?"}
    Level -->|L3-L5 IT/OT DMZ| IT["рҹ–ҘпёҸ IT-side Containment"]
    Level -->|L1-L2 PLC/HMI| OT["рҹҸӯ OT Engineer Required"]
    Level -->|L0 Physical| DANGER["рҹ”ҙрҹ”ҙ Safety-Critical"]
```

---

## 1. аёҒаёІаёЈаё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң

### 1.1 аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ Purdue Model

| аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ | аёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ | аё–аё№аёҒаёҡаёёаёҒаёЈаёёаёҒ? | аёңаё№а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҙаё”аёҠаёӯаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **L5** | Enterprise Network, ERP | вҳҗ | SOC/IT |
| **L4** | IT-OT DMZ, Data Historian | вҳҗ | SOC/IT + OT |
| **L3** | SCADA Server, Historian | вҳҗ | OT Engineer |
| **L2** | HMI, Engineering WS | вҳҗ | OT Engineer |
| **L1** | PLC, RTU, DCS Controller | вҳҗ | OT Engineer + Vendor |
| **L0** | Physical Process (valve, motor) | вҳҗ | Plant Engineer |
| **SIS** | Safety Instrumented System | вҳҗ | Safety Engineer |

### 1.2 аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң OT

| аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё— | аё•аёұаё§аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮ | аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **IT вҶ’ OT lateral movement** | Ransomware аёӮа№үаёІаёЎ DMZ | рҹ”ҙ аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• |
| **PLC logic change** | Unauthorized logic upload | рҹ”ҙ аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• |
| **HMI manipulation** | а№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷаё„а№ҲаёІ setpoint | рҹ”ҙ аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• |
| **SIS tampering** (TRITON-style) | Safety system аё–аё№аёҒаёӣаёҙаё” | рҹ”ҙрҹ”ҙ Life-threatening |
| **OT malware** | INDUSTROYER, PIPEDREAM | рҹ”ҙ аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• |
| **Rogue device** | аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңа№ҒаёӣаёҘаёҒаёҡаёҷ OT network | рҹҹ  аёӘаё№аёҮ |
| **Remote access abuse** | VPN/jump host аё–аё№аёҒаёҡаёёаёҒаёЈаёёаёҒ | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ |

### 1.3 аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ

| аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈ | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| аё аёұаёўаё„аёёаёҒаё„аёІаёЎаёӮа№үаёІаёЎ IT вҶ’ OT? | Firewall logs | вҳҗ |
| PLC logic аё–аё№аёҒа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷ? | OT-IDS / PLC comparison | вҳҗ |
| Safety System (SIS) аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ? | SIS panel / OT engineer | вҳҗ |
| HMI а№ҒаёӘаё”аёҮаё„а№ҲаёІаёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ? | HMI / operator | вҳҗ |
| OT protocol anomalies? (Modbus/OPC/EtherNet/IP) | OT-IDS | вҳҗ |
| Remote access вҖ” аёЎаёөаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ? | VPN / jump host logs | вҳҗ |
| аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңа№ҒаёӣаёҘаёҒаёҡаёҷ OT network? | OT-IDS asset inventory | вҳҗ |

---

## 2. аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ

### вҡЎ Safety First (аё«аёІаёҒаёЎаёөаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаё—аёІаёҮаёҒаёІаёўаё аёІаёһ)

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” SIS / Emergency Shutdown** аё•аёІаёЎ procedure | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **аёӘаёҘаёұаёҡа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ manual control** | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **аёӯаёһаёўаёһаёҡаёёаё„аёҘаёІаёҒаёЈ** (аё–а№үаёІаёҲаёіа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ) | вҳҗ |

### рҹ”’ Network Containment

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **аё•аёұаё” IT-OT DMZ** (а№ҒаёўаёҒ IT / OT networks) | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **аёӣаёҙаё” remote access** аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” (VPN, jump host, TeamViewer) | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **аёҲаёұаёҡ PCAP** аёҡаёҷ OT network (**аё«а№үаёІаёЎаё•аёҙаё”аё•аёұа№үаёҮ agent аёҡаёҷ PLC!**) | вҳҗ |

> вӣ” **аё«а№үаёІаёЎаё—аёі**: Reboot PLC, Patch OT devices, Install software аёҡаёҷ OT, scan OT network

---

## 3. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаёіаёҲаёұаё”

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | аё„аё·аёҷаё„а№ҲаёІ PLC аёҲаёІаёҒ **golden baseline** (verified offline backup) | вҳҗ |
| 2 | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ **firmware integrity** (PLC, RTU) | вҳҗ |
| 3 | аё«аёЎаёёаёҷа№Җаё§аёөаёўаёҷ OT credentials (**аёЈаё§аёЎ default passwords!**) | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аё—аёіаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаё°аёӯаёІаё” IT-side (malware, jump host, VPN) | вҳҗ |
| 5 | аёҘаёҡ rogue devices аёӯаёӯаёҒаёҲаёІаёҒ OT network | вҳҗ |

---

## 4. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҹаё·а№үаёҷаёҹаё№

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Staged restart** аёЎаёө OT engineer аё”аё№а№ҒаёҘаё—аёёаёҒаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷ | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Deploy **OT-IDS** (Claroty / Nozomi Networks / Dragos) | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **IEC 62443** compliance review | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ **golden baseline** а№ғаё«аёЎа№ҲаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ PLC аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” | вҳҗ |
| 5 | а№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷ default passwords аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” | вҳҗ |
| 6 | аёҲаёіаёҒаёұаё” remote access вҖ” MFA + jump host + time-limited | вҳҗ |

---

## 5. аёңаё№а№үаё•аёҙаё”аё•а№ҲаёӯаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ

| аёҡаё—аёҡаёІаё— | а№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯа№„аё«аёЈа№Ҳ |
|:---|:---|
| **OT/Plant Engineer** | аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө вҖ” аё—аёёаёҒаёҒаёЈаё“аёө OT |
| **Safety Officer** | аё«аёІаёҒаёЎаёөаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаё—аёІаёҮаёҒаёІаёўаё аёІаёһ |
| **PLC/SCADA Vendor** | Firmware/logic validation |
| **Regulator** | аё«аёІаёҒа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ critical infrastructure |
| **CISO** | аё—аёёаёҒа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң OT |
| **National CERT** | Nation-state indicators |

---

### аёңаёұаёҮ OT/IT Convergence Risks

```mermaid
graph TD
    IT["рҹҸў IT Network"] --> DMZ["рҹ”’ IT/OT DMZ"]
    DMZ --> OT["рҹҸӯ OT Network"]
    OT --> SCADA["рҹ“Ҡ SCADA/HMI"]
    OT --> PLC["вҡҷпёҸ PLC/RTU"]
    IT -.->|вқҢ аё«а№үаёІаёЎа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё•аёЈаёҮ| PLC
    DMZ --> Historian["рҹ“Ӣ Data Historian"]
    style IT fill:#3498db,color:#fff
    style OT fill:#f39c12,color:#fff
    style PLC fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
```

### аёңаёұаёҮ Safety System Decision

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant SOC
    participant OT_Eng as OT Engineer
    participant SIS as Safety System
    participant Management
    SOC->>OT_Eng: рҹҡЁ OT anomaly detected
    OT_Eng->>SIS: Check safety system status
    SIS-->>OT_Eng: вң… Normal
    OT_Eng->>SOC: Safe to investigate
    SOC->>Management: Situation update
    Note over SIS: вқҢ аё«а№үаёІаёЎаёӣаёҙаё” safety system!
```

## аёҒаёҺаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ (Sigma)

| аёҒаёҺ | а№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң |
|:---|:---|
| OT/ICS Network Anomaly Detection | [net_ot_ics_anomaly.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/net_ot_ics_anomaly.yml) |

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ

- [аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң](../Framework.th.md)
- [PB-02 Ransomware](Ransomware.th.md)
- [PB-03 аёЎаёұаёҘа№Ғаё§аёЈа№Ң](Malware_Infection.th.md)

## OT/ICS Safety Priorities

| Priority | Action | Rationale |
|:---|:---|:---|
| 1 | Protect human safety | Life first |
| 2 | Preserve physical process | Prevent damage |
| 3 | Contain cyber threat | Limit spread |
| 4 | Gather evidence | Investigation |
| 5 | Restore operations | Business continuity |

### ICS Protocol Monitoring

| Protocol | Port | Monitor For |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Modbus | 502 | Unauthorized writes |
| DNP3 | 20000 | Unusual commands |
| OPC UA | 4840 | Config changes |
| BACnet | 47808 | Unauthorized access |

### IT vs OT Response Differences

| Aspect | IT | OT |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Priority | Data integrity | Physical safety |
| Patching | ASAP | Scheduled downtime |
| Isolation | Network segmentation | Physical disconnect |

## References

- [MITRE ATT&CK for ICS](https://attack.mitre.org/matrices/ics/)
- [NIST SP 800-82r3 вҖ” Guide to OT Security](https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-82/rev-3/final)
- [IEC 62443 вҖ” Industrial Automation Security](https://www.isa.org/standards-and-publications/isa-standards/isa-iec-62443-series-of-standards)

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Phishing.en.md
# Playbook: Phishing Response

**ID**: PB-01
**Severity**: High | **Category**: Email Security
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1566](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1566/) (Phishing), [T1566.001](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1566/001/) (Spearphishing Attachment), [T1566.002](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1566/002/) (Spearphishing Link)
**Trigger**: User report, Mail filter alert, Phishing simulation, TI feed

### Phishing IR Flow

```mermaid
graph LR
    Report["рҹ“§ Report"] --> Analyze["рҹ”Қ Analyze"]
    Analyze --> Contain["рҹ”’ Contain"]
    Contain --> Eradicate["рҹ—‘пёҸ Eradicate"]
    Eradicate --> Recover["вҷ»пёҸ Recover"]
    Recover --> Lessons["рҹ“қ Lessons"]
    style Report fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Analyze fill:#f39c12,color:#fff
    style Contain fill:#e67e22,color:#fff
    style Eradicate fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style Recover fill:#2980b9,color:#fff
    style Lessons fill:#8e44ad,color:#fff
```

### Email Analysis Workflow

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant SOC
    participant Mail as Mail Gateway
    participant TI as Threat Intel
    SOC->>Mail: Pull email headers + body
    SOC->>TI: Check URL/attachment hash
    TI-->>SOC: TI result (malicious/clean)
    SOC->>Mail: Search all recipients
    Mail-->>SOC: Recipient list
    SOC->>User: Notify + guidance
```

---

## Decision Flow

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    Start["рҹ“© User Reports / Gateway Alert"] --> Header{"рҹ”Қ Analyze Headers"}
    Header -->|SPF/DKIM Pass + Known Domain| Legit["вң… Legitimate Email"]
    Header -->|SPF/DKIM Fail or Spoofed| Content{"рҹ“Һ Malicious Content?"}
    Content -->|Attachment| Sandbox["рҹ§Ә Detonate in Sandbox"]
    Content -->|Link| URLCheck["рҹ”— Check URL Reputation"]
    Content -->|None| Social["рҹ“Ӣ Social Engineering Only"]
    Sandbox -->|Malicious| Confirm["рҹҡЁ Confirmed Phishing"]
    Sandbox -->|Clean| FP["False Positive"]
    URLCheck -->|Malicious/Credential Harvester| Confirm
    URLCheck -->|Clean| FP
    Social -->|Credential Request| Confirm
    Social -->|Generic Spam| FP
    Confirm --> Clicked{"Did User Click/Submit?"}
    Clicked -->|No| ContainEmail["рҹӣЎпёҸ Block & Purge Only"]
    Clicked -->|Yes, Clicked Link| ContainPartial["рҹӣЎпёҸ Block + Monitor"]
    Clicked -->|Yes, Entered Credentials| ContainFull["рҹҡЁ Full Compromise Response"]
```

---

## 1. Analysis (Triage)

### 1.1 Header Analysis

| Check | How | Tool |
|:---|:---|:---|
| SPF result | Check `Received-SPF` header | Email header analyzer |
| DKIM signature | Verify `DKIM-Signature` validity | Email header analyzer |
| DMARC result | Check `Authentication-Results` | Email header analyzer |
| Return-Path | Compare with From address | Manual inspection |
| Received chain | Trace originating server IP | Manual + GeoIP |
| X-Originating-IP | Identify sender IP | Header inspection |

### 1.2 Content Analysis

| Item | Action | Tool |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **Sender domain** | Search reputation | VirusTotal, AbuseIPDB, WHOIS |
| **URLs** | Extract and check reputation | URLhaus, VirusTotal, urlscan.io |
| **Attachments** | Submit to sandbox (**NEVER open locally**) | Hybrid Analysis, Joe Sandbox, ANY.RUN |
| **File hash** | Check against TI feeds | VirusTotal, ThreatFox |
| **Language/tone** | Assess urgency, grammar, brand impersonation | Manual review |
| **Reply-to** | Compare with From вҖ” mismatch = suspicious | Manual inspection |

### 1.3 Scope Assessment

- [ ] How many users received this email?
- [ ] How many users clicked the link / opened the attachment?
- [ ] Any credential submissions on the landing page?
- [ ] Is this part of a targeted campaign or mass phishing?

---

## 2. Containment

### 2.1 Immediate Actions (within 15 minutes)

| # | Action | Tool | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Block sender email/domain in Email Gateway | M365 / Google / Proofpoint | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Purge email from ALL mailboxes | Search & Purge / Compliance Search | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Block malicious URLs at proxy/firewall | Web proxy, firewall | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Block file hash in EDR (if attachment) | CrowdStrike / SentinelOne | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Add IoCs to SIEM watchlist | SIEM TI integration | вҳҗ |

### 2.2 If User Clicked Link (No Credential Entry)

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Scan endpoint for malware/persistence | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Check browser history for redirects | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Monitor endpoint for 24 hours | вҳҗ |

### 2.3 If User Entered Credentials (Full Compromise)

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Force password reset immediately | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Revoke all active sessions/tokens | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Reset MFA and re-enroll | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Check for mailbox rules (forwarding, redirect) | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Check for OAuth app consents | вҳҗ |
| 6 | Review login history for suspicious access | вҳҗ |
| 7 | Cross-reference with [PB-05 Account Compromise](Account_Compromise.en.md) | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. IoC Collection

| Type | Value | Source |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Sender Email | | Email header |
| Sender Domain | | Email header |
| Sender IP | | Received chain |
| URL(s) | | Email body |
| Landing Page IP | | DNS lookup |
| Attachment Name | | Email |
| Attachment Hash (SHA256) | | Sandbox |
| Dropped File Hash | | Sandbox |

---

## 4. Evidence Checklist

| Evidence Type | What to Collect | Source | Why It Matters |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Original email | Full headers, body, sender metadata, message ID | Mail gateway / mailbox export | Proves spoofing path and campaign scope |
| URL evidence | Full URL, redirect chain, resolved IP/domain, screenshots | URL sandbox / proxy / DNS | Confirms credential harvesting or delivery path |
| Attachment evidence | Filename, SHA256, sandbox verdict, dropped files | Sandbox / mail gateway | Confirms malware delivery and blocking scope |
| User action evidence | Click time, credential submission, browser history, affected endpoint | Proxy / IdP / endpoint logs | Shows whether it remained phishing only or became compromise |
| Campaign scope | Recipient list, purge results, similar messages, VIP targeting | Mail search / SIEM | Supports escalation and awareness actions |

---

## 5. Minimum Telemetry Required

| Telemetry Source | Required For | Priority | Blind Spot If Missing |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| Mail gateway and secure email logs | Sender analysis, delivery path, purge validation | Required | Cannot confirm scope or whether the message was delivered |
| Mailbox audit and message trace | Inbox rule changes, user interaction, lateral mailbox impact | Required | Cannot prove post-delivery actions or mailbox abuse |
| Proxy, DNS, and URL filtering logs | Click path, redirect chain, destination infrastructure | Required | Cannot validate phishing destinations or follow-on browsing |
| Identity provider sign-in logs | Credential submission fallout, token abuse, MFA changes | Required | Cannot determine whether phishing became account compromise |
| Sandbox and endpoint telemetry | Attachment execution, dropped files, process lineage | Recommended | Malware delivery may be underestimated or missed |

---

## 6. False Positive and Tuning Guide

| Scenario | Why It Looks Suspicious | How to Validate | Tuning Action | Escalate If |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Legitimate bulk email campaign | High recipient count and similar subject lines resemble phishing blasts | Confirm approved sender, sending platform, and campaign owner | Allowlist approved sender domains and mail infrastructure only | Links, sender path, or branding differ from the approved campaign |
| External file-share or e-signature notification | URL-based messages can look like credential lures | Validate sender domain, DKIM/SPF alignment, and business context | Tune for approved SaaS sender patterns and signed URLs | Destination domain or redirect chain is not on the approved service list |
| Security awareness simulation | Uses phishing-like language and tracking links by design | Confirm simulation schedule and source platform | Suppress alerts only for the simulation domains and campaign window | Delivery occurs outside the exercise window or targets excluded users |
| User travel or mobile click-through | Rapid click from unusual IP or device can look compromised | Confirm user location, device, and no credential/token misuse after click | Keep click alerts informational when no follow-on auth anomalies exist | Credentials submitted, MFA changed, or token abuse appears |

---

## 7. Escalation Criteria

| Condition | Escalate To |
|:---|:---|
| > 10 users received the same email | SOC Lead |
| Any user entered credentials | Tier 2 + Account Security |
| Attachment confirmed as malware | Tier 2 + IR |
| Executive/VIP targeted (spear-phishing) | SOC Manager + CISO |
| Part of ongoing campaign | Threat Intel team |
| Data breach suspected | Legal + Compliance |

---

## 8. Recovery

- [ ] Unblock user account after password reset and MFA re-enrollment
- [ ] Confirm no unauthorized mailbox rules remain
- [ ] Verify no OAuth/API keys were created by attacker
- [ ] Remove user from "High Risk" monitoring after 48 hours (if clean)

---

## 9. Post-Incident

- [ ] Update email gateway rules if new pattern identified
- [ ] Submit phishing URL/domain to community blocklists
- [ ] Create/update Sigma detection rule if novel technique
- [ ] Send awareness reminder to affected users
- [ ] Document in [Incident Report](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.en.md)

---

### Email Security Stack

```mermaid
graph LR
    Email["рҹ“§ Inbound Email"] --> SPF["рҹ“Ӣ SPF"]
    SPF --> DKIM["рҹ”Ҹ DKIM"]
    DKIM --> DMARC["рҹӣЎпёҸ DMARC"]
    DMARC --> ATP["рҹ”Қ ATP Sandbox"]
    ATP --> Inbox["рҹ“¬ Deliver"]
    ATP --> Quarantine["рҹ—‘пёҸ Quarantine"]
    style DMARC fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style Quarantine fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
```

### User Report & Response

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant PhishBtn as Report Phishing Button
    participant SOC
    participant Email_Admin as Email Admin
    User->>PhishBtn: рҹ“§ Report suspicious email
    PhishBtn->>SOC: рҹҡЁ Forward to SOC
    SOC->>SOC: Analyze headers + URLs
    SOC->>Email_Admin: Block sender domain
    SOC-->>User: вң… Thanks! Phishing confirmed
```

## Detection Rules (Sigma)

| Rule | File |
|:---|:---|
| Suspicious Inbox Rule Created | [cloud_email_inbox_rule.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/cloud_email_inbox_rule.yml) |
| Office Spawning PowerShell | [proc_office_spawn_powershell.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/proc_office_spawn_powershell.yml) |

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Phishing.th.md
# Playbook: аёҹаёҙаёҠаёҠаёҙаёҮ (Phishing)

**ID**: PB-01
**аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ**: аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ/аёӘаё№аёҮ | **аё«аёЎаё§аё”аё«аёЎаё№а№Ҳ**: аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӣаёҘаёӯаё”аё аёұаёўаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘ
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1566.001](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1566/001/) (Spearphishing Attachment), [T1566.002](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1566/002/) (Spearphishing Link)
**аё—аёЈаёҙаёҒа№ҖаёҒаёӯаёЈа№Ң**: аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷ, Mail gateway block, SIEM correlation, Phishing simulation fail

### аёңаёұаёҮ IR аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёҹаёҙаёҠаёҠаёҙаёҮ

```mermaid
graph LR
    Report["рҹ“§ аёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷ"] --> Analyze["рҹ”Қ аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң"]
    Analyze --> Contain["рҹ”’ аё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ"]
    Contain --> Eradicate["рҹ—‘пёҸ аёҒаёіаёҲаёұаё”"]
    Eradicate --> Recover["вҷ»пёҸ аёҹаё·а№үаёҷаёҹаё№"]
    Recover --> Lessons["рҹ“қ аёҡаё—а№ҖаёЈаёөаёўаёҷ"]
    style Report fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Analyze fill:#f39c12,color:#fff
    style Contain fill:#e67e22,color:#fff
    style Eradicate fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style Recover fill:#2980b9,color:#fff
    style Lessons fill:#8e44ad,color:#fff
```

### аёңаёұаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ңаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘ

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant User as аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү
    participant SOC
    participant Mail as Mail Gateway
    participant TI as Threat Intel
    SOC->>Mail: аё”аё¶аёҮ email headers + body
    SOC->>TI: аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ URL/attachment hash
    TI-->>SOC: аёңаёҘаёҘаёұаёһаёҳа№Ң TI (malicious/clean)
    SOC->>Mail: аё„а№үаёҷаё«аёІ recipients аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё”
    Mail-->>SOC: аёЈаёІаёўаёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ recipients
    SOC->>User: а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮа№Җаё•аё·аёӯаёҷ + аё„аёіа№Ғаёҷаё°аёҷаёі
```

---

## аёңаёұаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲ

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ аёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘ Phishing"] --> Action{"рҹ“§ аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёӯаё°а№„аёЈ?"}
    Action -->|аёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷ а№„аёЎа№Ҳаё„аёҘаёҙаёҒ| Report["вң… аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң + аёҡаёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒ"]
    Action -->|аё„аёҘаёҙаёҒаёҘаёҙаёҮаёҒа№Ң| Click["рҹҹ  аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡа№Җаё§а№Үаёҡа№„аёӢаё•а№Ң"]
    Action -->|а№Җаёӣаёҙаё”а№„аёҹаёҘа№Ңа№Ғаёҷаёҡ| Attach["рҹ”ҙ EDR / Sandbox"]
    Action -->|аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҒ credentials| Creds["рҹ”ҙ аёЈаёөа№ҖаёӢа№Үаё•аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө"]
    Click --> Harvest{"а№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷаё«аёҷа№үаёІ login аёӣаёҘаёӯаёЎ?"}
    Harvest -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| Creds
    Harvest -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ (redirect/tracking)| Low["рҹҹЎ аёҡаёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒ URL + аё•аёҙаё”аё•аёІаёЎ"]
    Attach --> Malware{"аёЎаёұаёҘа№Ғаё§аёЈа№Ң?"}
    Malware -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| Isolate["рҹ”’ Isolate Host"]
    Creds --> Reset["рҹ”җ аёЈаёөа№ҖаёӢа№Үаё• + а№ҖаёһаёҙаёҒаё–аёӯаёҷ"]
```

---

## 1. аёҒаёІаёЈаё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң

### 1.1 аёҒаёІаёЈаё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ңаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘ

| аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈ | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| аёңаё№а№үаёӘа№ҲаёҮ (From / Return-Path / Envelope) | Email headers | вҳҗ |
| SPF / DKIM / DMARC аёңа№ҲаёІаёҷаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | Email headers | вҳҗ |
| Display name аёӣаёҘаёӯаёЎ (spoofing)? | а№ҖаёӣаёЈаёөаёўаёҡа№Җаё—аёөаёўаёҡаёҒаёұаёҡ directory | вҳҗ |
| аёҘаёҙаёҮаёҒа№Ңа№ғаёҷ email аёҠаёөа№үа№„аёӣаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё«аёҷ? | URL analysis | вҳҗ |
| а№„аёҹаёҘа№Ңа№Ғаёҷаёҡ вҖ” аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—, hash | Sandbox / VT | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёөаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаёӯаё·а№Ҳаёҷа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘа№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷ? | Mail log search | вҳҗ |
| Urgency / pressure tactics? | Content review | вҳҗ |

### 1.2 аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё— Phishing

| аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё— | аёҘаёұаёҒаё©аё“аё° | аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **Mass Phishing** | аёӘа№ҲаёҮаё–аё¶аёҮаё—аёёаёҒаё„аёҷ, generic content | рҹҹЎ аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ |
| **Spearphishing** | а№ҖаёҲаёІаё°аёҲаёҮаёҡаёёаё„аё„аёҘ/а№ҒаёңаёҷаёҒ | рҹҹ  аёӘаё№аёҮ |
| **Whaling** | а№ҖаёҲаёІаё°аёҲаёҮаёңаё№а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈ | рҹ”ҙ аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• |
| **BEC** | аёӣаёҘаёӯаёЎ CEO/CFO, аёӮаёӯа№Ӯаёӯаёҷа№ҖаёҮаёҙаёҷ | рҹ”ҙ аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• |
| **QR Phishing (Quishing)** | QR code аёҷаёіа№„аёӣаё«аёҷа№үаёІаёӣаёҘаёӯаёЎ | рҹҹ  аёӘаё№аёҮ |

---

## 2. аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ

### 2.1 а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёөаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаё„аёҘаёҙаёҒ

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **аёҡаёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒ** sender domain/IP аё—аёөа№Ҳ Mail Gateway | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **аёҡаёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒ** URL аё—аёөа№Ҳ Proxy/DNS | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **аёҘаёҡ** аёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘаёҲаёІаёҒаё—аёёаёҒ mailbox | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **аёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷ** URL/domain а№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ TI platform | вҳҗ |

### 2.2 аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаё„аёҘаёҙаёҒаёҘаёҙаёҮаёҒа№Ңаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёҒаёЈаёӯаёҒ Credentials

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **аёЈаёөа№ҖаёӢа№Үаё•аёЈаё«аёұаёӘаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ** аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **а№ҖаёһаёҙаёҒаё–аёӯаёҷ sessions** а№ҒаёҘаё° tokens аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ** sign-in logs аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮаёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ** inbox rules вҖ” forwarding аё–аё№аёҒаёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | вҳҗ |
| 5 | **аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ** OAuth app consents | вҳҗ |

### 2.3 аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үа№Җаёӣаёҙаё”а№„аёҹаёҘа№Ңа№Ғаёҷаёҡ

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Isolate** host аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **аёӘа№ҒаёҒаёҷ** аё”а№үаё§аёў EDR | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **аёӘа№ҲаёҮ** а№„аёҹаёҘа№Ңа№Ғаёҷаёҡа№„аёӣ sandbox | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **Block** hash аё—аёөа№Ҳ EDR | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаёіаёҲаёұаё”

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | аёҘаёҡаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘ phishing аёҲаёІаёҒаё—аёёаёҒ mailbox (purge) | вҳҗ |
| 2 | аёҘаёҡ malware/implant аёӯаёӯаёҒаёҲаёІаёҒ host аё—аёөа№Ҳаё•аёҙаё”а№ҖаёҠаё·а№үаёӯ | вҳҗ |
| 3 | аёҘаёҡ inbox rules аё—аёөа№Ҳаёңаё№а№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөаёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ | вҳҗ |
| 4 | а№ҖаёһаёҙаёҒаё–аёӯаёҷ OAuth apps аё—аёөа№Ҳаёӯаёұаёҷаё•аёЈаёІаёў | вҳҗ |
| 5 | аёӘаёіаёЈаёӯаёҮ forensic evidence | вҳҗ |

---

## 4. Evidence Checklist

| аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ | аёӘаёҙа№ҲаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ | а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёңаёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| аёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘаё•а№үаёҷаёүаёҡаёұаёҡ | headers, body, sender metadata, message ID | Mail gateway / mailbox export | а№ғаёҠа№үаёһаёҙаёӘаё№аёҲаёҷа№Ңа№ҖаёӘа№үаёҷаё—аёІаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈ spoof а№ҒаёҘаё°аёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё•а№Ғаё„аёЎа№ҖаёӣаёҚ |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ URL | URL а№Җаё•а№ҮаёЎ, redirect chain, resolved IP/domain, screenshot | URL sandbox / proxy / DNS | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ credential harvesting аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮаё—аёІаёҮаёӘа№ҲаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯ |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷа№„аёҹаёҘа№Ңа№Ғаёҷаёҡ | filename, SHA256, sandbox verdict, dropped files | Sandbox / mail gateway | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёӘа№ҲаёҮаёЎаёұаёҘа№Ғаё§аёЈа№Ңа№ҒаёҘаё°аёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё•аёҒаёІаёЈ block |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёіаёӮаёӯаёҮаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү | а№Җаё§аёҘаёІ click, аёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаёЈаёӯаёҒ credentials, browser history, endpoint аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ | Proxy / IdP / endpoint logs | а№ғаёҠа№үа№ҒаёўаёҒаё§а№ҲаёІа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ phishing аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮа№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёҒаёҘаёІаёўа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ account compromise |
| аёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё•аёӮаёӯаёҮа№Ғаё„аёЎа№ҖаёӣаёҚ | recipient list, аёңаёҘаёҒаёІаёЈ purge, аёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘаёҘаёұаёҒаё©аё“аё°а№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷ, аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҲаёІаё°аёҒаёҘаёёа№ҲаёЎ VIP | Mail search / SIEM | аёЈаёӯаёҮаёЈаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№ҒаёҘаё°аёҒаёІаёЈаёӘаё·а№ҲаёӯаёӘаёІаёЈаё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ |

---

## 5. Minimum Telemetry Required

| а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮ Telemetry | а№ғаёҠа№үа№Җаёһаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёӯаё°а№„аёЈ | аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ | Blind Spot аё–а№үаёІа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| Mail gateway а№ҒаёҘаё° secure email logs | аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ңаёңаё№а№үаёӘа№ҲаёҮ, а№ҖаёӘа№үаёҷаё—аёІаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаёӘа№ҲаёҮ, аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаёңаёҘаёҒаёІаёЈ purge | Required | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё•а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№ү а№ҒаёҘаё°а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЈаё№а№үаё§а№ҲаёІаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘаё–аё№аёҒаёӘа№ҲаёҮаё–аё¶аёҮа№ғаё„аёЈаёҡа№үаёІаёҮ |
| Mailbox audit а№ҒаёҘаё° message trace | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ inbox rule, аёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёіаёӮаёӯаёҮаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү, аёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡаё•а№Ҳаёӯ mailbox аёӯаё·а№Ҳаёҷ | Required | аёһаёҙаёӘаё№аёҲаёҷа№Ң post-delivery action аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ mailbox abuse а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№ү |
| Proxy, DNS, а№ҒаёҘаё° URL filtering logs | аё”аё№ click path, redirect chain, аёӣаёҘаёІаёўаё—аёІаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаё•аёҙаё”аё•а№Ҳаёӯ | Required | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ phishing destination аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёҠаёЎаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаёҷаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№ү |
| Identity provider sign-in logs | аё”аё№аёңаёҘаёҲаёІаёҒ credential submission, token abuse, MFA change | Required | аёҡаёӯаёҒа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаё§а№ҲаёІ phishing аёҒаёҘаёІаёўа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ account compromise а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёўаёұаёҮ |
| Sandbox а№ҒаёҘаё° endpoint telemetry | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҒаёІаёЈаёЈаёұаёҷ attachment, dropped file, process lineage | Recommended | аёӯаёІаёҲаёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷ malware delivery аё•а№ҲаёіаёҒаё§а№ҲаёІаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёһаёҘаёІаё”а№„аёӣа№ҖаёҘаёў |

---

## 6. False Positive а№ҒаёҘаё° Tuning Guide

| Scenario | аё—аёіа№„аёЎаёҲаё¶аёҮаё”аё№аёҷа№ҲаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёў | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | Tuning Action | аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| а№Ғаё„аёЎа№ҖаёӣаёҚаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘаёӣаёЈаё°аёҠаёІаёӘаёұаёЎаёһаёұаёҷаёҳа№Ңаё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ | аёңаё№а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёҲаёіаёҷаё§аёҷаёЎаёІаёҒа№ҒаёҘаё°аё«аёұаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаё„аёҘа№үаёІаёўаёҒаёұаёҷаё”аё№а№Җаё«аёЎаё·аёӯаёҷ phishing blast | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ sender аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ, platform аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№үаёӘа№ҲаёҮ, а№ҒаёҘаё° owner аёӮаёӯаёҮа№Ғаё„аёЎа№ҖаёӣаёҚ | allowlist а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё° sender domain а№ҒаёҘаё° mail infrastructure аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | аёҘаёҙаёҮаёҒа№Ң, sender path, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ branding а№„аёЎа№Ҳаё•аёЈаёҮаёҒаёұаёҡа№Ғаё„аёЎа№ҖаёӣаёҚаё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ |
| аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮа№Җаё•аё·аёӯаёҷаёҲаёІаёҒаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ file-share аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ e-signature | аёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘаё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёө URL аёЎаёұаёҒаё”аё№а№Җаё«аёЎаё·аёӯаёҷ credential lure | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ sender domain, DKIM/SPF alignment, а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҡаёЈаёҙаёҡаё—аёҳаёёаёЈаёҒаёҙаёҲ | tune аё•аёІаёЎ pattern аёӮаёӯаёҮ SaaS аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙа№ҒаёҘаё° signed URL | destination domain аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ redirect chain а№„аёЎа№Ҳаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳа№ғаёҷаёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ |
| аёҒаёІаёЈаё—аё”аёӘаёӯаёҡ security awareness | а№ғаёҠа№үаёӮа№үаёӯаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҒаёҘаё° tracking link а№Ғаёҡаёҡ phishing а№Ӯаё”аёўаё•аёұа№үаёҮа№ғаёҲ | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ schedule аёӮаёӯаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аё”аёӘаёӯаёҡа№ҒаёҘаё° source platform | suppress а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё° domain аёӮаёӯаёҮ simulation а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҠа№Ҳаё§аёҮа№Җаё§аёҘаёІаё—аё”аёӘаёӯаёҡ | аёҒаёІаёЈаёӘа№ҲаёҮа№ҖаёҒаёҙаё”аёҷаёӯаёҒаёҠа№Ҳаё§аёҮ exercise аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёўаёҙаёҮа№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳа№ғаёҷ scope |
| аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үа№Җаё”аёҙаёҷаё—аёІаёҮаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№Җаёӣаёҙаё”аёҘаёҙаёҮаёҒа№Ңаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷа№Җаё„аёЈаё·аёӯаёӮа№ҲаёІаёўаёЎаё·аёӯаё–аё·аёӯ | аёҒаёІаёЈ click аёҲаёІаёҒ IP аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ device а№ғаё«аёЎа№ҲаёӯаёІаёҲаё”аё№а№Җаё«аёЎаё·аёӯаёҷ compromise | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ location, device, а№ҒаёҘаё°а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө credential/token misuse аё•аёІаёЎаёЎаёІ | аё„аёҮ click alert а№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ informational аё–а№үаёІа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө auth anomaly аё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаёҷаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ | аёһаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаёЈаёӯаёҒ credential, MFA а№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷ, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ token abuse |

---

## 7. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҹаё·а№үаёҷаёҹаё№

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” phishing-resistant MFA (FIDO2) | вҳҗ |
| 2 | а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” Safe Links / Safe Attachments | вҳҗ |
| 3 | аёӣаёЈаёұаёҡ mail gateway rules | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аёӘа№ҲаёҮ security awareness а№ғаё«а№үаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ | вҳҗ |
| 5 | аёӯаёұаёӣа№Җаё”аё• phishing simulation exercises | вҳҗ |
| 6 | аё•аёҙаё”аё•аёІаёЎ 7 аё§аёұаёҷ | вҳҗ |

---

## 8. а№ҖаёҒаё“аё‘а№ҢаёҒаёІаёЈаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ

| а№ҖаёҮаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аёӮ | аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ |
|:---|:---|
| Credentials аё–аё№аёҒаёӮа№ӮаёЎаёўа№ҒаёҘаё°а№ғаёҠа№үаёҮаёІаёҷ | [PB-05 аёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёөаё–аё№аёҒаёҡаёёаёҒаёЈаёёаёҒ](Account_Compromise.th.md) |
| а№„аёҹаёҘа№Ңа№Ғаёҷаёҡ = malware | [PB-03 аёЎаёұаёҘа№Ғаё§аёЈа№Ң](Malware_Infection.th.md) |
| BEC вҖ” аёЎаёөаёҒаёІаёЈа№Ӯаёӯаёҷа№ҖаёҮаёҙаёҷ | [PB-17 BEC](BEC.th.md) + Legal |
| Whaling вҖ” аёңаё№а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈаё–аё№аёҒа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө | CISO аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө |
| аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү > 10 аё„аёҷ а№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡ phishing | SOC Lead |

---

### аёңаёұаёҮ Email Security Stack

```mermaid
graph LR
    Email["рҹ“§ Inbound Email"] --> SPF["рҹ“Ӣ SPF"]
    SPF --> DKIM["рҹ”Ҹ DKIM"]
    DKIM --> DMARC["рҹӣЎпёҸ DMARC"]
    DMARC --> ATP["рҹ”Қ ATP Sandbox"]
    ATP --> Inbox["рҹ“¬ Deliver"]
    ATP --> Quarantine["рҹ—‘пёҸ Quarantine"]
    style DMARC fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style Quarantine fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
```

### аёңаёұаёҮ User Report & Response

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant PhishBtn as Report Phishing Button
    participant SOC
    participant Email_Admin as Email Admin
    User->>PhishBtn: рҹ“§ Report suspicious email
    PhishBtn->>SOC: рҹҡЁ Forward to SOC
    SOC->>SOC: Analyze headers + URLs
    SOC->>Email_Admin: Block sender domain
    SOC-->>User: вң… Thanks! Phishing confirmed
```

## аёҒаёҺаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ (Sigma)

|:---|:---|

| Office Spawning PowerShell | [proc_office_spawn_powershell.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/proc_office_spawn_powershell.yml) |

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ

- [аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң](../Framework.th.md)
- [а№ҒаёЎа№Ҳа№ҒаёҡаёҡаёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.th.md)
- [PB-05 аёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёөаё–аё№аёҒаёҡаёёаёҒаёЈаёёаёҒ](Account_Compromise.th.md)
- [PB-26 аёҒаёІаёЈаё«аёҘаёөаёҒа№ҖаёҘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ MFA](MFA_Bypass.th.md)

## Phishing Email Analysis Checklist

| Check | How | Tool |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Sender reputation | SPF/DKIM/DMARC | Email headers |
| URL analysis | Sandbox detonation | URLScan/VirusTotal |
| Attachment scan | Hash + sandbox | Any.run/JoeSandbox |
| Header analysis | Examine X-headers | MXToolbox |
| Reply-to mismatch | Compare From vs Reply | Manual |

### Phishing Response Workflow

| Impact Level | Response | Owner |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Clicked link only | Monitor user | SOC Tier 1 |
| Entered credentials | Reset password + MFA | SOC Tier 2 |
| Downloaded malware | Full IR playbook | IR Team |
| Multiple victims | Company-wide alert | SOC + Comms |

### Phishing Impact Assessment

| Level | User Action | Response |
|:---|:---|:---|
| None | Reported only | Close + praise |
| Clicked | Visited URL | Scan + monitor |
| Submitted | Entered creds | Full IR + reset |

## References

- [MITRE ATT&CK T1566 вҖ” Phishing](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1566/)

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Privilege_Escalation.en.md
# Playbook: Privilege Escalation

**ID**: PB-07
**Severity**: High/Critical | **Category**: Identity & Access / Endpoint
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1068](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1068/) (Exploitation for Privilege Escalation), [T1098](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1098/) (Account Manipulation), [T1078.002](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1078/002/) (Domain Accounts)
**Trigger**: EDR alert, SIEM (Event 4672/4728/4732), PAM alert, sudo anomaly

### Admin Tiering Model

```mermaid
graph TD
    T0["рҹҸ° Tier 0: Domain Controllers"] --> T1["рҹ–ҘпёҸ Tier 1: Servers"]
    T1 --> T2["рҹ’» Tier 2: Workstations"]
    T0 -.->|вқҢ No cross-tier access| T2
    style T0 fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style T1 fill:#f39c12,color:#fff
    style T2 fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
```

### KRBTGT Reset Procedure

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant SOC
    participant AD as AD Admin
    participant DC as Domain Controller
    SOC->>AD: рҹҡЁ Golden Ticket detected
    AD->>DC: Reset KRBTGT #1
    Note over DC: Wait for full replication
    Note over DC: вҸі Wait 12 hours
    AD->>DC: Reset KRBTGT #2
    Note over DC: Wait for full replication
    AD->>SOC: вң… Golden Tickets invalidated
```

---

## Decision Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ Privilege Escalation Alert"] --> Method{"вҡҷпёҸ Escalation Method?"}
    Method -->|Group Membership Change| Group["рҹ‘Ҙ Added to Admin Group"]
    Method -->|Exploit / Tool| Tool["рҹ”§ Exploit Tool Detected"]
    Method -->|Configuration Change| Config["вҡҷпёҸ GPO / Policy Modification"]
    Group --> Ticket{"рҹ“Ӣ Change Request?"}
    Ticket -->|Yes, Authorized| FP["вң… False Positive"]
    Ticket -->|No| Suspicious["рҹ”ҙ Unauthorized"]
    Tool --> ToolType{"Which Tool?"}
    ToolType -->|Mimikatz / LSASS Dump| Cred["рҹ”ҙ Credential Theft"]
    ToolType -->|Local Exploit (CVE)| Vuln["рҹ”ҙ Vulnerability Exploit"]
    ToolType -->|UAC Bypass| UAC["рҹҹ  UAC Bypass"]
    Config --> Authorized{"Authorized Change?"}
    Authorized -->|No| Suspicious
    Suspicious --> Isolate["рҹ”Ң Isolate + Investigate"]
    Cred --> Isolate
    Vuln --> Isolate
    UAC --> Isolate
```

---

## 1. Analysis

### 1.1 Escalation Method Identification

| Method | Detection | Event IDs / Artifacts |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **Domain Admin group add** | SIEM, AD audit | 4728, 4732 (group member added) |
| **Local Admin group add** | SIEM, EDR | 4732 (local group) |
| **Mimikatz / credential dump** | EDR | LSASS access, sekurlsa::\* |
| **Token manipulation** | EDR, Sysmon | Process token changes, SeDebugPrivilege |
| **UAC bypass** | EDR, Sysmon | fodhelper.exe, eventvwr.exe abuse |
| **Kernel exploit (CVE)** | EDR, IDS | Exploit artifacts, crash dumps |
| **Sudo/SUID abuse** | Linux audit | sudo logs, SUID file execution |
| **GPO modification** | AD audit | GPO changes in SYSVOL |
| **Scheduled task as SYSTEM** | Sysmon, SIEM | 4698 (task created), SYSTEM context |

### 1.2 Investigation Checklist

| Check | How | Done |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| What process/tool performed the escalation? | EDR process timeline | вҳҗ |
| Was it authorized? (Change request, admin work) | ITSM / Change Management | вҳҗ |
| Which account gained elevated privileges? | AD audit log | вҳҗ |
| What did the elevated account do next? | SIEM / EDR timeline | вҳҗ |
| Was the source host already compromised? | EDR alerts, malware presence | вҳҗ |
| Was credential dumping involved? | LSASS access, process injection | вҳҗ |
| Were other systems accessed with elevated creds? | [PB-12 Lateral Movement](Lateral_Movement.en.md) | вҳҗ |

---

## 2. Containment

### 2.1 Immediate Actions

| # | Action | Tool | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Remove** escalated privileges / group membership | AD / IdP | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **Disable** the suspicious account | AD / IdP | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **Isolate** the source host | EDR | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **Kill** the exploit/tool process | EDR | вҳҗ |
| 5 | **Block** the exploit hash across all endpoints | EDR global blacklist | вҳҗ |

### 2.2 If Credential Theft Confirmed

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Reset passwords of ALL accounts accessed from compromised host | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Check for Pass-the-Hash / Pass-the-Ticket usage | вҳҗ |
| 3 | If Domain Admin creds dumped, plan KRBTGT reset (twice, 12h apart) | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Audit all lateral movement from this host вҶ’ [PB-12](Lateral_Movement.en.md) | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Check for DCSync (Event ID 4662 with replication GUIDs) | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. Eradication

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Remove exploit tools / malware from host | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Patch the vulnerability used for escalation (if CVE-based) | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Review GPOs for unauthorized modifications | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Scan for backdoors: new accounts, scheduled tasks, services | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Check for persistence in registry, WMI, startup | вҳҗ |
| 6 | Re-image host if Mimikatz/credential dump confirmed | вҳҗ |

---

## 4. Recovery

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Restore permission baseline from documented standard | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Full AD audit вҖ” compare current vs baseline group memberships | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Enable Credential Guard on workstations | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Implement LAPS for local admin passwords | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Deploy/verify Protected Users group for sensitive accounts | вҳҗ |
| 6 | Monitor recovered host and accounts for 72 hours | вҳҗ |

---

## 5. IoC Collection

| Type | Value | Source |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Exploit tool/binary hash | | EDR |
| Escalated account name | | AD audit |
| Process used for escalation | | EDR |
| Source host | | SIEM |
| CVE exploited (if applicable) | | IDS / EDR |
| Lateral movement destinations | | SIEM |

---

## 6. Evidence Checklist

| Evidence Type | What to Collect | Source | Why It Matters |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Privilege evidence | New group memberships, token privileges, sudo/suid misuse, admin rights gained | AD audit / system logs / EDR | Confirms what level of privilege was gained |
| Execution evidence | Process tree, exploit tool, command line, persistence artifacts | EDR / forensic tools | Shows how escalation happened and whether it persists |
| Identity evidence | Account type, credential exposure, ticketing/admin context | IAM / IdP / PAM logs | Distinguishes attack activity from authorized admin work |
| Scope evidence | Other hosts, accounts, or GPOs touched after escalation | SIEM / AD audit | Determines whether escalation led to wider compromise |
| Business impact evidence | Sensitive systems or data reached with elevated rights | Asset inventory / DLP | Supports severity and executive escalation |

---

## 7. Minimum Telemetry Required

| Telemetry Source | Required For | Priority | Blind Spot If Missing |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| Endpoint and EDR telemetry | Exploit tool use, token abuse, process lineage, persistence | Required | Cannot prove how privilege was gained |
| AD, IAM, and PAM audit logs | Group changes, admin rights, token or role grants | Required | Privilege change scope remains unclear |
| System security logs | Local admin, sudo, service, scheduled-task, registry activity | Required | OS-native privilege escalation paths stay hidden |
| Vulnerability and patch context | CVE correlation and missing patch context | Recommended | Analysts may miss exploit-based root cause |
| SIEM correlation across hosts | Follow-on movement and spread after escalation | Recommended | Wider blast radius may be underestimated |

---

## 8. False Positive and Tuning Guide

| Scenario | Why It Looks Suspicious | How to Validate | Tuning Action | Escalate If |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Approved admin elevation | Legitimate maintenance may add temp admin rights | Check PAM request, change ticket, and time window | Suppress only approved user/role/time combinations | Elevation persists or touches unrelated systems |
| Software installer/service deployment | Installers may request elevation and create services | Validate signed package, deployment owner, and path | Allowlist known installers and deployment tools narrowly | Tool also dumps credentials or alters admin groups |
| Security tool or EDR action | Defensive tools can access privileged processes | Confirm tool identity and console action | Suppress documented tool behaviors only | Same host shows unknown binaries or privilege changes outside tool scope |
| Break-glass account use | Emergency admin access can resemble abuse | Validate incident record and approval | Lower severity only for approved break-glass events | Access continues beyond approved duration or scope |

---

## 9. Escalation Criteria

| Condition | Escalate To |
|:---|:---|
| Domain Admin credentials compromised | CISO + External IR |
| Mimikatz / credential dumping confirmed | Tier 2 + Identity team |
| Multiple hosts affected | Major Incident |
| GPO modified without authorization | CISO + AD team |
| Kernel exploit (0-day) | CISO + Vendor |
| Data accessed with elevated privileges | [PB-08](Data_Exfiltration.en.md) + Legal |

---

## 10. Post-Incident

- [ ] Patch vulnerabilities used for privilege escalation
- [ ] Review LAPS configuration for local admin passwords
- [ ] Audit group memberships (Domain Admins, Enterprise Admins)
- [ ] Implement credential guard and LSA protection
- [ ] Review and harden service account permissions
- [ ] Deploy PAM solution for all privileged access
- [ ] Create detection rules for observed escalation technique
- [ ] Document findings in [Incident Report](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.en.md)

---

### Privilege Escalation Paths

```mermaid
graph TD
    Init["рҹ‘Ө Normal User"] --> Kernel["вҡҷпёҸ Kernel exploit"]
    Init --> Misconfig["рҹ“Ӣ Misconfiguration"]
    Init --> Token["рҹ”‘ Token theft"]
    Init --> Vuln["рҹ”“ Software vuln"]
    Kernel --> Admin["рҹ‘‘ Admin/Root"]
    Misconfig --> Admin
    Token --> Admin
    Vuln --> Admin
    Admin --> DCSync["рҹҸ° DCSync"]
    style Admin fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style DCSync fill:#c0392b,color:#fff
```

### PAM Architecture

```mermaid
graph LR
    User["рҹ‘Ө User"] --> Request["рҹ“қ Request access"]
    Request --> PAM["рҹ”’ PAM Vault"]
    PAM --> Approve["вң… Manager approval"]
    Approve --> Session["рҹ“ә Recorded session"]
    Session --> Rotate["рҹ”„ Auto-rotate password"]
    style PAM fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style Session fill:#3498db,color:#fff
```

## Detection Rules (Sigma)

| Rule | File |
|:---|:---|
| User Added to Domain Admins | [win_domain_admin_group_add.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/win_domain_admin_group_add.yml) |
| New Local User Created | [win_new_user_created.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/win_new_user_created.yml) |

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Privilege_Escalation.th.md
# Playbook: Privilege Escalation / аёҒаёІаёЈаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ң

**ID**: PB-07
**аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ**: аёӘаё№аёҮ/аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• | **аё«аёЎаё§аё”аё«аёЎаё№а№Ҳ**: Identity & Access
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1068](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1068/) (Exploitation for Privilege Escalation), [T1078](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1078/) (Valid Accounts)
**аё—аёЈаёҙаёҒа№ҖаёҒаёӯаёЈа№Ң**: EDR alert, SIEM (Event 4672/4728/4732), PAM alert, sudo anomaly


## аё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң (Post-Incident)

- [ ] Patch vulnerability аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№үаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ privilege escalation
- [ ] аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ LAPS configuration
- [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ group memberships (Domain/Enterprise Admins)
- [ ] а№ғаёҠа№ү Credential Guard / LSA protection
- [ ] а№ғаёҠа№ү PAM аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ privileged access аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё”
- [ ] аёҲаёұаё”аё—аёі [Incident Report](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.th.md)

### аёңаёұаёҮ Admin Tiering Model

```mermaid
graph TD
    T0["рҹҸ° Tier 0: Domain Controllers"] --> T1["рҹ–ҘпёҸ Tier 1: Servers"]
    T1 --> T2["рҹ’» Tier 2: Workstations"]
    T0 -.->|вқҢ аё«а№үаёІаёЎаёӮа№үаёІаёЎ Tier| T2
    style T0 fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style T1 fill:#f39c12,color:#fff
    style T2 fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
```

### аёңаёұаёҮаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷаёЈаёөа№ҖаёӢа№Үаё• KRBTGT

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant SOC
    participant AD as AD Admin
    participant DC as Domain Controller

    Note over DC: аёЈаёӯ replication аё—аёұа№Ҳаё§ forest
    Note over DC: вҸі аёЈаёӯ 12 аёҠаёЎ.
    AD->>DC: аёЈаёөа№ҖаёӢа№Үаё• KRBTGT аё„аёЈаёұа№үаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳ 2
    Note over DC: аёЈаёӯ replication аё—аёұа№Ҳаё§ forest
    AD->>SOC: вң… Golden Ticket а№ғаёҠа№үа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§
```

## аёңаёұаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲ

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ Privilege Escalation"] --> Type{"вҡҷпёҸ аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—?"}
    Type -->|Exploit-based| Exploit["рҹ’Ҙ Kernel/App Exploit"]
    Type -->|Credential-based| Cred["рҹ”‘ Credential Theft"]
    Type -->|Config-based| Config["вҡҷпёҸ Misconfiguration"]
    Exploit --> Impact{"рҹ“Ҡ аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ң?"}
    Cred --> Impact
    Config --> Impact
    Impact -->|Domain Admin| Critical["рҹ”ҙ DCSync / Golden Ticket"]
    Impact -->|Local Admin| High["рҹҹ  Lateral Movement Risk"]
    Impact -->|Elevated User| Medium["рҹҹЎ Monitor + Revert"]
```

---

## 1. аёҒаёІаёЈаё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң

### 1.1 а№Җаё—аё„аёҷаёҙаё„аёҒаёІаёЈаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ң

| а№Җаё—аё„аёҷаёҙаё„ | аё•аёұаё§аёҡа№ҲаёҮаёҠаёөа№ү | Event ID | аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **Kernel Exploit** | Exploit binary, SYSTEM shell | вҖ” | рҹ”ҙ аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• |
| **UAC Bypass** | Auto-elevate abuse | вҖ” | рҹҹ  аёӘаё№аёҮ |
| **Token Manipulation** | Token impersonation/theft | 4672 | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ |
| **Sudo/SUID Abuse** (Linux) | sudo misconfig, SUID binary | вҖ” | рҹҹ  аёӘаё№аёҮ |
| **Service Permissions** | Modifiable service path/binary | 7045 | рҹҹ  аёӘаё№аёҮ |
| **DLL Hijacking** | DLL а№ғаёҷ writable path | вҖ” | рҹҹ  аёӘаё№аёҮ |
| **Group Policy Abuse** | GPO modification | вҖ” | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ |
| **DCSync** | Domain replication (mimikatz) | 4662 | рҹ”ҙ аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• |
| **Golden Ticket** | Forged Kerberos TGT | вҖ” | рҹ”ҙ аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• |
| **Silver Ticket** | Forged service ticket | вҖ” | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ |

### 1.2 Windows Event IDs аёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ

| Event ID | аё„аё§аёІаёЎаё«аёЎаёІаёў |
|:---|:---|
| **4672** | Special privileges assigned (admin logon) |
| **4728** | Member added to security-enabled global group |
| **4732** | Member added to security-enabled local group |
| **4756** | Member added to universal group |
| **4662** | Operation performed on AD object (DCSync indicator) |
| **7045** | New service installed |

### 1.3 аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ

| аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈ | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү/process аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№ҢаёӘаё№аёҮ | EDR / SIEM | вҳҗ |
| а№Җаё—аё„аёҷаёҙаё„аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№ү (exploit/credential/misconfig) | EDR analysis | вҳҗ |
| аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ңаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№ү (local admin/domain admin/SYSTEM) | EDR / AD audit | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёө lateral movement аё•аёІаёЎаёЎаёІ? | SIEM correlation | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёө DCSync / credential dumping? | Event 4662 / SIEM | вҳҗ |
| AD group membership а№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷ? | Event 4728/4732 | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёө GPO аё–аё№аёҒа№ҒаёҒа№үа№„аёӮ? | Group Policy audit | вҳҗ |
| Entry vector (а№„аё”а№үаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ңа№ҖаёЈаёҙа№ҲаёЎаё•а№үаёҷаёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮа№„аёЈ) | EDR timeline | вҳҗ |

---

## 2. аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ

### 2.1 Local Privilege Escalation

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Isolate** host | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **Kill** malicious process | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **аёҘаёҡ** local admin аё—аёөа№Ҳа№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎаёЎаёІ | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **Patch** vulnerability аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№ү exploit | вҳҗ |

### 2.2 Domain-level Escalation

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **аёЈаёөа№ҖаёӢа№Үаё• KRBTGT** password (2 аё„аёЈаёұа№үаёҮ, аё«а№ҲаёІаёҮаёҒаёұаёҷ 12 аёҠаёЎ.) | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **аёЈаёөа№ҖаёӢа№Үаё•** compromised Domain Admin password | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **аёҘаёҡ** unauthorized group memberships | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **Revert** GPO changes | вҳҗ |
| 5 | **Scan** аё—аёёаёҒ DC аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ persistence | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаёіаёҲаёұаё”

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | аёҘаёҡ exploit tools (mimikatz, Rubeus, SharpHound) | вҳҗ |
| 2 | аёҘаёҡ persistence (services, scheduled tasks, registry) | вҳҗ |
| 3 | аё«аёЎаёёаёҷа№Җаё§аёөаёўаёҷ credentials аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё”аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮа№„аё”а№ү | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аёҘаёҡ forged tickets / cached credentials | вҳҗ |
| 5 | а№ҒаёҒа№үа№„аёӮ misconfiguration аё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒа№ғаёҠа№ү (service perms, SUID) | вҳҗ |

---

## 4. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҹаё·а№үаёҷаёҹаё№

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Deploy **LAPS** (Local Admin Password Solution) | вҳҗ |
| 2 | а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” **Credential Guard** | вҳҗ |
| 3 | а№ғаёҠа№ү **PAM** (Privileged Access Management) / PIM | вҳҗ |
| 4 | а№ғаёҠа№ү **Admin Tiering** (Tier 0/1/2) | вҳҗ |
| 5 | а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” **Protected Users** security group | вҳҗ |
| 6 | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ AD permissions аё—аёёаёҒа№„аё•аёЈаёЎаёІаёӘ | вҳҗ |

---

## 5. Evidence Checklist

| аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ | аёӘаёҙа№ҲаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ | а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёңаёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаё”а№үаёІаёҷаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ң | group membership а№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ, token privilege, sudo/suid misuse, аёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ң admin аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үа№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎ | AD audit / system logs / EDR | а№ғаёҠа№үаёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаё§а№ҲаёІа№„аё”а№үаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№ҢаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№ғаё” |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёіаёҮаёІаёҷ | process tree, exploit tool, command line, persistence artifact | EDR / forensic tools | а№ғаёҠа№үаё”аё№аё§а№ҲаёІ escalation а№ҖаёҒаёҙаё”аёӮаё¶а№үаёҷаёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮа№„аёЈа№ҒаёҘаё°аёўаёұаёҮаё„аёҮаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаё”а№үаёІаёҷаё•аёұаё§аё•аёҷ | account type, credential exposure, admin/ticket context | IAM / IdP / PAM logs | а№ғаёҠа№үа№ҒаёўаёҒ attack аёӯаёӯаёҒаёҲаёІаёҒаёҮаёІаёҷ admin аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаё”а№үаёІаёҷаёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё• | host, account, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ GPO аёӯаё·а№Ҳаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒа№Ғаё•аё°аё«аёҘаёұаёҮ escalation | SIEM / AD audit | а№ғаёҠа№үаёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёҘаёёаёҒаёҘаёІаёЎ |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡаёҳаёёаёЈаёҒаёҙаёҲ | аёЈаё°аёҡаёҡаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮа№„аё”а№үаё”а№үаё§аёўаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№ҢаёӘаё№аёҮ | Asset inventory / DLP | а№ғаёҠа№үаёӣаёЈаё°аёҒаёӯаёҡ severity а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҒаёІаёЈаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё–аё¶аёҮаёңаё№а№үаёҡаёЈаёҙаё«аёІаёЈ |

---

## 6. Minimum Telemetry Required

| а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮ Telemetry | а№ғаёҠа№үа№Җаёһаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёӯаё°а№„аёЈ | аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ | Blind Spot аё–а№үаёІа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| Endpoint а№ҒаёҘаё° EDR telemetry | аё”аё№ exploit tool, token abuse, process lineage, persistence | Required | аёһаёҙаёӘаё№аёҲаёҷа№Ңа№ҖаёӘа№үаёҷаё—аёІаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ңа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№ү |
| AD, IAM, а№ҒаёҘаё° PAM audit logs | аё”аё№ group change, admin rights, token/role grant | Required | аёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё•аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҷаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ңа№„аёЎа№ҲаёҠаёұаё” |
| System security logs | аё”аё№ local admin, sudo, service, scheduled task, registry activity | Required | аёһаёҘаёІаё” escalation path аёқаёұа№ҲаёҮ OS |
| Vulnerability а№ҒаёҘаё° patch context | а№ғаёҠа№үа№ӮаёўаёҮаёҒаёұаёҡ CVE а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Ӯаё«аё§а№Ҳаё—аёөа№ҲаёўаёұаёҮа№„аёЎа№Ҳ patch | Recommended | аё«аёІ root cause аёҲаёІаёҒ exploit-based escalation аёҠа№үаёІаёҘаёҮ |
| SIEM correlation аёӮа№үаёІаёЎаё«аёҘаёІаёў host | аё”аё№ movement аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ spread аё«аёҘаёұаёҮаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ң | Recommended | аёӯаёІаёҲаёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷ blast radius аё•а№Ҳаёіа№ҖаёҒаёҙаёҷаёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮ |

---

## 7. False Positive а№ҒаёҘаё° Tuning Guide

| Scenario | аё—аёіа№„аёЎаёҲаё¶аёҮаё”аё№аёҷа№ҲаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёў | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | Tuning Action | аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| аёҮаёІаёҷ admin elevation аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | maintenance аёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮаёӯаёІаёҲа№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№ҢаёҠаёұа№Ҳаё§аё„аёЈаёІаё§ | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ PAM request, change ticket, а№ҒаёҘаё° time window | suppress а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё° user/role/time аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | аёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ңаё„а№үаёІаёҮаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёӣа№Ғаё•аё°аёЈаё°аёҡаёҡаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ |
| software installer аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ service deployment | installer аёӯаёІаёҲаёӮаёӯаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№ҢаёӘаё№аёҮа№ҒаёҘаё°аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ service | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ signed package, deployment owner, а№ҒаёҘаё° path | allowlist installer а№ҒаёҘаё° deployment tool аё—аёөа№ҲаёЈаё№а№үаёҲаёұаёҒа№Ғаёҡаёҡа№Ғаё„аёҡ | аёЎаёө credential dumping аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№ҒаёҒа№ү admin group аёЈа№Ҳаё§аёЎаё”а№үаё§аёў |
| аёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёіаёҮаёІаёҷаёӮаёӯаёҮ security tool аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ EDR | defensive tool аёӯаёІаёҲа№Ғаё•аё° process аёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№ҢаёӘаё№аёҮ | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ tool identity а№ҒаёҘаё° console action | suppress а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё°аёһаёӨаё•аёҙаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎаёӮаёӯаёҮа№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯаё—аёөа№Ҳ documented | host а№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷаёЎаёө binary а№ҒаёӣаёҘаёҒаё«аёЈаё·аёӯ privilege change аёҷаёӯаёҒ scope |
| break-glass account use | emergency admin access аё”аё№а№Җаё«аёЎаё·аёӯаёҷ abuse | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ incident record а№ҒаёҘаё° approval | аёҘаё” severity а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё° break-glass аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | а№ғаёҠа№үаёҷаёІаёҷа№ҖаёҒаёҙаёҷа№Җаё§аёҘаёІ аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№ҖаёҒаёҙаёҷаёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё•аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ |

---

## 8. а№ҖаёҒаё“аё‘а№ҢаёҒаёІаёЈаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ

| а№ҖаёҮаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аёӮ | аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ |
|:---|:---|
| Domain Admin compromise | CISO + Major Incident |
| DCSync / Golden Ticket | CISO + AD team аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө |
| аё«аёҘаёІаёў host а№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡ escalation | Major Incident |
| аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё–аё№аёҒа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ | Legal + DPO |
| Lateral movement аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёһаёҡ | [PB-09 Lateral Movement](Lateral_Movement.th.md) |

---

### аёңаёұаёҮ Privilege Escalation Paths

```mermaid
graph TD
    Init["рҹ‘Ө Normal User"] --> Kernel["вҡҷпёҸ Kernel exploit"]
    Init --> Misconfig["рҹ“Ӣ Misconfiguration"]
    Init --> Token["рҹ”‘ Token theft"]
    Init --> Vuln["рҹ”“ Software vuln"]
    Kernel --> Admin["рҹ‘‘ Admin/Root"]
    Misconfig --> Admin
    Token --> Admin
    Vuln --> Admin
    Admin --> DCSync["рҹҸ° DCSync"]
    style Admin fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style DCSync fill:#c0392b,color:#fff
```

### аёңаёұаёҮ PAM Architecture

```mermaid
graph LR
    User["рҹ‘Ө User"] --> Request["рҹ“қ Request access"]
    Request --> PAM["рҹ”’ PAM Vault"]
    PAM --> Approve["вң… Manager approval"]
    Approve --> Session["рҹ“ә Recorded session"]
    Session --> Rotate["рҹ”„ Auto-rotate password"]
    style PAM fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style Session fill:#3498db,color:#fff
```

## аёҒаёҺаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ (Sigma)

| аёҒаёҺ | а№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң |
|:---|:---|
| User Added to Domain Admins | [win_domain_admin_group_add.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/win_domain_admin_group_add.yml) |
| New Local User Created | [win_new_user_created.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/win_new_user_created.yml) |

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ

- [аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң](../Framework.th.md)
- [PB-09 Lateral Movement](Lateral_Movement.th.md)
- [PB-05 аёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёөаё–аё№аёҒаёҡаёёаёҒаёЈаёёаёҒ](Account_Compromise.th.md)

## Privilege Escalation Techniques

| Technique | OS | Detection Event |
|:---|:---|:---|
| UAC bypass | Windows | Sysmon Event 1 |
| Sudo abuse | Linux | auth.log |
| Token manipulation | Windows | Event 4672 |
| Kernel exploit | Both | EDR behavioral |
| Misconfigured SUID | Linux | find command audit |

### Response Priority

| Escalation Type | Severity | Response |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Domain Admin gained | Critical | Immediate IR |
| Local admin gained | High | Investigate + contain |
| Service account abuse | High | Rotate + monitor |
| Application privilege | Medium | Review + fix |

## References

- [MITRE ATT&CK вҖ” Privilege Escalation](https://attack.mitre.org/tactics/TA0004/)


---

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Ransomware.en.md
# Playbook: Ransomware Response

**ID**: PB-02
**Severity**: Critical | **Category**: Malware / Impact
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1486](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1486/) (Data Encrypted for Impact), [T1490](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1490/) (Inhibit System Recovery)
**Trigger**: EDR alert, User report (ransom note), SIEM (mass file rename/encrypt pattern)

> вҡ пёҸ **CRITICAL**: Do NOT pay the ransom. Do NOT negotiate without Legal/CISO approval. Time is critical вҖ” every minute counts.

### Recovery Priority Order

```mermaid
graph LR
    A["1пёҸвғЈ AD/DC"] --> B["2пёҸвғЈ DNS/DHCP"]
    B --> C["3пёҸвғЈ Critical Servers"]
    C --> D["4пёҸвғЈ Business Apps"]
    D --> E["5пёҸвғЈ Workstations"]
    style A fill:#ff4444,color:#fff
    style B fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style C fill:#ff9900,color:#fff
    style D fill:#ffcc00,color:#000
    style E fill:#88cc00,color:#000
```

### Incident Communication Flow

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant SOC
    participant CISO
    participant Legal
    participant PR
    participant CEO
    SOC->>CISO: рҹҡЁ Ransomware confirmed
    CISO->>Legal: Assess PDPA / regulatory
    CISO->>CEO: BCP activation
    Legal->>CISO: Ransom / notification advice
    CISO->>PR: Prepare statement (if needed)
    PR->>CEO: Approve statement
    SOC->>CISO: Status update every 2h
```

---

## Decision Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ Ransomware Detected"] --> Isolate{"рҹ”Ң Isolate IMMEDIATELY"}
    Isolate -->|EDR Available| NetworkIso["Network Isolation via EDR"]
    Isolate -->|EDR Unavailable| Physical["Physically Disconnect"]
    NetworkIso --> Scope["рҹ“Ҡ Determine Scope"]
    Physical --> Scope
    Scope --> Single{"Single Host?"}
    Single -->|Yes| Contain["Standard Containment"]
    Single -->|No, Spreading| Activate["рҹҡЁ Activate Major IR"]
    Activate --> Segment["Segment Network"]
    Segment --> Shutdown["Shutdown Unaffected Critical Systems"]
    Contain --> Identify["рҹ”Қ Identify Strain"]
    Shutdown --> Identify
    Identify --> Decrypt{"Decryptor Available?"}
    Decrypt -->|Yes| DecryptFiles["Attempt Decryption"]
    Decrypt -->|No| Wipe["Wipe & Re-image"]
    DecryptFiles --> Restore["Restore & Validate"]
    Wipe --> Restore
    Restore --> Patch["Patch Entry Vector"]
    Patch --> Reconnect["Reconnect to Network"]
```

---

## 1. Analysis (First 15 Minutes)

### 1.1 Immediate Verification

| Check | How | Done |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Ransom note present? | Check Desktop, affected folders | вҳҗ |
| File extensions changed? | Look for `.encrypted`, `.locked`, `.crypt` | вҳҗ |
| Shadow copies deleted? | Check `vssadmin list shadows` | вҳҗ |
| Encryption still active? | Monitor file system activity | вҳҗ |

### 1.2 Scope Assessment

| Check | How | Done |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Number of affected hosts | SIEM query for similar alerts | вҳҗ |
| Network shares encrypted? | Check SMB/CIFS share status | вҳҗ |
| Lateral movement evidence? | RDP/SMB/WMI/PsExec logs from affected host | вҳҗ |
| Data exfiltrated before encryption? | Firewall/DLP logs for large outbound transfers | вҳҗ |
| Backup integrity | Verify offline/immutable backups are intact | вҳҗ |

### 1.3 Strain Identification

| Method | Tool |
|:---|:---|
| Ransom note text | [ID Ransomware](https://id-ransomware.malwarehunterteam.com/) |
| Encrypted file sample | [No More Ransom](https://www.nomoreransom.org/) |
| File hash (malware binary) | VirusTotal, ThreatFox |
| C2 domain/IP | TI feeds, OSINT |

---

## 2. Containment

### 2.1 Immediate (within 5 minutes)

| # | Action | Tool | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Network isolate** all affected hosts | EDR | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Disable affected user accounts | AD / IdP | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Block C2 IPs/domains at firewall | Firewall | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Block malware hash across all endpoints | EDR | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Disable RDP/SMB if spreading laterally | GPO / Firewall | вҳҗ |

### 2.2 If Spreading (Major Incident)

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Activate Major Incident Response plan | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Segment network (isolate affected VLAN) | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Shut down critical servers pre-emptively | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Disable domain-wide SMBv1 | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Notify CISO, Legal, and executive team | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. Eradication & Recovery

### 3.1 Eradication

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Wipe & re-image** вҖ” do NOT attempt to clean | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Remove persistence mechanisms (scheduled tasks, services, registry) | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Scan all connected systems for dormant payloads | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Reset all potentially compromised credentials | вҳҗ |

### 3.2 Recovery

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Restore from last known good backup (offline/immutable) | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Validate restored data integrity (hash comparison) | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Patch the entry vector (RDP, VPN, phishing gap) | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Re-enable network connectivity in stages | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Monitor recovered systems for 72 hours | вҳҗ |

---

## 4. Notification & Legal

| Stakeholder | When | Channel |
|:---|:---|:---|
| SOC Lead / Manager | Immediately | Chat + Phone |
| CISO | Within 30 minutes | Phone |
| Legal / Compliance | Within 1 hour | Email + Phone |
| CEO / Board (if major) | Within 4 hours | Briefing |
| Regulatory (PDPA/GDPR) | Within 72 hours if data breach | Official notification |
| Law enforcement | As directed by Legal | Official channels |

> вҡ пёҸ Do NOT communicate details on potentially compromised channels (email may be monitored by attacker).

---

## 5. IoC Collection

| Type | Value | Source |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Malware Binary Hash | | EDR / Forensics |
| Ransom Note Filename | | Affected host |
| Encrypted File Extension | | Affected host |
| C2 IP/Domain | | Network logs |
| Initial Access Vector | | Investigation |
| Lateral Movement Tool | | EDR logs |

---

## 6. Evidence Checklist

| Evidence Type | What to Collect | Source | Why It Matters |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Host impact evidence | Ransom note, encrypted extensions, affected hostnames, timestamps | Endpoint / EDR | Confirms strain behavior and spread timing |
| Malware evidence | Binary hash, execution path, persistence artifacts, process tree | EDR / forensic tools | Supports eradication and block actions |
| Lateral movement evidence | RDP/SMB/WMI/PsExec activity, authentication events | SIEM / Windows logs / EDR | Shows how the attack propagated |
| Recovery impact evidence | Backup status, immutable snapshot status, restore test results | Backup console / DR team | Determines recovery path and executive decisions |
| Legal and business impact evidence | Exfiltration indicators, affected systems, downtime, critical services impacted | DLP / NetFlow / asset inventory | Supports notification and business continuity decisions |

---

## 7. Minimum Telemetry Required

| Telemetry Source | Required For | Priority | Blind Spot If Missing |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| Endpoint detection and forensic telemetry | Encryption behavior, process lineage, persistence, spread indicators | Required | Cannot confirm patient zero or active encryption behavior |
| Windows or system authentication logs | Lateral movement, credential abuse, privileged access | Required | Cannot trace propagation across hosts or accounts |
| Network telemetry and DNS logs | C2, staging, remote encryption activity, exfiltration clues | Required | Cannot scope external communication or propagation path |
| Backup, snapshot, and recovery logs | Restore viability, immutable copy status, recovery timing | Required | Recovery planning becomes guesswork |
| Asset inventory and business service mapping | Critical system impact and outage prioritization | Recommended | Executive prioritization and service recovery order become weak |

---

## 8. False Positive and Tuning Guide

| Scenario | Why It Looks Suspicious | How to Validate | Tuning Action | Escalate If |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Approved software deployment or patching | Large file changes and process execution can resemble encryption activity | Confirm deployment window, package source, and signed installer lineage | Suppress only the known package/process combination for the maintenance window | File rename/write behavior persists outside the approved package path |
| Backup, compression, or archival jobs | High file I/O and extension changes can look like ransomware staging | Validate service account, job schedule, destination, and expected host list | Tune thresholds for approved backup/compression binaries and service accounts | Unexpected user context, shadow copy deletion, or ransom notes appear |
| Security scanning or EDR remediation | Mass file touches or quarantine actions can appear destructive | Confirm scanner/remediation job ID and source console actions | Suppress by tool process name plus management server correlation | The same host also shows lateral movement or unknown payload execution |
| Lab, sandbox, or malware analysis environment | Intentional ransomware detonation for testing looks real in telemetry | Validate isolated asset tag, analyst owner, and lab network segment | Scope exceptions to isolated lab assets only | Activity escapes the lab boundary or reaches production identities/systems |

---

## 9. Post-Incident

- [ ] Conduct lessons learned within 5 business days
- [ ] Update endpoint hardening (disable macros, restrict PowerShell)
- [ ] Verify backup strategy (3-2-1 rule with immutable copy)
- [ ] Create/update detection rules for the attack chain
- [ ] Brief all SOC analysts on lessons learned
- [ ] Document in [Incident Report](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.en.md)

---

### 3-2-1 Backup Strategy

```mermaid
graph TD
    Backup["рҹ’ҫ 3-2-1 Backup"] --> Three["рҹ“Ӣ 3 copies"]
    Three --> Two["рҹ—„пёҸ 2 media types"]
    Two --> One["вҳҒпёҸ 1 offsite/air-gapped"]
    One --> Test["рҹ§Ә Test restore monthly"]
    Test --> Immutable["рҹ”’ Immutable backup"]
    style Backup fill:#3498db,color:#fff
    style Immutable fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
```

### Ransom Payment Decision

```mermaid
graph TD
    Pay{"рҹ’° Pay ransom?"} -.->|вҡ пёҸ Not recommended| Risks["вқҢ Risks"]
    Pay --> Legal["вҡ–пёҸ Legal consult"]
    Risks --> R1["No decryption guarantee"]
    Risks --> R2["Funds criminal operations"]
    Risks --> R3["May be targeted again"]
    Legal --> CISO["рҹ§‘вҖҚрҹ’ј CISO decides"]
    CISO --> Recovery["вҷ»пёҸ Recovery Plan"]
    style Pay fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Risks fill:#c0392b,color:#fff
    style Recovery fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
```

## Detection Rules (Sigma)

| Rule | File |
|:---|:---|
| Ransomware Bulk Renaming | [file_bulk_renaming_ransomware.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/file_bulk_renaming_ransomware.yml) |
| PowerShell Encoded Command | [proc_powershell_encoded.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/proc_powershell_encoded.yml) |
| Execution from Temp/Downloads | [proc_temp_folder_execution.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/proc_temp_folder_execution.yml) |

- [MITRE ATT&CK T1486 вҖ” Data Encrypted for Impact](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1486/)
- [CISA Ransomware Guide](https://www.cisa.gov/stopransomware/ransomware-guide)

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Ransomware.th.md
# Playbook: а№ҒаёЈаёҷаёӢаёұаёЎа№Ғаё§аёЈа№Ң (Ransomware)

**ID**: PB-02
**аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ**: аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• | **аё«аёЎаё§аё”аё«аёЎаё№а№Ҳ**: аёҒаёІаёЈа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1486](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1486/) (Data Encrypted for Impact), [T1489](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1489/) (Service Stop)
**аё—аёЈаёҙаёҒа№ҖаёҒаёӯаёЈа№Ң**: EDR alert, аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷа№„аёҹаёҘа№Ңаё–аё№аёҒа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёЈаё«аёұаёӘ, Ransom note, Canary file triggered

> рҹҡЁ **аё«а№үаёІаёЎаёҲа№ҲаёІаёўаё„а№ҲаёІа№„аё–а№Ҳ** а№Ӯаё”аёўа№„аёЎа№ҲаёӣаёЈаё¶аёҒаё©аёІ Legal + CISO вҖ” аёҒаёІаёЈаёҲа№ҲаёІаёўа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЈаёұаёҡаёӣаёЈаё°аёҒаёұаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаё№а№үаё„аё·аёҷ

---

## аёңаёұаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲ

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ Ransomware"] --> Scope{"рҹ“Ҡ аёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё•?"}
    Scope -->|а№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§| Single["рҹҹ  Isolate + Investigate"]
    Scope -->|аё«аёҘаёІаёўа№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ/server| Multi["рҹ”ҙ Major Incident"]
    Scope -->|AD/DC аё–аё№аёҒа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёЈаё«аёұаёӘ| Critical["рҹ”ҙрҹ”ҙ аё—аёұа№үаёҮаёӯаёҮаё„а№ҢаёҒаёЈ"]
    Single --> Contain["рҹ”’ Isolate Host"]
    Multi --> Contain
    Critical --> War["рҹҸў War Room вҖ” CEO/CISO/Legal"]
    Contain --> Backup{"рҹ’ҫ Backup аёӘаё°аёӯаёІаё”?"}
    Backup -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| Restore["вҷ»пёҸ аёҒаё№а№үаё„аё·аёҷ"]
    Backup -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ| Decrypt["рҹ”‘ аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ Decryptor"]
```

---

## аё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң (Post-Incident)

- [ ] аё—аё”аёӘаёӯаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈ restore аёҲаёІаёҒ backup а№ғаё«а№үаёӘаёЎаёҡаё№аёЈаё“а№Ң
- [ ] а№ғаёҠа№ү 3-2-1 backup strategy
- [ ] аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ endpoint hardening (macros, RDP, PowerShell)
- [ ] а№ғаёҠа№ү network segmentation аёӣа№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёұаёҷ lateral movement
- [ ] аёҲаёұаё” awareness training а№ҖаёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ phishing/ransomware
- [ ] аёҲаёұаё”аё—аёі [Incident Report](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.th.md)


## 1. аёҒаёІаёЈаё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң

### 1.1 аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ

| аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈ | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| аё•аёЈаё°аёҒаё№аёҘа№ҒаёЈаёҷаёӢаёұаёЎа№Ғаё§аёЈа№Ң (аёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯ, ransom note) | ID Ransomware | вҳҗ |
| аёҲаёіаёҷаё§аёҷа№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ/server аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ | EDR / SIEM | вҳҗ |
| Entry vector (phishing/RDP/exploit) | EDR timeline | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёө data exfiltration аёҒа№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёЈаё«аёұаёӘ? (double extortion) | Netflow / DLP | вҳҗ |
| Backup аёӣаёҘаёӯаё”аё аёұаёў? (offline / immutable?) | Backup team | вҳҗ |
| AD/DC а№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ? | AD admin | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёө decryptor аёҹаёЈаёө? | [NoMoreRansom.org](https://www.nomoreransom.org/) | вҳҗ |

### 1.2 аёҒаёҘаёёа№ҲаёЎа№ҒаёЈаёҷаёӢаёұаёЎа№Ғаё§аёЈа№Ңа№ҒаёҘаё°аёһаёӨаё•аёҙаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎ

| аёҒаёҘаёёа№ҲаёЎ | Double Extortion | аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮаёҡаёҷ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| LockBit 3.0 | вң… | Builder leaked |
| BlackCat/ALPHV | вң… | Rust |
| Cl0p | вң… (MOVEit, GoAnywhere) | File transfer exploit |
| PLAY | вң… | вҖ” |
| Royal/BlackSuit | вң… | вҖ” |

---

## 2. аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Isolate** аё—аёёаёҒа№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ (EDR networkquarantine) | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **аё•аёұаё”** internet access аёӮаёІаёӯаёӯаёҒ (аёӣа№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёұаёҷа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёЈаё«аёұаёӘа№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎ) | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **аёЈаёөа№ҖаёӢа№Үаё•аёЈаё«аёұаёӘаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ** KRBTGT (2 аё„аёЈаёұа№үаёҮ) аё–а№үаёІ AD аё–аё№аёҒаёҡаёёаёҒаёЈаёёаёҒ | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **аёӣаёҙаё” RDP** аё аёІаёўаёҷаёӯаёҒаё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” | вҳҗ |
| 5 | **аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ** backup вҖ” аёўаёұаёҮаёӘаё°аёӯаёІаё”? Disconnect backup! | вҳҗ |
| 6 | **а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ** Executive / Legal аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаёіаёҲаёұаё”

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | аёҘаёҡаёЎаёұаёҘа№Ғаё§аёЈа№Ң + persistence аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” | вҳҗ |
| 2 | аёҘа№үаёІаёҮ GPO/script аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№үаёҒаёЈаё°аёҲаёІаёўаёЎаёұаёҘа№Ғаё§аёЈа№Ң | вҳҗ |
| 3 | аё«аёЎаёёаёҷа№Җаё§аёөаёўаёҷ credentials аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” (admin, service accounts) | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аёЈаёөа№ҖаёӢа№Үаё• KRBTGT (аё–а№үаёІаёўаёұаёҮа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаё—аёі) | вҳҗ |

### аёңаёұаёҮаёҘаёіаё”аёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаё№а№үаё„аё·аёҷ

```mermaid
graph LR
    A["1пёҸвғЈ AD/DC"] --> B["2пёҸвғЈ DNS/DHCP"]
    B --> C["3пёҸвғЈ Critical Servers"]
    C --> D["4пёҸвғЈ Business Apps"]
    D --> E["5пёҸвғЈ Workstations"]
    style A fill:#ff4444,color:#fff
    style B fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style C fill:#ff9900,color:#fff
    style D fill:#ffcc00,color:#000
    style E fill:#88cc00,color:#000
```

### аёңаёұаёҮаёӘаё·а№ҲаёӯаёӘаёІаёЈаёЈаё°аё«аё§а№ҲаёІаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant SOC
    participant CISO
    participant Legal
    participant PR
    participant CEO
    SOC->>CISO: рҹҡЁ аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ Ransomware
    CISO->>Legal: аёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷ PDPA / аёҒаёҺаё«аёЎаёІаёў
    CISO->>CEO: а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ BCP activation
    Legal->>CISO: а№Ғаёҷаё°аёҷаёіаёҒаёІаёЈаёҲа№ҲаёІаёўаё„а№ҲаёІа№„аё–а№Ҳ / а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮа№Җаё•аё·аёӯаёҷ
    CISO->>PR: а№Җаё•аёЈаёөаёўаёЎа№Ғаё–аёҘаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң (аё–а№үаёІаёҲаёіа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ)
    PR->>CEO: аёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙа№Ғаё–аёҘаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң
    SOC->>CISO: аёӯаёұаёӣа№Җаё”аё•аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё°аё—аёёаёҒ 2 аёҠаёЎ.
```
