## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/SQL_Injection.th.md
# Playbook: аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮ SQL Injection

**ID**: PB-37
**аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ**: аёӘаё№аёҮ | **аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—**: Initial Access / Web Application
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1190](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1190/) (Exploit Public-Facing Application)
**Trigger**: WAF alert, SIEM correlation (SQL patterns аёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ), IDS signature, application error spike

> вҡ пёҸ **аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё•**: SQL injection аёӯаёІаёҲаёҷаёіа№„аёӣаёӘаё№а№ҲаёҒаёІаёЈа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө database аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё”, аёӮа№ӮаёЎаёўаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёЈаёұаёҷ OS command аёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ `xp_cmdshell` аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ `LOAD_FILE()`

### аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё— SQL Injection

```mermaid
graph TD
    SQLi["рҹ”ҙ SQL Injection"] --> Classic["Classic SQLi\n' OR 1=1 --"]
    SQLi --> Blind["Blind SQLi\nBoolean/Time-based"]
    SQLi --> Union["UNION-based\nExtract аё•аёІаёЈаёІаёҮаёӯаё·а№Ҳаёҷ"]
    SQLi --> Error["Error-based\nаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ DB а№ғаёҷ error"]
    SQLi --> Stacked["Stacked Queries\nаё«аёҘаёІаёўаё„аёіаёӘаёұа№ҲаёҮ"]
    SQLi --> OOB["Out-of-Band\nDNS/HTTP exfil"]
    SQLi --> Second["Second-Order\nа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡа№ҒаёҘа№үаё§аё—аёіаёҮаёІаёҷаё—аёөаё«аёҘаёұаёҮ"]
    style SQLi fill:#ff4444,color:#fff
    style Stacked fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style OOB fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
```

### аёҘаёіаё”аёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө

```mermaid
graph LR
    A["1пёҸвғЈ аёӘаёіаёЈаё§аёҲ\nParameter fuzzing"] --> B["2пёҸвғЈ Injection\nаёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ payload"]
    B --> C["3пёҸвғЈ аё”аё¶аёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ\nUNION/Blind"]
    C --> D["4пёҸвғЈ Privilege Escalation\nDB admin access"]
    D --> E["5пёҸвғЈ OS Command\nxp_cmdshell/UDF"]
    E --> F["6пёҸвғЈ Compromise а№Җаё•а№ҮаёЎаёЈаё№аёӣ\nLateral movement"]
    style A fill:#ffcc00,color:#000
    style B fill:#ff9900,color:#fff
    style C fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style D fill:#ff4444,color:#fff
    style E fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style F fill:#660000,color:#fff
```

---

## Decision Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёһаёҡ SQLi"] --> Source{"а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮ Alert?"}
    Source -->|WAF| WAF["аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ WAF logs\nBlock аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ?"]
    Source -->|SIEM| SIEM["аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ DB query logs"]
    Source -->|IDS| IDS["аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ network payload"]
    WAF --> Blocked{"Request аё–аё№аёҒ block?"}
    Blocked -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| Monitor["аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаё•аёҙаё”аё•аёІаёЎаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаёҷаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ\nа№ҖаёҠа№Үаё„ endpoint аёӯаё·а№Ҳаёҷ"]
    Blocked -->|"а№„аёЎа№Ҳ вҖ” аёңа№ҲаёІаёҷа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёЎаёІ"| Confirm["рҹ”ҙ аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ SQLi"]
    SIEM --> Confirm
    IDS --> Confirm
    Confirm --> Assess{"аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё–аё№аёҒа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ?"}
    Assess -->|"Schema/metadata а№Җаё—а№ҲаёІаёҷаёұа№үаёҷ"| Medium["рҹҹЎ аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ вҖ” аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаёӘаёіаёЈаё§аёҲ"]
    Assess -->|"аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаё–аё№аёҒаё”аё¶аёҮ"| High["рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ вҖ” Data breach"]
    Assess -->|"OS commands аё–аё№аёҒаёЈаёұаёҷ"| Critical["рҹ’Җ аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• вҖ” Full compromise"]
    High --> Contain["CONTAIN & а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ"]
    Critical --> Contain
    style Alert fill:#ff4444,color:#fff
    style Confirm fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style Critical fill:#660000,color:#fff
```

### аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant WAF
    participant SOC as SOC Analyst
    participant DBA as DB Admin
    participant Dev as Dev Team
    participant IR as IR Team

    WAF->>SOC: рҹҡЁ аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёһаёҡ SQLi pattern
    SOC->>WAF: аё”аё¶аёҮ request logs аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” (URI, params, body)
    SOC->>DBA: аёӮаёӯ DB query audit logs
    DBA->>SOC: аёӘа№ҲаёҮ queries аё—аёөа№Ҳаёҷа№ҲаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёў
    SOC->>SOC: а№ҖаёӣаёЈаёөаёўаёҡа№Җаё—аёөаёўаёҡ WAF + DB logs (timestamp match)
    SOC->>IR: аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ SQLi вҖ” escalate
    IR->>DBA: аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ (tables, rows)
    IR->>Dev: аёЈаё°аёҡаёё endpoint аё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёөаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Ӯаё«аё§а№Ҳ
    Dev->>Dev: Deploy hotfix (parameterized queries)
    IR->>SOC: аёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷаёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё• data breach
```

### аёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ Database

```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph "Level 1: аёӘаёіаёЈаё§аёҲ"
        L1A["Version query\nSELECT @@version"]
        L1B["Schema enumeration\nINFORMATION_SCHEMA"]
        L1C["Table listing\nSHOW TABLES"]
    end
    subgraph "Level 2: а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ"
        L2A["аёӯа№ҲаёІаёҷаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү\nSELECT from users"]
        L2B["аёӮа№ӮаёЎаёў credential\npassword hashes"]
        L2C["аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҮаёҙаёҷ\ntransactions, PII"]
    end
    subgraph "Level 3: Compromise аёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ"
        L3A["аёӯа№ҲаёІаёҷа№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң\nLOAD_FILE()"]
        L3B["а№ҖаёӮаёөаёўаёҷа№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң\nINTO OUTFILE"]
        L3C["OS commands\nxp_cmdshell"]
    end
    style L1A fill:#ffcc00,color:#000
    style L2B fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style L3C fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
```

### аёӣаёЈаё°аёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙаё аёІаёһ WAF Rules

```mermaid
pie title SQLi Detection а№Ӯаё”аёў WAF Rule
    "Classic patterns blocked" : 45
    "Encoded payloads blocked" : 20
    "Blind SQLi detected" : 15
    "Bypassed (0-day)" : 10
    "False positives" : 10
```

### Timeline аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮ

```mermaid
gantt
    title SQL Injection Response Timeline
    dateFormat HH:mm
    axisFormat %H:%M
    section Detection
        WAF/IDS alert          :a1, 00:00, 5min
        Log correlation        :a2, after a1, 15min
    section Containment
        Block attacker IP      :a3, after a2, 5min
        WAF emergency rules    :a4, after a3, 10min
    section Investigation
        аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң request      :a5, after a4, 30min
        аёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ DB     :a6, after a5, 60min
        аёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё• data breach    :a7, after a6, 60min
```

## 1. аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө (15 аёҷаёІаё—аёөа№ҒаёЈаёҒ)

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | аёңаё№а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҙаё”аёҠаёӯаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| 1 | Block IP аёңаё№а№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөаё—аёөа№Ҳ WAF/firewall | SOC T1 |
| 2 | а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” WAF rules а№ҖаёӮа№үаёЎаёҮаё§аё”аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ SQLi | SOC T1 |
| 3 | а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ HTTP request logs а№Җаё•а№ҮаёЎаёЈаё№аёӣа№Ғаёҡаёҡ (headers, body, params) | SOC T2 |
| 4 | аёӮаёӯ database query audit logs аёҲаёІаёҒ DBA | SOC T2 |
| 5 | аёЈаё°аёҡаёё application endpoint аё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёөаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Ӯаё«аё§а№Ҳ | Dev Team |
| 6 | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаё§а№ҲаёІаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё–аё№аёҒаёҷаёіаёӯаёӯаёҒаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ (response sizes, timing) | SOC T2 |

## 2. аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ

### аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң WAF/Web Server
- [ ] HTTP requests аё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёө SQLi patterns аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё” (URI, params, POST body)
- [ ] IP аёңаё№а№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө, User-Agent, аё—аёөа№Ҳаё•аёұа№үаёҮаё—аёІаёҮаё аё№аёЎаёҙаёЁаёІаёӘаё•аёЈа№Ң
- [ ] аё„аё§аёІаёЎаё–аёөа№Ҳа№ҒаёҘаё°аёЈаё№аёӣа№Ғаёҡаёҡа№Җаё§аёҘаёІаёӮаёӯаёҮ requests
- [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ encoding bypasses (URL, Unicode, hex, double encoding)
- [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаё§а№ҲаёІ requests аё–аё№аёҒ block аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёЎаёІ

### аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң Database
- [ ] а№Җаёӣаёҙаё”а№ҒаёҘаё°аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ query audit logs
- [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ `UNION SELECT`, `INFORMATION_SCHEMA`, `@@version`
- [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ `xp_cmdshell`, `LOAD_FILE()`, `INTO OUTFILE`
- [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ privileges аёӮаёӯаёҮ database user (аёЈаёұаёҷа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ DBA/root аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ?)
- [ ] аёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷ tables/rows аё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ
- [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ database users а№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷа№ҒаёӣаёҘаёҮ privileges

### аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң Application
- [ ] аёЈаё°аёҡаёё code аё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёөаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Ӯаё«аё§а№Ҳ (а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№ү parameterized queries)
- [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаё§а№ҲаёІ ORM а№ғаёҠа№үаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ
- [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ input validation а№ҒаёҘаё° sanitization
- [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ stored procedures аё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёө dynamic SQL

## 3. аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ (Containment)

| аёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё• | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | аёЈаёІаёўаёҘаё°а№Җаёӯаёөаёўаё” |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **а№Җаё„аёЈаё·аёӯаёӮа№ҲаёІаёў** | Block IP аёңаё№а№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө | WAF + Firewall rules |
| **WAF** | Emergency SQLi rules | Block payloads аё—аёұа№Ҳаё§а№„аёӣ |
| **Application** | аёӣаёҙаё” endpoint аё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёөаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Ӯаё«аё§а№Ҳ | аё«аёҷа№үаёІ maintenance аёҠаёұа№Ҳаё§аё„аёЈаёІаё§ |
| **Database** | а№ҖаёһаёҙаёҒаё–аёӯаёҷ privileges а№ҖаёҒаёҙаёҷ | Least-privilege аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ app accounts |
| **Credentials** | аё«аёЎаёёаёҷа№Җаё§аёөаёўаёҷ DB passwords | аё—аёёаёҒ application DB connections |

## 4. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаёіаёҲаёұаё”а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҒаё№а№үаё„аё·аёҷ

### Code Fixes (аёҘаёіаё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ)
1. **Parameterized queries** вҖ” а№Ғаё—аёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳ string concatenation а№ғаёҷ SQL аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё”
2. **Input validation** вҖ” Whitelist аё•аёұаё§аёӯаёұаёҒаё©аёЈаё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё•аё•а№Ҳаёӯ field
3. **WAF rules** вҖ” Deploy SQLi signatures а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё°
4. **DB hardening** вҖ” аёҘаёҡ `xp_cmdshell`, аёӣаёҙаё” `LOAD_FILE()`
5. **Least privilege** вҖ” App DB accounts аёЎаёө permissions аёҷа№үаёӯаёўаё—аёөа№ҲаёӘаёёаё”

### SIEM Detection Queries
```sql
-- Splunk: аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ SQLi patterns а№ғаёҷ web logs
index=web sourcetype=access_combined
| regex uri_query="(?i)(union\s+select|information_schema|or\s+1\s*=\s*1|waitfor\s+delay|benchmark\s*\(|sleep\s*\()"
| stats count by src_ip, uri_path, uri_query
| where count > 5
```

## 5. Evidence Checklist

| аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ | аёӘаёҙа№ҲаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ | а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | а№Җаё«аё•аёёаёңаёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ request | full URI, parameter, header, body, encoding style, timestamp | WAF / web logs | а№ғаёҠа№ү reconstruct injection path а№ҒаёҘаё° bypass technique |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ database | query log, table аё—аёөа№Ҳа№Ӯаё”аёҷ, privilege аёӮаёӯаёҮ DB user, error trace | DB audit / DBA logs | а№ғаёҠа№үаёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаё§а№ҲаёІаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡаё–аё¶аёҮ database а№ҒаёҘаё°аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷа№ғаё”аёҡа№үаёІаёҮ |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷа№ҒаёӯаёӣаёһаёҘаёҙа№Җаё„аёҠаёұаёҷ | vulnerable code path, stack trace, release/version context | App logs / APM / code review | а№ғаёҠа№үаёңаё№аёҒа№Җаё«аё•аёёа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёҒаёұаёҡ defect аё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҒаёҒа№ү |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷаёӮаёӯаёҮ response | returned row, response size, timing anomaly, error page | Access logs / app metrics | а№ғаёҠа№үаё”аё№аё§а№ҲаёІаёЎаёө data extraction аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ blind SQLi аёӘаёіа№ҖаёЈа№ҮаёҲаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ |
| аё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷа№Ӯаё„аёЈаёҮаёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮаёһаё·а№үаёҷаёҗаёІаёҷ | action аёӮаёӯаёҮ WAF, firewall, endpoint change аёҠаёұа№Ҳаё§аё„аёЈаёІаё§ | WAF / firewall / change tickets | а№ғаёҠа№үаёӣаёЈаё°аёҒаёӯаёҡ containment timeline а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҡаё—а№ҖаёЈаёөаёўаёҷ |

---

## 6. Minimum Telemetry Required

| а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮ Telemetry | а№ғаёҠа№үа№Җаёһаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёӯаё°а№„аёЈ | аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ | Blind Spot аё–а№үаёІа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЎаёө |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| WAF а№ҒаёҘаё° web access logs | аё”аё№ payload pattern, source IP, target endpoint, block/pass status | Required | аёЈаё°аёҡаёё injection vector а№ҒаёҘаё°аёһаёӨаё•аёҙаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎаё•а№үаёҷаё—аёІаёҮа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№ү |
| Database audit logs | аё”аё№ query abuse, table access, privilege abuse, data extraction | Required | аёһаёҙаёӘаё№аёҲаёҷа№ҢаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡаё•а№ҲаёӯаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№ү |
| Application а№ҒаёҘаё° APM logs | аё”аё№ error condition, code path, auth/session context | Required | аёҡаёӯаёҒа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаё§а№ҲаёІ payload а№„аёӣаё–аё¶аёҮ logic аё—аёөа№Ҳ exploitable аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ |
| Change а№ҒаёҘаё° release records | аё”аё№ code change аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ config regression аёҘа№ҲаёІаёӘаёёаё” | Recommended | root cause analysis аёҠа№үаёІаёҘаёҮа№ҒаёҘаё°а№Ӯаё—аё©аёңаёҙаё”аёҲаёёаё”а№„аё”а№ү |
| DLP аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ data classification context | аё”аё№аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӯа№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аё«аё§аёӮаёӯаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёІаёҲаё–аё№аёҒаёҷаёіаёӯаёӯаёҒ | Recommended | аёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё•аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮа№Җаё•аё·аёӯаёҷа№„аёЎа№ҲаёҠаёұаё” |

---

## 7. False Positive а№ҒаёҘаё° Tuning Guide

| Scenario | аё—аёіа№„аёЎаёҲаё¶аёҮаё”аё№аёҷа№ҲаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёў | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | Tuning Action | аё•а№үаёӯаёҮаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| security scan аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ DAST run | test payload аё•аёұа№үаёҮа№ғаёҲа№ғаё«а№үа№Җаё«аёЎаё·аёӯаёҷ SQLi | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ scanner source, schedule, а№ҒаёҘаё° endpoint scope | allowlist source range а№ҒаёҘаё° test header а№ғаёҷаёҠа№Ҳаё§аёҮа№Җаё§аёҘаёІаё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | request а№ӮаёңаёҘа№ҲаёҷаёӯаёҒа№Җаё§аёҘаёІ аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёӣа№Ӯаё”аёҷ production data path аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳаё„аё§аёЈ |
| business input аё—аёөа№Ҳ encode аёӢаёұаёҡаёӢа№үаёӯаёҷа№Ғаё•а№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ | search syntax аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ special char аёӯаёІаёҲаё”аё№а№Җаё«аёЎаё·аёӯаёҷ payload | reproduce аёҒаёұаёҡ application owner а№ҒаёҘаё°аё”аё№аёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈаёқаёұа№ҲаёҮ server | tune exception а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё° parameter а№„аёЎа№Ҳаёңа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёҒаёҺаё—аёұа№үаёҮаёҠаёёаё” | source а№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷа№ҖаёЈаёҙа№ҲаёЎ schema probing аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ timing payload |
| QA аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ pre-release validation | test automation аёӯаёІаёҲаёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ query string аё—аёөа№Ҳ error а№Җаёўаёӯаё° | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ testing window а№ҒаёҘаё° environment | аёҘаё” severity а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё° QA identity а№ҒаёҘаё° path аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | traffic а№„аёӣа№Ӯаё”аёҷ production аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёЎаёө DB-side indicator аёЈа№Ҳаё§аёЎ |
| WAF normalization gap | double-encoding аё—аёіа№ғаё«а№үа№ҖаёҒаёҙаё” partial match noise | validate decoded payload а№ҒаёҘаё°аё”аё№аёһаёӨаё•аёҙаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎ downstream | tune а№ҖаёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ normalization/decoding consistency аёҒа№Ҳаёӯаёҷ suppress | decoded content аёўаёұаёҮ probing schema, delay, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ extraction pattern |

---

## 8. аё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң (Post-Incident)

### аёҡаё—а№ҖаёЈаёөаёўаёҷ
| аё„аёіаё–аёІаёЎ | аё„аёіаё•аёӯаёҡ |
|:---|:---|
| Application а№ғаёҠа№ү parameterized queries аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | [аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒ] |
| WAF аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡа№ҒаёҘаё° block а№„аё”а№үаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | [а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ/а№„аёЎа№Ҳ вҖ” rule gap?] |
| Database privileges аёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё”аё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | [аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒаёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮаё§а№ҲаёІаёҮ] |
| аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё–аё№аёҒаёҷаёіаёӯаёӯаёҒаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? аё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ PDPA? | [аёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷ] |

## 9. Detection Rules (Sigma)

```yaml
title: SQL Injection Attempt in Web Logs
logsource:
    category: webserver
detection:
    selection:
        cs-uri-query|contains:
            - 'UNION SELECT'
            - 'INFORMATION_SCHEMA'
            - 'xp_cmdshell'
            - "' OR 1=1"
            - 'WAITFOR DELAY'
            - 'BENCHMARK('
    condition: selection
    level: high
```

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ
- [Web Attack Playbook](Web_Attack.th.md)
- [Data Exfiltration Playbook](Data_Exfiltration.th.md)
- [Exploit Playbook](Exploit.th.md)
- [аё„аё№а№ҲаёЎаё·аёӯ Tier 2](../Runbooks/Tier2_Runbook.th.md)

## References
- [OWASP SQL Injection](https://owasp.org/www-community/attacks/SQL_Injection)
- [MITRE T1190](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1190/)
- [SQLi Cheat Sheet вҖ” PortSwigger](https://portswigger.net/web-security/sql-injection/cheat-sheet)

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Shadow_IT.en.md
# Playbook: Shadow IT / Unauthorized SaaS

**ID**: PB-29
**Severity**: Medium/High | **Category**: Governance & Compliance
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1567](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1567/) (Exfiltration Over Web Service), [T1537](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1537/) (Transfer Data to Cloud Account)
**Trigger**: CASB alert, Proxy log anomaly, User report, SaaS audit, Network anomaly

### Shadow IT Discovery

```mermaid
graph LR
    Proxy["рҹҢҗ Proxy Logs"] --> CASB["рҹ”Қ CASB"]
    CASB --> Discover["рҹ“Ӣ Unsanctioned App"]
    DNS["рҹ”Ө DNS Analytics"] --> Discover
    Expense["рҹ’і Expense Reports"] --> Discover
    Discover --> Assess["вҡ–пёҸ Risk Assessment"]
    style Discover fill:#f39c12,color:#fff
    style Assess fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
```

### SaaS Governance

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant SOC
    participant IT
    participant Owner as Business Owner
    SOC->>IT: рҹҡЁ Unsanctioned SaaS found
    IT->>Owner: Check business need
    Owner-->>IT: Needed вҖ” request approval
    IT->>SOC: Move to approved list
    IT->>User: Migrate data + SSO
```

---

## Decision Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ Unauthorized SaaS / Cloud Service"] --> Source{"рҹ”Қ Detection Source?"}
    Source -->|CASB Discovery| CASB["рҹ“Ҡ Review CASB Risk Score"]
    Source -->|DLP Alert| DLP["рҹ“„ Check Data Classification"]
    Source -->|Proxy/DNS Logs| Proxy["рҹҢҗ Analyze Usage Pattern"]
    Source -->|Audit Finding| Audit["рҹ“Ӣ Review Scope"]
    CASB --> Data{"рҹ“Ғ Corporate Data Uploaded?"}
    DLP --> Data
    Proxy --> Data
    Audit --> Data
    Data -->|Yes, Sensitive/PII| High["рҹ”ҙ P2 вҖ” Data Exposure"]
    Data -->|Yes, Non-Sensitive| Medium["рҹҹ  P3 вҖ” Policy Violation"]
    Data -->|No, Usage Only| Low["рҹҹЎ P4 вҖ” Awareness"]
    High --> Contain["рҹ”’ Block + Retrieve Data"]
    Medium --> Educate["рҹ“ҡ Educate + Monitor"]
    Low --> Educate
```

---

## 1. Analysis

### 1.1 Service Risk Assessment

| Category | Examples | Data Risk | Priority |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **File sharing** | WeTransfer, Google Drive (personal), Dropbox | рҹ”ҙ High вҖ” data exposure | P2 |
| **AI/LLM tools** | ChatGPT, Copilot (unapproved), Bard | рҹ”ҙ High вҖ” data in prompts | P2 |
| **Project management** | Notion, Trello, Asana (personal) | рҹҹ  Medium вҖ” IP exposure | P3 |
| **Communication** | WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord | рҹҹ  Medium вҖ” conversation leaks | P3 |
| **Development** | GitHub (personal), Replit, Codespaces | рҹ”ҙ High вҖ” source code | P2 |
| **Email** | Personal Gmail, ProtonMail | рҹ”ҙ High вҖ” data forward | P2 |
| **Design/Docs** | Canva, Figma (personal), Google Docs | рҹҹЎ Low-Medium | P3-P4 |

### 1.2 Investigation Checklist

| Check | How | Done |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| What service is being used? | CASB / Proxy logs | вҳҗ |
| How many users? (individual or department-wide) | CASB discovery | вҳҗ |
| How long has it been used? | Historical proxy logs | вҳҗ |
| Was corporate data uploaded? What type? | DLP / CASB | вҳҗ |
| Did users sign up with corporate email? | Service registration, CASB | вҳҗ |
| Were corporate credentials reused? | User interview | вҳҗ |
| Is OAuth/SSO connected to corporate IdP? | Enterprise apps audit | вҳҗ |
| Is there a legitimate business need? | Business unit inquiry | вҳҗ |

### 1.3 Data Exposure Assessment

| Data Category | Exposed? | Classification | Action Required |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Customer PII | вҳҗ Yes вҳҗ No | L4 | PDPA notification |
| Source code / IP | вҳҗ Yes вҳҗ No | L3-L4 | Immediate retrieval |
| Financial data | вҳҗ Yes вҳҗ No | L4 | Legal review |
| Internal communications | вҳҗ Yes вҳҗ No | L2-L3 | Assess impact |
| AI prompt data | вҳҗ Yes вҳҗ No | Varies | Review content |

---

## 2. Containment

### 2.1 High Risk (Data Uploaded)

| # | Action | Tool | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Block service** at proxy/firewall | Proxy / Firewall | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **Revoke OAuth** connections to corporate IdP | Enterprise Apps | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **Enable DLP** to prevent further uploads | CASB / DLP | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **Capture evidence** вҖ” CASB/proxy logs, data transfer details | CASB | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Notify user's manager | Email / Chat | вҳҗ |

### 2.2 Medium/Low Risk (Usage Only)

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Send awareness notification to user(s) | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Log the service in Shadow IT register | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Add to CASB monitoring (don't block yet) | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Assess if sanctioning the tool is appropriate | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. Remediation

| # | Action | Owner | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Export / delete** corporate data from unauthorized service | User + IT | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **Delete accounts** or change passwords if corporate creds reused | User | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **Evaluate business need** вҖ” consider sanctioning with security controls | IT + Security | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **Update AUP** (Acceptable Use Policy) with explicit guidance | Security | вҳҗ |
| 5 | If PII was exposed, initiate PDPA notification process | Legal / DPO | вҳҗ |

---

## 4. Recovery

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Provide sanctioned alternatives that meet the business need | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Tune CASB policies for continuous Shadow IT discovery | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Implement SaaS governance framework (request/approve/review cycle) | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Monthly review of unsanctioned SaaS from proxy/DNS logs | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Conduct awareness training on data security risks of unauthorized cloud | вҳҗ |

---

## 5. Escalation Criteria

| Condition | Escalate To |
|:---|:---|
| PII or customer data uploaded | Legal + DPO (PDPA 72h) |
| Source code uploaded to public service | CISO + Engineering Lead |
| Data uploaded to AI/LLM service | CISO + Privacy team |
| Executive found using unauthorized service | CISO + HR |
| Department-wide usage (>10 users) | SOC Lead + IT Director |
| OAuth connected to corporate directory | Identity team urgently |

---

## 6. IoC Collection

| Type | Value | Source |
|:---|:---|:---|
| SaaS service name / URL | | Proxy / DNS logs |
| User accounts involved | | AD / SSO logs |
| Data uploaded (file names, size) | | DLP / proxy |
| OAuth app consents granted | | Azure AD / Google Workspace |
| API keys / tokens created | | Cloud admin console |
| IP addresses of SaaS service | | Firewall logs |
| Authentication method used | | Identity provider logs |
| Duration of usage | | Proxy / CASB |

## 7. Post-Incident

- [ ] Add discovered Shadow IT service to CASB blocklist
- [ ] Review and update approved SaaS catalog
- [ ] Implement automated Shadow IT discovery scanning (monthly)
- [ ] Update employee code of conduct regarding unsanctioned services
- [ ] Conduct awareness training on data security risks
- [ ] Review OAuth app consent policies (restrict by default)
- [ ] Document findings in [Incident Report](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.en.md)

---

### SaaS Risk Scoring

```mermaid
graph TD
    App["рҹ“ұ Unsanctioned App"] --> Score{"вҡ–пёҸ Risk Score?"}
    Score -->|High Risk| Block["рҹ”’ Block immediately"]
    Score -->|Medium Risk| Review["рҹ‘ҒпёҸ Review: alternatives?"]
    Score -->|Low Risk| Allow["вң… Allow + monitor"]
    Review -->|Yes| Migrate["рҹ”„ Migrate to approved"]
    Review -->|No| Onboard["рҹ“Ӣ Onboard + SSO"]
    style Block fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Onboard fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
```

### SSO Integration Flow

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant IdP as Azure AD SSO
    participant App as SaaS App
    participant SOC
    User->>IdP: Login to SaaS
    IdP->>IdP: MFA + Conditional Access
    IdP->>App: SAML assertion
    App-->>User: вң… Access granted
    IdP->>SOC: рҹ“Ӣ Audit log
```

## Detection Rules (Sigma)

| Rule | File |
|:---|:---|
| Shadow IT вҖ” Unauthorized SaaS Usage | [proxy_shadow_it.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/proxy_shadow_it.yml) |

- [IR Framework](../Framework.en.md)

- [PB-08 Data Exfiltration](Data_Exfiltration.en.md)
- [Data Governance Policy](../../07_Compliance_Privacy/Data_Governance_Policy.en.md)
- [PDPA Compliance](../../07_Compliance_Privacy/PDPA_Compliance.en.md)

## References

- [MITRE ATT&CK T1567 вҖ” Exfiltration Over Web Service](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1567/)
- [NIST SP 800-144 вҖ” Cloud Computing Guidelines](https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-144/final)


---

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Shadow_IT.th.md
# Playbook: Shadow IT / SaaS аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё•

**ID**: PB-29
**аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ**: аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ/аёӘаё№аёҮ | **аё«аёЎаё§аё”аё«аёЎаё№а№Ҳ**: аёҳаёЈаёЈаёЎаёІаё аёҙаёҡаёІаёҘа№ҒаёҘаё°аёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёҸаёҙаёҡаёұаё•аёҙаё•аёІаёЎаёҒаёҺаёЈаё°а№Җаёҡаёөаёўаёҡ
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1567](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1567/) (аёҒаёІаёЈаёҷаёіаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӯаёӯаёҒаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷаёҡаёЈаёҙаёҒаёІаёЈа№Җаё§а№Үаёҡ), [T1537](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1537/) (а№ӮаёӯаёҷаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘа№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёөаё„аёҘаёІаё§аё”а№Ң)
**аё—аёЈаёҙаёҒа№ҖаёҒаёӯаёЈа№Ң**: CASB alert, proxy log anomaly, аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷ, SaaS audit, network anomaly


## аё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң (Post-Incident)

- [ ] а№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎ Shadow IT service аё—аёөа№Ҳаёһаёҡа№ғаёҷ CASB blocklist
- [ ] аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷа№ҒаёҘаё°аёӯаёұаёһа№Җаё”аё— approved SaaS catalog
- [ ] а№ғаёҠа№ү automated Shadow IT discovery scanning (аёЈаёІаёўа№Җаё”аё·аёӯаёҷ)
- [ ] аёӯаёұаёһа№Җаё”аё— code of conduct а№ҖаёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ unsanctioned services
- [ ] аёҲаёұаё” awareness training а№ҖаёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ data security risks
- [ ] аёҲаёұаё”аё—аёі [Incident Report](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.th.md)

### аёңаёұаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаё„а№үаёҷаёһаёҡ Shadow IT

```mermaid
graph LR
    Proxy["рҹҢҗ Proxy Logs"] --> CASB["рҹ”Қ CASB"]
    CASB --> Discover["рҹ“Ӣ Unsanctioned App"]
    DNS["рҹ”Ө DNS Analytics"] --> Discover
    Expense["рҹ’і Expense Reports"] --> Discover
    Discover --> Assess["вҡ–пёҸ Risk Assessment"]
    style Discover fill:#f39c12,color:#fff
    style Assess fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
```

### аёңаёұаёҮаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷ SaaS Governance

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant User as аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№ү
    participant SOC
    participant IT
    participant Owner as Business Owner
    SOC->>IT: рҹҡЁ аёһаёҡ SaaS аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ
    IT->>Owner: аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ business need
    Owner-->>IT: аёҲаёіа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ вҖ” аёӮаёӯаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ
    IT->>SOC: аёўа№үаёІаёўа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІ approved list
    IT->>User: migrate data + SSO
```

---

## аёңаёұаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲ

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ SaaS / Cloud аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё•"] --> Source{"рҹ”Қ а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёһаёҡ?"}
    Source -->|CASB| CASB["рҹ“Ҡ аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ Risk Score"]
    Source -->|DLP Alert| DLP["рҹ“„ аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёіа№ҒаёҷаёҒаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ"]
    Source -->|Proxy/DNS| Proxy["рҹҢҗ аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№ҢаёЈаё№аёӣа№ҒаёҡаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈа№ғаёҠа№үаёҮаёІаёҷ"]
    CASB --> Data{"рҹ“Ғ аёЎаёөаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӯаёҮаё„а№ҢаёҒаёЈаё–аё№аёҒаёӯаёұаёӣа№Ӯаё«аёҘаё”?"}
    DLP --> Data
    Proxy --> Data
    Data -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ, аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ/PII| High["рҹ”ҙ P2 вҖ” аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёЈаёұа№Ҳаё§а№„аё«аёҘ"]
    Data -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ, а№„аёЎа№ҲаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ| Medium["рҹҹ  P3 вҖ” аёҘаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаё”аёҷа№ӮаёўаёҡаёІаёў"]
    Data -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ, а№ғаёҠа№үаёҮаёІаёҷа№Җаё—а№ҲаёІаёҷаёұа№үаёҷ| Low["рҹҹЎ P4 вҖ” а№ғаё«а№үаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаё№а№ү"]
    High --> Contain["рҹ”’ аёҡаёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒ + а№ҖаёЈаёөаёўаёҒаё„аё·аёҷаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ"]
    Medium --> Educate["рҹ“ҡ а№ғаё«а№үаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаё№а№ү + аё•аёҙаё”аё•аёІаёЎ"]
```

---

## 1. аёҒаёІаёЈаё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң

### 1.1 аёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаёӮаёӯаёҮаёҡаёЈаёҙаёҒаёІаёЈ

| аё«аёЎаё§аё”аё«аёЎаё№а№Ҳ | аё•аёұаё§аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮ | аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | аёҘаёіаё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **а№ҒаёҠаёЈа№Ңа№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң** | WeTransfer, Google Drive (аёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаё•аёұаё§), Dropbox | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ | P2 |
| **AI/LLM** | ChatGPT, Copilot (а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ) | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ вҖ” аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘа№ғаёҷ prompt | P2 |
| **аёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈа№ӮаёӣаёЈа№ҖаёҲаёҒаё•а№Ң** | Notion, Trello, Asana (аёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаё•аёұаё§) | рҹҹ  аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ | P3 |
| **аёӘаё·а№ҲаёӯаёӘаёІаёЈ** | WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord | рҹҹ  аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ | P3 |
| **аёһаёұаё’аёҷаёІаёӢаёӯаёҹаё•а№Ңа№Ғаё§аёЈа№Ң** | GitHub (аёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаё•аёұаё§), Replit | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ вҖ” аёӢаёӯаёЈа№ҢаёӘа№Ӯаё„а№үаё” | P2 |
| **аёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘ** | Gmail аёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаё•аёұаё§, ProtonMail | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ | P2 |

### 1.2 аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ

| аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈ | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| аёҡаёЈаёҙаёҒаёІаёЈаёӯаё°а№„аёЈаё–аё№аёҒа№ғаёҠа№ү? | CASB / Proxy logs | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёөаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаёҒаёөа№Ҳаё„аёҷ? (а№Җаё”аёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аё«аёЈаё·аёӯаё—аёұа№үаёҮа№ҒаёңаёҷаёҒ) | CASB discovery | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёөаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӯаёҮаё„а№ҢаёҒаёЈаё–аё№аёҒаёӯаёұаёӣа№Ӯаё«аёҘаё”аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | DLP / CASB | вҳҗ |
| аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаёҘаёҮаё—аё°а№Җаёҡаёөаёўаёҷаё”а№үаё§аёўаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘаёӯаёҮаё„а№ҢаёҒаёЈаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | CASB, аёҒаёІаёЈаёӘаёӯаёҡаё–аёІаёЎ | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёө OAuth а№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎаё•а№ҲаёӯаёҒаёұаёҡ IdP аёӯаёҮаё„а№ҢаёҒаёЈаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | Enterprise Apps | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёөаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёҲаёіа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷаё—аёІаёҮаёҳаёёаёЈаёҒаёҙаёҲаёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | аёӘаёӯаёҡаё–аёІаёЎаё«аёҷа№Ҳаё§аёўаёҮаёІаёҷ | вҳҗ |

### 1.3 аёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳа№Җаёӣаёҙаё”а№Җаёңаёў

| аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | аёЈаёұа№Ҳаё§а№„аё«аёҘ? | аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| PII аёҘаё№аёҒаё„а№үаёІ | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ | L4 | а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ PDPA |
| аёӢаёӯаёЈа№ҢаёӘа№Ӯаё„а№үаё” / IP | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ | L3-L4 | а№ҖаёЈаёөаёўаёҒаё„аё·аёҷаё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө |
| аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҮаёҙаёҷ | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ | L4 | аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷаёҒаёҺаё«аёЎаёІаёў |
| аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘа№ғаёҷ AI prompt | вҳҗ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ вҳҗ а№„аёЎа№Ҳ | а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§а№Ғаё•а№Ҳ | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡа№Җаёҷаё·а№үаёӯаё«аёІ |

---

## 2. аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ

### 2.1 аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаёӘаё№аёҮ (аёЎаёөаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё–аё№аёҒаёӯаёұаёӣа№Ӯаё«аёҘаё”)

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **аёҡаёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒаёҡаёЈаёҙаёҒаёІаёЈ** аё—аёөа№Ҳ proxy/firewall | Proxy / Firewall | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **а№ҖаёһаёҙаёҒаё–аёӯаёҷ OAuth** аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎаё•а№Ҳаёӯ IdP | Enterprise Apps | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” DLP** аёӣа№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёұаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёӯаёұаёӣа№Ӯаё«аёҘаё”а№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎ | CASB / DLP | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ** | CASB | вҳҗ |
| 5 | а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаёңаё№а№үаёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈ | аёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘ / а№ҒаёҠаё— | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҒаёҒа№үа№„аёӮ

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **аёӘа№ҲаёҮаёӯаёӯаёҒ / аёҘаёҡ** аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӯаёҮаё„а№ҢаёҒаёЈаёҲаёІаёҒаёҡаёЈаёҙаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё• | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **аёҘаёҡаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө** аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҷаёЈаё«аёұаёӘаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷаё«аёІаёҒа№ғаёҠа№ү credential аёӢа№үаёі | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **аёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёҲаёіа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ** вҖ” аёһаёҙаёҲаёІаёЈаё“аёІаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙаёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎ security controls | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **аёӯаёұаёӣа№Җаё”аё• AUP** (Acceptable Use Policy) | вҳҗ |
| 5 | аё«аёІаёҒ PII аёЈаёұа№Ҳаё§а№„аё«аёҘ вҶ’ а№ҖаёЈаёҙа№ҲаёЎаёҒаёЈаё°аёҡаё§аёҷаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ PDPA | вҳҗ |

---

## 4. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҹаё·а№үаёҷаёҹаё№

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | аёҲаёұаё”аё«аёІаё—аёІаёҮа№ҖаёҘаё·аёӯаёҒаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ | вҳҗ |
| 2 | аёӣаёЈаёұаёҡаёҷа№ӮаёўаёҡаёІаёў CASB аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ Shadow IT discovery | вҳҗ |
| 3 | аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ SaaS governance framework | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ SaaS аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё•аёЈаёІаёўа№Җаё”аё·аёӯаёҷ | вҳҗ |
| 5 | аёҲаёұаё”аёӯаёҡаёЈаёЎаё”а№үаёІаёҷаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӣаёҘаёӯаё”аё аёұаёўаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ | вҳҗ |

---

## 5. а№ҖаёҒаё“аё‘а№ҢаёҒаёІаёЈаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ

| а№ҖаёҮаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аёӮ | аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ |
|:---|:---|
| PII / аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёҘаё№аёҒаё„а№үаёІаё–аё№аёҒаёӯаёұаёӣа№Ӯаё«аёҘаё” | Legal + DPO (PDPA 72 аёҠаёЎ.) |
| аёӢаёӯаёЈа№ҢаёӘа№Ӯаё„а№үаё”аё–аё№аёҒаёӯаёұаёӣа№„аёӣаёҡаёЈаёҙаёҒаёІаёЈаёӘаёІаёҳаёІаёЈаё“аё° | CISO + аё«аёұаё§аё«аёҷа№үаёІаё§аёҙаёЁаё§аёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎ |
| аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё–аё№аёҒаёӯаёұаёӣа№„аёӣ AI/LLM | CISO + аё—аёөаёЎ Privacy |
| а№ғаёҠа№үаёҮаёІаёҷаё—аёұа№үаёҮа№ҒаёңаёҷаёҒ (>10 аё„аёҷ) | SOC Lead + IT Director |
| OAuth а№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎаё•а№Ҳаёӯ corporate directory | аё—аёөаёЎ Identity аё”а№Ҳаё§аёҷ |

---

### аёңаёұаёҮ SaaS Risk Scoring

```mermaid
graph TD
    App["рҹ“ұ Unsanctioned App"] --> Score{"вҡ–пёҸ Risk Score?"}
    Score -->|High Risk| Block["рҹ”’ Block аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө"]
    Score -->|Medium Risk| Review["рҹ‘ҒпёҸ Review: аёЎаёөаё—аёІаёҮа№ҖаёҘаё·аёӯаёҒ?"]
    Score -->|Low Risk| Allow["вң… Allow + monitor"]
    Review -->|Yes| Migrate["рҹ”„ Migrate to approved"]
    Review -->|No| Onboard["рҹ“Ӣ Onboard + SSO"]
    style Block fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Onboard fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
```

### аёңаёұаёҮ SSO Integration Flow

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant IdP as Azure AD SSO
    participant App as SaaS App
    participant SOC
    User->>IdP: Login to SaaS
    IdP->>IdP: MFA + Conditional Access
    IdP->>App: SAML assertion
    App-->>User: вң… Access granted
    IdP->>SOC: рҹ“Ӣ Audit log
```

## аёҒаёҺаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ (Sigma)

| аёҒаёҺ | а№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң |
|:---|:---|
| Shadow IT вҖ” Unauthorized SaaS Usage | [proxy_shadow_it.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/proxy_shadow_it.yml) |

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ

- [аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң](../Framework.th.md)
- [а№ҒаёЎа№Ҳа№ҒаёҡаёҡаёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.th.md)
- [PB-08 аёҒаёІаёЈаёҷаёіаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӯаёӯаёҒ](Data_Exfiltration.th.md)
- [аёҷа№ӮаёўаёҡаёІаёўаёҳаёЈаёЈаёЎаёІаё аёҙаёҡаёІаёҘаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ](../../07_Compliance_Privacy/Data_Governance_Policy.th.md)

## Shadow IT Discovery Methods

| Method | Coverage | Detection Rate |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Proxy/Firewall logs | Web SaaS | 80% |
| CASB | Cloud apps | 90% |
| DNS analysis | All internet | 70% |
| Endpoint agent | Installed apps | 95% |
| Financial review | Paid services | 60% |

### Risk Rating Matrix

| Factor | Low | Medium | High |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Data sensitivity | Public | Internal | Confidential |
| User count | < 5 | 5-50 | 50+ |
| Data transfer | < 1 GB | 1-50 GB | 50+ GB |
| Authentication | SSO/MFA | Password only | None |

### Shadow IT Response Workflow

| Phase | Action | Owner | SLA |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Discover | Identify unauthorized service | SOC | Ongoing |
| Assess | Risk rating + data audit | Security | 48 hrs |
| Decide | Approve / Block / Migrate | CISO | 5 days |
| Execute | Implement decision | IT + Security | 14 days |

### Risk Acceptance Process

| Step | Owner | SLA |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Risk assessment | Security | 48 hrs |
| Business justification | Requester | 5 days |
| CISO approval | CISO | 3 days |

## References

- [MITRE ATT&CK T1567 вҖ” Exfiltration Over Web Service](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1567/)
- [NIST SP 800-144 вҖ” Cloud Computing Guidelines](https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-144/final)


---

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Supply_Chain_Attack.en.md
# Playbook: Supply Chain Attack Response

**ID**: PB-32
**Severity**: Critical | **Category**: Software Supply Chain
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1195](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1195/) (Supply Chain Compromise), [T1195.001](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1195/001/) (Compromise Software Dependencies), [T1195.002](https://attack.microsoft.com/techniques/T1195/002/) (Compromise Software Supply Chain)
**Trigger**: Vendor advisory, TI alert, EDR detection (compromised update), Dependency scan, CISA advisory

### Supply Chain Attack Vectors

```mermaid
graph TD
    SC["рҹ”— Supply Chain"] --> Type{"рҹ“Ӣ Vector?"}
    Type -->|Software Update| Update["рҹ“Ұ Trojanized Update"]
    Type -->|Open Source| OSS["рҹ”“ Malicious Package"]
    Type -->|Hardware| HW["рҹ”§ Firmware Implant"]
    Type -->|MSP/Vendor| MSP["рҹҸў Vendor Compromise"]
    Update --> Impact["рҹ’Ҙ Impact Assessment"]
    OSS --> Impact
    HW --> Impact
    MSP --> Impact
```

### SBOM Verification

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant SOC
    participant SCA as SCA Tool
    participant Dev as Dev Team
    participant Vendor
    SOC->>SCA: Scan dependencies
    SCA-->>SOC: Compromised package found!
    SOC->>Dev: рҹҡЁ Stop using package
    Dev->>Dev: Pin to safe version
    SOC->>Vendor: Notify + request advisory
    Dev->>SOC: вң… Remediated
```

> вҡ пёҸ **CRITICAL**: Supply chain attacks can affect thousands of organizations simultaneously. Time-to-containment directly impacts blast radius.

---

## Decision Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ Supply Chain Alert"] --> Source{"рҹ“ў Alert Source?"}
    Source -->|Vendor Advisory / CVE| Advisory["рҹ“„ Review Advisory"]
    Source -->|CISA/CERT Alert| CERT["рҹҸӣпёҸ Review CERT Details"]
    Source -->|Internal Detection| Internal["рҹ”Қ Anomaly on Vendor Component"]
    Source -->|Threat Intel / News| TI["рҹ“° Emerging Threat"]
    Advisory --> Scope["рҹ“Ҡ Scope Impact"]
    CERT --> Scope
    Internal --> Scope
    TI --> Scope
    Scope --> Used{"рҹ–ҘпёҸ We Use This Component?"}
    Used -->|Yes| Inventory["рҹ“Ӣ Enumerate Affected Systems"]
    Used -->|No| Monitor["рҹ‘ҒпёҸ Monitor вҖ” No Action"]
    Inventory --> IOC{"рҹ”Қ IoCs Found?"}
    IOC -->|Yes| Compromised["рҹ”ҙ Confirmed Compromise"]
    IOC -->|No| Mitigate["рҹҹ  Preventive Mitigation"]
    Compromised --> FullIR["рҹ”’ Full IR Response"]
```

---

## 1. Analysis

### 1.1 Supply Chain Attack Types

| Type | Example | Detection |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **Compromised software update** | SolarWinds Orion (SUNBURST) | Update contains backdoor |
| **Compromised dependency** | npm/PyPI malicious package | Typosquatting, dependency confusion |
| **Compromised build system** | Codecov CI script | CI/CD pipeline injection |
| **Compromised vendor access** | MSP/MSSP credential compromise | Vendor account misuse |
| **Compromised hardware/firmware** | Pre-installed malware | Firmware integrity check |
| **Compromised container image** | Docker Hub malicious image | Image scanning |

### 1.2 Investigation Checklist

| Check | How | Done |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Identify the compromised component (library, update, vendor) | Advisory, TI | вҳҗ |
| Affected versions | Advisory / CVE details | вҳҗ |
| Enumerate ALL systems using the component | SBOM, package managers, CMDB | вҳҗ |
| When was the compromised version installed? | Package manager logs, change history | вҳҗ |
| How long was it active? | Timeline analysis | вҳҗ |
| Search for advisory-provided IoCs | SIEM, EDR, network logs | вҳҗ |
| Were any IoCs found? | Search results | вҳҗ |
| Did the compromised component have network access? | Firewall rules, traffic logs | вҳҗ |
| Did the compromised component have credentials/secrets access? | Config, env vars | вҳҗ |

### 1.3 SBOM Assessment

| Question | Answer | Done |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Do we have an SBOM for affected applications? | | вҳҗ |
| Are dependency versions pinned? | | вҳҗ |
| Are checksums verified in CI/CD? | | вҳҗ |
| Do we use a private package registry? | | вҳҗ |

---

## 2. Containment

### 2.1 Immediate Actions

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Isolate** affected systems from network | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **Block C2** вҖ” add advisory-provided IoCs to blocklists | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **Disable vendor access** вҖ” revoke API keys, OAuth, VPN, service accounts | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **Freeze CI/CD** вҖ” halt all deployments until compromised dependency removed | вҳҗ |
| 5 | **Snapshot** affected systems for forensics | вҳҗ |

### 2.2 Vendor Access Revocation

| Access Type | How to Revoke | Done |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| API keys | Rotate in API management | вҳҗ |
| OAuth tokens | Enterprise Apps / IdP | вҳҗ |
| VPN credentials | VPN management | вҳҗ |
| Service accounts | AD / IAM | вҳҗ |
| SSH keys / certificates | Key management | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. Eradication

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Patch/rollback** to clean version of compromised component | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **Rotate ALL secrets** accessible to the compromised component | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **Audit SBOM** for additional vulnerable dependencies | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **Rebuild** affected applications from clean dependencies | вҳҗ |
| 5 | **Verify file integrity** вҖ” compare binaries against known-good hashes | вҳҗ |
| 6 | Hunt for backdoors, web shells, or persistence created by attacker | вҳҗ |

---

## 4. Recovery

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Staged restoration** вҖ” restore systems in phases with monitoring | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **Validate integrity** of all restored systems | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **Request vendor's incident report** before restoring vendor access | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **Implement SBOM** вҖ” maintain for all applications | вҳҗ |
| 5 | **Pin dependency versions** and verify checksums in CI/CD | вҳҗ |
| 6 | **Private registry** вҖ” mirror dependencies in private package registry | вҳҗ |
| 7 | **Vendor assessment** вҖ” update third-party risk management program | вҳҗ |
| 8 | Monitor for 30 days | вҳҗ |

---

## 5. IoC Collection

| Type | Value | Source |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Compromised component name/version | | Advisory |
| Malicious file hashes | | Advisory / EDR |
| C2 domains/IPs | | Advisory / TI |
| Backdoor indicators | | Advisory / Forensics |
| Affected systems | | SBOM / Inventory |
| Vendor access logs | | IAM / VPN |

---

## 6. Escalation Criteria

| Condition | Escalate To |
|:---|:---|
| Production systems confirmed compromised | CISO + Major Incident |
| Data exfiltration via supply chain backdoor | Legal + DPO (PDPA 72h) |
| CI/CD pipeline compromised | Engineering Lead + CISO |
| Vendor confirmed breached | Legal + Procurement + CISO |
| Multiple organizations affected (industry-wide) | ISAC sharing (TLP:AMBER) |
| Credentials accessed by compromised component | IAM team + Full secret rotation |

---

### SBOM Management

```mermaid
graph LR
    Build["рҹ”Ё CI/CD Build"] --> SBOM["рҹ“Ӣ Generate SBOM"]
    SBOM --> Scan["рҹ”Қ Scan vulnerabilities"]
    Scan --> CVE{"рҹ”“ CVE found?"}
    CVE -->|Yes| Block["вқҢ Block deployment"]
    CVE -->|No| Deploy["вң… Deploy"]
    Block --> Fix["рҹ”§ Update dependency"]
    style Block fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Deploy fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
```

### Vendor Risk Assessment

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Security
    participant Vendor
    participant Legal
    participant CISO
    Security->>Vendor: рҹ“Ӣ Security questionnaire
    Vendor-->>Security: Complete questionnaire
    Security->>Security: вҡ–пёҸ Calculate risk score
    Security->>Legal: Review contract terms
    Security->>CISO: рҹ“Ҡ Risk report
    CISO->>CISO: Approve / Reject
```

## Detection Rules (Sigma)

| Rule | File |
|:---|:---|
| Suspicious Dependency Activity | [cloud_supply_chain_compromise.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/cloud_supply_chain_compromise.yml) |

## Related Documents

- [IR Framework](../Framework.en.md)
- [Incident Report](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.en.md)
- [PB-03 Malware Infection](Malware_Infection.en.md)
- [PB-08 Data Exfiltration](Data_Exfiltration.en.md)
- [PB-18 Exploit](Exploit.en.md)

## References

- [MITRE ATT&CK T1195 вҖ” Supply Chain Compromise](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1195/)
- [NIST SP 800-161r1 вҖ” Cybersecurity Supply Chain Risk Management](https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-161/rev-1/final)
- [CISA вҖ” Defending Against Software Supply Chain Attacks](https://www.cisa.gov/sites/default/files/publications/defending_against_software_supply_chain_attacks_508.pdf)
- [SLSA Framework](https://slsa.dev/)

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Supply_Chain_Attack.th.md
# Playbook: Supply Chain Attack / аёҒаёІаёЈа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөаё«а№Ҳаё§аёҮа№ӮаёӢа№Ҳаёӯаёёаёӣаё—аёІаёҷ

**ID**: PB-32
**аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ**: аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• | **аё«аёЎаё§аё”аё«аёЎаё№а№Ҳ**: аё аёұаёўаё„аёёаёҒаё„аёІаёЎаёҲаёІаёҒаё аёІаёўаёҷаёӯаёҒ
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1195](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1195/) (Supply Chain Compromise)
**аё—аёЈаёҙаёҒа№ҖаёҒаёӯаёЈа№Ң**: Vendor advisory, TI alert, EDR detection (compromised update), dependency vulnerability scan


## аё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң (Post-Incident)

- [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ SBOM аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё”аё«аёІ vulnerable components
- [ ] аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ vendor risk assessment process
- [ ] а№ғаёҠа№ү SCA (Software Composition Analysis) а№ғаёҷ CI/CD
- [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ code signing certificates
- [ ] а№ғаёҠа№ү allowlist аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ approved packages/vendors
- [ ] аёҲаёұаё”аё—аёі [Incident Report](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.th.md)

### аёңаёұаёҮа№Җаё§аёҒа№Җаё•аёӯаёЈа№Ң Supply Chain

```mermaid
graph TD
    SC["рҹ”— Supply Chain"] --> Type{"рҹ“Ӣ аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—?"}
    Type -->|Software Update| Update["рҹ“Ұ Trojanized Update"]
    Type -->|Open Source| OSS["рҹ”“ Malicious Package"]
    Type -->|Hardware| HW["рҹ”§ Firmware Implant"]
    Type -->|MSP/Vendor| MSP["рҹҸў Vendor Compromise"]
    Update --> Impact["рҹ’Ҙ Impact Assessment"]
    OSS --> Impact
    HW --> Impact
    MSP --> Impact
```

### аёңаёұаёҮаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷ SBOM Verification

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant SOC
    participant SCA as SCA Tool
    participant Dev as Dev Team
    participant Vendor
    SOC->>SCA: аёӘа№ҒаёҒаёҷ dependencies
    SCA-->>SOC: аёһаёҡ compromised package!
    SOC->>Dev: рҹҡЁ аё«аёўаёёаё”а№ғаёҠа№ү package
    Dev->>Dev: Pin а№„аёӣа№Җаё§аёӯаёЈа№ҢаёҠаёұаёҷаёӣаёҘаёӯаё”аё аёұаёў
    SOC->>Vendor: а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ + аёӮаёӯ advisory
    Dev->>SOC: вң… Remediated
```

---

## аёңаёұаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲ

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ Supply Chain Alert"] --> Type{"рҹ“Ұ аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—?"}
    Type -->|Software Update| SW["рҹ’ҝ Compromised Update"]
    Type -->|Open-Source Dep| OSS["рҹ“Ұ Malicious Package"]
    Type -->|Vendor/MSP Access| Vendor["рҹҸў Vendor Compromise"]
    Type -->|Container Image| Container["рҹҗі Compromised Image"]
    Type -->|Hardware/Firmware| HW["рҹ”Ң Hardware Backdoor"]
    SW --> SBOM["рҹ“Ӣ аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ SBOM"]
    OSS --> SBOM
    Vendor --> Access["рҹ”‘ аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ Vendor Access"]
    Container --> SBOM
    HW --> Isolate["рҹ”’ Isolate Hardware"]
    SBOM --> Scope{"рҹ“Ҡ аёҒаёөа№ҲаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡ?"}
    Scope -->|аёЎаёІаёҒ| Major["рҹ”ҙ Major Incident"]
    Scope -->|аёҷа№үаёӯаёў| Contain["рҹҹ  Contain + Patch"]
```

---

## 1. аёҒаёІаёЈаё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң

### 1.1 аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—аёҒаёІаёЈа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө Supply Chain

| аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё— | аё•аёұаё§аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮаёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮ | аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **Software Update** | SolarWinds SUNBURST | рҹ”ҙ аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• |
| **Open-Source Package** | event-stream (npm), ua-parser-js | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ |
| **Vendor/MSP Access** | Kaseya VSA, MoveIT | рҹ”ҙ аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• |
| **Container Image** | Docker Hub compromised images | рҹҹ  аёӘаё№аёҮ |
| **CI/CD Pipeline** | Codecov bash uploader | рҹ”ҙ аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• |
| **Hardware/Firmware** | Pre-installed backdoor | рҹ”ҙ аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё• |

### 1.2 аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ

| аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈ | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| аёӢаёӯаёҹаё•а№Ңа№Ғаё§аёЈа№Ң/component/library аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ | Advisory / SCA | вҳҗ |
| а№Җаё§аёӯаёЈа№ҢаёҠаёұаёҷаё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёөаёӣаёұаёҚаё«аёІ (affected versions) | Advisory | вҳҗ |
| SBOM вҖ” а№ғаёҠа№үаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё«аёҷа№ғаёҷаёӯаёҮаё„а№ҢаёҒаёЈ? | SBOM / SCA scan | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёө IoC аёҲаёІаёҒ advisory? | TI platform | вҳҗ |
| Vendor а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаё§аёҙаёҳаёө remediate? | Vendor contact | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёө patched version а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§? | Advisory | вҳҗ |
| аёЈаё°аёҡаёҡаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№ү component аёҷаёөа№үа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ internet-facing? | CMDB | вҳҗ |

---

## 2. аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Block** а№Җаё§аёӯаёЈа№ҢаёҠаёұаёҷаё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёөаёӣаёұаёҚаё«аёІ (аё«а№үаёІаёЎаё•аёҙаё”аё•аёұа№үаёҮ/аёӯаёұаёӣа№Җаё”аё•) | Package mgr / SCA | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **Isolate** аёЈаё°аёҡаёҡаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ | EDR / Network | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **аё•аёұаё” vendor access** аёҠаёұа№Ҳаё§аё„аёЈаёІаё§ | VPN / PAM | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **Scan IoC** аё—аёұа№үаёҮаёӯаёҮаё„а№ҢаёҒаёЈ | SIEM / EDR | вҳҗ |
| 5 | **Freeze deployments** аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№ү affected component | CI/CD | вҳҗ |

### 2.1 аёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёұаё”аёҒаёІаёЈ Vendor Access

| Vendor Type | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| MSP (managed service) | аёӣаёҙаё” VPN / аёҘаёҡ access аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө | вҳҗ |
| SaaS vendor | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ OAuth tokens, аёӣаёҙаё” API access | вҳҗ |
| On-site vendor | аёӣаёҙаё” network access, а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ vendor | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаёіаёҲаёұаё”

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Rollback / uninstall** а№Җаё§аёӯаёЈа№ҢаёҠаёұаёҷаё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёөаёӣаёұаёҚаё«аёІ | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **аёӯаёұаёӣа№Җаё”аё•** а№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷа№Җаё§аёӯаёЈа№ҢаёҠаёұаёҷаё—аёөа№ҲаёӣаёҘаёӯаё”аё аёұаёў (аё–а№үаёІаёЎаёө) | вҳҗ |
| 3 | аёҘаёҡ backdoor / persistence аё—аёөа№Ҳ inserted | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аё«аёЎаёёаёҷа№Җаё§аёөаёўаёҷ credentials аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮа№„аё”а№үаёҲаёІаёҒ affected system | вҳҗ |
| 5 | **Rebuild** affected systems аёҲаёІаёҒ clean state | вҳҗ |

---

## 4. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҹаё·а№үаёҷаёҹаё№

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | а№ғаёҠа№ү **private registry** аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ packages/images | вҳҗ |
| 2 | а№ғаёҠа№ү **SCA** (Software Composition Analysis) а№ғаёҷ CI/CD | вҳҗ |
| 3 | аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ **SBOM** аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаё—аёёаёҒа№ҒаёӯаёӣаёһаёҘаёҙа№Җаё„аёҠаёұаёҷ | вҳҗ |
| 4 | а№ғаёҠа№ү **dependency pinning** (lock files) | вҳҗ |
| 5 | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ **vendor security** аё—аёёаёҒаёӣаёө (SOC 2, ISO 27001) | вҳҗ |
| 6 | а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” **Dependabot / Renovate** automated alerts | вҳҗ |

---

## 5. а№ҖаёҒаё“аё‘а№ҢаёҒаёІаёЈаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ

| а№ҖаёҮаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аёӮ | аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ |
|:---|:---|
| SolarWinds/Kaseya-scale compromise | CISO + Major Incident |
| аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёҘаё№аёҒаё„а№үаёІаё–аё№аёҒа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ | Legal + DPO (PDPA 72 аёҠаёЎ.) |
| Critical infrastructure а№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ | Regulator |
| аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаёӘаёІаёҳаёІаёЈаё“аё°аёҲаёіа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ | PR + Executive |
| Nation-state indicators | National CERT + Law Enforcement |

---

### аёңаёұаёҮ SBOM Management

```mermaid
graph LR
    Build["рҹ”Ё CI/CD Build"] --> SBOM["рҹ“Ӣ Generate SBOM"]
    SBOM --> Scan["рҹ”Қ Scan vulnerabilities"]
    Scan --> CVE{"рҹ”“ CVE found?"}
    CVE -->|Yes| Block["вқҢ Block deployment"]
    CVE -->|No| Deploy["вң… Deploy"]
    Block --> Fix["рҹ”§ Update dependency"]
    style Block fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Deploy fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
```

### аёңаёұаёҮ Vendor Risk Assessment

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Security
    participant Vendor
    participant Legal
    participant CISO
    Security->>Vendor: рҹ“Ӣ Security questionnaire
    Vendor-->>Security: аё•аёӯаёҡа№ҒаёҡаёҡаёӘаёӯаёҡаё–аёІаёЎ
    Security->>Security: вҡ–пёҸ аёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷ risk score
    Security->>Legal: аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ contract
    Security->>CISO: рҹ“Ҡ Risk report
    CISO->>CISO: Approve / Reject
```

## аёҒаёҺаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ (Sigma)

| аёҒаёҺ | а№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң |
|:---|:---|
| Suspicious Dependency Activity | [cloud_supply_chain_compromise.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/cloud_supply_chain_compromise.yml) |

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ

- [аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң](../Framework.th.md)

## Supply Chain Attack Indicators

| Indicator | Source | Detection |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Modified package hash | Build pipeline | Checksum verify |
| Unusual update timing | Vendor advisories | Off-cycle alert |
| New network connections | NDR | Post-update monitoring |
| Embedded backdoor | SAST/DAST | Code scan |
| Dependency confusion | Package manager | Namespace check |

### Vendor Risk Tiers (Supply Chain)

| Tier | Access Level | Monitoring | Assessment |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Critical | Code/infrastructure | Continuous | Quarterly |
| High | Data processing | Weekly review | Semi-annual |
| Medium | Network access | Monthly review | Annual |
| Low | No access | Periodic | Biennial |

### Vendor Communication Template

| Item | Content |
|:---|:---|
| Subject | Security incident notification |
| Impact | [affected systems] |
| Request | Patch/advisory ETA |
| Contact | [security team email] |

## References

- [MITRE ATT&CK T1195 вҖ” Supply Chain Compromise](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1195/)
- [CISA вҖ” ICT Supply Chain Risk Management](https://www.cisa.gov/supply-chain)


---

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Suspicious_Script.en.md
# Playbook: Suspicious Script Execution

**ID**: PB-11
**Severity**: High | **Category**: Endpoint / Execution
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1059](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1059/) (Command & Scripting Interpreter), [T1059.001](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1059/001/) (PowerShell), [T1059.005](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1059/005/) (Visual Basic)
**Trigger**: EDR alert ("PowerShell EncodedCommand", "WScript suspicious execution"), AMSI detection, Sysmon Event ID 1

### Script Analysis Pipeline

```mermaid
graph LR
    Script["рҹ“ң Script"] --> AMSI["рҹӣЎпёҸ AMSI"]
    AMSI --> Deobfuscate["рҹ”“ Deobfuscate"]
    Deobfuscate --> Analyze["рҹ”Қ Analyze Intent"]
    Analyze --> IOC["рҹҺҜ Extract IOCs"]
    IOC --> Hunt["рҹҺҜ Org-wide Hunt"]
    style Script fill:#3498db,color:#fff
    style AMSI fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style IOC fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
```

### PowerShell Logging Detection

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant PS as PowerShell
    participant AMSI
    participant EventLog as Event Log
    participant SIEM
    PS->>AMSI: Scan script content
    AMSI-->>PS: вң… / вқҢ
    PS->>EventLog: Event 4104 (ScriptBlock)
    EventLog->>SIEM: Forward
    SIEM->>SIEM: Detect obfuscation pattern
    SIEM->>SIEM: рҹҡЁ Alert SOC
```

---

## Decision Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ Script Execution Alert"] --> Engine{"вҡҷпёҸ Script Engine?"}
    Engine -->|PowerShell| PS["рҹ”ө PowerShell Analysis"]
    Engine -->|VBScript/JScript| VBS["рҹҹ  WScript/CScript Analysis"]
    Engine -->|Python/Bash| Other["рҹҹЎ Other Script"]
    Engine -->|Macro (VBA)| Macro["рҹ”ҙ Office Macro"]
    PS --> Encoded{"рҹ”Қ Encoded/Obfuscated?"}
    Encoded -->|Yes -enc / IEX| Decode["Decode + Sandbox"]
    Encoded -->|No, Cleartext| Analyze{"Malicious Content?"}
    VBS --> Parent{"Parent Process?"}
    Macro --> Parent
    Other --> Analyze
    Decode --> Analyze
    Parent -->|Word/Excel/Outlook| Phishing["рҹ”ҙ Phishing Delivery"]
    Parent -->|explorer/cmd| UserRun["вҡ пёҸ User Initiated"]
    Analyze -->|Download cradle / C2| Confirmed["рҹ”ҙ Malicious"]
    Analyze -->|Admin script / IT tool| FP["вң… False Positive"]
    Phishing --> Kill["рҹ”Ң Kill + Isolate"]
    Confirmed --> Kill
```

---

## 1. Analysis

### 1.1 Script Engine Identification

| Engine | File Extensions | Process Name | Parent (Suspicious) |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **PowerShell** | `.ps1`, `.psm1` | `powershell.exe`, `pwsh.exe` | Word, Excel, WMI, cmd |
| **VBScript** | `.vbs`, `.vbe` | `wscript.exe`, `cscript.exe` | Explorer, Outlook |
| **JScript** | `.js`, `.jse` | `wscript.exe`, `cscript.exe` | Browser, Explorer |
| **VBA Macro** | embedded | `WINWORD.EXE`, `EXCEL.EXE` | N/A (spawns child) |
| **Python** | `.py`, `.pyc` | `python.exe`, `python3` | Depends on context |
| **Batch/CMD** | `.bat`, `.cmd` | `cmd.exe` | Word, PowerShell |
| **Bash/Shell** | `.sh` | `bash`, `sh` | Cron, web server |

### 1.2 Suspicious Indicators

| Indicator | Example | Risk |
|:---|:---|:---|
| `-EncodedCommand` / `-enc` | `powershell -enc SQBFAFgA...` | рҹ”ҙ High |
| `Invoke-Expression` / `IEX` | `IEX(New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString(...)` | рҹ”ҙ High |
| Download cradle | `Net.WebClient`, `Invoke-WebRequest`, `curl` | рҹ”ҙ High |
| Memory-only execution | `Reflection.Assembly::Load`, `.NET in-memory` | рҹ”ҙ High |
| AMSI bypass | `AmsiUtils`, `amsiInitFailed` | рҹ”ҙ Critical |
| Execution policy bypass | `-ExecutionPolicy Bypass` | рҹҹ  Medium |
| Obfuscation | String concatenation, char codes, `^` escaping | рҹҹ  Medium |
| Scheduled task creation | `schtasks /create`, `Register-ScheduledTask` | рҹ”ҙ High |
| Registry modification | `Set-ItemProperty`, `reg add` | рҹҹ  Medium |

### 1.3 Investigation Checklist

| Check | How | Done |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Decode the command (Base64, URL encoding) | CyberChef, `[System.Text.Encoding]::Unicode` | вҳҗ |
| What did the script DO? | Decoded content analysis | вҳҗ |
| Parent process chain | EDR process tree | вҳҗ |
| User context (admin/standard, SYSTEM?) | Process details | вҳҗ |
| Did it download anything? | Proxy / DNS logs, EDR network | вҳҗ |
| Did it create files? | File creation events, Sysmon | вҳҗ |
| Was AMSI triggered? | AMSI logs, Event ID 1116 | вҳҗ |
| Did it establish persistence? | Registry, scheduled tasks, services | вҳҗ |

---

## 2. Containment

### 2.1 Immediate Actions

| # | Action | Tool | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Kill** the script engine process | EDR | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **Isolate** the host | EDR | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **Block** downloaded payload hash | EDR global blacklist | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **Block** C2/download URL at proxy | Proxy / DNS | вҳҗ |
| 5 | **Disable** user account (if macro phishing) | AD / IdP | вҳҗ |

### 2.2 If Macro-Based Delivery (Phishing)

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Search all mailboxes for same attachment | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Delete phishing emails from all mailboxes | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Block sender domain at email gateway | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Check if any other users opened the attachment | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. Eradication

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Delete the malicious script file (`.ps1`, `.vbs`, `.js`) | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Remove downloaded payloads | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Remove persistence (scheduled tasks, registry Run keys, services) | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Clear PowerShell command history if attacker used console | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Full AV/EDR scan of the host | вҳҗ |

---

## 4. Recovery

| # | Action | Done |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | Reconnect host after verified clean | вҳҗ |
| 2 | Enforce Constrained Language Mode for PowerShell | вҳҗ |
| 3 | Deploy/verify AppLocker or WDAC script restrictions | вҳҗ |
| 4 | Enable Script Block Logging (Event ID 4104) | вҳҗ |
| 5 | Enable Module Logging for PowerShell | вҳҗ |
| 6 | Monitor host for 72 hours | вҳҗ |

---

## 5. IoC Collection

| Type | Value | Source |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Script file hash | | EDR |
| Decoded command content | | Analysis |
| Download URL | | Proxy / EDR |
| Downloaded payload hash | | EDR |
| C2 domain/IP | | DNS / Proxy |
| Parent process | | EDR |
| Persistence location | | Registry / Sysmon |

---

## 6. Escalation Criteria

| Condition | Escalate To |
|:---|:---|
| AMSI bypass detected | Tier 2 + Threat Hunt |
| Download cradle connecting to C2 | [PB-13 C2](C2_Communication.en.md) |
| Macro phishing hitting multiple users | [PB-01 Phishing](Phishing.en.md) вҖ” Major |
| Credential dumping via script | [PB-07 PrivEsc](Privilege_Escalation.en.md) |
| Ransomware payload downloaded | [PB-02 Ransomware](Ransomware.en.md) |
| Script ran as SYSTEM | SOC Lead immediately |

---

### AMSI Detection Pipeline

```mermaid
graph LR
    Script["рҹ“ң Script"] --> AMSI["рҹӣЎпёҸ AMSI scan"]
    AMSI --> Clean{"вң… Clean?"}
    Clean -->|Yes| Execute["вҡҷпёҸ Execute"]
    Clean -->|No| Block["вқҢ Block"]
    Block --> EDR["рҹҡЁ EDR alert"]
    EDR --> SOC["рҹҺҜ SOC investigate"]
    style Block fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style AMSI fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
```

### Script Execution Policy

```mermaid
graph TD
    Policy["рҹ“Ӣ Execution Policy"] --> AppLocker["рҹ”’ AppLocker"]
    Policy --> WDAC["рҹӣЎпёҸ WDAC"]
    Policy --> CLM["рҹ“ң Constrained Language"]
    AppLocker --> Whitelist["вң… Whitelist only"]
    WDAC --> SignedOnly["рҹ”Ҹ Signed scripts only"]
    CLM --> Limited["вҡ пёҸ Limited cmdlets"]
    style AppLocker fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style SignedOnly fill:#3498db,color:#fff
    style Limited fill:#f39c12,color:#fff
```

- [Microsoft Script Block Logging](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/microsoft.powershell.core/about/about_logging_windows)

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Suspicious_Script.th.md
# Playbook: аёҒаёІаёЈаёЈаёұаёҷ Script аё—аёөа№Ҳаёҷа№ҲаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёў (Suspicious Script Execution)

**ID**: PB-11
**аёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ**: аёӘаё№аёҮ | **аё«аёЎаё§аё”аё«аёЎаё№а№Ҳ**: Endpoint / Execution
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1059](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1059/) (Command & Scripting Interpreter)
**аё—аёЈаёҙаёҒа№ҖаёҒаёӯаёЈа№Ң**: EDR alert (script execution), SIEM (Event 4104/4688), AMSI detection, email attachment filter


## аё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң (Post-Incident)

- [ ] аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ script execution policies (PowerShell, Python, VBA)
- [ ] а№ғаёҠа№ү AMSI protection аё—аёёаёҒ endpoint
- [ ] аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ application control / AppLocker policies
- [ ] аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ detection rule аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ obfuscation patterns
- [ ] а№ғаёҠа№ү constrained language mode аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ PowerShell
- [ ] аёҲаёұаё”аё—аёі [Incident Report](../../11_Reporting_Templates/incident_report.th.md)

### аёңаёұаёҮ Script Analysis Pipeline

```mermaid
graph LR
    Script["рҹ“ң Script"] --> AMSI["рҹӣЎпёҸ AMSI"]
    AMSI --> Deobfuscate["рҹ”“ Deobfuscate"]
    Deobfuscate --> Analyze["рҹ”Қ Analyze Intent"]
    Analyze --> IOC["рҹҺҜ Extract IOC"]
    IOC --> Hunt["рҹҺҜ Org-wide Hunt"]
    style Script fill:#3498db,color:#fff
    style AMSI fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style IOC fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
```

### аёңаёұаёҮаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ PowerShell Logging

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant PS as PowerShell
    participant AMSI
    participant EventLog as Event Log
    participant SIEM
    PS->>AMSI: аёӘа№ҒаёҒаёҷ script content
    AMSI-->>PS: вң… / вқҢ
    PS->>EventLog: Event 4104 (ScriptBlock)
    EventLog->>SIEM: Forward
    SIEM->>SIEM: Detect obfuscation pattern
    SIEM->>SIEM: рҹҡЁ Alert SOC
```

---

## аёңаёұаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёұаё”аёӘаёҙаёҷа№ғаёҲ

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ Suspicious Script"] --> Engine{"вҡҷпёҸ Script Engine?"}
    Engine -->|PowerShell| PS["рҹ”ө PowerShell"]
    Engine -->|VBScript/JScript| VB["рҹҹ  WSH"]
    Engine -->|Bash/Python| Unix["рҹҹў Unix Shell"]
    Engine -->|Office Macro| Macro["рҹ“„ VBA Macro"]
    PS --> Encoded{"рҹ”Ө Encoded?"}
    VB --> Parent["рҹ‘Ҷ Parent Process?"]
    Unix --> Parent
    Macro --> Parent
    Encoded -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| Decode["рҹ”“ Decode + аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң"]
    Encoded -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ| Content["рҹ“Ӣ аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң Content"]
    Decode --> Malicious{"рҹҰ  аёӯаёұаёҷаё•аёЈаёІаёў?"}
    Content --> Malicious
    Parent --> Malicious
    Malicious -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| Isolate["рҹ”’ Isolate Host"]
    Malicious -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ (FP)| Close["вң… False Positive"]
```

---

## 1. аёҒаёІаёЈаё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң

### 1.1 Script Engines а№ҒаёҘаё°аё•аёұаё§аёҡа№ҲаёҮаёҠаёөа№ү

| Engine | Binary | аё•аёұаё§аёҡа№ҲаёҮаёҠаёөа№үаёӯаёұаёҷаё•аёЈаёІаёў | аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| **PowerShell** | powershell.exe, pwsh.exe | `-EncodedCommand`, `-NoProfile`, `-Bypass`, AMSI bypass, `IEX`, `DownloadString` | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ |
| **VBScript** | wscript.exe, cscript.exe | child process (cmd, powershell), ActiveXObject | рҹҹ  аёӘаё№аёҮ |
| **Python** | python.exe, python3 | unexpected execution, subprocess, urllib | рҹҹ  аёӘаё№аёҮ |
| **Bash/Shell** | bash, sh | `curl \| bash`, `wget + chmod +x`, reverse shell | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ |
| **Office Macro** | WINWORD.EXE вҶ’ child | cmd.exe/powershell.exe spawn | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ |
| **MSHTA** | mshta.exe | inline VBScript, remote HTA | рҹ”ҙ аёӘаё№аёҮ |

### 1.2 аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ

| аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈ | аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Script engine аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№ү | EDR process details | вҳҗ |
| Full command line аё—аёөа№ҲаёЈаёұаёҷ | EDR / Sysmon Event 1 | вҳҗ |
| Decoded content (аё–а№үаёІ encoded) | CyberChef / EDR decode | вҳҗ |
| Parent process (а№ғаё„аёЈ/аёӯаё°а№„аёЈа№ҖаёЈаёөаёўаёҒ?) | EDR process tree | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёөаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаё„аёЈаё·аёӯаёӮа№ҲаёІаёў? (C2 callback) | EDR / Sysmon Event 3 | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёөа№„аёҹаёҘа№Ңаё–аё№аёҒаёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№ҒаёҒа№үа№„аёӮ? | EDR / Sysmon Event 11 | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёө persistence аёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ? (registry, task) | EDR / Autoruns | вҳҗ |
| аёЎаёө host аёӯаё·а№ҲаёҷаёЈаёұаёҷ script а№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷ? | SIEM pivot | вҳҗ |
| AMSI blocked аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ bypass аёӘаёіа№ҖаёЈа№ҮаёҲ? | AMSI logs / Event 4104 | вҳҗ |

### 1.3 Obfuscation Patterns аё—аёөа№Ҳаёҷа№ҲаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёў

| Pattern | аё•аёұаё§аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮ |
|:---|:---|
| Base64 encoded | `-EncodedCommand`, `base64 -d` |
| String concatenation | `"Down" + "loadS" + "tring"` |
| XOR/char code | `[char]0x49 + [char]0x45 + [char]0x58` |
| Compression + encode | `IO.Compression.DeflateStream` |

---

## 2. аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---|:---:|
| 1 | **Kill** process аё—аёөа№ҲаёЈаёұаёҷ script | EDR | вҳҗ |
| 2 | **Isolate** host (network quarantine) | EDR | вҳҗ |
| 3 | **Block** script hash аё—аёөа№Ҳ EDR аё—аёұа№үаёҮаёӯаёҮаё„а№ҢаёҒаёЈ | EDR policy | вҳҗ |
| 4 | **Block** C2 domain/IP (аё–а№үаёІаёЎаёөаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎаё•а№Ҳаёӯ) | Firewall/DNS | вҳҗ |
| 5 | аё„а№үаёҷаё«аёІ script hash / command pattern а№ғаёҷ host аёӯаё·а№Ҳаёҷ | SIEM | вҳҗ |

---

## 3. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаёіаёҲаёұаё”

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | аёҘаёҡ script file + payload аё—аёөа№Ҳаё”аёІаё§аёҷа№Ңа№Ӯаё«аёҘаё”аёЎаёІ | вҳҗ |
| 2 | аёҘаёҡ persistence (scheduled task, registry run key, cron) | вҳҗ |
| 3 | аё«аёЎаёёаёҷа№Җаё§аёөаёўаёҷ credentials аё–а№үаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёўаё§а№ҲаёІаё–аё№аёҒ harvest | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аёӘа№ҒаёҒаёҷ AV/EDR а№Җаё•а№ҮаёЎаёЈаё№аёӣа№Ғаёҡаёҡ | вҳҗ |
| 5 | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ parent process вҖ” а№ҒаёҒа№ү entry vector (macro, phishing) | вҳҗ |

---

## 4. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҹаё·а№үаёҷаёҹаё№

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | а№ҖаёӘаёЈа№ҮаёҲ |
|:---:|:---|:---:|
| 1 | а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” **Script Block Logging** (PowerShell Event 4104) | вҳҗ |
| 2 | аёҡаёұаёҮаё„аёұаёҡ **Constrained Language Mode** (PowerShell) | вҳҗ |
| 3 | а№ғаёҠа№ү **AppLocker / WDAC** аёҲаёіаёҒаёұаё” script execution | вҳҗ |
| 4 | аёӣаёҙаё” **WSH** (wscript/cscript) аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаё—аёұа№Ҳаё§а№„аёӣ | вҳҗ |
| 5 | аёҡаёҘа№ҮаёӯаёҒ **Office Macros** аёҲаёІаёҒ internet (Mark of the Web) | вҳҗ |

---

## 5. а№ҖаёҒаё“аё‘а№ҢаёҒаёІаёЈаёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡ

| а№ҖаёҮаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аёӮ | аёўаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡа№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ |
|:---|:---|
| Malware payload аё–аё№аёҒаё”аёІаё§аёҷа№Ңа№Ӯаё«аёҘаё” | [PB-03 Malware](Malware_Infection.th.md) |
| C2 callback аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ | [PB-13 C2](C2_Communication.th.md) |
| аё«аёҘаёІаёў host аё–аё№аёҒаёЈаёұаёҷ script а№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§аёҒаёұаёҷ | Major Incident |
| AMSI bypass аёӘаёіа№ҖаёЈа№ҮаёҲ + persistence | Tier 2 escalation |
| Credential theft (Mimikatz-style) | [PB-09 Lateral Movement](Lateral_Movement.th.md) |

---

### аёңаёұаёҮ AMSI Detection Pipeline

```mermaid
graph LR
    Script["рҹ“ң Script"] --> AMSI["рҹӣЎпёҸ AMSI scan"]
    AMSI --> Clean{"вң… Clean?"}
    Clean -->|Yes| Execute["вҡҷпёҸ Execute"]
    Clean -->|No| Block["вқҢ Block"]
    Block --> EDR["рҹҡЁ EDR alert"]
    EDR --> SOC["рҹҺҜ SOC investigate"]
    style Block fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style AMSI fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
```

### аёңаёұаёҮ Script Execution Policy

```mermaid
graph TD
    Policy["рҹ“Ӣ Execution Policy"] --> AppLocker["рҹ”’ AppLocker"]
    Policy --> WDAC["рҹӣЎпёҸ WDAC"]
    Policy --> CLM["рҹ“ң Constrained Language"]
    AppLocker --> Whitelist["вң… Whitelist only"]
    WDAC --> SignedOnly["рҹ”Ҹ Signed scripts only"]
    CLM --> Limited["вҡ пёҸ Limited cmdlets"]
    style AppLocker fill:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style SignedOnly fill:#3498db,color:#fff
    style Limited fill:#f39c12,color:#fff
```

## аёҒаёҺаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ (Sigma)

| аёҒаёҺ | а№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң |
|:---|:---|
| PowerShell Encoded Command | [proc_powershell_encoded.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/proc_powershell_encoded.yml) |
| Office Spawning PowerShell | [proc_office_spawn_powershell.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/proc_office_spawn_powershell.yml) |
| Execution from Temp/Downloads | [proc_temp_folder_execution.yml](../../08_Detection_Engineering/sigma_rules/proc_temp_folder_execution.yml) |

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ

- [аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёӯа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң](../Framework.th.md)
- [PB-03 аёЎаёұаёҘа№Ғаё§аёЈа№Ң](Malware_Infection.th.md)
- [PB-13 C2 Communication](C2_Communication.th.md)

## Script Risk Assessment

| Script Type | Risk Level | Common Abuse |
|:---|:---|:---|
| PowerShell (-Enc) | High | Obfuscated payload |
| VBScript/JScript | High | Dropper, downloader |
| Bash/Shell | Medium | Reverse shell |
| Python | Medium | Recon, exploitation |
| Batch (.bat/.cmd) | Medium | Persistence |

### Suspicious Script Indicators

| Indicator | Example | Detection |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Base64 encoding | -EncodedCommand | Regex pattern |
| Download cradle | IEX(IWR ...) | Process + network |
| AMSI bypass | [Ref].Assembly | String match |
| Obfuscation | String concatenation | Entropy analysis |
| Uncommon parent | Office вҶ’ cmd вҶ’ PS | Process tree |

### Script Deobfuscation Steps

| Step | Tool |
|:---|:---|
| Base64 decode | CyberChef |
| String extraction | FLOSS |
| Dynamic analysis | Any.run sandbox |

## References

- [MITRE ATT&CK T1059 вҖ” Command & Scripting Interpreter](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1059/)

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Typosquatting.en.md
# Playbook: Typosquatting / Domain Impersonation Response

**ID**: PB-49
**Severity**: High | **Category**: Resource Development / Initial Access
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1583.001](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1583/001/) (Acquire Infrastructure: Domains), [T1608.005](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1608/005/) (Link Target)
**Trigger**: Brand monitoring alert (lookalike domain registered), user report (suspicious email from similar domain), threat intel (phishing campaign using typosquat domain)

> вҡ пёҸ **WARNING**: Typosquatting domains are used for phishing, credential harvesting, and supply chain attacks. Attackers register domains that look like yours вҖ” one character off вҖ” and target your customers, partners, and employees.

### Typosquatting Attack Methods

```mermaid
graph TD
    TS["рҹҢҗ Typosquatting Types"] --> Typo["Character swap\nexampel.com"]
    TS --> Missing["Missing char\nexmple.com"]
    TS --> Double["Double letter\nexammple.com"]
    TS --> TLD["TLD variation\nexample.co"]
    TS --> Homo["Homograph\nexР°mple.com\n(Cyrillic Р°)"]
    TS --> Combo["Combosquat\nexample-login.com"]

    Typo --> Use["Phishing\nCredential harvest\nMalware delivery"]
    Missing --> Use
    Double --> Use
    TLD --> Use
    Homo --> Use
    Combo --> Use

    style TS fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style Homo fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style Use fill:#660000,color:#fff
```

### Attack Use Cases

```mermaid
graph TD
    Domain["Typosquat Domain"] --> Phish["рҹ“§ Phishing Emails\nFrom: admin@exampel.com"]
    Domain --> Web["рҹҢҗ Fake Website\nClone of real login page"]
    Domain --> BEC["рҹ’ј BEC Attack\ncfo@exampel.com вҶ’ wire"]
    Domain --> Supply["рҹ“Ұ Supply Chain\nFake vendor emails"]
    Domain --> SEO["рҹ”Қ SEO Poisoning\nFake site in search results"]
    Domain --> Malware["рҹ’Җ Malware\nDrive-by download"]
    style Domain fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style BEC fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style Malware fill:#660000,color:#fff
```

---

## Decision Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ Suspicious Domain Detected"] --> Source{"Detection source?"}
    Source -->|"Brand monitoring"| Brand["New domain registered\nsimilar to ours"]
    Source -->|"User report"| User["Email from similar\ndomain received"]
    Source -->|"Threat intel"| TI["Phishing campaign\nusing typosquat domain"]
    Brand --> Active{"Domain actively\nhosting content?"}
    Active -->|Yes| Hostile["рҹ”ҙ Active threat\nTakedown required"]
    Active -->|"No вҖ” parked"| Monitor["Monitor + request\nproactive takedown"]
    User --> Block["Block domain\nCheck who received emails"]
    TI --> Block
    Hostile --> Takedown["Initiate domain takedown"]
    Block --> Scope["Scope: affected users?"]
    style Alert fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style Hostile fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
```

### Investigation Workflow

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Monitor as Brand Monitor
    participant SOC as SOC Analyst
    participant Legal as Legal Team
    participant IT as IT / DNS
    participant Registrar

    Monitor->>SOC: рҹҡЁ Lookalike domain registered
    SOC->>SOC: Analyze domain (WHOIS, DNS, content)
    SOC->>SOC: Check вҖ” is it hosting phishing content?
    SOC->>IT: Block domain at DNS/proxy/email gateway
    SOC->>Legal: Request domain takedown
    Legal->>Registrar: Submit abuse report + UDRP
    Registrar->>Legal: Domain suspended
    SOC->>SOC: Sweep email logs for messages from domain
```

### Domain Analysis Checklist

```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph "Domain Intelligence"
        D1["WHOIS вҖ” registration date, registrant"]
        D2["DNS вҖ” A record, MX record, nameservers"]
        D3["Content вҖ” clone of real site?"]
        D4["SSL cert вҖ” who issued?"]
        D5["VirusTotal вҖ” reputation"]
        D6["URLScan вҖ” page screenshot"]
    end
    subgraph "Email Intelligence"
        E1["SPF/DKIM/DMARC вҖ” configured?"]
        E2["Email gateway вҖ” messages from this domain?"]
        E3["Users who received/clicked"]
    end
    style D3 fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style E1 fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
```

### Takedown Process

```mermaid
graph TD
    Detect["Detect typosquat domain"] --> Evidence["Collect evidence\nScreenshots, WHOIS, content"]
    Evidence --> Block["Block internally\nDNS, proxy, email"]
    Block --> Report["Report to registrar\nAbuse complaint"]
    Report --> UDRP{"Need UDRP/legal?"}
    UDRP -->|"Yes вҖ” disputed"| Legal["File UDRP dispute\nor legal action"]
    UDRP -->|"No вҖ” clear abuse"| Suspend["Registrar suspends\nwithin 24-72h"]
    Legal --> Resolve["Domain transferred\nor deleted"]
    Suspend --> Resolve
    style Detect fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style Report fill:#ffcc00,color:#000
```

### Response Timeline

```mermaid
gantt
    title Typosquatting Response Timeline
    dateFormat HH:mm
    axisFormat %H:%M
    section Detection
        Brand monitoring alert  :a1, 00:00, 5min
        Domain analysis         :a2, after a1, 30min
    section Containment
        Block at DNS/proxy      :a3, after a2, 15min
        Block at email gateway  :a4, after a3, 15min
    section Takedown
        Submit abuse report     :a5, after a4, 30min
        Registrar response      :a6, after a5, 1440min
    section Investigation
        Email log sweep         :a7, after a3, 60min
```

---

## 1. Immediate Actions (First 30 Minutes)

| # | Action | Owner |
|:---|:---|:---|
| 1 | Analyze domain (WHOIS, DNS, content, SSL) | SOC T2 |
| 2 | Block domain at DNS resolver and web proxy | IT / SOC |
| 3 | Block domain at email gateway (inbound/outbound) | IT |
| 4 | Check email logs for messages from/to the domain | SOC |
| 5 | Screenshot all hosted content as evidence | SOC |
| 6 | Submit abuse report to domain registrar | Legal / SOC |

## 2. Investigation Checklist

### Domain Analysis
- [ ] WHOIS: registration date, registrant info, registrar
- [ ] DNS records: A, MX, NS, TXT (SPF/DKIM)
- [ ] Content: is it a clone of our website?
- [ ] SSL certificate: issuing CA, subject
- [ ] VirusTotal: detection by security vendors
- [ ] URLScan.io: page screenshot and analysis

### Email Impact
- [ ] Inbound emails from the typosquat domain
- [ ] Users who received emails from the domain
- [ ] Users who clicked links in emails from the domain
- [ ] Outbound emails to the typosquat domain (data leak risk)

### Broader Campaign
- [ ] Are there other similar domains registered?
- [ ] Is this part of a phishing campaign?
- [ ] Are partners/customers being targeted?

## 3. Containment

| Scope | Action |
|:---|:---|
| **DNS** | Sinkhole / block the domain |
| **Proxy** | URL category block |
| **Email** | Block inbound + outbound |
| **Users** | Notify anyone who interacted |
| **External** | Alert customers/partners |

## 4. Post-Incident

| Question | Answer |
|:---|:---|
| How was the typosquat domain detected? | [Brand monitoring/user report] |
| Was brand monitoring in place? | [Yes/No] |
| Were DMARC reject policies configured? | [Yes/No] |
| Was domain takedown successful? | [Status + timeline] |

## 6. Detection Rules (Sigma)

```yaml
title: Email From Typosquat Domain
logsource:
    product: email_gateway
detection:
    selection:
        sender_domain|re: '(examp1e|exampel|exmple|exampl)\.(com|org|net)'
    condition: selection
    level: high
```

- [IR Framework](../Framework.en.md)
- [Phishing Playbook](Phishing.en.md)
- [BEC Playbook](BEC.en.md)

- [MITRE T1583.001 вҖ” Domains](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1583/001/)
- [ICANN вҖ” UDRP Policy](https://www.icann.org/resources/pages/help/dndr/udrp-en)
