## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Typosquatting.th.md
# Playbook: аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮ Typosquatting / Domain Impersonation

**ID**: PB-49
**аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ**: аёӘаё№аёҮ | **аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—**: Resource Development / Initial Access
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1583.001](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1583/001/) (Acquire Infrastructure: Domains), [T1608.005](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1608/005/) (Link Target)
**Trigger**: Brand monitoring alert (domain аё„аёҘа№үаёІаёўаё„аёҘаё¶аёҮ), user аёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷ (аёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘаёҲаёІаёҒ domain аё„аёҘа№үаёІаёўаёҒаёұаёҷ), threat intel (phishing campaign а№ғаёҠа№ү typosquat domain)

> вҡ пёҸ **аё„аёіа№Җаё•аё·аёӯаёҷ**: Typosquatting domains а№ғаёҠа№үаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ phishing, credential harvesting, а№ҒаёҘаё° supply chain attacks аёңаё№а№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөаёҲаё”аё—аё°а№Җаёҡаёөаёўаёҷ domain аё—аёөа№Ҳа№Җаё«аёЎаё·аёӯаёҷаёӮаёӯаёҮаё„аёёаё“ вҖ” аё•а№ҲаёІаёҮаёӯаёұаёҒаё©аёЈа№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§ вҖ” а№ҒаёҘаё°а№ҖаёҘа№ҮаёҮа№Җаёӣа№үаёІ customers, partners, а№ҒаёҘаё°аёһаёҷаёұаёҒаёҮаёІаёҷ

### аё§аёҙаёҳаёөаёҒаёІаёЈ Typosquatting

```mermaid
graph TD
    TS["рҹҢҗ аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё— Typosquatting"] --> Typo["аёӘаёҘаёұаёҡаёӯаёұаёҒаё©аёЈ\nexampel.com"]
    TS --> Missing["аёӮаёІаё”аёӯаёұаёҒаё©аёЈ\nexmple.com"]
    TS --> Double["аёӯаёұаёҒаё©аёЈаёӢа№үаёі\nexammple.com"]
    TS --> TLD["а№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷ TLD\nexample.co"]
    TS --> Homo["Homograph\nexР°mple.com\n(Cyrillic Р°)"]
    TS --> Combo["Combosquat\nexample-login.com"]

    Typo --> Use["Phishing\nCredential harvest\nMalware delivery"]
    Missing --> Use
    Double --> Use
    TLD --> Use
    Homo --> Use
    Combo --> Use

    style TS fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style Homo fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style Use fill:#660000,color:#fff
```

### аёҒаёЈаё“аёөаёҒаёІаёЈа№ғаёҠа№үа№ҖаёҠаёҙаёҮа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө

```mermaid
graph TD
    Domain["Typosquat Domain"] --> Phish["рҹ“§ Phishing Emails\nFrom: admin@exampel.com"]
    Domain --> Web["рҹҢҗ а№Җаё§а№ҮаёҡаёӣаёҘаёӯаёЎ\nClone аё«аёҷа№үаёІ login аёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮ"]
    Domain --> BEC["рҹ’ј BEC Attack\ncfo@exampel.com вҶ’ а№Ӯаёӯаёҷа№ҖаёҮаёҙаёҷ"]
    Domain --> Supply["рҹ“Ұ Supply Chain\nаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘ vendor аёӣаёҘаёӯаёЎ"]
    Domain --> SEO["рҹ”Қ SEO Poisoning\nа№Җаё§а№ҮаёҡаёӣаёҘаёӯаёЎа№ғаёҷаёңаёҘаё„а№үаёҷаё«аёІ"]
    Domain --> Malware["рҹ’Җ Malware\nDrive-by download"]
    style Domain fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style BEC fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style Malware fill:#660000,color:#fff
```

---

## Decision Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёһаёҡ Domain аёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ"] --> Source{"а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ?"}
    Source -->|"Brand monitoring"| Brand["Domain а№ғаё«аёЎа№ҲаёҲаё”аё—аё°а№Җаёҡаёөаёўаёҷ\nаё„аёҘа№үаёІаёўаёӮаёӯаёҮа№ҖаёЈаёІ"]
    Source -->|"User аёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷ"| User["а№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘаёҲаёІаёҒ\ndomain аё—аёөа№Ҳаё„аёҘа№үаёІаёўаёҒаёұаёҷ"]
    Source -->|"Threat intel"| TI["Phishing campaign\nа№ғаёҠа№ү typosquat domain"]
    Brand --> Active{"Domain аёЎаёөа№Җаёҷаё·а№үаёӯаё«аёІ\nаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ?"}
    Active -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| Hostile["рҹ”ҙ аё аёұаёўаё„аёёаёҒаё„аёІаёЎаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№үаёҮаёІаёҷаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳ\nаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ takedown"]
    Active -->|"а№„аёЎа№Ҳ вҖ” parked"| Monitor["аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаё•аёҙаё”аё•аёІаёЎ + аёӮаёӯ\nproactive takedown"]
    User --> Block["Block domain\nаё•аёЈаё§аёҲа№ғаё„аёЈа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘ"]
    TI --> Block
    Hostile --> Takedown["а№ҖаёЈаёҙа№ҲаёЎаёҒаёЈаё°аёҡаё§аёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ domain takedown"]
    Block --> Scope["аёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё•: аёңаё№а№үа№ғаёҠа№үаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ?"]
    style Alert fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style Hostile fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
```

### аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Monitor as Brand Monitor
    participant SOC as SOC Analyst
    participant Legal as Legal Team
    participant IT as IT / DNS
    participant Registrar

    Monitor->>SOC: рҹҡЁ Lookalike domain аёҲаё”аё—аё°а№Җаёҡаёөаёўаёҷ
    SOC->>SOC: аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң domain (WHOIS, DNS, а№Җаёҷаё·а№үаёӯаё«аёІ)
    SOC->>SOC: аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ вҖ” аёЎаёөа№Җаёҷаё·а№үаёӯаё«аёІ phishing аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ?
    SOC->>IT: Block domain аё—аёөа№Ҳ DNS/proxy/email gateway
    SOC->>Legal: аёӮаёӯ domain takedown
    Legal->>Registrar: аёўаё·а№Ҳаёҷ abuse report + UDRP
    Registrar->>Legal: Domain аё–аё№аёҒ suspend
    SOC->>SOC: Sweep email logs аё«аёІаёӮа№үаёӯаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёҲаёІаёҒ domain
```

### аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ Domain

```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph "Domain Intelligence"
        D1["WHOIS вҖ” аё§аёұаёҷаёҲаё”аё—аё°а№Җаёҡаёөаёўаёҷ, аёңаё№а№үаёҲаё”аё—аё°а№Җаёҡаёөаёўаёҷ"]
        D2["DNS вҖ” A record, MX record, nameservers"]
        D3["а№Җаёҷаё·а№үаёӯаё«аёІ вҖ” clone а№Җаё§а№ҮаёҡаёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮ?"]
        D4["SSL cert вҖ” а№ғаё„аёЈаёӯаёӯаёҒ?"]
        D5["VirusTotal вҖ” reputation"]
        D6["URLScan вҖ” screenshot аё«аёҷа№үаёІа№Җаё§а№Үаёҡ"]
    end
    subgraph "Email Intelligence"
        E1["SPF/DKIM/DMARC вҖ” аёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё”аё„а№ҲаёІаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳ?"]
        E2["Email gateway вҖ” аёӮа№үаёӯаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёҲаёІаёҒ domain аёҷаёөа№ү?"]
        E3["Users аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡ/аё„аёҘаёҙаёҒ"]
    end
    style D3 fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style E1 fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
```

### аёҒаёЈаё°аёҡаё§аёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ Takedown

```mermaid
graph TD
    Detect["аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёһаёҡ typosquat domain"] --> Evidence["аёЈаё§аёҡаёЈаё§аёЎаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ\nScreenshots, WHOIS, а№Җаёҷаё·а№үаёӯаё«аёІ"]
    Evidence --> Block["Block аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ\nDNS, proxy, email"]
    Block --> Report["аёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷ registrar\nAbuse complaint"]
    Report --> UDRP{"аё•а№үаёӯаёҮ UDRP/аёҒаёҺаё«аёЎаёІаёў?"}
    UDRP -->|"а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ вҖ” аёЎаёөаёӮа№үаёӯаёһаёҙаёһаёІаё—"| Legal["аёўаё·а№Ҳаёҷ UDRP dispute\nаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёІаёҮаёҒаёҺаё«аёЎаёІаёў"]
    UDRP -->|"а№„аёЎа№Ҳ вҖ” abuse аёҠаёұаё”а№ҖаёҲаёҷ"| Suspend["Registrar suspend\nаё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ 24-72 аёҠаёЎ."]
    Legal --> Resolve["Domain аё–аё№аёҒа№Ӯаёӯаёҷ\nаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаёҘаёҡ"]
    Suspend --> Resolve
    style Detect fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style Report fill:#ffcc00,color:#000
```

### Timeline аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮ

```mermaid
gantt
    title Typosquatting Response Timeline
    dateFormat HH:mm
    axisFormat %H:%M
    section Detection
        Brand monitoring alert  :a1, 00:00, 5min
        аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң domain        :a2, after a1, 30min
    section Containment
        Block аё—аёөа№Ҳ DNS/proxy     :a3, after a2, 15min
        Block аё—аёөа№Ҳ email gateway :a4, after a3, 15min
    section Takedown
        аёўаё·а№Ҳаёҷ abuse report       :a5, after a4, 30min
        Registrar аё•аёӯаёҡаёҒаёҘаёұаёҡ       :a6, after a5, 1440min
    section Investigation
        Sweep email logs        :a7, after a3, 60min
```

---

## 1. аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө (30 аёҷаёІаё—аёөа№ҒаёЈаёҒ)

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | аёңаё№а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҙаё”аёҠаёӯаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| 1 | аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң domain (WHOIS, DNS, а№Җаёҷаё·а№үаёӯаё«аёІ, SSL) | SOC T2 |
| 2 | Block domain аё—аёөа№Ҳ DNS resolver а№ҒаёҘаё° web proxy | IT / SOC |
| 3 | Block domain аё—аёөа№Ҳ email gateway (inbound/outbound) | IT |
| 4 | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ email logs аё«аёІаёӮа№үаёӯаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёҲаёІаёҒ/а№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ domain | SOC |
| 5 | Screenshot а№Җаёҷаё·а№үаёӯаё«аёІаё—аёөа№Ҳ host аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё”а№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ | SOC |
| 6 | аёўаё·а№Ҳаёҷ abuse report а№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ registrar | Legal / SOC |

## 2. аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ

### аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң Domain
- [ ] WHOIS: аё§аёұаёҷаёҲаё”аё—аё°а№Җаёҡаёөаёўаёҷ, аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёңаё№а№үаёҲаё”аё—аё°а№Җаёҡаёөаёўаёҷ, registrar
- [ ] DNS records: A, MX, NS, TXT (SPF/DKIM)
- [ ] а№Җаёҷаё·а№үаёӯаё«аёІ: clone аёӮаёӯаёҮа№Җаё§а№Үаёҡа№„аёӢаё•а№Ңа№ҖаёЈаёІаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ?
- [ ] SSL certificate: CA аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёӯаёҒ, subject
- [ ] VirusTotal: аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡа№Ӯаё”аёў security vendors

### аёңаёҘаёҒаёЈаё°аё—аёҡ Email
- [ ] Inbound emails аёҲаёІаёҒ typosquat domain
- [ ] Users аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘаёҲаёІаёҒ domain
- [ ] Users аё—аёөа№Ҳаё„аёҘаёҙаёҒ links а№ғаёҷаёӯаёөа№ҖаёЎаёҘаёҲаёІаёҒ domain
- [ ] Outbound emails а№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ typosquat domain (аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ data leak)

## 3. аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ (Containment)

| аёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё• | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ |
|:---|:---|
| **DNS** | Sinkhole / block domain |
| **Proxy** | URL category block |
| **Email** | Block inbound + outbound |
| **Users** | а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮаё—аёёаёҒаё„аёҷаё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёөаёӣаёҸаёҙаёӘаёұаёЎаёһаёұаёҷаёҳа№Ң |
| **аё аёІаёўаёҷаёӯаёҒ** | а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ customers/partners |

### аёЎаёІаё•аёЈаёҒаёІаёЈаёӣаёҒаёӣа№үаёӯаёҮа№ҒаёҡаёЈаёҷаё”а№Ң
- [ ] аёҘаёҮаё—аё°а№Җаёҡаёөаёўаёҷ domain аё—аёөа№Ҳаё„аёҘа№үаёІаёўаёҒаёұаёҷ (typo variants)
- [ ] а№Җаёӣаёҙаё”а№ғаёҠа№ү DMARC, SPF, DKIM аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ domain аё«аёҘаёұаёҒ
- [ ] аёӘаёЎаёұаё„аёЈ domain monitoring service
- [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ certificate transparency logs а№Җаёӣа№ҮаёҷаёӣаёЈаё°аёҲаёі
- [ ] а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ registrar а№Җаёһаё·а№Ҳаёӯ takedown domains аё—аёөа№ҲаёҘаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаё”

## 4. аё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң (Post-Incident)

| аё„аёіаё–аёІаёЎ | аё„аёіаё•аёӯаёҡ |
|:---|:---|
| Typosquat domain аё–аё№аёҒаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮа№„аёЈ? | [Brand monitoring/user report] |
| аёЎаёө brand monitoring аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | [а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ/а№„аёЎа№Ҳ] |
| DMARC reject policies аёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё”аё„а№ҲаёІаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | [а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ/а№„аёЎа№Ҳ] |
| Domain takedown аёӘаёіа№ҖаёЈа№ҮаёҲаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | [аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё° + timeline] |

## 6. Detection Rules (Sigma)

```yaml
title: Email From Typosquat Domain
logsource:
    product: email_gateway
detection:
    selection:
        sender_domain|re: '(examp1e|exampel|exmple)\.(com|org|net)'
    condition: selection
    level: high
```

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ
- [IR Framework](../Framework.th.md)
- [Phishing Playbook](Phishing.th.md)
- [BEC Playbook](BEC.th.md)

## References
- [MITRE T1583.001 вҖ” Domains](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1583/001/)
- [ICANN вҖ” UDRP Policy](https://www.icann.org/resources/pages/help/dndr/udrp-en)

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/USB_Removable_Media.en.md
# Playbook: USB / Removable Media Incident Response

**ID**: PB-40
**Severity**: MediumвҖ“High | **Category**: Initial Access / Exfiltration
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1091](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1091/) (Replication Through Removable Media), [T1052.001](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1052/001/) (Exfiltration over USB), [T1200](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1200/) (Hardware Additions)
**Trigger**: DLP alert (USB copy), EDR (autorun execution), physical security (unauthorized USB device), SIEM (mass file copy to removable drive)

> вҡ пёҸ **WARNING**: USB devices can deliver malware (Rubber Ducky, BadUSB), exfiltrate data, or bridge air-gapped networks. Never plug unknown USBs into corporate systems.

### USB Threat Landscape

```mermaid
graph TD
    USB["рҹ”Ң USB Threats"] --> Malware["Malware Delivery"]
    USB --> Exfil["Data Exfiltration"]
    USB --> HW["Hardware Attack"]
    USB --> Bridge["Air-Gap Bridge"]

    Malware --> Autorun["Autorun malware\nT1091"]
    Malware --> Rubber["Rubber Ducky\nHID injection"]
    Malware --> BadUSB["BadUSB\nFirmware exploit"]

    Exfil --> Copy["Mass file copy\nT1052.001"]
    Exfil --> Encrypt["Encrypted container\nVeraCrypt"]

    HW --> Killer["USB Killer\nHardware damage"]
    HW --> Keylogger["USB Keylogger\nKeystroke capture"]

    Bridge --> Stuxnet["Stuxnet-style\nOT network bridge"]

    style USB fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style Rubber fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style BadUSB fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style Killer fill:#660000,color:#fff
```

### USB Attack Scenarios

```mermaid
graph LR
    A["1пёҸвғЈ Social Engineering\nUSB drop in parking lot"] --> B["2пёҸвғЈ Device Plugged In\nCuriosity/ignorance"]
    B --> C["3пёҸвғЈ Payload Executes\nAutorun/HID inject"]
    C --> D["4пёҸвғЈ Malware Installs\nPersistence established"]
    D --> E["5пёҸвғЈ C2 Connection\nBeacon to attacker"]
    E --> F["6пёҸвғЈ Lateral Movement\nNetwork compromise"]
    style A fill:#ffcc00,color:#000
    style C fill:#ff4444,color:#fff
    style F fill:#660000,color:#fff
```

---

## Decision Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ USB Activity Detected"] --> Type{"Type of activity?"}
    Type -->|"Unknown device plugged in"| Unknown["Check device type\nHID? Storage? Network?"]
    Type -->|"Mass file copy to USB"| DLP["Check DLP policy\nAuthorized transfer?"]
    Type -->|"Autorun/execution from USB"| Exec["рҹ”ҙ Potential malware\nIsolate immediately"]
    Unknown --> HID{"HID device?"}
    HID -->|Yes| Rubber["рҹ”ҙ Possible Rubber Ducky\nPull USB immediately"]
    HID -->|"No вҖ” Storage"| Authorized{"Authorized user & device?"}
    Authorized -->|Yes| Policy["Log & monitor"]
    Authorized -->|No| Block["Block & investigate"]
    DLP --> Sensitive{"Sensitive data?"}
    Sensitive -->|Yes| DLPBlock["рҹ”ҙ Block transfer\nAlert Data Protection"]
    Sensitive -->|No| Review["Review purpose\nLog for audit"]
    Exec --> Isolate["Isolate endpoint\nPreserve evidence"]
    style Alert fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style Rubber fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style DLPBlock fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
```

### Investigation Workflow

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant DLP
    participant SOC as SOC Analyst
    participant IT as IT Security
    participant HR
    participant IR as IR Team

    DLP->>SOC: рҹҡЁ USB mass copy alert
    SOC->>SOC: Check: who, what files, when
    SOC->>IT: Pull USB device registry (VID/PID)
    IT->>SOC: Device info: personal USB drive
    SOC->>SOC: Classify data sensitivity
    SOC->>HR: Alert вҖ” potential data theft
    SOC->>IR: Escalate if sensitive data confirmed
    IR->>IT: Review all USB activity for this user (30 days)
```

### USB Device Classification

```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph "рҹҹў Low Risk"
        Mouse["USB Mouse\nStandard HID"]
        Keyboard["USB Keyboard\nStandard HID"]
        Headset["USB Headset\nAudio device"]
    end
    subgraph "рҹҹЎ Medium Risk"
        Storage["USB Flash Drive\nMass storage"]
        ExtHDD["External HDD\nMass storage"]
        Phone["Smartphone\nMTP/PTP"]
    end
    subgraph "рҹ”ҙ High Risk"
        RubberDuck["Rubber Ducky\nHID + scripting"]
        BadUSBDev["BadUSB Device\nFirmware exploit"]
        WiFiPineapple["WiFi Pineapple\nNetwork bridge"]
        USBKiller["USB Killer\nPower surge"]
    end
    style RubberDuck fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style BadUSBDev fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style USBKiller fill:#660000,color:#fff
```

### Data Exfiltration Detection

```mermaid
graph TD
    Monitor["USB Monitoring"] --> Volume{"Data volume transferred?"}
    Volume -->|"< 100MB"| Low["рҹҹў Low risk\nLog and review"]
    Volume -->|"100MB - 1GB"| Med["рҹҹЎ Medium risk\nReview file types"]
    Volume -->|"> 1GB"| High["рҹ”ҙ High risk\nPotential mass exfil"]
    High --> FileType{"File types?"}
    FileType -->|"Source code, DB dumps"| Critical["рҹ’Җ Critical\nIP theft"]
    FileType -->|"Documents, spreadsheets"| Breach["рҹ”ҙ Data breach\nCheck PII/PDPA"]
    FileType -->|"Media, presentations"| Review2["рҹҹЎ Review with user"]
    style Monitor fill:#333,color:#fff
    style Critical fill:#660000,color:#fff
```

### Response Timeline

```mermaid
gantt
    title USB Incident Response Timeline
    dateFormat HH:mm
    axisFormat %H:%M
    section Detection
        DLP/EDR alert          :a1, 00:00, 5min
        Identify device & user :a2, after a1, 10min
    section Containment
        Block USB device       :a3, after a2, 5min
        Confiscate device      :a4, after a3, 30min
    section Investigation
        Analyze files copied   :a5, after a4, 60min
        Review user history    :a6, after a5, 60min
        Data classification    :a7, after a6, 30min
    section Recovery
        Policy enforcement     :a8, after a7, 60min
        User training          :a9, after a8, 30min
```

---

## 1. Immediate Actions (First 15 Minutes)

| # | Action | Owner |
|:---|:---|:---|
| 1 | Identify the USB device (VID/PID, device type) | SOC T1 |
| 2 | Identify the user and timestamp | SOC T1 |
| 3 | If malware execution вҖ” isolate endpoint immediately | SOC T1 |
| 4 | If data exfiltration вҖ” preserve DLP logs | SOC T2 |
| 5 | Confiscate the USB device (chain of custody) | Physical Security |
| 6 | Check if the device was authorized per policy | SOC T2 |

## 2. Investigation Checklist

### Device Analysis
- [ ] USB device VID/PID (registry: `USBSTOR`)
- [ ] Device serial number and manufacturer
- [ ] First connection timestamp
- [ ] Is it a known/authorized device?
- [ ] Check Windows Event ID 6416 (new device connected)

### Data Transfer Analysis
- [ ] What files were copied TO the USB?
- [ ] What files were copied FROM the USB?
- [ ] Total volume of data transferred
- [ ] Were any files classified as sensitive/confidential?
- [ ] DLP logs for the transfer

### Malware Analysis (if applicable)
- [ ] Check for autorun.inf on the USB
- [ ] Scan USB content with multiple AV engines
- [ ] Check for hidden/system files
- [ ] Look for malicious .lnk or .hta files
- [ ] Check if any executables ran from the USB

## 3. Containment

| Scope | Action | Details |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **Device** | Confiscate USB | Chain of custody documentation |
| **Endpoint** | Isolate if malware suspected | EDR network isolation |
| **Account** | Disable if insider threat suspected | Pending investigation |
| **Policy** | Block USB class on affected endpoint | GPO or EDR |

## 4. Eradication & Recovery

### If Malware Delivered
1. Reimage endpoint
2. Scan all connected file shares for propagation
3. Block USB device class on all endpoints
4. Deploy updated EDR signatures

### If Data Exfiltrated
1. Classify all exfiltrated data
2. Assess PDPA/regulatory notification requirements
3. Preserve USB content as evidence
4. Review and strengthen DLP policies

## 5. Post-Incident

### Lessons Learned
| Question | Answer |
|:---|:---|
| Was USB device policy enforced? | [Yes/No] |
| Did DLP detect the transfer? | [Yes/No вҖ” gap?] |
| Was the user trained on USB risks? | [Status] |
| Are USB ports disabled on sensitive systems? | [Status] |

### Prevention Measures
- [ ] Deploy USB device control (whitelist only approved devices)
- [ ] Enable DLP for removable media
- [ ] Disable autorun/autoplay via GPO
- [ ] Disable USB mass storage on sensitive workstations
- [ ] Conduct USB drop test (security awareness exercise)
- [ ] Deploy USB device auditing (Sysmon Event ID 1 + registry)

## 6. Detection Rules (Sigma)

```yaml
title: USB Mass Storage Device Connected
logsource:
    product: windows
    service: security
detection:
    selection:
        EventID: 6416
        ClassName: 'DiskDrive'
    condition: selection
    level: medium
```

```yaml
title: Mass File Copy to Removable Drive
logsource:
    product: windows
    category: file_event
detection:
    selection:
        TargetFilename|startswith:
            - 'D:\'
            - 'E:\'
            - 'F:\'
    timeframe: 5m
    condition: selection | count() > 50
    level: high
```

## Related Documents
- [IR Framework](../Framework.en.md)
- [Sigma Rules Index](../../08_Detection_Engineering/README.md)
- [Data Exfiltration Playbook](Data_Exfiltration.en.md)
- [Insider Threat Playbook](Insider_Threat.en.md)
- [Lost Device Playbook](Lost_Device.en.md)
- [Data Handling Protocol](../../06_Operations_Management/Data_Handling_Protocol.en.md)

## References
- [MITRE T1091 вҖ” Replication Through Removable Media](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1091/)
- [USB Attack Taxonomy](https://www.usenix.org/conference/usenixsecurity16/technical-sessions/presentation/tischer)
- [NIST SP 800-53 вҖ” Media Protection](https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-53/rev-5/final)

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/USB_Removable_Media.th.md
# Playbook: аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮ USB / аёӘаё·а№Ҳаёӯаё–аёӯаё”а№„аё”а№ү

**ID**: PB-40
**аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ**: аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮвҖ“аёӘаё№аёҮ | **аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—**: Initial Access / Exfiltration
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1091](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1091/) (Replication Through Removable Media), [T1052.001](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1052/001/) (Exfiltration over USB), [T1200](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1200/) (Hardware Additions)
**Trigger**: DLP alert (USB copy), EDR (autorun execution), physical security (USB device а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё•), SIEM (mass file copy а№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ removable drive)

> вҡ пёҸ **аё„аёіа№Җаё•аё·аёӯаёҷ**: аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң USB аёӘаёІаёЎаёІаёЈаё–аёӘа№ҲаёҮ malware (Rubber Ducky, BadUSB), аёӮа№ӮаёЎаёўаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎа№Җаё„аёЈаё·аёӯаёӮа№ҲаёІаёў air-gapped а№„аё”а№ү аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІа№ҖаёӘаёөаёўаёҡ USB аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЈаё№а№үаёҲаёұаёҒа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡаёӯаёҮаё„а№ҢаёҒаёЈ

### аё аёІаёһаёЈаё§аёЎаё аёұаёўаё„аёёаёҒаё„аёІаёЎ USB

```mermaid
graph TD
    USB["рҹ”Ң аё аёұаёўаё„аёёаёҒаё„аёІаёЎ USB"] --> Malware["аёӘа№ҲаёҮ Malware"]
    USB --> Exfil["аёӮа№ӮаёЎаёўаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ"]
    USB --> HW["а№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө Hardware"]
    USB --> Bridge["а№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎ Air-Gap"]

    Malware --> Autorun["Autorun malware\nT1091"]
    Malware --> Rubber["Rubber Ducky\nHID injection"]
    Malware --> BadUSB["BadUSB\nFirmware exploit"]

    Exfil --> Copy["аё„аёұаё”аёҘаёӯаёҒа№„аёҹаёҘа№ҢаёҲаёіаёҷаё§аёҷаёЎаёІаёҒ\nT1052.001"]
    Exfil --> Encrypt["Encrypted container\nVeraCrypt"]

    HW --> Killer["USB Killer\nаё—аёіаёҘаёІаёў hardware"]
    HW --> Keylogger["USB Keylogger\nаёҲаёұаёҡ keystroke"]

    Bridge --> Stuxnet["а№Ғаёҡаёҡ Stuxnet\nа№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎ OT network"]

    style USB fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style Rubber fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style BadUSB fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style Killer fill:#660000,color:#fff
```

### аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№ҢаёҒаёІаёЈа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө USB

```mermaid
graph LR
    A["1пёҸвғЈ Social Engineering\nаё§аёІаёҮ USB а№ғаёҷаё—аёөа№ҲаёҲаёӯаё”аёЈаё–"] --> B["2пёҸвғЈ а№ҖаёӘаёөаёўаёҡаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң\nаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӯаёўаёІаёҒаёЈаё№а№ү"]
    B --> C["3пёҸвғЈ Payload аё—аёіаёҮаёІаёҷ\nAutorun/HID inject"]
    C --> D["4пёҸвғЈ Malware аё•аёҙаё”аё•аёұа№үаёҮ\nаёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ persistence"]
    D --> E["5пёҸвғЈ C2 Connection\nBeacon а№„аёӣаё«аёІаёңаё№а№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө"]
    E --> F["6пёҸвғЈ Lateral Movement\nCompromise а№Җаё„аёЈаё·аёӯаёӮа№ҲаёІаёў"]
    style A fill:#ffcc00,color:#000
    style C fill:#ff4444,color:#fff
    style F fill:#660000,color:#fff
```

---

## Decision Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёһаёҡаёҒаёҙаёҲаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎ USB"] --> Type{"аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—аёҒаёҙаёҲаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎ?"}
    Type -->|"аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңа№„аёЎа№ҲаёЈаё№а№үаёҲаёұаёҒа№ҖаёӘаёөаёўаёҡ"| Unknown["аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң\nHID? Storage? Network?"]
    Type -->|"аё„аёұаё”аёҘаёӯаёҒа№„аёҹаёҘа№ҢаёҲаёіаёҷаё§аёҷаёЎаёІаёҒ"| DLP["аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ DLP policy\nаёҒаёІаёЈа№Ӯаёӯаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё•?"]
    Type -->|"Autorun/execution аёҲаёІаёҒ USB"| Exec["рҹ”ҙ аёӯаёІаёҲа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ malware\nа№ҒаёўаёҒаё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө"]
    Unknown --> HID{"HID device?"}
    HID -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| Rubber["рҹ”ҙ аёӯаёІаёҲа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ Rubber Ducky\nаё–аёӯаё” USB аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө"]
    HID -->|"а№„аёЎа№Ҳ вҖ” Storage"| Authorized{"User & device а№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё•?"}
    Authorized -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| Policy["аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒ & аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаё•аёҙаё”аё•аёІаёЎ"]
    Authorized -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ| Block["Block & аёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ"]
    DLP --> Sensitive{"аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ?"}
    Sensitive -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| DLPBlock["рҹ”ҙ Block аёҒаёІаёЈа№Ӯаёӯаёҷ\nа№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ Data Protection"]
    Sensitive -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ| Review["аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаё§аёұаё•аё–аёёаёӣаёЈаё°аёӘаёҮаё„а№Ң\nаёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ audit"]
    Exec --> Isolate["а№ҒаёўаёҒ endpoint\nа№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ"]
    style Alert fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style Rubber fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style DLPBlock fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
```

### аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant DLP
    participant SOC as SOC Analyst
    participant IT as IT Security
    participant HR
    participant IR as IR Team

    DLP->>SOC: рҹҡЁ USB mass copy alert
    SOC->>SOC: аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ: а№ғаё„аёЈ аё„аёұаё”аёҘаёӯаёҒа№„аёҹаёҘа№Ңаёӯаё°а№„аёЈ а№ҖаёЎаё·а№Ҳаёӯа№„аё«аёЈа№Ҳ
    SOC->>IT: аё”аё¶аёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ USB device registry (VID/PID)
    IT->>SOC: аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң: USB drive аёӘа№Ҳаё§аёҷаё•аёұаё§
    SOC->>SOC: аёҲаёіа№ҒаёҷаёҒаёЈаё°аё”аёұаёҡаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚаёӮаёӯаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ
    SOC->>HR: а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ вҖ” аёӯаёІаёҲаёЎаёөаёҒаёІаёЈаёӮа№ӮаёЎаёўаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ
    SOC->>IR: Escalate аё–а№үаёІаёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ
    IR->>IT: аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҒаёҙаёҲаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎ USB аё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё”аёӮаёӯаёҮ user аёҷаёөа№ү (30 аё§аёұаёҷ)
```

### аёҒаёІаёЈаёҲаёіа№ҒаёҷаёҒаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң USB

```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph "рҹҹў аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёі"
        Mouse["USB Mouse\nStandard HID"]
        Keyboard["USB Keyboard\nStandard HID"]
        Headset["USB Headset\nAudio device"]
    end
    subgraph "рҹҹЎ аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ"
        Storage["USB Flash Drive\nMass storage"]
        ExtHDD["External HDD\nMass storage"]
        Phone["Smartphone\nMTP/PTP"]
    end
    subgraph "рҹ”ҙ аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаёӘаё№аёҮ"
        RubberDuck["Rubber Ducky\nHID + scripting"]
        BadUSBDev["BadUSB Device\nFirmware exploit"]
        WiFiPineapple["WiFi Pineapple\nNetwork bridge"]
        USBKiller["USB Killer\nPower surge"]
    end
    style RubberDuck fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style BadUSBDev fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style USBKiller fill:#660000,color:#fff
```

### аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ Data Exfiltration

```mermaid
graph TD
    Monitor["USB Monitoring"] --> Volume{"аёӣаёЈаёҙаёЎаёІаё“аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳа№Ӯаёӯаёҷ?"}
    Volume -->|"< 100MB"| Low["рҹҹў аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаё•а№Ҳаёі\nаёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒа№ҒаёҘаё°аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ"]
    Volume -->|"100MB - 1GB"| Med["рҹҹЎ аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ\nаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—а№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң"]
    Volume -->|"> 1GB"| High["рҹ”ҙ аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮаёӘаё№аёҮ\nаёӯаёІаёҲаёӮа№ӮаёЎаёўаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёҲаёіаёҷаё§аёҷаёЎаёІаёҒ"]
    High --> FileType{"аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—а№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң?"}
    FileType -->|"Source code, DB dumps"| Critical["рҹ’Җ аё§аёҙаёҒаёӨаё•\nаёӮа№ӮаёЎаёў IP"]
    FileType -->|"Documents, spreadsheets"| Breach["рҹ”ҙ Data breach\nаё•аёЈаё§аёҲ PII/PDPA"]
    FileType -->|"Media, presentations"| Review2["рҹҹЎ аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡаёҒаёұаёҡ user"]
    style Monitor fill:#333,color:#fff
    style Critical fill:#660000,color:#fff
```

### Timeline аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮ

```mermaid
gantt
    title USB Incident Response Timeline
    dateFormat HH:mm
    axisFormat %H:%M
    section Detection
        DLP/EDR alert          :a1, 00:00, 5min
        аёЈаё°аёҡаёёаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң & user    :a2, after a1, 10min
    section Containment
        Block USB device       :a3, after a2, 5min
        аёўаё¶аё”аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң            :a4, after a3, 30min
    section Investigation
        аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ңа№„аёҹаёҘа№Ңаё—аёөа№Ҳаё„аёұаё”аёҘаёӯаёҒ :a5, after a4, 60min
        аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӣаёЈаё°аё§аёұаё•аёҙ user      :a6, after a5, 60min
        аёҲаёіа№ҒаёҷаёҒаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ           :a7, after a6, 30min
    section Recovery
        аёҡаёұаёҮаё„аёұаёҡ policy          :a8, after a7, 60min
        аёӯаёҡаёЈаёЎ user             :a9, after a8, 30min
```

---

## 1. аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө (15 аёҷаёІаё—аёөа№ҒаёЈаёҒ)

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | аёңаё№а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҙаё”аёҠаёӯаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| 1 | аёЈаё°аёҡаёёаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң USB (VID/PID, аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—) | SOC T1 |
| 2 | аёЈаё°аёҡаёё user а№ҒаёҘаё° timestamp | SOC T1 |
| 3 | аё–а№үаёІ malware execution вҖ” а№ҒаёўаёҒ endpoint аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө | SOC T1 |
| 4 | аё–а№үаёІаёӮа№ӮаёЎаёўаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ вҖ” а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡ DLP logs | SOC T2 |
| 5 | аёўаё¶аё”аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң USB (chain of custody) | Physical Security |
| 6 | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаё§а№ҲаёІаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё•аё•аёІаёЎ policy аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ | SOC T2 |

## 2. аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ

### аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№ҢаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң
- [ ] USB device VID/PID (registry: `USBSTOR`)
- [ ] аё«аёЎаёІаёўа№ҖаёҘаёӮаёӢаёөа№ҖаёЈаёөаёўаёҘа№ҒаёҘаё°аёңаё№а№үаёңаёҘаёҙаё•
- [ ] Timestamp аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎаё•а№Ҳаёӯаё„аёЈаёұа№үаёҮа№ҒаёЈаёҒ
- [ ] а№Җаёӣа№ҮаёҷаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңаё—аёөа№ҲаёЈаё№а№үаёҲаёұаёҒ/а№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё•аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ?
- [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ Windows Event ID 6416 (аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңа№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳа№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎаё•а№Ҳаёӯ)

### аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№ҢаёҒаёІаёЈа№ӮаёӯаёҷаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ
- [ ] а№„аёҹаёҘа№Ңаёӯаё°а№„аёЈаё–аё№аёҒаё„аёұаё”аёҘаёӯаёҒа№„аёӣаёўаёұаёҮ USB?
- [ ] а№„аёҹаёҘа№Ңаёӯаё°а№„аёЈаё–аё№аёҒаё„аёұаё”аёҘаёӯаёҒаёҲаёІаёҒ USB?
- [ ] аёӣаёЈаёҙаёЎаёІаё“аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аёөа№Ҳа№Ӯаёӯаёҷаё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё”
- [ ] аёЎаёөа№„аёҹаёҘа№Ңаё—аёөа№ҲаёҲаёұаё”а№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ sensitive/confidential аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ?
- [ ] DLP logs аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈа№Ӯаёӯаёҷ

### аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң Malware (аё–а№үаёІаёЎаёө)
- [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ autorun.inf аёҡаёҷ USB
- [ ] аёӘа№ҒаёҒаёҷа№Җаёҷаё·а№үаёӯаё«аёІ USB аё”а№үаё§аёў AV аё«аёҘаёІаёўаё•аёұаё§
- [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲа№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң hidden/system
- [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲа№„аёҹаёҘа№Ң .lnk аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ .hta аёӯаёұаёҷаё•аёЈаёІаёў
- [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаё§а№ҲаёІаёЎаёө executables аёЈаёұаёҷаёҲаёІаёҒ USB аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ

## 3. аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ (Containment)

| аёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё• | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | аёЈаёІаёўаёҘаё°а№Җаёӯаёөаёўаё” |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ң** | аёўаё¶аё” USB | а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈ chain of custody |
| **Endpoint** | а№ҒаёўаёҒаё–а№үаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёў malware | EDR network isolation |
| **аёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө** | аёӣаёҙаё”аё–а№үаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёў insider threat | аёЈаёӯаёҒаёІаёЈаёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ |
| **Policy** | Block USB class аёҡаёҷ endpoint | GPO аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ EDR |

## 4. аёҒаёІаёЈаёҒаёіаёҲаёұаё”а№ҒаёҘаё°аёҒаё№а№үаё„аё·аёҷ

### аё–а№үаёІаёӘа№ҲаёҮ Malware
1. Reimage endpoint
2. аёӘа№ҒаёҒаёҷ file shares аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎаё•а№ҲаёӯаёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈа№ҒаёһаёЈа№ҲаёҒаёЈаё°аёҲаёІаёў
3. Block USB device class аёҡаёҷаё—аёёаёҒ endpoints
4. Deploy EDR signatures аё—аёөа№Ҳаёӯаёұаёӣа№Җаё”аё•

### аё–а№үаёІаёӮа№ӮаёЎаёўаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ
1. аёҲаёіа№ҒаёҷаёҒаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аёұа№үаёҮаё«аёЎаё”аё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаёӮа№ӮаёЎаёў
2. аёӣаёЈаё°а№ҖаёЎаёҙаёҷаёӮа№үаёӯаёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё”а№ҒаёҲа№үаёҮ PDPA/аёҒаёҺаё«аёЎаёІаёў
3. а№ҖаёҒа№Үаёҡа№Җаёҷаё·а№үаёӯаё«аёІ USB а№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷаё«аёҘаёұаёҒаёҗаёІаёҷ
4. аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡа№ҒаёҘаё°а№ҖаёӘаёЈаёҙаёЎ DLP policies

## 5. аё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң (Post-Incident)

### аёҡаё—а№ҖаёЈаёөаёўаёҷ
| аё„аёіаё–аёІаёЎ | аё„аёіаё•аёӯаёҡ |
|:---|:---|
| USB device policy аёҡаёұаёҮаё„аёұаёҡа№ғаёҠа№үаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | [а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ/а№„аёЎа№Ҳ] |
| DLP аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈа№Ӯаёӯаёҷа№„аё”а№үаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | [а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ/а№„аёЎа№Ҳ вҖ” аёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮаё§а№ҲаёІаёҮ?] |
| User а№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаёӯаёҡаёЈаёЎа№ҖаёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮ USB risks аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | [аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё°] |
| USB ports аёӣаёҙаё”аёҡаёҷаёЈаё°аёҡаёҡаёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | [аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё°] |

### аёЎаёІаё•аёЈаёҒаёІаёЈаёӣа№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёұаёҷ
- [ ] Deploy USB device control (whitelist а№ҖаёүаёһаёІаё°аёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңаё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёҷаёёаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ)
- [ ] а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” DLP аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ removable media
- [ ] аёӣаёҙаё” autorun/autoplay аёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ GPO
- [ ] аёӣаёҙаё” USB mass storage аёҡаёҷ workstations аёӘаёіаё„аёұаёҚ
- [ ] аёҲаёұаё”аё—аё”аёӘаёӯаёҡ USB drop test (security awareness)
- [ ] Deploy USB device auditing (Sysmon Event ID 1 + registry)

## 6. Detection Rules (Sigma)

```yaml
title: USB Mass Storage Device Connected
logsource:
    product: windows
    service: security
detection:
    selection:
        EventID: 6416
        ClassName: 'DiskDrive'
    condition: selection
    level: medium
```

```yaml
title: Mass File Copy to Removable Drive
logsource:
    product: windows
    category: file_event
detection:
    selection:
        TargetFilename|startswith:
            - 'D:\'
            - 'E:\'
            - 'F:\'
    timeframe: 5m
    condition: selection | count() > 50
    level: high
```

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ

## References
- [MITRE T1091 вҖ” Replication Through Removable Media](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1091/)
- [USB Attack Taxonomy](https://www.usenix.org/conference/usenixsecurity16/technical-sessions/presentation/tischer)
- [NIST SP 800-53 вҖ” Media Protection](https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-53/rev-5/final)

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Unauthorized_Scanning.en.md
# Playbook: Unauthorized Scanning / Reconnaissance Response

**ID**: PB-50
**Severity**: Medium | **Category**: Reconnaissance / Discovery
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1046](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1046/) (Network Service Discovery), [T1595](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1595/) (Active Scanning)
**Trigger**: IDS/IPS (port scan detection), firewall (repeated connection attempts), SIEM (network sweep from internal host), honeypot alert, external scan report

> вҡ пёҸ **NOTE**: Scanning is often the first phase of an attack. While scanning alone is not an incident, it indicates adversary interest and should drive proactive defense.

### Reconnaissance Attack Position

```mermaid
graph LR
    A["1пёҸвғЈ Scanning\nPort/service discovery"] --> B["2пёҸвғЈ Enumeration\nService versions/banners"]
    B --> C["3пёҸвғЈ Vulnerability Scan\nCVE identification"]
    C --> D["4пёҸвғЈ Exploitation\nGain access"]
    D --> E["5пёҸвғЈ Post-Exploit\nPersistence + lateral"]
    style A fill:#ffcc00,color:#000
    style C fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style D fill:#ff4444,color:#fff
    style E fill:#660000,color:#fff
```

### Scan Types and Risk

```mermaid
graph TD
    Scan["рҹ”Қ Scan Types"] --> Port["Port Scan\nTCP/UDP services"]
    Scan --> Vuln["Vulnerability Scan\nCVE matching"]
    Scan --> Web["Web Scan\nDirectory/file brute"]
    Scan --> DNS["DNS Enumeration\nSubdomain discovery"]
    Scan --> OSINT["OSINT\nShodan/Censys"]

    Port --> Risk1["рҹҹЎ Medium\nRecon indicator"]
    Vuln --> Risk2["рҹҹ  High\nExploitation imminent"]
    Web --> Risk3["рҹҹ  High\nApplication targeting"]
    DNS --> Risk4["рҹҹЎ Medium\nAsset mapping"]
    OSINT --> Risk5["рҹ”ө Low\nPassive вҖ” no direct scan"]

    style Scan fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style Risk2 fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style Risk3 fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
```

---

## Decision Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ Scanning Activity Detected"] --> Source{"Internal or External?"}
    Source -->|"External"| Ext["External IP scanning\nour perimeter"]
    Source -->|"Internal"| Int["Internal host scanning\nnetwork segments"]
    Ext --> Volume{"Volume/intent?"}
    Volume -->|"Low вҖ” few ports"| ExtLow["рҹҹЎ Monitor\nMay be legitimate scanner"]
    Volume -->|"High вҖ” sweep"| ExtHigh["рҹҹ  Block source IP\nCheck for vulnerability match"]
    Int --> Authorized{"Authorized scan?"}
    Authorized -->|"Yes вҖ” IT/pentest"| Close["Verify authorization\nClose alert"]
    Authorized -->|"No вҖ” Unknown"| Compromise["рҹ”ҙ Host may be compromised\nInvestigate immediately"]
    Compromise --> Isolate["Isolate scanning host\nCheck for malware"]
    style Alert fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style Compromise fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
```

### Investigation Workflow

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant IDS as IDS/Firewall
    participant SOC as SOC Analyst
    participant NetOps as Network Ops
    participant IT as IT Team
    participant IR as IR Team

    IDS->>SOC: рҹҡЁ Port scan detected from 10.1.2.50
    SOC->>SOC: Check: is this an authorized scan?
    SOC->>IT: Who owns 10.1.2.50? Any scheduled scans?
    IT->>SOC: Not authorized вҖ” desktop PC
    SOC->>NetOps: Isolate host at switch level
    SOC->>IR: Potential compromised host
    IR->>IR: EDR check for malware/C2
    IR->>SOC: Worm spreading via SMB вҖ” contain
```

### Common Scanning Tools

```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph "Legitimate/Dual-Use"
        T1["Nmap вҖ” port scanner"]
        T2["Nessus вҖ” vulnerability scanner"]
        T3["Masscan вҖ” fast port scanner"]
        T4["Nikto вҖ” web scanner"]
        T5["Dirbuster вҖ” directory enumeration"]
    end
    subgraph "Malware Scanning"
        M1["WannaCry вҖ” SMB scanning"]
        M2["Mirai вҖ” telnet/SSH scan"]
        M3["Emotet вҖ” internal recon"]
        M4["Cobalt Strike вҖ” network discovery"]
    end
    style M1 fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style M4 fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style T1 fill:#ff9900,color:#fff
```

### Scan Pattern Analysis

```mermaid
graph TD
    Pattern["Scan Pattern"] --> Horizontal["Horizontal Scan\nSame port, many hosts\nвҶ’ Worm/mass exploit"]
    Pattern --> Vertical["Vertical Scan\nMany ports, one host\nвҶ’ Targeted recon"]
    Pattern --> Sweep["Network Sweep\nMany ports, many hosts\nвҶ’ Internal recon"]
    Horizontal --> HRisk["рҹ”ҙ Likely automated\nMalware/worm"]
    Vertical --> VRisk["рҹҹ  Likely targeted\nAttacker profiling host"]
    Sweep --> SRisk["рҹ”ҙ Compromised host\nLateral movement prep"]
    style HRisk fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style SRisk fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style VRisk fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
```

### Response Timeline

```mermaid
gantt
    title Unauthorized Scanning Response
    dateFormat HH:mm
    axisFormat %H:%M
    section Detection
        IDS/FW alert           :a1, 00:00, 5min
        Verify authorization   :a2, after a1, 10min
    section Assessment
        Classify scan type     :a3, after a2, 10min
        Check source host      :a4, after a3, 15min
    section Response
        Block/isolate source   :a5, after a4, 5min
        Hunt for compromise    :a6, after a5, 60min
    section Remediation
        Patch exposed services :a7, after a6, 120min
```

---

## 1. Immediate Actions (First 15 Minutes)

| # | Action | Owner |
|:---|:---|:---|
| 1 | Identify scanning source (IP address, hostname) | SOC T1 |
| 2 | Determine: internal or external? Authorized or not? | SOC T1 |
| 3 | If unauthorized internal вҖ” isolate host immediately | NetOps |
| 4 | If external вҖ” block source IP at firewall | NetOps |
| 5 | Check what was scanned (ports, services, responses) | SOC T2 |
| 6 | Verify targeted services are patched | IT |

## 2. Investigation Checklist

### Scan Analysis
- [ ] Source IP address and geolocation/hostname
- [ ] Scan type: port scan, vulnerability scan, web scan?
- [ ] Scan pattern: horizontal, vertical, or sweep?
- [ ] Ports/services targeted
- [ ] Duration and volume of scan traffic
- [ ] Was any exploitation attempted after scanning?

### Internal Source
- [ ] What host is performing the scan?
- [ ] Is it an authorized security scan/pentest?
- [ ] Check EDR for malware or C2 on the scanning host
- [ ] Was the host recently compromised?
- [ ] Are other hosts in the same segment also scanning?

### External Source
- [ ] IP reputation check (AbuseIPDB, VirusTotal)
- [ ] Is it a known scanner (Shodan, Censys, legitimate)?
- [ ] Was exploration attempted after scanning?
- [ ] Are vulnerable services exposed?

## 3. Containment

| Scope | Action |
|:---|:---|
| **External source** | Block at firewall, report to ISP |
| **Internal source** | Isolate host, investigate for compromise |
| **Targeted services** | Verify patches, close unnecessary ports |
| **Network** | Review firewall rules, close gaps |

## 4. Post-Incident

| Question | Answer |
|:---|:---|
| Was the scan internal or external? | [Source] |
| Was it authorized (pentest/IT scan)? | [Yes/No] |
| Were any vulnerable services discovered? | [List] |
| Were exposed services patched? | [Status] |
| Are IDS scan detection rules tuned? | [Status] |

## 6. Detection Rules (Sigma)

```yaml
title: Internal Port Scan Detected
logsource:
    product: firewall
detection:
    selection:
        action: 'deny'
        direction: 'internal'
    timeframe: 5m
    condition: selection | count(dst_port) by src_ip > 20
    level: high
```

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/Unauthorized_Scanning.th.md
# Playbook: аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮ Unauthorized Scanning / Reconnaissance

**ID**: PB-50
**аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ**: аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ | **аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—**: Reconnaissance / Discovery
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1046](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1046/) (Network Service Discovery), [T1595](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1595/) (Active Scanning)
**Trigger**: IDS/IPS (аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёұаёҡ port scan), firewall (connection attempts аёӢа№үаёіа№Ҷ), SIEM (network sweep аёҲаёІаёҒ internal host), honeypot alert, аёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷ scan аё аёІаёўаёҷаёӯаёҒ

> вҡ пёҸ **аё«аёЎаёІаёўа№Җаё«аё•аёё**: Scanning аёЎаёұаёҒа№Җаёӣа№ҮаёҷаёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҒаёӮаёӯаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө а№ҒаёЎа№ү scanning а№ҖаёһаёөаёўаёҮаёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮа№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№Ҳа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң а№Ғаё•а№Ҳаёҡа№ҲаёҮаёҠаёөа№үаё–аё¶аёҮаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаёҷа№ғаёҲаёӮаёӯаёҮаёңаё№а№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөа№ҒаёҘаё°аё„аё§аёЈаёҒаёЈаё°аё•аёёа№үаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёӣа№үаёӯаёҮаёҒаёұаёҷа№ҖаёҠаёҙаёҮаёЈаёёаёҒ

### аё•аёіа№Ғаё«аёҷа№ҲаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө Reconnaissance

```mermaid
graph LR
    A["1пёҸвғЈ Scanning\nаё„а№үаёҷаё«аёІ port/service"] --> B["2пёҸвғЈ Enumeration\nService versions/banners"]
    B --> C["3пёҸвғЈ Vulnerability Scan\nаёЈаё°аёҡаёё CVE"]
    C --> D["4пёҸвғЈ Exploitation\nа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ"]
    D --> E["5пёҸвғЈ Post-Exploit\nPersistence + lateral"]
    style A fill:#ffcc00,color:#000
    style C fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style D fill:#ff4444,color:#fff
    style E fill:#660000,color:#fff
```

### аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё— Scan а№ҒаёҘаё°аё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ҖаёӘаёөа№ҲаёўаёҮ

```mermaid
graph TD
    Scan["рҹ”Қ аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё— Scan"] --> Port["Port Scan\nTCP/UDP services"]
    Scan --> Vuln["Vulnerability Scan\nCVE matching"]
    Scan --> Web["Web Scan\nDirectory/file brute"]
    Scan --> DNS["DNS Enumeration\nаё„а№үаёҷаё«аёІ subdomain"]
    Scan --> OSINT["OSINT\nShodan/Censys"]

    Port --> Risk1["рҹҹЎ аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ\nаё•аёұаё§аёҡа№ҲаёҮаёҠаёөа№ү recon"]
    Vuln --> Risk2["рҹҹ  аёӘаё№аёҮ\nExploitation а№ғаёҒаёҘа№үаёҲаё°а№ҖаёҒаёҙаё”"]
    Web --> Risk3["рҹҹ  аёӘаё№аёҮ\nаёЎаёёа№ҲаёҮа№Җаёӣа№үаёІ application"]
    DNS --> Risk4["рҹҹЎ аёӣаёІаёҷаёҒаёҘаёІаёҮ\nаё—аёіа№Ғаёңаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳ assets"]
    OSINT --> Risk5["рҹ”ө аё•а№Ҳаёі\nPassive вҖ” а№„аёЎа№Ҳ scan а№Ӯаё”аёўаё•аёЈаёҮ"]

    style Scan fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style Risk2 fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style Risk3 fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
```

---

## Decision Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёһаёҡ Scanning Activity"] --> Source{"аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаё аёІаёўаёҷаёӯаёҒ?"}
    Source -->|"аё аёІаёўаёҷаёӯаёҒ"| Ext["IP аё аёІаёўаёҷаёӯаёҒ scan\nperimeter аёӮаёӯаёҮа№ҖаёЈаёІ"]
    Source -->|"аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ"| Int["Host аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ scan\nnetwork segments"]
    Ext --> Volume{"аёӣаёЈаёҙаёЎаёІаё“/а№ҖаёҲаё•аёҷаёІ?"}
    Volume -->|"аё•а№Ҳаёі вҖ” ports аёҷа№үаёӯаёў"| ExtLow["рҹҹЎ аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаё•аёҙаё”аё•аёІаёЎ\nаёӯаёІаёҲа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ scanner аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ"]
    Volume -->|"аёӘаё№аёҮ вҖ” sweep"| ExtHigh["рҹҹ  Block source IP\nаё•аёЈаё§аёҲ vulnerability match"]
    Int --> Authorized{"Scan аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё•?"}
    Authorized -->|"а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ вҖ” IT/pentest"| Close["аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ authorization\nаёӣаёҙаё” alert"]
    Authorized -->|"а№„аёЎа№Ҳ вҖ” а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЈаё№а№үаёҲаёұаёҒ"| Compromise["рҹ”ҙ Host аёӯаёІаёҲаё–аё№аёҒ compromise\nаёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷаё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө"]
    Compromise --> Isolate["а№ҒаёўаёҒ scanning host\nаё•аёЈаё§аёҲ malware"]
    style Alert fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style Compromise fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
```

### аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant IDS as IDS/Firewall
    participant SOC as SOC Analyst
    participant NetOps as Network Ops
    participant IT as IT Team
    participant IR as IR Team

    IDS->>SOC: рҹҡЁ аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёһаёҡ port scan аёҲаёІаёҒ 10.1.2.50
    SOC->>SOC: аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ: а№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ authorized scan аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ?
    SOC->>IT: а№ғаё„аёЈа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷа№ҖаёҲа№үаёІаёӮаёӯаёҮ 10.1.2.50? аёЎаёө scan аё—аёөа№Ҳаёҷаёұаё”а№„аё§а№ү?
    IT->>SOC: а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё• вҖ” desktop PC
    SOC->>NetOps: а№ҒаёўаёҒ host аё—аёөа№Ҳ switch level
    SOC->>IR: Host аёӯаёІаёҲаё–аё№аёҒ compromise
    IR->>IR: EDR аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ malware/C2
    IR->>SOC: Worm а№ҒаёһаёЈа№ҲаёҒаёЈаё°аёҲаёІаёўаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ SMB вҖ” contain
```

### а№Җаё„аёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЎаё·аёӯ Scanning аё—аёөа№Ҳаёһаёҡаёҡа№Ҳаёӯаёў

```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph "аё–аё№аёҒаёҒаёҺаё«аёЎаёІаёў/а№ғаёҠа№үа№„аё”а№үаёӘаёӯаёҮаё—аёІаёҮ"
        T1["Nmap вҖ” port scanner"]
        T2["Nessus вҖ” vulnerability scanner"]
        T3["Masscan вҖ” fast port scanner"]
        T4["Nikto вҖ” web scanner"]
    end
    subgraph "Malware Scanning"
        M1["WannaCry вҖ” SMB scanning"]
        M2["Mirai вҖ” telnet/SSH scan"]
        M3["Emotet вҖ” internal recon"]
        M4["Cobalt Strike вҖ” network discovery"]
    end
    style M1 fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style M4 fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style T1 fill:#ff9900,color:#fff
```

### аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№ҢаёЈаё№аёӣа№Ғаёҡаёҡ Scan

```mermaid
graph TD
    Pattern["аёЈаё№аёӣа№Ғаёҡаёҡ Scan"] --> Horizontal["Horizontal Scan\nPort а№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§, аё«аёҘаёІаёў hosts\nвҶ’ Worm/mass exploit"]
    Pattern --> Vertical["Vertical Scan\nаё«аёҘаёІаёў ports, host а№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§\nвҶ’ Targeted recon"]
    Pattern --> Sweep["Network Sweep\nаё«аёҘаёІаёў ports, аё«аёҘаёІаёў hosts\nвҶ’ Internal recon"]
    Horizontal --> HRisk["рҹ”ҙ аёҷа№ҲаёІаёҲаё°аёӯаёұаё•а№ӮаёҷаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ\nMalware/worm"]
    Vertical --> VRisk["рҹҹ  аёҷа№ҲаёІаёҲаё° targeted\nаёңаё№а№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө profile host"]
    Sweep --> SRisk["рҹ”ҙ Host аё–аё№аёҒ compromise\nа№Җаё•аёЈаёөаёўаёЎ lateral movement"]
    style HRisk fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style SRisk fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style VRisk fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
```

### Timeline аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮ

```mermaid
gantt
    title Unauthorized Scanning Response
    dateFormat HH:mm
    axisFormat %H:%M
    section Detection
        IDS/FW alert           :a1, 00:00, 5min
        аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ authorization   :a2, after a1, 10min
    section Assessment
        аёҲаёіа№ҒаёҷаёҒаёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё— scan       :a3, after a2, 10min
        аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ source host       :a4, after a3, 15min
    section Response
        Block/а№ҒаёўаёҒ source       :a5, after a4, 5min
        Hunt for compromise    :a6, after a5, 60min
    section Remediation
        Patch exposed services :a7, after a6, 120min
```

## 1. аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө (15 аёҷаёІаё—аёөа№ҒаёЈаёҒ)

| # | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ | аёңаё№а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёңаёҙаё”аёҠаёӯаёҡ |
|:---|:---|:---|
| 1 | аёЈаё°аёҡаёёа№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮ scanning (IP address, hostname) | SOC T1 |
| 2 | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ: аё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаё аёІаёўаёҷаёӯаёҒ? а№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё•аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | SOC T1 |
| 3 | аё–а№үаёІаё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё• вҖ” а№ҒаёўаёҒ host аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө | NetOps |
| 4 | аё–а№үаёІаё аёІаёўаёҷаёӯаёҒ вҖ” block source IP аё—аёөа№Ҳ firewall | NetOps |
| 5 | аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаё§а№ҲаёІ scan аёӯаё°а№„аёЈ (ports, services, responses) | SOC T2 |
| 6 | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ targeted services а№„аё”а№ү patch а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§ | IT |

## 2. аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ

### аё§аёҙа№Җаё„аёЈаёІаё°аё«а№Ң Scan
- [ ] Source IP address а№ҒаёҘаё° geolocation/hostname
- [ ] аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—: port scan, vulnerability scan, web scan?
- [ ] аёЈаё№аёӣа№Ғаёҡаёҡ: horizontal, vertical, аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ sweep?
- [ ] Ports/services аё—аёөа№Ҳа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷа№Җаёӣа№үаёІаё«аёЎаёІаёў
- [ ] аёЈаё°аёўаё°а№Җаё§аёҘаёІа№ҒаёҘаё°аёӣаёЈаёҙаёЎаёІаё“ scan traffic
- [ ] аёЎаёөаёҒаёІаёЈаёһаёўаёІаёўаёІаёЎ exploit аё«аёҘаёұаёҮ scanning аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ?

### а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮ Internal
- [ ] Host а№„аё«аёҷаё—аёі scan?
- [ ] а№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ security scan/pentest аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё•аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ?
- [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ EDR аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ malware аё«аёЈаё·аёӯ C2 аёҡаёҷ scanning host
- [ ] Host аё–аё№аёҒ compromise а№ҖаёЈа№Үаё§а№Ҷ аёҷаёөа№үаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ?

## 3. аёҒаёІаёЈаё„аё§аёҡаё„аёёаёЎ (Containment)

| аёӮаёӯаёҡа№ҖаёӮаё• | аёҒаёІаёЈаё”аёіа№ҖаёҷаёҙаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈ |
|:---|:---|
| **а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮаё аёІаёўаёҷаёӯаёҒ** | Block аё—аёөа№Ҳ firewall, аёЈаёІаёўаёҮаёІаёҷ ISP |
| **а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮаё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ** | а№ҒаёўаёҒ host, аёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ compromise |
| **Services а№Җаёӣа№үаёІаё«аёЎаёІаёў** | аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ patches, аёӣаёҙаё” ports аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№ҲаёҲаёіа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ |
| **а№Җаё„аёЈаё·аёӯаёӮа№ҲаёІаёў** | аё—аёҡаё—аё§аёҷ firewall rules, аёӣаёҙаё”аёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Ӯаё«аё§а№Ҳ |

### аёҒаёІаёЈ Harden а№Җаё„аёЈаё·аёӯаёӮа№ҲаёІаёў
- [ ] аёӣаёҙаё” ports а№ҒаёҘаё° services аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аёЎа№ҲаёҲаёіа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ
- [ ] а№Җаёӣаёҙаё”а№ғаёҠа№ү rate limiting аёҡаёҷ firewall
- [ ] Deploy network-level IPS аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ scan detection
- [ ] аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ default credentials аёҡаёҷаёӯаёёаёӣаёҒаёЈаё“а№Ңа№Җаё„аёЈаё·аёӯаёӮа№ҲаёІаёў
- [ ] а№ғаёҠа№ү port knocking аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ management interfaces
- [ ] а№Җаёӣаёҙаё” flow logging аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ baseline traffic analysis
- [ ] аёҒаёіаё«аёҷаё” allowlists аёӘаёіаё«аёЈаёұаёҡ scanning IP аё—аёөа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё•

## 4. аё«аёҘаёұаёҮа№Җаё«аё•аёёаёҒаёІаёЈаё“а№Ң (Post-Incident)

| аё„аёіаё–аёІаёЎ | аё„аёіаё•аёӯаёҡ |
|:---|:---|
| Scan а№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷаё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷаё«аёЈаё·аёӯаё аёІаёўаёҷаёӯаёҒ? | [а№Ғаё«аёҘа№ҲаёҮ] |
| а№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё• (pentest/IT scan) аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | [а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ/а№„аёЎа№Ҳ] |
| аёһаёҡ vulnerable services аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | [аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈ] |
| Exposed services а№„аё”а№ү patch а№ҒаёҘа№үаё§аё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№„аёЎа№Ҳ? | [аёӘаё–аёІаёҷаё°] |

## 6. Detection Rules (Sigma)

```yaml
title: Internal Port Scan Detected
logsource:
    product: firewall
detection:
    selection:
        action: 'deny'
        direction: 'internal'
    timeframe: 5m
    condition: selection | count(dst_port) by src_ip > 20
    level: high
```

## а№ҖаёӯаёҒаёӘаёІаёЈаё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҖаёҒаёөа№Ҳаёўаё§аёӮа№үаёӯаёҮ
- [Exploit Playbook](Exploit.th.md)
- [Lateral Movement Playbook](Lateral_Movement.th.md)
- [Malware Infection Playbook](Malware_Infection.th.md)

## References
- [MITRE T1046 вҖ” Network Service Discovery](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1046/)
- [MITRE T1595 вҖ” Active Scanning](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1595/)


---

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/VPN_Abuse.en.md
# Playbook: VPN Abuse / Unauthorized VPN Access

**ID**: PB-41
**Severity**: High | **Category**: Initial Access / Persistence
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1133](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1133/) (External Remote Services), [T1078](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1078/) (Valid Accounts)
**Trigger**: SIEM alert (VPN login from unusual location), impossible travel, brute force on VPN portal, compromised VPN credentials on dark web

> вҡ пёҸ **WARNING**: VPN access provides direct internal network access. A compromised VPN session is equivalent to an attacker sitting on your LAN.

### VPN Threat Landscape

```mermaid
graph TD
    VPN["рҹ”’ VPN Threats"] --> CredTheft["Credential Theft"]
    VPN --> Vuln["VPN Vulnerability"]
    VPN --> Split["Split Tunneling Abuse"]
    VPN --> Session["Session Hijacking"]

    CredTheft --> Phish["Phishing for VPN creds"]
    CredTheft --> Dark["Credentials on dark web"]
    CredTheft --> Brute["Brute force / spray"]

    Vuln --> CVE["CVE exploitation\nPulse Secure, FortiGate"]
    Vuln --> ZeroDay["Zero-day in VPN appliance"]

    Split --> Exfil["Data exfil via split tunnel"]
    Split --> Pivot["Pivot to internal network"]

    style VPN fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style CVE fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style ZeroDay fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
```

### VPN Attack Chain

```mermaid
graph LR
    A["1пёҸвғЈ Credential Theft\nPhishing/Dark web"] --> B["2пёҸвғЈ VPN Auth\nValid credentials"]
    B --> C["3пёҸвғЈ Internal Access\nNetwork recon"]
    C --> D["4пёҸвғЈ Lateral Movement\nRDP/SMB/WMI"]
    D --> E["5пёҸвғЈ Persistence\nBackdoor account"]
    E --> F["6пёҸвғЈ Exfiltration\nData theft"]
    style A fill:#ffcc00,color:#000
    style B fill:#ff9900,color:#fff
    style D fill:#ff4444,color:#fff
    style F fill:#660000,color:#fff
```

---

## Decision Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ Suspicious VPN Activity"] --> Type{"Alert type?"}
    Type -->|"Unusual location"| Geo["Check GeoIP\nProxy/VPN/Tor?"]
    Type -->|"Impossible travel"| Travel["Compare with last login\nPhysically possible?"]
    Type -->|"Brute force"| BF["Check failed attempts\nSource IP reputation"]
    Type -->|"After hours access"| Hours["Check user schedule\nOn-call roster?"]
    Geo --> Legit{"Legitimate travel?"}
    Travel --> Legit
    BF --> Threshold{"Threshold exceeded?"}
    Hours --> Legit
    Legit -->|"No вҖ” Suspicious"| Verify["рҹ“һ Call user to verify"]
    Legit -->|"Yes вҖ” Expected"| Log["Log & monitor"]
    Threshold -->|"Yes > 10 failures"| Block["рҹ”ҙ Block source IP"]
    Verify --> Confirmed{"User confirms?"}
    Confirmed -->|"No вҖ” Not them"| Contain["рҹ”ҙ CONTAIN\nRevoke VPN session"]
    Confirmed -->|"Yes вҖ” Legitimate"| Close["Close alert"]
    style Alert fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style Contain fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
```

### Investigation Process

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant SIEM
    participant SOC as SOC Analyst
    participant VPN as VPN Admin
    participant User
    participant IR as IR Team

    SIEM->>SOC: рҹҡЁ VPN anomaly detected
    SOC->>VPN: Pull session logs (IP, duration, bandwidth)
    SOC->>SOC: GeoIP check + impossible travel calc
    SOC->>User: рҹ“һ Phone call verification
    User->>SOC: "That wasn't me!"
    SOC->>VPN: Terminate active session immediately
    SOC->>IR: Escalate вҖ” compromised VPN credentials
    IR->>VPN: Reset user credentials + revoke MFA token
    IR->>SOC: Hunt for lateral movement during session
```

### VPN Session Risk Scoring

```mermaid
graph TD
    Score["Risk Score Calculation"] --> Geo{"GeoIP unusual?"}
    Geo -->|Yes| G["+ 30 points"]
    Geo -->|No| G0["+ 0"]
    Score --> Time{"Outside business hours?"}
    Time -->|Yes| T["+ 20 points"]
    Time -->|No| T0["+ 0"]
    Score --> Duration{"Session > 8 hours?"}
    Duration -->|Yes| D["+ 15 points"]
    Duration -->|No| D0["+ 0"]
    Score --> BW{"High bandwidth?"}
    BW -->|Yes| B["+ 25 points"]
    BW -->|No| B0["+ 0"]
    Score --> MFA{"MFA bypassed?"}
    MFA -->|Yes| M["+ 50 points рҹ”ҙ"]
    MFA -->|No| M0["+ 0"]
    G --> Total["Total Score"]
    T --> Total
    D --> Total
    B --> Total
    M --> Total
    style Score fill:#333,color:#fff
    style M fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
```

### Response Timeline

```mermaid
gantt
    title VPN Abuse Response Timeline
    dateFormat HH:mm
    axisFormat %H:%M
    section Detection
        SIEM alert              :a1, 00:00, 5min
        GeoIP + travel analysis :a2, after a1, 10min
    section Verification
        Contact user            :a3, after a2, 15min
        Confirm unauthorized    :a4, after a3, 5min
    section Containment
        Kill VPN session        :a5, after a4, 2min
        Reset credentials       :a6, after a5, 10min
    section Investigation
        Session activity audit  :a7, after a6, 60min
        Lateral movement hunt   :a8, after a7, 120min
    section Recovery
        New credentials         :a9, after a8, 30min
```

### VPN Appliance Vulnerability Check

```mermaid
graph TD
    subgraph "Critical VPN CVEs to Monitor"
        CVE1["CVE-2024-21762\nFortiOS RCE"]
        CVE2["CVE-2023-46805\nIvanti Connect Secure"]
        CVE3["CVE-2021-22893\nPulse Secure RCE"]
        CVE4["CVE-2020-5902\nF5 BIG-IP"]
        CVE5["CVE-2023-20269\nCisco ASA/FTD"]
    end
    style CVE1 fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style CVE2 fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style CVE3 fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
```

---

## 1. Immediate Actions (First 15 Minutes)

| # | Action | Owner |
|:---|:---|:---|
| 1 | Identify suspicious VPN session (user, IP, duration) | SOC T1 |
| 2 | GeoIP + impossible travel analysis | SOC T1 |
| 3 | Contact user via phone for verification | SOC T1 |
| 4 | If unauthorized вҖ” kill VPN session immediately | VPN Admin |
| 5 | Reset user password and revoke MFA token | IAM Team |
| 6 | Check for activity during unauthorized session | SOC T2 |

## 2. Investigation Checklist

### VPN Session Analysis
- [ ] Source IP address and GeoIP location
- [ ] Session start/end time and duration
- [ ] Bandwidth consumed (unusual data transfer?)
- [ ] VPN client version and device fingerprint
- [ ] MFA method used (was it bypassed?)
- [ ] Concurrent sessions (user logged in from 2 locations?)

### Network Activity During Session
- [ ] Internal hosts accessed during VPN session
- [ ] File shares mounted or accessed
- [ ] RDP/SSH sessions initiated
- [ ] DNS queries made (internal reconnaissance?)
- [ ] Data volume transferred (exfiltration indicator)

### Credential Investigation
- [ ] Check dark web/paste sites for credential exposure
- [ ] Review password change history
- [ ] Check if same credentials used elsewhere (password reuse)
- [ ] Review MFA enrollment/changes

## 2.1 Evidence Checklist

| Evidence Type | What to Collect | Source | Why It Matters |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Session evidence | Source IP, GeoIP, session start/end, duration, bandwidth, device fingerprint | VPN logs / SIEM | Confirms whether the session behavior fits expected user behavior |
| Identity evidence | Username, group membership, MFA method, token changes, lockout/reset history | IAM / IdP | Determines privilege level and whether identity controls failed |
| Network activity evidence | Internal hosts accessed, RDP/SSH, DNS, file-share activity, transfer volume | Firewall / VPN / NDR / DNS / NetFlow | Shows what the attacker did after access was granted |
| Appliance evidence | VPN admin actions, config changes, patch level, exploit indicators | VPN admin console / syslog | Determines whether abuse was credential-based or appliance-based |
| User verification evidence | Call notes, travel context, business justification, device ownership | Ticket / call log | Supports false-positive closure and defensible escalation |

## 2.2 Minimum Telemetry Required

| Telemetry Source | Required For | Priority | Blind Spot If Missing |
|:---|:---|:---:|:---|
| VPN authentication and session logs | User, source IP, duration, concurrent sessions, protocol details | Required | Cannot confirm the suspicious session or attribute it correctly |
| IAM and MFA telemetry | Token resets, MFA changes, account state, risk signals | Required | Cannot tell whether identity protections were bypassed or changed |
| Network and DNS telemetry | Internal access, lateral movement, exfiltration indicators | Required | Post-login attacker activity remains largely invisible |
| VPN appliance logs and vulnerability state | Admin changes, exploit traces, version/CVE exposure | Required | Cannot distinguish credential abuse from VPN appliance compromise |
| Asset, user schedule, and ticket context | On-call status, travel, approved remote work exceptions | Recommended | Benign after-hours or travel events may be over-escalated |

## 2.3 False Positive and Tuning Guide

| Scenario | Why It Looks Suspicious | How to Validate | Tuning Action | Escalate If |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Legitimate user travel or remote work | New country or after-hours access may resemble session theft | Confirm itinerary, manager approval, device compliance, and MFA success | Tune geo and time-of-day logic for approved travel/remote-work patterns | Concurrent sessions, high-risk geo, or unusual internal activity follows |
| Corporate VPN exit or roaming carrier change | Source IP changes quickly and breaks simple location logic | Validate carrier/VPN ASN and normal device fingerprint | Tune ASN-aware impossible-travel logic instead of raw country checks | MFA changes or different device fingerprint appears |
| On-call or emergency access | Night/weekend login can look malicious | Confirm on-call roster, incident ticket, and accessed systems | Lower severity for approved on-call identities and windows | Access scope exceeds job need or includes privileged movement |
| Security or network testing | Scanner or red-team use of VPN may look abusive | Validate source, window, and owner | Allowlist approved test accounts and source ranges only | Activity reaches production data or uses stolen user credentials |

## 3. Containment

| Scope | Action | Details |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **VPN Session** | Terminate immediately | Kill active session |
| **Credentials** | Reset password + MFA | New token enrollment |
| **Source IP** | Block at perimeter | Firewall rule |
| **Internal access** | Review and revoke | File shares, RDP |

## 4. Eradication & Recovery

1. Force password reset for affected account
2. Re-enroll MFA (new device/token)
3. Review all systems accessed during unauthorized session
4. Check for persistence (new accounts, scheduled tasks, backdoors)
5. Patch VPN appliance if vulnerability exploited

## 5. Post-Incident

### Lessons Learned
| Question | Answer |
|:---|:---|
| How were VPN credentials compromised? | [Phishing/dark web/reuse] |
| Was MFA enabled and enforced? | [Yes/No] |
| Did anomaly detection trigger promptly? | [Time to detect] |
| Was split tunneling policy appropriate? | [Review] |

## 6. Detection Rules (Sigma)

```yaml
title: VPN Login from Unusual Country
logsource:
    product: vpn
detection:
    selection:
        action: 'login_success'
    filter:
        src_country|contains:
            - 'TH'
            - 'US'
            - 'SG'
    condition: selection and not filter
    level: high
```

## Related Documents
- [IR Framework](../Framework.en.md)
- [Sigma Rules Index](../../08_Detection_Engineering/README.md)
- [Account Compromise Playbook](Account_Compromise.en.md)
- [Impossible Travel Playbook](Impossible_Travel.en.md)
- [Brute Force Playbook](Brute_Force.en.md)
- [Tier 1 Runbook](../Runbooks/Tier1_Runbook.en.md)

## References
- [MITRE T1133 вҖ” External Remote Services](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1133/)
- [CISA вҖ” VPN Security](https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories)

## File: 05_Incident_Response/Playbooks/VPN_Abuse.th.md
# Playbook: аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮ VPN Abuse / аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮ VPN а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё•

**ID**: PB-41
**аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёЈаёёаёҷа№ҒаёЈаёҮ**: аёӘаё№аёҮ | **аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё—**: Initial Access / Persistence
**MITRE ATT&CK**: [T1133](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1133/) (External Remote Services), [T1078](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1078/) (Valid Accounts)
**Trigger**: SIEM alert (VPN login аёҲаёІаёҒаё•аёіа№Ғаё«аёҷа№ҲаёҮаёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ), impossible travel, brute force аёҡаёҷ VPN portal, VPN credentials аё–аё№аёҒа№Җаёӣаёҙаё”а№Җаёңаёўаёҡаёҷ dark web

> вҡ пёҸ **аё„аёіа№Җаё•аё·аёӯаёҷ**: VPN access а№ғаё«а№үаёӘаёҙаё—аёҳаёҙа№Ңа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮа№Җаё„аёЈаё·аёӯаёӮа№ҲаёІаёўаё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷа№Ӯаё”аёўаё•аёЈаёҮ VPN session аё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөа№Җаё—а№ҲаёІаёҒаёұаёҡаёңаё№а№үа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёөаёҷаёұа№ҲаёҮаёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳаёҡаёҷ LAN аёӮаёӯаёҮаёӯаёҮаё„а№ҢаёҒаёЈ

### аё аёІаёһаёЈаё§аёЎаё аёұаёўаё„аёёаёҒаё„аёІаёЎ VPN

```mermaid
graph TD
    VPN["рҹ”’ аё аёұаёўаё„аёёаёҒаё„аёІаёЎ VPN"] --> CredTheft["аёӮа№ӮаёЎаёў Credential"]
    VPN --> Vuln["аёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Ӯаё«аё§а№Ҳ VPN"]
    VPN --> Split["Split Tunneling Abuse"]
    VPN --> Session["Session Hijacking"]

    CredTheft --> Phish["Phishing а№ҖаёӯаёІ VPN creds"]
    CredTheft --> Dark["Credentials аёҡаёҷ dark web"]
    CredTheft --> Brute["Brute force / spray"]

    Vuln --> CVE["CVE exploitation\nPulse Secure, FortiGate"]
    Vuln --> ZeroDay["Zero-day а№ғаёҷ VPN appliance"]

    Split --> Exfil["Exfil аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ split tunnel"]
    Split --> Pivot["Pivot а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІа№Җаё„аёЈаё·аёӯаёӮа№ҲаёІаёўаё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ"]

    style VPN fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style CVE fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
    style ZeroDay fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
```

### VPN Attack Chain

```mermaid
graph LR
    A["1пёҸвғЈ аёӮа№ӮаёЎаёў Credential\nPhishing/Dark web"] --> B["2пёҸвғЈ VPN Auth\nCredentials аё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ"]
    B --> C["3пёҸвғЈ а№ҖаёӮа№үаёІаё–аё¶аёҮаё аёІаёўа№ғаёҷ\nNetwork recon"]
    C --> D["4пёҸвғЈ Lateral Movement\nRDP/SMB/WMI"]
    D --> E["5пёҸвғЈ Persistence\nаёҡаёұаёҚаёҠаёө backdoor"]
    E --> F["6пёҸвғЈ аёӮа№ӮаёЎаёўаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ\nData theft"]
    style A fill:#ffcc00,color:#000
    style B fill:#ff9900,color:#fff
    style D fill:#ff4444,color:#fff
    style F fill:#660000,color:#fff
```

---

## Decision Flow

```mermaid
graph TD
    Alert["рҹҡЁ аёҒаёҙаёҲаёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎ VPN аёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ"] --> Type{"аёӣаёЈаё°а№Җаё аё— alert?"}
    Type -->|"аё•аёіа№Ғаё«аёҷа№ҲаёҮаёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ"| Geo["аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ GeoIP\nProxy/VPN/Tor?"]
    Type -->|"Impossible travel"| Travel["а№ҖаёӣаёЈаёөаёўаёҡа№Җаё—аёөаёўаёҡаёҒаёұаёҡ last login\nа№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷа№„аёӣа№„аё”а№үаё—аёІаёҮаёҒаёІаёўаё аёІаёһ?"]
    Type -->|"Brute force"| BF["аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёҲаёіаёҷаё§аёҷ failed attempts\nSource IP reputation"]
    Type -->|"аёҷаёӯаёҒа№Җаё§аёҘаёІаё—аёіаёҮаёІаёҷ"| Hours["аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаё•аёІаёЈаёІаёҮ user\nOn-call roster?"]
    Geo --> Legit{"а№Җаё”аёҙаёҷаё—аёІаёҮаёҲаёЈаёҙаёҮ?"}
    Travel --> Legit
    BF --> Threshold{"а№ҖаёҒаёҙаёҷ threshold?"}
    Hours --> Legit
    Legit -->|"а№„аёЎа№Ҳ вҖ” аёҷа№ҲаёІаёӘаёҮаёӘаёұаёў"| Verify["рҹ“һ а№Ӯаё—аёЈаё«аёІ user аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ"]
    Legit -->|"а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ вҖ” аё„аёІаё”аё«аё§аёұаёҮ"| Log["аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒ & аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаё•аёҙаё”аё•аёІаёЎ"]
    Threshold -->|"а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ > 10 failures"| Block["рҹ”ҙ Block source IP"]
    Verify --> Confirmed{"User аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ?"}
    Confirmed -->|"а№„аёЎа№Ҳ вҖ” а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№Ҳа№ҖаёӮаёІ"| Contain["рҹ”ҙ CONTAIN\nRevoke VPN session"]
    Confirmed -->|"а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ вҖ” аё–аё№аёҒаё•а№үаёӯаёҮ"| Close["аёӣаёҙаё” alert"]
    style Alert fill:#ff6600,color:#fff
    style Contain fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
```

### аёӮаёұа№үаёҷаё•аёӯаёҷаёҒаёІаёЈаёӘаё·аёҡаёӘаё§аёҷ

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant SIEM
    participant SOC as SOC Analyst
    participant VPN as VPN Admin
    participant User
    participant IR as IR Team

    SIEM->>SOC: рҹҡЁ аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёһаёҡ VPN anomaly
    SOC->>VPN: аё”аё¶аёҮ session logs (IP, duration, bandwidth)
    SOC->>SOC: GeoIP check + аё„аёіаёҷаё§аё“ impossible travel
    SOC->>User: рҹ“һ а№Ӯаё—аёЈаёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷ
    User->>SOC: "а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№ғаёҠа№ҲаёңаёЎ!"
    SOC->>VPN: аё•аёұаё” active session аё—аёұаёҷаё—аёө
    SOC->>IR: Escalate вҖ” VPN credentials аё–аё№аёҒа№ӮаёҲаёЎаё•аёө
    IR->>VPN: Reset credentials + revoke MFA token
    IR->>SOC: Hunt lateral movement аёЈаё°аё«аё§а№ҲаёІаёҮ session
```

### VPN Session Risk Scoring

```mermaid
graph TD
    Score["аё„аёіаёҷаё§аё“ Risk Score"] --> Geo{"GeoIP аёңаёҙаё”аёӣаёҒаё•аёҙ?"}
    Geo -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| G["+ 30 аё„аё°а№Ғаёҷаёҷ"]
    Geo -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ| G0["+ 0"]
    Score --> Time{"аёҷаёӯаёҒа№Җаё§аёҘаёІаё—аёіаёҮаёІаёҷ?"}
    Time -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| T["+ 20 аё„аё°а№Ғаёҷаёҷ"]
    Time -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ| T0["+ 0"]
    Score --> Duration{"Session > 8 аёҠаёЎ.?"}
    Duration -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| D["+ 15 аё„аё°а№Ғаёҷаёҷ"]
    Duration -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ| D0["+ 0"]
    Score --> BW{"Bandwidth аёӘаё№аёҮ?"}
    BW -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| B["+ 25 аё„аё°а№Ғаёҷаёҷ"]
    BW -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ| B0["+ 0"]
    Score --> MFA{"MFA аё–аё№аёҒ bypass?"}
    MFA -->|а№ғаёҠа№Ҳ| M["+ 50 аё„аё°а№Ғаёҷаёҷ рҹ”ҙ"]
    MFA -->|а№„аёЎа№Ҳ| M0["+ 0"]
    G --> Total["аё„аё°а№ҒаёҷаёҷаёЈаё§аёЎ"]
    T --> Total
    D --> Total
    B --> Total
    M --> Total
    style Score fill:#333,color:#fff
    style M fill:#cc0000,color:#fff
```

### Timeline аёҒаёІаёЈаё•аёӯаёҡаёӘаёҷаёӯаёҮ

```mermaid
gantt
    title VPN Abuse Response Timeline
    dateFormat HH:mm
    axisFormat %H:%M
    section Detection
        SIEM alert              :a1, 00:00, 5min
        GeoIP + travel analysis :a2, after a1, 10min
    section Verification
        аё•аёҙаё”аё•а№Ҳаёӯ user             :a3, after a2, 15min
        аёўаё·аёҷаёўаёұаёҷа№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№үаёЈаёұаёҡаёӯаёҷаёёаёҚаёІаё•   :a4, after a3, 5min
    section Containment
        Kill VPN session        :a5, after a4, 2min
        Reset credentials       :a6, after a5, 10min
    section Investigation
        аё•аёЈаё§аёҲ session activity   :a7, after a6, 60min
        Hunt lateral movement   :a8, after a7, 120min
    section Recovery
        Credentials а№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳ        :a9, after a8, 30min
```

### аёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮа№Ӯаё«аё§а№Ҳ VPN Appliance аё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮаё•аёЈаё§аёҲ

    subgraph "Critical VPN CVEs"
